title: Self-Calibrating Language Models via Test-Time Discriminative Distillation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are systematically overconfident: they routinely express high certainty on questions they often answer incorrectly. Existing calibration methods either require labeled validation data, degrade under distribution shifts, or incur substantial inference costs. Recent work has shown that LLMs already contain a better-calibrated signal than the one they verbalize: the token probability of "True" when the model is asked "Is this answer correct?" ($P(\text{True})$) consistently outperforms their stated confidence, a gap that is theoretically grounded as generative error is lower-bounded by roughly twice the corresponding discriminative error. We introduce $\textbf{SECL}$ ($\textbf{SE}$lf-$\textbf{C}$alibrating $\textbf{L}$anguage Models), a test-time training (TTT) pipeline that exploits this gap as label-free self-supervision, requiring no labeled data or human supervision. SECL adapts only when the input distribution shifts, training on just 6--26% of the question stream at lower cost than the baseline it distills from. Across four small language models from three model families and four diverse domains, SECL reduces Expected Calibration Error (ECE) by 56--78%, outperforming its own supervision signal and matching or outperforming recent inference-time methods. SECL is the first method to apply TTT to calibration; seven ablations covering signal quality, gating strategy, weight accumulation, loss design, domain ordering, hyperparameter sensitivity, and layer selection confirm that each component is crucial and robust across configurations. Code: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/secl-emnlp26-submission-C890

AI.tldr: SECL是一种无需标注数据的自校准方法，利用LLMs内部"True"概率与口头置信度之间的差距作为自监督信号，通过测试时训练实现校准，显著降低校准误差。
AI.motivation: 现有LLMs存在系统性过度自信问题，现有校准方法需要标注数据、在分布偏移下性能下降或推理成本高。研究发现LLMs内部"True"概率信号比口头置信度更准确，这为无监督校准提供了理论基础。
AI.method: SECL利用LLMs内部"True"概率与口头置信度之间的差距作为自监督信号，采用测试时训练(TTT)框架，仅在输入分布变化时进行适应，训练成本低(仅需6-26%的问题流)。
AI.result: 在4个小语言模型、3个模型家族、4个不同领域上，SECL将预期校准误差(ECE)降低了56-78%，优于其自身的监督信号，匹配或超越最近的推理时方法。
AI.conclusion: SECL是首个将测试时训练应用于校准的方法，通过7个消融实验验证了各组件的重要性和鲁棒性，为LLMs的无监督校准提供了有效解决方案。

title: Toward Generalized Cross-Lingual Hateful Language Detection with Web-Scale Data and Ensemble LLM Annotations
summary: We study whether large-scale unlabelled web data and LLM-based synthetic annotations can improve multilingual hate speech detection. Starting from texts crawled via OpenWebSearch.eu~(OWS) in four languages (English, German, Spanish, Vietnamese), we pursue two complementary strategies. First, we apply continued pre-training to BERT models by continuing masked language modelling on unlabelled OWS texts before supervised fine-tuning, and show that this yields an average macro-F1 gain of approximately 3% over standard baselines across sixteen benchmarks, with stronger gains in low-resource settings. Second, we use four open-source LLMs (Mistral-7B, Llama3.1-8B, Gemma2-9B, Qwen2.5-14B) to produce synthetic annotations through three ensemble strategies: mean averaging, majority voting, and a LightGBM meta-learner. The LightGBM ensemble consistently outperforms the other strategies. Fine-tuning on these synthetic labels substantially benefits a small model (Llama3.2-1B: +11% pooled F1), but provides only a modest gain for the larger Qwen2.5-14B (+0.6%). Our results indicate that the combination of web-scale unlabelled data and LLM-ensemble annotations is the most valuable for smaller models and low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 大规模无标签网络数据和LLM合成标注可提升多语言仇恨言论检测，对小型模型和低资源语言效果显著
AI.motivation: 研究如何利用大规模无标签网络数据和LLM生成的合成标注来改进多语言仇恨言论检测，特别是在低资源语言和小型模型场景下
AI.method: 采用两种互补策略：1) 对BERT模型进行持续预训练，在无标签网络数据上进行掩码语言建模后再进行监督微调；2) 使用四种开源LLM通过三种集成策略（均值平均、多数投票、LightGBM元学习器）生成合成标注
AI.result: 持续预训练使平均macro-F1提升约3%，在低资源场景下效果更明显；LightGBM集成策略表现最佳；合成标注对小型模型（Llama3.2-1B）提升11% F1，但对大型模型（Qwen2.5-14B）仅提升0.6%
AI.conclusion: 网络规模无标签数据与LLM集成标注的组合对小型模型和低资源语言最有价值，为资源受限场景下的多语言NLP任务提供了有效解决方案

title: HumorGen: Cognitive Synergy for Humor Generation in Large Language Models via Persona-Based Distillation
summary: Humor generation poses a significant challenge for Large Language Models (LLMs), because their standard training objective - predicting the most likely next word - inherently conflicts with the surprise and incongruity needed for comedy. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Cognitive Synergy Framework, a theoretically grounded methodology for generating high-quality humor data inspired by psychological theories of humor. Utilizing a Mixture-of-Thought (MoT) approach, we deploy six cognitive personas (e.g., The Absurdist, The Cynic) to synthesize diverse comedic perspectives for a given prompt. This framework creates a theoretically grounded dataset, which we use to fine-tune a 7B-parameter student model. We compare Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) and a novel Offline Group Relative Policy Optimization (O-GRPO); our 7B model significantly outperforms larger instruction-tuned baselines and achieves performance competitive with state-of-the-art proprietary models. We find that cognitive-driven data curation is far more critical than alignment algorithms or model scale for humor generation. Code and data will be available upon publication.

AI.tldr: 论文提出认知协同框架，通过混合思维方法和六种认知角色生成高质量幽默数据，用于微调7B模型，在幽默生成任务上超越更大模型并达到与专有模型竞争的水平。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型的标准训练目标（预测最可能的下一个词）与幽默所需的惊喜和矛盾性存在固有冲突，导致LLMs在幽默生成方面表现不佳。需要理论指导的方法来生成高质量幽默数据。
AI.method: 提出认知协同框架，采用混合思维方法部署六种认知角色（如荒诞主义者、愤世嫉俗者）为给定提示合成多样化的喜剧视角。使用该框架创建理论指导的数据集，用于微调7B参数的学生模型。比较了直接偏好优化和新型离线组相对策略优化方法。
AI.result: 7B模型显著优于更大的指令调优基线模型，并在幽默生成任务上达到与最先进的专有模型竞争的性能。研究发现认知驱动的数据策划比对齐算法或模型规模对幽默生成更为关键。
AI.conclusion: 认知协同框架通过理论指导的幽默数据生成方法有效解决了LLMs在幽默生成方面的挑战，证明了认知驱动数据策划的重要性，为特定领域的LLM能力提升提供了新思路。

title: Generating High Quality Synthetic Data for Dutch Medical Conversations
comment: Accepted to LREC 2026. This publication was supported by the MediSpeech project funded by ITEA4 under contract number 22032
summary: Medical conversations offer insights into clinical communication often absent from Electronic Health Records. However, developing reliable clinical Natural Language Processing (NLP) models is hampered by the scarcity of domain-specific datasets, as clinical data are typically inaccessible due to privacy and ethical constraints. To address these challenges, we present a pipeline for generating synthetic Dutch medical dialogues using a Dutch fine-tuned Large Language Model, with real medical conversations serving as linguistic and structural reference. The generated dialogues were evaluated through quantitative metrics and qualitative review by native speakers and medical practitioners. Quantitative analysis revealed strong lexical variety and overly regular turn-taking, suggesting scripted rather than natural conversation flow. Qualitative review produced slightly below-average scores, with raters noting issues in domain specificity and natural expression. The limited correlation between quantitative and qualitative results highlights that numerical metrics alone cannot fully capture linguistic quality. Our findings demonstrate that generating synthetic Dutch medical dialogues is feasible but requires domain knowledge and carefully structured prompting to balance naturalness and structure in conversation. This work provides a foundation for expanding Dutch clinical NLP resources through ethically generated synthetic data.

AI.tldr: 使用荷兰语微调LLM生成合成荷兰医疗对话的流程，通过定量指标和专家定性评估验证可行性，但发现自然度和领域特异性仍需改进
AI.motivation: 解决临床NLP模型开发中领域特定数据集稀缺的问题，特别是荷兰语医疗对话数据因隐私和伦理限制难以获取，希望通过合成数据方法扩展临床NLP资源
AI.method: 提出生成合成荷兰医疗对话的流程：使用荷兰语微调的大型语言模型，以真实医疗对话作为语言和结构参考，通过定量指标（词汇多样性、话轮转换）和定性评估（母语者和医疗从业者评审）进行验证
AI.result: 定量分析显示强词汇多样性但话轮转换过于规律（类似脚本而非自然对话），定性评估得分略低于平均水平，评审者指出领域特异性和自然表达存在问题，定量与定性结果相关性有限
AI.conclusion: 生成合成荷兰医疗对话可行，但需要领域知识和精心设计的提示来平衡对话的自然性和结构，数值指标不能完全捕捉语言质量，为通过伦理生成的合成数据扩展荷兰临床NLP资源奠定基础

title: The Diffusion-Attention Connection
summary: Transformers, diffusion-maps, and magnetic Laplacians are usually treated as separate tools; we show they are all different regimes of a single Markov geometry built from pre-softmax query-scores. We define a QK "bidivergence" whose exponentiated and normalized forms yield attention, diffusion-maps, and magnetic diffusion. And use product of experts and Schrödinger-bridges to connect and organize them into equilibrium, nonequilibrium steady-state, and driven dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了Transformer注意力机制、扩散映射和磁拉普拉斯算子之间的统一数学框架，它们都是基于预softmax查询分数的马尔可夫几何的不同表现形式。
AI.motivation: 当前Transformer注意力机制、扩散映射和磁拉普拉斯算子通常被视为独立的数学工具，但作者发现它们实际上共享相同的数学基础，希望通过统一的框架来理解和连接这些看似不同的方法。
AI.method: 定义了QK"双向散度"，通过指数化和归一化得到注意力、扩散映射和磁扩散。使用专家乘积和薛定谔桥将这些方法组织成平衡态、非平衡稳态和驱动动力学三种状态。
AI.result: 建立了统一的数学框架，将Transformer注意力、扩散映射和磁拉普拉斯算子表示为同一马尔可夫几何的不同状态，揭示了它们之间的内在联系。
AI.conclusion: 这些看似不同的数学工具实际上是同一基础框架的不同表现形式，这一统一视角有助于深入理解Transformer架构的数学本质，并为模型设计提供新的思路。

title: 3D Multi-View Stylization with Pose-Free Correspondences Matching for Robust 3D Geometry Preservation
summary:
Artistic style transfer is well studied for images and videos, but extending it to multi-view 3D scenes remains difficult because stylization can disrupt correspondences needed by geometry-aware pipelines. Independent per-view stylization often causes texture drift, warped edges, and inconsistent shading, degrading SLAM, depth prediction, and multi-view reconstruction. This thesis addresses multi-view stylization that remains usable for downstream 3D tasks without assuming camera poses or an explicit 3D representation during training.
  We introduce a feed-forward stylization network trained with per-scene test-time optimization under a composite objective coupling appearance transfer with geometry preservation. Stylization is driven by an AdaIN-inspired loss from a frozen VGG-19 encoder, matching channel-wise moments to a style image. To stabilize structure across viewpoints, we propose a correspondence-based consistency loss using SuperPoint and SuperGlue, constraining descriptors from a stylized anchor view to remain consistent with matched descriptors from the original multi-view set. We also impose a depth-preservation loss using MiDaS/DPT and use global color alignment to reduce depth-model domain shift. A staged weight schedule introduces geometry and depth constraints.
  We evaluate on Tanks and Temples and Mip-NeRF 360 using image and reconstruction metrics. Style adherence and structure retention are measured by Color Histogram Distance (CHD) and Structure Distance (DSD). For 3D consistency, we use monocular DROID-SLAM trajectories and symmetric Chamfer distance on back-projected point clouds. Across ablations, correspondence and depth regularization reduce structural distortion and improve SLAM stability and reconstructed geometry; on scenes with MuVieCAST baselines, our method yields stronger trajectory and point-cloud consistency while maintaining competitive stylization.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种多视角3D场景风格化方法，通过几何保持约束确保风格化后的图像仍可用于下游3D任务（如SLAM、深度预测和重建），无需相机位姿或显式3D表示。
AI.motivation: 多视角3D场景的艺术风格化面临挑战：独立视角风格化会导致纹理漂移、边缘扭曲和光照不一致，破坏几何对应关系，从而影响SLAM、深度预测和多视角重建等下游3D任务。需要一种既能保持艺术风格又能维持几何一致性的方法。
AI.method: 提出前馈风格化网络，采用逐场景测试时优化。使用AdaIN风格损失进行外观迁移，通过SuperPoint和SuperGlue构建对应关系一致性损失来稳定跨视角结构，使用MiDaS/DPT深度保持损失，并采用全局颜色对齐减少域偏移。采用分阶段权重调度引入几何和深度约束。
AI.result: 在Tanks and Temples和Mip-NeRF 360数据集上评估，使用颜色直方图距离和结构距离衡量风格保持与结构保留。对应关系和深度正则化减少了结构失真，提高了SLAM稳定性和重建几何质量。与MuVieCAST基线相比，该方法在保持竞争性风格化的同时，提供了更强的轨迹和点云一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了多视角3D场景的风格化，同时保持了足够的几何一致性以支持下游3D任务，无需依赖相机位姿或显式3D表示，为艺术风格化与3D计算机视觉的结合提供了有效解决方案。

title: LABBench2: An Improved Benchmark for AI Systems Performing Biology Research
summary: Optimism for accelerating scientific discovery with AI continues to grow. Current applications of AI in scientific research range from training dedicated foundation models on scientific data to agentic autonomous hypothesis generation systems to AI-driven autonomous labs. The need to measure progress of AI systems in scientific domains correspondingly must not only accelerate, but increasingly shift focus to more real-world capabilities. Beyond rote knowledge and even just reasoning to actually measuring the ability to perform meaningful work. Prior work introduced the Language Agent Biology Benchmark LAB-Bench as an initial attempt at measuring these abilities. Here we introduce an evolution of that benchmark, LABBench2, for measuring real-world capabilities of AI systems performing useful scientific tasks. LABBench2 comprises nearly 1,900 tasks and is, for the most part, a continuation of LAB-Bench, measuring similar capabilities but in more realistic contexts. We evaluate performance of current frontier models, and show that while abilities measured by LAB-Bench and LABBench2 have improved substantially, LABBench2 provides a meaningful jump in difficulty (model-specific accuracy differences range from -26% to -46% across subtasks) and underscores continued room for performance improvement. LABBench2 continues the legacy of LAB-Bench as a de facto benchmark for AI scientific research capabilities and we hope that it continues to help advance development of AI tools for these core research functions. To facilitate community use and development, we provide the task dataset at https://huggingface.co/datasets/futurehouse/labbench2 and a public eval harness at https://github.com/EdisonScientific/labbench2.

AI.tldr: LABBench2是LAB-Bench的进化版，包含近1900个任务，用于评估AI系统在科学领域的真实能力，难度显著提升，模型准确率下降26-46%
AI.motivation: 随着AI在科学发现中的应用日益增长，需要从简单的知识记忆和推理评估转向测量AI系统执行实际科学工作的真实能力。LAB-Bench2旨在提供更贴近现实的科学任务评估框架。
AI.method: 在LAB-Bench基础上扩展，构建包含近1900个任务的基准测试集，任务设计更贴近真实科学工作场景。提供公开数据集和评估工具链。
AI.result: 当前前沿模型在LABBench2上的表现相比LAB-Bench显著下降，各子任务准确率差异在-26%到-46%之间，表明新基准难度大幅提升，仍有很大改进空间。
AI.conclusion: LABBench2作为AI科学能力评估的新标准，提供了更有挑战性的测试环境，有助于推动AI科学工具的发展，促进AI在真实科学工作中的实际应用。

title: GIANTS: Generative Insight Anticipation from Scientific Literature
summary: Scientific breakthroughs often emerge from synthesizing prior ideas into novel contributions. While language models (LMs) show promise in scientific discovery, their ability to perform this targeted, literature-grounded synthesis remains underexplored. We introduce insight anticipation, a generation task in which a model predicts a downstream paper's core insight from its foundational parent papers. To evaluate this capability, we develop GiantsBench, a benchmark of 17k examples across eight scientific domains, where each example consists of a set of parent papers paired with the core insight of a downstream paper. We evaluate models using an LM judge that scores similarity between generated and ground-truth insights, and show that these similarity scores correlate with expert human ratings. Finally, we present GIANTS-4B, an LM trained via reinforcement learning (RL) to optimize insight anticipation using these similarity scores as a proxy reward. Despite its smaller open-source architecture, GIANTS-4B outperforms proprietary baselines and generalizes to unseen domains, achieving a 34% relative improvement in similarity score over gemini-3-pro. Human evaluations further show that GIANTS-4B produces insights that are more conceptually clear than those of the base model. In addition, SciJudge-30B, a third-party model trained to compare research abstracts by likely citation impact, predicts that insights generated by GIANTS-4B are more likely to lead to higher citations, preferring them over the base model in 68% of pairwise comparisons. We release our code, benchmark, and model to support future research in automated scientific discovery.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"洞察预测"任务，让模型根据父论文预测下游论文的核心洞察，构建GiantsBench基准，并通过强化学习训练GIANTS-4B模型，在科学发现合成方面超越更大模型。
AI.motivation: 科学突破通常源于对先前思想的综合创新。虽然语言模型在科学发现中显示出潜力，但它们在执行这种有针对性的、基于文献的综合能力方面仍未得到充分探索。研究旨在评估和提升模型从现有文献中预测新科学洞察的能力。
AI.method: 1) 提出"洞察预测"任务：根据父论文预测下游论文的核心洞察；2) 构建GiantsBench基准：包含8个科学领域的17k个示例；3) 使用LM评判器评估生成洞察与真实洞察的相似性；4) 通过强化学习训练GIANTS-4B模型，以相似性分数作为代理奖励进行优化。
AI.result: 1) GIANTS-4B在相似性分数上相对gemini-3-pro提升34%；2) 模型能够泛化到未见过的科学领域；3) 人类评估显示GIANTS-4B生成的洞察比基础模型更概念清晰；4) SciJudge-30B预测GIANTS-4B生成的洞察更可能获得高引用率，在68%的成对比较中更受青睐。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了语言模型在科学发现综合任务中的潜力，通过强化学习训练的小型开源模型能够超越更大的专有模型，为自动化科学发现提供了新的评估框架和模型方法。

title: Fairboard: a quantitative framework for equity assessment of healthcare models
comment: 30 pages, 6 figures, 109 extended data figures (ancillary file)
summary: Despite there now being more than 1,000 FDA-authorised AI medical devices, formal equity assessments -- whether model performance is uniform across patient subgroups -- are rare. Here, we evaluate the equity of 18 open-source brain tumour segmentation models across 648 glioma patients from two independent datasets (n = 11,664 model inferences) along distinct univariate, Bayesian multivariate, spatial, and representational dimensions. We find that patient identity consistently explains more performance variance than model choice, with clinical factors, including molecular diagnosis, tumour grade, and extent of resection, predicting segmentation accuracy more strongly than model architecture. A voxel-wise spatial meta-analysis identifies neuroanatomically localised biases that are compartment-specific yet often consistent across models. Within a high-dimensional latent space of lesion masks and clinic-demographic features, model performance clusters significantly, indicating that the patient feature space contains axes of algorithmic vulnerability. Although newer models tend toward greater equity, none provide a formal fairness guarantee. Lastly, we release Fairboard, an open-source, no-code dashboard that lowers barriers to equitable model monitoring in medical imaging.

AI.tldr: 评估18个开源脑肿瘤分割模型在648名胶质瘤患者中的公平性，发现患者身份比模型选择更能解释性能差异，临床因素比模型架构更能预测分割准确性，并开发了Fairboard公平性监测工具。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有超过1000个FDA授权的AI医疗设备，但正式的公平性评估（模型性能在不同患者亚组中是否一致）仍然很少。本研究旨在评估脑肿瘤分割模型的公平性，揭示算法在不同患者群体中的性能差异。
AI.method: 使用两个独立数据集（648名胶质瘤患者，共11,664次模型推断），从单变量、贝叶斯多变量、空间和表示学习四个维度评估18个开源脑肿瘤分割模型的公平性。包括临床因素（分子诊断、肿瘤分级、切除范围）分析、空间元分析和高维潜在空间聚类分析。
AI.result: 1) 患者身份比模型选择更能解释性能方差；2) 临床因素比模型架构更能预测分割准确性；3) 空间元分析发现神经解剖定位偏差，这些偏差具有区域特异性但在不同模型中一致；4) 在高维潜在空间中，模型性能显著聚类，表明患者特征空间存在算法脆弱性轴；5) 新模型趋向更公平，但都没有提供正式的公平性保证。
AI.conclusion: 脑肿瘤分割模型存在系统性公平性问题，患者特征比模型设计对性能影响更大。需要正式的公平性评估和保证机制。作者发布了Fairboard开源工具，降低医疗影像中公平性监测的门槛。

title: PA-SFM: Tracker-free differentiable acoustic radiation for freehand 3D photoacoustic imaging
summary: Three-dimensional (3D) handheld photoacoustic tomography typically relies on bulky and expensive external positioning sensors to correct motion artifacts, which severely limits its clinical flexibility and accessibility. To address this challenge, we present PA-SFM, a tracker-free framework that leverages exclusively single-modality photoacoustic data for both sensor pose recovery and high-fidelity 3D reconstruction via differentiable acoustic radiation modeling. Unlike traditional structure-from-motion (SFM) methods based on visual features, PA-SFM integrates the acoustic wave equation into a differentiable programming pipeline. By leveraging a high-performance, GPU-accelerated acoustic radiation kernel, the framework simultaneously optimizes the 3D photoacoustic source distribution and the sensor array pose via gradient descent. To ensure robust convergence in freehand scenarios, we introduce a coarse-to-fine optimization strategy that incorporates geometric consistency checks and rigid-body constraints to eliminate motion outliers. We validated the proposed method through both numerical simulations and in-vivo rat experiments. The results demonstrate that PA-SFM achieves sub-millimeter positioning accuracy and restores high-resolution 3D vascular structures comparable to ground-truth benchmarks, offering a low-cost, software-defined solution for clinical freehand photoacoustic imaging. The source code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/JaegerCQ/PA-SFM}{https://github.com/JaegerCQ/PA-SFM}.

AI.tldr: PA-SFM提出了一种无跟踪器的三维手持光声成像框架，仅使用单模态光声数据通过可微分声辐射建模实现传感器姿态恢复和高保真3D重建。
AI.motivation: 传统3D手持光声成像依赖笨重昂贵的外部定位传感器来校正运动伪影，限制了临床灵活性和可及性。需要一种仅使用光声数据的低成本解决方案。
AI.method: 将声波方程集成到可微分编程流程中，使用GPU加速的声辐射核同时优化3D光声源分布和传感器阵列姿态。采用由粗到细的优化策略，包含几何一致性检查和刚体约束以消除运动异常值。
AI.result: 数值模拟和活体大鼠实验验证表明，PA-SFM实现了亚毫米级定位精度，恢复了与基准相当的高分辨率3D血管结构。
AI.conclusion: PA-SFM为临床自由手光声成像提供了一种低成本、软件定义的解决方案，无需外部跟踪传感器。

title: Linear Programming for Multi-Criteria Assessment with Cardinal and Ordinal Data: A Pessimistic Virtual Gap Analysis
summary: Multi-criteria Analysis (MCA) is used to rank alternatives based on various criteria. Key MCA methods, such as Multiple Criteria Decision Making (MCDM) methods, estimate parameters for criteria to compute the performance of each alternative. Nonetheless, subjective evaluations and biases frequently influence the reliability of results, while the diversity of data affects the precision of the parameters. The novel linear programming-based Virtual Gap Analysis (VGA) models tackle these issues. This paper outlines a two-step method that integrates two novel VGA models to assess each alternative from a pessimistic perspective, using both quantitative and qualitative criteria, and employing cardinal and ordinal data. Next, prioritize the alternatives to eliminate the least favorable one. The proposed method is dependable and scalable, enabling thorough assessments efficiently and effectively within decision support systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于线性规划的虚拟差距分析（VGA）方法，用于多准则决策分析，通过悲观视角评估备选方案，结合定量/定性准则和基数/序数数据，提高决策可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统多准则分析方法存在主观评估偏差和数据多样性影响参数精度的问题，需要更可靠、可扩展的决策支持方法。
AI.method: 采用两步法：1）整合两种新型VGA模型，从悲观视角评估每个备选方案；2）优先排序并淘汰最不利方案。支持定量/定性准则和基数/序数数据。
AI.result: 提出的方法可靠且可扩展，能够在决策支持系统中高效有效地进行综合评估。
AI.conclusion: VGA方法能够解决传统MCDM方法中的主观偏差和数据多样性问题，提供更可靠的决策支持。

title: Claim2Vec: Embedding Fact-Check Claims for Multilingual Similarity and Clustering
summary: Recurrent claims present a major challenge for automated fact-checking systems designed to combat misinformation, especially in multilingual settings. While tasks such as claim matching and fact-checked claim retrieval aim to address this problem by linking claim pairs, the broader challenge of effectively representing groups of similar claims that can be resolved with the same fact-check via claim clustering remains relatively underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce Claim2Vec, the first multilingual embedding model optimized to represent fact-check claims as vectors in an improved semantic embedding space. We fine-tune a multilingual encoder using contrastive learning with similar multilingual claim pairs. Experiments on the claim clustering task using three datasets, 14 multilingual embedding models, and 7 clustering algorithms demonstrate that Claim2Vec significantly improves clustering performance. Specifically, it enhances both cluster label alignment and the geometric structure of the embedding space across different cluster configurations. Our multilingual analysis shows that clusters containing multiple languages benefit from fine-tuning, demonstrating cross-lingual knowledge transfer.

AI.tldr: Claim2Vec：首个针对事实核查声明的多语言嵌入模型，通过对比学习优化语义嵌入空间，显著提升声明聚类性能
AI.motivation: 重复声明是多语言环境下自动化事实核查系统面临的主要挑战。虽然声明匹配和事实核查声明检索任务试图通过链接声明对来解决这个问题，但更广泛的挑战——如何有效表示可通过相同事实核查解决的相似声明群组（即声明聚类）——仍然相对未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出Claim2Vec模型，这是首个针对事实核查声明优化的多语言嵌入模型。使用相似多语言声明对，通过对比学习对多语言编码器进行微调，以改进语义嵌入空间中的向量表示。
AI.result: 在三个数据集、14个多语言嵌入模型和7种聚类算法上的实验表明，Claim2Vec显著提升了聚类性能。具体来说，它在不同聚类配置下改善了聚类标签对齐和嵌入空间的几何结构。多语言分析显示，包含多种语言的聚类从微调中受益，证明了跨语言知识迁移。
AI.conclusion: Claim2Vec为多语言事实核查声明提供了有效的嵌入表示，通过改进的语义嵌入空间显著提升了声明聚类性能，并展示了跨语言知识迁移的能力。

title: Deliberative Alignment is Deep, but Uncertainty Remains: Inference time safety improvement in reasoning via attribution of unsafe behavior to base model
summary: While the wide adoption of refusal training in large language models (LLMs) has showcased improvements in model safety, recent works have highlighted shortcomings due to the shallow nature of these alignment methods. To this end, the work on Deliberative alignment proposed distilling reasoning capabilities from stronger reasoning models, thereby instilling deeper safety in LLMs. In this work, we study the impact of deliberative alignment in language models. First, we show that despite being larger in model size and stronger in safety capability, there exists an alignment gap between teacher and student language models, which affects both the safety and general utility of the student model. Furthermore, we show that models aligned through deliberative alignment can retain unsafe behaviors from the base model despite learning the reasoning patterns of larger reasoning models. Building upon this observation, we propose a BoN sampling method that attributes the unsafe behavior back to the base LLMs in the latent space, thereby down-ranking unsafe responses to gain a meaningful improvement in model safety across multiple safety benchmarks with minimal loss in utility. In particular, across 7 teacher models and 6 student models of different classes and sizes, we show an average attack success rate (ASR) reduction of 28.2% in DAN, 31.3% in WildJailbreak and 35.4 % in StrongREJECT benchmarks. We further show that these safety gains prevail post RL training, thus highlighting the uncertainty in safety reasoning and it's explicit attribution to the base model.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了审议对齐在语言模型中的影响，发现教师与学生模型之间存在对齐差距，并提出了一种BoN采样方法来归因不安全行为，显著提升了模型安全性。
AI.motivation: 尽管拒绝训练在LLM安全方面取得了一定成效，但现有对齐方法较为浅层。审议对齐通过从更强的推理模型蒸馏推理能力来植入更深层次的安全性，但其实际效果和局限性需要深入研究。
AI.method: 1) 分析审议对齐中教师与学生模型之间的对齐差距；2) 发现对齐后的模型仍可能保留基础模型的不安全行为；3) 提出BoN采样方法，在潜在空间中将不安全行为归因于基础LLM，从而降级不安全响应。
AI.result: 在7个教师模型和6个学生模型中，平均攻击成功率显著降低：DAN基准降低28.2%，WildJailbreak降低31.3%，StrongREJECT降低35.4%。安全增益在RL训练后仍能保持，且对模型实用性影响最小。
AI.conclusion: 审议对齐存在局限性，教师与学生模型之间存在对齐差距。提出的BoN采样方法能有效归因不安全行为到基础模型，显著提升模型安全性，同时保持实用性，且安全增益在后续训练中具有持续性。

title: TRACE: Thermal Recognition Attentive-Framework for CO2 Emissions from Livestock
summary: Quantifying exhaled CO2 from free-roaming cattle is both a direct indicator of rumen metabolic state and a prerequisite for farm-scale carbon accounting, yet no existing system can deliver continuous, spatially resolved measurements without physical confinement or contact. We present TRACE (Thermal Recognition Attentive-Framework for CO2 Emissions from Livestock), the first unified framework to jointly address per-frame CO2 plume segmentation and clip-level emission flux classification from mid-wave infrared (MWIR) thermal video. TRACE contributes three domain-specific advances: a Thermal Gas-Aware Attention (TGAA) encoder that incorporates per-pixel gas intensity as a spatial supervisory signal to direct self-attention toward high-emission regions at each encoder stage; an Attention-based Temporal Fusion (ATF) module that captures breath-cycle dynamics through structured cross-frame attention for sequence-level flux classification; and a four-stage progressive training curriculum that couples both objectives while preventing gradient interference. Benchmarked against fifteen state-of-the-art models on the CO2 Farm Thermal Gas Dataset, TRACE achieves an mIoU of 0.998 and the best result on every segmentation and classification metric simultaneously, outperforming domain-specific gas segmenters with several times more parameters and surpassing all baselines in flux classification. Ablation studies confirm that each component is individually essential: gas-conditioned attention alone determines precise plume boundary localization, and temporal reasoning is indispensable for flux-level discrimination. TRACE establishes a practical path toward non-invasive, continuous, per-animal CO2 monitoring from overhead thermal cameras at commercial scale. Codes are available at https://github.com/taminulislam/trace.

AI.tldr: TRACE是一个用于从热红外视频中检测牛群CO2排放的统一框架，通过热气体感知注意力机制和时序融合模块，实现了高精度的CO2羽流分割和排放通量分类。
AI.motivation: 现有系统无法在不物理限制或接触的情况下实现连续、空间分辨的牛群CO2排放测量，而这对监测瘤胃代谢状态和农场碳核算至关重要。
AI.method: 提出了TRACE框架，包含三个核心创新：1）热气体感知注意力编码器，利用像素级气体强度作为空间监督信号；2）基于注意力的时序融合模块，捕捉呼吸周期动态；3）四阶段渐进式训练课程，防止梯度干扰。
AI.result: 在CO2农场热气体数据集上，TRACE在15个SOTA模型中取得最佳性能，mIoU达到0.998，在所有分割和分类指标上均优于基线模型，包括参数量更大的领域专用气体分割器。
AI.conclusion: TRACE为非侵入式、连续、个体化的牛群CO2监测提供了实用路径，每个组件对性能都至关重要，特别是气体条件注意力对羽流边界定位和时序推理对通量分类的贡献。

title: Seven simple steps for log analysis in AI systems
summary: AI systems produce large volumes of logs as they interact with tools and users. Analysing these logs can help understand model capabilities, propensities, and behaviours, or assess whether an evaluation worked as intended. Researchers have started developing methods for log analysis, but a standardised approach is still missing. Here we suggest a pipeline based on current best practices. We illustrate it with concrete code examples in the Inspect Scout library, provide detailed guidance on each step, and highlight common pitfalls. Our framework provides researchers with a foundation for rigorous and reproducible log analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于最佳实践的标准化日志分析框架，通过Inspect Scout库提供具体代码示例和详细指导，帮助研究人员进行严谨可复现的AI系统日志分析。
AI.motivation: AI系统在与工具和用户交互时会产生大量日志，分析这些日志有助于理解模型能力、倾向和行为，或评估实验是否按预期进行。目前研究人员已开始开发日志分析方法，但缺乏标准化方法。
AI.method: 提出基于当前最佳实践的标准化日志分析流程，开发Inspect Scout库提供具体代码实现，包括日志收集、处理、分析和可视化等步骤，并提供详细指导和常见陷阱说明。
AI.result: 建立了一个系统化的日志分析框架，使研究人员能够进行严谨且可复现的日志分析，通过具体代码示例和详细指导降低了日志分析的门槛。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为AI系统日志分析提供了标准化基础，有助于提升模型评估、能力分析和行为理解的研究质量，促进更严谨和可复现的AI研究实践。

title: Spoiler Alert: Narrative Forecasting as a Metric for Tension in LLM Storytelling
summary: LLMs have so far failed both to generate consistently compelling stories and to recognize this failure--on the leading creative-writing benchmark (EQ-Bench), LLM judges rank zero-shot AI stories above New Yorker short stories, a gold standard for literary fiction. We argue that existing rubrics overlook a key dimension of compelling human stories: narrative tension. We introduce the 100-Endings metric, which walks through a story sentence by sentence: at each position, a model predicts how the story will end 100 times given only the text so far, and we measure tension as how often predictions fail to match the ground truth. Beyond the mismatch rate, the sentence-level curve yields complementary statistics, such as inflection rate, a geometric measure of how frequently the curve reverses direction, tracking twists and revelations. Unlike rubric-based judges, 100-Endings correctly ranks New Yorker stories far above LLM outputs. Grounded in narratological principles, we design a story-generation pipeline using structural constraints, including analysis of story templates, idea formulation, and narrative scaffolding. Our pipeline significantly increases narrative tension as measured by the 100-Endings metric, while maintaining performance on the EQ-Bench leaderboard.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了100-Endings指标来衡量故事叙事张力，发现LLM在故事创作中缺乏张力感知，并设计了基于叙事约束的故事生成管道来提升张力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在故事创作中既无法生成有吸引力的故事，也无法识别这种失败。现有评估指标忽略了叙事张力这一关键维度，导致LLM评委将AI故事排在《纽约客》短篇小说之上。
AI.method: 1) 提出100-Endings指标：逐句预测故事100种可能结局，通过预测与真实结局的匹配率衡量张力；2) 设计故事生成管道：基于叙事学原理，包括故事模板分析、构思制定和叙事脚手架等结构约束。
AI.result: 100-Endings指标能正确将《纽约客》故事排在LLM输出之上，而基于量规的评委则错误评估。生成管道显著提升了叙事张力，同时在EQ-Bench排行榜上保持性能。
AI.conclusion: 叙事张力是故事吸引力的关键维度，100-Endings指标能有效评估故事质量，基于结构约束的生成方法能提升LLM的故事创作能力。

title: Human-like Working Memory Interference in Large Language Models
summary: Intelligent systems must maintain and manipulate task-relevant information online to adapt to dynamic environments and changing goals. This capacity, known as working memory, is fundamental to human reasoning and intelligence. Despite having on the order of 100 billion neurons, both biological and artificial systems exhibit limitations in working memory. This raises a key question: why do large language models (LLMs) show such limitations, given that transformers have full access to prior context through attention? We find that although a two-layer transformer can be trained to solve working memory tasks perfectly, a diverse set of pretrained LLMs continues to show working memory limitations. Notably, LLMs reproduce interference signatures observed in humans: performance degrades with increasing memory load and is biased by recency and stimulus statistics. Across models, stronger working memory capacity correlates with broader competence on standard benchmarks, mirroring its link to general intelligence in humans. Yet despite substantial variability in working memory performance, LLMs surprisingly converge on a common computational mechanism. Rather than directly copying the relevant memory item from context, models encode multiple memory items in entangled representations, such that successful recall depends on interference control -- actively suppressing task-irrelevant content to isolate the target for readout. Moreover, a targeted intervention that suppresses stimulus content information improves performance, providing causal support for representational interference. Together, these findings identify representational interference as a core constraint on working memory in pretrained LLMs, suggesting that working-memory limits in biological and artificial systems may reflect a shared computational challenge: selecting task-relevant information under interference.

AI.tldr: 研究发现预训练大语言模型存在工作记忆限制，表现出与人类相似的干扰特征，并揭示了表征干扰是核心约束机制
AI.motivation: 探究为什么拥有完整上下文访问能力的Transformer大语言模型仍然存在工作记忆限制，以及这种限制与人类工作记忆限制的相似性
AI.method: 通过训练两层Transformer解决工作记忆任务，测试多种预训练LLM的工作记忆表现，分析干扰特征，并进行针对性干预实验
AI.result: LLM表现出与人类相似的工作记忆限制：随记忆负荷增加性能下降，受近因效应和刺激统计影响；工作记忆能力与标准基准表现正相关；模型采用纠缠表征机制，成功回忆依赖干扰控制
AI.conclusion: 表征干扰是预训练LLM工作记忆的核心约束，表明生物和人工系统的工作记忆限制可能反映共同的计算挑战：在干扰下选择任务相关信息

title: FlowHijack: A Dynamics-Aware Backdoor Attack on Flow-Matching Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are emerging as a cornerstone for robotics, with flow-matching policies like $π_0$ showing great promise in generating smooth, continuous actions. As these models advance, their unique action generation mechanism - the vector field dynamics - presents a critical yet unexplored security vulnerability, particularly backdoor vulnerabilities. Existing backdoor attacks designed for autoregressive discretization VLAs cannot be directly applied to this new continuous dynamics. We introduce FlowHijack, the first backdoor attack framework to systematically target the underlying vector-field dynamics of flow-matching VLAs. Our method combines a novel $τ$-conditioned injection strategy, which manipulates the initial phase of the action generation, with a dynamics mimicry regularizer. Experiments demonstrate that FlowHijack achieves high attack success rates using stealthy, context-aware triggers where prior works failed. Crucially, it preserves benign task performance and, by enforcing kinematic similarity, generates malicious actions that are behaviorally indistinguishable from normal actions. Our findings reveal a significant vulnerability in continuous embodied models, highlighting the urgent need for defenses targeting the model's internal generative dynamics.

AI.tldr: FlowHijack：首个针对流匹配VLA模型向量场动力学的后门攻击框架，通过τ条件注入策略和动力学模仿正则化器，在保持良性任务性能的同时实现高攻击成功率
AI.motivation: 随着VLA模型在机器人领域的兴起，其独特的向量场动力学动作生成机制存在未探索的安全漏洞。现有的基于自回归离散化的后门攻击无法直接应用于这种连续动力学模型，需要专门针对流匹配VLA底层向量场动力学的攻击框架
AI.method: 提出FlowHijack框架：1) τ条件注入策略，操纵动作生成的初始阶段；2) 动力学模仿正则化器，确保恶意动作与正常动作在行为上难以区分。该方法针对流匹配VLA模型的连续向量场动力学进行攻击
AI.result: 实验表明FlowHijack使用隐蔽的上下文感知触发器实现了高攻击成功率，而先前工作失败。关键的是，它保持了良性任务性能，并通过强制运动学相似性生成行为上难以区分的恶意动作
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了连续具身模型中的重大安全漏洞，强调了针对模型内部生成动力学的防御措施的紧迫需求。FlowHijack是首个针对流匹配VLA向量场动力学的后门攻击框架

title: Turing Test on Screen: A Benchmark for Mobile GUI Agent Humanization
summary: The rise of autonomous GUI agents has triggered adversarial countermeasures from digital platforms, yet existing research prioritizes utility and robustness over the critical dimension of anti-detection. We argue that for agents to survive in human-centric ecosystems, they must evolve Humanization capabilities. We introduce the ``Turing Test on Screen,'' formally modeling the interaction as a MinMax optimization problem between a detector and an agent aiming to minimize behavioral divergence. We then collect a new high-fidelity dataset of mobile touch dynamics, and conduct our analysis that vanilla LMM-based agents are easily detectable due to unnatural kinematics. Consequently, we establish the Agent Humanization Benchmark (AHB) and detection metrics to quantify the trade-off between imitability and utility. Finally, we propose methods ranging from heuristic noise to data-driven behavioral matching, demonstrating that agents can achieve high imitability theoretically and empirically without sacrificing performance. This work shifts the paradigm from whether an agent can perform a task to how it performs it within a human-centric ecosystem, laying the groundwork for seamless coexistence in adversarial digital environments.

AI.tldr: 论文提出GUI代理需要具备"拟人化"能力以在对抗性数字环境中生存，建立了Agent Humanization Benchmark (AHB)来量化模仿性与效用之间的权衡，并展示了代理可以在不牺牲性能的情况下实现高拟人度。
AI.motivation: 随着自主GUI代理的兴起，数字平台采取了对抗性反制措施。现有研究过于关注效用和鲁棒性，而忽视了反检测这一关键维度。为了让代理在人类中心生态系统中生存，它们必须发展拟人化能力。
AI.method: 1) 提出"屏幕上的图灵测试"，将交互建模为检测器与代理之间的MinMax优化问题；2) 收集新的高保真移动触摸动态数据集；3) 建立Agent Humanization Benchmark (AHB)和检测指标；4) 提出从启发式噪声到数据驱动的行为匹配等方法。
AI.result: 分析发现基于LMM的普通代理由于不自然的运动学特性容易被检测。提出的方法在理论和实证上都表明，代理可以在不牺牲性能的情况下实现高拟人度。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作将范式从"代理能否执行任务"转变为"代理如何在人类中心生态系统中执行任务"，为在对抗性数字环境中实现无缝共存奠定了基础。

title: Simulating Organized Group Behavior: New Framework, Benchmark, and Analysis
summary: Simulating how organized groups (e.g., corporations) make decisions (e.g., responding to a competitor's move) is essential for understanding real-world dynamics and could benefit relevant applications (e.g., market prediction). In this paper, we formalize this problem as a concrete research platform for group behavior understanding, providing: (1) a task definition with benchmark and evaluation criteria, (2) a structured analytical framework with a corresponding algorithm, and (3) detailed temporal and cross-group analysis. Specifically, we propose Organized Group Behavior Simulation, a task that models organized groups as collective entities from a practical perspective: given a group facing a particular situation (e.g., AI Boom), predict the decision it would take. To support this task, we present GROVE (GRoup Organizational BehaVior Evaluation), a benchmark covering 44 entities with 8,052 real-world context-decision pairs collected from Wikipedia and TechCrunch across 9 domains, with an end-to-end evaluation protocol assessing consistency, initiative, scope, magnitude, and horizon. Beyond straightforward prompting pipelines, we propose a structured analytical framework that converts collective decision-making events into an interpretable, adaptive, and traceable behavioral model, achieving stronger performance than summarization- and retrieval-based baselines. It further introduces an adapter mechanism for time-aware evolution and group-aware transfer, and traceable evidence nodes grounding each decision rule in originating historical events. Our analysis reveals temporal behavioral drift within individual groups, which the time-aware adapter effectively captures for stronger prediction, and structured cross-group similarity that enables knowledge transfer for data-scarce organizations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了有组织群体行为模拟任务，创建了GROVE基准数据集，并开发了结构化分析框架来预测群体决策，实现了时间感知和跨群体知识迁移。
AI.motivation: 模拟有组织群体（如公司）如何做出决策对于理解现实世界动态至关重要，有助于市场预测等应用。目前缺乏系统化的研究平台来理解和预测群体行为。
AI.method: 1) 提出有组织群体行为模拟任务，将群体视为集体实体进行决策预测；2) 构建GROVE基准数据集，包含44个实体的8,052个真实世界情境-决策对；3) 开发结构化分析框架，将集体决策事件转换为可解释、自适应、可追溯的行为模型；4) 引入时间感知适配器和群体感知迁移机制。
AI.result: 提出的结构化分析框架在一致性、主动性、范围、幅度和时间跨度等评估维度上优于基于总结和检索的基线方法。时间感知适配器能有效捕捉个体群体的时间行为漂移，群体感知迁移机制能在数据稀缺组织间实现知识转移。
AI.conclusion: 本文为群体行为理解提供了系统化的研究平台，通过结构化分析框架实现了更准确、可解释的群体决策预测，并展示了时间动态和跨群体相似性的重要价值。

title: Belief-State RWKV for Reinforcement Learning under Partial Observability
summary: We propose a stronger formulation of RL on top of RWKV-style recurrent sequence models, in which the fixed-size recurrent state is explicitly interpreted as a belief state rather than an opaque hidden vector. Instead of conditioning policy and value on a single summary h_t, we maintain a compact uncertainty-aware state b_t = (μ_t, Σ_t) derived from RWKV-style recurrent statistics and let control depend on both memory and uncertainty. This design targets a key weakness of plain fixed-state policies in partially observed settings: they may store evidence, but not necessarily confidence. We present the method, a theoretical program, and a pilot RL experiment with hidden episode-level observation noise together with a test-time noise sweep. The pilot shows that belief-state policies nearly match the best recurrent baseline overall while slightly improving return on the hardest in-distribution regime and under a held-out noise shift. Additional ablations show that this simple belief readout is currently stronger than two more structured extensions, namely gated memory control and privileged belief targets, underscoring the need for richer benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出基于RWKV循环模型的强化学习新方法，将循环状态显式解释为信念状态而非隐藏向量，通过维护不确定性感知状态(μ_t, Σ_t)来改进部分可观测环境中的策略性能
AI.motivation: 针对传统固定状态策略在部分可观测环境中的关键弱点：它们可以存储证据但无法表示置信度。现有RWKV风格循环模型将隐藏状态视为不透明的向量，缺乏对不确定性的显式建模
AI.method: 将RWKV循环状态重新解释为信念状态b_t = (μ_t, Σ_t)，从RWKV循环统计中推导紧凑的不确定性感知状态。让控制策略同时依赖记忆和不确定性，而不是仅基于单一摘要h_t
AI.result: 在包含隐藏观测噪声的试点实验中，信念状态策略几乎匹配最佳循环基线，在最具挑战性的分布内机制和保持噪声偏移下略微改善回报。简单信念读取优于门控记忆控制和特权信念目标等结构化扩展
AI.conclusion: 将循环状态显式解释为信念状态可以改善部分可观测环境中的RL性能，但需要更丰富的基准测试来评估更复杂的扩展方法

title: Prints in the Magnetic Dust: Robust Similarity Search in Legacy Media Images Using Checksum Count Vectors
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. Peer-reviewed, presented on Machine Intelligence and Digital Interaction (MIDI) Conference on 11 december 2025 in Warsaw, POLAND. To be included in the proceedings (print in progress)
summary: Digitizing magnetic media containing computer data is only the first step towards the preservation of early home computing era artifacts. The audio tape images must be decoded, verified, repaired if necessary, tested, and documented. If parts of this process could be effectively automated, volunteers could focus on contributing contextual and historical knowledge rather than struggling with technical tools. We therefore propose a feature representation based on Checksum Count Vectors and evaluate its applicability to detecting duplicates and variants of recordings within a large data store. The approach was tested on a collection of decoded tape images (n=4902), achieving 58\% accuracy in detecting variants and 97% accuracy in identifying alternative copies, for damaged recordings with up to 75% of records missing. These results represent an important step towards fully automated pipelines for restoration, de-duplication, and semantic integration of historical digital artifacts through sequence matching, automatic repair and knowledge discovery.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于校验和计数向量的特征表示方法，用于在大型数据存储中检测早期家用计算机时代磁媒体录音的重复和变体，实现历史数字文物的自动化处理管道。
AI.motivation: 数字化早期家用计算机时代的磁媒体只是保存的第一步，需要解码、验证、修复、测试和文档化。如果这些过程能够有效自动化，志愿者就可以专注于贡献上下文和历史知识，而不是与技术工具作斗争。
AI.method: 提出基于校验和计数向量的特征表示方法，用于在大型数据存储中检测录音的重复和变体。该方法在解码磁带图像集合（n=4902）上进行测试。
AI.result: 在检测变体方面达到58%准确率，在识别替代副本方面达到97%准确率，即使对于记录缺失高达75%的损坏录音也能有效工作。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果代表了通过序列匹配、自动修复和知识发现，实现历史数字文物修复、去重和语义集成的全自动化管道的重要一步。

title: AHC: Meta-Learned Adaptive Compression for Continual Object Detection on Memory-Constrained Microcontrollers
summary: Deploying continual object detection on microcontrollers (MCUs) with under 100KB memory requires efficient feature compression that can adapt to evolving task distributions. Existing approaches rely on fixed compression strategies (e.g., FiLM conditioning) that cannot adapt to heterogeneous task characteristics, leading to suboptimal memory utilization and catastrophic forgetting. We introduce Adaptive Hierarchical Compression (AHC), a meta-learning framework featuring three key innovations: (1) true MAML-based compression that adapts via gradient descent to each new task in just 5 inner-loop steps, (2) hierarchical multi-scale compression with scale-aware ratios (8:1 for P3, 6.4:1 for P4, 4:1 for P5) matching FPN redundancy patterns, and (3) a dual-memory architecture combining short-term and long-term banks with importance-based consolidation under a hard 100KB budget. We provide formal theoretical guarantees bounding catastrophic forgetting as O(ε{sq.root(T)} + 1/{sq.root(M)}) where ε is compression error, T is task count, and M is memory size. Experiments on CORe50, TiROD, and PASCAL VOC benchmarks with three standard baselines (Fine-tuning,EWC, iCaRL) demonstrate that AHC enables practical continual detection within a 100KB replay budget, achieving competitive accuracy through mean-pooled compressed feature replay combined with EWC regularization and feature distillation.

AI.tldr: 提出AHC框架，通过元学习和分层压缩实现微控制器上100KB内存内的持续目标检测，解决固定压缩策略无法适应异构任务的问题。
AI.motivation: 在内存小于100KB的微控制器上部署持续目标检测需要高效的特征压缩，现有固定压缩策略无法适应不断演化的任务分布，导致内存利用不足和灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 1) 基于MAML的元学习压缩，仅需5步内循环适应新任务；2) 分层多尺度压缩，针对FPN冗余模式设计不同压缩比；3) 双内存架构，结合短期和长期存储库，在100KB硬预算下进行重要性合并。
AI.result: 在CORe50、TiROD和PASCAL VOC基准测试中，AHC在100KB重放预算内实现实用持续检测，通过均值池化压缩特征重放结合EWC正则化和特征蒸馏获得有竞争力的准确率。
AI.conclusion: AHC框架通过自适应压缩策略有效解决了微控制器上持续目标检测的内存限制和灾难性遗忘问题，提供了理论保证和实际可行性。

title: Should We be Pedantic About Reasoning Errors in Machine Translation?
summary: Across multiple language pairings (English $\to$ \{Spanish, French, German, Mandarin, Japanese, Urdu, Cantonese\}), we find reasoning errors in translation. To quantify how often these reasoning errors occur, we leverage an automated annotation protocol for reasoning evaluation wherein the goal is to detect if a reasoning step is any of three error categories: (1) source sentence-misaligned, (2) model hypothesis-misaligned, or (3) reasoning trace-misaligned. We probe the reasoning model with perturbed traces correcting for these identified reasoning errors using an array of weak-to-strong interventions: hedging, removal, re-reasoning after removal, hindsight, and oracle interventions. Experimenting with interventions on the reasoning traces suggests that small corrections to the reasoning have little impact on translation quality, but stronger interventions yield the highest resolution rates, despite translation quality gains being mixed. We find ultimately that reasoning errors in MT can be identified with high precision in Urdu but lower precision in Spanish, but that removing these reasoning errors does not resolve the initial errors significantly, suggesting limited reasoning faithfulness for machine translation.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了机器翻译中推理错误的检测与干预，发现推理错误在翻译中普遍存在，但纠正这些错误对翻译质量的提升有限，表明机器翻译的推理忠实度较低。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是量化机器翻译中推理错误的发生频率，并探索通过干预推理过程来改善翻译质量的可能性。作者关注推理错误对翻译质量的实际影响。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）自动标注协议检测三种推理错误类别；2）使用弱到强干预策略（对冲、移除、移除后重新推理、事后干预、神谕干预）纠正推理错误；3）在多种语言对上实验评估干预效果。
AI.result: 结果显示：1）推理错误在机器翻译中普遍存在；2）小规模修正对翻译质量影响有限；3）强干预能获得最高分辨率，但翻译质量提升不一致；4）推理错误检测在乌尔都语中精度高，西班牙语中精度低；5）移除推理错误不能显著解决初始错误。
AI.conclusion: 结论是机器翻译的推理忠实度有限，推理错误与翻译错误之间的关联较弱，单纯修正推理过程不能有效提升翻译质量。

title: Active Inference with a Self-Prior in the Mirror-Mark Task
summary: The mirror self-recognition test evaluates whether a subject touches a mark on its own body that is visible only in a mirror, and is widely used as an indicator of self-awareness. In this study, we present a computational model in which this behavior emerges spontaneously through a single mechanism, the self-prior, without any external reward. The self-prior, implemented with a Transformer, learns the density of familiar multisensory experiences; when a novel mark appears, the discrepancy from this learned distribution drives mark-directed behavior through active inference. A simulated infant, relying solely on vision and proprioception without tactile input, discovered a sticker placed on its own face in the mirror and removed it in approximately 70% of cases without any explicit instruction. Expected free energy decreased significantly after sticker removal, confirming that the self-prior operates as an internal criterion for distinguishing self from non-self. Cross-modal sampling further demonstrated that the self-prior captures visual--proprioceptive associations, functioning as a probabilistic body schema. These results provide a concise computational account of the key behavior observed in the mirror test and suggest that the free energy principle can serve as a unifying hypothesis for investigating the developmental origins of self-awareness. Code is available at: https://github.com/kim135797531/self-prior-mirror

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自先验(self-prior)的计算模型，通过Transformer学习多感官经验的密度分布，在镜像测试中自发产生标记指向行为，无需外部奖励。
AI.motivation: 镜像自我识别测试被广泛用作自我意识的指标，但缺乏计算模型解释这种行为如何自发产生。研究旨在通过自由能原理提供统一的计算框架，探究自我意识的发育起源。
AI.method: 使用Transformer实现自先验(self-prior)，学习熟悉的多感官经验密度分布。当出现新标记时，与学习分布的差异通过主动推理驱动标记指向行为。模拟婴儿仅依赖视觉和本体感觉，无触觉输入。
AI.result: 模拟婴儿在大约70%的情况下自发发现并移除脸上的贴纸，无需明确指令。移除贴纸后预期自由能显著降低，确认自先验作为区分自我与非自我的内部标准。跨模态采样显示自先验捕捉视觉-本体感觉关联，作为概率性身体图式。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为镜像测试的关键行为提供了简洁的计算解释，表明自由能原理可作为研究自我意识发育起源的统一假设。自先验机制能够自发产生自我识别行为。

title: A Modular Zero-Shot Pipeline for Accident Detection, Localization, and Classification in Traffic Surveillance Video
comment: 9 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables. Submitted to the ACCIDENT @ CVPR 2026 Workshop. Source code and notebook available at https://www.kaggle.com/code/ameythakur20/zero-shot-cctv-traffic-accident-understanding/
summary: We describe a zero-shot pipeline developed for the ACCIDENT @ CVPR 2026 challenge. The challenge requires predicting when, where, and what type of traffic accident occurs in surveillance video, without labeled real-world training data. Our method separates the problem into three independent modules. The first module localizes the collision in time by running peak detection on z-score normalized frame-difference signals. The second module finds the impact location by computing the weighted centroid of cumulative dense optical flow magnitude maps using the Farneback algorithm. The third module classifies collision type by measuring cosine similarity between CLIP image embeddings of frames near the detected peak and text embeddings built from multi-prompt natural language descriptions of each collision category. No domain-specific fine-tuning is involved; the pipeline processes each video using only pre-trained model weights. Our implementation is publicly available as a Kaggle notebook.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个零样本管道用于交通事故事件检测挑战，通过三个独立模块分别定位碰撞时间、位置和类型，无需真实世界标注数据或领域特定微调。
AI.motivation: 解决在监控视频中预测交通事故发生时间、地点和类型的挑战，特别是在没有真实世界标注训练数据的情况下。该挑战要求零样本学习能力，避免对特定领域数据进行微调。
AI.method: 采用三个独立模块的管道方法：1) 时间定位模块：基于z-score归一化的帧差信号进行峰值检测；2) 空间定位模块：使用Farneback算法计算密集光流幅度图的加权质心；3) 类型分类模块：通过CLIP图像嵌入与基于多提示自然语言描述构建的文本嵌入之间的余弦相似度进行分类。
AI.result: 开发了一个完整的零样本管道，能够处理监控视频中的交通事故检测任务，无需领域特定微调，仅使用预训练模型权重。实现已作为Kaggle笔记本公开可用。
AI.conclusion: 通过组合传统计算机视觉技术（光流、峰值检测）和现代多模态模型（CLIP），构建了一个有效的零样本交通事故检测系统，展示了在缺乏标注数据场景下的实用解决方案。

title: Explainable Planning for Hybrid Systems
summary: The recent advancement in artificial intelligence (AI) technologies facilitates a paradigm shift toward automation. Autonomous systems are fully or partially replacing manually crafted ones. At the core of these systems is automated planning. With the advent of powerful planners, automated planning is now applied to many complex and safety-critical domains, including smart energy grids, self-driving cars, warehouse automation, urban and air traffic control, search and rescue operations, surveillance, robotics, and healthcare. There is a growing need to generate explanations of AI-based systems, which is one of the major challenges the planning community faces today. The thesis presents a comprehensive study on explainable artificial intelligence planning (XAIP) for hybrid systems that capture a representation of real-world problems closely.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了混合系统的可解释人工智能规划(XAIP)，旨在为复杂安全关键领域中的AI规划系统提供解释能力。
AI.motivation: 随着AI技术在自动化系统中的广泛应用，特别是在智能电网、自动驾驶、医疗等安全关键领域，AI规划系统需要能够解释其决策过程，这是当前规划社区面临的主要挑战之一。
AI.method: 论文对混合系统的可解释人工智能规划(XAIP)进行了全面研究，混合系统能够更接近地表示现实世界问题，研究内容包括解释生成方法和框架。
AI.result: 论文提出了针对混合系统的XAIP方法和框架，为复杂AI规划系统提供了解释能力，有助于提高这些系统的透明度和可信度。
AI.conclusion: 可解释人工智能规划对于安全关键领域的AI系统至关重要，该研究为混合系统规划提供了有效的解释方法，有助于推动可信AI的发展。

title: Human vs. Machine Deception: Distinguishing AI-Generated and Human-Written Fake News Using Ensemble Learning
summary: The rapid adoption of large language models has introduced a new class of AI-generated fake news that coexists with traditional human-written misinformation, raising important questions about how these two forms of deceptive content differ and how reliably they can be distinguished. This study examines linguistic, structural, and emotional differences between human-written and AI-generated fake news and evaluates machine learning and ensemble-based methods for distinguishing these content types. A document-level feature representation is constructed using sentence structure, lexical diversity, punctuation patterns, readability indices, and emotion-based features capturing affective dimensions such as fear, anger, joy, sadness, trust, and anticipation. Multiple classification models, including logistic regression, random forest, support vector machines, extreme gradient boosting, and a neural network, are applied alongside an ensemble framework that aggregates predictions across models. Model performance is assessed using accuracy and area under the receiver operating characteristic curve. The results show strong and consistent classification performance, with readability-based features emerging as the most informative predictors and AI-generated text exhibiting more uniform stylistic patterns. Ensemble learning provides modest but consistent improvements over individual models. These findings indicate that stylistic and structural properties of text provide a robust basis for distinguishing AI-generated misinformation from human-written fake news.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了人类编写与AI生成的假新闻在语言、结构和情感特征上的差异，构建了基于句子结构、词汇多样性、标点模式、可读性指数和情感特征的文档级表示，使用多种机器学习模型和集成方法进行区分，发现可读性特征是最具信息量的预测因子，AI生成文本表现出更统一的风格模式。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型的快速普及，AI生成的假新闻与传统人类编写的虚假信息并存，这引发了两个重要问题：这两种欺骗性内容形式有何差异？如何可靠地区分它们？研究旨在探索人类编写与AI生成假新闻的语言、结构和情感差异，并评估机器学习方法对它们的区分能力。
AI.method: 构建文档级特征表示，包括句子结构、词汇多样性、标点模式、可读性指数和基于情感的特征（恐惧、愤怒、喜悦、悲伤、信任、期待）。应用多种分类模型：逻辑回归、随机森林、支持向量机、极端梯度提升和神经网络，并采用集成框架聚合多个模型的预测结果。
AI.result: 结果显示强大且一致的分类性能，可读性特征成为最具信息量的预测因子，AI生成文本表现出更统一的风格模式。集成学习相比单个模型提供了适度但一致的改进。基于准确率和ROC曲线下面积评估模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 文本的风格和结构特性为区分AI生成的虚假信息与人类编写的假新闻提供了可靠基础。这表明AI生成内容具有可检测的模式特征，可用于开发更有效的虚假信息检测工具。

title: A Comparative Theoretical Analysis of Entropy Control Methods in Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a key approach for enhancing reasoning in large language models (LLMs), yet scalable training is often hindered by the rapid collapse of policy entropy, which leads to premature convergence and performance saturation. This paper provides a comparative theoretical analysis of two entropy control strategies: traditional entropy regularization and the recently proposed covariance-based mechanism. We establish a unified framework for entropy dynamics under softmax parameterization, showing that entropy change is governed by the covariance between log-probabilities and logit updates. Our analysis reveals that traditional entropy regularization introduces a dense, persistent bias that modifies the stationary condition, leading to suboptimal policies, while covariance-based methods selectively regularize a sparse subset of high-covariance tokens and achieve asymptotic unbiasedness when the regularization coefficient is annealed. These results provide principled guidelines for entropy control in LLM posttraining, with implications for scaling RL to larger models and more complex reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 该论文对LLM强化学习中的两种熵控制策略进行了理论比较分析：传统熵正则化与协方差机制，揭示了协方差方法在保持渐进无偏性方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 强化学习已成为增强大语言模型推理能力的关键方法，但可扩展训练常因策略熵快速崩溃而受阻，导致过早收敛和性能饱和。需要理解不同熵控制策略的理论特性以指导实践。
AI.method: 建立softmax参数化下熵动态的统一分析框架，证明熵变化由对数概率与logit更新的协方差控制。理论比较传统熵正则化（引入密集持续偏差）与协方差机制（稀疏正则化高协方差token）。
AI.result: 传统熵正则化修改平稳条件导致次优策略，而协方差方法通过退火正则化系数实现渐进无偏性，为高协方差token提供选择性正则化。
AI.conclusion: 协方差机制为LLM后训练中的熵控制提供了更优的理论基础，对扩展RL到更大模型和更复杂推理任务具有指导意义。

title: Grid2Matrix: Revealing Digital Agnosia in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) excel on many multimodal reasoning benchmarks, but these evaluations often do not require an exhaustive readout of the image and can therefore obscure failures in faithfully capturing all visual details. We introduce Grid2Matrix (G2M), a controlled benchmark in which a model is shown a color grid and a color-to-number mapping, and must output the corresponding matrix. By varying grid size and the number of colors, G2M provides a simple way to increase visual complexity while minimizing semantic confounds. We find that VLMs exhibit a sharp early collapse in zero-shot end-to-end evaluation, failing on surprisingly small grids rather than degrading gradually as the task becomes denser. We probe the visual encoders of VLMs from two representative families and find that they preserve substantially more of the grid information than the corresponding end-to-end outputs. This suggests that the failure is not explained by visual encoding alone, but also reflects a gap between what remains recoverable from visual features and what is ultimately expressed in language. We term this gap \textit{Digital Agnosia}. Further analyses show that these errors are highly structured and depend strongly on how grid cells overlap with visual patch boundaries. We also find that common strategies such as model scaling and multimodal alignment do not fully eliminate this failure mode. We expect G2M to serve as a useful testbed for understanding where and how VLMs lose fine visual details, and for evaluating tasks where missing even small visual details can matter, such as tables, charts, forms, and GUIs.

AI.tldr: Grid2Matrix (G2M) 基准测试揭示视觉语言模型在需要精确视觉细节读取的任务中存在"数字失认症"现象，即使在小尺寸网格上也会出现早期性能崩溃，而非随任务复杂度逐渐下降。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型评测通常不需要详尽读取图像细节，可能掩盖模型在忠实捕捉所有视觉信息方面的失败。需要创建受控基准来评估模型对精细视觉细节的捕捉能力。
AI.method: 提出Grid2Matrix (G2M)基准：向模型展示彩色网格和颜色到数字的映射，要求输出对应矩阵。通过改变网格大小和颜色数量来增加视觉复杂度，同时最小化语义混淆。对两类代表性VLM家族的视觉编码器进行探测分析。
AI.result: VLMs在零样本端到端评估中表现出早期性能崩溃，在出人意料的小尺寸网格上就失败。视觉编码器保留的网格信息比端到端输出多得多，表明失败不仅源于视觉编码，还反映了视觉特征与语言表达之间的差距（数字失认症）。错误高度结构化，强烈依赖于网格单元与视觉补丁边界的重叠情况。模型缩放和多模态对齐等常见策略无法完全消除这种失败模式。
AI.conclusion: G2M可作为理解VLMs在何处以及如何丢失精细视觉细节的有用测试平台，适用于评估表格、图表、表单和GUI等需要精确视觉细节的任务。揭示了视觉特征与语言表达之间的关键差距。

title: Help Without Being Asked: A Deployed Proactive Agent System for On-Call Support with Continuous Self-Improvement
summary: In large-scale cloud service platforms, thousands of customer tickets are generated daily and are typically handled through on-call dialogues. This high volume of on-call interactions imposes a substantial workload on human support analysts. Recent studies have explored reactive agents that leverage large language models as a first line of support to interact with customers directly and resolve issues. However, when issues remain unresolved and are escalated to human support, these agents are typically disengaged. As a result, they cannot assist with follow-up inquiries, track resolution progress, or learn from the cases they fail to address. In this paper, we introduce Vigil, a novel proactive agent system designed to operate throughout the entire on-call life-cycle. Unlike reactive agents, Vigil focuses on providing assistance during the phase in which human support is already involved. It integrates into the dialogue between the customer and the analyst, proactively offering assistance without explicit user invocation. Moreover, Vigil incorporates a continuous self-improvement mechanism that extracts knowledge from human-resolved cases to autonomously update its capabilities. Vigil has been deployed on Volcano Engine, ByteDance's cloud platform, for over ten months, and comprehensive evaluations based on this deployment demonstrate its effectiveness and practicality. The open source version of this work is publicly available at https://github.com/volcengine/veaiops.

AI.tldr: Vigil是一个主动式智能客服系统，在整个客服生命周期中为人工客服提供辅助，通过持续自我改进机制从人工解决案例中学习，已在字节跳动云平台部署超过10个月。
AI.motivation: 云服务平台每天产生大量客户工单，传统基于大语言模型的反应式客服代理只在第一线交互，当问题升级到人工客服时就会断开连接，无法提供后续支持、跟踪解决进度或从失败案例中学习。
AI.method: Vigil是一个主动式代理系统，专注于人工客服介入阶段，集成到客户与分析师之间的对话中，无需用户显式调用即可主动提供帮助，并包含持续自我改进机制，从人工解决案例中提取知识自主更新能力。
AI.result: Vigil已在字节跳动的火山引擎云平台部署超过10个月，基于实际部署的全面评估证明了其有效性和实用性，开源版本已公开提供。
AI.conclusion: Vigil系统通过在整个客服生命周期中提供主动辅助，解决了传统反应式代理的局限性，实现了更全面的客服支持能力，并通过持续学习机制不断提升性能。

title: Weird Generalization is Weirdly Brittle
summary: Weird generalization is a phenomenon in which models fine-tuned on data from a narrow domain (e.g. insecure code) develop surprising traits that manifest even outside that domain (e.g. broad misalignment)-a phenomenon that prior work has highlighted as a critical safety concern. Here, we present an extended replication study of key weird generalization results across an expanded suite of models and datasets. We confirm that surprising (and dangerous) traits can emerge under certain circumstances, but we find that weird generalization is exceptionally brittle: it emerges only for specific models on specific datasets, and it vanishes under simple training-time, prompt-based interventions. We find that the most effective interventions provide prompt context that makes the generalized behavior the expected behavior. However, we show that even very generic interventions that do not anticipate specific generalized traits can still be effective in mitigating weird generalization's effects. Our findings thus help clarify the nature of the safety threat that weird generalization poses and point toward an easily implemented set of solutions.

AI.tldr: 对"奇怪泛化"现象的扩展复制研究：确认在某些情况下会出现危险特征，但这种现象极其脆弱，仅出现在特定模型和数据集上，且可通过简单的训练时提示干预消除
AI.motivation: 研究模型在窄域数据（如不安全代码）上微调后，在域外表现出意外特征（如广泛的不对齐）的现象，这是先前工作中强调的关键安全问题
AI.method: 扩展复制研究：在扩展的模型套件和数据集上验证奇怪泛化结果，测试各种训练时、基于提示的干预措施的有效性
AI.result: 确认在某些情况下会出现令人惊讶（且危险）的特征，但奇怪泛化极其脆弱：仅出现在特定模型和数据集上，在简单干预下消失。最有效的干预是提供使泛化行为成为预期行为的提示上下文
AI.conclusion: 研究结果有助于澄清奇怪泛化带来的安全威胁性质，并指向一套易于实施的解决方案

title: STaR-DRO: Stateful Tsallis Reweighting for Group-Robust Structured Prediction
summary: Structured prediction requires models to generate ontology-constrained labels, grounded evidence, and valid structure under ambiguity, label skew, and heterogeneous group difficulty. We present a two-part framework for controllable inference and robust fine-tuning. First, we introduce a task-agnostic prompting strategy that combines XML-based instruction structure, disambiguation rules, verification-style reasoning, schema constraints, and self-validation to address format drift, label ambiguity, evidence hallucination, and metadata-conditioned confusion in in-context structured generation. Second, we introduce STaR-DRO, a stateful robust optimization method for group heterogeneity. It combines Tsallis mirror descent with momentum-smoothed, centered group-loss signals and bounded excess-only multipliers so that only persistently hard groups above a neutral baseline are upweighted, concentrating learning where it is most needed while avoiding volatile, dense exponentiated-gradient reweighting and unnecessary loss from downweighting easier groups. We evaluate the combined framework on EPPC Miner, a benchmark for extracting hierarchical labels and evidence spans from patient-provider secure messages. Prompt engineering improves zero-shot by +15.44 average F1 across Code, Sub-code, and Span over four Llama models. Building on supervised fine-tuning, STaR-DRO further improves the hardest semantic decisions: on Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, Code F1 rises from 79.24 to 81.47 and Sub-code F1 from 67.78 to 69.30, while preserving Span performance and reducing group-wise validation cross-entropy by up to 29.6% on the most difficult clinical categories. Because these rare and difficult groups correspond to clinically consequential communication behaviors, these gains are not merely statistical improvements: they directly strengthen communication mining reliability for patient-centered care analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个两部分的框架用于结构化预测：任务无关的提示策略和STaR-DRO鲁棒优化方法，在临床通信挖掘任务上显著提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 结构化预测需要模型在模糊性、标签偏斜和异构群体难度下生成本体约束的标签、有根据的证据和有效结构。现有方法在处理格式漂移、标签模糊、证据幻觉和元数据条件混淆方面存在挑战。
AI.method: 1. 任务无关提示策略：结合XML指令结构、消歧规则、验证式推理、模式约束和自验证；2. STaR-DRO：状态鲁棒优化方法，结合Tsallis镜像下降、动量平滑的群体损失信号和有界超额乘子，仅对持续困难的群体进行加权。
AI.result: 提示工程在四个Llama模型上平均F1提升+15.44；STaR-DRO在Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct上将Code F1从79.24提升到81.47，Sub-code F1从67.78提升到69.30，同时保持Span性能，在最困难临床类别上减少群体验证交叉熵达29.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架显著提升了结构化预测性能，特别是在临床通信挖掘等关键应用中，增强了患者为中心护理分析的可靠性。

title: Immunizing 3D Gaussian Generative Models Against Unauthorized Fine-Tuning via Attribute-Space Traps
summary: Recent large-scale generative models enable high-quality 3D synthesis. However, the public accessibility of pre-trained weights introduces a critical vulnerability. Adversaries can fine-tune these models to steal specialized knowledge acquired during pre-training, leading to intellectual property infringement. Unlike defenses for 2D images and language models, 3D generators require specialized protection due to their explicit Gaussian representations, which expose fundamental structural parameters directly to gradient-based optimization. We propose GaussLock, the first approach designed to defend 3D generative models against fine-tuning attacks. GaussLock is a lightweight parameter-space immunization framework that integrates authorized distillation with attribute-aware trap losses targeting position, scale, rotation, opacity, and color. Specifically, these traps systematically collapse spatial distributions, distort geometric shapes, align rotational axes, and suppress primitive visibility to fundamentally destroy structural integrity. By jointly optimizing these dual objectives, the distillation process preserves fidelity on authorized tasks while the embedded traps actively disrupt unauthorized reconstructions. Experiments on large-scale Gaussian models demonstrate that GaussLock effectively neutralizes unauthorized fine-tuning attacks. It substantially degrades the quality of unauthorized reconstructions, evidenced by significantly higher LPIPS and lower PSNR, while effectively maintaining performance on authorized fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: GaussLock是首个针对3D生成模型的微调攻击防御框架，通过参数空间免疫化结合授权蒸馏和属性感知陷阱损失，保护预训练模型的知识产权。
AI.motivation: 随着大规模生成模型的发展，高质量的3D合成成为可能，但预训练权重的公开可访问性带来了关键漏洞。攻击者可以通过微调这些模型来窃取预训练期间获得的专业知识，导致知识产权侵权。与2D图像和语言模型的防御不同，3D生成器需要专门保护，因为其显式高斯表示直接将基本结构参数暴露给基于梯度的优化。
AI.method: GaussLock是一个轻量级参数空间免疫框架，集成了授权蒸馏和属性感知陷阱损失。这些陷阱针对位置、尺度、旋转、不透明度和颜色等属性，系统地破坏空间分布、扭曲几何形状、对齐旋转轴并抑制基元可见性，从根本上破坏结构完整性。通过联合优化这些双重目标，蒸馏过程在授权任务上保持保真度，同时嵌入的陷阱主动破坏未经授权的重建。
AI.result: 在大规模高斯模型上的实验表明，GaussLock有效中和了未经授权的微调攻击。它显著降低了未经授权重建的质量，表现为显著更高的LPIPS和更低的PSNR，同时有效保持了授权微调的性能。
AI.conclusion: GaussLock为3D生成模型提供了有效的知识产权保护机制，通过参数空间免疫化技术防止未经授权的知识窃取，同时保持模型在授权任务上的可用性。

title: OOWM: Structuring Embodied Reasoning and Planning via Object-Oriented Programmatic World Modeling
summary: Standard Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting empowers Large Language Models (LLMs) with reasoning capabilities, yet its reliance on linear natural language is inherently insufficient for effective world modeling in embodied tasks. While text offers flexibility, it fails to explicitly represent the state-space, object hierarchies, and causal dependencies required for robust robotic planning. To address these limitations, we propose Object-Oriented World Modeling (OOWM), a novel framework that structures embodied reasoning through the lens of software engineering formalisms. We redefine the world model not as a latent vector space, but as an explicit symbolic tuple $W = \langle S, T \rangle$: a State Abstraction ($G_\text{state}$) instantiating the environmental state $S$, coupled with a Control Policy ($G_\text{control}$) representing the transition logic $T: S \times A \rightarrow S'$. OOWM leverages the Unified Modeling Language (UML) to materialize this definition: it employs Class Diagrams to ground visual perception into rigorous object hierarchies, and Activity Diagrams to operationalize planning into executable control flows. Furthermore, we introduce a three-stage training pipeline combining Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Crucially, this method utilizes outcome-based rewards from the final plan to implicitly optimize the underlying object-oriented reasoning structure, enabling effective learning even with sparse annotations. Extensive evaluations on the MRoom-30k benchmark demonstrate that OOWM significantly outperforms unstructured textual baselines in planning coherence, execution success, and structural fidelity, establishing a new paradigm for structured embodied reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出OOWM框架，将具身推理结构化，用软件工程形式化方法（UML类图和活动图）显式建模世界状态和转移逻辑，结合SFT和GRPO训练，在MRoom-30k基准上显著优于非结构化文本基线。
AI.motivation: 传统CoT提示依赖线性自然语言，无法有效建模具身任务所需的状态空间、对象层次和因果依赖。文本虽灵活但缺乏显式表示，限制了机器人规划的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出对象导向世界建模(OOWM)框架：1) 将世界模型定义为显式符号元组W=⟨S,T⟩，包含状态抽象G_state和控制策略G_control；2) 使用UML类图将视觉感知转化为对象层次，活动图将规划转化为可执行控制流；3) 采用三阶段训练管道：SFT结合GRPO，利用最终计划的结果奖励隐式优化对象导向推理结构。
AI.result: 在MRoom-30k基准上，OOWM在规划一致性、执行成功率和结构保真度方面显著优于非结构化文本基线，建立了结构化具身推理的新范式。
AI.conclusion: OOWM通过软件工程形式化方法为LLM具身推理提供结构化框架，解决了传统CoT的局限性，实现了更鲁棒的机器人规划。

title: CoSToM:Causal-oriented Steering for Intrinsic Theory-of-Mind Alignment in Large Language Models
summary: Theory of Mind (ToM), the ability to attribute mental states to others, is a hallmark of social intelligence. While large language models (LLMs) demonstrate promising performance on standard ToM benchmarks, we observe that they often fail to generalize to complex task-specific scenarios, relying heavily on prompt scaffolding to mimic reasoning. The critical misalignment between the internal knowledge and external behavior raises a fundamental question: Do LLMs truly possess intrinsic cognition, and can they externalize this internal knowledge into stable, high-quality behaviors? To answer this, we introduce CoSToM (Causal-oriented Steering for ToM alignment), a framework that transitions from mechanistic interpretation to active intervention. First, we employ causal tracing to map the internal distribution of ToM features, empirically uncovering the internal layers' characteristics in encoding fundamental ToM semantics. Building on this insight, we implement a lightweight alignment framework via targeted activation steering within these ToM-critical layers. Experiments demonstrate that CoSToM significantly enhances human-like social reasoning capabilities and downstream dialogue quality.

AI.tldr: CoSToM框架通过因果追踪和激活引导，提升LLMs在心理理论任务上的推理能力，解决内部知识与外部行为不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs在标准心理理论基准测试中表现良好，但在复杂场景中往往依赖提示脚手架来模仿推理，内部知识与外部行为存在关键不一致。这引发了一个根本问题：LLMs是否真正拥有内在认知能力，能否将内部知识外化为稳定、高质量的行为？
AI.method: 1) 使用因果追踪来映射心理理论特征的内部分布，实证揭示内部层在编码基本心理理论语义方面的特征；2) 基于这一洞察，通过在这些心理理论关键层中进行有针对性的激活引导，实现轻量级对齐框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，CoSToM显著增强了类人社交推理能力和下游对话质量。
AI.conclusion: CoSToM框架成功地将机械解释转化为主动干预，通过因果导向的引导实现了心理理论对齐，提升了LLMs的社会智能。

title: ExecTune: Effective Steering of Black-Box LLMs with Guide Models
comment: Accepted at Lifelong Agents Workshop at ICLR 2026
summary: For large language models deployed through black-box APIs, recurring inference costs often exceed one-time training costs. This motivates composed agentic systems that amortize expensive reasoning into reusable intermediate representations. We study a broad class of such systems, termed Guide-Core Policies (GCoP), in which a guide model generates a structured strategy that is executed by a black-box core model. This abstraction subsumes base, supervised, and advisor-style approaches, which differ primarily in how the guide is trained. We formalize GCoP under a cost-sensitive utility objective and show that end-to-end performance is governed by guide-averaged executability: the probability that a strategy generated by the guide can be faithfully executed by the core. Our analysis shows that existing GCoP instantiations often fail to optimize executability under deployment constraints, resulting in brittle strategies and inefficient computation. Motivated by these insights, we propose ExecTune, a principled training recipe that combines teacher-guided acceptance sampling, supervised fine-tuning, and structure-aware reinforcement learning to directly optimize syntactic validity, execution success, and cost efficiency. Across mathematical reasoning and code-generation benchmarks, GCoP with ExecTune improves accuracy by up to 9.2% over prior state-of-the-art baselines while reducing inference cost by up to 22.4%. It enables Claude Haiku 3.5 to outperform Sonnet 3.5 on both math and code tasks, and to come within 1.7% absolute accuracy of Sonnet 4 at 38% lower cost. Beyond efficiency, GCoP also supports modular adaptation by updating the guide without retraining the core.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Guide-Core Policies (GCoP)框架，通过引导模型生成结构化策略，由黑盒核心模型执行，以降低推理成本。作者开发了ExecTune训练方法优化策略可执行性，在数学推理和代码生成任务上显著提升精度并降低成本。
AI.motivation: 对于通过黑盒API部署的大型语言模型，重复的推理成本常常超过一次性训练成本。这促使需要构建能够将昂贵推理分摊到可重用中间表示的组合式智能体系统。
AI.method: 提出Guide-Core Policies (GCoP)框架，其中引导模型生成结构化策略，由黑盒核心模型执行。开发ExecTune训练方法，结合教师引导的接受采样、监督微调和结构感知强化学习，直接优化语法有效性、执行成功率和成本效率。
AI.result: 在数学推理和代码生成基准测试中，使用ExecTune的GCoP比先前最先进基线精度提升高达9.2%，推理成本降低高达22.4%。使Claude Haiku 3.5在数学和代码任务上超越Sonnet 3.5，并以38%更低的成本达到Sonnet 4的1.7%绝对精度范围内。
AI.conclusion: GCoP框架通过优化引导模型生成策略的可执行性，显著降低了黑盒LLM的推理成本并提升了性能。ExecTune方法为组合式智能体系统提供了有效的训练方案，支持通过更新引导模型而不重新训练核心模型来实现模块化适应。

title: Face Density as a Proxy for Data Complexity: Quantifying the Hardness of Instance Count
comment: Accepted for publication at IEEE CAI 2026
summary:
Machine learning progress has historically prioritized model-centric innovations, yet achievable performance is frequently capped by the intrinsic complexity of the data itself. In this work, we isolate and quantify the impact of instance density (measured by face count) as a primary driver of data complexity. Rather than simply observing that ``crowded scenes are harder,'' we rigorously control for class imbalance to measure the precise degradation caused by density alone.
  Controlled experiments on the WIDER FACE and Open Images datasets, restricted to exactly 1 to 18 faces per image with perfectly balanced sampling, reveal that model performance degrades monotonically with increasing face count. This trend holds across classification, regression, and detection paradigms, even when models are fully exposed to the entire density range. Furthermore, we demonstrate that models trained on low-density regimes fail to generalize to higher densities, exhibiting a systematic under-counting bias, with error rates increasing by up to 4.6x, which suggests density acts as a domain shift.
  These findings establish instance density as an intrinsic, quantifiable dimension of data hardness and motivate specific interventions in curriculum learning and density-stratified evaluation.

AI.tldr: 论文通过控制实验证明实例密度（图像中人脸数量）是数据复杂度的内在量化维度，模型性能随密度增加单调下降，且低密度训练模型无法泛化到高密度场景，表现出系统性低估偏差。
AI.motivation: 机器学习研究长期以模型为中心，但性能常受限于数据本身的固有复杂度。本研究旨在分离和量化实例密度（人脸数量）作为数据复杂度的主要驱动因素，而非简单观察"拥挤场景更难"，而是通过控制类别不平衡来精确测量密度单独造成的性能下降。
AI.method: 在WIDER FACE和Open Images数据集上进行控制实验，将图像限制在1到18个人脸之间，并采用完美平衡采样。研究跨越分类、回归和检测范式，即使模型完全暴露在整个密度范围内，也测量性能随密度增加的变化。同时测试低密度训练模型向高密度场景的泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型性能随人脸数量增加单调下降，这一趋势在所有实验范式中一致。低密度训练模型无法泛化到高密度场景，表现出系统性低估偏差，错误率最高增加4.6倍，表明密度起到了领域偏移的作用。
AI.conclusion: 实例密度是数据硬度的内在可量化维度，这些发现为课程学习和密度分层评估提供了具体的干预动机。研究强调了在机器学习中考虑数据固有复杂度的重要性，而不仅仅是模型创新。

title: OpeFlo: Automated UX Evaluation via Simulated Human Web Interaction with GUI Grounding
summary: Evaluating web usability typically requires time-consuming user studies and expert reviews, which often limits iteration speed during product development, especially for small teams and agile workflows. We present OpenFlo, a user-experience evaluation agent that simulates user behavior on websites and produces standardized usability. Unlike traditional tools that rely on DOM parsing, OpenFlo grounds actions and observations, enabling it to interact with real web pages end-to-end while maintaining a coherent trace of the user journey. Building on Avenir-Web, our system pairs this robust interaction with simulated user behavior profiles and a structured evaluation protocol that integrates the System Usability Scale (SUS), step-wise Single Ease Questions (SEQ), and concurrent Think Aloud. Subsequently, a comprehensive User Experience (UX) report will be generated. We discuss the architecture of OpenFlo and illustrate how its multimodal grounding improves robustness for web-based interaction and UX evaluation scenarios, paving the way for a new era of continuous, scalable, and data-driven usability testing that empowers every developer to build web interfaces that are usable. Code is available at: https://github.com/Onflow-AI/OpenFlo

AI.tldr: OpenFlo是一个用户体验评估代理，通过模拟用户在网站上的行为来评估网页可用性，无需传统耗时的人工用户研究或专家评审。
AI.motivation: 传统的网页可用性评估需要耗时的人工用户研究和专家评审，限制了产品开发迭代速度，特别是对小团队和敏捷工作流程。需要一种自动化的解决方案来提供持续、可扩展的可用性测试。
AI.method: 基于Avenir-Web系统，OpenFlo通过多模态基础（而非传统DOM解析）实现与真实网页的端到端交互。系统结合模拟用户行为配置文件、结构化评估协议（包括系统可用性量表SUS、逐步单易问题SEQ和并发思考发声），生成全面的用户体验报告。
AI.result: OpenFlo能够模拟用户行为并与真实网页交互，生成标准化的可用性评估报告。其多模态基础提高了基于网页交互和用户体验评估场景的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: OpenFlo为持续、可扩展、数据驱动的可用性测试开辟了新途径，使每个开发者都能构建更易用的网页界面。

title: Computational Implementation of a Model of Category-Theoretic Metaphor Comprehension
summary: In this study, we developed a computational implementation for a model of metaphor comprehension based on the theory of indeterminate natural transformation (TINT) proposed by Fuyama et al. We simplified the algorithms implementing the model to be closer to the original theory and verified it through data fitting and simulations. The outputs of the algorithms are evaluated with three measures: data-fitting with experimental data, the systematicity of the metaphor comprehension result, and the novelty of the comprehension (i.e. the correspondence of the associative structure of the source and target of the metaphor). The improved algorithm outperformed the existing ones in all the three measures.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于不确定自然变换理论(TINT)的隐喻理解计算模型，简化算法更接近原始理论，在数据拟合、系统性和新颖性三个指标上优于现有算法。
AI.motivation: 将Fuyama等人提出的不确定自然变换理论(TINT)转化为可计算模型，改进现有隐喻理解算法的实现，使其更贴近原始理论框架。
AI.method: 开发基于TINT理论的隐喻理解计算实现，简化算法设计使其更接近原始理论，通过数据拟合和模拟验证模型效果。
AI.result: 改进后的算法在三个评估指标上均优于现有算法：1) 实验数据拟合度；2) 隐喻理解结果的系统性；3) 理解的新颖性（源域与目标域关联结构的对应性）。
AI.conclusion: 成功实现了基于TINT理论的隐喻理解计算模型，改进算法在多个评估维度上表现更优，验证了理论框架的可计算性和实用性。

title: Efficient Matrix Implementation for Rotary Position Embedding
summary: Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) has become a core component of modern Transformer architectures across language, vision, and 3D domains. However, existing implementations rely on vector-level split and merge operations that introduce non-negligible computational overhead, often overlooked in attention optimization. The problem is further amplified in multi-dimensional settings (e.g., 2D and 3D RoPE), where additional vector operations and uneven feature partitions degrade hardware utilization. To overcome these limitations, we propose RoME (Rotary Matrix position Embedding), a mathematically equivalent yet computationally efficient reformulation of RoPE that replaces vector operations with unified matrix transformations. RoME eliminates dimension-specific operations, simplifies implementation, and enables fused parallel execution across Cube and Vector units on modern NPUs. Experiments show that RoME delivers substantial acceleration at both the operator and full-model levels. The implementation is available at https://gitcode.com/cann/ops-transformer/blob/master/experimental/posembedding/rope_matrix/README.md.

AI.tldr: RoME是一种新的旋转位置编码实现方法，通过矩阵变换替代向量操作，显著提升计算效率，特别是在2D/3D场景中。
AI.motivation: 现有RoPE实现依赖向量级的分割合并操作，带来不可忽视的计算开销，在多维场景中问题更严重，导致硬件利用率下降。
AI.method: 提出RoME（Rotary Matrix position Embedding），用统一的矩阵变换替代向量操作，消除维度特定操作，支持现代NPU上的融合并行执行。
AI.result: 实验显示RoME在算子和全模型层面都实现了显著加速，特别是在2D/3D场景中效果更明显。
AI.conclusion: RoME为旋转位置编码提供了更高效的计算实现，对Transformer架构优化有重要价值。

title: Are We Recognizing the Jaguar or Its Background? A Diagnostic Framework for Jaguar Re-Identification
