summary: Jaguar re-identification (re-ID) from citizen-science imagery can look strong on standard retrieval metrics while still relying on the wrong evidence, such as background context or silhouette shape, instead of the coat pattern that defines identity. We introduce a diagnostic framework for wildlife re-ID with two axes: a leakage-controlled context ratio, background/foreground, computed from inpainted background-only versus foreground-only images, and a laterality diagnostic based on cross-flank retrieval and mirror self-similarity. To make these diagnostics measurable, we curate a Pantanal jaguar benchmark with per-pixel segmentation masks and an identity-balanced evaluation protocol. We then use representative mitigation families, ArcFace fine-tuning, anti-symmetry regularization, and Lorentz hyperbolic embeddings, as case studies under the same evaluation lens. The goal is not only to ask which model ranks best, but also what visual evidence it uses to do so.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一个诊断框架来评估野生动物重识别模型是否真正依赖关键特征（如美洲豹皮毛图案），而非背景或轮廓等伪特征。框架包含两个诊断轴：泄漏控制上下文比率和侧向性诊断，并在Pantanal美洲豹数据集上验证。
AI.motivation: 现有野生动物重识别模型在标准检索指标上表现良好，但可能依赖错误的视觉证据（如背景环境或轮廓形状），而非真正定义个体身份的关键特征（如美洲豹的皮毛图案）。需要诊断工具来评估模型是否真正学习到正确的身份特征。
AI.method: 提出双轴诊断框架：1) 泄漏控制上下文比率（背景/前景），通过背景修复图像与前景图像计算；2) 侧向性诊断，基于跨侧面检索和镜像自相似性。创建Pantanal美洲豹基准数据集，包含像素级分割掩码和身份平衡评估协议。使用ArcFace微调、抗对称正则化和Lorentz双曲嵌入作为代表性缓解方法进行案例研究。
AI.result: 论文提供了可量化的诊断框架，能够评估重识别模型是否真正依赖正确的视觉证据。在Pantanal美洲豹数据集上验证了不同缓解方法的有效性，不仅关注模型排名，还分析其使用的视觉证据。
AI.conclusion: 需要超越标准检索指标，评估重识别模型是否真正学习到定义个体身份的关键特征。提出的诊断框架为野生动物重识别提供了更深入的评估工具，有助于开发更可靠、可解释的模型。

title: Factorizing formal contexts from closures of necessity operators
summary: Factorizing datasets is an interesting process in a multitude of approaches, but many times it is not possible or efficient the computation of a factorization of the dataset. A method to obtain independent subcontexts of a formal context with Boolean data was proposed in~\cite{dubois:2012}, based on the operators used in possibility theory. In this paper, we will analyze this method and study different properties related to the pairs of sets from which a factorization of a formal context arises. We also inspect how the properties given in the classical case can be extended to the fuzzy framework, which is essential to obtain a mechanism that allows the computation of independent subcontexts of a fuzzy context.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了一种基于可能性理论算子分解形式背景的方法，研究了产生形式背景分解的集合对的性质，并将经典情况下的性质扩展到模糊框架中。
AI.motivation: 数据集分解在许多方法中是一个有趣的过程，但很多时候计算数据集的分解是不可能的或低效的。需要研究如何获得形式背景的独立子背景，特别是在模糊框架下的扩展。
AI.method: 基于可能性理论算子，分析形式背景分解方法，研究产生分解的集合对的性质，并将经典性质扩展到模糊框架中，以获得计算模糊背景独立子背景的机制。
AI.result: 分析了形式背景分解方法的性质，研究了分解集合对的相关特性，并成功将经典性质扩展到模糊框架中，为计算模糊背景的独立子背景提供了理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为形式背景分解提供了理论分析，特别是在模糊框架下的扩展具有重要意义，为处理更复杂的数据集分解问题提供了机制。

title: Linguistic Accommodation Between Neurodivergent Communities on Reddit:A Communication Accommodation Theory Analysis of ADHD and Autism Groups
summary: Social media research on mental health has focused predominantly on detecting and diagnosing conditions at the individual level. In this work, we shift attention to \emph{intergroup} behavior, examining how two prominent neurodivergent communities, ADHD and autism, adjust their language when engaging with each other on Reddit. Grounded in Communication Accommodation Theory (CAT), we first establish that each community maintains a distinct linguistic profile as measured by Language Inquiry and Word Count Lexicon (LIWC). We then show that these profiles shift in opposite directions when users cross community boundaries: features that are elevated in one group's home community decrease when its members post in the other group's space, and vice versa, consistent with convergent accommodation. The involvement of topic-independent summary variables (Authentic, Clout) in these shifts provides partial evidence against a purely topical explanation. Finally, in an exploratory longitudinal analysis around the moment of public diagnosis disclosure, we find that its effects on linguistic style are small and, in some cases, directionally opposite to cross-community accommodation, providing initial evidence that situational audience adaptation and longer-term identity processes may involve different mechanisms. Our findings contribute to understanding intergroup communication dynamics among neurodivergent populations online and carry implications for community moderation and clinical perspectives on these conditions.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了Reddit上ADHD和自闭症社区之间的跨群体语言适应行为，发现当用户跨越社区边界时，语言特征会向对方社区收敛，揭示了神经多样性群体间的沟通动态。
AI.motivation: 现有社交媒体心理健康研究主要关注个体层面的检测和诊断，而本研究将注意力转向群体间行为，旨在理解神经多样性社区（ADHD和自闭症）在Reddit上互动时的语言适应模式。
AI.method: 基于沟通适应理论（CAT），使用LIWC词典分析两个社区的语言特征，比较用户在自家社区和对方社区发帖时的语言变化，并进行纵向分析以考察公开诊断披露的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）每个社区都有独特的语言特征；2）用户跨越社区边界时，语言特征会向对方社区收敛；3）话题无关的摘要变量参与这种变化；4）公开诊断披露对语言风格的影响较小且方向相反。
AI.conclusion: 神经多样性群体间的语言适应揭示了情境性受众适应与长期身份过程可能涉及不同机制，对社区管理和临床视角有重要启示。

title: Explainable Human Activity Recognition: A Unified Review of Concepts and Mechanisms
summary: Human activity recognition (HAR) has become a key component of intelligent systems for healthcare monitoring, assistive living, smart environments, and human-computer interaction. Although deep learning has substantially improved HAR performance on multivariate sensor data, the resulting models often remain opaque, limiting trust, reliability, and real-world deployment. Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) has therefore emerged as a critical direction for making HAR systems more transparent and human-centered. This paper presents a comprehensive review of explainable HAR methods across wearable, ambient, physiological, and multimodal sensing settings. We introduce a unified perspective that separates conceptual dimensions of explainability from algorithmic explanation mechanisms, reducing ambiguities in prior surveys. Building on this distinction, we present a mechanism-centric taxonomy of XAI-HAR methods covering major explanation paradigms. The review examines how these methods address the temporal, multimodal, and semantic complexities of HAR, and summarize their interpretability objectives, explanation targets, and limitations. In addition, we discuss current evaluation practices, highlight key challenges in achieving reliable and deployable XAI-HAR, and outline directions toward trustworthy activity recognition systems that better support human understanding and decision-making.

AI.tldr: 该论文是关于可解释人工智能（XAI）在人类活动识别（HAR）领域的全面综述，提出了统一框架和分类法，旨在提高HAR系统的透明度和可信度。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习显著提升了基于多变量传感器数据的人类活动识别性能，但现有模型通常不透明，限制了信任度、可靠性和实际部署。可解释人工智能因此成为使HAR系统更加透明和以人为中心的关键方向。
AI.method: 论文提出了一个统一视角，将可解释性的概念维度与算法解释机制分开，减少了先前综述中的模糊性。基于这一区分，提出了一个机制中心的XAI-HAR方法分类法，涵盖主要解释范式。综述分析了这些方法如何处理HAR的时间、多模态和语义复杂性。
AI.result: 论文总结了现有XAI-HAR方法的可解释性目标、解释目标和局限性，讨论了当前的评估实践，突出了实现可靠和可部署XAI-HAR的关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 论文为构建更可信的活动识别系统指明了方向，这些系统能更好地支持人类理解和决策制定，推动了可解释人工智能在人类活动识别领域的系统化发展。

title: CAGE: Bridging the Accuracy-Aesthetics Gap in Educational Diagrams via Code-Anchored Generative Enhancement
summary: Educational diagrams -- labeled illustrations of biological processes, chemical structures, physical systems, and mathematical concepts -- are essential cognitive tools in K-12 instruction. Yet no existing method can generate them both accurately and engagingly. Open-source diffusion models produce visually rich images but catastrophically garble text labels. Code-based generation via LLMs guarantees label correctness but yields visually flat outputs. Closed-source APIs partially bridge this gap but remain unreliable and prohibitively expensive at educational scale. We quantify this accuracy-aesthetics dilemma across all three paradigms on 400 K-12 diagram prompts, measuring both label fidelity and visual quality through complementary automated and human evaluation protocols. To resolve it, we propose CAGE (Code-Anchored Generative Enhancement): an LLM synthesizes executable code producing a structurally correct diagram, then a diffusion model conditioned on the programmatic output via ControlNet refines it into a visually polished graphic while preserving label fidelity. We also introduce EduDiagram-2K, a collection of 2,000 paired programmatic-stylized diagrams enabling this pipeline, and present proof-of-concept results and a research agenda for the multimedia community.

AI.tldr: 提出了CAGE框架，通过LLM生成代码创建结构正确的教育图表，再用扩散模型进行视觉增强，解决了教育图表生成中标签准确性与视觉质量的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 教育图表是K-12教学的重要工具，但现有方法无法同时保证标签准确性和视觉质量：开源扩散模型标签错误严重，基于LLM的代码生成方法视觉效果平淡，闭源API不可靠且昂贵。
AI.method: 提出CAGE框架：1) LLM生成可执行代码创建结构正确的图表；2) 通过ControlNet条件扩散模型对程序化输出进行视觉增强，同时保持标签保真度。还创建了EduDiagram-2K数据集。
AI.result: 在400个K-12图表提示上量化了准确性与美学的矛盾，提出了解决方案并展示了概念验证结果。创建了包含2000对程序化-风格化图表的数据集。
AI.conclusion: CAGE框架有效解决了教育图表生成中的准确性与视觉质量权衡问题，为多媒体社区提供了新的研究方向。

title: Agentic Exploration of PDE Spaces using Latent Foundation Models for Parameterized Simulations
summary: Flow physics and more broadly physical phenomena governed by partial differential equations (PDEs), are inherently continuous, high-dimensional and often chaotic in nature. Traditionally, researchers have explored these rich spatiotemporal PDE solution spaces using laboratory experiments and/or computationally expensive numerical simulations. This severely limits automated and large-scale exploration, unlike domains such as drug discovery or materials science, where discrete, tokenizable representations naturally interface with large language models. We address this by coupling multi-agent LLMs with latent foundation models (LFMs), a generative model over parametrised simulations, that learns explicit, compact and disentangled latent representations of flow fields, enabling continuous exploration across governing PDE parameters and boundary conditions. The LFM serves as an on-demand surrogate simulator, allowing agents to query arbitrary parameter configurations at negligible cost. A hierarchical agent architecture orchestrates exploration through a closed loop of hypothesis, experimentation, analysis and verification, with a tool-modular interface requiring no user support. Applied to flow past tandem cylinders at Re = 500, the framework autonomously evaluates over 1,600 parameter-location pairs and discovers divergent scaling laws: a regime-dependent two-mode structure for minimum displacement thickness and a robust linear scaling for maximum momentum thickness, with both landscapes exhibiting a dual-extrema structure that emerges at the near-wake to co-shedding regime transition. The coupling of the learned physical representations with agentic reasoning establishes a general paradigm for automated scientific discovery in PDE-governed systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多智能体LLM与潜在基础模型（LFM）的框架，用于自动探索偏微分方程（PDE）控制的物理现象。LFM作为按需替代模拟器，学习流场的紧凑潜在表示，使智能体能够以低成本查询任意参数配置，实现大规模自动化科学发现。
AI.motivation: 传统上，研究PDE控制的物理现象（如流体力学）依赖于昂贵的实验室实验或数值模拟，这限制了大规模自动化探索。与药物发现或材料科学等离散、可标记化的领域不同，连续、高维且混沌的物理系统难以直接与LLM接口。本文旨在通过结合LLM与生成模型，实现PDE系统的自动化科学探索。
AI.method: 提出耦合多智能体LLM与潜在基础模型（LFM）。LFM是一种参数化模拟的生成模型，学习流场的显式、紧凑且解耦的潜在表示。LFM作为按需替代模拟器，允许智能体以可忽略的成本查询任意参数配置。采用分层智能体架构，通过假设、实验、分析和验证的闭环进行探索，具有无需用户支持的工具模块化接口。
AI.result: 在Re=500的串联圆柱绕流案例中，框架自主评估了超过1,600个参数-位置对，并发现了不同的标度律：最小位移厚度呈现依赖于状态的两模态结构，最大动量厚度呈现稳健的线性标度。两种景观都表现出在近尾流到共脱落状态转变时出现的双极值结构。
AI.conclusion: 学习的物理表示与智能推理的结合，为PDE控制系统的自动化科学发现建立了一个通用范式。该方法能够实现大规模、低成本的物理现象探索，超越了传统方法的限制。

title: ASPIRin: Action Space Projection for Interactivity-Optimized Reinforcement Learning in Full-Duplex Speech Language Models
summary: End-to-end full-duplex Speech Language Models (SLMs) require precise turn-taking for natural interaction. However, optimizing temporal dynamics via standard raw-token reinforcement learning (RL) degrades semantic quality, causing severe generative collapse and repetition. We propose ASPIRin, an interactivity-optimized RL framework that explicitly decouples when to speak from what to say. Using Action Space Projection, ASPIRin maps the text vocabulary into a coarse-grained binary state (active speech vs. inactive silence). By applying Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with rule-based rewards, it balances user interruption and response latency. Empirical evaluations show ASPIRin optimizes interactivity across turn-taking, backchanneling, and pause handling. Crucially, isolating timing from token selection preserves semantic coherence and reduces the portion of duplicate n-grams by over 50% compared to standard GRPO, effectively eliminating degenerative repetition.

AI.tldr: ASPIRin是一个用于端到端全双工语音语言模型的强化学习框架，通过将文本词汇映射到二元状态（说话/沉默）来解耦"何时说话"和"说什么"，优化交互性同时保持语义质量。
AI.motivation: 端到端全双工语音语言模型需要精确的轮换机制来实现自然交互，但使用标准原始token强化学习优化时间动态会降低语义质量，导致严重的生成崩溃和重复问题。
AI.method: 提出ASPIRin框架：1) 使用动作空间投影将文本词汇映射到粗粒度的二元状态（主动说话vs.非活动沉默）；2) 应用带有规则奖励的组相对策略优化来平衡用户打断和响应延迟。
AI.result: ASPIRin优化了轮换、回馈和停顿处理等交互性指标。更重要的是，将时间控制与token选择分离保持了语义连贯性，相比标准GRPO将重复n-gram的比例降低了50%以上，有效消除了退化性重复。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦"何时说话"和"说什么"，ASPIRin框架能够在优化语音语言模型交互性的同时保持语义质量，解决了传统强化学习方法导致的生成崩溃问题。

title: NeuroFlow: Toward Unified Visual Encoding and Decoding from Neural Activity
summary: Visual encoding and decoding models act as gateways to understanding the neural mechanisms underlying human visual perception. Typically, visual encoding models that predict brain activity from stimuli and decoding models that reproduce stimuli from brain activity are treated as distinct tasks, requiring separate models and training procedures. This separation is inefficient and fails to model the consistency between encoding and decoding processes. To address this limitation, we propose NeuroFlow, the first unified framework that jointly models visual encoding and decoding from neural activity within a single flow model. NeuroFlow introduces two key components: (1) NeuroVAE is designed as a variational backbone to model neural variability and establish a compact, semantically structured latent space for bidirectional modeling across visual and neural modalities. (2) Cross-modal Flow Matching (XFM) bypasses the typical paradigm of noise-to-data diffusion guided by a specific modality condition, instead learning a reversibly consistent flow model between visual and neural latent distributions. For the first time, visual encoding and decoding are reformulated as a time-dependent, reversible process within a shared latent space for unified modeling. Empirical results demonstrate that NeuroFlow achieves superior overall performance in visual encoding and decoding tasks with higher computational efficiency compared to any isolated methods. We further analyze principal factors that steer the model toward encoding-decoding consistency and, through brain functional analyses, demonstrate that NeuroFlow captures consistent activation patterns underlying neural variability. NeuroFlow marks a major step toward unified visual encoding and decoding from neural activity, providing mechanistic insights that inform future bidirectional visual brain-computer interfaces.

AI.tldr: NeuroFlow：首个统一视觉编码与解码的流模型框架，通过NeuroVAE和跨模态流匹配实现双向建模，在脑活动与视觉刺激间建立可逆一致的过程。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉编码模型（从刺激预测脑活动）和解码模型（从脑活动重建刺激）是分离的，这既低效又无法建模编码-解码过程的一致性。需要统一框架来同时处理这两个任务。
AI.method: 提出NeuroFlow框架：1) NeuroVAE作为变分骨干，建模神经变异性，建立紧凑的语义结构化潜空间；2) 跨模态流匹配(XFM)学习视觉和神经潜分布间的可逆一致流模型，替代传统的噪声到数据的扩散范式。
AI.result: NeuroFlow在视觉编码和解码任务上取得整体优越性能，计算效率高于任何孤立方法。分析显示模型实现了编码-解码一致性，并通过脑功能分析证明能捕捉神经变异性的激活模式。
AI.conclusion: NeuroFlow是统一视觉编码与解码的重要进展，为未来双向视觉脑机接口提供了机制性见解，首次将编码-解码重新表述为共享潜空间中的时间依赖可逆过程。

title: TaFall: Balance-Informed Fall Detection via Passive Thermal Sensing
summary: Falls are a major cause of injury and mortality among older adults, yet most incidents occur in private indoor environments where monitoring must balance effectiveness with privacy. Existing privacy-preserving fall detection approaches, particularly those based on radio frequency sensing, often rely on coarse motion cues, which limits reliability in real-world deployments. We introduce TaFall, a balance-informed fall detection system based on low-cost, privacy-preserving thermal array sensing. The key insight is that TaFall models a fall as a process of balance degradation and detects falls by estimating pose-driven biomechanical balance dynamics. To enable this capability from low-resolution thermal array maps, we propose (i) an appearance-motion fusion model for robust pose reconstruction, (ii) physically grounded balance-aware learning, and (iii) pose-bridged pretraining to improve robustness. TaFall achieves a detection rate of 98.26% with a false alarm rate of 0.65% on our dataset with over 3,000 fall instances from 35 participants across diverse indoor environments. In 27 day deployments across four homes, TaFall attains an ultra-low false alarm rate of 0.00126% and a pilot bathroom study confirms robustness under moisture and thermal interference. Together, these results establish TaFall as a reliable and privacy-preserving approach to fall detection in everyday living environments.

AI.tldr: TaFall：基于低成本热阵列传感的平衡感知跌倒检测系统，通过建模平衡退化过程实现高精度隐私保护跌倒检测
AI.motivation: 老年人跌倒是一个严重的健康问题，但大多数跌倒发生在室内私人环境中，需要在监测效果和隐私保护之间取得平衡。现有的基于射频传感的隐私保护跌倒检测方法通常依赖粗略的运动线索，在实际部署中可靠性有限。
AI.method: 1) 提出外观-运动融合模型用于鲁棒的姿态重建；2) 基于物理的平衡感知学习；3) 姿态桥接预训练以提高鲁棒性。系统将跌倒建模为平衡退化过程，通过估计姿态驱动的生物力学平衡动态来检测跌倒。
AI.result: 在包含35名参与者、3000多个跌倒实例的数据集上，检测率达到98.26%，误报率为0.65%。在4个家庭的27天部署中，误报率仅为0.00126%。浴室试点研究证实了在湿度和热干扰下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TaFall被确立为日常生活中可靠且隐私保护的跌倒检测方法，通过平衡感知的生物力学建模，在保持隐私的同时实现了高精度检测。

title: MobiFlow: Real-World Mobile Agent Benchmarking through Trajectory Fusion
summary: Mobile agents can autonomously complete user-assigned tasks through GUI interactions. However, existing mainstream evaluation benchmarks, such as AndroidWorld, operate by connecting to a system-level Android emulator and provide evaluation signals based on the state of system resources. In real-world mobile-agent scenarios, however, many third-party applications do not expose system-level APIs to determine whether a task has succeeded, leading to a mismatch between benchmarks and real-world usage and making it difficult to evaluate model performance accurately. To address these issues, we propose MobiFlow, an evaluation framework built on tasks drawn from arbitrary third-party applications. Using an efficient graph-construction algorithm based on multi-trajectory fusion, MobiFlow can effectively compress the state space, support dynamic interaction, and better align with real-world third-party application scenarios. MobiFlow covers 20 widely used third-party applications and comprises 240 diverse real-world tasks, with enriched evaluation metrics. Compared with AndroidWorld, MobiFlow's evaluation results show higher alignment with human assessments and can guide the training of future GUI-based models under real workloads.

AI.tldr: MobiFlow是一个面向移动智能体GUI交互的评估框架，专注于第三方应用任务，通过多轨迹融合的图构建算法压缩状态空间，提供更贴近真实场景的评估
AI.motivation: 现有移动智能体评估基准（如AndroidWorld）依赖系统级Android模拟器和系统资源状态提供评估信号，但许多第三方应用不暴露系统级API来确定任务是否成功，导致基准与真实使用场景不匹配，难以准确评估模型性能
AI.method: 提出MobiFlow评估框架，基于任意第三方应用任务构建，采用基于多轨迹融合的高效图构建算法，能有效压缩状态空间，支持动态交互，更好地对齐真实第三方应用场景
AI.result: MobiFlow覆盖20个广泛使用的第三方应用，包含240个多样化真实世界任务，提供丰富的评估指标。相比AndroidWorld，MobiFlow的评估结果与人类评估更一致，能指导真实工作负载下GUI模型的训练
AI.conclusion: MobiFlow解决了现有移动智能体评估基准与真实第三方应用场景不匹配的问题，提供了更贴近实际使用场景的评估框架，有助于更准确地评估和指导GUI交互模型的开发

title: Reason Only When Needed: Efficient Generative Reward Modeling via Model-Internal Uncertainty
summary: Recent advancements in the Generative Reward Model (GRM) have demonstrated its potential to enhance the reasoning abilities of LLMs through Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting. Despite these gains, existing implementations of GRM suffer from two critical limitations. First, CoT prompting is applied indiscriminately to all inputs regardless of their inherent complexity. This introduces unnecessary computational costs for tasks amenable to fast, direct inference. Second, existing approaches primarily rely on voting-based mechanisms to evaluate CoT outputs, which often lack granularity and precision in assessing reasoning quality. In this paper, we propose E-GRM, an efficient generative reward modeling framework grounded in model-internal uncertainty. E-GRM leverages the convergence behavior of parallel model generations to estimate uncertainty and selectively trigger CoT reasoning only when needed, without relying on handcrafted features or task-dependent signals. To improve reward fidelity, we introduce a lightweight discriminative scorer trained with a hybrid regression--ranking objective to provide fine-grained evaluation of reasoning paths. Experiments on multiple reasoning benchmarks show that E-GRM substantially reduces inference cost while consistently improving answer accuracy, demonstrating that model-internal uncertainty is an effective and general signal for efficient reasoning-aware reward modeling.

AI.tldr: E-GRM：基于模型内部不确定性的高效生成奖励建模框架，通过选择性触发CoT推理和细粒度评分器，在降低计算成本的同时提升推理准确性
AI.motivation: 现有GRM方法存在两个关键限制：1) CoT提示对所有输入无差别应用，导致简单任务计算成本过高；2) 基于投票的评估机制缺乏对推理质量的细粒度评估
AI.method: 1) 利用并行模型生成的收敛行为估计不确定性，仅在需要时选择性触发CoT推理；2) 引入轻量级判别性评分器，采用混合回归-排序目标对推理路径进行细粒度评估
AI.result: 在多个推理基准测试中，E-GRM显著降低推理成本，同时持续提升答案准确性，证明模型内部不确定性是高效推理感知奖励建模的有效通用信号
AI.conclusion: 模型内部不确定性可作为高效推理感知奖励建模的有效信号，E-GRM框架通过选择性CoT触发和细粒度评分实现了计算效率与推理质量的平衡

title: Below-ground Fungal Biodiversity Can be Monitored Using Self-Supervised Learning Satellite Features
summary: Mycorrhizal fungi are vital to terrestrial ecosystem functioning. Yet monitoring their biodiversity at landscape scales is often unfeasible due to time and cost constraints. Current predictions suggest that 90\% of mycorrhizal diversity hotspots remain unprotected, opening questions of how to broadly and effectively map underground fungal communities. Here, we show that self-supervised learning (SSL) applied to satellite imagery can predict below-ground ectomycorrhizal fungal richness across diverse environments. Our models explain over half the variance in species richness across ~12,000 field samples spanning Europe and Asia. SSL-derived features prove to be the single most informative predictor, subsuming the majority of information contained in climate, soil, and land cover datasets. Using this approach, we achieve a 10,000-fold increase in spatial resolution over existing techniques, moving from 1km landscape averages to 10m habitat-scale observations with nearly no systematic bias. As satellite observations are dynamic rather than static, this enables temporal monitoring of below-ground biodiversity at landscape scales for the first time. We analyze multi-year trends in predicted fungal richness across UK National Park woodlands, finding that ancient forests may be losing ectomycorrhizal diversity at disproportionate rates. These results establish SSL satellite features as a scalable tool for extending sparse field observations to continuous, high-resolution biodiversity maps for monitoring the invisible half of terrestrial ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 该研究展示了自监督学习结合卫星影像可预测地下真菌多样性，将空间分辨率提升10,000倍，实现10米尺度监测
AI.motivation: 监测地下真菌多样性面临时间和成本限制，90%的真菌多样性热点未受保护，需要开发大范围有效监测方法
AI.method: 采用自监督学习处理卫星影像，预测欧洲和亚洲约12,000个野外样本的菌根真菌丰富度，整合气候、土壤和土地利用数据
AI.result: 模型解释超过50%的物种丰富度方差，SSL特征是最具信息量的预测因子，空间分辨率从1公里提升到10米，无系统偏差
AI.conclusion: SSL卫星特征可作为可扩展工具，将稀疏野外观测扩展到连续高分辨率生物多样性地图，首次实现景观尺度地下生物多样性时间监测

title: EDFNet: Early Fusion of Edge and Depth for Thin-Obstacle Segmentation in UAV Navigation
summary: Autonomous Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) must reliably detect thin obstacles such as wires, poles, and branches to navigate safely in real-world environments. These structures remain difficult to perceive because they occupy few pixels, often exhibit weak visual contrast, and are strongly affected by class imbalance. Existing segmentation methods primarily target coarser obstacles and do not fully exploit the complementary multimodal cues needed for thin-structure perception. We present EDFNet, a modular early-fusion segmentation framework that integrates RGB, depth, and edge information for thin-obstacle perception in cluttered aerial scenes. We evaluate EDFNet on the Drone Depth and Obstacle Segmentation (DDOS) dataset across sixteen modality-backbone configurations using U-Net and DeepLabV3 in pretrained and non-pretrained settings. The results show that early RGB-Depth-Edge fusion provides a competitive and well-balanced baseline, with the most consistent gains appearing in boundary-sensitive and recall-oriented metrics. The pretrained RGBDE U-Net achieves the best overall performance, with the highest Thin-Structure Evaluation Score (0.244), mean IoU (0.219), and boundary IoU (0.234), while maintaining competitive runtime performance (19.62 FPS) on our evaluation hardware. However, performance on the rarest ultra-thin categories remains low across all models, indicating that reliable ultra-thin segmentation is still an open challenge. Overall, these findings position early RGB-Depth-Edge fusion as a practical and modular baseline for thin-obstacle segmentation in UAV navigation.

AI.tldr: EDFNet：一种用于无人机导航中细障碍物感知的早期RGB-深度-边缘融合分割框架，在DDOS数据集上评估显示早期多模态融合在细结构检测中具有竞争力
AI.motivation: 无人机需要可靠检测电线、杆子、树枝等细障碍物以确保安全导航，但这些结构因像素少、视觉对比度弱、类别不平衡而难以感知，现有分割方法主要针对粗障碍物且未充分利用多模态线索
AI.method: 提出EDFNet，一种模块化早期融合分割框架，集成RGB、深度和边缘信息用于杂乱空中场景中的细障碍物感知，在DDOS数据集上评估了16种模态-骨干配置，使用U-Net和DeepLabV3的预训练和非预训练设置
AI.result: 早期RGB-深度-边缘融合提供了竞争性且平衡的基线，在边界敏感和召回导向指标中表现最一致，预训练RGBDE U-Net获得最佳整体性能（最高细结构评估分数0.244、平均IoU 0.219、边界IoU 0.234），同时保持竞争性运行时性能（19.62 FPS）
AI.conclusion: 早期RGB-深度-边缘融合是无人机导航中细障碍物分割的实用模块化基线，但所有模型在超细类别上的性能仍然较低，表明可靠的超细分割仍是一个开放挑战

title: Persistent Identity in AI Agents: A Multi-Anchor Architecture for Resilient Memory and Continuity
comment: 18 pages, 2 figures. Submitting to arXiv cs.ET (Emerging Technologies)
summary: Modern AI agents suffer from a fundamental identity problem: when context windows overflow and conversation histories are summarized, agents experience catastrophic forgetting -- losing not just information, but continuity of self. This technical limitation reflects a deeper architectural flaw: AI agent identity is centralized in a single memory store, creating a single point of failure. Drawing on neurological case studies of human memory disorders, we observe that human identity survives damage because it is distributed across multiple systems: episodic memory, procedural memory, emotional continuity, and embodied knowledge. We present soul.py, an open-source architecture that implements persistent identity through separable components (identity files and memory logs), and propose extensions toward multi-anchor resilience. The framework introduces a hybrid RAG+RLM retrieval system that automatically routes queries to appropriate memory access patterns, achieving efficient retrieval without sacrificing comprehensiveness. We formalize the notion of identity anchors for AI systems and present a roadmap for building agents whose identity can survive partial memory failures. Code is available at github.com/menonpg/soul.py

AI.tldr: 提出soul.py架构，通过可分离的身份文件和记忆日志实现AI代理的持久身份，解决上下文窗口溢出和记忆摘要导致的灾难性遗忘问题，借鉴人类记忆系统设计分布式身份存储。
AI.motivation: 现代AI代理存在根本的身份问题：当上下文窗口溢出和对话历史被摘要时，代理会经历灾难性遗忘——不仅丢失信息，还失去自我连续性。这反映了更深层的架构缺陷：AI代理身份集中在单一记忆存储中，形成单点故障。
AI.method: 提出soul.py开源架构，通过可分离组件（身份文件和记忆日志）实现持久身份；引入混合RAG+RLM检索系统，自动将查询路由到适当的记忆访问模式；形式化AI系统身份锚点概念，提出多锚点韧性扩展。
AI.result: 实现了高效检索而不牺牲全面性，为构建能够承受部分记忆故障的代理提供了路线图。代码已在github.com/menonpg/soul.py开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过分布式身份存储架构解决AI代理的身份连续性问题，借鉴人类记忆系统的多系统分布特性，使AI身份能够在部分记忆故障中存活。

title: Why Supervised Fine-Tuning Fails to Learn: A Systematic Study of Incomplete Learning in Large Language Models
summary: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) is the standard approach for adapting large language models (LLMs) to downstream tasks. However, we observe a persistent failure mode: even after convergence, models often fail to correctly reproduce a subset of their own supervised training data. We refer to this behavior as the Incomplete Learning Phenomenon(ILP). This paper presents the first systematic study of ILP in LLM fine-tuning. We formalize ILP as post-training failure to internalize supervised instances and demonstrate its prevalence across multiple model families, domains, and datasets. Through controlled analyses, we identify five recurrent sources of incomplete learning: (1) missing prerequisite knowledge in the pre-trained model, (2) conflicts between SFT supervision and pre-training knowledge, (3) internal inconsistencies within SFT data, (4) left-side forgetting during sequential fine-tuning, and (5) insufficient optimization for rare or complex patterns. We introduce a diagnostic-first framework that maps unlearned samples to these causes using observable training and inference signals, and study several targeted mitigation strategies as causal interventions. Experiments on Qwen, LLaMA, and OLMo2 show that incomplete learning is widespread and heterogeneous, and that improvements in aggregate metrics can mask persistent unlearned subsets. The findings highlight the need for fine-grained diagnosis of what supervised fine-tuning fails to learn, and why.

AI.tldr: 论文系统研究了LLM监督微调中的"不完全学习现象"：模型即使在收敛后仍无法正确复现部分训练数据，识别了5种根本原因，并提出了诊断框架和缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 监督微调是LLM适应下游任务的标准方法，但作者观察到模型即使在收敛后仍无法正确复现部分训练数据，这种现象被称为"不完全学习现象"。目前缺乏对这一现象的系统研究，需要理解SFT失败学习的内容和原因。
AI.method: 1. 形式化定义不完全学习现象为后训练阶段未能内化监督实例；2. 在多个模型家族、领域和数据集上验证其普遍性；3. 通过控制分析识别5种根本原因；4. 提出诊断优先框架，使用可观察的训练和推理信号将未学习样本映射到具体原因；5. 研究针对性的缓解策略作为因果干预。
AI.result: 在Qwen、LLaMA和OLMo2上的实验表明：1. 不完全学习现象广泛存在且具有异质性；2. 聚合指标的改进可能掩盖了持续未学习的子集；3. 诊断框架能有效识别具体原因；4. 针对性缓解策略对改善特定类型的不完全学习有效。
AI.conclusion: 监督微调存在系统性的不完全学习问题，需要细粒度诊断来理解模型未能学习的内容和原因。研究强调了超越聚合指标的重要性，为改进LLM微调提供了理论基础和实践框架。

title: Relational Preference Encoding in Looped Transformer Internal States
summary:
We investigate how looped transformers encode human preference in their internal iteration states. Using Ouro-2.6B-Thinking, a 2.6B-parameter looped transformer with iterative refinement, we extract hidden states from each loop iteration and train lightweight evaluator heads (~5M parameters) to predict human preference on the Anthropic HH-RLHF dataset. Our pairwise evaluator achieves 95.2% test accuracy on 8,552 unseen examples, surpassing a full-batch L-BFGS probe (84.5%) while the base model remains completely frozen.
  Our central finding is that loop states encode preference predominantly relationally: a linear probe on pairwise differences achieves 84.5%, the best nonlinear independent evaluator reaches only 65% test accuracy, and linear independent classification scores 21.75%, below chance and with inverted polarity. Interpreted precisely, the evaluator functions as a model-internal consistency probe, measuring how stably Ouro's own learned value system organizes its representations rather than how well it predicts noisy human annotations.
  We also document a systematic architecture search that established a genuine 70% ceiling for independent scoring, and show how the 50% argument-swap protocol required to prevent degenerate pairwise solutions deflated pairwise training metrics by about 31 points at peak, creating the false appearance that pairwise and pointwise evaluators shared the same ceiling.
  Finally, we show that a cosine learning-rate dead zone at epoch 2 accidentally acted as early stopping, preserving the generalization peak before overfitting degraded test accuracy from 95.2% to 62.4% by epoch 5. Cross-epoch flip-test analysis shows that antisymmetry correlation remains stable while strict sign-flip rate mainly tracks scorer bias. We propose the flip test as a mandatory diagnostic for pairwise preference evaluators.

AI.tldr: 研究了循环Transformer如何在其内部迭代状态中编码人类偏好，使用Ouro-2.6B-Thinking模型提取隐藏状态，训练轻量级评估器预测人类偏好，发现偏好主要通过关系性方式编码而非独立表示。
AI.motivation: 探索循环Transformer模型如何在其内部状态中编码人类偏好，特别是理解偏好信息是以关系性方式还是独立方式表示，这对于理解模型内部的价值系统具有重要意义。
AI.method: 使用2.6B参数的循环Transformer Ouro-2.6B-Thinking，提取每个循环迭代的隐藏状态，在Anthropic HH-RLHF数据集上训练轻量级评估器头（约5M参数），采用成对比较和独立评分两种方法，并进行架构搜索和翻转测试分析。
AI.result: 成对评估器在8,552个未见样本上达到95.2%的测试准确率，显著优于全批次L-BFGS探针（84.5%）。研究发现偏好主要通过关系性方式编码：线性探针在成对差异上达到84.5%，而非线性独立评估器仅65%，线性独立分类甚至低于随机水平（21.75%）。
AI.conclusion: 循环Transformer中的偏好信息主要通过关系性方式编码，评估器实际上测量模型内部价值系统的一致性而非预测噪声人类标注。翻转测试应作为成对偏好评估器的必要诊断工具，学习率死区意外起到了早停作用。

title: Assessing Privacy Preservation and Utility in Online Vision-Language Models
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE ICC 2026. \c{opyright} IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. The final version will appear in IEEE Xplore
summary: The increasing use of Online Vision Language Models (OVLMs) for processing images has introduced significant privacy risks, as individuals frequently upload images for various utilities, unaware of the potential for privacy violations. Images contain relationships that relate to Personally Identifiable Information (PII), where even seemingly harmless details can indirectly reveal sensitive information through surrounding clues. This paper explores the critical issue of PII disclosure in images uploaded to OVLMs and its implications for user privacy. We investigate how the extraction of contextual relationships from images can lead to direct (explicit) or indirect (implicit) exposure of PII, significantly compromising personal privacy. Furthermore, we propose methods to protect privacy while preserving the intended utility of the images in Vision Language Model (VLM)-based applications. Our evaluation demonstrates the efficacy of these techniques, highlighting the delicate balance between maintaining utility and protecting privacy in online image processing environments. Index Terms-Personally Identifiable Information (PII), Privacy, Utility, privacy concerns, sensitive information

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在线视觉语言模型(OVLMs)处理图像时的隐私风险，特别是个人可识别信息(PII)泄露问题，并提出保护隐私同时保持图像效用的方法。
AI.motivation: 随着在线视觉语言模型(OVLMs)的广泛使用，用户上传图像时面临隐私风险。图像中包含的个人可识别信息(PII)可能通过上下文关系被间接揭示，导致隐私泄露，而用户往往对此缺乏认知。
AI.method: 研究图像中上下文关系提取如何导致PII的直接或间接暴露，并提出在视觉语言模型(VLM)应用中保护隐私同时保持图像效用的方法。
AI.result: 评估显示所提出的隐私保护技术有效，能够在在线图像处理环境中平衡效用和隐私保护。
AI.conclusion: 在线视觉语言模型处理图像时存在显著的PII泄露风险，需要开发有效的隐私保护方法来平衡效用和隐私，这对可信AI发展至关重要。

title: DeepReviewer 2.0: A Traceable Agentic System for Auditable Scientific Peer Review
summary: Automated peer review is often framed as generating fluent critique, yet reviewers and area chairs need judgments they can \emph{audit}: where a concern applies, what evidence supports it, and what concrete follow-up is required. DeepReviewer~2.0 is a process-controlled agentic review system built around an output contract: it produces a \textbf{traceable review package} with anchored annotations, localized evidence, and executable follow-up actions, and it exports only after meeting minimum traceability and coverage budgets. Concretely, it first builds a manuscript-only claim--evidence--risk ledger and verification agenda, then performs agenda-driven retrieval and writes anchored critiques under an export gate. On 134 ICLR~2025 submissions under three fixed protocols, an \emph{un-finetuned 196B} model running DeepReviewer~2.0 outperforms Gemini-3.1-Pro-preview, improving strict major-issue coverage (37.26\% vs.\ 23.57\%) and winning 71.63\% of micro-averaged blind comparisons against a human review committee, while ranking first among automatic systems in our pool. We position DeepReviewer~2.0 as an assistive tool rather than a decision proxy, and note remaining gaps such as ethics-sensitive checks.

AI.tldr: DeepReviewer 2.0是一个过程控制的代理评审系统，通过可追溯的评审包（包含锚定注释、本地化证据和可执行的后续行动）来改进自动同行评审的可审计性，在ICLR 2025提交上表现优于Gemini-3.1-Pro-preview和人类评审委员会。
AI.motivation: 当前自动同行评审系统主要关注生成流畅的批评，但缺乏可审计性——评审者和领域主席需要能够追踪问题所在、支持证据和具体后续行动。现有系统难以提供这种可追溯的评审过程。
AI.method:
1. 构建仅基于稿件的声明-证据-风险账本和验证议程
2. 执行议程驱动的检索
3. 在导出门控下编写锚定批评
4. 系统仅在满足最小可追溯性和覆盖度预算后才导出评审包
AI.result:
在134个ICLR 2025提交上，未微调的196B模型运行DeepReviewer 2.0：
1. 严格主要问题覆盖度：37.26% vs Gemini-3.1-Pro-preview的23.57%
2. 在微观平均盲比较中，71.63%优于人类评审委员会
3. 在自动系统中排名第一
AI.conclusion: DeepReviewer 2.0定位为辅助工具而非决策代理，通过过程控制和可追溯输出改进了自动评审的可审计性。但仍存在伦理敏感检查等差距。

title: SEPTQ: A Simple and Effective Post-Training Quantization Paradigm for Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown remarkable performance in various domains, but they are constrained by massive computational and storage costs. Quantization, an effective technique for compressing models to fit resource-limited devices while preserving generative quality, encompasses two primary methods: quantization aware training (QAT) and post-training quantization (PTQ). QAT involves additional retraining or fine-tuning, thus inevitably resulting in high training cost and making it unsuitable for LLMs. Consequently, PTQ has become the research hotspot in recent quantization methods. However, existing PTQ methods usually rely on various complex computation procedures and suffer from considerable performance degradation under low-bit quantization settings. To alleviate the above issues, we propose a simple and effective post-training quantization paradigm for LLMs, named SEPTQ. Specifically, SEPTQ first calculates the importance score for each element in the weight matrix and determines the quantization locations in a static global manner. Then it utilizes the mask matrix which represents the important locations to quantize and update the associated weights column-by-column until the appropriate quantized weight matrix is obtained. Compared with previous methods, SEPTQ simplifies the post-training quantization procedure into only two steps, and considers the effectiveness and efficiency simultaneously. Experimental results on various datasets across a suite of models ranging from millions to billions in different quantization bit-levels demonstrate that SEPTQ significantly outperforms other strong baselines, especially in low-bit quantization scenarios.

AI.tldr: SEPTQ：一种简单有效的LLM后训练量化方法，通过静态全局重要性评分和逐列量化更新，在低比特量化场景中显著优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型的计算和存储成本巨大，量化是有效的压缩技术。QAT需要重新训练成本高，不适合LLM；现有PTQ方法通常依赖复杂计算过程，在低比特量化下性能下降严重。需要一种简单有效的后训练量化方法。
AI.method: SEPTQ包含两个步骤：1) 计算权重矩阵中每个元素的重要性分数，以静态全局方式确定量化位置；2) 使用表示重要位置的掩码矩阵，逐列量化和更新相关权重，直到获得合适的量化权重矩阵。
AI.result: 在各种数据集和从百万到数十亿参数的不同模型上，在不同量化比特级别下，SEPTQ显著优于其他强基线方法，特别是在低比特量化场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: SEPTQ将后训练量化简化为仅两个步骤，同时考虑了有效性和效率，为LLM量化提供了一种简单而强大的解决方案。

title: Efficient Personalization of Generative User Interfaces
summary: Generative user interfaces (UIs) create new opportunities to adapt interfaces to individual users on demand, but personalization remains difficult because desirable UI properties are subjective, hard to articulate, and costly to infer from sparse feedback. We study this problem through a new dataset in which 20 trained designers each provide pairwise judgments over the same 600 generated UIs, enabling direct analysis of preference divergence. We find substantial disagreement across designers (average kappa = 0.25), and written rationales reveal that even when designers appeal to similar concepts such as hierarchy or cleanliness, designers differ in how they define, prioritize, and apply those concepts. Motivated by these findings, we develop a sample-efficient personalization method that represents a new user in terms of prior designers rather than a fixed rubric of design concepts. In a technical evaluation, our preference model outperforms both a pretrained UI evaluator and a larger multimodal model, and scales better with additional feedback. When used to personalize generation, it also produces interfaces preferred by 12 new designers over baseline approaches, including direct user prompting. Our findings suggest that lightweight preference elicitation can serve as a practical foundation for personalized generative UI systems.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了生成式用户界面个性化中的偏好分歧问题，通过设计师对600个生成UI的成对判断数据集，发现设计师之间存在显著分歧，并开发了基于设计师先验知识的个性化方法。
AI.motivation: 生成式UI虽然能按需为用户定制界面，但个性化仍然困难，因为理想的UI属性是主观的、难以明确表达，且从稀疏反馈中推断成本高昂。需要解决设计师偏好分歧问题，实现有效的个性化生成。
AI.method: 1) 构建新数据集：20名训练有素的设计师对相同的600个生成UI提供成对判断；2) 分析偏好分歧：计算一致性指标，分析书面理由；3) 开发个性化方法：基于先前设计师而非固定设计概念来表征新用户，实现样本高效的偏好建模。
AI.result: 1) 发现设计师之间存在显著分歧（平均kappa=0.25）；2) 即使设计师使用类似概念（如层次结构、简洁性），他们在定义、优先级和应用上存在差异；3) 开发的偏好模型在技术评估中优于预训练的UI评估器和更大的多模态模型；4) 用于个性化生成时，12名新设计师更偏好该方法生成的界面。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级的偏好获取可以作为个性化生成UI系统的实用基础。通过基于设计师先验知识而非固定概念框架的个性化方法，能够有效应对主观偏好分歧问题。

title: I Can't Believe TTA Is Not Better: When Test-Time Augmentation Hurts Medical Image Classification
summary: Test-time augmentation (TTA)--aggregating predictions over multiple augmented copies of a test input--is widely assumed to improve classification accuracy, particularly in medical imaging where it is routinely deployed in production systems and competition solutions. We present a systematic empirical study challenging this assumption across three MedMNIST v2 benchmarks and four architectures spanning three orders of magnitude in parameter count (21K to 11M). Our principal finding is that TTA with standard augmentation pipelines consistently degrades accuracy relative to single-pass inference, with drops as severe as 31.6 percentage points for ResNet-18 on pathology images. This degradation affects all architectures, including convolutional models, and worsens with more augmented views. The sole exception is ResNet-18 on dermatology images, which gains a modest +1.6%. We identify the distribution shift between augmented and training-time inputs--amplified by batch normalization statistics mismatch--as the primary mechanism. Our ablation studies show that augmentation strategy matters critically: intensity-only augmentations preserve more performance than geometric transforms, and including the original unaugmented image partially mitigates but does not eliminate the accuracy drop. These findings serve as a cautionary note for practitioners: TTA should not be applied as a default post-hoc improvement but must be validated on the specific model-dataset combination.

AI.tldr: TTA（测试时增强）在医学图像分类中通常被认为能提高准确性，但本研究发现在MedMNIST基准测试中，标准增强流程反而会降低所有架构的准确率，最多下降31.6个百分点。
AI.motivation: 测试时增强在医学影像分析中被广泛假设能提高分类准确性，并常规部署于生产系统和竞赛解决方案中。本研究旨在系统性地验证这一假设是否成立。
AI.method: 在MedMNIST v2的三个基准数据集和四种架构（参数规模从21K到11M）上进行系统实证研究，评估标准增强流程对分类准确性的影响，并通过消融实验分析不同增强策略的效果。
AI.result: TTA使用标准增强流程会持续降低准确性，相对于单次推理，ResNet-18在病理图像上准确率下降高达31.6个百分点。所有架构都受到影响，且增强视图越多性能越差。唯一例外是ResNet-18在皮肤病图像上获得+1.6%的微小提升。
AI.conclusion: TTA不应作为默认的后处理改进手段，必须在特定模型-数据集组合上进行验证。增强策略至关重要：仅强度增强比几何变换能保留更多性能，包含原始未增强图像只能部分缓解但不能消除准确率下降。

title: Spatial Competence Benchmark
comment: Accepted at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Efficient Spatial Reasoning
summary: Spatial competence is the quality of maintaining a consistent internal representation of an environment and using it to infer discrete structure and plan actions under constraints. Prevailing spatial evaluations for large models are limited to probing isolated primitives through 3D transformations or visual question answering. We introduce the Spatial Competence Benchmark (SCBench), spanning three hierarchical capability buckets whose tasks require executable outputs verified by deterministic checkers or simulator-based evaluators. On SCBench, three frontier models exhibit monotonically decreasing accuracy up the capability ladder. Sweeping output-token caps shows that accuracy gains concentrate at low budgets and saturate quickly, and failures are dominated by locally plausible geometry that breaks global constraints. We release the task generators, verifiers, and visualisation tooling.

AI.tldr: SCBench是一个评估大模型空间能力的新基准，包含三个层次的能力桶，要求可执行输出并通过确定性检查器或模拟器验证。前沿模型在能力阶梯上表现出单调递减的准确性，且准确率提升集中在低预算区域。
AI.motivation: 现有的大模型空间评估局限于通过3D变换或视觉问答探测孤立的基本能力，缺乏对空间能力的系统性评估。作者希望建立一个更全面的空间能力基准，评估模型在维持环境内部一致表示、推断离散结构和约束下规划行动的能力。
AI.method: 引入空间能力基准SCBench，包含三个层次的能力桶，任务要求可执行输出并通过确定性检查器或模拟器验证。通过扫描输出标记限制来分析模型性能，并分析失败模式。
AI.result: 三个前沿模型在SCBench上表现出随能力层次提升而单调递减的准确性。准确率提升集中在低预算区域并快速饱和，失败主要由局部合理但破坏全局约束的几何结构导致。
AI.conclusion: SCBench揭示了当前大模型在空间能力方面的系统性缺陷，特别是在高层次空间推理和全局约束满足方面。基准提供了任务生成器、验证器和可视化工具，为未来研究提供了基础。

title: Who Wrote This Line? Evaluating the Detection of LLM-Generated Classical Chinese Poetry
summary: The rapid development of large language models (LLMs) has extended text generation tasks into the literary domain. However, AI-generated literary creations has raised increasingly prominent issues of creative authenticity and ethics in literary world, making the detection of LLM-generated literary texts essential and urgent. While previous works have made significant progress in detecting AI-generated text, it has yet to address classical Chinese poetry. Due to the unique linguistic features of classical Chinese poetry, such as strict metrical regularity, a shared system of poetic imagery, and flexible syntax, distinguishing whether a poem is authored by AI presents a substantial challenge. To address these issues, we introduce ChangAn, a benchmark for detecting LLM-generated classical Chinese poetry that containing total 30,664 poems, 10,276 are human-written poems and 20,388 poems are generated by four popular LLMs. Based on ChangAn, we conducted a systematic evaluation of 12 AI detectors, investigating their performance variations across different text granularities and generation strategies. Our findings highlight the limitations of current Chinese text detectors, which fail to serve as reliable tools for detecting LLM-generated classical Chinese poetry. These results validate the effectiveness and necessity of our proposed ChangAn benchmark. Our dataset and code are available at https://github.com/VelikayaScarlet/ChangAn.

AI.tldr: 提出ChangAn基准，用于检测大语言模型生成的古典中文诗歌，包含30,664首诗歌，评估12个AI检测器在古典诗歌检测上的表现
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型在文学创作领域的应用，AI生成的文学作品引发了创作真实性和伦理问题。古典中文诗歌具有独特的语言特征（严格的格律、共享的意象系统、灵活的句法），现有AI文本检测器未能有效处理这类文本，因此需要专门的检测基准。
AI.method: 构建ChangAn基准数据集，包含30,664首诗歌（10,276首人类创作，20,388首由4个流行LLM生成）。基于该数据集，系统评估12个AI检测器在不同文本粒度和生成策略下的性能表现。
AI.result: 当前中文文本检测器在检测LLM生成的古典中文诗歌方面存在显著局限性，无法作为可靠工具。这验证了ChangAn基准的有效性和必要性。
AI.conclusion: 需要专门针对古典中文诗歌的AI检测基准，现有检测器在该领域表现不足，ChangAn基准为此提供了重要资源。

title: SemEnrich: Self-Supervised Semantic Enrichment of Radiology Reports for Vision-Language Learning
summary: Medical vision-language datasets are often limited in size and biased toward negative findings, as clinicians report abnormalities mostly but might omit some positive/neutral findings because they might be considered as irrelevant to the patient's condition. We propose a self-supervised data enrichment method that leverages semantic clustering of report sentences. Then we enrich the findings in the medical reports in the training set by adding positive/neutral observations from different clusters in a self-supervised manner. Our approach yields consistent gains in supervised fine-tuning (5.63%, 3.04%, 7.40%, 5.30%, 7.47% average gains on COMET score, Bert score, Sentence Bleu, CheXbert-F1 and RadGraph-F1 scores respectively). Ablation studies confirm that improvements stem from semantic clustering rather than random augmentation. Furthermore, we introduce a way to incorporate semantic cluster information into the reward design for GRPO training, which leads to further performance gains (2.78%, 3.14%, 12.80% average gains on COMET score, Bert score and Sentence Bleu scores respectively). We share our code at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SemEnrich-75CF

AI.tldr: 提出一种医学视觉语言数据增强方法，通过语义聚类报告句子，在训练集中添加正/中性观察结果，提升监督微调和GRPO训练性能。
AI.motivation: 医学视觉语言数据集通常规模有限且偏向阴性发现，因为临床医生主要报告异常情况，可能忽略阳性/中性发现。这导致数据集存在偏差，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 1. 自监督数据增强：利用报告句子的语义聚类，从不同聚类中添加阳性/中性观察结果到训练数据中。2. 将语义聚类信息整合到GRPO训练的奖励设计中。
AI.result: 监督微调获得显著提升：COMET分数提升5.63%，Bert分数提升3.04%，Sentence Bleu提升7.40%，CheXbert-F1提升5.30%，RadGraph-F1提升7.47%。GRPO训练进一步提升了2.78%、3.14%、12.80%的平均增益。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义聚类进行数据增强能有效改善医学视觉语言模型的性能，特别是在处理数据集偏差方面。该方法为医学AI提供了实用的数据增强策略。

title: Attention-Guided Flow-Matching for Sparse 3D Geological Generation
summary: Constructing high-resolution 3D geological models from sparse 1D borehole and 2D surface data is a highly ill-posed inverse problem. Traditional heuristic and implicit modeling methods fundamentally fail to capture non-linear topological discontinuities under extreme sparsity, often yielding unrealistic artifacts. Furthermore, while deep generative architectures like Diffusion Models have revolutionized continuous domains, they suffer from severe representation collapse when conditioned on sparse categorical grids. To bridge this gap, we propose 3D-GeoFlow, the first Attention-Guided Continuous Flow Matching framework tailored for sparse multimodal geological modeling. By reformulating discrete categorical generation as a simulation-free, continuous vector field regression optimized via Mean Squared Error, our model establishes stable, deterministic optimal transport paths. Crucially, we integrate 3D Attention Gates to dynamically propagate localized borehole features across the volumetric latent space, ensuring macroscopic structural coherence. To validate our framework, we curated a large-scale multimodal dataset comprising 2,200 procedurally generated 3D geological cases. Extensive out-of-distribution (OOD) evaluations demonstrate that 3D-GeoFlow achieves a paradigm shift, significantly outperforming heuristic interpolations and standard diffusion baselines.

AI.tldr: 3D-GeoFlow：首个针对稀疏多模态地质建模的注意力引导连续流匹配框架，通过连续向量场回归解决离散分类生成问题，显著优于传统方法和扩散模型基线。
AI.motivation: 从稀疏的1D钻孔和2D表面数据构建高分辨率3D地质模型是一个高度不适定的逆问题。传统启发式和隐式建模方法无法捕捉极端稀疏条件下的非线性拓扑不连续性，常产生不真实的伪影。同时，扩散模型等深度生成架构在连续域表现优异，但在稀疏分类网格条件下会出现严重的表示崩溃。
AI.method: 提出3D-GeoFlow框架，将离散分类生成重新表述为无模拟的连续向量场回归，通过均方误差优化建立稳定的确定性最优传输路径。关键创新是集成3D注意力门，动态传播局部钻孔特征到体积潜在空间，确保宏观结构一致性。
AI.result: 在包含2,200个程序生成的3D地质案例的大规模多模态数据集上进行广泛评估，特别是在分布外（OOD）测试中，3D-GeoFlow实现了范式转变，显著优于启发式插值和标准扩散基线。
AI.conclusion: 3D-GeoFlow为稀疏多模态地质建模提供了首个注意力引导连续流匹配框架，通过连续向量场回归和3D注意力门机制，有效解决了传统方法和扩散模型在稀疏分类网格下的局限性，实现了更准确和结构一致的3D地质建模。

title: DERM-3R: A Resource-Efficient Multimodal Agents Framework for Dermatologic Diagnosis and Treatment in Real-World Clinical Settings
summary: Dermatologic diseases impose a large and growing global burden, affecting billions and substantially reducing quality of life. While modern therapies can rapidly control acute symptoms, long-term outcomes are often limited by single-target paradigms, recurrent courses, and insufficient attention to systemic comorbidities. Traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) provides a complementary holistic approach via syndrome differentiation and individualized treatment, but practice is hindered by non-standardized knowledge, incomplete multimodal records, and poor scalability of expert reasoning. We propose DERM-3R, a resource-efficient multimodal agent framework to model TCM dermatologic diagnosis and treatment under limited data and compute. Based on real-world workflows, we reformulate decision-making into three core issues: fine-grained lesion recognition, multi-view lesion representation with specialist-level pathogenesis modeling, and holistic reasoning for syndrome differentiation and treatment planning. DERM-3R comprises three collaborative agents: DERM-Rec, DERM-Rep, and DERM-Reason, each targeting one component of this pipeline. Built on a lightweight multimodal LLM and partially fine-tuned on 103 real-world TCM psoriasis cases, DERM-3R performs strongly across dermatologic reasoning tasks. Evaluations using automatic metrics, LLM-as-a-judge, and physician assessment show that despite minimal data and parameter updates, DERM-3R matches or surpasses large general-purpose multimodal models. These results suggest structured, domain-aware multi-agent modeling can be a practical alternative to brute-force scaling for complex clinical tasks in dermatology and integrative medicine.

AI.tldr: DERM-3R是一个资源高效的多模态智能体框架，用于在有限数据和计算条件下进行中医皮肤病诊断和治疗建模，通过三个协作智能体实现细粒度病灶识别、多视角病灶表示和整体推理。
AI.motivation: 皮肤病带来巨大全球负担，现代疗法常局限于单靶点范式且复发率高，中医提供整体治疗方法但受限于知识非标准化、多模态记录不完整和专家推理难以规模化。需要资源高效的解决方案来建模中医皮肤病诊断。
AI.method: 基于真实世界工作流程，将决策制定重构为三个核心问题：细粒度病灶识别、具有专家级病理建模的多视角病灶表示、以及整体推理用于辨证论治。构建三个协作智能体：DERM-Rec（识别）、DERM-Rep（表示）、DERM-Reason（推理），基于轻量级多模态LLM，在103个真实世界中医银屑病病例上部分微调。
AI.result: 尽管数据和参数更新极少，DERM-3R在皮肤病推理任务上表现强劲。使用自动指标、LLM-as-a-judge和医生评估显示，DERM-3R匹配或超越了大型通用多模态模型。
AI.conclusion: 结构化、领域感知的多智能体建模可以成为皮肤病和整合医学中复杂临床任务的实用替代方案，避免暴力扩展方法。

title: CircuitSynth: Reliable Synthetic Data Generation
summary: The generation of high-fidelity synthetic data is a cornerstone of modern machine learning, yet Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently suffer from hallucinations, logical inconsistencies, and mode collapse when tasked with structured generation. Existing approaches, such as prompting or retrieval-augmented generation, lack the mechanisms to balance linguistic expressivity with formal guarantees regarding validity and coverage. To address this, we propose CircuitSynth, a novel neuro-symbolic framework that decouples semantic reasoning from surface realization. By distilling the reasoning capabilities of a Teacher LLM into a Probabilistic Sentential Decision Diagram (PSDD), CircuitSynth creates a tractable semantic prior that structurally enforces hard logical constraints. Furthermore, we introduce a convex optimization mechanism to rigorously satisfy soft distributional goals. Empirical evaluations across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that CircuitSynth achieves 100% Schema Validity even in complex logic puzzles where unconstrained baselines fail (12.4%) while significantly outperforming state-of-the-art methods in rare-combination coverage.

AI.tldr: CircuitSynth：一种神经符号框架，通过将教师LLM的推理能力提炼为概率句子决策图（PSDD），实现结构化生成，确保100%模式有效性和稀有组合覆盖
AI.motivation: LLM在结构化生成中经常出现幻觉、逻辑不一致和模式崩溃问题，现有方法（如提示或检索增强生成）缺乏平衡语言表达性与形式保证的机制
AI.method: 提出CircuitSynth框架，将语义推理与表面实现解耦，将教师LLM的推理能力提炼为PSDD创建可处理的语义先验，并引入凸优化机制满足软分布目标
AI.result: 在复杂逻辑谜题中实现100%模式有效性（无约束基线仅12.4%），在稀有组合覆盖方面显著优于最先进方法
AI.conclusion: CircuitSynth通过神经符号方法有效解决了LLM结构化生成中的幻觉和模式崩溃问题，平衡了语言表达性与形式保证

title: Improving Pediatric Emergency Department Triage with Modality Dropout in Late Fusion Multimodal EHR Models
summary: Emergency department triage relies heavily on both quantitative vital signs and qualitative clinical notes, yet multimodal machine learning models predicting triage acuity often suffer from modality collapse by over-relying on structured tabular data. This limitation severely hinders demographic generalizability, particularly for pediatric patients where developmental variations in vital signs make unstructured clinical narratives uniquely crucial. To address this gap, we propose a late-fusion multimodal architecture that processes tabular vitals via XGBoost and unstructured clinical text via Bio_ClinicalBERT, combined through a Logistic Regression meta-classifier to predict the 5-level Emergency Severity Index. To explicitly target the external validity problem, we train our model exclusively on adult encounters from the MIMIC-IV and NHAMCS datasets and evaluate its zero-shot generalization on a traditionally overlooked pediatric cohort. Furthermore, we employ symmetric modality dropout during training to prevent the ensemble from overfitting to adult-specific clinical correlations. Our results demonstrate that the multimodal framework significantly outperforms single-modality baselines. Most notably, applying a 30-40% symmetric modality dropout rate yielded steep performance improvements in the unseen pediatric cohort, elevating the Quadratic Weighted Kappa to 0.351. These findings highlight modality dropout as a critical regularization technique for mitigating modality collapse and enhancing cross-demographic generalization in clinical AI.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于急诊分诊的晚期融合多模态架构，结合XGBoost处理生命体征和Bio_ClinicalBERT处理临床文本，通过Logistic Regression元分类器预测急诊严重指数，并使用对称模态dropout提升跨人口统计泛化能力
AI.motivation: 急诊分诊依赖定量生命体征和定性临床记录，但现有多模态模型常因过度依赖结构化数据而出现模态崩溃，限制了人口统计泛化能力，特别是在儿科患者中，生命体征的发育变化使得非结构化临床叙述尤为关键
AI.method: 提出晚期融合多模态架构：1) XGBoost处理表格化生命体征数据；2) Bio_ClinicalBERT处理非结构化临床文本；3) Logistic Regression元分类器融合两种模态预测5级急诊严重指数。使用对称模态dropout训练，专门在成人数据上训练，在儿科数据上进行零样本评估
AI.result: 多模态框架显著优于单模态基线。应用30-40%对称模态dropout率在未见过的儿科队列中带来显著性能提升，将二次加权Kappa提高到0.351
AI.conclusion: 模态dropout是缓解模态崩溃和增强临床AI跨人口统计泛化的关键正则化技术，多模态方法能更好地利用临床叙述信息，特别是在生命体征因发育变化而受限的儿科患者中

title: PASTA: Vision Transformer Patch Aggregation for Weakly Supervised Target and Anomaly Segmentation
summary:
Detecting unseen anomalies in unstructured environments presents a critical challenge for industrial and agricultural applications such as material recycling and weeding. Existing perception systems frequently fail to satisfy the strict operational requirements of these domains, specifically real-time processing, pixel-level segmentation precision, and robust accuracy, due to their reliance on exhaustively annotated datasets. To address these limitations, we propose a weakly supervised pipeline for object segmentation and classification using weak image-level supervision called 'Patch Aggregation for Segmentation of Targets and Anomalies' (PASTA). By comparing an observed scene with a nominal reference, PASTA identifies Target and Anomaly objects through distribution analysis in self-supervised Vision Transformer (ViT) feature spaces. Our pipeline utilizes semantic text-prompts via the Segment Anything Model 3 to guide zero-shot object segmentation.
  Evaluations on a custom steel scrap recycling dataset and a plant dataset demonstrate a 75.8% training time reduction of our approach to domain-specific baselines. While being domain-agnostic, our method achieves superior Target (up to 88.3% IoU) and Anomaly (up to 63.5% IoU) segmentation performance in the industrial and agricultural domain.

AI.tldr: PASTA：基于弱监督图像级标注的目标与异常分割方法，通过自监督ViT特征空间分布分析和SAM3文本提示引导，在工业和农业领域实现高效异常检测
AI.motivation: 解决工业和农业领域（如材料回收和除草）中无结构环境下未见过异常检测的挑战。现有感知系统依赖详尽标注数据集，难以满足实时处理、像素级分割精度和鲁棒性等严格操作要求。
AI.method: 提出弱监督管道PASTA：1）使用自监督Vision Transformer提取特征；2）通过观察场景与参考场景的特征分布分析识别目标和异常对象；3）利用Segment Anything Model 3的语义文本提示引导零样本对象分割。
AI.result: 在钢铁废料回收和植物数据集上评估：1）训练时间减少75.8%；2）目标分割IoU达88.3%；3）异常分割IoU达63.5%；4）领域无关但优于领域特定基线。
AI.conclusion: PASTA提供了一种高效、精确的弱监督异常检测解决方案，特别适用于需要实时处理和像素级精度的工业和农业应用，显著减少对详尽标注数据的依赖。

title: CID-TKG: Collaborative Historical Invariance and Evolutionary Dynamics Learning for Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning
summary: Temporal knowledge graph (TKG) reasoning aims to infer future facts at unseen timestamps from temporally evolving entities and relations. Despite recent progress, existing approaches still suffer from inherent limitations due to their inductive biases, as they predominantly rely on time-invariant or weakly time-dependent structures and overlook the evolutionary dynamics. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel collaborative learning framework for TKGR (dubbed CID-TKG) that integrates evolutionary dynamics and historical invariance semantics as an effective inductive bias for reasoning. Specifically, CID-TKG constructs a historical invariance graph to capture long-term structural regularities and an evolutionary dynamics graph to model short-term temporal transitions. Dedicated encoders are then employed to learn representations from each structure. To alleviate semantic discrepancies across the two structures, we decompose relations into view-specific representations and align view-specific query representations via a contrastive objective, which promotes cross-view consistency while suppressing view-specific noise. Extensive experiments verify that our CID-TKG achieves state-of-the-art performance under extrapolation settings.

AI.tldr: 提出CID-TKG框架，通过协同学习演化动力学和历史不变性语义，提升时序知识图谱推理性能
AI.motivation: 现有时序知识图谱推理方法存在固有局限性，主要依赖时间不变或弱时间依赖结构，忽略了演化动力学。需要克服这些限制，为推理提供更有效的归纳偏置。
AI.method: 提出协同学习框架CID-TKG：1) 构建历史不变性图捕获长期结构规律；2) 构建演化动力学图建模短期时序转换；3) 使用专用编码器学习每种结构的表示；4) 将关系分解为视图特定表示，通过对比目标对齐视图特定查询表示，促进跨视图一致性同时抑制视图特定噪声。
AI.result: 大量实验验证CID-TKG在外推设置下实现了最先进的性能
AI.conclusion: 通过整合演化动力学和历史不变性语义作为有效归纳偏置，CID-TKG框架显著提升了时序知识图谱推理能力

title: Training-Free Cross-Lingual Dysarthria Severity Assessment via Phonological Subspace Analysis in Self-Supervised Speech Representations
summary: Dysarthric speech severity assessment typically requires trained clinicians or supervised models built from labelled pathological speech, limiting scalability across languages and clinical settings. We present a training-free method that quantifies dysarthria severity by measuring degradation in phonological feature subspaces within frozen HuBERT representations. No supervised severity model is trained; feature directions are estimated from healthy control speech using a pretrained forced aligner. For each speaker, we extract phone-level embeddings via Montreal Forced Aligner, compute d-prime scores along phonological contrast directions (nasality, voicing, stridency, sonorance, manner, and four vowel features) derived exclusively from healthy controls, and construct a 12-dimensional phonological profile.Evaluating 890 speakers across 10 corpora, 5 languages (English, Spanish, Dutch, Mandarin, French), and 3 primary aetiologies (Parkinson's disease, cerebral palsy, ALS), we find that all five consonant d-prime features correlate significantly with clinical severity (random-effects meta-analysis rho = -0.50 to -0.56, p < 2e-4; pooled Spearman rho = -0.47 to -0.55 with bootstrap 95% CIs not crossing zero). The effect replicates within individual corpora, survives FDR correction, and remains robust to leave-one-corpus-out removal and alignment quality controls. Nasality d-prime decreases monotonically from control to severe in 6 of 7 severity-graded corpora. Mann-Whitney U tests confirm that all 12 features distinguish controls from severely dysarthric speakers (p < 0.001).The method requires no dysarthric training data and applies to any language with an existing MFA acoustic model (currently 29 languages). We release the full pipeline and phone feature configurations for six languages.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的构音障碍严重程度评估方法，通过分析健康语音的HuBERT表示中的语音学特征子空间退化来量化构音障碍严重程度，无需标注的病理语音数据。
AI.motivation: 传统构音障碍严重程度评估需要临床专家或基于标注病理语音的监督模型，限制了跨语言和临床环境的可扩展性。需要一种无需训练、可跨语言应用的评估方法。
AI.method: 使用冻结的HuBERT表示，从健康对照语音中估计语音学特征方向（鼻音、浊音、摩擦音、响音、发音方式及四个元音特征）。通过Montreal Forced Aligner提取音素级嵌入，计算d-prime分数构建12维语音学特征剖面。
AI.result: 在10个语料库、5种语言、890名说话者中验证，所有五个辅音d-prime特征与临床严重程度显著相关（rho = -0.50到-0.56）。方法在个体语料库中可重复，对FDR校正、留一交叉验证和对齐质量控制保持稳健。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种无需构音障碍训练数据的严重程度评估方法，适用于任何有MFA声学模型的语言（目前29种），为跨语言临床评估提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: Last-Iterate Convergence of Randomized Kaczmarz and SGD with Greedy Step Size
summary: We study last-iterate convergence of SGD with greedy step size over smooth quadratics in the interpolation regime, a setting which captures the classical Randomized Kaczmarz algorithm as well as other popular iterative linear system solvers. For these methods, we show that the $t$-th iterate attains an $O(1/t^{3/4})$ convergence rate, addressing a question posed by Attia, Schliserman, Sherman, and Koren, who gave an $O(1/t^{1/2})$ guarantee for this setting. In the proof, we introduce the family of stochastic contraction processes, whose behavior can be described by the evolution of a certain deterministic eigenvalue equation, which we analyze via a careful discrete-to-continuous reduction.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在插值机制下，带有贪婪步长的SGD在光滑二次函数上的最后迭代收敛性，证明了第t次迭代达到O(1/t^{3/4})的收敛速率，改进了先前O(1/t^{1/2})的结果。
AI.motivation: 研究随机梯度下降(SGD)在插值机制下的收敛行为，特别是带有贪婪步长的变体。这一设置涵盖了经典的随机Kaczmarz算法和其他流行的迭代线性系统求解器。Attia等人先前给出了O(1/t^{1/2})的保证，本文旨在改进这一收敛速率。
AI.method: 引入了随机收缩过程族，其行为可以通过特定确定性特征值方程的演化来描述。通过精细的离散到连续约简来分析这一过程，建立了理论框架来证明改进的收敛速率。
AI.result: 证明了在插值机制下，带有贪婪步长的SGD第t次迭代达到O(1/t^{3/4})的收敛速率，显著改进了先前O(1/t^{1/2})的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为随机优化算法在插值设置下的收敛行为提供了新的理论见解，特别是对于带有贪婪步长的SGD变体，建立了更紧的收敛速率界限。

title: Identity-Aware U-Net: Fine-grained Cell Segmentation via Identity-Aware Representation Learning
summary: Precise segmentation of objects with highly similar shapes remains a challenging problem in dense prediction, especially in scenarios with ambiguous boundaries, overlapping instances, and weak inter-instance visual differences. While conventional segmentation models are effective at localizing object regions, they often lack the discriminative capacity required to reliably distinguish a target object from morphologically similar distractors. In this work, we study fine-grained object segmentation from an identity-aware perspective and propose Identity-Aware U-Net (IAU-Net), a unified framework that jointly models spatial localization and instance discrimination. Built upon a U-Net-style encoder-decoder architecture, our method augments the segmentation backbone with an auxiliary embedding branch that learns discriminative identity representations from high-level features, while the main branch predicts pixel-accurate masks. To enhance robustness in distinguishing objects with near-identical contours or textures, we further incorporate triplet-based metric learning, which pulls target-consistent embeddings together and separates them from hard negatives with similar morphology. This design enables the model to move beyond category-level segmentation and acquire a stronger capability for precise discrimination among visually similar objects. Experiments on benchmarks including cell segmentation demonstrate promising results, particularly in challenging cases involving similar contours, dense layouts, and ambiguous boundaries.

AI.tldr: IAU-Net：一种用于精细物体分割的身份感知U-Net框架，通过联合建模空间定位和实例判别，特别针对形状高度相似、边界模糊、实例重叠的挑战性场景。
AI.motivation: 解决密集预测中形状高度相似物体的精确分割难题，特别是在边界模糊、实例重叠、实例间视觉差异弱的场景下。传统分割模型虽然能定位物体区域，但缺乏可靠区分目标物体与形态相似干扰物的判别能力。
AI.method: 提出身份感知U-Net（IAU-Net），基于U-Net编码器-解码器架构，增加辅助嵌入分支学习判别性身份表示，主分支预测像素级掩码。引入三元组度量学习增强鲁棒性，将目标一致的嵌入拉近，与形态相似的硬负样本分离。
AI.result: 在细胞分割等基准测试中取得有希望的结果，特别是在涉及相似轮廓、密集布局和模糊边界的挑战性案例中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: IAU-Net通过联合建模空间定位和实例判别，超越了类别级分割，获得了在视觉相似物体间进行精确判别的更强能力。

title: Hubble: An LLM-Driven Agentic Framework for Safe and Automated Alpha Factor Discovery
summary: Discovering predictive alpha factors in quantitative finance remains a formidable challenge due to the vast combinatorial search space and inherently low signal-to-noise ratios in financial data. Existing automated methods, particularly genetic programming, often produce complex, uninterpretable formulas prone to overfitting. We introduce Hubble, a closed-loop factor mining framework that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) as intelligent search heuristics, constrained by a domain-specific operator language and an Abstract Syntax Tree (AST)-based execution sandbox. The framework evaluates candidate factors through a rigorous statistical pipeline encompassing cross-sectional Rank Information Coefficient (RankIC), annualized Information Ratio, and portfolio turnover. An evolutionary feedback mechanism returns top-performing factors and structured error diagnostics to the LLM, enabling iterative refinement across multiple generation rounds. In experiments conducted on a panel of 30 U.S. equities over 752 trading days, the system evaluated 181 syntactically valid factors from 122 unique candidates across three rounds, achieving a peak composite score of 0.827 with 100% computational stability. Our results demonstrate that combining LLM-driven generation with deterministic safety constraints yields an effective, interpretable, and reproducible approach to automated factor discovery.

AI.tldr: Hubble是一个利用LLMs作为智能搜索启发式的闭环因子挖掘框架，通过领域特定操作符语言和AST执行沙箱约束，在金融数据中发现可预测的alpha因子。
AI.motivation: 量化金融中预测性alpha因子的发现面临巨大挑战：搜索空间庞大、金融数据信噪比低。现有自动化方法（特别是遗传编程）通常产生复杂、难以解释且容易过拟合的公式。
AI.method: 引入Hubble框架：1) 使用LLMs作为智能搜索启发式；2) 通过领域特定操作符语言和AST执行沙箱进行约束；3) 使用统计管道评估候选因子（横截面RankIC、年化信息比率、投资组合换手率）；4) 进化反馈机制将表现最佳的因子和结构化错误诊断返回给LLM，实现多轮迭代优化。
AI.result: 在30只美国股票752个交易日的实验中，系统在三轮中评估了122个独特候选者的181个语法有效因子，达到0.827的峰值综合得分，计算稳定性100%。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的生成与确定性安全约束相结合，为自动化因子发现提供了一种有效、可解释且可重复的方法。

title: Think in Sentences: Explicit Sentence Boundaries Enhance Language Model's Capabilities
summary: Researchers have explored different ways to improve large language models (LLMs)' capabilities via dummy token insertion in contexts. However, existing works focus solely on the dummy tokens themselves, but fail to leverage the inherent sentence-level structure of natural language. This is a critical oversight, as LLMs acquire linguistic capabilities through exposure to human-generated texts, which are inherently structured at the sentence level. Motivated by this gap, we propose an approach that inserts delimiters at sentence boundaries in LLM inputs, which not only integrates dummy tokens into the context, but also facilitates LLMs with sentence-by-sentence processing behavior during reasoning. Two concrete methods: (1). In-context learning and (2). Supervised fine-tuning are experimented using 7B models to 600B Deepseek-V3. Our results demonstrate consistent improvements across various tasks, with notable gains of up to 7.7\% on GSM8k and 12.5\% on DROP. Furthermore, the fine-tuned LLMs can incorporate sentence awareness evidenced by their internal representations. Our work establishes a simple yet effective technique for enhancing LLM's capabilities, offering promising directions for cognitive-inspired LLM enhancement paradigm.

AI.tldr: 提出在LLM输入中插入句子边界分隔符的方法，通过句子级别的结构处理来增强模型能力，在多种任务上取得显著提升
AI.motivation: 现有研究只关注插入虚拟标记本身，但忽略了自然语言固有的句子级结构。LLMs通过接触人类生成文本获得语言能力，这些文本本质上具有句子级结构，因此需要利用这种结构来增强模型能力
AI.method: 在LLM输入中插入句子边界分隔符，促进模型进行逐句推理处理。实验了两种具体方法：(1)上下文学习，(2)监督微调，使用从7B到600B的Deepseek-V3模型
AI.result: 在各种任务上取得一致改进，在GSM8k上提升高达7.7%，在DROP上提升12.5%。微调后的LLMs能够表现出句子感知能力，这在其内部表征中得到验证
AI.conclusion: 建立了一种简单而有效的技术来增强LLM能力，为认知启发的LLM增强范式提供了有前景的方向

title: Regularized Entropy Information Adaptation with Temporal-Awareness Networks for Simultaneous Speech Translation
summary: Simultaneous Speech Translation (SimulST) requires balancing high translation quality with low latency. Recent work introduced REINA, a method that trains a Read/Write policy based on estimating the information gain of reading more audio. However, we find that information-based policies often lack temporal context, leading the policy to bias itself toward reading most of the audio before starting to write. We improve REINA using two distinct strategies: a supervised alignment network (REINA-SAN) and a timestep-augmented network (REINA-TAN). Our results demonstrate that while both methods significantly outperform the baseline and resolve stability issues, REINA-TAN provides a slightly superior Pareto frontier for streaming efficiency, whereas REINA-SAN offers more robustness against 'read loops'. Applied to Whisper, both methods improve the pareto frontier of streaming efficiency as measured by Normalized Streaming Efficiency (NoSE) scores up to 7.1% over existing competitive baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文改进了REINA方法，通过两种策略（REINA-SAN和REINA-TAN）解决信息增益策略缺乏时间上下文的问题，提升了同声传译的质量-延迟平衡。
AI.motivation: 同声传译需要在高质量翻译和低延迟之间取得平衡。现有的REINA方法基于信息增益训练读写策略，但缺乏时间上下文，导致策略倾向于读取大部分音频后才开始写入，影响实时性。
AI.method: 提出了两种改进策略：1) REINA-SAN：使用监督对齐网络；2) REINA-TAN：使用时序增强网络。两种方法都旨在为读写策略提供更好的时间上下文。
AI.result: 两种方法都显著优于基线并解决了稳定性问题。REINA-TAN在流式效率的帕累托前沿表现略优，而REINA-SAN对"读取循环"问题更具鲁棒性。应用于Whisper模型时，两种方法将流式效率的帕累托前沿提升了7.1%。
AI.conclusion: 通过为信息增益策略添加时间上下文，可以显著改进同声传译的读写策略，在翻译质量和延迟之间取得更好的平衡。

title: Multi-Granularity Reasoning for Image Quality Assessment via Attribute-Aware Reinforcement Learning to Rank
summary: Recent advances in reasoning-induced image quality assessment (IQA) have demonstrated the power of reinforcement learning to rank (RL2R) for training vision-language models (VLMs) to assess perceptual quality. However, existing approaches operate at a single granularity, predicting only an overall quality score, while overlooking the multi-dimensional nature of human quality perception, which encompasses attributes such as sharpness, color fidelity, noise level, and compositional aesthetics. In this paper, we propose MG-IQA (Multi-Granularity IQA), a multi-granularity reasoning framework that extends RL2R to jointly assess overall image quality and fine-grained quality attributes within a single inference pass. Our approach introduces three key innovations: (1) an attribute-aware prompting strategy that elicits structured multi-attribute reasoning from VLMs; (2) a multi-dimensional Thurstone reward model that computes attribute-specific fidelity rewards for group relative policy optimization; and (3) a cross-domain alignment mechanism that enables stable joint training across synthetic distortion, authentic distortion, and AI-generated image datasets without perceptual scale re-alignment. Extensive experiments on eight IQA benchmarks demonstrate that MG-IQA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both overall quality prediction (average SRCC improvement of 2.1\%) and attribute-level assessment, while generating interpretable, human-aligned quality descriptions.

AI.tldr: MG-IQA提出多粒度图像质量评估框架，使用强化学习排序训练视觉语言模型，同时评估整体质量和细粒度属性（如锐度、色彩保真度等），在八个基准测试中表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的图像质量评估方法仅预测整体质量分数，忽略了人类感知的多维度特性（如锐度、色彩保真度、噪声水平、构图美学等），需要更细粒度的评估框架。
AI.method: 1) 属性感知提示策略，引导VLMs进行结构化多属性推理；2) 多维Thurstone奖励模型，计算属性特定的保真度奖励用于组相对策略优化；3) 跨域对齐机制，支持在合成失真、真实失真和AI生成图像数据集上进行稳定联合训练。
AI.result: 在八个IQA基准测试中，MG-IQA在整体质量预测上平均SRCC提升2.1%，同时在属性级评估上表现优异，并能生成可解释、与人类对齐的质量描述。
AI.conclusion: MG-IQA通过多粒度推理框架成功扩展了强化学习排序方法，实现了同时评估整体图像质量和细粒度质量属性，为图像质量评估提供了更全面、可解释的解决方案。

title: From Scalars to Tensors: Declared Losses Recover Epistemic Distinctions That Neutrosophic Scalars Cannot Express
summary: Leyva-Vázquez and Smarandache (2025) demonstrated that neutrosophic T/I/F evaluation, where Truth, Indeterminacy, and Falsity are independent dimensions not constrained to sum to 1.0, which reveals "hyper-truth"' (T+I+F > 1.0) in 35% of complex epistemic cases evaluated by LLMs. We extend their work in two directions. First, we replicate and extend their experiment across five model families from five vendors (Anthropic, Meta, DeepSeek, Alibaba, Mistral), finding hyper-truth in 84% of unconstrained evaluations, which confirms the phenomenon is cross-vendor under our prompt protocol. Second, and more significantly, we identify a limitation of scalar T/I/F that their framework cannot address: models adopting an `"Absorption" position (T=0, I=1, F=0) produce identical scalar outputs for fundamentally different epistemic situations (paradox, ignorance, contingency), collapsing the very distinctions neutrosophic logic was designed to preserve. We demonstrate that extending the evaluation to include declared losses (structured descriptions of what the model cannot evaluate and why) substantially recovers these distinctions. Models producing identical scalars for paradox and ignorance produce nearly disjoint loss vocabularies (Jaccard similarity < 0.10 on loss description keywords), with domain-specific, severity-rated loss declarations that differentiate the nature of their uncertainty. This suggests that scalar T/I/F is a necessary but insufficient representation of epistemic state, and that tensor-structured output (scalars + losses) provides a more faithful model of LLM epistemic capabilities.

AI.tldr: 论文扩展了中性逻辑评估方法，发现LLMs在84%的无约束评估中表现出"超真值"现象，并提出标量T/I/F评估的局限性，建议结合结构化损失描述来更准确表征LLM的认知状态。
AI.motivation: 先前研究发现中性逻辑T/I/F评估中LLMs在35%复杂认知案例中表现出"超真值"现象。本研究旨在：1) 验证这一现象是否跨模型供应商普遍存在；2) 识别标量T/I/F评估的局限性，特别是"吸收位置"问题；3) 探索更全面的LLM认知状态表征方法。
AI.method: 1) 在五个供应商的模型家族中进行实验复制和扩展；2) 分析标量T/I/F评估的局限性，特别是T=0, I=1, F=0的"吸收位置"问题；3) 引入结构化损失描述（模型无法评估的内容及原因）作为补充；4) 使用Jaccard相似度等指标分析损失描述的关键词差异。
AI.result: 1) 在84%的无约束评估中观察到"超真值"现象，证实该现象跨供应商普遍存在；2) 发现标量T/I/F无法区分不同认知情境（悖论、无知、偶然性）；3) 结构化损失描述能有效恢复这些区分，悖论和无知情境下的损失描述关键词Jaccard相似度<0.10；4) 损失描述具有领域特定性和严重性评级。
AI.conclusion: 标量T/I/F评估是必要但不充分的LLM认知状态表征方法。结合标量和结构化损失描述的张量结构输出能更准确地建模LLM的认知能力，为LLM评估和可解释性提供新方向。

title: Nationality encoding in language model hidden states: Probing culturally differentiated representations in persona-conditioned academic text
summary: Large language models are increasingly used as writing tools and pedagogical resources in English for Academic Purposes, but it remains unclear whether they encode culturally differentiated representations when generating academic text. This study tests whether Gemma-3-4b-it encodes nationality-discriminative information in hidden states when generating research article introductions conditioned by British and Chinese academic personas. A corpus of 270 texts was generated from 45 prompt templates crossed with six persona conditions in a 2 x 3 design. Logistic regression probes were trained on hidden-state activations across all 35 layers, with shuffled-label baselines, a surface-text skyline classifier, cross-family tests, and sentence-level baselines used as controls. Probe-selected token positions were annotated for structural, lexical, and stance features using the Stanza NLP pipeline. The nationality probe reached 0.968 cross-validated accuracy at Layer 18, with perfect held-out classification. Nationality encoding followed a non-monotonic trajectory across layers, with structural effects strongest in the middle to upper network and lexical-domain effects peaking earlier. At high-signal token positions, British-associated patterns showed more postmodification, hedging, boosting, passive voice, and evaluative or process-oriented vocabulary, while Chinese-associated patterns showed more premodification, nominal predicates, and sociocultural or internationalisation vocabulary. However, sentence-level analysis found no significant nationality differences in the full generated surface text. The findings extend probing methodology to a sociolinguistic attribute and have practical implications for EAP and language pedagogy.

AI.tldr: 研究使用逻辑回归探针分析Gemma-3-4b-it模型在生成英中学术文本时隐藏状态中的国籍编码差异，发现模型在中间层能高精度区分国籍特征，但在表层文本中无显著差异。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型越来越多地用于学术英语写作教学，但尚不清楚它们在生成学术文本时是否编码了文化差异化的表征。本研究旨在测试Gemma模型在生成英中学术文本时，其隐藏状态中是否包含国籍区分性信息。
AI.method: 使用45个提示模板与6个人设条件（2×3设计）生成270篇文本，在所有35层隐藏状态上训练逻辑回归探针，使用随机标签基线、表层文本基准分类器、跨家族测试和句子级基线作为控制。对探针选择的token位置使用Stanza NLP流水线进行结构、词汇和立场特征标注。
AI.result: 国籍探针在第18层达到0.968的交叉验证准确率，完美保持分类。国籍编码在层间呈非单调轨迹，结构效应在中上层最强，词汇域效应较早达到峰值。在高信号token位置，英式模式显示更多后置修饰、模糊语、强调语、被动语态和评价性/过程导向词汇；中式模式显示更多前置修饰、名词性谓语和社会文化/国际化词汇。但句子级分析发现生成的完整表层文本中无显著国籍差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究将探针方法扩展到社会语言学属性，对学术英语教学有实际意义，表明LLM隐藏状态编码了文化差异特征，但这些差异在最终生成的表层文本中被中和。

title: A Tale of Two Temperatures: Simple, Efficient, and Diverse Sampling from Diffusion Language Models
summary: Much work has been done on designing fast and accurate sampling for diffusion language models (dLLMs). However, these efforts have largely focused on the tradeoff between speed and quality of individual samples; how to additionally ensure diversity across samples remains less well understood. In this work, we show that diversity can be increased by using softened, tempered versions of familiar confidence-based remasking heuristics, retaining their computational benefits and offering simple implementations. We motivate this approach by introducing an idealized formal model of fork tokens and studying the impact of remasking on the expected entropy at the forks. Empirically, the proposed tempered heuristics close the exploration gap (pass@k) between existing confidence-based and autoregressive sampling, hence outperforming both when controlling for cost (pass@NFE). We further study how the increase in diversity translates to downstream post-training and test-time compute scaling. Overall, our findings demonstrate that simple, efficient, and diverse sampling from dLLMs is possible.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用软化、调温的置信度重掩码启发式方法，在保持计算效率的同时提高扩散语言模型采样多样性，缩小了与自回归采样在探索能力上的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散语言模型采样方法主要关注速度与单个样本质量之间的权衡，而如何确保跨样本的多样性研究不足。作者旨在解决扩散语言模型采样中的多样性问题，同时保持计算效率。
AI.method: 引入"分叉令牌"的形式化模型，分析重掩码对分叉处期望熵的影响。提出使用软化、调温版本的置信度重掩码启发式方法，这些方法计算效率高且实现简单。
AI.result: 提出的调温启发式方法缩小了现有置信度采样与自回归采样之间的探索差距（pass@k），在控制成本（pass@NFE）时优于两者。多样性提升进一步转化为下游后训练和测试时计算扩展的改进。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，从扩散语言模型中进行简单、高效且多样化的采样是可行的，为扩散语言模型的采样方法提供了新的方向。

title: The Deployment Gap in AI Media Detection: Platform-Aware and Visually Constrained Adversarial Evaluation
summary:
Recent AI media detectors report near-perfect performance under clean laboratory evaluation, yet their robustness under realistic deployment conditions remains underexplored. In practice, AI-generated images are resized, compressed, re-encoded, and visually modified before being shared on online platforms. We argue that this creates a deployment gap between laboratory robustness and real-world reliability.
