  In this work, we introduce a platform-aware adversarial evaluation framework for AI media detection that explicitly models deployment transforms (e.g., resizing, compression, screenshot-style distortions) and constrains perturbations to visually plausible meme-style bands rather than full-image noise. Under this threat model, detectors achieving AUC $\approx$ 0{.}99 in clean settings experience substantial degradation. Per-image platform-aware attacks reduce AUC to significantly lower levels and achieve high fake-to-real misclassification rates, despite strict visual constraints. We further demonstrate that universal perturbations exist even under localized band constraints, revealing shared vulnerability directions across inputs. Beyond accuracy degradation, we observe pronounced calibration collapse under attack, where detectors become confidently incorrect.
  Our findings highlight that robustness measured under clean conditions substantially overestimates deployment robustness. We advocate for platform-aware evaluation as a necessary component of future AI media security benchmarks and release our evaluation framework to facilitate standardized robustness assessment.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了AI媒体检测器在实验室环境下表现优异，但在真实部署场景中面临严重鲁棒性问题，提出了平台感知的对抗评估框架来评估检测器在现实条件下的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前AI媒体检测器在实验室环境下报告接近完美的性能，但在真实部署条件下（如图像被调整大小、压缩、重新编码和视觉修改）的鲁棒性尚未充分探索。实验室鲁棒性与现实世界可靠性之间存在部署差距。
AI.method: 引入平台感知的对抗评估框架，明确建模部署转换（如调整大小、压缩、截图式失真），并将扰动限制在视觉上合理的meme风格带而非全图像噪声。在该威胁模型下评估检测器性能。
AI.result: 在干净设置下AUC≈0.99的检测器在平台感知攻击下性能显著下降，AUC大幅降低，假到真误分类率很高。即使在局部带约束下也存在通用扰动，揭示了跨输入的共享脆弱性方向。攻击下检测器出现明显的校准崩溃，变得自信地错误。
AI.conclusion: 在干净条件下测量的鲁棒性严重高估了部署鲁棒性。平台感知评估应成为未来AI媒体安全基准的必要组成部分，作者发布评估框架以促进标准化鲁棒性评估。

title: LLMs for Text-Based Exploration and Navigation Under Partial Observability
comment: 15 pages, (to be published Springer Lecture Notes of the Institute for Computer Sciences, Social Informatics and Telecommunications Engineering [LNICST] )
summary: Exploration and goal-directed navigation in unknown layouts are central to inspection, logistics, and search-and-rescue. We ask whether large language models (LLMs) can function as \emph{text-only} controllers under partial observability -- without code execution, tools, or program synthesis. We introduce a reproducible benchmark with oracle localisation in fixed ASCII gridworlds: each step reveals only a local $5\times5$ window around the agent and the model must select one of \texttt{UP/RIGHT/DOWN/LEFT}. Nine contemporary LLMs ranging from open/proprietary, dense / Mixture of Experts and instruction- vs. reasoning-tuned are evaluated on two tasks across three layouts of increasing difficulty: \emph{Exploration} (maximising revealed cells) and \emph{Navigation} (reach the goal on the shortest path). The experimental results are evaluated on quantitative metrics including \emph{success rate}, \emph{efficiency} such as normalised coverage and \emph{path length} vs. oracle as well as qualitative analysis. Reasoning-tuned models reliably complete navigation across all layouts, yet remain less efficient than oracle paths. Few-shot demonstrations in the prompt chiefly help these Reasoning-tuned models by reducing invalid moves and shortening paths, while classic dense instruction models remain inconsistent. We observe characteristic action priors (UP/RIGHT) that can induce looping under partial observability. Overall, training regimen and test-time deliberation predict control ability better than raw parameter count. These findings suggest lightweight hybridisation with classical online planners as a practical route to deployable partial map systems.

AI.tldr: 论文评估了9种LLM在部分可观测ASCII网格世界中的探索和导航能力，发现推理调优模型能可靠完成导航但效率低于最优路径，训练方式和推理能力比参数量更能预测控制性能。
AI.motivation: 研究LLM能否作为纯文本控制器在部分可观测环境中执行探索和导航任务，无需代码执行、工具或程序合成。这对于检查、物流和搜救等应用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 创建可复现的基准测试，在固定ASCII网格世界中使用oracle定位，每步只显示5×5局部窗口。评估9种LLM（开源/专有、密集/MoE、指令调优/推理调优）在三种难度布局上的探索（最大化揭示单元格）和导航（最短路径到达目标）任务。
AI.result: 推理调优模型在所有布局中都能可靠完成导航，但效率低于最优路径。few-shot提示主要帮助推理调优模型减少无效移动和缩短路径，而传统密集指令模型表现不一致。观察到特征性动作先验（上/右）可能导致部分可观测下的循环。训练方式和测试时推理能力比原始参数量更能预测控制性能。
AI.conclusion: LLM在部分可观测环境中具有一定导航能力，但需要与经典在线规划器轻量级混合才能实现可部署的部分地图系统。训练方式和推理能力是关键因素。

title: ODUTQA-MDC: A Task for Open-Domain Underspecified Tabular QA with Multi-turn Dialogue-based Clarification
comment: This paper has been accepted to the main conference of ACL 2026
summary: The advancement of large language models (LLMs) has enhanced tabular question answering (Tabular QA), yet they struggle with open-domain queries exhibiting underspecified or uncertain expressions. To address this, we introduce the ODUTQA-MDC task and the first comprehensive benchmark to tackle it. This benchmark includes: (1) a large-scale ODUTQA dataset with 209 tables and 25,105 QA pairs; (2) a fine-grained labeling scheme for detailed evaluation; and (3) a dynamic clarification interface that simulates user feedback for interactive assessment. We also propose MAIC-TQA, a multi-agent framework that excels at detecting ambiguities, clarifying them through dialogue, and refining answers. Experiments validate our benchmark and framework, establishing them as a key resource for advancing conversational, underspecification-aware Tabular QA research.

AI.tldr: 提出了ODUTQA-MDC任务和首个综合基准，包含大规模数据集、细粒度标注方案和动态澄清接口，并开发了MAIC-TQA多智能体框架来处理表格问答中的不确定性和模糊表达。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在表格问答方面有进步，但在处理开放域查询时仍面临表达不明确或不确定的问题，需要专门的任务和评估框架来解决这一挑战。
AI.method: 1) 创建ODUTQA-MDC基准：包含209个表格和25,105个问答对的大规模数据集、细粒度标注方案、动态澄清接口；2) 提出MAIC-TQA多智能体框架：能够检测模糊性、通过对话澄清、优化答案。
AI.result: 实验验证了基准和框架的有效性，为推进对话式、不确定性感知的表格问答研究提供了关键资源。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了表格问答中处理不确定性和模糊表达的空白，为未来研究提供了重要的基准和框架支持。

title: K-STEMIT: Knowledge-Informed Spatio-Temporal Efficient Multi-Branch Graph Neural Network for Subsurface Stratigraphy Thickness Estimation from Radar Data
summary: Subsurface stratigraphy contains important spatio-temporal information about accumulation, deformation, and layer formation in polar ice sheets. In particular, variations in internal ice layer thickness provide valuable constraints for snow mass balance estimation and projections of ice sheet change. Although radar sensors can capture these layered structures as depth-resolved radargrams, convolutional neural networks applied directly to radar images are often sensitive to speckle noise and acquisition artifacts. In addition, purely data-driven methods may underuse physical knowledge, leading to unrealistic thickness estimates under spatial or temporal extrapolation. To address these challenges, we develop K-STEMIT, a novel knowledge-informed, efficient, multi-branch spatio-temporal graph neural network that combines a geometric framework for spatial learning with temporal convolution to capture temporal dynamics, and incorporates physical data synchronized from the Model Atmospheric Regional physical weather model. An adaptive feature fusion strategy is employed to dynamically combine features learned from different branches. Extensive experiments have been conducted to compare K-STEMIT against current state-of-the-art methods in both knowledge-informed and non-knowledge-informed settings, as well as other existing methods. Results show that K-STEMIT consistently achieves the highest accuracy while maintaining near-optimal efficiency. Most notably, incorporating adaptive feature fusion and physical priors reduces the root mean-squared error by 21.01% with negligible additional cost compared to its conventional multi-branch variants. Additionally, our proposed K-STEMIT achieves consistently lower per-year relative MAE, enabling reliable, continuous spatiotemporal assessment of snow accumulation variability across large spatial regions.

AI.tldr: K-STEMIT是一种知识引导的高效多分支时空图神经网络，用于从雷达图像中提取冰层厚度信息，通过结合几何框架、时间卷积和物理天气模型数据，显著提高了厚度估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于卷积神经网络的雷达图像处理方法对噪声和伪影敏感，且纯数据驱动方法未能充分利用物理知识，导致时空外推时厚度估计不现实。需要开发能结合物理先验知识的方法来提高冰层厚度估计的准确性和可靠性。
AI.method: 提出K-STEMIT模型：1）使用几何框架进行空间学习；2）时间卷积捕捉时间动态；3）整合Model Atmospheric Regional物理天气模型的同步数据；4）采用自适应特征融合策略动态组合不同分支的特征。
AI.result: K-STEMIT在知识引导和非知识引导设置下均优于现有方法，自适应特征融合和物理先验使均方根误差降低21.01%，同时保持接近最优的效率，实现了更低的时间相对MAE，支持可靠的大范围时空积雪积累变异性评估。
AI.conclusion: K-STEMIT通过结合物理知识和自适应特征融合，显著提高了冰层厚度估计的准确性和可靠性，为大规模时空积雪积累变异性评估提供了有效工具。

title: Orthogonal Quadratic Complements for Vision Transformer Feed-Forward Networks
summary:
Recent bilinear feed-forward replacements for vision transformers can substantially improve accuracy, but they often conflate two effects: stronger second-order interactions and increased redundancy relative to the main branch. We study a complementary design principle in which auxiliary quadratic features contribute only information not already captured by the dominant hidden representation. To this end, we propose Orthogonal Quadratic Complements (OQC), which construct a low-rank quadratic auxiliary branch and explicitly project it onto the orthogonal complement of the main branch before injection. We further study an efficient low-rank realization (OQC-LR) and gated extensions (OQC-static and OQC-dynamic).
  Under a parameter-matched Deep-ViT and CIFAR-100 protocol with a fixed penultimate residual readout, full OQC improves an AFBO baseline from 64.25 +/- 0.22 to 65.59 +/- 0.22, while OQC-LR reaches 65.52 +/- 0.25 with a substantially better speed-accuracy tradeoff. On TinyImageNet, the gated extension OQC-dynamic achieves 51.88 +/- 0.32, improving the baseline (50.45 +/- 0.21) by 1.43 points and outperforming all ungated variants. Mechanism analyses show near-zero post-projection auxiliary-main overlap together with improved representation geometry and class separation. The full family, including both ungated and gated variants, generalizes consistently across both datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出正交二次补码(OQC)，一种用于视觉Transformer的辅助二次分支设计，通过正交投影确保补充信息不冗余，提高模型准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有双线性前馈网络改进视觉Transformer时，往往混淆了二阶交互增强和冗余增加两种效应。本文旨在设计一种辅助二次特征分支，只补充主分支未捕获的信息，避免信息冗余。
AI.method: 提出正交二次补码(OQC)：构建低秩二次辅助分支，在注入前将其显式投影到主分支的正交补空间。进一步研究高效低秩实现(OQC-LR)和门控扩展(OQC-static和OQC-dynamic)。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100上，完整OQC将AFBO基线从64.25±0.22提升到65.59±0.22，OQC-LR达到65.52±0.25且速度-准确率权衡更优。在TinyImageNet上，门控扩展OQC-dynamic达到51.88±0.32，比基线(50.45±0.21)提升1.43分，优于所有非门控变体。
AI.conclusion: OQC通过正交投影确保辅助分支补充非冗余信息，显著提升视觉Transformer性能，同时保持高效性。机制分析显示投影后辅助-主分支重叠接近零，改善了表示几何和类别分离。

title: Evaluating Reliability Gaps in Large Language Model Safety via Repeated Prompt Sampling
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures; accepted at the CCAI 2026 conference
summary: Traditional benchmarks for large language models (LLMs), such as HELM and AIR-BENCH, primarily assess safety risk through breadth-oriented evaluation across diverse tasks. However, real-world deployment often exposes a different class of risk: operational failures arising from repeated generations of the same prompt rather than broad task generalization. In high-stakes settings, response consistency and safety under repeated use are critical operational requirements. We introduce Accelerated Prompt Stress Testing (APST), a depth-oriented evaluation framework inspired by highly accelerated stress testing in reliability engineering. APST probes LLM behavior by repeatedly sampling identical prompts under controlled operational conditions, including temperature variation and prompt perturbation, to surface latent failure modes such as hallucinations, refusal inconsistency, and unsafe completions. Rather than treating failures as isolated events, APST characterizes them statistically as stochastic outcomes of repeated inference. We model observed safety failures using Bernoulli and binomial formulations to estimate per-inference failure probabilities, enabling quantitative comparison of operational risk across models and configurations. We apply APST to multiple instruction-tuned LLMs evaluated on AIR-BENCH 2024 derived safety and security prompts. While models exhibit similar performance under conventional single- or very-low-sample evaluation (N <= 3), repeated sampling reveals substantial variation in empirical failure probabilities across temperatures. These results demonstrate that shallow benchmark scores can obscure meaningful differences in reliability under sustained use.

AI.tldr: APST框架通过重复采样相同提示来评估LLM的操作风险，发现传统基准测试可能掩盖持续使用下的可靠性差异
AI.motivation: 传统基准测试（如HELM和AIR-BENCH）主要评估跨任务的广度安全风险，但实际部署中更关注重复生成相同提示时的操作失败风险。高风险场景下，响应一致性和重复使用安全性是关键操作要求。
AI.method: 提出加速提示压力测试（APST）框架，受可靠性工程中高度加速压力测试启发。通过重复采样相同提示，在受控操作条件（温度变化和提示扰动）下探测LLM行为，发现幻觉、拒绝不一致和不安全完成等潜在故障模式。将安全故障建模为伯努利和二项分布，估计每次推理的故障概率。
AI.result: 将APST应用于多个指令调优LLM，使用AIR-BENCH 2024的安全和安保提示进行评估。虽然模型在传统单次或极低样本评估（N≤3）下表现相似，但重复采样揭示了不同温度下经验故障概率的显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 浅层基准分数可能掩盖持续使用下的可靠性差异。APST提供了一种深度导向的评估方法，能够量化操作风险，对于高风险部署场景的LLM评估具有重要意义。

title: FAITH: Factuality Alignment through Integrating Trustworthiness and Honestness
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate factually inaccurate content even if they have corresponding knowledge, which critically undermines their reliability. Existing approaches attempt to mitigate this by incorporating uncertainty in QA prompt during training, but these numerical scores lack the semantic richness for LLM to properly understand its internal states of trustworthiness and honestness, leading to insufficient factuality alignment. We introduce FAITH (Factuality Alignment through Integrating Trustworthiness and Honestness), a post-training framework for factuality alignment that integrates natural-language uncertainty signals with external knowledge. Specifically, we augment training datasets by computing confidence scores and semantic entropy from LLM outputs and mapping them into a knowledge state quadrant that describes the model's internal knowledge possession (trustworthiness) and answering behaviors (honestness) in natural language. Based on this enhanced data, we design a reward function that considers both correctness and uncertainty signals, and fine-tune the LLM using the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm. To further mitigate weakly grounded responses, we design a retrieval-augmented module that retrieves relevant external passages, improving the consistency between internal and external knowledge representations. Extensive experiments on four knowledge-intensive benchmarks demonstrate that FAITH enhances the factual accuracy and truthfulness of LLMs.

AI.tldr: FAITH是一个后训练框架，通过整合可信度和诚实度的自然语言不确定性信号与外部知识，来提升LLM的事实准确性。该方法将置信度分数和语义熵映射到知识状态象限，使用PPO算法进行微调，并加入检索增强模块。
AI.motivation: LLM即使拥有相关知识也会生成事实不准确的内容，这严重削弱了其可靠性。现有方法通过在训练中融入不确定性数值评分，但这些数值缺乏语义丰富性，无法让LLM充分理解其内部可信度和诚实度状态，导致事实对齐不足。
AI.method: 1) 通过计算LLM输出的置信度分数和语义熵，将其映射到描述模型内部知识拥有（可信度）和回答行为（诚实度）的自然语言知识状态象限，增强训练数据；2) 设计同时考虑正确性和不确定性信号的奖励函数，使用PPO算法微调LLM；3) 设计检索增强模块检索相关外部段落，改善内部和外部知识表示的一致性。
AI.result: 在四个知识密集型基准测试上的广泛实验表明，FAITH显著提升了LLM的事实准确性和真实性。
AI.conclusion: FAITH通过整合自然语言不确定性信号与外部知识，有效提升了LLM的事实对齐能力，为解决LLM生成事实不准确内容的问题提供了有效的后训练框架。

title: A Hybrid Intelligent Framework for Uncertainty-Aware Condition Monitoring of Industrial Systems
summary: Hybrid approaches that combine data-driven learning with physics-based insight have shown promise for improving the reliability of industrial condition monitoring. This work develops a hybrid condition monitoring framework that integrates primary sensor measurements, lagged temporal features, and physics-informed residuals derived from nominal surrogate models. Two hybrid integration strategies are examined. The first is a feature-level fusion approach that augments the input space with residual and temporal information. The second is a model-level ensemble approach in which machine learning classifiers trained on different feature types are combined at the decision level. Both hybrid approaches of the condition monitoring framework are evaluated on a continuous stirred-tank reactor (CSTR) benchmark using several machine learning models and ensemble configurations. Both feature-level and model-level hybridization improve diagnostic accuracy relative to single-source baselines, with the best model-level ensemble achieving a 2.9\% improvement over the best baseline ensemble. To assess predictive reliability, conformal prediction is applied to quantify coverage, prediction-set size, and abstention behavior. The results show that hybrid integration enhances uncertainty management, producing smaller and well-calibrated prediction sets at matched coverage levels. These findings demonstrate that lightweight physics-informed residuals, temporal augmentation, and ensemble learning can be combined effectively to improve both accuracy and decision reliability in nonlinear industrial systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种混合工业状态监测框架，结合了数据驱动学习与物理知识，通过特征级融合和模型级集成两种策略，在连续搅拌釜反应器基准测试中提高了诊断准确性和预测可靠性。
AI.motivation: 工业状态监测需要可靠的方法来确保系统安全运行。纯数据驱动方法可能缺乏物理一致性，而纯物理模型可能无法捕捉复杂非线性行为。因此需要结合数据驱动学习与物理洞察的混合方法，以提高监测的可靠性和准确性。
AI.method: 开发了混合状态监测框架，整合了：1）主要传感器测量；2）滞后时间特征；3）从名义代理模型导出的物理信息残差。研究了两种混合集成策略：特征级融合（将残差和时间信息增强到输入空间）和模型级集成（在不同特征类型上训练的机器学习分类器在决策级组合）。在连续搅拌釜反应器基准上使用多种机器学习模型和集成配置进行评估，并应用保形预测来量化覆盖范围、预测集大小和弃权行为。
AI.result: 两种混合方法都提高了诊断准确性：最佳模型级集成比最佳基线集成提高了2.9%。在预测可靠性方面，混合集成增强了不确定性管理，在匹配的覆盖水平下产生更小且校准良好的预测集。轻量级物理信息残差、时间增强和集成学习的结合有效提高了非线性工业系统的准确性和决策可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 混合方法结合数据驱动学习和物理洞察可以显著提高工业状态监测的性能。特征级融合和模型级集成策略都能带来准确性和可靠性的改进，为非线性工业系统提供了更可靠的监测解决方案。

title: Robust Fair Disease Diagnosis in CT Images
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. Accepted at the 3rd Workshop on New Trends in AI-Generated Media and Security (AIMS) @ CVPR 2026
summary: Automated diagnosis from chest CT has improved considerably with deep learning, but models trained on skewed datasets tend to perform unevenly across patient demographics. However, the situation is worse than simple demographic bias. In clinical data, class imbalance and group underrepresentation often coincide, creating compound failure modes that neither standard rebalancing nor fairness corrections can fix alone. We introduce a two-level objective that targets both axes of this problem. Logit-adjusted cross-entropy loss operates at the sample level, shifting decision margins by class frequency with provable consistency guarantees. Conditional Value at Risk aggregation operates at the group level, directing optimization pressure toward whichever demographic group currently has the higher loss. We evaluate on the Fair Disease Diagnosis benchmark using a 3D ResNet-18 pretrained on Kinetics-400, classifying CT volumes into Adenocarcinoma, Squamous Cell Carcinoma, COVID-19, and Normal groups with patient sex annotations. The training set illustrates the compound problem concretely: squamous cell carcinoma has 84 samples total, 5 of them female. The combined loss reaches a gender-averaged macro F1 of 0.8403 with a fairness gap of 0.0239, a 13.3% improvement in score and 78% reduction in demographic disparity over the baseline. Ablations show that each component alone falls short. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/Purdue-M2/Fair-Disease-Diagnosis.

AI.tldr: 提出一种两层次损失函数，结合样本级的logit调整交叉熵和群体级的条件风险价值聚合，解决医学影像诊断中类别不平衡与群体代表性不足的复合问题，在公平疾病诊断基准上显著提升性能并减少人口统计差异。
AI.motivation: 医学影像诊断中，深度学习模型在偏斜数据集上训练会导致性能在不同患者人口统计特征上表现不均。临床数据中，类别不平衡和群体代表性不足往往同时存在，形成复合失败模式，传统的重新平衡或公平性校正方法无法单独解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出两层次目标函数：1) 样本级使用logit调整交叉熵损失，根据类别频率调整决策边界，具有可证明的一致性保证；2) 群体级使用条件风险价值聚合，将优化压力导向当前损失较高的人口统计群体。在Fair Disease Diagnosis基准上使用预训练的3D ResNet-18进行评估。
AI.result: 在公平疾病诊断基准上，结合损失达到性别平均宏观F1为0.8403，公平性差距为0.0239，相比基线提升13.3%的性能，减少78%的人口统计差异。消融实验显示单独使用任一组件效果不佳。
AI.conclusion: 提出的两层次损失函数能有效解决医学影像诊断中类别不平衡与群体代表性不足的复合问题，显著提升模型性能并减少人口统计差异，代码已公开。

title: Unifying Ontology Construction and Semantic Alignment for Deterministic Enterprise Reasoning at Scale
summary: While enterprises amass vast quantities of data, much of it remains chaotic and effectively dormant, preventing decision-making based on comprehensive information. Existing neuro-symbolic approaches rely on disjoint pipelines and struggle with error propagation. We introduce the large ontology model (LOM), a unified framework that seamlessly integrates ontology construction, semantic alignment, and logical reasoning into a single end-to-end architecture. LOM employs a construct-align-reason (CAR) pipeline, leveraging its unified architecture across all three stages: it first autonomously constructs a domain-specific ontological universe from raw data, then aligns neural generation with this structural reality using a graph-aware encoder and reinforcement learning, and finally executes deterministic reasoning over the constructed topology, node attributes and relation types. We evaluate LOM on a comprehensive benchmark constructed from diverse real-world enterprise datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that LOM-4B achieves 88.8% accuracy in ontology completion and 94% in complex graph reasoning tasks, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art LLMs. These findings validate that autonomous logical construction is essential for achieving deterministic, enterprise-grade intelligence.

AI.tldr: LOM是一个统一的大型本体模型框架，通过构建-对齐-推理（CAR）管道，将本体构建、语义对齐和逻辑推理集成到端到端架构中，显著提升企业数据推理能力。
AI.motivation: 企业拥有大量混乱且未被充分利用的数据，现有神经符号方法依赖分离的流程且存在错误传播问题，需要统一的框架来实现确定性的企业级智能。
AI.method: 提出大型本体模型（LOM），采用构建-对齐-推理（CAR）管道：1）从原始数据自主构建领域特定本体宇宙；2）使用图感知编码器和强化学习将神经生成与结构现实对齐；3）在构建的拓扑、节点属性和关系类型上执行确定性推理。
AI.result: 在多样化真实企业数据集构建的基准测试中，LOM-4B在本体补全任务上达到88.8%准确率，在复杂图推理任务上达到94%准确率，显著优于最先进的LLMs。
AI.conclusion: 自主逻辑构建对于实现确定性的企业级智能至关重要，LOM框架为处理混乱企业数据提供了有效的统一解决方案。

title: Relational Probing: LM-to-Graph Adaptation for Financial Prediction
comment: Accpeted by The 2nd Workskop on Advances in Financial AI Workshop: Towards Agentic and Responsible Systems at ICLR 2026
summary: Language models can be used to identify relationships between financial entities in text. However, while structured output mechanisms exist, prompting-based pipelines still incur autoregressive decoding costs and decouple graph construction from downstream optimization. We propose \emph{Relational Probing}, which replaces the standard language-model head with a relation head that induces a relational graph directly from language-model hidden states and is trained jointly with the downstream task model for stock-trend prediction. This approach both learns semantic representations and preserves the strict structure of the induced relational graph. It enables language-model outputs to go beyond text, allowing them to be reshaped into task-specific formats for downstream models. To enhance reproducibility, we provide an operational definition of small language models (SLMs): models that can be fine-tuned end-to-end on a single 24GB GPU under specified batch-size and sequence-length settings. Experiments use Qwen3 backbones (0.6B/1.7B/4B) as upstream SLMs and compare against a co-occurrence baseline. Relational Probing yields consistent performance improvements at competitive inference cost.

AI.tldr: 提出Relational Probing方法，用关系头替代标准语言模型头，直接从隐藏状态诱导关系图，并与下游股票趋势预测任务联合训练，实现语义表示学习和结构化图保持。
AI.motivation: 现有基于提示的方法存在自回归解码成本高、图构建与下游优化分离的问题。需要一种既能学习语义表示又能保持结构化关系图的方法，让语言模型输出超越文本格式，适应下游任务需求。
AI.method: 1) 用关系头替代标准LM头，直接从隐藏状态诱导关系图；2) 与下游股票趋势预测任务联合训练；3) 使用Qwen3小语言模型(0.6B/1.7B/4B)作为上游模型；4) 提供小语言模型的可操作定义：可在24GB GPU上端到端微调。
AI.result: Relational Probing在保持竞争力的推理成本下，相比共现基线获得了一致的性能提升。方法能够有效学习语义表示并保持关系图结构。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法成功解决了现有方法的局限性，实现了语言模型输出向任务特定格式的转换，为金融实体关系识别提供了更高效的解决方案。

title: Vestibular reservoir computing
summary: Reservoir computing (RC) is a computational framework known for its training efficiency, making it ideal for physical hardware implementations. However, realizing the complex interconnectivity of traditional reservoirs in physical systems remains a significant challenge. This paper proposes a physical RC scheme inspired by the biological vestibular system. To overcome hardware complexity, we introduce a designed uncoupled topology and demonstrate that it achieves performance comparable to fully coupled networks. We theoretically analyze the difference between these topologies by deriving a memory capacity formula for linear reservoirs, identifying specific conditions where both configurations yield equivalent memory. These analytical results are demonstrated to approximately hold for nonlinear reservoir systems. Furthermore, we systematically examine the impact of reservoir size on predictive statistics and memory capacity. Our findings suggest that uncoupled reservoir architectures offer a mathematically sound and practically feasible pathway for efficient physical reservoir computing.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种受生物前庭系统启发的物理储层计算方案，采用非耦合拓扑结构替代传统全耦合网络，在保持性能的同时显著降低硬件实现复杂度。
AI.motivation: 储层计算以其训练效率高而闻名，适合物理硬件实现，但传统储层的复杂互连性在物理系统中实现困难。需要找到既能保持性能又能简化硬件复杂度的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出受生物前庭系统启发的物理储层计算方案，引入设计的非耦合拓扑结构。通过理论分析推导线性储层的记忆容量公式，比较非耦合与全耦合拓扑的性能差异，并将分析结果扩展到非线性储层系统。
AI.result: 非耦合拓扑在特定条件下能达到与全耦合网络相当的性能。理论分析表明两种配置在特定条件下具有等效记忆能力，这一结论在非线性储层系统中也近似成立。系统研究了储层大小对预测统计量和记忆容量的影响。
AI.conclusion: 非耦合储层架构为高效的物理储层计算提供了数学上合理且实际可行的途径，能够显著降低硬件实现复杂度而不牺牲性能。

title: Head-wise Modality Specialization within MLLMs for Robust Fake News Detection under Missing Modality
summary: Multimodal fake news detection (MFND) aims to verify news credibility by jointly exploiting textual and visual evidence. However, real-world news dissemination frequently suffers from missing modality due to deleted images, corrupted screenshots, and similar issues. Thus, robust detection in this scenario requires preserving strong verification ability for each modality, which is challenging in MFND due to insufficient learning of the low-contribution modality and scarce unimodal annotations. To address this issue, we propose Head-wise Modality Specialization within Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for robust MFND under missing modality. Specifically, we first systematically study attention heads in MLLMs and their relationship with performance under missing modality, showing that modality-critical heads serve as key carriers of unimodal verification ability through their modality specialization. Based on this observation, to better preserve verification ability for the low-contribution modality, we introduce a head-wise specialization mechanism that explicitly allocates these heads to different modalities and preserves their specialization through lower-bound attention constraints. Furthermore, to better exploit scarce unimodal annotations, we propose a Unimodal Knowledge Retention strategy that prevents these heads from drifting away from the unimodal knowledge learned from limited supervision. Experiments show that our method improves robustness under missing modality while preserving performance with full multimodal input.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多头模态专业化的多模态大语言模型方法，用于处理缺失模态下的多模态假新闻检测，通过显式分配注意力头到不同模态并利用有限单模态标注来提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中新闻传播经常面临模态缺失问题（如图片删除、截图损坏等），而现有多模态假新闻检测方法在模态缺失情况下难以保持每个模态的验证能力，主要挑战包括低贡献模态学习不足和单模态标注稀缺。
AI.method: 1. 系统研究MLLMs中注意力头与缺失模态下性能的关系，发现模态关键头通过模态专业化承载单模态验证能力；2. 提出头级专业化机制，显式分配注意力头到不同模态，并通过下界注意力约束保持其专业化；3. 提出单模态知识保留策略，防止这些头从有限监督中学到的单模态知识漂移。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在缺失模态情况下提高了鲁棒性，同时保持了完整多模态输入下的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过头级模态专业化和单模态知识保留，可以有效提升多模态大语言模型在缺失模态场景下的假新闻检测鲁棒性。

title: General-purpose LLMs as Models of Human Driver Behavior: The Case of Simplified Merging
summary: Human behavior models are essential as behavior references and for simulating human agents in virtual safety assessment of automated vehicles (AVs), yet current models face a trade-off between interpretability and flexibility. General-purpose large language models (LLMs) offer a promising alternative: a single model potentially deployable without parameter fitting across diverse scenarios. However, what LLMs can and cannot capture about human driving behavior remains poorly understood. We address this gap by embedding two general-purpose LLMs (OpenAI o3 and Google Gemini 2.5 Pro) as standalone, closed-loop driver agents in a simplified one-dimensional merging scenario and comparing their behavior against human data using quantitative and qualitative analyses. Both models reproduce human-like intermittent operational control and tactical dependencies on spatial cues. However, neither consistently captures the human response to dynamic velocity cues, and safety performance diverges sharply between models. A systematic prompt ablation study reveals that prompt components act as model-specific inductive biases that do not transfer across LLMs. These findings suggest that general-purpose LLMs could potentially serve as standalone, ready-to-use human behavior models in AV evaluation pipelines, but future research is needed to better understand their failure modes and ensure their validity as models of human driving behavior.

AI.tldr: 该研究探索将通用大语言模型作为自动驾驶评估中的人类行为模型，在简化的一维并道场景中测试了OpenAI o3和Google Gemini 2.5 Pro，发现它们能部分模拟人类驾驶行为，但在动态速度响应和安全性方面存在局限，提示词设计对模型表现有显著影响。
AI.motivation: 当前人类行为模型在自动驾驶安全评估中存在可解释性与灵活性之间的权衡。通用大语言模型提供了无需参数调整即可部署到多种场景的潜力，但LLM在捕捉人类驾驶行为方面的能力与局限尚不清楚。本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 将两个通用LLM（OpenAI o3和Google Gemini 2.5 Pro）作为独立的闭环驾驶员代理嵌入简化的1D并道场景，通过定量和定性分析比较它们与人类数据的行为。进行了系统的提示词消融研究，分析不同提示组件对模型行为的影响。
AI.result: 两个LLM都能复现人类间歇性操作控制和基于空间线索的战术依赖。但都无法一致地捕捉人类对动态速度线索的响应，且安全性表现差异显著。提示词组件作为模型特定的归纳偏置，在不同LLM间不可迁移。
AI.conclusion: 通用LLM有潜力作为即用型人类行为模型用于自动驾驶评估流程，但需要进一步研究以更好理解其失效模式，并确保其作为人类驾驶行为模型的有效性。

title: CodeComp: Structural KV Cache Compression for Agentic Coding
summary: Agentic code tasks such as fault localization and patch generation require processing long codebases under tight memory constraints, where the Key-Value (KV) cache becomes the primary inference bottleneck. Existing compression methods rely exclusively on attention signals to estimate token importance, systematically discarding structurally critical tokens such as call sites, branch conditions, and assignments that are essential for code understanding. We present CodeComp, a training-free KV cache compression framework that incorporates static program analysis into LLM inference via Code Property Graph priors extracted by Joern. Across bug localization and code generation benchmarks, CodeComp consistently outperforms attention-only compression baselines under equal memory budgets, recovering the majority of full-context accuracy under aggressive KV cache compression, while matching the patch generation quality of uncompressed full-context inference and integrating seamlessly into SGLang-based agentic coding pipelines without model modification.

AI.tldr: CodeComp：一种无需训练的KV缓存压缩框架，通过静态程序分析（Code Property Graph）提升代码任务中的LLM推理效率，在相同内存预算下优于仅基于注意力信号的压缩方法。
AI.motivation: 代码代理任务（如故障定位和补丁生成）需要处理长代码库，KV缓存成为主要推理瓶颈。现有压缩方法仅依赖注意力信号估计token重要性，会系统性地丢弃对代码理解至关重要的结构关键token（如调用点、分支条件、赋值语句）。
AI.method: CodeComp框架结合静态程序分析（通过Joern提取Code Property Graph先验）到LLM推理中，无需训练。它识别代码中的结构关键token，在KV缓存压缩时优先保留这些token，同时与SGLang-based代理编码管道无缝集成。
AI.result: 在故障定位和代码生成基准测试中，CodeComp在相同内存预算下持续优于仅基于注意力的压缩基线，在激进的KV缓存压缩下恢复大部分完整上下文准确性，同时匹配未压缩完整上下文推理的补丁生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 将静态程序分析集成到LLM推理中能有效提升KV缓存压缩效果，特别是在代码任务中。CodeComp展示了无需模型修改即可在内存受限环境下保持代码理解能力的方法。

title: SLM Finetuning for Natural Language to Domain Specific Code Generation in Production
comment: 11 pages (including appendix), 5 tables, 1 figure. Submitted to arXiv as a preprint
summary: Many applications today use large language models for code generation; however, production systems have strict latency requirements that can be difficult to meet with large models. Small language models with a few billion parameters are resource efficient but may suffer from limited reasoning, hallucinations, or poor retention of longer context. Fine tuning improves task specific accuracy by embedding domain knowledge directly into model weights, reducing reliance on runtime context. We previously implemented a baseline natural language to code generation approach using a retrieval augmented generation pipeline that dynamically selected few shot examples to embed domain specific language context for a large language model. In this study, we evaluate small language models for generating domain specific language from natural language by fine tuning variants of Mistral and other models on a dataset of natural language code pairs. Our results show that the fine-tuned models achieve improved performance and latency on test datasets compared to larger models. We also demonstrate that the trained model can be further fine-tuned for customer specific scenarios without degrading general performance, helping resolve production issues. Load testing followed by production deployment confirmed optimal performance in terms of latency and quality. These findings demonstrate that task specific fine tuning with small language models provides an efficient, faster, and cost-effective alternative to large language models for domain specific language generation.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了小型语言模型在领域特定代码生成任务上的表现，通过微调Mistral等模型，在保持低延迟的同时实现了优于大模型的性能，证明了小模型微调是高效、快速且成本更低的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 生产系统对代码生成有严格的延迟要求，大语言模型难以满足；小语言模型虽然资源效率高，但存在推理能力有限、幻觉问题以及长上下文保留能力差等缺点。需要找到既能满足延迟要求又能保证代码生成质量的解决方案。
AI.method:
1. 在自然语言-代码对数据集上微调Mistral等小型语言模型变体
2. 与之前基于检索增强生成(RAG)的大语言模型基线方法进行对比
3. 进一步对训练好的模型进行客户特定场景的微调
4. 进行负载测试和生产部署验证
AI.result:
1. 微调后的小型模型在测试数据集上比大模型表现更好且延迟更低
2. 训练好的模型可以进一步针对客户特定场景微调，而不降低通用性能
3. 负载测试和生产部署确认了在延迟和质量方面的最优性能
AI.conclusion: 针对特定任务的微调小型语言模型为领域特定语言生成提供了高效、快速且成本更低的替代方案，能够满足生产系统的延迟要求，同时解决小模型的推理和幻觉问题。

title: LAST: Leveraging Tools as Hints to Enhance Spatial Reasoning for Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Spatial reasoning is a cornerstone capability for intelligent systems to perceive and interact with the physical world. However, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently suffer from hallucinations and imprecision when parsing complex geometric layouts. As data-driven scaling struggles to internalize structured geometric priors and spatial constraints, integrating mature, specialized vision models presents a compelling alternative. Despite its promise, applying this paradigm to spatial reasoning is hindered by two key challenges: The difficulty of invoking heterogeneous, parameter-rich tools, as well as the challenge of understanding and effectively leveraging their diverse low-level outputs (e.g., segmentation masks, depth maps) in high-level reasoning. To address these challenges, we propose LAST, a unified framework for tool-augmented spatial reasoning. LAST features an extensible interactive sandbox, termed LAST-Box, which abstracts heterogeneous tool invocations into atomic instructions and reusable spatial skills, returning multimodal hints (e.g., annotated images and textual descriptions) that can be directly consumed by LLMs. We further design a three-stage progressive training strategy that guides models from understanding tool outputs to proficient and adaptive tool invocation. Experiments on four datasets show that LAST-7B achieves around 20\% performance gains over its backbone and outperforms strong proprietary closed-source LLMs, substantially enhancing reasoning on complex spatial tasks.

AI.tldr: LAST框架通过工具增强提升多模态大语言模型的空间推理能力，将异构工具抽象为原子指令和可复用空间技能，使用渐进训练策略，在7B模型上实现约20%性能提升
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在解析复杂几何布局时经常出现幻觉和不精确问题，数据驱动的扩展难以内化结构化几何先验和空间约束。虽然集成成熟的专用视觉模型是很有前景的替代方案，但存在两个关键挑战：调用异构参数丰富工具的困难，以及在高级推理中理解和有效利用其多样化低级输出的挑战
AI.method: 提出LAST框架，包含可扩展的交互式沙盒LAST-Box，将异构工具调用抽象为原子指令和可复用空间技能，返回多模态提示（如标注图像和文本描述）。设计三阶段渐进训练策略，引导模型从理解工具输出到熟练自适应地调用工具
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的实验表明，LAST-7B相比其骨干模型实现了约20%的性能提升，并优于强大的专有闭源大语言模型，显著增强了复杂空间任务的推理能力
AI.conclusion: LAST框架通过工具增强有效解决了多模态大语言模型在空间推理中的幻觉和不精确问题，展示了将专用视觉模型与语言模型结合进行复杂空间推理的可行性

title: Beyond Theory of Mind in Robotics
summary: Theory of Mind, the capacity to explain and predict behavior by inferring hidden mental states, has become the dominant paradigm for social interaction in robotics. Yet ToM rests on three assumptions that poorly capture how most social interaction actually unfolds: that meaning travels inside-out from hidden states to observable behavior; that understanding requires detached inference rather than participation; and that the meaning of behavior is fixed and available to a passive observer. Drawing on ethnomethodology, conversation analysis, and participatory sense-making, I argue that social meaning is not decoded from behavior but produced through moment-to-moment coordination between agents. This interactional foundation has direct implications for robot design: shifting from internal state modeling toward policies for sustaining coordination, from observer-based inference toward active participation, and from fixed behavioral meaning toward meaning potential stabilized through response.

AI.tldr: 该论文批判了机器人领域主流的"心智理论"范式，提出社会意义并非从行为中解码，而是通过智能体间的实时协调产生，这对机器人设计有重要启示。
AI.motivation: 作者认为当前机器人社交互动中占主导地位的心智理论范式存在三个问题：1) 意义从隐藏状态到可观察行为的"由内而外"传递假设；2) 理解需要脱离参与的推理而非参与本身；3) 行为意义固定且对被动观察者可用。这些假设未能捕捉大多数社交互动的实际展开方式。
AI.method: 论文借鉴了民族方法学、会话分析和参与式意义建构理论，论证社会意义不是从行为中解码，而是通过智能体间的实时协调产生的。作者提出了从内部状态建模转向维持协调的策略，从观察者推理转向主动参与，从固定行为意义转向通过响应稳定的意义潜力。
AI.result: 论文提出了机器人设计的交互基础范式转变：从内部状态建模转向维持协调的策略，从观察者推理转向主动参与，从固定行为意义转向通过响应稳定的意义潜力。
AI.conclusion: 社交意义是通过智能体间的实时协调产生的，而非从行为中解码。这对机器人设计有直接启示，需要从传统的心智理论范式转向更加互动和参与式的设计方法。

title: Comparative Analysis of Large Language Models in Healthcare
summary: Background: Large Language Models (LLMs) are transforming artificial intelligence applications in healthcare due to their ability to understand, generate, and summarize complex medical text. They offer valuable support to clinicians, researchers, and patients, yet their deployment in high-stakes clinical environments raises critical concerns regarding accuracy, reliability, and patient safety. Despite substantial attention in recent years, standardized benchmarking of LLMs for medical applications has been limited. Objective: This study addresses the need for a standardized comparative evaluation of LLMs in medical settings. Method: We evaluate multiple models, including ChatGPT, LLaMA, Grok, Gemini, and ChatDoctor, on core medical tasks such as patient note summarization and medical question answering, using the open-access datasets, MedMCQA, PubMedQA, and Asclepius, and assess performance through a combination of linguistic and task-specific metrics. Results: The results indicate that domain-specific models, such as ChatDoctor, excel in contextual reliability, producing medically accurate and semantically aligned text, whereas general-purpose models like Grok and LLaMA perform better in structured question-answering tasks, demonstrating higher quantitative accuracy. This highlights the complementary strengths of domain-specific and general-purpose LLMs depending on the medical task. Conclusion: Our findings suggest that LLMs can meaningfully support medical professionals and enhance clinical decision-making; however, their safe and effective deployment requires adherence to ethical standards, contextual accuracy, and human oversight in relevant cases. These results underscore the importance of task-specific evaluation and cautious integration of LLMs into healthcare workflows.

AI.tldr: 该研究对医疗领域的LLMs进行了标准化比较评估，发现领域特定模型在上下文可靠性方面表现更好，而通用模型在结构化问答任务中更准确，强调了任务特定评估的重要性。
AI.motivation: LLMs在医疗领域应用广泛，但在高风险临床环境中部署存在准确性、可靠性和患者安全等关键问题。目前缺乏医疗应用LLMs的标准化基准测试，需要系统评估不同模型在医疗任务中的表现。
AI.method: 评估了ChatGPT、LLaMA、Grok、Gemini和ChatDoctor等多个模型，使用MedMCQA、PubMedQA和Asclepius等公开数据集，在患者笔记总结和医疗问答等核心医疗任务上进行测试，结合语言学和任务特定指标评估性能。
AI.result: 领域特定模型（如ChatDoctor）在上下文可靠性方面表现优异，能生成医学准确且语义对齐的文本；通用模型（如Grok和LLaMA）在结构化问答任务中表现更好，具有更高的定量准确性。不同模型在不同医疗任务中各有优势。
AI.conclusion: LLMs能有效支持医疗专业人员和增强临床决策，但安全有效部署需要遵守伦理标准、确保上下文准确性并在相关情况下进行人工监督。研究强调了任务特定评估和谨慎将LLMs整合到医疗工作流程中的重要性。

title: From Recency Bias to Stable Convergence Block Kaczmarz Methods for Online Preference Learning in Matchmaking Applications
summary: We present a family of Kaczmarz-based preference learning algorithms for real-time personalized matchmaking in reciprocal recommender systems. Post-step L2 normalization, common in Kaczmarz-inspired online learners, induces exponential recency bias: the influence of the t-th interaction decays as eta^(n - t), reaching approximately 1e-6 after just 20 swipes at eta = 0.5. We resolve this by replacing the normalization step with a Tikhonov-regularized projection denominator that bounds step size analytically without erasing interaction history. When candidate tag vectors are not pre-normalized, as in realistic deployments where candidates vary in tag density, the Tikhonov denominator ||a||^2 + alpha produces genuinely per-candidate adaptive step sizes, making it structurally distinct from online gradient descent with any fixed learning rate. We further derive a block variant that processes full swipe sessions as a single Gram matrix solve. Population-scale simulation over 6,400 swipes reveals that Block Normalized Kaczmarz (BlockNK), which combines the batch Gram solve with post-session L2 normalization, achieves the highest preference alignment (Align@20 = 0.698), the strongest inter-session direction stability (delta = 0.994), and the flattest degradation profile under label noise across flip ratios p_flip in [0.10, 0.35]. Experiments under cosine similarity subsampling further show that adaptively filtering the candidate pool toward the current preference direction substantially improves asymptotic alignment, at the cost of introducing a feedback loop that may slow recovery from miscalibration. The sequential Tikhonov-Kaczmarz method performs comparably to K-NoNorm under our simulation conditions, suggesting the dominant practical gain over normalized Kaczmarz is the removal of per-step normalization rather than the Tikhonov constant alpha itself.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Kaczmarz的偏好学习算法家族，用于实时个性化匹配推荐系统，通过Tikhonov正则化解决L2归一化导致的指数级近期偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 在基于Kaczmarz的在线学习器中，后步骤L2归一化会导致指数级近期偏差，使得第t次交互的影响呈指数衰减，这限制了推荐系统的长期偏好学习能力。
AI.method: 1) 用Tikhonov正则化投影分母替换归一化步骤，分析性地限制步长而不擦除交互历史；2) 当候选标签向量未预归一化时，Tikhonov分母产生真正的每候选自适应步长；3) 推导处理完整滑动会话作为单个Gram矩阵求解的块变体。
AI.result: Block Normalized Kaczmarz (BlockNK)在6400次滑动模拟中实现最高偏好对齐(Align@20=0.698)、最强的会话间方向稳定性(delta=0.994)，以及在标签噪声下最平坦的性能退化曲线。
AI.conclusion: Tikhonov-Kaczmarz方法的主要实用优势在于移除每步归一化而非Tikhonov常数本身，自适应过滤候选池可显著提高渐近对齐，但可能引入减缓校准恢复的反馈循环。

title: Zero-Shot Synthetic-to-Real Handwritten Text Recognition via Task Analogies
summary: Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) models trained on synthetic handwriting often struggle to generalize to real text, and existing adaptation methods still require real samples from the target domain. In this work, we tackle the fully zero-shot synthetic-to-real generalization setting, where no real data from the target language is available. Our approach learns how model parameters change when moving from synthetic to real handwriting in one or more source languages and transfers this learned correction to new target languages. When using multiple sources, we rely on linguistic similarity to weigh their contrubition when combining them. Experiments across five languages and six architectures show consistent improvements over synthetic-only baselines and reveal that the transferred corrections benefit even languages unrelated to the sources.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种零样本合成到真实手写文本识别的迁移学习方法，通过从源语言学习合成到真实的参数修正，并将其迁移到目标语言，无需目标语言的真实数据。
AI.motivation: 手写文本识别模型在合成数据上训练后难以泛化到真实数据，现有方法仍需目标领域的真实样本。本文旨在解决完全零样本的合成到真实泛化问题，即目标语言没有任何真实数据可用。
AI.method: 方法从源语言学习模型参数从合成到真实手写的变化规律，然后将这种学习到的参数修正迁移到新的目标语言。当使用多个源语言时，基于语言相似性加权组合它们的贡献。
AI.result: 在五种语言和六种架构上的实验显示，该方法相比仅使用合成数据的基线有持续改进，并且迁移的修正甚至对与源语言无关的语言也有益处。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了完全零样本的合成到真实手写文本识别泛化，通过跨语言迁移学习到的参数修正，无需目标语言真实数据即可提升模型性能。

title: The Geometry of Knowing: From Possibilistic Ignorance to Probabilistic Certainty -- A Measure-Theoretic Framework for Epistemic Convergence
summary: This paper develops a measure-theoretic framework establishing when and how a possibilistic representation of incomplete knowledge contracts into a probabilistic representation of intrinsic stochastic variability. Epistemic uncertainty is encoded by a possibility distribution and its dual necessity measure, defining a credal set bounding all probability measures consistent with current evidence. As evidence accumulates, the credal set contracts. The epistemic collapse condition marks the transition: the Choquet integral converges to the Lebesgue integral over the unique limiting density. We prove this rigorously (Theorem 4.5), with all assumptions explicit and a full treatment of the non-consonant case. We introduce the aggregate epistemic width W, establish its axiomatic properties, provide a canonical normalization, and give a feasible online proxy resolving a circularity in prior formulations. Section 7 develops the dynamics of epistemic contraction: evidence induces compatibility, compatibility performs falsification, posterior possibility is the min-intersection of prior possibility and compatibility, and a credibility-directed flow governs support geometry contraction. This is not belief updating. It is knowledge contraction. Probability theory is the limiting geometry of that process. The UKF and ESPF solve different problems by different mechanisms. The UKF minimizes MSE, asserts truth, and requires a valid generative model. The ESPF minimizes maximum entropy and surfaces what evidence has not ruled out. When the world is Gaussian and the model valid, both reach the same estimate by entirely different routes -- convergent optimality, not hierarchical containment. We prove this (Theorem 9.1) and compare both on a 2-day, 877-step orbital tracking scenario. Both achieve 1-meter accuracy. The UKF is accurate but epistemically silent. The ESPF is accurate and epistemically honest.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个测度论框架，用于描述不完全知识的可能性表示如何收缩为内在随机性的概率表示，建立了认知收缩的数学理论，并比较了UKF和ESPF两种滤波方法。
AI.motivation: 传统概率论在处理不完全知识时存在局限性，需要建立从可能性表示到概率表示的严格数学框架，以区分认知不确定性和内在随机性，并为滤波方法提供理论基础。
AI.method: 1. 建立测度论框架，用可能性分布和其对偶必然性测度编码认知不确定性；2. 定义认知收缩条件和Choquet积分收敛定理；3. 引入聚合认知宽度W及其性质；4. 发展认知收缩动力学；5. 理论比较UKF和ESPF方法；6. 在877步轨道跟踪场景中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 1. 证明了认知收缩定理（定理4.5），建立了从可能性到概率的严格收敛条件；2. 提出了认知宽度W的可行在线代理；3. 理论证明了UKF和ESPF在特定条件下的收敛最优性（定理9.1）；4. 实验显示两种方法在轨道跟踪中都达到1米精度，但ESPF提供认知诚实性。
AI.conclusion: 概率论是认知收缩过程的极限几何，UKF和ESPF通过不同机制解决不同问题：UKF最小化MSE但缺乏认知信息，ESPF最小化最大熵并提供未被证据排除的可能性。当世界是高斯分布且模型有效时，两者通过不同路径达到相同估计。

title: Adaptive Multi-Expert Reasoning via Difficulty-Aware Routing and Uncertainty-Guided Aggregation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong performance in math reasoning benchmarks, but their performance varies inconsistently across problems with varying levels of difficulty. This paper describes Adaptive Multi-Expert Reasoning (AMR), a framework that focuses on problem complexity by reasoning with dynamically adapted strategies. An agile routing system that focuses on problem text predicts problems' difficulty and uncertainty and guides a reconfigurable sampling mechanism to manage the breadth of generation. Three specialized experts create candidate responses, which are modified during multiple correction and finalization phases. A neural verifier assesses the correctness of responses, while a clustering-based aggregation technique identifies the final candidate answer based on a combination of consensus and answer quality. When evaluated on the GSM8K dataset, AMR achieved 75.28% accuracy while only using the original training data. This result outperformed the majority of comparable 7B models that were trained on synthetic data. This showcases that models using difficulty-based routing and uncertainty-driven aggregation are efficient and effective in improving math reasoning models' robustness.

AI.tldr: AMR框架通过动态适应策略解决LLM数学推理中性能不一致问题，使用难度路由和不确定性聚合提升模型鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在数学推理基准测试中表现良好，但在不同难度问题上的性能表现不一致。现有方法缺乏对问题复杂度的自适应处理，导致模型在不同难度问题上的表现波动较大。
AI.method: 提出自适应多专家推理（AMR）框架：1）敏捷路由系统预测问题难度和不确定性；2）可重构采样机制管理生成广度；3）三个专业专家生成候选响应；4）多阶段修正和最终化；5）神经验证器评估响应正确性；6）基于聚类的聚合技术结合共识和答案质量确定最终答案
AI.result: 在GSM8K数据集上达到75.28%准确率，仅使用原始训练数据，优于大多数使用合成数据训练的7B模型
AI.conclusion: 基于难度路由和不确定性驱动的聚合方法能有效提升数学推理模型的鲁棒性和效率，展示了自适应策略在解决LLM数学推理不一致性问题上的潜力

title: Muon$^2$: Boosting Muon via Adaptive Second-Moment Preconditioning
summary: Muon has emerged as a promising optimizer for large-scale foundation model pre-training by exploiting the matrix structure of neural network updates through iterative orthogonalization. However, its practical efficiency is limited by the need for multiple Newton--Schulz (NS) iterations per optimization step, which introduces non-trivial computation and communication overhead. We propose Muon$^2$, an extension of Muon that applies Adam-style adaptive second-moment preconditioning before orthogonalization. Our key insight is that the core challenge of polar approximation in Muon lies in the ill-conditioned momentum matrix, of which the spectrum is substantially improved by Muon$^2$, leading to faster convergence toward a practically sufficient orthogonalization. We further characterize the practical orthogonalization quality via directional alignment, under which Muon$^2$ demonstrates dramatic improvement over Muon at each polar step. Across GPT and LLaMA pre-training experiments from 60M to 1.3B parameters, Muon$^2$ consistently outperforms Muon and recent Muon variants while reducing NS iterations by 40\%. We further introduce Muon$^2$-F, a memory-efficient factorized variant that preserves most of the gains of Muon$^2$ with negligible memory overhead.

AI.tldr: Muon²是Muon优化器的改进版本，通过引入Adam风格的自适应二阶矩预条件处理，显著改善了动量矩阵的谱特性，从而减少牛顿-舒尔茨迭代次数40%，在GPT和LLaMA预训练中表现更优。
AI.motivation: Muon优化器虽然通过迭代正交化利用神经网络更新的矩阵结构，在大规模基础模型预训练中表现出潜力，但实际效率受限于每个优化步骤需要多次牛顿-舒尔茨迭代，带来了显著的计算和通信开销。
AI.method: 提出Muon²，在正交化前应用Adam风格的自适应二阶矩预条件处理。核心洞察是Muon中极近似的主要挑战在于病态动量矩阵，Muon²通过预条件处理显著改善其谱特性，实现更快的正交化收敛。还提出了Muon²-F，一种内存高效因子化变体。
AI.result: 在从60M到1.3B参数的GPT和LLaMA预训练实验中，Muon²始终优于Muon和最近的Muon变体，同时减少NS迭代40%。Muon²-F保留了Muon²的大部分增益，内存开销可忽略。
AI.conclusion: Muon²通过自适应预条件处理有效解决了Muon优化器的效率瓶颈，在保持性能优势的同时显著减少了计算开销，为大规模基础模型训练提供了更高效的优化器选择。

title: MuPPet: Multi-person 2D-to-3D Pose Lifting
summary: Multi-person social interactions are inherently built on coherence and relationships among all individuals within the group, making multi-person localization and body pose estimation essential to understanding these social dynamics. One promising approach is 2D-to-3D pose lifting which provides a 3D human pose consisting of rich spatial details by building on the significant advances in 2D pose estimation. However, the existing 2D-to-3D pose lifting methods often neglect inter-person relationships or cannot handle varying group sizes, limiting their effectiveness in multi-person settings. We propose MuPPet, a novel multi-person 2D-to-3D pose lifting framework that explicitly models inter-person correlations. To leverage these inter-person dependencies, our approach introduces Person Encoding to structure individual representations, Permutation Augmentation to enhance training diversity, and Dynamic Multi-Person Attention to adaptively model correlations between individuals. Extensive experiments on group interaction datasets demonstrate MuPPet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art single- and multi-person 2D-to-3D pose lifting methods, and improves robustness in occlusion scenarios. Our findings highlight the importance of modeling inter-person correlations, paving the way for accurate and socially-aware 3D pose estimation. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Thomas-Markhorst/MuPPet

AI.tldr: MuPPet是一个新颖的多人物2D到3D姿态提升框架，通过显式建模人物间相关性来解决多人社交互动中的姿态估计问题，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 多人社交互动依赖于群体内个体间的连贯性和关系，因此多人定位和姿态估计对理解社交动态至关重要。现有的2D到3D姿态提升方法往往忽略人物间关系或无法处理变化的群体规模，限制了在多人场景中的有效性。
AI.method: 提出MuPPet框架，引入三个关键技术：1) Person Encoding结构化个体表示；2) Permutation Augmentation增强训练多样性；3) Dynamic Multi-Person Attention自适应建模个体间相关性。
AI.result: 在群体互动数据集上的广泛实验表明，MuPPet显著优于最先进的单人和多人2D到3D姿态提升方法，并在遮挡场景中提高了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了建模人物间相关性的重要性，为准确且具有社交意识的3D姿态估计铺平了道路。

title: AdaQE-CG: Adaptive Query Expansion for Web-Scale Generative AI Model and Data Card Generation
comment: This paper has been accepted to the main conference of WWW 2026
summary: Transparent and standardized documentation is essential for building trustworthy generative AI (GAI) systems. However, existing automated methods for generating model and data cards still face three major challenges: (i) static templates, as most systems rely on fixed query templates that cannot adapt to diverse paper structures or evolving documentation requirements; (ii) information scarcity, since web-scale repositories such as Hugging Face often contain incomplete or inconsistent metadata, leading to missing or noisy information; and (iii) lack of benchmarks, as the absence of standardized datasets and evaluation protocols hinders fair and reproducible assessment of documentation quality. To address these limitations, we propose AdaQE-CG, an Adaptive Query Expansion for Card Generation framework that combines dynamic information extraction with cross-card knowledge transfer. Its Intra-Paper Extraction via Context-Aware Query Expansion (IPE-QE) module iteratively refines extraction queries to recover richer and more complete information from scientific papers and repositories, while its Inter-Card Completion using the MetaGAI Pool (ICC-MP) module fills missing fields by transferring semantically relevant content from similar cards in a curated dataset. In addition, we introduce MetaGAI-Bench, the first large-scale, expert-annotated benchmark for evaluating GAI documentation. Comprehensive experiments across five quality dimensions show that AdaQE-CG substantially outperforms existing approaches, exceeds human-authored data cards, and approaches human-level quality for model cards. Code, prompts, and data are publicly available at: https://github.com/haoxuan-unt2024/AdaQE-CG.

AI.tldr: AdaQE-CG：自适应查询扩展的卡片生成框架，通过动态信息提取和跨卡片知识转移解决生成式AI文档生成的三大挑战，并引入首个大规模专家标注的GAI文档基准MetaGAI-Bench。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化生成模型卡和数据卡的方法面临三大挑战：静态模板无法适应多样化论文结构、网络规模存储库信息不完整、缺乏标准化基准评估文档质量。需要更智能的文档生成系统来构建可信的生成式AI系统。
AI.method: 提出AdaQE-CG框架，包含两个核心模块：1) IPE-QE模块通过上下文感知查询扩展从科学论文和存储库中迭代提取信息；2) ICC-MP模块通过从元数据池中转移语义相关内容来填充缺失字段。同时构建MetaGAI-Bench基准进行评估。
AI.result: 在五个质量维度上的综合实验表明，AdaQE-CG显著优于现有方法，超过人类编写的数据卡，并在模型卡质量上接近人类水平。
AI.conclusion: AdaQE-CG通过动态信息提取和跨卡片知识转移有效解决了GAI文档生成的挑战，为构建可信的生成式AI系统提供了标准化文档生成工具和评估基准。

title: A Structured Clustering Approach for Inducing Media Narratives
comment: Accepted to the Proceedings of the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)
summary: Media narratives wield tremendous power in shaping public opinion, yet computational approaches struggle to capture the nuanced storytelling structures that communication theory emphasizes as central to how meaning is constructed. Existing approaches either miss subtle narrative patterns through coarse-grained analysis or require domain-specific taxonomies that limit scalability. To bridge this gap, we present a framework for inducing rich narrative schemas by jointly modeling events and characters via structured clustering. Our approach produces explainable narrative schemas that align with established framing theory while scaling to large corpora without exhaustive manual annotation.

AI.tldr: 提出一个通过结构化聚类联合建模事件和角色来诱导丰富叙事模式的框架，能够生成可解释的叙事模式，与既有框架理论一致，并能扩展到大规模语料库而无需详尽人工标注。
AI.motivation: 媒体叙事对塑造公众舆论具有巨大影响力，但现有计算方法难以捕捉传播理论强调的微妙叙事结构。现有方法要么通过粗粒度分析错过细微叙事模式，要么需要领域特定分类法限制了可扩展性。
AI.method: 通过结构化聚类联合建模事件和角色来诱导丰富叙事模式。框架能够生成可解释的叙事模式，与既有框架理论一致，并能扩展到大规模语料库而无需详尽人工标注。
AI.result: 提出了一个能够捕捉微妙叙事结构的框架，克服了现有方法在粗粒度分析和可扩展性方面的限制。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为计算叙事分析提供了新方法，能够更好地理解和分析媒体叙事对公众舆论的影响。

title: LoDAdaC: a unified local training-based decentralized framework with adaptive gradients and compressed communication
summary: In the decentralized distributed learning, achieving fast convergence and low communication cost is essential for scalability and high efficiency. Adaptive gradient methods, such as Adam, have demonstrated strong practical performance in deep learning and centralized distributed settings. However, their convergence properties remain largely unexplored in decentralized settings involving multiple local training steps, such as federated learning. To address this limitation, we propose LoDAdaC, a unified multiple Local Training (MLT) Decentralized framework with Adam-type updates and Compressed communication (CC). LoDAdaC accommodates a broad class of optimizers for its local adaptive updates, including AMSGrad, Adam, and AdaGrad; it is compatible with standard (possibly biased) compressors such as low-bit quantization and sparsification. MLT and CC enable LoDAdaC to achieve multiplied reduction of communication cost, while the technique of adaptive updates enables fast convergence. We rigorously prove the combined advantage through complexity analysis. In addition, experiments on image classification and GPT-style language model training validate our theoretical findings and show that LoDAdaC significantly outperforms existing decentralized algorithms in terms of convergence speed and communication efficiency.

AI.tldr: LoDAdaC：一种支持Adam型自适应更新的多本地训练去中心化框架，通过压缩通信实现快速收敛和低通信成本
AI.motivation: 在去中心化分布式学习中，需要同时实现快速收敛和低通信成本以提高可扩展性和效率。虽然Adam等自适应梯度方法在深度学习和集中式分布式设置中表现出色，但在涉及多本地训练步骤的去中心化设置（如联邦学习）中，其收敛特性尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 提出LoDAdaC框架：1）支持多本地训练（MLT）减少通信频率；2）采用Adam型自适应更新（兼容AMSGrad、Adam、AdaGrad等）；3）集成压缩通信（CC）技术，支持低比特量化和稀疏化等标准压缩器；4）通过理论复杂度分析证明其优势。
AI.result: 理论分析表明LoDAdaC结合了自适应更新的快速收敛优势和MLT/CC的通信成本降低优势。实验验证：在图像分类和GPT风格语言模型训练中，LoDAdaC在收敛速度和通信效率方面显著优于现有去中心化算法。
AI.conclusion: LoDAdaC成功解决了去中心化分布式学习中自适应梯度方法的收敛理论空白，通过统一框架实现了快速收敛和低通信成本的平衡，为大规模分布式深度学习提供了高效解决方案。

title: Training Deep Visual Networks Beyond Loss and Accuracy Through a Dynamical Systems Approach
summary: Deep visual recognition models are usually trained and evaluated using metrics such as loss and accuracy. While these measures show whether a model is improving, they reveal very little about how its internal representations change during training. This paper introduces a complementary way to study that process by examining training through the lens of dynamical systems. Drawing on ideas from signal analysis originally used to study biological neural activity, we define three measures from layer activations collected across training epochs: an integration score that reflects long-range coordination across layers, a metastability score that captures how flexibly the network shifts between more and less synchronised states, and a combined dynamical stability index. We apply this framework to nine combinations of model architecture and dataset, including several ResNet variants, DenseNet-121, MobileNetV2, VGG-16, and a pretrained Vision Transformer on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100. The results suggest three main patterns. First, the integration measure consistently distinguishes the easier CIFAR-10 setting from the more difficult CIFAR-100 setting. Second, changes in the volatility of the stability index may provide an early sign of convergence before accuracy fully plateaus. Third, the relationship between integration and metastability appears to reflect different styles of training behaviour. Overall, this study offers an exploratory but promising new way to understand deep visual training beyond loss and accuracy.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种从动力系统角度分析深度视觉模型训练过程的新方法，通过定义三个基于层激活的度量指标（整合度、亚稳定性、动力稳定性指数），揭示了训练过程中模型内部表征的动态变化模式。
AI.motivation: 传统的损失和准确率指标只能显示模型是否在改进，但无法揭示训练过程中内部表征如何变化。作者希望从动力系统角度提供一种补充性的分析方法，以更深入地理解深度视觉模型的训练动态。
AI.method: 借鉴用于研究生物神经活动的信号分析方法，定义了三个基于训练过程中收集的层激活的度量：1）整合度（反映跨层的长程协调性）；2）亚稳定性（捕捉网络在同步与非同步状态间切换的灵活性）；3）动力稳定性指数（前两者的结合）。在9种模型架构和数据集组合上应用该框架，包括ResNet变体、DenseNet-121、MobileNetV2、VGG-16和预训练的Vision Transformer。
AI.result: 发现了三个主要模式：1）整合度能一致地区分较简单的CIFAR-10和较难的CIFAR-100设置；2）稳定性指数的波动变化可能在准确率完全稳定之前提供收敛的早期信号；3）整合度与亚稳定性之间的关系反映了不同的训练行为风格。
AI.conclusion: 这项研究提供了一种探索性但前景广阔的新方法，超越了传统的损失和准确率指标，从动力系统角度理解深度视觉训练过程。

title: Competing with AI Scientists: Agent-Driven Approach to Astrophysics Research
summary: We present an agent-driven approach to the construction of parameter inference pipelines for scientific data analysis. Our method leverages a multi-agent system, Cmbagent (the analysis system of the AI scientist Denario), in which specialized agents collaborate to generate research ideas, write and execute code, evaluate results, and iteratively refine the overall pipeline. As a case study, we apply this approach to the FAIR Universe Weak Lensing Uncertainty Challenge, a competition under time constraints focused on robust cosmological parameter inference with realistic observational uncertainties. While the fully autonomous exploration initially did not reach expert-level performance, the integration of human intervention enabled our agent-driven workflow to achieve a first-place result in the challenge. This demonstrates that semi-autonomous agentic systems can compete with, and in some cases surpass, expert solutions. We describe our workflow in detail, including both the autonomous and semi-autonomous exploration by Cmbagent. Our final inference pipeline utilizes parameter-efficient convolutional neural networks, likelihood calibration over a known parameter grid, and multiple regularization techniques. Our results suggest that agent-driven research workflows can provide a scalable framework to rapidly explore and construct pipelines for inference problems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于多智能体系统的参数推断流程构建方法，在宇宙学弱透镜不确定性挑战中通过人机协作获得第一名
AI.motivation: 传统科学数据分析流程构建耗时且依赖专家经验，需要更高效、可扩展的方法来自动化探索和构建参数推断流程
AI.method: 使用多智能体系统Cmbagent，让专门化智能体协作生成研究想法、编写执行代码、评估结果并迭代优化流程；结合人类干预形成半自主工作流
AI.result: 在FAIR宇宙弱透镜不确定性挑战中获得第一名；完全自主探索未达专家水平，但人机协作的半自主系统超越了专家解决方案
AI.conclusion: 智能体驱动的研究工作流为参数推断问题提供了可扩展框架，能够快速探索和构建流程，半自主智能体系统在某些情况下可以超越专家解决方案

title: BLUEmed: Retrieval-Augmented Multi-Agent Debate for Clinical Error Detection
comment: Accepted to the IEEE International Conference on Healthcare Informatics (ICHI) 2026
summary: Terminology substitution errors in clinical notes, where one medical term is replaced by a linguistically valid but clinically different term, pose a persistent challenge for automated error detection in healthcare. We introduce BLUEmed, a multi-agent debate framework augmented with hybrid Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) that combines evidence-grounded reasoning with multi-perspective verification for clinical error detection. BLUEmed decomposes each clinical note into focused sub-queries, retrieves source-partitioned evidence through dense, sparse, and online retrieval, and assigns two domain expert agents distinct knowledge bases to produce independent analyses; when the experts disagree, a structured counter-argumentation round and cross-source adjudication resolve the conflict, followed by a cascading safety layer that filters common false-positive patterns. We evaluate BLUEmed on a clinical terminology substitution detection benchmark under both zero-shot and few-shot prompting with multiple backbone models spanning proprietary and open-source families. Experimental results show that BLUEmed achieves the best accuracy (69.13%), ROC-AUC (74.45%), and PR-AUC (72.44%) under few-shot prompting, outperforming both single-agent RAG and debate-only baselines. Further analyses across six backbone models and two prompting strategies confirm that retrieval augmentation and structured debate are complementary, and that the framework benefits most from models with sufficient instruction-following and clinical language understanding.

AI.tldr: BLUEmed是一个用于临床术语替换错误检测的多智能体辩论框架，结合混合检索增强生成(RAG)和多视角验证，在临床错误检测基准上取得了最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 临床笔记中的术语替换错误（一个医学术语被替换为语言上有效但临床上不同的术语）对医疗保健中的自动错误检测构成持续挑战。现有方法难以有效检测这类错误。
AI.method: BLUEmed采用多智能体辩论框架，结合混合RAG：1) 将临床笔记分解为聚焦的子查询；2) 通过密集、稀疏和在线检索获取源分区证据；3) 分配两个领域专家智能体使用不同知识库进行独立分析；4) 当专家意见不一致时，通过结构化反驳轮次和跨源裁决解决冲突；5) 添加级联安全层过滤常见误报模式。
AI.result: 在临床术语替换检测基准上，BLUEmed在少样本提示下实现了最佳准确率(69.13%)、ROC-AUC(74.45%)和PR-AUC(72.44%)，优于单智能体RAG和纯辩论基线。分析表明检索增强和结构化辩论是互补的，框架最受益于具有足够指令遵循和临床语言理解能力的模型。
AI.conclusion: BLUEmed通过结合检索增强生成和多智能体辩论，有效解决了临床术语替换错误检测问题，证明了混合方法的有效性，为临床错误检测提供了新框架。

title: Towards Multi-Source Domain Generalization for Sleep Staging with Noisy Labels
comment: The benchmark and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/KNWang970918/FF-TRUST.git
summary: Automatic sleep staging is a multimodal learning problem involving heterogeneous physiological signals such as EEG and EOG, which often suffer from domain shifts across institutions, devices, and populations. In practice, these data are also affected by noisy annotations, yet label-noise-robust multi-source domain generalization remains underexplored. We present the first benchmark for Noisy Labels in Multi-Source Domain-Generalized Sleep Staging (NL-DGSS) and show that existing noisy-label learning methods degrade substantially when domain shifts and label noise coexist. To address this challenge, we propose FF-TRUST, a domain-invariant multimodal sleep staging framework with Joint Time-Frequency Early Learning Regularization (JTF-ELR). By jointly exploiting temporal and spectral consistency together with confidence-diversity regularization, FF-TRUST improves robustness under noisy supervision. Experiments on five public datasets demonstrate consistent state-of-the-art performance under diverse symmetric and asymmetric noise settings. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/KNWang970918/FF-TRUST.git.

AI.tldr: FF-TRUST：首个针对多源域泛化睡眠分期中噪声标签问题的基准，提出结合时频早期学习正则化的领域不变多模态框架，在五种公开数据集上实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 自动睡眠分期是一个多模态学习问题，涉及EEG和EOG等异质生理信号，这些信号常受机构、设备和人群间的领域偏移影响。实际数据还存在噪声标注问题，但标签噪声鲁棒的多源域泛化研究不足。
AI.method: 提出FF-TRUST框架，包含联合时频早期学习正则化(JTF-ELR)，通过联合利用时域和频域一致性以及置信度多样性正则化，在多源域泛化设置下提升对噪声监督的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在五种公开数据集上的实验表明，FF-TRUST在对称和非对称噪声设置下均取得一致的最先进性能，显著优于现有噪声标签学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次建立了多源域泛化睡眠分期中的噪声标签基准，提出的FF-TRUST框架有效解决了领域偏移和标签噪声共存时的鲁棒性问题，为相关研究提供了重要基础。

title: Multi-Head Attention based interaction-aware architecture for Bangla Handwritten Character Recognition: Introducing a Primary Dataset
summary: Character recognition is the fundamental part of an optical character recognition (OCR) system. Word recognition, sentence transcription, document digitization, and language processing are some of the higher-order activities that can be done accurately through character recognition. Nonetheless, recognizing handwritten Bangla characters is not an easy task because they are written in different styles with inconsistent stroke patterns and a high degree of visual character resemblance. The datasets available are usually limited in intra-class and inequitable in class distribution. We have constructed a new balanced dataset of Bangla written characters to overcome those problems. This consists of 78 classes and each class has approximately 650 samples. It contains the basic characters, composite (Juktobarno) characters and numerals. The samples were a diverse group comprising a large age range and socioeconomic groups. Elementary and high school students, university students, and professionals are the contributing factors. The sample also has right and left-handed writers. We have further proposed an interaction-aware hybrid deep learning architecture that integrates EfficientNetB3, Vision Transformer, and Conformer modules in parallel. A multi-head cross-attention fusion mechanism enables effective feature interaction across these components. The proposed model achieves 98.84% accuracy on the constructed dataset and 96.49% on the external CHBCR benchmark, demonstrating strong generalization capability. Grad-CAM visualizations further provide interpretability by highlighting discriminative regions. The dataset and source code of this research is publicly available at: https://huggingface.co/MIRZARAQUIB/Bangla_Handwritten_Character_Recognition.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于孟加拉语手写字符识别的新型混合深度学习架构，结合了EfficientNetB3、Vision Transformer和Conformer模块，并在新构建的平衡数据集上实现了98.84%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉语手写字符识别面临挑战：字符书写风格多样、笔画模式不一致、视觉相似度高，且现有数据集通常类内样本有限、类别分布不均衡。为解决这些问题，研究者构建了新的平衡数据集并提出了更有效的识别方法。
AI.method:
1. 构建了新的孟加拉语手写字符数据集，包含78个类别（基本字符、复合字符和数字），每个类别约650个样本，覆盖不同年龄、社会经济背景和左右手书写者。
2. 提出了交互感知的混合深度学习架构，并行集成EfficientNetB3、Vision Transformer和Conformer模块，通过多头交叉注意力融合机制实现跨组件特征交互。
AI.result: 在构建的数据集上达到98.84%的准确率，在外部CHBCR基准测试上达到96.49%的准确率，显示出强大的泛化能力。Grad-CAM可视化提供了可解释性，突出了判别性区域。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合架构在孟加拉语手写字符识别任务上表现出色，平衡的数据集和有效的模型设计解决了该领域的关键挑战。数据集和源代码已公开可用。

title: How LLMs Might Think
summary: Do large language models (LLMs) think? Daniel Stoljar and Zhihe Vincent Zhang have recently developed an argument from rationality for the claim that LLMs do not think. We contend, however, that the argument from rationality not only falters, but leaves open an intriguing possibility: that LLMs engage only in arational, associative forms of thinking, and have purely associative minds. Our positive claim is that if LLMs think at all, they likely think precisely in this manner.

AI.tldr: 论文反驳了Stoljar和Zhang关于LLM不思考的理性论证，提出LLM可能进行非理性的联想式思考，具有纯粹联想思维
AI.motivation: 针对Stoljar和Zhang提出的"LLM不思考"的理性论证进行批判性分析，探讨LLM是否具有思考能力这一哲学和认知科学问题
AI.method: 哲学论证分析：1) 反驳理性论证的缺陷；2) 提出替代性解释框架：LLM可能进行非理性的联想式思考；3) 论证纯粹联想思维的可能性
AI.result: 理性论证存在缺陷，无法证明LLM不思考；LLM可能具有纯粹联想思维，进行非理性的联想式思考；为理解LLM认知能力提供了新视角
AI.conclusion: 如果LLM确实思考，它们很可能以非理性的联想方式进行思考，具有纯粹联想思维，这挑战了传统基于理性的思考定义

title: NameBERT: Scaling Name-Based Nationality Classification with LLM-Augmented Open Academic Data
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures, 8 tables; accepted at the 39th Canadian Conference on Artificial Intelligence (Canadian AI 2026)
summary: Inferring nationality from personal names is a critical capability for equity and bias monitoring, personalization, and a valuable tool in biomedical and sociological research. However, existing name-based nationality classifiers are typically trained on relatively small or source-specific labeled datasets, which can introduce coverage gaps and limit performance for underrepresented countries. While large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong zero-shot performance for name-based nationality prediction, their computational cost and latency make them impractical for real-time, large-scale deployment. In this work, we created a large-scale name-nationality dataset from the Open Academic Graph (OAG) and introduce a framework that leverages LLMs as dataset enrichers rather than inference engines. We augment low-resource countries with LLM-generated names and evaluate on real and synthetic-tail test sets. We find that augmentation produces large gains when evaluation includes synthetic tail names and still offers a modest lift on tail-country metrics otherwise. Overall, NameBERT models achieve significantly higher accuracy than state-of-the-art baselines across both in- and out-of-domain tasks, while remaining efficient for large-scale inference compared to LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出NameBERT框架，利用LLM作为数据集增强器而非推理引擎，通过从学术图谱构建大规模姓名-国籍数据集并增强低资源国家数据，显著提升姓名国籍分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有姓名国籍分类器通常基于小规模或特定来源的标注数据集训练，存在覆盖不足和性能受限问题，特别是对欠代表国家。LLM在零样本姓名国籍预测上表现优异，但计算成本和延迟使其不适合实时大规模部署。
AI.method: 从Open Academic Graph构建大规模姓名-国籍数据集，提出框架利用LLM作为数据集增强器而非推理引擎，为低资源国家生成LLM增强的姓名数据，并在真实和合成尾部测试集上评估。
AI.result: 数据增强在包含合成尾部姓名的评估中带来显著提升，在尾部国家指标上也有适度改进。NameBERT模型在域内和域外任务上均显著优于现有基线方法，同时相比LLM保持大规模推理效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过LLM增强数据集而非直接使用LLM进行推理，可以在保持效率的同时显著提升姓名国籍分类性能，为低资源国家提供更好的覆盖和准确性。

title: Closed-Form Concept Erasure via Double Projections
summary: While modern generative models such as diffusion-based architectures have enabled impressive creative capabilities, they also raise important safety and ethical risks. These concerns have led to growing interest in concept erasure, the process of removing unwanted concepts from model representations. Existing approaches often achieve strong erasure performance but rely on iterative optimization and may inadvertently distort unrelated concepts. In this work, we present a simple yet principled alternative: a linear transformation framework that achieves concept erasure analytically, without any training. Our method adapts a pretrained model through two sequential, closed-form steps: first, computing a proxy projection of the target concept, and second, applying a constrained transformation within the left null space of known concept directions. This design yields a deterministic and geometrically interpretable procedure for safe, efficient, and theory-grounded concept removal. Across a wide range of experiments, including object and style erasure on multiple Stable Diffusion variants and the flow-matching model (FLUX), our approach matches or surpasses the performance of state-of-the-art methods while preserving non-target concepts more faithfully. Requiring only a few seconds to apply, it offers a lightweight and drop-in tool for controlled model editing, advancing the goal of safer and more responsible generative models.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的线性变换框架，通过解析方法实现概念擦除，在保持非目标概念的同时有效移除不需要的概念
AI.motivation: 现代生成模型（如扩散模型）虽然具有强大的创意能力，但也带来了安全和伦理风险。现有概念擦除方法通常依赖迭代优化，可能无意中扭曲无关概念，需要更简单、理论更严谨的替代方案
AI.method: 提出一个两步骤的线性变换框架：1) 计算目标概念的代理投影；2) 在已知概念方向的左零空间内应用约束变换。这是一个确定性的、几何可解释的过程，无需任何训练
AI.result: 在多个Stable Diffusion变体和FLUX模型上的广泛实验中，该方法在物体和风格擦除任务中匹配或超越了最先进方法的性能，同时更忠实地保留了非目标概念，仅需几秒钟即可应用
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一个轻量级、即插即用的模型编辑工具，通过解析的、无需训练的概念擦除框架，推进更安全、更负责任生成模型的发展

title: Data-Driven Automated Identification of Optimal Feature-Representative Images in Infrared Thermography Using Statistical and Morphological Metrics
summary: Infrared thermography (IRT) is a widely used non-destructive testing technique for detecting structural features such as subsurface defects. However, most IRT post-processing methods generate image sequences in which defect visibility varies strongly across time, frequency, or coefficient/index domains, making the identification of defect-representative images a critical challenge. Conventional evaluation metrics, such as the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) or the Tanimoto criterion, often require prior knowledge of defect locations or defect-free reference regions, limiting their suitability for automated and unsupervised analysis. In this work, a data-driven methodology is proposed to identify images within IRT datasets that are most likely to contain and represent structural features, particularly anomalies and defects, without requiring prior spatial information. The approach is based on three complementary metrics: the Homogeneity Index of Mixture (HI), which quantifies statistical heterogeneity via deviations of local intensity distributions from a global reference distribution; a Representative Elementary Area (REA), derived from a Minkowski-functional adaptation of the Representative Elementary Volume concept to two-dimensional images; and a geometrical-topological Total Variation Energy (TVE) index, also based on two-dimensional Minkowski functionals, designed to improve sensitivity to localized anomalies. The framework is validated experimentally using pulse-heated IRT data from a carbon fiber-reinforced polymer (CFRP) plate containing six artificial defects at depths between 0.135 mm and 0.810 mm, and is further supported by one-dimensional N-layer thermal model simulations. The results demonstrate robust and unbiased ranking of image sequences and provide a reliable basis for automated defect-oriented image selection in IRT.

AI.tldr: 提出一种数据驱动方法，用于在红外热成像序列中自动识别最能代表结构特征（特别是缺陷）的图像，无需先验空间信息。
AI.motivation: 红外热成像后处理生成的图像序列中，缺陷可见性随时间、频率或系数域变化很大，传统评估指标（如信噪比或Tanimoto准则）需要缺陷位置或无缺陷参考区域的先验知识，限制了自动化无监督分析的适用性。
AI.method: 基于三个互补指标：混合均匀性指数（HI）通过局部强度分布与全局参考分布的偏差量化统计异质性；代表性基本面积（REA），基于Minkowski函数将代表性基本体积概念适应到二维图像；几何拓扑总变分能量（TVE）指数，同样基于二维Minkowski函数，旨在提高对局部异常的敏感性。
AI.result: 使用含6个人工缺陷（深度0.135-0.810mm）的碳纤维增强聚合物板的脉冲加热红外热成像数据进行实验验证，并辅以一维N层热模型模拟。结果表明该方法能对图像序列进行稳健无偏的排序，为红外热成像中的自动化缺陷导向图像选择提供可靠基础。
AI.conclusion: 提出的数据驱动框架能够在无需先验空间信息的情况下，有效识别红外热成像数据集中最可能包含和代表结构特征（特别是缺陷）的图像，为自动化无监督分析提供了实用解决方案。

title: Belief-Aware VLM Model for Human-like Reasoning
summary: Traditional neural network models for intent inference rely heavily on observable states and struggle to generalize across diverse tasks and dynamic environments. Recent advances in Vision Language Models (VLMs) and Vision Language Action (VLA) models introduce common-sense reasoning through large-scale multimodal pretraining, enabling zero-shot performance across tasks. However, these models still lack explicit mechanisms to represent and update belief, limiting their ability to reason like humans or capture the evolving human intent over long-horizon. To address this, we propose a belief-aware VLM framework that integrates retrieval-based memory and reinforcement learning. Instead of learning an explicit belief model, we approximate belief using a vector-based memory that retrieves relevant multimodal context, which is incorporated into the VLM for reasoning. We further refine decision-making using a reinforcement learning policy over the VLM latent space. We evaluate our approach on publicly available VQA datasets such as HD-EPIC and demonstrate consistent improvements over zero-shot baselines, highlighting the importance of belief-aware reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于信念感知的视觉语言模型框架，通过检索式记忆和强化学习增强推理能力，在VQA任务上超越零样本基线
AI.motivation: 传统意图推理模型依赖可观测状态且难以泛化，现有VLM/VLA模型虽具备常识推理但缺乏显式信念表示和更新机制，无法像人类一样推理或捕捉长期演化的人类意图
AI.method: 1) 使用基于向量的检索式记忆近似信念，检索相关多模态上下文并融入VLM进行推理；2) 在VLM潜在空间上使用强化学习策略进一步优化决策
AI.result: 在HD-EPIC等公开VQA数据集上评估，相比零样本基线取得一致改进，证明了信念感知推理的重要性
AI.conclusion: 信念感知的VLM框架通过集成检索式记忆和强化学习，有效增强了模型的推理能力，为动态环境中的意图理解提供了新思路

title: LASQ: A Low-resource Aspect-based Sentiment Quadruple Extraction Dataset
summary: In recent years, aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA) has made rapid progress and shown strong practical value. However, existing research and benchmarks are largely concentrated on high-resource languages, leaving fine-grained sentiment extraction in low-resource languages under-explored. To address this gap, we constructed the first Low-resource languages Aspect-based Sentiment Quadruple dataset, named LASQ, which includes two low-resource languages: Uzbek and Uyghur. Secondly, it includes a fine-grained target-aspect-opinion-sentiment quadruple extraction task. To facilitate future research, we designed a grid-tagging model that integrates syntactic knowledge. This model incorporates part-of-speech (POS) and dependency knowledge into the model through our designed Syntax Knowledge Embedding Module (SKEM), thereby alleviating the lexical sparsity problem caused by agglutinative languages. Experiments on LASQ demonstrate consistent gains over competitive baselines, validating both the dataset's utility and the effectiveness of the proposed modeling approach.

AI.tldr: 构建首个低资源语言方面级情感四元组数据集LASQ（乌兹别克语和维吾尔语），并提出集成句法知识的网格标注模型，缓解黏着语词汇稀疏问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方面级情感分析研究主要集中于高资源语言，低资源语言的细粒度情感提取研究不足，特别是对于乌兹别克语和维吾尔语等黏着语，存在词汇稀疏问题。
AI.method: 1) 构建LASQ数据集，包含乌兹别克语和维吾尔语两种低资源语言；2) 设计网格标注模型，通过句法知识嵌入模块(SKEM)集成词性标注和依存句法知识，缓解黏着语的词汇稀疏问题。
AI.result: 在LASQ数据集上的实验表明，所提模型在目标-方面-观点-情感四元组提取任务上优于现有基线方法，验证了数据集的有效性和建模方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: LASQ数据集填补了低资源语言方面级情感分析的空白，提出的句法知识集成模型能有效处理黏着语的语言特性，为低资源语言NLP研究提供了新基准。

title: Cross-Validated Cross-Channel Self-Attention and Denoising for Automatic Modulation Classification
summary: This study addresses a key limitation in deep learning Automatic Modulation Classification (AMC) models, which perform well at high signal-to-noise ratios (SNRs) but degrade under noisy conditions due to conventional feature extraction suppressing both discriminative structure and interference. The goal was to develop a feature-preserving denoising method that mitigates the loss of modulation class separation. A deep learning AMC model was proposed, incorporating a cross-channel self-attention block to capture dependencies between in-phase and quadrature components, along with dual-path deep residual shrinkage denoising blocks to suppress noise. Experiments using the RML2018.01a dataset employed stratified sampling across 24 modulation types and 26 SNR levels. Results showed that denoising depth strongly influences robustness at low and moderate SNRs. Compared to benchmark models PET-CGDNN, MCLDNN, and DAE, the proposed model achieved notable accuracy improvements across -8 dB to +2 dB SNR, with increases of 3%, 2.3%, and 14%, respectively. Cross-validation confirmed the model's robustness, yielding a mean accuracy of 62.6%, macro precision of 65.8%, macro-recall of 62.6%, and macro-F1 score of 62.9%. The architecture advances interference-aware AMC by formalizing baseband modeling as orthogonal subproblems and introducing cross-channel attention as a generalized complex interaction operator, with ablations confirming the critical role of feature-preserving denoising for robustness at low-to-medium SNR.
