AI.tldr: 提出一种用于自动调制分类的深度学习模型，通过交叉通道自注意力块和双路径深度残差收缩去噪块，在高噪声条件下保持调制类别分离特征，显著提升低信噪比下的分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习自动调制分类模型在高信噪比下表现良好，但在噪声条件下性能下降，因为常规特征提取方法同时抑制了判别性结构和干扰。需要开发一种特征保留的去噪方法，减轻调制类别分离的损失。
AI.method: 提出深度学习AMC模型，包含：1) 交叉通道自注意力块捕捉同相和正交分量间的依赖关系；2) 双路径深度残差收缩去噪块抑制噪声；3) 使用RML2018.01a数据集，对24种调制类型和26个SNR水平进行分层采样。
AI.result: 去噪深度对低和中SNR下的鲁棒性有显著影响。与PET-CGDNN、MCLDNN和DAE基准模型相比，在-8dB到+2dB SNR范围内分别实现3%、2.3%和14%的准确率提升。交叉验证显示平均准确率62.6%，宏精度65.8%，宏召回62.6%，宏F1分数62.9%。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过将基带建模形式化为正交子问题，并引入交叉通道注意力作为广义复数交互算子，推进了干扰感知的AMC。消融研究证实特征保留去噪对低到中SNR下的鲁棒性至关重要。

title: LOLGORITHM: Funny Comment Generation Agent For Short Videos
summary: Short-form video platforms have become central to multimedia information dissemination, where comments play a critical role in driving engagement, propagation, and algorithmic feedback. However, existing approaches -- including video summarization and live-streaming danmaku generation -- fail to produce authentic comments that conform to platform-specific cultural and linguistic norms. In this paper, we present LOLGORITHM, a novel modular multi-agent framework for stylized short-form video comment generation. LOLGORITHM supports six controllable comment styles and comprises three core modules: video content summarization, video classification, and comment generation with semantic retrieval and hot meme augmentation. We further construct a bilingual dataset of 3,267 videos and 16,335 comments spanning five high-engagement categories across YouTube and Douyin. Evaluation combining automatic scoring and large-scale human preference analysis demonstrates that LOLGORITHM consistently outperforms baseline methods, achieving human preference selection rates of 80.46\% on YouTube and 84.29\% on Douyin across 107 respondents. Ablation studies confirm that these gains are attributable to the framework architecture rather than the choice of backbone LLM, underscoring the robustness and generalizability of our approach.

AI.tldr: LOLGORITHM是一个用于短视频平台风格化评论生成的模块化多智能体框架，支持六种可控评论风格，在YouTube和抖音上分别获得80.46%和84.29%的人类偏好选择率。
AI.motivation: 短视频平台已成为多媒体信息传播的核心，评论在推动参与度、传播和算法反馈方面起着关键作用。现有方法（包括视频摘要和直播弹幕生成）无法生成符合平台特定文化和语言规范的真实评论。
AI.method: 提出了LOLGORITHM框架，包含三个核心模块：视频内容摘要、视频分类、以及结合语义检索和热门梗增强的评论生成。支持六种可控评论风格，构建了包含3,267个视频和16,335条评论的双语数据集。
AI.result: 通过自动评分和大规模人类偏好分析评估，LOLGORITHM在YouTube和Douyin上分别获得80.46%和84.29%的人类偏好选择率（107名受访者），持续优于基线方法。消融研究证实这些收益源于框架架构而非骨干LLM的选择。
AI.conclusion: LOLGORITHM框架能够生成符合平台特定文化和语言规范的风格化短视频评论，其模块化多智能体设计具有鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Tipiano: Cascaded Piano Hand Motion Synthesis via Fingertip Priors
summary: Synthesizing realistic piano hand motions requires both precision and naturalness. Physics-based methods achieve precision but produce stiff motions; data-driven models learn natural dynamics but struggle with positional accuracy. Piano motion exhibits a natural hierarchy: fingertip positions are nearly deterministic given piano geometry and fingering, while wrist and intermediate joints offer stylistic freedom. We present [OURS], a four-stage framework exploiting this hierarchy: (1) statistics-based fingertip positioning, (2) FiLM-conditioned trajectory refinement, (3) wrist estimation, and (4) STGCN-based pose synthesis. We contribute expert-annotated fingerings for the FürElise dataset (153 pieces, ~10 hours). Experiments demonstrate F1 = 0.910, substantially outperforming diffusion baselines (F1 = 0.121), with user study (N=41) confirming quality approaching motion capture. Expert evaluation by professional pianists (N=5) identified anticipatory motion as the key remaining gap, providing concrete directions for future improvement.

AI.tldr: 提出一个四阶段框架[OURS]来合成逼真的钢琴手部动作，利用钢琴动作的自然层次结构：指尖位置由钢琴几何和指法决定，手腕和中间关节提供风格自由度。
AI.motivation: 合成逼真的钢琴手部动作需要同时满足精确性和自然性。基于物理的方法能实现精确性但动作僵硬；数据驱动模型能学习自然动态但位置准确性不足。钢琴动作具有自然层次结构，需要利用这一特性来同时满足精确性和自然性。
AI.method: 四阶段框架：1) 基于统计的指尖定位，2) FiLM条件轨迹细化，3) 手腕估计，4) STGCN（时空图卷积网络）姿态合成。利用了钢琴动作的层次结构：指尖位置由钢琴几何和指法决定，手腕和中间关节提供风格自由度。
AI.result: F1分数达到0.910，显著优于扩散基线（F1=0.121）。用户研究（N=41）确认质量接近动作捕捉。专业钢琴家评估（N=5）指出预期动作是主要差距，为未来改进提供了具体方向。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用钢琴动作的层次结构，提出的四阶段框架能够合成既精确又自然的钢琴手部动作，显著优于现有方法，为音乐动作合成提供了新思路。

title: Turing or Cantor: That is the Question
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.15969
summary: Alan Turing is considered as a founder of current computer science together with Kurt Godel, Alonzo Church and John von Neumann. In this paper multiple new research results are presented. It is demonstrated that there would not be Alan Turing's achievements without earlier seminal contributions by Georg Cantor in the set theory and foundations of mathematics. It is proposed to introduce the measure of undecidability of problems unsolvable by Turing machines based on probability distribution of its input data, i.e., to provide the degree of unsolvabilty based on the number of undecidable instances of input data versus decidable ones. It is proposed as well to extend the Turing's work on infinite logics and Oracle machines to a whole class of super-Turing models of computation. Next, the three new complexity classes for TM undecidable problems have been defined: U-complete (Universal complete), D-complete (Diagonalization complete) and H-complete (Hypercomputation complete) classes. The above has never been defined explicitly before by other scientists, and has been inspired by Cook/Levin NP-complete class for intractable problems. Finally, an equivalent to famous P is not equal to NP unanswered question for NP-complete class, has been answered negatively for U-complete class of complexity for undecidable problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多个新研究结果：1) 论证图灵成就依赖于康托尔集合论基础；2) 基于输入数据概率分布提出不可判定问题的不可判定性度量；3) 扩展图灵无限逻辑和预言机到超图灵计算模型类；4) 定义三个新的不可判定问题复杂度类(U-完全、D-完全、H-完全)；5) 对U-完全类证明了类似P≠NP的否定答案。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在扩展图灵计算理论，特别是针对不可判定问题的复杂度分类。作者认为图灵的工作建立在康托尔集合论基础上，且当前对不可判定问题的研究不够系统化，需要建立类似NP完全类的分类框架。
AI.method: 采用理论计算机科学的方法论：1) 历史分析图灵与康托尔工作的联系；2) 基于概率分布定义不可判定性度量；3) 扩展图灵机模型到超图灵计算；4) 类比Cook/Levin的NP完全类定义，提出三个新的不可判定问题复杂度类；5) 对U-完全类进行理论分析。
AI.result: 主要成果：1) 建立了图灵-康托尔历史联系；2) 提出不可判定性度量方法；3) 定义了U-完全、D-完全、H-完全三个新复杂度类；4) 证明了对于U-完全类，类似P≠NP的问题有否定答案（即存在某种等价性）。
AI.conclusion: 本文扩展了图灵计算理论，为不可判定问题提供了系统的复杂度分类框架，并解决了U-完全类中的基本问题。这些结果为计算理论提供了新的研究方向，特别是在超图灵计算和不可判定问题复杂度分析方面。

title: When Can You Poison Rewards? A Tight Characterization of Reward Poisoning in Linear MDPs
summary: We study reward poisoning attacks in reinforcement learning (RL), where an adversary manipulates rewards within constrained budgets to force the target RL agent to adopt a policy that aligns with the attacker's objectives. Prior works on reward poisoning mainly focused on sufficient conditions to design a successful attacker, while only a few studies discussed the infeasibility of targeted attacks. This paper provides the first precise necessity and sufficiency characterization of the attackability of a linear MDP under reward poisoning attacks. Our characterization draws a bright line between the vulnerable RL instances, and the intrinsically robust ones which cannot be attacked without large costs even running vanilla non-robust RL algorithms. Our theory extends beyond linear MDPs -- by approximating deep RL environments as linear MDPs, we show that our theoretical framework effectively distinguishes the attackability and efficiently attacks the vulnerable ones, demonstrating both the theoretical and practical significance of our characterization.

AI.tldr: 该论文首次对线性MDP在奖励投毒攻击下的可攻击性提供了精确的必要和充分条件刻画，区分了易受攻击和本质鲁棒的RL实例，并将理论扩展到深度RL环境。
AI.motivation: 先前关于奖励投毒攻击的研究主要关注设计成功攻击者的充分条件，只有少数研究讨论了目标攻击的不可行性。本文旨在填补这一空白，为线性MDP在奖励投毒攻击下的可攻击性提供精确的理论刻画。
AI.method: 通过理论分析建立线性MDP在奖励投毒攻击下的必要和充分条件，将深度RL环境近似为线性MDP，并应用理论框架来区分可攻击性，同时高效攻击易受攻击的实例。
AI.result: 理论框架有效区分了可攻击性，能够高效攻击易受攻击的实例，同时证明了即使运行普通的非鲁棒RL算法，本质鲁棒的实例也需要高成本才能攻击。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次提供了线性MDP在奖励投毒攻击下的精确可攻击性刻画，这一理论框架具有理论和实践意义，能够有效区分易受攻击和本质鲁棒的RL实例。

title: Multi-Frequency Local Plasticity for Visual Representation Learning
summary:
We study how far structured architectural bias can compensate for the absence of end-to-end gradient-based representation learning in visual recognition. Building on the VisNet tradition, we introduce a modular hierarchical framework combining: (i) fixed multi-frequency Gabor decomposition into F=7 parallel streams; (ii) within-stream competitive learning with Hebbian and Oja updates and anti-Hebbian decorrelation; (iii) an associative memory module inspired by modern Hopfield retrieval; and (iv) iterative top-down modulation using local prediction and reconstruction signals.
  Representational layers are trained without end-to-end backpropagation through the full hierarchy; only the final linear readout and top-down projection matrices are optimized by gradient descent. We therefore interpret the model as a hybrid system that is predominantly locally trained but includes a small number of gradient-trained parameters.
  On CIFAR-10, the full model reaches 80.1% +/- 0.3% top-1 accuracy, linear probe), compared with 71.0% for a Hebbian-only baseline and 83.4% for a gradient-trained model on the same fixed Gabor basis. On CIFAR-100, performance is 54.8%. Factorial analysis indicates that multi-frequency streams, associative memory, and top-down feedback contribute largely additively, with a significant Streams x TopDown interaction (p=0.02).
  These results suggest that carefully chosen architectural priors can recover a substantial fraction of the performance typically associated with global gradient training, while leaving a measurable residual gap. Experiments are limited to CIFAR-10/100.

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合视觉识别框架，结合固定Gabor分解、竞争学习、联想记忆和自上而下调制，大部分模块无需端到端反向传播训练，在CIFAR-10上达到80.1%准确率
AI.motivation: 研究结构化架构偏置能在多大程度上补偿端到端梯度学习的缺失，探索局部训练与少量梯度训练参数的混合系统
AI.method: 模块化分层框架：1) 固定多频率Gabor分解为7个并行流；2) 流内竞争学习（Hebbian/Oja更新和反Hebbian去相关）；3) 现代Hopfield启发的联想记忆模块；4) 使用局部预测和重建信号的迭代自上而下调制
AI.result: CIFAR-10上80.1%准确率（线性探测），相比纯Hebbian基线71.0%，相同Gabor基上的梯度训练模型83.4%；CIFAR-100上54.8%；因子分析显示多频率流、联想记忆和自上而下反馈具有加性贡献
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的架构先验可以恢复全局梯度训练性能的相当大部分，但仍存在可测量的性能差距

title: The Myth of Expert Specialization in MoEs: Why Routing Reflects Geometry, Not Necessarily Domain Expertise
summary: Mixture of Experts (MoEs) are now ubiquitous in large language models, yet the mechanisms behind their "expert specialization" remain poorly understood. We show that, since MoE routers are linear maps, hidden state similarity is both necessary and sufficient to explain expert usage similarity, and specialization is therefore an emergent property of the representation space, not of the routing architecture itself. We confirm this at both token and sequence level across five pre-trained models. We additionally prove that load-balancing loss suppresses shared hidden state directions to maintain routing diversity, which might provide a theoretical explanation for specialization collapse under less diverse data, e.g. small batch. Despite this clean mechanistic account, we find that specialization patterns in pre-trained MoEs resist human interpretation: expert overlap between different models answering the same question is no higher than between entirely different questions ($\sim$60\%); prompt-level routing does not predict rollout-level routing; and deeper layers exhibit near-identical expert activation across semantically unrelated inputs, especially in reasoning models. We conclude that, while the efficiency perspective of MoEs is well understood, understanding expert specialization is at least as hard as understanding LLM hidden state geometry, a long-standing open problem in the literature.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了MoE模型中的专家专业化机制，发现隐藏状态相似性是专家使用相似性的充要条件，专业化是表示空间的涌现特性而非路由架构本身。研究揭示了负载均衡损失如何抑制共享隐藏状态方向，并发现预训练MoE的专业化模式难以进行人类解释。
AI.motivation: 尽管MoE在大型语言模型中普遍存在，但其"专家专业化"机制仍未被充分理解。研究者希望揭示MoE专家专业化的本质机制，特别是路由决策与隐藏状态几何之间的关系。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和实证验证：1）证明MoE路由器的线性映射特性使得隐藏状态相似性是专家使用相似性的充要条件；2）分析负载均衡损失如何影响共享隐藏状态方向；3）在五个预训练模型上进行token级和序列级验证；4）研究不同模型间专家重叠、提示级与展开级路由一致性、深层激活模式等。
AI.result: 1）专家专业化是表示空间的涌现特性；2）负载均衡损失抑制共享隐藏状态方向以维持路由多样性；3）预训练MoE的专业化模式难以解释：不同模型回答相同问题的专家重叠度仅约60%，提示级路由无法预测展开级路由，深层在语义无关输入上表现出近乎相同的专家激活模式。
AI.conclusion: 理解MoE专家专业化至少与理解LLM隐藏状态几何一样困难，这是文献中长期存在的开放问题。虽然MoE的效率视角已被充分理解，但其专业化机制仍具挑战性。

title: CodaRAG: Connecting the Dots with Associativity Inspired by Complementary Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle with knowledge-intensive tasks due to hallucinations and fragmented reasoning over dispersed information. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds generation in external sources, existing methods often treat evidence as isolated units, failing to reconstruct the logical chains that connect these dots. Inspired by Complementary Learning Systems (CLS), we propose CodaRAG, a framework that evolves retrieval from passive lookup into active associative discovery. CodaRAG operates via a three-stage pipeline: (1) Knowledge Consolidation to unify fragmented extractions into a stable memory substrate; (2) Associative Navigation to traverse the graph via multi-dimensional pathways-semantic, contextualized, and functional-explicitly recovering dispersed evidence chains; and (3) Interference Elimination to prune hyper-associative noise, ensuring a coherent, high-precision reasoning context. On GraphRAG-Bench, CodaRAG achieves absolute gains of 7-10% in retrieval recall and 3-11% in generation accuracy. These results demonstrate CodaRAG's superior ability to systematically robustify associative evidence retrieval for factual, reasoning, and creative tasks.

AI.tldr: CodaRAG：基于互补学习系统启发的检索增强生成框架，通过知识整合、关联导航和干扰消除三阶段，将被动检索转变为主动关联发现，显著提升检索召回和生成准确性
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法将证据视为孤立单元，无法重建逻辑链，导致LLM在知识密集型任务中出现幻觉和碎片化推理。需要从被动查找转变为主动关联发现
AI.method: 三阶段框架：1) 知识整合：将碎片化提取统一为稳定记忆基质；2) 关联导航：通过语义、情境化和功能等多维路径遍历图结构，显式恢复分散证据链；3) 干扰消除：修剪过度关联噪声，确保连贯高精度推理上下文
AI.result: 在GraphRAG-Bench上，CodaRAG实现检索召回率绝对提升7-10%，生成准确率提升3-11%，在事实、推理和创造性任务中表现出系统性鲁棒的关联证据检索能力
AI.conclusion: CodaRAG通过模仿互补学习系统，将检索从被动查找转变为主动关联发现，显著提升了LLM在知识密集型任务中的性能，为RAG方法提供了新的方向

title: Graph-RHO: Critical-path-aware Heterogeneous Graph Network for Long-Horizon Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling
summary: Long-horizon Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling~(FJSP) presents a formidable combinatorial challenge due to complex, interdependent decisions spanning extended time horizons. While learning-based Rolling Horizon Optimization~(RHO) has emerged as a promising paradigm to accelerate solving by identifying and fixing invariant operations, its effectiveness is hindered by the structural complexity of FJSP. Existing methods often fail to capture intricate graph-structured dependencies and ignore the asymmetric costs of prediction errors, in which misclassifying critical-path operations is significantly more detrimental than misclassifying non-critical ones. Furthermore, dynamic shifts in predictive confidence during the rolling process make static pruning thresholds inadequate. To address these limitations, we propose Graph-RHO, a novel critical-path-aware graph-based RHO framework. First, we introduce a topology-aware heterogeneous graph network that encodes subproblems as operation-machine graphs with multi-relational edges, leveraging edge-feature-aware message passing to predict operation stability. Second, we incorporate a critical-path-aware mechanism that injects inductive biases during training to distinguish highly sensitive bottleneck operations from robust ones. Third, we devise an adaptive thresholding strategy that dynamically calibrates decision boundaries based on online uncertainty estimation to align model predictions with the solver's search space. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that \mbox{Graph-RHO} establishes a new state of the art in solution quality and computational efficiency. Remarkably, it exhibits exceptional zero-shot generalization, reducing solve time by over 30\% on large-scale instances (2000 operations) while achieving superior solution quality. Our code is available \href{https://github.com/IntelliSensing/Graph-RHO}{here}.

AI.tldr: Graph-RHO：一种基于图神经网络的滚动时域优化框架，用于解决长时域柔性作业车间调度问题，通过拓扑感知异构图网络、关键路径感知机制和自适应阈值策略，显著提升求解质量和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的滚动时域优化方法在处理柔性作业车间调度问题时存在三个主要限制：1）难以捕捉复杂的图结构依赖关系；2）忽略预测误差的不对称成本（关键路径操作误分类代价更高）；3）滚动过程中预测置信度的动态变化使静态剪枝阈值失效。
AI.method: 提出Graph-RHO框架：1）拓扑感知异构图网络将子问题编码为操作-机器图，利用边特征感知的消息传递预测操作稳定性；2）关键路径感知机制在训练中注入归纳偏置以区分瓶颈操作；3）自适应阈值策略基于在线不确定性估计动态校准决策边界。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，Graph-RHO在求解质量和计算效率上均达到新的SOTA。在大规模实例（2000个操作）上，求解时间减少超过30%，同时获得更优的解决方案质量，并展现出卓越的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Graph-RHO通过结合图神经网络、关键路径感知和自适应阈值，有效解决了长时域柔性作业车间调度中的结构复杂性和动态不确定性挑战，为组合优化问题提供了新的学习型滚动时域优化范式。

title: See Fair, Speak Truth: Equitable Attention Improves Grounding and Reduces Hallucination in Vision-Language Alignment
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently hallucinate objects that are absent from the visual input, often because attention during decoding is disproportionately drawn to visually dominant or frequently occurring content. We observe that this inequity in attention allocation is a root cause of object hallucination: when rare, small, or contextually peripheral objects receive insufficient attention, the model fails to ground its generation in the full visual scene. We argue that every object in an image, regardless of its size, frequency or visual salience, deserves equal representational opportunity during decoding. To this end, we propose DOP-OBC, a training-free and architecture-agnostic decoding strategy built on the principle of equitable attention. Two complementary object-aware signals work in tandem: a Dominant Object Penalty (DOP) that softly suppresses attention over-concentration on visually dominant regions, and an Outlier Boost Coefficient (OBC) that amplifies attention toward rare yet confidently detected objects. These signals are injected as per-row logit modulations within the causal attention mask, requiring no weight updates and preserving autoregressive decoding properties. Extensive experiments across image and video MLLMs demonstrate consistent reductions in object hallucination on CHAIR and POPE benchmarks, alongside improvements in GPT-4o assessed captioning quality across correctness, consistency, detail, context and temporal dimensions. DOP-OBC establishes that fairness in attention allocation is not merely a design principle but a practical and effective path toward more faithful multimodal generation.

AI.tldr: DOP-OBC是一种无需训练的解码策略，通过公平注意力分配减少MLLM的对象幻觉：使用主导对象惩罚抑制视觉主导区域的过度关注，同时用离群增强系数放大对罕见但自信检测到的对象的注意力。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型经常幻觉出视觉输入中不存在的对象，主要原因是解码时的注意力分配不均衡——视觉主导或频繁出现的内容吸引了过多注意力，而罕见、小型或上下文边缘的对象则被忽视。作者认为图像中的每个对象都应获得平等的表示机会。
AI.method: 提出DOP-OBC解码策略：1) 主导对象惩罚(DOP)：软性抑制对视觉主导区域的过度关注；2) 离群增强系数(OBC)：放大对罕见但自信检测到的对象的注意力。这些信号作为逐行logit调制注入因果注意力掩码中，无需权重更新，保持自回归解码特性。
AI.result: 在图像和视频MLLM上的广泛实验显示，在CHAIR和POPE基准测试中对象幻觉持续减少，同时在GPT-4o评估的captioning质量（正确性、一致性、细节、上下文和时间维度）方面有所改善。
AI.conclusion: 注意力分配的公平性不仅是设计原则，而且是实现更忠实多模态生成的实用有效途径。DOP-OBC证明了通过解码策略调整注意力分配可以显著减少对象幻觉。

title: Pioneer Agent: Continual Improvement of Small Language Models in Production
summary: Small language models are attractive for production deployment due to their low cost, fast inference, and ease of specialization. However, adapting them to a specific task remains a challenging engineering loop, driven not by training itself but by surrounding decisions: data curation, failure diagnosis, regression avoidance, and iteration control. We present Pioneer Agent, a closed-loop system that automates this lifecycle. In cold-start mode, given only a natural-language task description, the agent acquires data, constructs evaluation sets, and iteratively trains models by jointly optimizing data, hyperparameters, and learning strategy. In production mode, given a deployed model with labeled failures, it diagnoses error patterns, constructs targeted training data, and retrains under explicit regression constraints. To evaluate this setting, we introduce AdaptFT-Bench, a benchmark of synthetic inference logs with progressively increasing noise, designed to test the full adaptation loop: diagnosis, curriculum synthesis, retraining, and verification. Across eight cold-start benchmarks spanning reasoning, math, code generation, summarization, and classification, Pioneer Agent improves over base models by 1.6-83.8 points. On AdaptFT-Bench, it improves or preserves performance in all seven scenarios, while naive retraining degrades by up to 43 points. On two production-style deployments built from public benchmark tasks, it raises intent classification from 84.9% to 99.3% and Entity F1 from 0.345 to 0.810. Beyond performance gains, the agent often discovers effective training strategies, including chain-of-thought supervision, task-specific optimization, and quality-focused data curation, purely from downstream feedback.

AI.tldr: Pioneer Agent是一个自动化小语言模型任务适应的闭环系统，支持冷启动和生产模式，通过数据获取、评估构建和迭代训练优化模型性能，在多个基准测试中显著提升效果。
AI.motivation: 小语言模型因成本低、推理快、易于定制而适合生产部署，但特定任务适应仍面临数据管理、错误诊断、回归避免和迭代控制等工程挑战，需要自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Pioneer Agent闭环系统：冷启动模式下，基于自然语言任务描述自动获取数据、构建评估集、迭代训练模型，联合优化数据、超参数和学习策略；生产模式下，基于已部署模型的标记错误诊断错误模式，构建针对性训练数据，在明确回归约束下重新训练。
AI.result: 在8个冷启动基准测试（推理、数学、代码生成、摘要、分类）中，相比基础模型提升1.6-83.8分；在AdaptFT-Bench上，所有7个场景都保持或提升性能，而简单重训练下降最多43分；在两个生产式部署中，意图分类从84.9%提升到99.3%，实体F1从0.345提升到0.810。
AI.conclusion: Pioneer Agent能有效自动化小语言模型的任务适应过程，显著提升性能，并自动发现有效的训练策略（如思维链监督、任务特定优化、质量导向数据管理），仅基于下游反馈。

title: Instruction Data Selection via Answer Divergence
summary: Instruction tuning relies on large instruction-response corpora whose quality and composition strongly affect downstream performance. We propose Answer Divergence-Guided Selection (ADG), which selects instruction data based on the geometric structure of multi-sample outputs. ADG draws several high-temperature generations per instruction, maps responses into an embedding space, and computes an output divergence score that jointly encodes dispersion magnitude and shape anisotropy. High scores correspond to instructions whose answers are both far apart and multi-modal, rather than clustered paraphrases along a single direction. Across two backbones and three public instruction pools, fine-tuning on only 10K ADG-selected examples consistently outperforms strong selectors on six benchmarks spanning reasoning, knowledge, and coding. Analyses further show that both dispersion magnitude and shape anisotropy are necessary, supporting answer divergence as a practical signal for instruction data selection. Code and appendix are included in the supplementary materials.

AI.tldr: ADG提出了一种基于答案多样性的指令数据选择方法，通过分析多样本输出的几何结构来选择高质量的指令数据，仅用10K数据就能在多个基准测试中取得优异表现。
AI.motivation: 指令调优依赖于大规模指令-响应语料库，其质量和组成强烈影响下游性能。现有方法缺乏对指令数据质量的系统性评估标准，特别是对模型输出多样性的考量。
AI.method: 提出答案多样性引导选择（ADG）：1）对每个指令进行多次高温采样生成多个响应；2）将响应映射到嵌入空间；3）计算输出多样性分数，同时考虑分散幅度和形状各向异性；4）选择分数高的指令数据。
AI.result: 在两个骨干模型和三个公共指令池上，仅使用10K ADG选择的示例进行微调，在涵盖推理、知识和编码的六个基准测试中始终优于强基线选择器。分析表明分散幅度和形状各向异性都是必要的。
AI.conclusion: 答案多样性是选择指令数据的实用信号，ADG方法能有效识别高质量指令数据，提升指令调优效率。

title: Transformers Learn the Optimal DDPM Denoiser for Multi-Token GMMs
summary: Transformer-based diffusion models have demonstrated remarkable performance at generating high-quality samples. However, our theoretical understanding of the reasons for this success remains limited. For instance, existing models are typically trained by minimizing a denoising objective, which is equivalent to fitting the score function of the training data. However, we do not know why transformer-based models can match the score function for denoising, or why gradient-based methods converge to the optimal denoising model despite the non-convex loss landscape. To the best of our knowledge, this paper provides the first convergence analysis for training transformer-based diffusion models. More specifically, we consider the population Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) objective for denoising data that follow a multi-token Gaussian mixture distribution. We theoretically quantify the required number of tokens per data point and training iterations for the global convergence towards the Bayes optimal risk of the denoising objective, thereby achieving a desired score matching error. A deeper investigation reveals that the self-attention module of the trained transformer implements a mean denoising mechanism that enables the trained model to approximate the oracle Minimum Mean Squared Error (MMSE) estimator of the injected noise in the diffusion steps. Numerical experiments validate these findings.

AI.tldr: 该论文首次对基于Transformer的扩散模型训练进行收敛性分析，证明了在特定数据分布下，Transformer能够通过自注意力机制实现均值去噪，逼近贝叶斯最优风险。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer-based扩散模型在生成高质量样本方面表现出色，但其成功原因的理论理解仍然有限。现有模型通过最小化去噪目标（相当于拟合训练数据的得分函数）进行训练，但我们不清楚为什么Transformer模型能够匹配去噪的得分函数，也不明白为什么基于梯度的方法能够在非凸损失景观下收敛到最优去噪模型。
AI.method: 论文考虑多token高斯混合分布数据的总体DDPM去噪目标，从理论上量化了实现全局收敛所需的每个数据点的token数量和训练迭代次数。研究发现训练后的Transformer自注意力模块实现了均值去噪机制，使模型能够逼近扩散步骤中注入噪声的oracle最小均方误差估计器。
AI.result: 论文提供了首个基于Transformer的扩散模型训练收敛性分析，理论上证明了在特定条件下能够实现全局收敛到贝叶斯最优风险，达到期望的得分匹配误差。数值实验验证了这些发现。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了Transformer-based扩散模型理论理解的空白，揭示了自注意力机制在去噪中的关键作用，为理解扩散模型训练收敛性提供了理论基础。

title: MedLVR: Latent Visual Reasoning for Reliable Medical Visual Question Answering
summary: Medical vision--language models (VLMs) have shown strong potential for medical visual question answering (VQA), yet their reasoning remains largely text-centric: images are encoded once as static context, and subsequent inference is dominated by language. This paradigm is fundamentally limited in clinical scenarios, where accurate answers often depend on subtle, localized visual evidence that cannot be reliably preserved in static embeddings. We propose \textsc{MedLVR}, a latent visual reasoning framework that introduces an explicit visual evidence state into autoregressive decoding. Instead of relying solely on text-based intermediate reasoning, \textsc{MedLVR} interleaves a short latent reasoning segment within the decoder by reusing hidden states as continuous latent steps, enabling iterative preservation and refinement of query-relevant visual evidence before answer generation. To support effective visual supervision, we adopt a two-stage training strategy: region of interest (ROI)-supervised fine-tuning aligns latent states with clinically relevant image evidence, and Visual-Latent Policy Optimization (VLPO) further optimizes latent reasoning and answer generation under outcome-level rewards. Experiments on OmniMedVQA and five external medical VQA benchmarks show that \textsc{MedLVR} consistently outperforms recent reasoning baselines and improves the average score over the Qwen2.5-VL-7B backbone from 48.3\% to 53.4\%. These results show that latent visual reasoning provides an effective mechanism for preserving diagnostically relevant visual evidence and improving the reliability of medical VQA.

AI.tldr: MedLVR提出了一种用于医学视觉问答的潜在视觉推理框架，通过引入显式的视觉证据状态到自回归解码中，实现迭代的视觉证据保留和精炼，显著提升了医学VQA性能。
AI.motivation: 当前医学视觉语言模型在视觉问答中主要采用文本中心的推理范式：图像被编码为静态上下文，后续推理由语言主导。这种范式在临床场景中存在根本性限制，因为准确答案通常依赖于细微的局部视觉证据，这些证据无法可靠地保存在静态嵌入中。
AI.method: MedLVR引入显式视觉证据状态到自回归解码中，在解码器内部交错插入短的潜在推理段，重用隐藏状态作为连续潜在步骤，实现查询相关视觉证据的迭代保留和精炼。采用两阶段训练策略：1) ROI监督微调将潜在状态与临床相关图像证据对齐；2) 视觉潜在策略优化在结果级奖励下进一步优化潜在推理和答案生成。
AI.result: 在OmniMedVQA和五个外部医学VQA基准测试中，MedLVR持续优于最近的推理基线，将Qwen2.5-VL-7B骨干的平均得分从48.3%提升到53.4%。
AI.conclusion: 潜在视觉推理为保留诊断相关的视觉证据和提高医学VQA的可靠性提供了有效机制，解决了传统文本中心推理范式在临床场景中的局限性。

title: Controllable and Verifiable Tool-Use Data Synthesis for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Existing synthetic tool-use corpora are primarily designed for offline supervised fine-tuning, yet reinforcement learning (RL) requires executable environments that support reward-checkable online rollouts. We propose COVERT, a two-stage pipeline that first generates reliable base tool-use trajectories through self-evolving synthesis with multi-level validation, and then applies oracle-preserving augmentations that systematically increase environmental complexity. These augmentations introduce distractor tools, indirect or ambiguous user queries, and noisy, multi-format, or erroneous tool outputs, while strictly preserving oracle tool calls and final answers as ground truth. This design enables automatic reward computation via reference matching for standard cases and lightweight judge-assisted verification for special behaviors such as error detection, supporting RL optimization of tool-calling policies. On Qwen2.5-Instruct-14B, COVERT-RL improves overall accuracy on BFCL v3 from 56.5 to 59.9 and on ACEBench from 53.0 to 59.3, with minimal regressions on general-ability benchmarks; when stacked on SFT, it further reaches 62.1 and 61.8, confirming additive gains. These results suggest that oracle-preserving synthetic environments offer a practical RL refinement stage, complementary to SFT, for improving tool-use robustness under ambiguity and unreliable tool feedback.

AI.tldr: COVERT：两阶段工具使用RL训练框架，通过自演化合成和多级验证生成可靠基础轨迹，再通过保留oracle的增强增加环境复杂性，支持在线RL优化
AI.motivation: 现有合成工具使用语料库主要用于离线监督微调，但强化学习需要可执行环境来支持奖励可检查的在线rollout。需要创建既能自动计算奖励又能保持oracle真实性的合成环境
AI.method: 1. 自演化合成与多级验证生成可靠基础工具使用轨迹；2. 应用保留oracle的增强，引入干扰工具、间接/模糊用户查询、噪声/多格式/错误工具输出，同时严格保留oracle工具调用和最终答案作为ground truth；3. 通过参考匹配自动计算标准案例奖励，轻量级judge辅助验证特殊行为（如错误检测）
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-Instruct-14B上，COVERT-RL将BFCL v3总体准确率从56.5提升至59.9，ACEBench从53.0提升至59.3，通用能力基准测试仅有最小退化；与SFT叠加后分别达到62.1和61.8，确认了累加增益
AI.conclusion: 保留oracle的合成环境为工具使用提供了实用的RL精炼阶段，与SFT互补，能在模糊性和不可靠工具反馈下提高工具使用的鲁棒性

title: NOSE: Neural Olfactory-Semantic Embedding with Tri-Modal Orthogonal Contrastive Learning
comment: Accepted to the ACL 2026 Main Conference
summary: Olfaction lies at the intersection of chemical structure, neural encoding, and linguistic perception, yet existing representation methods fail to fully capture this pathway. Current approaches typically model only isolated segments of the olfactory pathway, overlooking the complete chain from molecule to receptors to linguistic descriptions. Such fragmentation yields learned embeddings that lack both biological grounding and semantic interpretability. We propose NOSE (Neural Olfactory-Semantic Embedding), a representation learning framework that aligns three modalities along the olfactory pathway: molecular structure, receptor sequence, and natural language description. Rather than simply fusing these signals, we decouple their contributions via orthogonal constraints, preserving the unique encoded information of each modality. To address the sparsity of olfactory language, we introduce a weak positive sample strategy to calibrate semantic similarity, preventing erroneous repulsion of similar odors in the feature space. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NOSE achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance and excellent zero-shot generalization, confirming the strong alignment between its representation space and human olfactory intuition.

AI.tldr: NOSE是一个跨模态表示学习框架，将分子结构、受体序列和自然语言描述对齐，用于嗅觉表示学习，通过正交约束解耦各模态贡献，并引入弱正样本策略解决嗅觉语言稀疏性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有嗅觉表示方法通常只建模嗅觉通路的孤立片段，忽略了从分子到受体再到语言描述的完整链条，导致学习到的嵌入缺乏生物学基础和语义可解释性。
AI.method: 提出NOSE框架，对齐分子结构、受体序列和自然语言描述三种模态，通过正交约束解耦各模态贡献，并引入弱正样本策略校准语义相似性，防止相似气味在特征空间中被错误排斥。
AI.result: NOSE在实验中实现了最先进的性能，并展现出优秀的零样本泛化能力，证实其表示空间与人类嗅觉直觉的强对齐。
AI.conclusion: NOSE框架成功捕捉了嗅觉通路的完整链条，为跨模态表示学习提供了新思路，特别是在处理稀疏语言数据方面具有创新性。

title: Attention Sink in Transformers: A Survey on Utilization, Interpretation, and Mitigation
summary: As the foundational architecture of modern machine learning, Transformers have driven remarkable progress across diverse AI domains. Despite their transformative impact, a persistent challenge across various Transformers is Attention Sink (AS), in which a disproportionate amount of attention is focused on a small subset of specific yet uninformative tokens. AS complicates interpretability, significantly affecting the training and inference dynamics, and exacerbates issues such as hallucinations. In recent years, substantial research has been dedicated to understanding and harnessing AS. However, a comprehensive survey that systematically consolidates AS-related research and offers guidance for future advancements remains lacking. To address this gap, we present the first survey on AS, structured around three key dimensions that define the current research landscape: Fundamental Utilization, Mechanistic Interpretation, and Strategic Mitigation. Our work provides a pivotal contribution by clarifying key concepts and guiding researchers through the evolution and trends of the field. We envision this survey as a definitive resource, empowering researchers and practitioners to effectively manage AS within the current Transformer paradigm, while simultaneously inspiring innovative advancements for the next generation of Transformers. The paper list of this work is available at https://github.com/ZunhaiSu/Awesome-Attention-Sink.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文是关于注意力汇（Attention Sink）的首个系统性综述，分析了Transformer中注意力过度集中在少数无信息令牌上的现象及其影响，并围绕基础利用、机制解释和策略缓解三个维度组织现有研究。
AI.motivation: Transformer作为现代机器学习的基础架构，尽管取得了显著进展，但注意力汇现象普遍存在，即注意力过度集中在少数特定但无信息的令牌上。这种现象影响了模型的可解释性、训练和推理动态，并加剧了幻觉等问题。目前缺乏对这一研究领域的系统性综述和未来指导。
AI.method: 作者通过系统性的文献综述方法，围绕三个关键维度组织现有研究：1）基础利用（如何利用注意力汇现象），2）机制解释（理解其产生原因），3）策略缓解（减轻其负面影响）。论文还提供了相关研究资源列表。
AI.result: 这篇论文提供了注意力汇研究的首个综合性综述，澄清了关键概念，梳理了该领域的发展脉络和趋势。通过三个维度的分析框架，为研究人员提供了系统的知识结构和未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述是注意力汇研究领域的权威资源，帮助研究者和从业者在当前Transformer范式中有效管理注意力汇问题，同时为下一代Transformer的创新进步提供启发。

title: Text-Guided 6D Object Pose Rearrangement via Closed-Loop VLM Agents
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit strong visual reasoning capabilities, yet they still struggle with 3D understanding. In particular, VLMs often fail to infer a text-consistent goal 6D pose of a target object in a 3D scene. However, we find that with some inference-time techniques and iterative reasoning, VLMs can achieve dramatic performance gains. Concretely, given a 3D scene represented by an RGB-D image (or a compositional scene of 3D meshes) and a text instruction specifying a desired state change, we repeat the following loop: observe the current scene; evaluate whether it is faithful to the instruction; propose a pose update for the target object; apply the update; and render the updated scene. Through this closed-loop interaction, the VLM effectively acts as an agent. We further introduce three inference-time techniques that are essential to this closed-loop process: (i) multi-view reasoning with supporting view selection, (ii) object-centered coordinate system visualization, and (iii) single-axis rotation prediction. Without any additional fine-tuning or new modules, our approach surpasses prior methods at predicting the text-guided goal 6D pose of the target object. It works consistently across both closed-source and open-source VLMs. Moreover, when combining our 6D pose prediction with simple robot motion planning, it enables more successful robot manipulation than existing methods. Finally, we conduct an ablation study to demonstrate the necessity of each proposed technique.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于视觉语言模型的闭环推理方法，通过迭代推理和三种推理时技术，显著提升了VLM在3D场景中预测文本指导的目标物体6D姿态的能力，无需额外微调。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在视觉推理方面表现出色，但在3D理解方面仍有不足，特别是在预测文本一致的3D场景中目标物体的6D姿态方面存在困难。作者发现通过推理时技术和迭代推理可以显著提升性能。
AI.method: 采用闭环交互方法：观察当前场景→评估是否满足文本指令→提出目标物体的姿态更新→应用更新→渲染更新后的场景。引入三种关键技术：1) 多视角推理与支持视角选择；2) 物体中心坐标系可视化；3) 单轴旋转预测。
AI.result: 该方法在预测文本指导的目标物体6D姿态方面超越了现有方法，在闭源和开源VLM上表现一致。结合简单的机器人运动规划，能实现比现有方法更成功的机器人操作。消融研究证明了每种技术的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 通过推理时技术和迭代推理，VLM可以作为智能体在3D场景中进行有效的姿态预测，显著提升了3D理解能力，为机器人操作等应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: EE-MCP: Self-Evolving MCP-GUI Agents via Automated Environment Generation and Experience Learning
summary: Computer-use agents that combine GUI interaction with structured API calls via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) show promise for automating software tasks. However, existing approaches lack a principled understanding of how agents should balance these two modalities and how to enable iterative self-improvement across diverse applications. We formulate MCP-GUI interplay as a unified hybrid policy learning problem where the agent learns when each modality provides complementary advantages, and show that distillation and experience augmentation target fundamentally different failure modes - requiring application-aware mechanism selection. Built on this formulation, we propose a self-evolving framework with a fully automatic pipeline that orchestrates automatic environment generation and validation, trajectory collection, gap-driven task synthesis, and quality-filtered training - all without manual intervention. A key innovation is our experience bank, which accumulates LLM-learned rules from trajectory comparison, enabling inference-time improvement without fine-tuning. Systematic \textbf{cross-application analysis} across three desktop applications reveals that the optimal strategy depends on MCP-GUI composition: distillation achieves 77.8\% pass rate on MCP-dominant tasks (+17.8pp), while the experience bank excels on GUI-intensive tasks (+10.0pp).

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一个自演化的MCP-GUI混合代理框架，通过自动环境生成、轨迹收集、任务合成和训练，使代理能够学习何时使用MCP API调用或GUI交互，并利用经验库实现推理时改进。
AI.motivation: 现有结合MCP API调用和GUI交互的计算机使用代理缺乏对两种模态平衡原则的理解，以及跨多样化应用的迭代自我改进能力。需要系统化的方法来理解何时每种模态提供互补优势，并实现自动化的自我演化。
AI.method: 将MCP-GUI交互建模为统一的混合策略学习问题，提出自演化框架：1）自动环境生成与验证；2）轨迹收集；3）基于差距的任务合成；4）质量过滤训练。创新性地引入经验库，通过轨迹比较积累LLM学习的规则，实现无需微调的推理时改进。
AI.result: 在三个桌面应用的跨应用分析中，发现最优策略取决于MCP-GUI组成：蒸馏方法在MCP主导任务上达到77.8%通过率（+17.8pp），而经验库在GUI密集型任务上表现更佳（+10.0pp）。
AI.conclusion: MCP-GUI代理需要应用感知的机制选择，蒸馏和经验增强针对不同的失败模式。提出的自演化框架能够自动优化代理性能，经验库为推理时改进提供了有效途径。

title: EviCare: Enhancing Diagnosis Prediction with Deep Model-Guided Evidence for In-Context Reasoning
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled promising progress in diagnosis prediction from electronic health records (EHRs). However, existing LLM-based approaches tend to overfit to historically observed diagnoses, often overlooking novel yet clinically important conditions that are critical for early intervention. To address this, we propose EviCare, an in-context reasoning framework that integrates deep model guidance into LLM-based diagnosis prediction. Rather than prompting LLMs directly with raw EHR inputs, EviCare performs (1) deep model inference for candidate selection, (2) evidential prioritization for set-based EHRs, and (3) relational evidence construction for novel diagnosis prediction. These signals are then composed into an adaptive in-context prompt to guide LLM reasoning in an accurate and interpretable manner. Extensive experiments on two real-world EHR benchmarks (MIMIC-III and MIMIC-IV) demonstrate that EviCare achieves significant performance gains, which consistently outperforms both LLM-only and deep model-only baselines by an average of 20.65\% across precision and accuracy metrics. The improvements are particularly notable in challenging novel diagnosis prediction, yielding average improvements of 30.97\%.

AI.tldr: EviCare：一个结合深度模型指导的上下文推理框架，用于电子健康记录中的诊断预测，特别关注新颖但临床重要的疾病，相比纯LLM或纯深度模型基线平均提升20.65%
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的电子健康记录诊断预测方法倾向于过拟合历史观察到的诊断，经常忽视对早期干预至关重要的新颖但临床重要的疾病
AI.method: 提出EviCare框架，通过三个步骤：(1)深度模型推理进行候选选择，(2)基于证据的集合型EHR优先级排序，(3)关系证据构建用于新颖诊断预测，然后将这些信号组合成自适应上下文提示来指导LLM推理
AI.result: 在两个真实世界EHR基准(MIMIC-III和MIMIC-IV)上，EviCare在精度和准确率指标上平均比纯LLM和纯深度模型基线提升20.65%，在新颖诊断预测方面平均提升30.97%
AI.conclusion: EviCare通过结合深度模型指导的上下文推理，有效解决了LLM在EHR诊断预测中过拟合历史数据的问题，显著提升了新颖疾病预测性能，同时保持了可解释性

title: End-to-end Automated Deep Neural Network Optimization for PPG-based Blood Pressure Estimation on Wearables
summary: Photoplethysmography (PPG)-based blood pressure (BP) estimation is a challenging task, particularly on resource-constrained wearable devices. However, fully on-board processing is desirable to ensure user data confidentiality. Recent deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved high BP estimation accuracy by reconstructing BP waveforms or directly regressing BP values, but their large memory, computation, and energy requirements hinder deployment on wearables. This work introduces a fully automated DNN design pipeline that combines hardware-aware neural architecture search (NAS), pruning, and mixed-precision search (MPS) to generate accurate yet compact BP prediction models optimized for ultra-low-power multicore systems-on-chip (SoCs). Starting from state-of-the-art baseline models on four public datasets, our optimized networks achieve up to 7.99% lower error with a 7.5x parameter reduction, or up to 83x fewer parameters with negligible accuracy loss. All models fit within 512 kB of memory on our target SoC (GreenWaves' GAP8), requiring less than 55 kB and achieving an average inference latency of 142 ms and energy consumption of 7.25 mJ. Patient-specific fine-tuning further improves accuracy by up to 64%, enabling fully autonomous, low-cost BP monitoring on wearables.

AI.tldr: 提出一个自动化DNN设计流程，结合硬件感知的NAS、剪枝和混合精度搜索，为可穿戴设备生成紧凑的血压预测模型，在保持精度的同时大幅减少参数和能耗。
AI.motivation: 可穿戴设备上的PPG血压估计面临资源限制挑战，现有DNN模型内存和计算需求大，难以部署。需要确保用户数据隐私的完全本地处理，同时保持高精度。
AI.method: 采用硬件感知的神经架构搜索(NAS)、剪枝和混合精度搜索(MPS)的自动化设计流程，针对超低功耗多核SoC优化。从四个公共数据集的最先进基线模型开始，生成紧凑的血压预测模型。
AI.result: 优化后模型在目标SoC(GAP8)上内存小于512kB，平均推理延迟142ms，能耗7.25mJ。参数减少7.5倍时误差降低7.99%，或参数减少83倍时精度损失可忽略。患者特定微调可提升精度达64%。
AI.conclusion: 该自动化设计流程能生成适合可穿戴设备的紧凑高效血压预测模型，实现完全自主、低成本的血压监测，平衡了精度、效率和隐私保护需求。

title: Biomarker-Based Pretraining for Chagas Disease Screening in Electrocardiograms
summary: Chagas disease screening via ECGs is limited by scarce and noisy labels in existing datasets. We propose a biomarker-based pretraining approach, where an ECG feature extractor is first trained to predict percentile-binned blood biomarkers from the MIMIC-IV-ECG dataset. The pretrained model is then fine-tuned on Brazilian datasets for Chagas detection. Our 5-model ensemble, developed by the Ahus AIM team, achieved a challenge score of 0.269 on the hidden test set, ranking 5th in Detection of Chagas Disease from the ECG: The George B. Moody PhysioNet Challenge 2025. Source code and the model are shared on GitHub: github.com/Ahus-AIM/physionet-challenge-2025

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于生物标志物的ECG预训练方法，通过预测血液生物标志物来训练ECG特征提取器，然后微调用于恰加斯病检测，在PhysioNet挑战赛中排名第5
AI.motivation: 恰加斯病筛查面临现有数据集中标签稀缺和噪声问题，需要开发更有效的ECG分析方法
AI.method:
1. 使用MIMIC-IV-ECG数据集预训练ECG特征提取器，预测百分位数分箱的血液生物标志物
2. 在巴西数据集上微调预训练模型用于恰加斯病检测
3. 采用5模型集成方法
AI.result: 在PhysioNet挑战赛隐藏测试集上获得0.269分，排名第5
AI.conclusion: 生物标志物预训练方法能有效提升ECG分析性能，特别是在标签稀缺场景下

title: COMPOSITE-Stem
summary: AI agents hold growing promise for accelerating scientific discovery; yet, a lack of frontier evaluations hinders adoption into real workflows. Expert-written benchmarks have proven effective at measuring AI reasoning, but most at this stage have become saturated and only measure performance on constrained outputs. To help address this gap, we introduce COMPOSITE-STEM, a benchmark of 70 expert-written tasks in physics, biology, chemistry, and mathematics, curated by doctoral-level researchers. Our benchmark combines exact-match grading and criterion-based rubrics with an LLM-as-a-jury grading protocol, allowing more flexible assessment of scientifically meaningful outputs. Using an adapted multimodal Terminus-2 agent harness within the Harbor agentic evaluation framework, we evaluate four frontier models. The top-performing model achieves 21%, demonstrating that COMPOSITE-STEM captures capabilities beyond current agent reach. All tasks are open-sourced with contributor permission to support reproducibility and to promote additional research towards AI's acceleration of scientific progress in these domains.

AI.tldr: COMPOSITE-STEM是一个由博士级研究人员构建的70个科学任务基准，涵盖物理、生物、化学和数学，采用精确匹配和基于标准的评估方法，结合LLM作为评审团的评分协议，用于评估AI代理在科学发现中的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前AI代理在加速科学发现方面具有潜力，但缺乏前沿评估阻碍了其在真实工作流程中的应用。现有的专家编写基准大多已饱和且仅评估受限输出，需要更灵活的评估方法来衡量科学上有意义的输出。
AI.method: 1) 构建包含70个专家编写任务的基准，涵盖四个STEM领域；2) 结合精确匹配评分和基于标准的评估准则；3) 采用LLM作为评审团的评分协议；4) 在Harbor代理评估框架中使用改进的多模态Terminus-2代理来评估四个前沿模型。
AI.result: 最佳模型仅达到21%的准确率，表明COMPOSITE-STEM捕捉到了超出当前代理能力范围的能力。所有任务都已开源以支持可重复性研究。
AI.conclusion: COMPOSITE-STEM基准通过灵活的评估方法揭示了当前AI代理在复杂科学任务中的局限性，为AI加速科学进步的研究提供了重要工具。

title: Dynamic Adaptive Attention and Supervised Contrastive Learning: A Novel Hybrid Framework for Text Sentiment Classification
summary: The exponential growth of user-generated movie reviews on digital platforms has made accurate text sentiment classification a cornerstone task in natural language processing. Traditional models, including standard BERT and recurrent architectures, frequently struggle to capture long-distance semantic dependencies and resolve ambiguous emotional expressions in lengthy review texts. This paper proposes a novel hybrid framework that seamlessly integrates dynamic adaptive multi-head attention with supervised contrastive learning into a BERT-based Transformer encoder. The dynamic adaptive attention module employs a global context pooling vector to dynamically regulate the contribution of each attention head, thereby focusing on critical sentiment-bearing tokens while suppressing noise. Simultaneously, the supervised contrastive learning branch enforces tighter intra-class compactness and larger inter-class separation in the embedding space. Extensive experiments on the IMDB dataset demonstrate that the proposed model achieves competitive performance with an accuracy of 94.67\%, outperforming strong baselines by 1.5--2.5 percentage points. The framework is lightweight, efficient, and readily extensible to other text classification tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合动态自适应多头注意力与监督对比学习的BERT混合框架，用于电影评论情感分类，在IMDB数据集上达到94.67%准确率
AI.motivation: 数字平台上用户生成的电影评论呈指数增长，准确的情感分类成为NLP核心任务。传统模型（如标准BERT和循环架构）难以捕捉长距离语义依赖和解决冗长评论中的模糊情感表达。
AI.method: 提出新颖的混合框架：1）动态自适应多头注意力模块，使用全局上下文池化向量动态调节每个注意力头的贡献，聚焦关键情感标记并抑制噪声；2）监督对比学习分支，在嵌入空间中强制实现更紧密的类内紧凑性和更大的类间分离。
AI.result: 在IMDB数据集上的广泛实验表明，所提模型达到94.67%的准确率，比强基线高出1.5-2.5个百分点。框架轻量、高效，易于扩展到其他文本分类任务。
AI.conclusion: 该混合框架有效解决了长文本情感分类中的语义依赖和模糊表达问题，通过动态注意力机制和监督对比学习的结合，显著提升了分类性能。

title: Consensus-based Recursive Multi-Output Gaussian Process
comment: Submitted to International Workshop on Signal Processing and Artificial Intelligence in Wireless Communications (IEEE SPAWC 2026)
summary: Multi-output Gaussian Processes provide principled uncertainty-aware learning of vector-valued fields but are difficult to deploy in large-scale, distributed, and streaming settings due to their computational and centralized nature. This paper proposes a Consensus-based Recursive Multi-Output Gaussian Process (CRMGP) framework that combines recursive inference on shared basis vectors with neighbour-to-neighbour information-consensus updates. The resulting method supports parallel, fully distributed learning with bounded per-step computation while preserving inter-output correlations and calibrated uncertainty. Experiments on synthetic wind fields and real LiDAR data demonstrate that CRMGP achieves competitive predictive performance and reliable uncertainty calibration, offering a scalable alternative to centralized Gaussian process models for multi-agent sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于共识的递归多输出高斯过程框架，支持分布式并行学习，适用于多智能体感知应用
AI.motivation: 多输出高斯过程虽然能提供向量值场的不确定性感知学习，但在大规模、分布式和流式设置中难以部署，因为其计算密集且需要集中式处理
AI.method: 结合共享基向量上的递归推断与邻居间的信息共识更新，支持并行、完全分布式学习，同时保持输出间相关性和校准的不确定性
AI.result: 在合成风场和真实LiDAR数据上的实验表明，CRMGP实现了有竞争力的预测性能和可靠的不确定性校准
AI.conclusion: CRMGP为多智能体感知应用提供了集中式高斯过程模型的可扩展替代方案

title: RobustMedSAM: Degradation-Resilient Medical Image Segmentation via Robust Foundation Model Adaptation
summary: Medical image segmentation models built on Segment Anything Model (SAM) achieve strong performance on clean benchmarks, yet their reliability often degrades under realistic image corruptions such as noise, blur, motion artifacts, and modality-specific distortions. Existing approaches address either medical-domain adaptation or corruption robustness, but not both jointly. In SAM, we find that these capabilities are concentrated in complementary modules: the image encoder preserves medical priors, while the mask decoder governs corruption robustness. Motivated by this observation, we propose RobustMedSAM, which adopts module-wise checkpoint fusion by initializing the image encoder from MedSAM and the mask decoder from RobustSAM under a shared ViT-B architecture. We then fine-tune only the mask decoder on 35 medical datasets from MedSegBench, spanning six imaging modalities and 12 corruption types, while freezing the remaining components to preserve pretrained medical representations. We additionally investigate an SVD-based parameter-efficient variant for limited encoder adaptation. Experiments on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution benchmarks show that RobustMedSAM improves degraded-image Dice from 0.613 to 0.719 (+0.106) over SAM, demonstrating that structured fusion of complementary pretrained models is an effective and practical approach for robust medical image segmentation.

AI.tldr: RobustMedSAM通过融合MedSAM的图像编码器和RobustSAM的掩码解码器，结合医学先验知识和抗腐蚀能力，提升了医学图像分割在真实图像损坏下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于SAM的医学图像分割模型在干净基准上表现良好，但在真实图像损坏（如噪声、模糊、运动伪影等）下可靠性下降。现有方法要么关注医学领域适应，要么关注腐蚀鲁棒性，但没有同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 发现SAM中医学先验知识和腐蚀鲁棒性分别集中在图像编码器和掩码解码器中。提出RobustMedSAM，采用模块级检查点融合：从MedSAM初始化图像编码器，从RobustSAM初始化掩码解码器。然后仅微调掩码解码器，在35个医学数据集上训练，涵盖6种成像模态和12种腐蚀类型，同时冻结其他组件以保留预训练的医学表示。还研究了基于SVD的参数高效变体用于有限的编码器适应。
AI.result: 在分布内和分布外基准测试中，RobustMedSAM将退化图像的Dice分数从SAM的0.613提升到0.719（+0.106），表明融合互补预训练模型是提升医学图像分割鲁棒性的有效实用方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构化融合互补预训练模型是提升医学图像分割鲁棒性的有效实用方法。模块级检查点融合策略能够同时利用医学先验知识和腐蚀鲁棒性。

title: Steered LLM Activations are Non-Surjective
comment: 10 pages main text. ICLR 2026 Workshops (Sci4DL, Re-Align)
summary: Activation steering is a popular white-box control technique that modifies model activations to elicit an abstract change in output behavior. It has also become a standard tool in interpretability (e.g., probing truthfulness, or translating activations into human-readable explanations and safety research (e.g., studying jailbreakability). However, it is unclear whether steered activation states are realizable by any textual prompt. In this work, we cast this question as a surjectivity problem: for a fixed model, does every steered activation admit a pre-image under the model's natural forward pass? Under practical assumptions, we prove that activation steering pushes the residual stream off the manifold of states reachable from discrete prompts. Almost surely, no prompt can reproduce the same internal behavior induced by steering. We also illustrate this finding empirically across three widely used LLMs. Our results establish a formal separation between white-box steerability and black-box prompting. We therefore caution against interpreting the ease and success of activation steering as evidence of prompt-based interpretability or vulnerability, and argue for evaluation protocols that explicitly decouple white-box and black-box interventions.

AI.tldr: 激活导向技术会改变模型激活状态，但这些导向后的状态无法通过任何文本提示实现，揭示了白盒导向与黑盒提示之间的形式化分离
AI.motivation: 激活导向是流行的白盒控制技术，用于改变模型输出行为，也被广泛应用于可解释性和安全研究。但尚不清楚导向后的激活状态是否可以通过任何文本提示实现，这关系到如何正确解释导向结果的意义。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为满射性问题：对于固定模型，每个导向后的激活是否在模型自然前向传播下存在原像？在实践假设下，证明激活导向会将残差流推离离散提示可到达的状态流形。通过理论证明和三个广泛使用的LLM的实证验证。
AI.result: 证明激活导向几乎必然无法通过任何提示复制相同的内部行为，导向后的状态不在文本提示可到达的流形上。实证结果在三个LLM中得到验证，建立了白盒可导向性与黑盒提示之间的形式化分离。
AI.conclusion: 激活导向的容易性和成功不应被解释为基于提示的可解释性或漏洞的证据。需要评估协议明确解耦白盒和黑盒干预，谨慎解释导向结果。

title: From Query to Counsel: Structured Reasoning with a Multi-Agent Framework and Dataset for Legal Consultation
summary: Legal consultation question answering (Legal CQA) presents unique challenges compared to traditional legal QA tasks, including the scarcity of high-quality training data, complex task composition, and strong contextual dependencies. To address these, we construct JurisCQAD, a large-scale dataset of over 43,000 real-world Chinese legal queries annotated with expert-validated positive and negative responses, and design a structured task decomposition that converts each query into a legal element graph integrating entities, events, intents, and legal issues. We further propose JurisMA, a modular multi-agent framework supporting dynamic routing, statutory grounding, and stylistic optimization. Combined with the element graph, the framework enables strong context-aware reasoning, effectively capturing dependencies across legal facts, norms, and procedural logic. Trained on JurisCQAD and evaluated on a refined LawBench, our system significantly outperforms both general-purpose and legal-domain LLMs across multiple lexical and semantic metrics, demonstrating the benefits of interpretable decomposition and modular collaboration in Legal CQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了JurisCQAD数据集和JurisMA框架，用于解决法律咨询问答任务中的数据稀缺、任务复杂和上下文依赖问题，在中文法律问答基准上显著优于通用和领域专用LLM。
AI.motivation: 法律咨询问答相比传统法律QA面临三大挑战：高质量训练数据稀缺、任务组合复杂、上下文依赖性强。现有方法难以有效处理这些挑战，需要专门的数据集和框架。
AI.method: 1) 构建JurisCQAD数据集（43,000+真实中文法律查询，专家标注正负响应）；2) 设计结构化任务分解，将查询转换为包含实体、事件、意图和法律问题的法律要素图；3) 提出JurisMA模块化多智能体框架，支持动态路由、法规基础和风格优化。
AI.result: 在精炼的LawBench基准上，系统在多个词汇和语义指标上显著优于通用LLM和法律领域LLM，证明了可解释分解和模块化协作在法律咨询问答中的优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化任务分解和模块化多智能体框架，结合大规模高质量数据集，可以有效解决法律咨询问答的独特挑战，实现强上下文感知推理。

title: A Temporally Augmented Graph Attention Network for Affordance Classification
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at 3rd IEEE Guwahati Subsection Conference (GCON 2026)
summary: Graph attention networks (GATs) provide one of the best frameworks for learning node representations in relational data; but, existing variants such as Graph Attention Network (GAT) mainly operate on static graphs and rely on implicit temporal aggregation when applied to sequential data. In this paper, we introduce Electroencephalography-temporal Graph Attention Network (EEG-tGAT), a temporally augmented formulation of GATv2 that is tailored for affordance classification from interaction sequences. The proposed model incorporates temporal attention to modulate the contribution of different time segments and temporal dropout to regularize learning across temporally correlated observations. The design reflects the assumption that temporal dimensions in affordance data are not semantically uniform and that discriminative information may be unevenly distributed across time. Experimental results on affordance datasets show that EEG-tGAT achieves improved classification performance compared to GATv2. The observed gains helps to conclude that explicitly encoding temporal importance and enforcing temporal robustness introduce inductive biases that are much better aligned with the structure of affordance-driven interaction data. These findings show us that modest architectural changes to graph attention models can help one obtain consistent benefits when temporal relationships play a nontrivial role in the task.

AI.tldr: EEG-tGAT：针对脑电图时序数据的图注意力网络变体，通过时间注意力机制和时间dropout提升交互序列中affordance分类性能
AI.motivation: 现有图注意力网络（如GAT）主要处理静态图，在应用于时序数据时依赖隐式时间聚合。affordance数据的时间维度语义不均匀，判别信息在时间上分布不均，需要显式建模时间重要性
AI.method: 基于GATv2的时间增强版本，引入时间注意力机制调节不同时间段的贡献，使用时间dropout正则化学习过程，处理时序相关观测
AI.result: 在affordance数据集上，EEG-tGAT相比GATv2获得分类性能提升，表明显式编码时间重要性和强制时间鲁棒性引入了与affordance驱动交互数据结构更匹配的归纳偏置
AI.conclusion: 对图注意力模型进行适度的架构修改，在时间关系起重要作用的任务中能获得一致收益，为时序图数据处理提供了有效方案

title: ACCIDENT: A Benchmark Dataset for Vehicle Accident Detection from Traffic Surveillance Videos
summary: We introduce ACCIDENT, a benchmark dataset for traffic accident detection in CCTV footage, designed to evaluate models in supervised (IID and OOD) and zero-shot settings, reflecting both data-rich and data-scarce scenarios. The benchmark consists of a curated set of 2,027 real and 2,211 synthetic clips annotated with the accident time, spatial location, and high-level collision type. We define three core tasks: (i) temporal localization of the accident, (ii) its spatial localization, and (iii) collision type classification. Each task is evaluated using custom metrics that account for the uncertainty and ambiguity inherent in CCTV footage. In addition to the benchmark, we provide a diverse set of baselines, including heuristic, motion-aware, and vision-language approaches, and show that ACCIDENT is challenging. You can access the ACCIDENT at: https://accidentbench.github.io

AI.tldr: ACCIDENT是一个用于CCTV视频中交通事故检测的基准数据集，包含真实和合成视频片段，支持监督学习（IID和OOD）和零样本设置，评估时间定位、空间定位和碰撞类型分类三个任务。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏专门针对CCTV视频中交通事故检测的全面基准数据集，现有方法在数据丰富和数据稀缺场景下的评估不足，需要能够处理视频中不确定性和模糊性的评估指标。
AI.method: 构建包含2,027个真实和2,211个合成视频片段的基准数据集，标注事故时间、空间位置和碰撞类型。定义三个核心任务：时间定位、空间定位和碰撞类型分类，并设计考虑不确定性的评估指标。提供启发式、运动感知和视觉语言等多种基线方法。
AI.result: ACCIDENT基准具有挑战性，现有方法表现有限。数据集支持多种评估设置，能够全面评估模型在数据丰富和数据稀缺场景下的性能。
AI.conclusion: ACCIDENT为交通事故检测研究提供了全面的基准，填补了现有空白，有助于推动该领域的发展，特别是在处理真实世界CCTV视频的复杂性和不确定性方面。

title: MEMENTO: Teaching LLMs to Manage Their Own Context
summary: Reasoning models think in long, unstructured streams with no mechanism for compressing or organizing their own intermediate state. We introduce MEMENTO: a method that teaches models to segment reasoning into blocks, compress each block into a memento, i.e., a dense state summary, and reason forward by attending only to mementos, reducing context, KV cache, and compute. To train MEMENTO models, we release OpenMementos, a public dataset of 228K reasoning traces derived from OpenThoughts-v3, segmented and annotated with intermediate summaries. We show that a two-stage SFT recipe on OpenMementos is effective across different model families (Qwen3, Phi-4, Olmo 3) and scales (8B--32B parameters). Trained models maintain strong accuracy on math, science, and coding benchmarks while achieving ${\sim}2.5\times$ peak KV cache reduction. We extend vLLM to support our inference method, achieving ${\sim}1.75\times$ throughput improvement while also enabling us to perform RL and further improve accuracy. Finally, we identify a dual information stream: information from each reasoning block is carried both by the memento text and by the corresponding KV states, which retain implicit information from the original block. Removing this channel drops accuracy by 15\,pp on AIME24.

AI.tldr: MEMENTO方法教模型将推理分割成块，压缩每个块为memento（密集状态摘要），仅关注memento进行推理，减少上下文、KV缓存和计算
AI.motivation: 当前推理模型在长而无结构的推理流中运行，缺乏压缩或组织中间状态的机制，导致计算效率低下
AI.method: 1) 在OpenMementos数据集（228K推理轨迹）上进行两阶段SFT训练；2) 教模型分割推理块并压缩为memento；3) 扩展vLLM支持该推理方法；4) 利用KV状态中的隐式信息
AI.result: 1) 在Qwen3、Phi-4、Olmo 3等模型上有效；2) 保持数学、科学、编码基准的强准确性；3) 实现约2.5倍峰值KV缓存减少；4) 约1.75倍吞吐量提升；5) 发现双重信息流现象
AI.conclusion: MEMENTO方法能有效压缩推理状态，提升计算效率，同时保持准确性，为高效推理提供了新方向

title: Why Don't You Know? Evaluating the Impact of Uncertainty Sources on Uncertainty Quantification in LLMs
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, reliable uncertainty quantification (UQ) becomes critical for safe and effective use. Most existing UQ approaches for language models aim to produce a single confidence score -- for example, estimating the probability that a model's answer is correct. However, uncertainty in natural language tasks arises from multiple distinct sources, including model knowledge gaps, output variability, and input ambiguity, which have different implications for system behavior and user interaction. In this work, we study how the source of uncertainty impacts the behavior and effectiveness of existing UQ methods. To enable controlled analysis, we introduce a new dataset that explicitly categorizes uncertainty sources, allowing systematic evaluation of UQ performance under each condition. Our experiments reveal that while many UQ methods perform well when uncertainty stems solely from model knowledge limitations, their performance degrades or becomes misleading when other sources are introduced. These findings highlight the need for uncertainty-aware methods that explicitly account for the source of uncertainty in large language models.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了LLM不确定性量化中不同来源的影响，发现现有方法在模型知识不足时表现良好，但在其他不确定性来源下性能下降，强调了需要考虑不确定性来源的重要性。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在现实应用中的部署，可靠的不确定性量化变得至关重要。现有方法通常只产生单一置信度分数，但自然语言任务中的不确定性来自多个不同来源（模型知识差距、输出可变性、输入模糊性），这些来源对系统行为和用户交互有不同的影响。
AI.method: 引入了一个新的数据集，明确分类不确定性来源，允许在每种条件下系统评估UQ性能。通过受控分析研究不确定性来源如何影响现有UQ方法的行为和效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，当不确定性仅来自模型知识限制时，许多UQ方法表现良好，但当引入其他不确定性来源时，它们的性能会下降或变得误导性。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了需要开发能够明确考虑不确定性来源的不确定性感知方法，这对于LLM的安全有效使用至关重要。

title: Tracing the Thought of a Grandmaster-level Chess-Playing Transformer
summary: While modern transformer neural networks achieve grandmaster-level performance in chess and other reasoning tasks, their internal computation process remains largely opaque. Focusing on Leela Chess Zero (LC0), we introduce a sparse decomposition framework to interpret its internal computation by decomposing its MLP and attention modules with sparse replacement layers, which capture the primary computation process of LC0. We conduct a detailed case study showing that these pathways expose rich, interpretable tactical considerations that are empirically verifiable. We further introduce three quantitative metrics and show that LC0 exhibits parallel reasoning behavior consistent with the inductive bias of its policy head architecture. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to decompose the internal computation of a transformer on both MLP and attention modules for interpretability. Combining sparse replacement layers and causal interventions in LC0 provides a comprehensive understanding of advanced tactical reasoning, offering critical insights into the underlying mechanisms of superhuman systems. Our code is available at https://github.com/JacklE0niden/Leela-SAEs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种稀疏分解框架，用于解释Leela Chess Zero（LC0）Transformer的内部计算过程，通过稀疏替换层分解MLP和注意力模块，揭示了模型在象棋推理中的战术考量。
AI.motivation: 尽管现代Transformer在象棋等推理任务中达到大师级水平，但其内部计算过程仍然不透明。作者希望开发一种方法来解释LC0这样的超人类系统的内部推理机制。
AI.method: 引入稀疏分解框架，通过稀疏替换层分解LC0的MLP和注意力模块，捕捉主要计算过程。结合因果干预，进行详细的案例研究，并引入三个定量指标分析并行推理行为。
AI.result: 稀疏分解揭示了LC0中丰富、可解释的战术考量，经验证有效。定量分析显示LC0表现出与其策略头架构归纳偏置一致的并行推理行为。这是首个同时分解Transformer MLP和注意力模块进行可解释性分析的工作。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏替换层与因果干预相结合，为理解高级战术推理提供了全面视角，揭示了超人类系统的底层机制，为Transformer可解释性研究提供了新方法。

title: F3G-Avatar : Face Focused Full-body Gaussian Avatar
summary: Existing full-body Gaussian avatar methods primarily optimize global reconstruction quality and often fail to preserve fine-grained facial geometry and expression details. This challenge arises from limited facial representational capacity that causes difficulties in modeling high-frequency pose-dependent deformations. To address this, we propose F3G-Avatar, a full-body, face-aware avatar synthesis method that reconstructs animatable human representations from multi-view RGB video and regressed pose/shape parameters. Starting from a clothed Momentum Human Rig (MHR) template, front/back positional maps are rendered and decoded into 3D Gaussians through a two-branch architecture: a body branch that captures pose-dependent non-rigid deformations and a face-focused deformation branch that refines head geometry and appearance. The predicted Gaussians are fused, posed with linear blend skinning (LBS), and rendered with differentiable Gaussian splatting. Training combines reconstruction and perceptual objectives with a face-specific adversarial loss to enhance realism in close-up views. Experiments demonstrate strong rendering quality, with face-view performance reaching PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS of 26.243/0.964/0.084 on the AvatarReX dataset. Ablations further highlight contributions of the MHR template and the face-focused deformation. F3G-Avatar provides a practical, high-quality pipeline for realistic, animatable full-body avatar synthesis.

AI.tldr: F3G-Avatar：一种面向全身、关注面部的可动画化人体表示合成方法，通过双分支架构（身体分支+面部变形分支）从多视角RGB视频重建高质量可动画化人体，特别优化了面部几何和表情细节。
AI.motivation: 现有基于高斯分布的全身虚拟化身方法主要优化全局重建质量，但难以保留细粒度的面部几何和表情细节。这源于有限的面部表示能力导致难以建模高频姿态相关变形。
AI.method: 从穿着衣服的Momentum Human Rig模板开始，渲染前后位置图，通过双分支架构解码为3D高斯分布：身体分支捕捉姿态相关的非刚性变形，面部变形分支细化头部几何和外观。预测的高斯分布通过线性混合蒙皮进行融合和姿态调整，使用可微分高斯溅射进行渲染。训练结合重建和感知目标，并添加面部特定的对抗损失以增强特写视图的真实感。
AI.result: 在AvatarReX数据集上，面部视图性能达到PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS为26.243/0.964/0.084。消融实验进一步突出了MHR模板和面部变形分支的贡献。
AI.conclusion: F3G-Avatar为真实、可动画化的全身虚拟化身合成提供了一个实用、高质量的流程，特别在面部细节保留方面表现出色。

title: Instructing LLMs to Negotiate using Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
summary: The recent advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) has established their potential as autonomous interactive agents. However, they often struggle in strategic games of incomplete information, such as bilateral price negotiation. In this paper, we investigate if Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) can effectively teach LLMs to negotiate. Specifically, we explore the strategic behaviors that emerge during the learning process. We introduce a framework that trains a mid-sized buyer agent against a regulated LLM seller across a wide distribution of real-world products. By grounding reward signals directly in the maximization of economic surplus and strict adherence to private budget constraints, we reveal a novel four-phase strategic evolution. The agent progresses from naive bargaining to using aggressive starting prices, moves through a phase of deadlock, and ultimately develops sophisticated persuasive skills. Our results demonstrate that this verifiable training allows a 30B agent to significantly outperform frontier models over ten times its size in extracting surplus. Furthermore, the trained agent generalizes robustly to stronger counterparties unseen during training and remains effective even when facing hostile, adversarial seller personas.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了如何通过可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）来训练大型语言模型进行价格谈判，发现训练后的30B参数模型在获取经济剩余方面显著优于大10倍的前沿模型，并展现出从天真议价到复杂说服技能的四阶段战略演化。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在自主交互代理方面展现出潜力，但在不完全信息战略游戏（如双边价格谈判）中表现不佳。研究者希望探索可验证奖励的强化学习能否有效教会LLMs进行谈判，并研究学习过程中出现的战略行为。
AI.method: 引入了一个框架，训练中等规模的买家代理与受监管的LLM卖家在广泛的真实世界产品分布上进行对抗。通过将奖励信号直接基于经济剩余最大化和严格遵守私人预算约束，研究战略行为的演化过程。
AI.result: 发现了新颖的四阶段战略演化：从天真议价到使用激进起始价格，经历僵局阶段，最终发展出复杂的说服技能。训练后的30B代理在提取剩余方面显著优于大10倍的前沿模型，并能泛化到训练中未见过的更强对手，甚至在面对敌对、对抗性卖家角色时仍保持有效。
AI.conclusion: 可验证奖励的强化学习能够有效训练LLMs进行战略谈判，使较小模型在谈判任务上超越更大模型，并展现出稳健的泛化能力，为LLMs作为战略代理的发展提供了重要见解。

title: Structure-Grounded Knowledge Retrieval via Code Dependencies for Multi-Step Data Reasoning
summary: Selecting the right knowledge is critical when using large language models (LLMs) to solve domain-specific data analysis tasks. However, most retrieval-augmented approaches rely primarily on lexical or embedding similarity, which is often a weak proxy for the task-critical knowledge needed for multi-step reasoning. In many such tasks, the relevant knowledge is not merely textually related to the query, but is instead grounded in executable code and the dependency structure through which computations are carried out. To address this mismatch, we propose SGKR (Structure-Grounded Knowledge Retrieval), a retrieval framework that organizes domain knowledge with a graph induced by function-call dependencies. Given a question, SGKR extracts semantic input and output tags, identifies dependency paths connecting them, and constructs a task-relevant subgraph. The associated knowledge and corresponding function implementations are then assembled as a structured context for LLM-based code generation. Experiments on multi-step data analysis benchmarks show that SGKR consistently improves solution correctness over no-retrieval and similarity-based retrieval baselines for both vanilla LLMs and coding agents.

AI.tldr: SGKR：基于结构的知识检索框架，通过函数调用依赖图组织领域知识，提升LLM在数据分折任务中的代码生成能力
AI.motivation: 现有检索增强方法主要依赖文本相似度，但领域数据分折任务需要的是基于可执行代码和计算依赖结构的知识，而不仅仅是文本相关的内容
AI.method: SGKR框架：1) 用函数调用依赖图组织领域知识；2) 给定问题时提取语义输入输出标签；3) 识别连接这些标签的依赖路径；4) 构建任务相关子图；5) 将相关知识及函数实现组装为结构化上下文供LLM生成代码
AI.result: 在多步数据分折基准测试中，SGKR相比无检索和基于相似度的检索基线，显著提高了解决方案的正确性，适用于普通LLM和代码代理
AI.conclusion: 基于结构的知识检索比传统相似度检索更适合需要多步推理的领域数据分折任务，能更好地利用代码依赖关系来组织相关知识

title: Virtual Smart Metering in District Heating Networks via Heterogeneous Spatial-Temporal Graph Neural Networks
summary: Intelligent operation of thermal energy networks aims to improve energy efficiency, reliability, and operational flexibility through data-driven control, predictive optimization, and early fault detection. Achieving these goals relies on sufficient observability, requiring continuous and well-distributed monitoring of thermal and hydraulic states. However, district heating systems are typically sparsely instrumented and frequently affected by sensor faults, limiting monitoring. Virtual sensing offers a cost-effective means to enhance observability, yet its development and validation remain limited in practice. Existing data-driven methods generally assume dense synchronized data, while analytical models rely on simplified hydraulic and thermal assumptions that may not adequately capture the behavior of heterogeneous network topologies. Consequently, modeling the coupled nonlinear dependencies between pressure, flow, and temperature under realistic operating conditions remains challenging. In addition, the lack of publicly available benchmark datasets hinders systematic comparison of virtual sensing approaches. To address these challenges, we propose a heterogeneous spatial-temporal graph neural network (HSTGNN) for constructing virtual smart heat meters. The model incorporates the functional relationships inherent in district heating networks and employs dedicated branches to learn graph structures and temporal dynamics for flow, temperature, and pressure measurements, thereby enabling the joint modeling of cross-variable and spatial correlations. To support further research, we introduce a controlled laboratory dataset collected at the Aalborg Smart Water Infrastructure Laboratory, providing synchronized high-resolution measurements representative of real operating conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach significantly outperforms existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于区域供热网络虚拟传感的异质时空图神经网络（HSTGNN），通过联合建模跨变量和空间相关性来构建虚拟智能热量表，并发布了首个公开基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 区域供热系统通常监测稀疏且易受传感器故障影响，现有数据驱动方法假设密集同步数据，而分析模型基于简化的热工水力假设，难以捕捉异构网络拓扑行为。缺乏公开基准数据集也阻碍了虚拟传感方法的系统比较。
AI.method: 提出异质时空图神经网络（HSTGNN），结合区域供热网络的功能关系，使用专用分支学习流量、温度和压力测量的图结构和时间动态，实现跨变量和空间相关性的联合建模。
AI.result: 在Aalborg智能水基础设施实验室收集的受控实验室数据集上进行广泛实验，证明所提方法显著优于现有基线。
AI.conclusion: HSTGNN能够有效建模区域供热网络中压力、流量和温度之间的耦合非线性依赖关系，为虚拟传感提供了有效解决方案，同时发布的基准数据集将促进该领域进一步研究。

title: Vector Field Synthesis with Sparse Streamlines Using Diffusion Model
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures; published at IEEE VIS 2025
summary: We present a novel diffusion-based framework for synthesizing 2D vector fields from sparse, coherent inputs (i.e., streamlines) while maintaining physical plausibility. Our method employs a conditional denoising diffusion probabilistic model with classifier-free guidance, enabling progressive reconstruction that preserves both geometric and physical constraints. Experimental results demonstrate our method's ability to synthesize plausible vector fields that adhere to physical laws while maintaining fidelity to sparse input observations, outperforming traditional optimization-based approaches in terms of flexibility and physical consistency.

AI.tldr: 提出基于扩散模型的2D矢量场合成框架，可从稀疏流线输入生成物理合理的矢量场，优于传统优化方法。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法在从稀疏、连贯输入（如流线）合成物理合理的2D矢量场时存在灵活性不足和物理一致性难以保证的问题，需要一种能同时保持几何约束和物理约束的新方法。
AI.method: 采用条件去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）结合无分类器引导，实现渐进式重建，既能保持几何约束又能满足物理约束。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法能合成符合物理定律的合理矢量场，同时在稀疏输入观测上保持保真度，在灵活性和物理一致性方面优于传统优化方法。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型为物理合理的矢量场合成提供了有效框架，在保持输入约束的同时确保物理一致性，为相关领域提供了新思路。

title: Evolutionary Token-Level Prompt Optimization for Diffusion Models
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models exhibit strong generative performance but remain highly sensitive to prompt formulation, often requiring extensive manual trial and error to obtain satisfactory results. This motivates the development of automated, model-agnostic prompt optimization methods that can systematically explore the conditioning space beyond conventional text rewriting. This work investigates the use of a Genetic Algorithm (GA) for prompt optimization by directly evolving the token vectors employed by CLIP-based diffusion models. The GA optimizes a fitness function that combines aesthetic quality, measured by the LAION Aesthetic Predictor V2, with prompt-image alignment, assessed via CLIPScore. Experiments on 36 prompts from the Parti Prompts (P2) dataset show that the proposed approach outperforms the baseline methods, including Promptist and random search, achieving up to a 23.93% improvement in fitness. Overall, the method is adaptable to image generation models with tokenized text encoders and provides a modular framework for future extensions, the limitations and prospects of which are discussed.

AI.tldr: 使用遗传算法直接优化CLIP扩散模型的token向量，结合美学质量和提示-图像对齐度进行自动提示优化，相比基线方法提升23.93%
AI.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型对提示词表述高度敏感，需要大量手动试错才能获得满意结果。这促使开发自动、模型无关的提示优化方法，能够系统探索条件空间。
AI.method: 采用遗传算法直接优化CLIP扩散模型使用的token向量。优化目标函数结合了LAION美学预测器V2测量的美学质量和CLIPScore评估的提示-图像对齐度。
AI.result: 在Parti Prompts数据集36个提示上的实验表明，该方法优于Promptist和随机搜索等基线方法，最高提升23.93%的适应度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于具有token化文本编码器的图像生成模型，为未来扩展提供了模块化框架，同时讨论了局限性和前景。

title: ReFEree: Reference-Free and Fine-Grained Method for Evaluating Factual Consistency in Real-World Code Summarization
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) have become capable of generating long and descriptive code summaries, accurate and reliable evaluation of factual consistency has become a critical challenge. However, previous evaluation methods are primarily designed for short summaries of isolated code snippets. Consequently, they struggle to provide fine-grained evaluation of multi-sentence functionalities and fail to accurately assess dependency context commonly found in real-world code summaries. To address this, we propose ReFEree, a reference-free and fine-grained method for evaluating factual consistency in real-world code summaries. We define factual inconsistency criteria specific to code summaries and evaluate them at the segment level using these criteria along with dependency information. These segment-level results are then aggregated into a fine-grained score. We construct a code summarization benchmark with human-annotated factual consistency labels. The evaluation results demonstrate that ReFEree achieves the highest correlation with human judgment among 13 baselines, improving 15-18% over the previous state-of-the-art. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/bsy99615/ReFEree.git.

AI.tldr: ReFEree是一个无参考的细粒度方法，用于评估真实世界代码摘要的事实一致性，通过定义代码摘要特定的事实不一致标准，在片段级别使用依赖信息进行评估，然后聚合为细粒度分数。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型能够生成长且描述性的代码摘要，准确可靠地评估事实一致性成为一个关键挑战。现有评估方法主要针对孤立代码片段的简短摘要设计，难以对多句子功能进行细粒度评估，也无法准确评估真实世界代码摘要中常见的依赖上下文。
AI.method: 提出ReFEree方法：1) 定义代码摘要特定的事实不一致标准；2) 在片段级别使用这些标准和依赖信息进行评估；3) 将片段级结果聚合为细粒度分数。构建了带有人工标注事实一致性标签的代码摘要基准数据集。
AI.result: 在13个基线方法中，ReFEree实现了与人类判断的最高相关性，比之前的最先进方法提高了15-18%。构建的代码摘要基准数据集和代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: ReFEree有效地解决了真实世界代码摘要的事实一致性评估问题，通过细粒度的片段级评估和依赖信息利用，显著提升了评估准确性。

title: Wolkowicz-Styan Upper Bound on the Hessian Eigenspectrum for Cross-Entropy Loss in Nonlinear Smooth Neural Networks
summary: Neural networks (NNs) are central to modern machine learning and achieve state-of-the-art results in many applications. However, the relationship between loss geometry and generalization is still not well understood. The local geometry of the loss function near a critical point is well-approximated by its quadratic form, obtained through a second-order Taylor expansion. The coefficients of the quadratic term correspond to the Hessian matrix, whose eigenspectrum allows us to evaluate the sharpness of the loss at the critical point. Extensive research suggests flat critical points generalize better, while sharp ones lead to higher generalization error. However, sharpness requires the Hessian eigenspectrum, but general matrix characteristic equations have no closed-form solution. Therefore, most existing studies on evaluating loss sharpness rely on numerical approximation methods. Existing closed-form analyses of the eigenspectrum are primarily limited to simplified architectures, such as linear or ReLU-activated networks; consequently, theoretical analysis of smooth nonlinear multilayer neural networks remains limited. Against this background, this study focuses on nonlinear, smooth multilayer neural networks and derives a closed-form upper bound for the maximum eigenvalue of the Hessian with respect to the cross-entropy loss by leveraging the Wolkowicz-Styan bound. Specifically, the derived upper bound is expressed as a function of the affine transformation parameters, hidden layer dimensions, and the degree of orthogonality among the training samples. The primary contribution of this paper is an analytical characterization of loss sharpness in smooth nonlinear multilayer neural networks via a closed-form expression, avoiding explicit numerical eigenspectrum computation. We hope that this work provides a small yet meaningful step toward unraveling the mysteries of deep learning.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非线性平滑多层神经网络，推导了交叉熵损失函数Hessian矩阵最大特征值的闭式上界，为理解损失几何与泛化关系提供了理论分析工具。
AI.motivation: 虽然损失函数的局部几何形状（特别是Hessian矩阵特征谱）与神经网络泛化能力密切相关，但现有研究主要依赖数值近似方法，对非线性平滑多层神经网络的理论分析有限。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 针对非线性平滑多层神经网络，利用Wolkowicz-Styan界推导交叉熵损失函数Hessian矩阵最大特征值的闭式上界。该上界表示为仿射变换参数、隐藏层维度和训练样本正交度的函数。
AI.result: 成功推导出非线性平滑多层神经网络中Hessian矩阵最大特征值的闭式上界表达式，避免了显式的数值特征谱计算，为分析损失尖锐度提供了解析工具。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过闭式表达式对平滑非线性多层神经网络的损失尖锐度进行了分析表征，为理解深度学习中的损失几何与泛化关系提供了理论进展。

title: Is There Knowledge Left to Extract? Evidence of Fragility in Medically Fine-Tuned Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly adapted through domain-specific fine-tuning, yet it remains unclear whether this improves reasoning beyond superficial visual cues, particularly in high-stakes domains like medicine. We evaluate four paired open-source VLMs (LLaVA vs. LLaVA-Med; Gemma vs. MedGemma) across four medical imaging tasks of increasing difficulty: brain tumor, pneumonia, skin cancer, and histopathology classification. We find that performance degrades toward near-random levels as task difficulty increases, indicating limited clinical reasoning. Medical fine-tuning provides no consistent advantage, and models are highly sensitive to prompt formulation, with minor changes causing large swings in accuracy and refusal rates. To test whether closed-form VQA suppresses latent knowledge, we introduce a description-based pipeline where models generate image descriptions that a text-only model (GPT-5.1) uses for diagnosis. This recovers a limited additional signal but remains bounded by task difficulty. Analysis of vision encoder embeddings further shows that failures stem from both weak visual representations and downstream reasoning. Overall, medical VLM performance is fragile, prompt-dependent, and not reliably improved by domain-specific fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 医学视觉语言模型在医疗影像任务中表现脆弱，性能随任务难度增加而急剧下降，医学微调无一致优势，模型对提示词高度敏感。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是评估视觉语言模型在医学领域微调后是否真正提升了临床推理能力，而非仅学习表面视觉线索。当前医学VLM在医疗影像诊断中的实际推理能力尚不明确。
AI.method: 评估了四对开源VLM（LLaVA vs. LLaVA-Med; Gemma vs. MedGemma）在四个难度递增的医疗影像任务上：脑肿瘤、肺炎、皮肤癌和组织病理学分类。引入基于描述的诊断流程，让模型生成图像描述，再由纯文本模型（GPT-5.1）进行诊断。分析了视觉编码器嵌入以探究失败原因。
AI.result: 性能随任务难度增加而急剧下降至接近随机水平，表明临床推理能力有限。医学微调无一致优势。模型对提示词高度敏感，微小变化导致准确率和拒绝率大幅波动。基于描述的流程仅恢复有限额外信号，但仍受限于任务难度。视觉编码器嵌入分析显示失败源于弱视觉表示和下游推理问题。
AI.conclusion: 医学VLM性能脆弱、提示词依赖性强，且无法通过领域特定微调可靠提升。模型在医疗影像诊断中的实际临床推理能力有限，需要更根本的改进而非简单微调。

title: What do your logits know? (The answer may surprise you!)
summary: Recent work has shown that probing model internals can reveal a wealth of information not apparent from the model generations. This poses the risk of unintentional or malicious information leakage, where model users are able to learn information that the model owner assumed was inaccessible. Using vision-language models as a testbed, we present the first systematic comparison of information retained at different "representational levels'' as it is compressed from the rich information encoded in the residual stream through two natural bottlenecks: low-dimensional projections of the residual stream obtained using tuned lens, and the final top-k logits most likely to impact model's answer. We show that even easily accessible bottlenecks defined by the model's top logit values can leak task-irrelevant information present in an image-based query, in some cases revealing as much information as direct projections of the full residual stream.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统比较了视觉语言模型中不同表征层级的信息保留情况，发现即使是模型顶部logit值这样的易访问瓶颈也会泄露与任务无关的图像查询信息，风险与完整残差流投影相当。
