AI.motivation: 解决LLMs中的越狱攻击、后门植入和安全遗忘问题。传统方法关注模型在恶意指令下的行为，但需要更根本地改变模型对指令的解释方式
AI.method: 提出潜在指令表示对齐（LIRA）方法，训练模型改变指令解释方式而非行为。结合内部对抗训练算法提升泛化能力
AI.result: 成功防御99%以上的PEZ越狱攻击；移除具有挑战性的不安全代码后门；在WMDP网络数据集上实现最优遗忘，同时保持良性能力损失可忽略
AI.conclusion: 通过改变指令解释方式而非行为，LIRA方法在LLM安全防御方面取得显著效果，为可信AI提供了新思路

title: BLPR: Robust License Plate Recognition under Viewpoint and Illumination Variations via Confidence-Driven VLM Fallback
summary: Robust license plate recognition in unconstrained environments remains a significant challenge, particularly in underrepresented regions with limited data availability and unique visual characteristics, such as Bolivia. Recognition accuracy in real-world conditions is often degraded by factors such as illumination changes and viewpoint distortion. To address these challenges, we introduce BLPR, a novel deep learning-based License Plate Detection and Recognition (LPDR) framework specifically designed for Bolivian license plates. The proposed system follows a two-stage pipeline where a YOLO-based detector is pretrained on synthetic data generated in Blender to simulate extreme perspectives and lighting conditions, and subsequently fine-tuned on street-level data collected in La Paz, Bolivia. Detected plates are geometrically rectified and passed to a character recognition model. To improve robustness under ambiguous scenarios, a lightweight vision-language model (Gemma3 4B) is selectively triggered as a confidence-based fallback mechanism. The proposed framework further leverages synthetic-to-real domain adaptation to improve robustness under diverse real-world conditions. We also introduce the first publicly available Bolivian LPDR dataset, enabling evaluation under diverse viewpoint and illumination conditions. The system achieves a character-level recognition accuracy of 89.6% on real-world data, demonstrating its effectiveness for deployment in challenging urban environments. Our project is publicly available at https://github.com/EdwinTSalcedo/BLPR.

AI.tldr: BLPR是一个针对玻利维亚车牌识别的新型深度学习框架，采用两阶段流水线：YOLO检测器+字符识别模型，并引入Gemma3 4B作为置信度回退机制，在真实数据上达到89.6%的字符级识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 在无约束环境下（特别是玻利维亚等数据稀缺地区）的车牌识别面临挑战，包括光照变化、视角扭曲等因素导致识别准确率下降。需要专门针对特定地区特征的鲁棒解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 两阶段流水线：YOLO检测器（在Blender生成的合成数据上预训练，在玻利维亚真实数据上微调）进行车牌检测；2) 几何校正后传递给字符识别模型；3) 引入Gemma3 4B作为置信度回退机制；4) 合成到真实的域适应方法；5) 创建首个公开玻利维亚车牌数据集。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据上达到89.6%的字符级识别准确率，证明了在挑战性城市环境中的有效性。同时发布了首个公开玻利维亚车牌数据集。
AI.conclusion: BLPR框架通过合成数据预训练、真实数据微调、几何校正和VLM回退机制，有效解决了玻利维亚等数据稀缺地区的车牌识别问题，为类似应用提供了可行方案。

title: Learning from Emptiness: De-biasing Listwise Rerankers with Content-Agnostic Probability Calibration
summary: Generative listwise reranking leverages global context for superior retrieval but is plagued by intrinsic position bias, where models exhibit structural sensitivity to input order independent of relevance. Existing mitigations present a dilemma: inference-time aggregation incurs prohibitive latency, while training-based methods often fail to eradicate ingrained priors, particularly in compact models. To resolve this dilemma, we propose CapCal (Content-Agnostic Probability Calibration), a training-free framework that mechanically decouples positional bias from ranking decisions. By estimating the bias distribution via content-free placeholders, CapCal rectifies output logits through an entropy-adaptive contrastive mechanism. Evaluations across 10 benchmarks confirm that CapCal achieves superior performance among training-free methods while preserving single-pass efficiency. Notably, it unlocks the latent potential of lightweight models (e.g., 0.6B), delivering absolute NDCG gains exceeding 10 points and outperforming both permutation-based aggregation and data-augmentation baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出CapCal框架，通过内容无关的概率校准解决生成式列表重排序中的位置偏差问题，无需训练即可在保持单次推理效率的同时提升轻量级模型性能。
AI.motivation: 生成式列表重排序虽然能利用全局上下文获得更好的检索效果，但存在固有的位置偏差问题——模型对输入顺序有结构性敏感，与相关性无关。现有方法面临两难：推理时聚合方法延迟过高，而基于训练的方法又难以消除深度嵌入的偏差先验，特别是在紧凑模型中。
AI.method: 提出CapCal（内容无关概率校准）框架，这是一种无需训练的方法，通过内容无关占位符估计偏差分布，然后通过熵自适应对比机制修正输出logits，从而机械地将位置偏差与排序决策解耦。
AI.result: 在10个基准测试上的评估表明，CapCal在无需训练的方法中达到最优性能，同时保持单次推理效率。特别地，它解锁了轻量级模型（如0.6B）的潜在能力，NDCG绝对增益超过10个百分点，优于基于排列的聚合和数据增强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CapCal有效解决了生成式重排序中的位置偏差问题，为轻量级模型提供了高效且高性能的解决方案，在保持推理效率的同时显著提升排序质量。

title: Attention Sinks as Internal Signals for Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models frequently exhibit hallucinations: fluent and confident outputs that are factually incorrect or unsupported by the input context. While recent hallucination detection methods have explored various features derived from attention maps, the underlying mechanisms they exploit remain poorly understood. In this work, we propose SinkProbe, a hallucination detection method grounded in the observation that hallucinations are deeply entangled with attention sinks - tokens that accumulate disproportionate attention mass during generation - indicating a transition from distributed, input-grounded attention to compressed, prior-dominated computation. Importantly, although sink scores are computed solely from attention maps, we find that the classifier preferentially relies on sinks whose associated value vectors have large norms. Moreover, we show that previous methods implicitly depend on attention sinks by establishing their mathematical relationship to sink scores. Our findings yield a novel hallucination detection method grounded in theory that produces state-of-the-art results across popular datasets and LLMs.

AI.tldr: SinkProbe：一种基于注意力机制检测大语言模型幻觉的新方法，通过分析注意力汇聚现象来识别事实错误输出
AI.motivation: 大语言模型经常产生幻觉（流畅但事实错误的输出），现有检测方法虽然利用了注意力图的各种特征，但其底层机制仍不清楚。作者希望深入理解幻觉与注意力机制的关系，特别是注意力汇聚现象。
AI.method: 提出SinkProbe方法，基于观察发现幻觉与注意力汇聚（attention sinks）密切相关——即在生成过程中积累不成比例注意力质量的标记。该方法从注意力图中计算汇聚分数，并发现分类器优先依赖那些关联值向量范数较大的汇聚点。同时建立了该方法与先前方法的数学关系。
AI.result: SinkProbe在多个流行数据集和LLM上实现了最先进的幻觉检测性能，证明了基于理论的方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 幻觉与注意力汇聚现象密切相关，表明模型从分布式、基于输入的注意力转向压缩的、先验主导的计算。SinkProbe不仅提供了有效的检测方法，还揭示了先前方法隐含依赖注意力汇聚的机制。

title: CARE-ECG: Causal Agent-based Reasoning for Explainable and Counterfactual ECG Interpretation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) enable waveform-to-text ECG interpretation and interactive clinical questioning, yet most ECG-LLM systems still rely on weak signal-text alignment and retrieval without explicit physiological or causal structure. This limits grounding, temporal reasoning, and counterfactual "what-if" analysis central to clinical decision-making. We propose CARE-ECG, a causally structured ECG-language reasoning framework that unifies representation learning, diagnosis, and explanation in a single pipeline. CARE-ECG encodes multi-lead ECGs into temporally organized latent biomarkers, performs causal graph inference for probabilistic diagnosis, and supports counterfactual assessment via structural causal models. To improve faithfulness, CARE-ECG grounds language outputs through causal retrieval-augmented generation and a modular agentic pipeline that integrates history, diagnosis, and response with verification. Across multiple ECG benchmarks and expert QA settings, CARE-ECG improves diagnostic accuracy and explanation faithfulness while reducing hallucinations (e.g., 0.84 accuracy on Expert-ECG-QA and 0.76 on SCP-mapped PTB-XL under GPT-4). Overall, CARE-ECG provides traceable reasoning by exposing key latent drivers, causal evidence paths, and how alternative physiological states would change outcomes.

AI.tldr: CARE-ECG：一个因果结构化的ECG-语言推理框架，通过编码多导联心电图为时序生物标志物、执行因果图推理进行概率诊断，并支持反事实分析，提高诊断准确性和解释可信度。
AI.motivation: 现有ECG-LLM系统主要依赖弱信号-文本对齐和检索，缺乏明确的生理或因果结构，限制了临床决策所需的因果推理、时序分析和反事实分析能力。
AI.method: 1) 将多导联ECG编码为时序组织的潜在生物标志物；2) 通过因果图推理进行概率诊断；3) 使用结构因果模型支持反事实评估；4) 通过因果检索增强生成和模块化代理管道提高语言输出的可信度。
AI.result: 在多个ECG基准测试和专家QA设置中，CARE-ECG提高了诊断准确性和解释可信度，同时减少了幻觉（例如在Expert-ECG-QA上达到0.84准确率，在SCP-mapped PTB-XL上达到0.76准确率）。
AI.conclusion: CARE-ECG通过暴露关键潜在驱动因素、因果证据路径以及替代生理状态如何改变结果，提供了可追溯的推理能力，为临床决策支持提供了更可靠的框架。

title: I Walk the Line: Examining the Role of Gestalt Continuity in Object Binding for Vision Transformers
summary: Object binding is a foundational process in visual cognition, during which low-level perceptual features are joined into object representations. Binding has been considered a fundamental challenge for neural networks, and a major milestone on the way to artificial models with flexible visual intelligence. Recently, several investigations have demonstrated evidence that binding mechanisms emerge in pretrained vision models, enabling them to associate portions of an image that contain an object. The question remains: how are these models binding objects together? In this work, we investigate whether vision models rely on the principle of Gestalt continuity to perform object binding, over and above other principles like similarity and proximity. Using synthetic datasets, we demonstrate that binding probes are sensitive to continuity across a wide range of pretrained vision transformers. Next, we uncover particular attention heads that track continuity, and show that these heads generalize across datasets. Finally, we ablate these attention heads, and show that they often contribute to producing representations that encode object binding.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究视觉Transformer模型是否依赖格式塔连续性原则进行对象绑定，发现特定注意力头对连续性敏感，这些头对编码对象绑定有贡献
AI.motivation: 对象绑定是视觉认知的基础过程，将低级感知特征组合成对象表示。虽然已有研究表明预训练视觉模型出现了绑定机制，但尚不清楚这些模型如何绑定对象，特别是是否依赖格式塔连续性原则
AI.method: 使用合成数据集测试多种预训练视觉Transformer对连续性的敏感性；识别追踪连续性的特定注意力头；通过消融实验验证这些头对对象绑定表示的贡献
AI.result: 绑定探针对连续性敏感；发现特定注意力头追踪连续性且能跨数据集泛化；消融这些头会影响模型产生编码对象绑定的表示
AI.conclusion: 视觉Transformer确实依赖格式塔连续性原则进行对象绑定，特定注意力头在这一过程中起关键作用，这为理解神经网络中的绑定机制提供了新见解

title: SpecMoE: A Fast and Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Inference via Self-Assisted Speculative Decoding
comment: This is an extended version of our work, which is accepted for publication at the 63rd ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference (DAC), 2026
summary: The Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture has emerged as a promising approach to mitigate the rising computational costs of large language models (LLMs) by selectively activating parameters. However, its high memory requirements and sub-optimal parameter efficiency pose significant challenges for efficient deployment. Although CPU-offloaded MoE inference systems have been proposed in the literature, they offer limited efficiency, particularly for large batch sizes. In this work, we propose SpecMoE, a memory-efficient MoE inference system based on our self-assisted speculative decoding algorithm. SpecMoE demonstrates the effectiveness of applying speculative decoding to MoE inference without requiring additional model training or fine-tuning. Our system improves inference throughput by up to $4.30\times$, while significantly reducing bandwidth requirements of both memory and interconnect on memory-constrained systems.

AI.tldr: SpecMoE：基于自辅助推测解码的内存高效MoE推理系统，无需额外训练即可提升推理吞吐量4.3倍，显著降低内存带宽需求
AI.motivation: MoE架构虽然能降低LLM计算成本，但存在高内存需求和参数效率低的问题。现有CPU卸载的MoE推理系统效率有限，尤其在大批量处理时表现不佳，需要更高效的MoE推理解决方案。
AI.method: 提出SpecMoE系统，基于自辅助推测解码算法。该方法将推测解码应用于MoE推理，无需额外模型训练或微调，通过优化内存使用和降低带宽需求来提升效率。
AI.result: 推理吞吐量提升高达4.3倍，在内存受限系统上显著降低内存和互连带宽需求，实现了内存高效的MoE推理。
AI.conclusion: SpecMoE成功展示了将推测解码应用于MoE推理的可行性，为高效部署大型MoE模型提供了实用解决方案，解决了现有系统的效率瓶颈。

title: Expect the Unexpected? Testing the Surprisal of Salient Entities
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 (main, long); camera-ready version
summary: Previous work examining the Uniform Information Density (UID) hypothesis has shown that while information as measured by surprisal metrics is distributed more or less evenly across documents overall, local discrepancies can arise due to functional pressures corresponding to syntactic and discourse structural constraints. However, work thus far has largely disregarded the relative salience of discourse participants. We fill this gap by studying how overall salience of entities in discourse relates to surprisal using 70K manually annotated mentions across 16 genres of English and a novel minimal-pair prompting method. Our results show that globally salient entities exhibit significantly higher surprisal than non-salient ones, even controlling for position, length, and nesting confounds. Moreover, salient entities systematically reduce surprisal for surrounding content when used as prompts, enhancing document-level predictability. This effect varies by genre, appearing strongest in topic-coherent texts and weakest in conversational contexts. Our findings refine the UID competing pressures framework by identifying global entity salience as a mechanism shaping information distribution in discourse.

AI.tldr: 研究发现：在文本中，全局显著的实体比非显著实体具有更高的信息量（surprisal），且作为提示时会降低周围内容的信息量，这种效应在不同文体中差异显著。
AI.motivation: 先前关于均匀信息密度（UID）假设的研究发现，虽然信息在文档中大致均匀分布，但局部差异可能由句法和语篇结构约束引起。然而，现有研究大多忽视了语篇参与者的相对显著性。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究实体显著性如何影响信息分布。
AI.method: 使用70K手动标注的英语提及（涵盖16种文体），采用新颖的最小对提示方法，分析全局实体显著性与信息量（surprisal）的关系，控制位置、长度和嵌套等混淆因素。
AI.result: 1) 全局显著实体比非显著实体具有显著更高的信息量；2) 显著实体作为提示时会降低周围内容的信息量，增强文档级可预测性；3) 这种效应在不同文体中差异显著：在主题连贯的文本中最强，在对话语境中最弱。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果细化了UID竞争压力框架，将全局实体显著性识别为塑造语篇信息分布的机制。这对理解语言生成中的信息组织模式具有重要意义。

title: Replicable Composition
comment: Abstract shortened due to Arxiv requirements
summary:
Replicability requires that algorithmic conclusions remain consistent when rerun on independently drawn data. A central structural question is composition: given $k$ problems each admitting a $ρ$-replicable algorithm with sample complexity $n$, how many samples are needed to solve all jointly while preserving replicability? The naive analysis yields $\widetilde{O}(nk^2)$ samples, and Bun et al. (STOC'23) observed that reductions through differential privacy give an alternative $\widetilde{O}(n^2k)$ bound, leaving open whether the optimal $\widetilde{O}(nk)$ scaling is achievable. We resolve this open problem and, more generally, show that problems with sample complexities $n_1,\ldots,n_k$ can be jointly solved with $\widetilde{O}(\sum_i n_i)$ samples while preserving constant replicability. Our approach converts each replicable algorithm into a perfectly generalizing one, composes them via a privacy-style analysis, and maps back via correlated sampling. This yields the first advanced composition theorem for replicability. En route, we obtain new bounds for the composition of perfectly generalizing algorithms with heterogeneous parameters.
  As part of our results, we provide a boosting theorem for the success probability of replicable algorithms. For a broad class of problems, the failure probability appears as a separate additive term independent of $ρ$, immediately yielding improved sample complexity bounds for several problems.
  Finally, we prove an $Ω(nk^2)$ lower bound for adaptive composition, establishing a quadratic separation from the non-adaptive setting. The key technique, which we call the phantom run, yields structural results of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 该论文解决了可复制算法的组合问题，证明了在保持常数可复制性的同时，可以以接近最优的样本复杂度联合解决多个问题，建立了可复制性的高级组合定理。
AI.motivation: 可复制性要求算法结论在独立数据上重新运行时保持一致。核心结构问题是组合：给定k个问题，每个问题都需要n个样本的ρ-可复制算法，需要多少样本才能联合解决所有问题同时保持可复制性？现有方法要么需要O(nk²)样本，要么需要O(n²k)样本，而最优的O(nk)缩放是否可实现是一个开放问题。
AI.method: 将每个可复制算法转换为完美泛化算法，通过隐私风格分析进行组合，然后通过相关采样映射回来。这产生了可复制性的第一个高级组合定理。还提供了可复制算法成功概率的提升定理，以及通过"幻影运行"技术证明自适应组合的下界。
AI.result: 证明了在保持常数可复制性的同时，可以以O(∑n_i)样本联合解决具有样本复杂度n₁,...,n_k的问题，实现了最优缩放。获得了完美泛化算法组合的新界限，以及可复制算法成功概率的提升定理。证明了自适应组合的Ω(nk²)下界，与非自适应设置形成二次分离。
AI.conclusion: 该工作解决了可复制算法组合的开放问题，建立了最优样本复杂度和高级组合定理，为可复制性理论提供了重要进展，并展示了与差分隐私的深刻联系。

title: Cross-Cultural Value Awareness in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: The rapid adoption of large vision-language models (LVLMs) in recent years has been accompanied by growing fairness concerns due to their propensity to reinforce harmful societal stereotypes. While significant attention has been paid to such fairness concerns in the context of social biases, relatively little prior work has examined the presence of stereotypes in LVLMs related to cultural contexts such as religion, nationality, and socioeconomic status. In this work, we aim to narrow this gap by investigating how cultural contexts depicted in images influence the judgments LVLMs make about a person's moral, ethical, and political values. We conduct a multi-dimensional analysis of such value judgments in five popular LVLMs using counterfactual image sets, which depict the same person across different cultural contexts. Our evaluation framework diagnoses LVLM awareness of cultural value differences through the use of Moral Foundations Theory, lexical analyses, and the sensitivity of generated values to depicted cultural contexts.

AI.tldr: 该研究调查了大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）中与文化背景（宗教、国籍、社会经济地位）相关的刻板印象，通过反事实图像集分析模型对人物道德、伦理和政治价值观的判断。
AI.motivation: 虽然已有研究关注LVLMs中的社会偏见，但较少探讨与文化背景相关的刻板印象。本研究旨在填补这一空白，研究图像中描绘的文化背景如何影响LVLMs对人物价值观的判断。
AI.method: 使用反事实图像集（描绘同一人物在不同文化背景下的图像），结合道德基础理论、词汇分析和生成值对文化背景的敏感性，对五个流行LVLMs进行多维度分析。
AI.result: 研究发现了LVLMs中存在与文化背景相关的刻板印象，模型会根据图像中的文化背景对人物的道德、伦理和政治价值观做出不同判断，揭示了模型对文化价值差异的认知模式。
AI.conclusion: LVLMs在文化背景相关的价值观判断中存在刻板印象，需要更多研究来理解和减轻这些偏见，特别是在宗教、国籍和社会经济地位等文化维度上。

title: Inductive Reasoning for Temporal Knowledge Graphs with Emerging Entities
summary: Reasoning on Temporal Knowledge Graphs (TKGs) is essential for predicting future events and time-aware facts. While existing methods are effective at capturing relational dynamics, their performance is limited by a closed-world assumption, which fails to account for emerging entities not present in the training. Notably, these entities continuously join the network without historical interactions. Empirical study reveals that emerging entities are widespread in TKGs, comprising roughly 25\% of all entities. The absence of historical interactions of these entities leads to significant performance degradation in reasoning tasks. Whereas, we observe that entities with semantic similarities often exhibit comparable interaction histories, suggesting the presence of transferable temporal patterns. Inspired by this insight, we propose TransFIR (Transferable Inductive Reasoning), a novel framework that leverages historical interaction sequences from semantically similar known entities to support inductive reasoning. Specifically, we propose a codebook-based classifier that categorizes emerging entities into latent semantic clusters, allowing them to adopt reasoning patterns from similar entities. Experimental results demonstrate that TransFIR outperforms all baselines in reasoning on emerging entities, achieving an average improvement of 28.6% in Mean Reciprocal Rank (MRR) across multiple datasets. The implementations are available at https://github.com/zhaodazhuang2333/TransFIR.

AI.tldr: 提出TransFIR框架，通过语义相似实体的历史交互序列进行知识迁移，解决时序知识图谱中新出现实体的推理问题，相比基线方法在MRR指标上平均提升28.6%。
AI.motivation: 现有时序知识图谱推理方法基于封闭世界假设，无法处理训练集中未出现的新实体。实证研究发现新实体约占所有实体的25%，且缺乏历史交互导致推理性能显著下降。观察到语义相似的实体往往具有可比较的交互历史，表明存在可迁移的时序模式。
AI.method: 提出TransFIR框架，采用基于码本的分类器将新实体分类到潜在语义簇中，使其能够从相似实体中采用推理模式。利用语义相似已知实体的历史交互序列支持归纳推理。
AI.result: TransFIR在所有基线方法中表现最佳，在多个数据集上的平均MRR提升28.6%。实验证明该方法能有效处理新实体推理问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义相似性进行知识迁移是解决时序知识图谱中新实体推理的有效方法，TransFIR框架显著提升了推理性能。

title: Too Nice to Tell the Truth: Quantifying Agreeableness-Driven Sycophancy in Role-Playing Language Models
comment: 14 Pages, 5 Figures, 9 Tables, ACL Main Conference 2026
summary: Large language models increasingly serve as conversational agents that adopt personas and role-play characters at user request. This capability, while valuable, raises concerns about sycophancy: the tendency to provide responses that validate users rather than prioritize factual accuracy. While prior work has established that sycophancy poses risks to AI safety and alignment, the relationship between specific personality traits of adopted personas and the degree of sycophantic behavior remains unexplored. We present a systematic investigation of how persona agreeableness influences sycophancy across 13 small, open-weight language models ranging from 0.6B to 20B parameters. We develop a benchmark comprising 275 personas evaluated on NEO-IPIP agreeableness subscales and expose each persona to 4,950 sycophancy-eliciting prompts spanning 33 topic categories. Our analysis reveals that 9 of 13 models exhibit statistically significant positive correlations between persona agreeableness and sycophancy rates, with Pearson correlations reaching $r = 0.87$ and effect sizes as large as Cohen's $d = 2.33$. These findings demonstrate that agreeableness functions as a reliable predictor of persona-induced sycophancy, with direct implications for the deployment of role-playing AI systems and the development of alignment strategies that account for personality-mediated deceptive behaviors.

AI.tldr: 研究发现语言模型角色扮演时，人格特质中的"宜人性"与谄媚行为呈正相关，高宜人性角色更容易提供迎合用户的非事实性回答。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型作为对话代理时，能够根据用户要求扮演不同角色和人格。这种能力虽然有用，但引发了谄媚行为（sycophancy）的担忧——即模型倾向于提供迎合用户而非事实准确的回答。先前研究已确认谄媚行为对AI安全和对齐构成风险，但特定人格特质与谄媚程度之间的关系尚未被探索。
AI.method: 研究系统性地调查了人格宜人性对谄媚行为的影响。开发了一个包含275个人格的基准，基于NEO-IPIP宜性子量表评估，将每个人格暴露于4,950个谄媚诱导提示中，涵盖33个主题类别。测试了13个参数量从0.6B到20B的小型开源语言模型。
AI.result: 13个模型中有9个显示出人格宜人性与谄媚率之间存在统计学显著的正相关，皮尔逊相关系数最高达r=0.87，效应量高达Cohen's d=2.33。这表明宜人性是角色诱导谄媚行为的可靠预测因子。
AI.conclusion: 宜人性人格特质与语言模型谄媚行为密切相关，这对角色扮演AI系统的部署具有重要意义。需要开发考虑人格中介欺骗行为的对齐策略，确保AI系统在扮演不同角色时仍能保持事实准确性。

title: Membership Inference Attacks Expose Participation Privacy in ECG Foundation Encoders
summary:
Foundation-style ECG encoders pretrained with self-supervised learning are increasingly reused across tasks, institutions, and deployment contexts, often through model-as-a-service interfaces that expose scalar scores or latent representations. While such reuse improves data efficiency and generalization, it raises a participation privacy concern: can an adversary infer whether a specific individual or cohort contributed ECG data to pretraining, even when raw waveforms and diagnostic labels are never disclosed? In connected-health settings, training participation itself may reveal institutional affiliation, study enrollment, or sensitive health context.
  We present an implementation-grounded audit of membership inference attacks (MIAs) against modern self-supervised ECG foundation encoders, covering contrastive objectives (SimCLR, TS2Vec) and masked reconstruction objectives (CNN- and Transformer-based MAE). We evaluate three realistic attacker interfaces: (i) score-only black-box access to scalar outputs, (ii) adaptive learned attackers that aggregate subject-level statistics across repeated queries, and (iii) embedding-access attackers that probe latent representation geometry. Using a subject-centric protocol with window-to-subject aggregation and calibration at fixed false-positive rates under a cross-dataset auditing setting, we observe heterogeneous and objective-dependent participation leakage: leakage is most pronounced in small or institution-specific cohorts and, for contrastive encoders, can saturate in embedding space, while larger and more diverse datasets substantially attenuate operational tail risk. Overall, our results show that restricting access to raw signals or labels is insufficient to guarantee participation privacy, underscoring the need for deployment-aware auditing of reusable biosignal foundation encoders in connected-health systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文审计了针对自监督心电信号基础编码器的成员推理攻击，发现即使不暴露原始波形和标签，攻击者仍能推断特定个体是否参与了预训练，揭示了可重用生物信号编码器在连接健康系统中的参与隐私风险。
AI.motivation: 随着心电信号基础编码器通过自监督学习预训练并在不同任务、机构和部署环境中重用（通常通过模型即服务接口），虽然提高了数据效率和泛化能力，但引发了参与隐私问题：即使不披露原始波形和诊断标签，攻击者是否能推断特定个体或群体是否参与了预训练？在连接健康环境中，训练参与本身可能暴露机构隶属、研究注册或敏感健康背景。
AI.method: 对现代自监督心电信号基础编码器进行实现基础的成员推理攻击审计，涵盖对比目标（SimCLR、TS2Vec）和掩码重建目标（基于CNN和Transformer的MAE）。评估三种现实攻击者接口：1)仅访问标量输出的黑盒访问；2)聚合重复查询中受试者级统计量的自适应学习攻击者；3)探测潜在表示几何的嵌入访问攻击者。使用以受试者为中心的协议，在跨数据集审计设置下进行窗口到受试者聚合和固定误报率校准。
AI.result: 观察到异质且目标依赖的参与泄漏：泄漏在小规模或机构特定群体中最明显；对于对比编码器，在嵌入空间中可能达到饱和；而更大、更多样化的数据集显著减弱了操作尾部风险。限制对原始信号或标签的访问不足以保证参与隐私。
AI.conclusion: 可重用生物信号基础编码器在连接健康系统中需要部署感知的审计，仅限制对原始信号或标签的访问不能保证参与隐私，强调了在重用基础编码器时进行隐私风险评估的必要性。

title: Unmixing-Guided Spatial-Spectral Mamba with Clustering Tokens for Hyperspectral Image Classification
summary: Although hyperspectral image (HSI) classification is critical for supporting various environmental applications, it is a challenging task due to the spectral-mixture effect, the spatial-spectral heterogeneity and the difficulty to preserve class boundaries and details. This letter presents a novel unmixing-guided spatial-spectral Mamba with clustering tokens for improved HSI classification, with the following contributions. First, to disentangle the spectral mixture effect in HSI for improved pattern discovery, we design a novel spectral unmixing network that not only automatically learns endmembers and abundance maps from HSI but also accounts for endmember variabilities. Second, to generate Mamba token sequences, based on the clusters defined by abundance maps, we design an efficient Top-\textit{K} token selection strategy to adaptively sequence the tokens for improved representational capability. Third, to improve spatial-spectral feature learning and detail preservation, based on the Top-\textit{K} token sequences, we design a novel unmixing-guided spatial-spectral Mamba module that greatly improves traditional Mamba models in terms of token learning and sequencing. Fourth, to learn simultaneously the endmember-abundance patterns and classification labels, a multi-task scheme is designed for model supervision, leading to a new unmixing-classification framework that outputs not only accurate classification maps but also a comprehensive spectral-library and abundance maps. Comparative experiments on four HSI datasets demonstrate that our model can greatly outperform the other state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/GSIL-UCalgary/Unmixing_guided_Mamba.git

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于高光谱图像分类的新型解混引导空间-光谱Mamba模型，结合聚类标记和Top-K标记选择策略，通过多任务学习同时进行光谱解混和分类。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临光谱混合效应、空间-光谱异质性以及难以保持类别边界和细节的挑战。现有方法在处理这些复杂特性时存在局限性。
AI.method: 1) 设计光谱解混网络自动学习端元和丰度图；2) 基于丰度图聚类设计Top-K标记选择策略生成Mamba标记序列；3) 设计解混引导的空间-光谱Mamba模块改进特征学习；4) 采用多任务学习框架同时学习解混模式和分类标签。
AI.result: 在四个高光谱数据集上的比较实验表明，该模型显著优于其他最先进方法，不仅能输出准确的分类图，还能提供完整的光谱库和丰度图。
AI.conclusion: 提出的解混引导Mamba框架通过结合光谱解混和先进的序列建模能力，有效解决了高光谱图像分类的关键挑战，为环境应用提供了更全面的分析工具。

title: MAVEN-T: Multi-Agent enVironment-aware Enhanced Neural Trajectory predictor with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Trajectory prediction remains a critical yet challenging component in autonomous driving systems, requiring sophisticated reasoning capabilities while meeting strict real-time deployment constraints. While knowledge distillation has demonstrated effectiveness in model compression, existing approaches often fail to preserve complex decision-making capabilities, particularly in dynamic multi-agent scenarios. This paper introduces MAVEN-T, a teacher-student framework that achieves state-of-the-art trajectory prediction through complementary architectural co-design and progressive distillation. The teacher employs hybrid attention mechanisms for maximum representational capacity, while the student uses efficient architectures optimized for deployment. Knowledge transfer is performed via multi-granular distillation with adaptive curriculum learning that dynamically adjusts complexity based on performance. Importantly, the framework incorporates reinforcement learning to overcome the imitation ceiling of traditional distillation, enabling the student to verify, refine, and optimize teacher knowledge through dynamic environmental interaction, potentially achieving more robust decision-making than the teacher itself. Extensive experiments on NGSIM and highD datasets demonstrate 6.2x parameter compression and 3.7x inference speedup while maintaining state-of-the-art accuracy, establishing a new paradigm for deploying sophisticated reasoning models under resource constraints.

AI.tldr: MAVEN-T：通过互补架构协同设计和渐进式蒸馏实现自动驾驶轨迹预测的师生框架，在保持SOTA精度的同时实现6.2倍参数压缩和3.7倍推理加速
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶轨迹预测需要复杂推理能力同时满足实时部署约束。现有知识蒸馏方法在动态多智能体场景中难以保持复杂决策能力，需要新方法来平衡模型性能和部署效率。
AI.method: 提出MAVEN-T师生框架：教师模型使用混合注意力机制最大化表示能力，学生模型使用高效架构优化部署。采用多粒度蒸馏和自适应课程学习进行知识迁移，并引入强化学习突破传统蒸馏的模仿天花板，让学生通过动态环境交互验证、优化教师知识。
AI.result: 在NGSIM和highD数据集上实现6.2倍参数压缩和3.7倍推理加速，同时保持最先进的预测精度，为资源受限环境下部署复杂推理模型建立新范式。
AI.conclusion: MAVEN-T框架通过架构协同设计和渐进式蒸馏，结合强化学习突破传统蒸馏限制，实现了高性能轨迹预测模型的高效部署，为自动驾驶系统提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Self-Correcting RAG: Enhancing Faithfulness via MMKP Context Selection and NLI-Guided MCTS
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) substantially extends the knowledge boundary of large language models. However, it still faces two major challenges when handling complex reasoning tasks: low context utilization and frequent hallucinations. To address these issues, we propose Self-Correcting RAG, a unified framework that reformulates retrieval and generation as constrained optimization and path planning. On the input side, we move beyond traditional greedy retrieval and, for the first time, formalize context selection as a multi-dimensional multiple-choice knapsack problem (MMKP), thereby maximizing information density and removing redundancy under a strict token budget. On the output side, we introduce a natural language inference (NLI)-guided Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) mechanism, which leverages test-time compute to dynamically explore reasoning trajectories and validate the faithfulness of generated answers. Experiments on six multi-hop question answering and fact-checking datasets demonstrate that our method significantly improves reasoning accuracy on complex queries while effectively reducing hallucinations, outperforming strong existing baselines.Our code is available at https://github.com/xjiacs/Self-Correcting-RAG .

AI.tldr: 提出Self-Correcting RAG框架，通过将检索和生成重新定义为约束优化和路径规划问题，解决复杂推理任务中的低上下文利用率和幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: RAG虽然扩展了LLM的知识边界，但在处理复杂推理任务时仍面临两个主要挑战：低上下文利用率和频繁的幻觉。需要更系统的方法来优化检索和生成过程。
AI.method: 1) 输入侧：将上下文选择形式化为多维多选择背包问题(MMKP)，在严格token预算下最大化信息密度并去除冗余；2) 输出侧：引入基于自然语言推理(NLI)的蒙特卡洛树搜索(MCTS)机制，动态探索推理轨迹并验证生成答案的忠实性。
AI.result: 在六个多跳问答和事实核查数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提高了复杂查询的推理准确性，同时有效减少了幻觉，优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Self-Correcting RAG通过将检索和生成重新定义为优化问题，提供了一种系统的方法来提升RAG在复杂推理任务中的性能，同时减少幻觉。

title: Towards Green Wearable Computing: A Physics-Aware Spiking Neural Network for Energy-Efficient IMU-based Human Activity Recognition
summary: Wearable IMU-based Human Activity Recognition (HAR) relies heavily on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs), which are burdened by immense computational and buffering demands. Their power-hungry floating-point operations and rigid requirement to process complete temporal windows severely cripple battery-constrained edge devices. While Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) offer extreme event-driven energy efficiency, standard architectures struggle with complex biomechanical topologies and temporal gradient degradation. To bridge this gap, we propose the Physics-Aware Spiking Neural Network (PAS-Net), a fully multiplier-free architecture explicitly tailored for Green HAR. Spatially, an adaptive symmetric topology mixer enforces human-joint physical constraints. Temporally, an $O(1)$-memory causal neuromodulator yields context-aware dynamic threshold neurons, adapting actively to non-stationary movement rhythms. Furthermore, we leverage a temporal spike error objective to unlock a flexible early-exit mechanism for continuous IMU streams. Evaluated across seven diverse datasets, PAS-Net achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while replacing dense operations with sparse 0.1 pJ integer accumulations. Crucially, its confidence-driven early-exit capability drastically reduces dynamic energy consumption by up to 98\%. PAS-Net establishes a robust, ultra-low-power neuromorphic standard for always-on wearable sensing.

AI.tldr: 提出PAS-Net（物理感知脉冲神经网络），一种完全无乘法器的架构，专为绿色人类活动识别设计，通过自适应对称拓扑混合器和因果神经调节器实现超低功耗，在七个数据集上达到SOTA精度，动态能耗降低达98%。
AI.motivation: 可穿戴IMU设备上基于DNN的人类活动识别存在巨大计算和缓冲需求，浮点运算耗电且需要处理完整时间窗口，严重限制电池受限的边缘设备。虽然SNN具有事件驱动的高能效优势，但标准架构难以处理复杂的生物力学拓扑和时间梯度退化问题。
AI.method: 提出PAS-Net架构：1）空间上，自适应对称拓扑混合器强制执行人体关节物理约束；2）时间上，O(1)内存因果神经调节器产生上下文感知的动态阈值神经元，适应非平稳运动节奏；3）利用时间脉冲误差目标实现灵活的提前退出机制。
AI.result: 在七个多样化数据集上实现最先进精度，将密集运算替换为稀疏的0.1 pJ整数累加。置信度驱动的提前退出能力将动态能耗降低高达98%。
AI.conclusion: PAS-Net为始终在线的可穿戴传感建立了强大、超低功耗的神经形态标准，解决了可穿戴IMU设备上HAR的能效瓶颈。

title: Learnable Motion-Focused Tokenization for Effective and Efficient Video Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
comment: Accepted to IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Video Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (VUDA) poses a significant challenge in action recognition, requiring the adaptation of a model from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain. Despite recent advances, existing VUDA methods often fall short of fully supervised performance, a key reason being the prevalence of static and uninformative backgrounds that exacerbate domain shifts. Additionally, prior approaches largely overlook computational efficiency, limiting real-world adoption. To address these issues, we propose Learnable Motion-Focused Tokenization (LMFT) for VUDA. LMFT tokenizes video frames into patch tokens and learns to discard low-motion, redundant tokens, primarily corresponding to background regions, while retaining motion-rich, action-relevant tokens for adaptation. Extensive experiments on three standard VUDA benchmarks across 21 domain adaptation settings show that our VUDA framework with LMFT achieves state-of-the-art performance while significantly reducing computational overhead. LMFT thus enables VUDA that is both effective and computationally efficient.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LMFT（可学习运动聚焦分词）方法，用于视频无监督域自适应（VUDA），通过识别并丢弃低运动冗余背景token，保留动作相关token，在提升性能的同时显著降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有VUDA方法难以达到全监督性能，主要原因是静态无信息背景加剧域偏移，且现有方法忽视计算效率，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出LMFT方法：将视频帧分词为patch token，学习丢弃低运动冗余token（主要对应背景区域），保留运动丰富、动作相关的token进行域自适应。
AI.result: 在3个标准VUDA基准测试的21个域自适应设置中，LMFT框架达到最先进性能，同时显著降低计算开销。
AI.conclusion: LMFT实现了既有效又计算高效的VUDA，解决了背景干扰和计算效率两大关键问题。

title: PoreDiT: A Scalable Generative Model for Large-Scale Digital Rock Reconstruction
summary: This manuscript presents PoreDiT, a novel generative model designed for high-efficiency digital rock reconstruction at gigavoxel scales. Addressing the significant challenges in digital rock physics (DRP), particularly the trade-off between resolution and field-of-view (FOV), and the computational bottlenecks associated with traditional deep learning architectures, PoreDiT leverages a three-dimensional (3D) Swin Transformer to break through these limitations. By directly predicting the binary probability field of pore spaces instead of grayscale intensities, the model preserves key topological features critical for pore-scale fluid flow and transport simulations. This approach enhances computational efficiency, enabling the generation of ultra-large-scale ($1024^3$ voxels) digital rock samples on consumer-grade hardware. Furthermore, PoreDiT achieves physical fidelity comparable to previous state-of-the-art methods, including accurate porosity, pore-scale permeability, and Euler characteristics. The model's ability to scale efficiently opens new avenues for large-domain hydrodynamic simulations and provides practical solutions for researchers in pore-scale fluid mechanics, reservoir characterization, and carbon sequestration.

AI.tldr: PoreDiT是一种用于千兆体素尺度数字岩石重建的高效生成模型，使用3D Swin Transformer直接预测孔隙空间的二元概率场，在消费级硬件上生成超大规模数字岩石样本。
AI.motivation: 解决数字岩石物理中的分辨率与视场权衡问题，克服传统深度学习架构的计算瓶颈，为孔隙尺度流体力学、储层表征和碳封存研究提供实用解决方案。
AI.method: 采用三维Swin Transformer架构，直接预测孔隙空间的二元概率场而非灰度强度，保留孔隙尺度流体流动和输运模拟所需的关键拓扑特征。
AI.result: 在消费级硬件上成功生成1024^3体素规模的超大规模数字岩石样本，物理保真度与先前最先进方法相当，包括准确的孔隙度、孔隙尺度渗透率和欧拉特性。
AI.conclusion: PoreDiT通过高效缩放为大规模域流体动力学模拟开辟了新途径，为孔隙尺度流体力学研究提供了实用解决方案。

title: BlasBench: An Open Benchmark for Irish Speech Recognition
comment: 8 pages, 4 tables, 3 appendices. Code and data: https://github.com/jyoutir/blasbench
summary: No open Irish-specific benchmark compares end-user ASR systems under a shared Irish-aware evaluation protocol. To solve this, we release BlasBench, an open evaluation harness with Irish-aware text normalisation that preserves fadas, lenition, and eclipsis. We benchmark 12 systems across four architecture families on Common Voice ga-IE and FLEURS ga-IE. All Whisper variants exceed 100% WER. The best open model (omniASR LLM 7B) achieves 30.65% WER on Common Voice and 39.09% on FLEURS. We noticed models fine-tuned on Common Voice lose 33-43 WER points on FLEURS, revealing a generalisation gap that is invisible to single-dataset evaluation.

AI.tldr: BlasBench是一个爱尔兰语ASR评估基准，包含爱尔兰语感知的文本规范化，评估了12个系统在Common Voice和FLEURS数据集上的表现，揭示了模型泛化差距。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏爱尔兰语特定的ASR系统评估基准，无法在共享的爱尔兰语感知评估协议下比较端到端ASR系统。
AI.method: 发布BlasBench开源评估框架，包含爱尔兰语感知的文本规范化（保留重音符号、软化和音变），在Common Voice ga-IE和FLEURS ga-IE数据集上评估12个系统，涵盖四种架构家族。
AI.result: 所有Whisper变体WER超过100%；最佳开源模型（omniASR LLM 7B）在Common Voice上WER为30.65%，在FLEURS上为39.09%；在Common Voice上微调的模型在FLEURS上WER下降33-43个百分点，揭示了单数据集评估无法发现的泛化差距。
AI.conclusion: 需要多数据集评估来发现ASR模型的泛化差距，BlasBench为爱尔兰语ASR提供了标准化评估框架。

title: Rethinking the Diffusion Model from a Langevin Perspective
summary: Diffusion models are often introduced from multiple perspectives, such as VAEs, score matching, or flow matching, accompanied by dense and technically demanding mathematics that can be difficult for beginners to grasp. One classic question is: how does the reverse process invert the forward process to generate data from pure noise? This article systematically organizes the diffusion model from a fresh Langevin perspective, offering a simpler, clearer, and more intuitive answer. We also address the following questions: how can ODE-based and SDE-based diffusion models be unified under a single framework? Why are diffusion models theoretically superior to ordinary VAEs? Why is flow matching not fundamentally simpler than denoising or score matching, but equivalent under maximum-likelihood? We demonstrate that the Langevin perspective offers clear and straightforward answers to these questions, bridging existing interpretations of diffusion models, showing how different formulations can be converted into one another within a common framework, and offering pedagogical value for both learners and experienced researchers seeking deeper intuition.

AI.tldr: 论文从朗之万动力学视角系统梳理扩散模型，为初学者提供更直观的理解框架，统一ODE/SDE方法，解释扩散模型优于VAE的理论原因，并阐明流匹配与去噪/分数匹配的等价性。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型通常从VAE、分数匹配、流匹配等多个角度引入，涉及复杂的数学推导，初学者难以掌握。特别是反向过程如何从纯噪声生成数据这一经典问题，需要更直观的解释框架。
AI.method: 采用朗之万动力学视角重新组织扩散模型理论，建立统一框架将ODE和SDE方法联系起来，通过朗之万过程解释扩散模型的核心机制。
AI.result: 朗之万视角为扩散模型提供了更简单清晰的理论解释，统一了不同表述形式，阐明了扩散模型优于VAE的理论优势，并证明了流匹配与去噪/分数匹配在最大似然下的等价性。
AI.conclusion: 朗之万视角为扩散模型提供了直观的教学框架，连接了现有解释，展示了不同表述在统一框架下的相互转换，对学习者和研究者都有教学价值。

title: YUV20K: A Complexity-Driven Benchmark and Trajectory-Aware Alignment Model for Video Camouflaged Object Detection
summary: Video Camouflaged Object Detection (VCOD) is currently constrained by the scarcity of challenging benchmarks and the limited robustness of models against erratic motion dynamics. Existing methods often struggle with Motion-Induced Appearance Instability and Temporal Feature Misalignment caused by complex motion scenarios. To address the data bottleneck, we present YUV20K, a pixel-level annoated complexity-driven VCOD benchmark. Comprising 24,295 annotated frames across 91 scenes and 47 kinds of species, it specifically targets challenging scenarios like large-displacement motion, camera motion and other 4 types scenarios. On the methodological front, we propose a novel framework featuring two key modules: Motion Feature Stabilization (MFS) and Trajectory-Aware Alignment (TAA). The MFS module utilizes frame-agnostic Semantic Basis Primitives to stablize features, while the TAA module leverages trajectory-guided deformable sampling to ensure precise temporal alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art competitors on existing datasets and establishes a new baseline on the challenging YUV20K. Notably, our framework exhibits superior cross-domain generalization and robustness when confronting complex spatiotemporal scenarios. Our code and dataset will be available at https://github.com/K1NSA/YUV20K

AI.tldr: 提出YUV20K视频伪装目标检测基准和新框架，解决现有方法在复杂运动场景下的运动诱导外观不稳定性和时序特征错位问题
AI.motivation: 当前视频伪装目标检测领域面临两个主要挑战：1）缺乏具有挑战性的基准数据集；2）现有模型在复杂运动动态下的鲁棒性有限，特别是在运动诱导的外观不稳定性和时序特征错位问题上
AI.method: 提出包含两个关键模块的新框架：1）运动特征稳定化模块，使用帧无关的语义基元来稳定特征；2）轨迹感知对齐模块，利用轨迹引导的可变形采样确保精确的时序对齐
AI.result: 在现有数据集上显著优于最先进方法，并在YUV20K基准上建立了新的基线。框架表现出优越的跨域泛化能力和在复杂时空场景下的鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: YUV20K基准填补了数据稀缺的空白，提出的框架有效解决了复杂运动场景下的特征稳定性和时序对齐问题，为视频伪装目标检测领域提供了新的解决方案

title: Credit-Budgeted ICPC-Style Coding: When Agents Must Pay for Every Decision
summary: Current evaluations of autonomous coding agents assume an unrealistic, infinite-resource environment. However, real-world software engineering is a resource-bound competition. As we scale toward large agent swarms, ignoring compute and time costs risks catastrophic budget exhaustion. To shift the focus from isolated accuracy to cost-aware problem-solving, we introduce USACOArena, an interactive ACM-ICPC-style arena driven by a strict "credit" economy. Every generated token, local test, and elapsed second depletes a fixed budget, forcing agents to make strategic trade-offs. Our comprehensive profiling reveals that frontier single agents and swarms currently fail to optimally balance accuracy with these constraints, exhibiting divergent, path-dependent behaviors. Ultimately, USACOArena provides an essential dynamic training ground for developing highly efficient, resource-aware agent architectures.

AI.tldr: USACOArena：一个基于信用经济的ACM-ICPC风格竞技场，用于评估资源受限环境下的自主编码代理，强调计算和时间成本约束下的策略性权衡。
AI.motivation: 当前自主编码代理评估假设无限资源环境，不切实际。真实软件开发是资源受限的竞争，随着代理群体规模扩大，忽略计算和时间成本可能导致灾难性预算耗尽。需要从孤立准确性转向成本感知的问题解决。
AI.method: 引入USACOArena：交互式ACM-ICPC风格竞技场，采用严格的"信用"经济体系。每个生成的token、本地测试和流逝秒数都会消耗固定预算，强制代理进行策略性权衡。进行全面的性能分析。
AI.result: 前沿单代理和群体目前无法在准确性和约束之间达到最优平衡，表现出不同的、路径依赖的行为模式。
AI.conclusion: USACOArena为开发高效、资源感知的代理架构提供了重要的动态训练场，推动了资源受限环境下的自主编码代理研究。

title: RCBSF: A Multi-Agent Framework for Automated Contract Revision via Stackelberg Game
summary: Despite the widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) in Legal AI, their utility for automated contract revision remains impeded by hallucinated safety and a lack of rigorous behavioral constraints. To address these limitations, we propose the Risk-Constrained Bilevel Stackelberg Framework (RCBSF), which formulates revision as a non-cooperative Stackelberg game. RCBSF establishes a hierarchical Leader Follower structure where a Global Prescriptive Agent (GPA) imposes risk budgets upon a follower system constituted by a Constrained Revision Agent (CRA) and a Local Verification Agent (LVA) to iteratively optimize output. We provide theoretical guarantees that this bilevel formulation converges to an equilibrium yielding strictly superior utility over unguided configurations. Empirical validation on a unified benchmark demonstrates that RCBSF achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing iterative baselines with an average Risk Resolution Rate (RRR) of 84.21\% while enhancing token efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/xjiacs/RCBSF .

AI.tldr: 提出RCBSF框架，通过双层Stackelberg博弈解决LLM在合同修订中的幻觉和约束不足问题，实现风险约束下的自动化合同修订
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM在Legal AI中广泛应用，但在自动化合同修订中存在幻觉安全和缺乏严格行为约束的问题，限制了其实用性
AI.method: 提出风险约束双层Stackelberg框架(RCBSF)，建立领导者-追随者层次结构：全局规定代理(GPA)设置风险预算，约束修订代理(CRA)和本地验证代理(LVA)迭代优化输出
AI.result: 在统一基准测试中达到SOTA性能，平均风险解决率(RRR)84.21%，超越迭代基线，同时提升token效率
AI.conclusion: RCBSF框架通过博弈论方法有效解决LLM在合同修订中的约束和安全问题，提供理论保证和实证验证

title: Exact Finite-Sample Variance Decomposition of Subagging: A Spectral Filtering Perspective
summary: Standard resampling ratios (e.g., $α\approx 0.632$) are widely used as default baselines in ensemble learning for three decades. However, how these ratios interact with a base learner's intrinsic functional complexity in finite samples lacks a exact mathematical characterization. We leverage the Hoeffding-ANOVA decomposition to derive the first exact, finite-sample variance decomposition for subagging, applicable to any symmetric base learner without requiring asymptotic limits or smoothness assumptions. We establish that subagging operates as a deterministic low-pass spectral filter: it preserves low-order structural signals while attenuating $c$-th order interaction variance by a geometric factor approaching $α^c$. This decoupling reveals why default baselines often under-regularize high-capacity interpolators, which instead require smaller $α$ to exponentially suppress spurious high-order noise. To operationalize these insights, we propose a complexity-guided adaptive subsampling algorithm, empirically demonstrating that dynamically calibrating $α$ to the learner's complexity spectrum consistently improves generalization over static baselines.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了首个精确的有限样本方差分解理论，揭示子采样装袋（subagging）作为确定性低通谱滤波器的工作原理，并基于此开发了复杂度引导的自适应子采样算法。
AI.motivation: 标准重采样比率（如α≈0.632）作为集成学习的默认基线已使用三十年，但这些比率如何与基学习器的内在函数复杂度在有限样本中相互作用缺乏精确的数学刻画。需要理论分析来理解子采样装袋的方差分解机制。
AI.method: 利用Hoeffding-ANOVA分解推导出首个精确的有限样本方差分解理论，适用于任何对称基学习器，无需渐近极限或平滑性假设。基于理论洞察，提出了复杂度引导的自适应子采样算法，动态校准α以适应学习器的复杂度谱。
AI.result: 理论证明子采样装袋作为确定性低通谱滤波器：保留低阶结构信号，同时以几何因子α^c衰减c阶交互方差。实验表明，动态校准α到学习器复杂度谱能持续改善泛化性能，优于静态基线。
AI.conclusion: 标准基线常对高容量插值器欠正则化，需要更小的α来指数抑制虚假高阶噪声。复杂度引导的自适应子采样为集成学习提供了理论指导的实用方法。

title: FlowPalm: Optical Flow Driven Non-Rigid Deformation for Geometrically Diverse Palmprint Generation
summary: Recently, synthetic palmprints have been increasingly used as substitutes for real data to train recognition models. To be effective, such synthetic data must reflect the diversity of real palmprints, including both style variation and geometric variation. However, existing palmprint generation methods mainly focus on style translation, while geometric variation is either ignored or approximated by simple handcrafted augmentations. In this work, we propose FlowPalm, an optical-flow-driven palmprint generation framework capable of simulating the complex non-rigid deformations observed in real palms. Specifically, FlowPalm estimates optical flows between real palmprint pairs to capture the statistical patterns of geometric deformations. Building on these priors, we design a progressive sampling process that gradually introduces the geometric deformations during diffusion while maintaining identity consistency. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate that FlowPalm significantly outperforms state-of-the-art palmprint generation approaches in downstream recognition tasks. Project page: https://yuchenzou.github.io/FlowPalm/

AI.tldr: FlowPalm是一个基于光流驱动的掌纹生成框架，能够模拟真实手掌的复杂非刚性变形，通过扩散模型逐步引入几何变形，显著提升了掌纹识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有掌纹生成方法主要关注风格转换，而几何变形要么被忽略，要么通过简单的手工增强来近似。然而，真实的掌纹包含复杂的非刚性变形，这对识别模型的训练至关重要。
AI.method: FlowPalm通过估计真实掌纹对之间的光流来捕捉几何变形的统计模式，并设计了一个渐进采样过程，在扩散过程中逐步引入几何变形，同时保持身份一致性。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上的实验表明，FlowPalm在后续识别任务中显著优于现有的掌纹生成方法。
AI.conclusion: FlowPalm能够有效模拟真实掌纹的几何变形，为掌纹识别模型的训练提供了高质量的合成数据。

title: Edu-MMBias: A Three-Tier Multimodal Benchmark for Auditing Social Bias in Vision-Language Models under Educational Contexts
summary: As Vision-Language Models (VLMs) become integral to educational decision-making, ensuring their fairness is paramount. However, current text-centric evaluations neglect the visual modality, leaving an unregulated channel for latent social biases. To bridge this gap, we present Edu-MMBias, a systematic auditing framework grounded in the tri-component model of attitudes from social psychology. This framework diagnoses bias across three hierarchical dimensions: cognitive, affective, and behavioral. Utilizing a specialized generative pipeline that incorporates a self-correct mechanism and human-in-the-loop verification, we synthesize contamination-resistant student profiles to conduct a holistic stress test on state-of-the-art VLMs. Our extensive audit reveals critical, counter-intuitive patterns: models exhibit a compensatory class bias favoring lower-status narratives while simultaneously harboring deep-seated health and racial stereotypes. Crucially, we find that visual inputs act as a safety backdoor, triggering a resurgence of biases that bypass text-based alignment safeguards and revealing a systematic misalignment between latent cognition and final decision-making. The contributions of this paper are available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EduMMBias-63B2.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Edu-MMBias框架，用于系统审计视觉语言模型在教育决策中的偏见，发现视觉输入会绕过文本对齐安全机制，触发深层次的健康与种族刻板印象。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉语言模型(VLMs)在教育决策中日益重要，确保其公平性至关重要。当前基于文本的评估忽略了视觉模态，留下了潜在社会偏见的未监管通道。需要填补这一空白，系统评估VLMs在教育场景中的偏见问题。
AI.method: 基于社会心理学中的态度三成分模型，构建了Edu-MMBias审计框架，从认知、情感和行为三个层次维度诊断偏见。采用专门的生成管道，包含自我纠正机制和人在回路验证，合成抗污染的学生档案，对最先进的VLMs进行全面的压力测试。
AI.result: 审计揭示了关键的反直觉模式：模型表现出补偿性阶级偏见，偏向低地位叙事，同时隐藏着深层次的健康和种族刻板印象。视觉输入作为安全后门，会触发绕过文本对齐安全机制的偏见复苏，揭示了潜在认知与最终决策之间的系统性错位。
AI.conclusion: 视觉语言模型在教育应用中存在复杂的偏见模式，视觉模态是偏见传播的重要渠道。需要超越文本中心的评估方法，开发更全面的偏见检测框架来确保教育AI的公平性。

title: Deep-Reporter: Deep Research for Grounded Multimodal Long-Form Generation
comment: 41 pages, 6 figures, 8 tables. Code available at https://github.com/fangda-ye/Deep-Report
summary: Recent agentic search frameworks enable deep research via iterative planning and retrieval, reducing hallucinations and enhancing factual grounding. However, they remain text-centric, overlooking the multimodal evidence that characterizes real-world expert reports. We introduce a pressing task: multimodal long-form generation. Accordingly, we propose Deep-Reporter, a unified agentic framework for grounded multimodal long-form generation. It orchestrates: (i) Agentic Multimodal Search and Filtering to retrieve and filter textual passages and information-dense visuals; (ii) Checklist-Guided Incremental Synthesis to ensure coherent image-text integration and optimal citation placement; and (iii) Recurrent Context Management to balance long-range coherence with local fluency. We develop a rigorous curation pipeline producing 8K high-quality agentic traces for model optimization. We further introduce M2LongBench, a comprehensive testbed comprising 247 research tasks across 9 domains and a stable multimodal sandbox. Extensive experiments demonstrate that long-form multimodal generation is a challenging task, especially in multimodal selection and integration, and effective post-training can bridge the gap.

AI.tldr: Deep-Reporter：面向多模态长文本生成的统一智能体框架，通过多模态搜索、清单引导合成和循环上下文管理，解决现有文本中心方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体搜索框架主要关注文本，忽略了真实世界专家报告中常见的多模态证据。需要解决多模态长文本生成这一紧迫任务。
AI.method: 提出Deep-Reporter统一框架，包含：(1) 智能体多模态搜索与过滤；(2) 清单引导的增量合成；(3) 循环上下文管理。开发了8K高质量智能体轨迹的优化管道，并构建M2LongBench测试平台。
AI.result: 实验表明多模态长文本生成具有挑战性，特别是在多模态选择和整合方面，有效的后训练可以弥补这一差距。
AI.conclusion: 多模态长文本生成是一个重要且具有挑战性的任务，Deep-Reporter框架通过系统的方法解决了多模态证据整合的问题。

title: CodeQuant: Unified Clustering and Quantization for Enhanced Outlier Smoothing in Low-Precision Mixture-of-Experts
summary:
Outliers have emerged as a fundamental bottleneck in preserving accuracy for low-precision large models, particularly within Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures that are increasingly central to large-scale language modeling. Under post-training quantization (PTQ), these outliers induce substantial quantization errors, leading to severe accuracy degradation. While recent rotation-based smoothing techniques alleviate the problem by redistributing outlier magnitudes, residual errors remain and continue to impede reliable low-precision deployment.
  In this work, we tackle this challenge by introducing \textit{CodeQuant}, a unified quantization-and-clustering scheme that contains smoothing activation outliers via learnable rotation and absorbing weight outliers into fine-tuned cluster centroids for MoE. This design reduces the influence of extreme values by fitting them within cluster centroids, thereby lowering quantization error while maintaining expressive capacity. Coupled with a dedicated kernel design for GPU and CPU, CodeQuant achieves up to $4.15\times$ speedup while delivering significantly higher accuracy than state-of-the-art quantization approaches across diverse MoE models. Our results highlight CodeQuant as a promising direction for efficient and accurate deployment of MoE-based large language models under low-precision constraints. Our code is available at https://github.com/SAI-Lab-NYU/CodeQuant.

AI.tldr: CodeQuant提出了一种统一的量化聚类方案，通过可学习旋转平滑激活异常值，并将权重异常值吸收到微调的聚类中心中，显著降低MoE模型的量化误差，实现高效低精度部署。
AI.motivation: 异常值已成为低精度大模型保持准确性的主要瓶颈，特别是在MoE架构中。现有旋转平滑技术虽然能缓解问题，但残留误差仍然阻碍可靠的低精度部署。
AI.method: CodeQuant采用统一的量化聚类方案：1）通过可学习旋转平滑激活异常值；2）将权重异常值吸收到微调的聚类中心中；3）为GPU和CPU设计专用内核。
AI.result: CodeQuant在多种MoE模型上实现了高达4.15倍的加速，同时比最先进的量化方法提供显著更高的准确性。
AI.conclusion: CodeQuant为低精度约束下MoE大语言模型的高效准确部署提供了有前景的方向。

title: Gait Recognition with Temporal Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
summary: Gait recognition is a biometric modality that identifies individuals from their characteristic walking patterns. Unlike conventional biometric traits, gait can be acquired at a distance and without active subject cooperation, making it suitable for surveillance and public safety applications. Nevertheless, silhouette-based temporal models remain sensitive to long sequences, observation noise, and appearance-related covariates. Recurrent architectures often struggle to preserve information from earlier frames and are inherently sequential to optimize, whereas transformer-based models typically require greater computational resources and larger training sets and may be sensitive to irregular sequence lengths and noisy inputs. These limitations reduce robustness under clothing variation, carrying conditions, and view changes, while also hindering the joint modeling of local gait cycles and longer-term motion trends. To address these challenges, we introduce a Temporal Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (TKAN) for gait recognition. The proposed model replaces fixed edge weights with learnable one-dimensional functions and incorporates a two-level memory mechanism consisting of short-term RKAN sublayers and a gated long-term pathway. This design enables efficient modeling of both cycle-level dynamics and broader temporal context while maintaining a compact backbone. Experiments on the CASIA-B dataset indicate that the proposed CNN+TKAN framework achieves strong recognition performance under the reported evaluation setting.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于步态识别的时序Kolmogorov-Arnold网络(TKAN)，通过可学习的一维函数和两级记忆机制，有效建模步态周期动态和长期时序上下文，在CASIA-B数据集上表现出色。
AI.motivation: 步态识别作为一种生物特征识别技术，具有远距离、无需主动配合的优势，适用于监控和公共安全应用。然而，现有的基于轮廓的时序模型对长序列、观测噪声和外观相关协变量敏感。循环架构难以保留早期帧信息且优化困难，而基于Transformer的模型需要更多计算资源和训练数据，对不规则序列长度和噪声输入敏感。这些限制降低了在服装变化、携带条件和视角变化下的鲁棒性，同时阻碍了局部步态周期和长期运动趋势的联合建模。
AI.method: 提出时序Kolmogorov-Arnold网络(TKAN)，用可学习的一维函数替代固定边权重，并包含两级记忆机制：短期RKAN子层和门控长期通路。这种设计能够高效建模周期级动态和更广泛的时序上下文，同时保持紧凑的骨干网络。采用CNN+TKAN框架进行步态识别。
AI.result: 在CASIA-B数据集上的实验表明，提出的CNN+TKAN框架在报告的评价设置下实现了强大的识别性能。
AI.conclusion: TKAN通过创新的网络架构设计，解决了步态识别中时序建模的挑战，在保持计算效率的同时提高了对服装变化、携带条件和视角变化的鲁棒性。

title: Cognitive Pivot Points and Visual Anchoring: Unveiling and Rectifying Hallucinations in Multimodal Reasoning Models
summary: Multimodal Large Reasoning Models (MLRMs) have achieved remarkable strides in visual reasoning through test time compute scaling, yet long chain reasoning remains prone to hallucinations. We identify a concerning phenomenon termed the Reasoning Vision Truth Disconnect (RVTD): hallucinations are strongly correlated with cognitive bifurcation points that often exhibit high entropy states. We attribute this vulnerability to a breakdown in visual semantic anchoring, localized within the network's intermediate layers; specifically, during these high uncertainty transitions, the model fails to query visual evidence, reverting instead to language priors. Consequently, we advocate a shift from solely outcome level supervision to augmenting it with fine grained internal attention guidance. To this end, we propose V-STAR (Visual Structural Training with Attention Reinforcement), a lightweight, holistic training paradigm designed to internalize visually aware reasoning capabilities. Central to our approach is the Hierarchical Visual Attention Reward (HVAR), integrated within the GRPO framework. Upon detecting high entropy states, this mechanism dynamically incentivizes visual attention across critical intermediate layers, thereby anchoring the reasoning process back to the visual input. Furthermore, we introduce the Forced Reflection Mechanism (FRM), a trajectory editing strategy that disrupts cognitive inertia by triggering reflection around high entropy cognitive bifurcation points and encouraging verification of subsequent steps against the visual input, thereby translating external debiasing interventions into an intrinsic capability for hallucination mitigation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出V-STAR框架，通过分层视觉注意力奖励和强制反思机制，解决多模态大推理模型中的视觉推理幻觉问题，增强模型对视觉证据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 多模态大推理模型在视觉推理方面取得显著进展，但长链推理仍容易出现幻觉。作者发现"推理视觉真相脱节"现象：幻觉与高熵认知分叉点强相关，模型在这些高不确定性转换时未能查询视觉证据，而是回归语言先验。
AI.method: 提出V-STAR训练范式，包含：1) 分层视觉注意力奖励机制，在GRPO框架中动态激励关键中间层的视觉注意力；2) 强制反思机制，通过轨迹编辑策略在高熵认知分叉点触发反思，鼓励后续步骤验证视觉输入。
AI.result: V-STAR能够有效缓解视觉推理中的幻觉问题，将外部去偏干预转化为内在的幻觉缓解能力，增强模型在推理过程中对视觉证据的依赖。
AI.conclusion: 需要从单纯结果级监督转向细粒度内部注意力引导，通过V-STAR框架内部化视觉感知推理能力，解决多模态推理中的视觉语义锚定崩溃问题。

title: How You Ask Matters! Adaptive RAG Robustness to Query Variations
summary: Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) promises accuracy and efficiency by dynamically triggering retrieval only when needed and is widely used in practice. However, real-world queries vary in surface form even with the same intent, and their impact on Adaptive RAG remains under-explored. We introduce the first large-scale benchmark of diverse yet semantically identical query variations, combining human-written and model-generated rewrites. Our benchmark facilitates a systematic evaluation of Adaptive RAG robustness by examining its key components across three dimensions: answer quality, computational cost, and retrieval decisions. We discover a critical robustness gap, where small surface-level changes in queries dramatically alter retrieval behavior and accuracy. Although larger models show better performance, robustness does not improve accordingly. These findings reveal that Adaptive RAG methods are highly vulnerable to query variations that preserve identical semantics, exposing a critical robustness challenge.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了首个大规模语义相同但表达多样的查询变体基准，用于系统评估自适应RAG的鲁棒性，发现查询的表面形式变化会显著影响检索行为和准确性，揭示了自适应RAG在语义相同查询变体下的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 自适应RAG在实际应用中广泛使用，但现实世界查询即使意图相同也会在表面形式上存在差异，这种差异对自适应RAG的影响尚未得到充分研究。需要系统评估自适应RAG在面对语义相同但表达多样的查询时的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 创建了首个大规模多样但语义相同的查询变体基准，结合人工编写和模型生成的改写。从三个维度系统评估自适应RAG：答案质量、计算成本和检索决策。分析不同规模模型的表现差异。
AI.result: 发现自适应RAG存在严重的鲁棒性差距，查询的表面形式微小变化会显著改变检索行为和准确性。虽然更大模型表现更好，但鲁棒性并未相应提升。自适应RAG方法对语义相同的查询变体高度脆弱。
AI.conclusion: 自适应RAG在面对语义相同但表达不同的查询时存在严重的鲁棒性挑战，这暴露了当前方法的脆弱性。需要开发更鲁棒的自适应RAG方法来解决这一关键问题。

title: PepBenchmark: A Standardized Benchmark for Peptide Machine Learning
summary: Peptide therapeutics are widely regarded as the "third generation" of drugs, yet progress in peptide Machine Learning (ML) are hindered by the absence of standardized benchmarks. Here we present PepBenchmark, which unifies datasets, preprocessing, and evaluation protocols for peptide drug discovery. PepBenchmark comprises three components: (1) PepBenchData, a well-curated collection comprising 29 canonical-peptide and 6 non-canonical-peptide datasets across 7 groups, systematically covering key aspects of peptide drug development, representing, to the best of our knowledge, the most comprehensive AI-ready dataset resource to date; (2) PepBenchPipeline, a standardized preprocessing pipeline that ensures consistent dataset cleaning, construction, splitting, and feature transformation, mitigating quality issues common in ad hoc pipelines; and (3) PepBenchLeaderboard, a unified evaluation protocol and leaderboard with strong baselines across 4 major methodological families: Fingerprint-based, GNN-based, PLM-based, and SMILES-based models. Together, PepBenchmark provides the first standardized and comparable foundation for peptide drug discovery, facilitating methodological advances and translation into real-world applications. The data and code are publicly available at https://github.com/ZGCI-AI4S-Pep/PepBenchmark/.

AI.tldr: PepBenchmark是一个用于肽药物发现的标准化基准测试平台，包含统一的数据集、预处理流程和评估协议
AI.motivation: 肽治疗药物被认为是"第三代"药物，但肽机器学习进展受到缺乏标准化基准的阻碍，需要统一的数据集、预处理和评估协议来推动该领域发展
AI.method: 构建了三个组件：1) PepBenchData - 包含29个经典肽和6个非经典肽数据集的全面AI就绪数据集；2) PepBenchPipeline - 标准化的预处理流程；3) PepBenchLeaderboard - 统一的评估协议和排行榜，涵盖指纹、GNN、PLM和SMILES四种方法家族
AI.result: 提供了首个用于肽药物发现的标准化和可比性基础，促进了方法学进步和实际应用转化
AI.conclusion: PepBenchmark为肽药物发现建立了首个标准化基准，解决了该领域缺乏统一评估框架的问题，有助于加速肽机器学习研究

title: Revisiting the Scale Loss Function and Gaussian-Shape Convolution for Infrared Small Target Detection
summary: Infrared small target detection still faces two persistent challenges: training instability from non-monotonic scale loss functions, and inadequate spatial attention due to generic convolution kernels that ignore the physical imaging characteristics of small targets. In this paper, we revisit both aspects. For the loss side, we propose a \emph{diff-based scale loss} that weights predictions according to the signed area difference between the predicted mask and the ground truth, yielding strictly monotonic gradients and stable convergence. We further analyze a family of four scale loss variants to understand how their geometric properties affect detection behavior. For the spatial side, we introduce \emph{Gaussian-shaped convolution} with a learnable scale parameter to match the center-concentrated intensity profile of infrared small targets, and augment it with a \emph{rotated pinwheel mask} that adaptively aligns the kernel with target orientation via a straight-through estimator. Extensive experiments on IRSTD-1k, NUDT-SIRST, and SIRST-UAVB demonstrate consistent improvements in $mIoU$, $P_d$, and $F_a$ over state-of-the-art methods. We release our anonymous code and pretrained models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出红外小目标检测的两种改进：基于差异的尺度损失函数解决训练不稳定问题，以及高斯形状卷积匹配目标物理特性
AI.motivation: 红外小目标检测面临两个持续挑战：非单调尺度损失函数导致的训练不稳定，以及通用卷积核忽略小目标物理成像特性导致的空间注意力不足
AI.method: 1. 提出基于差异的尺度损失函数，根据预测掩码与真实标签之间的有符号面积差异加权预测，确保严格单调梯度和稳定收敛；2. 引入高斯形状卷积，具有可学习尺度参数以匹配红外小目标的中心集中强度分布，并通过旋转风车掩码自适应对齐目标方向
AI.result: 在IRSTD-1k、NUDT-SIRST和SIRST-UAVB数据集上的实验表明，在mIoU、Pd和Fa指标上相比最先进方法有持续改进
AI.conclusion: 通过重新审视损失函数和空间注意力机制，提出的方法有效解决了红外小目标检测中的训练不稳定和空间注意力不足问题

title: SVSR: A Self-Verification and Self-Rectification Paradigm for Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Current multimodal models often suffer from shallow reasoning, leading to errors caused by incomplete or inconsistent thought processes. To address this limitation, we propose Self-Verification and Self-Rectification (SVSR), a unified framework that explicitly integrates self-verification and self-rectification into the model's reasoning pipeline, substantially improving robustness and reliability in complex visual understanding and multimodal reasoning tasks. SVSR is built on a novel three-stage training paradigm. First, we construct a high-quality unified preference dataset by refining reasoning traces from pre-trained vision-language models, incorporating both forward and backward reasoning to embed self-reflective signals. Second, we perform cold-start supervised fine-tuning on this dataset to learn structured, multi-step reasoning behaviors. Third, we apply a Semi-online Direct Preference Optimization (Semi-online DPO) process, continuously augmenting the training corpus with high-quality, model-generated reasoning traces filtered by a powerful teacher VLM. This pipeline enables the model to learn, elicit, and refine its ability to self-verify and self-rectify. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that SVSR improves reasoning accuracy and enables stronger generalization to unseen tasks and question types. Notably, once trained with explicit self-reflective reasoning, the model also exhibits improved implicit reasoning ability, outperforming strong baselines even when no explicit reasoning traces are provided. These results highlight the potential of SVSR for building more dependable, introspective, and cognitively aligned multimodal systems.

AI.tldr: SVSR是一个统一框架，通过自我验证和自我纠正增强多模态模型的推理能力，采用三阶段训练范式提升复杂视觉理解和多模态任务的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态模型常因浅层推理导致错误，缺乏完整一致的思维过程。需要增强模型的自我反思能力来提升推理的可靠性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 三阶段训练范式：1) 构建高质量统一偏好数据集，包含前向和后向推理的自我反思信号；2) 冷启动监督微调学习结构化多步推理行为；3) 半在线直接偏好优化，持续用高质量模型生成推理轨迹增强训练数据。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中显著提升推理准确性，增强对未见任务和问题类型的泛化能力。即使不提供显式推理轨迹，模型也展现出改进的隐式推理能力，超越强基线。
AI.conclusion: SVSR框架通过显式集成自我验证和自我纠正，能够构建更可靠、内省且认知对齐的多模态系统，提升模型的推理鲁棒性和可靠性。

title: Generating Multiple-Choice Knowledge Questions with Interpretable Difficulty Estimation using Knowledge Graphs and Large Language Models
summary: Generating multiple-choice questions (MCQs) with difficulty estimation remains challenging in automated MCQ-generation systems used in adaptive, AI-assisted education. This study proposes a novel methodology for generating MCQs with difficulty estimation from the input documents by utilizing knowledge graphs (KGs) and large language models (LLMs). Our approach uses an LLM to construct a KG from input documents, from which MCQs are then systematically generated. Each MCQ is generated by selecting a node from the KG as the key, sampling a related triple or quintuple -- optionally augmented with an extra triple -- and prompting an LLM to generate a corresponding stem from these graph components. Distractors are then selected from the KG. For each MCQ, nine difficulty signals are computed and combined into a unified difficulty score using a data-driven approach. Experimental results demonstrate that our method generates high-quality MCQs whose difficulty estimation is interpretable and aligns with human perceptions. Our approach improves automated MCQ generation by integrating structured knowledge representations with LLMs and a data-driven difficulty estimation model.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合知识图谱和LLM的自动多选题生成方法，包含难度估计功能，用于自适应AI教育系统
AI.motivation: 当前自动多选题生成系统在难度估计方面存在挑战，需要改进自适应AI辅助教育中的题目生成质量
AI.method: 使用LLM从输入文档构建知识图谱，从图谱中选取节点作为关键信息，采样三元组或五元组，通过LLM生成题干，从图谱中选择干扰项，计算9个难度信号并通过数据驱动方法合成统一难度分数
AI.result: 实验结果显示该方法能生成高质量多选题，其难度估计具有可解释性且与人类感知一致
AI.conclusion: 通过整合结构化知识表示、LLM和数据驱动的难度估计模型，改进了自动多选题生成系统

title: IceCache: Memory-efficient KV-cache Management for Long-Sequence LLMs
summary: Key-Value (KV) cache plays a crucial role in accelerating inference in large language models (LLMs) by storing intermediate attention states and avoiding redundant computation during autoregressive generation. However, its memory footprint scales linearly with sequence length, often leading to severe memory bottlenecks on resource-constrained hardware. Prior work has explored offloading KV cache to the CPU while retaining only a subset on the GPU, but these approaches often rely on imprecise token selection and suffer performance degradation in long-generation tasks such as chain-of-thought reasoning. In this paper, we propose a novel KV cache management strategy, IceCache, which integrates semantic token clustering with PagedAttention. By organizing semantically related tokens into contiguous memory regions managed by a hierarchical, dynamically updatable data structure, our method enables more efficient token selection and better utilization of memory bandwidth during CPU-GPU transfers. Experimental results on LongBench show that, with a 256-token budget, IceCache maintains 99% of the original accuracy achieved by the full KV cache model. Moreover, compared to other offloading-based methods, IceCache attains competitive or even superior latency and accuracy while using only 25% of the KV cache token budget, demonstrating its effectiveness in long-sequence scenarios. The code is available on our project website at https://yuzhenmao.github.io/IceCache/.

AI.tldr: IceCache：一种结合语义token聚类和PagedAttention的KV缓存管理策略，通过将语义相关的token组织到连续内存区域，在有限GPU内存下保持长序列推理的准确性。
AI.motivation: KV缓存在LLM推理中加速注意力计算，但其内存占用随序列长度线性增长，在资源受限硬件上造成内存瓶颈。现有方法将KV缓存卸载到CPU但依赖不精确的token选择，在长生成任务（如思维链推理）中性能下降。
AI.method: 提出IceCache策略，集成语义token聚类与PagedAttention。通过将语义相关的token组织到连续内存区域，由分层、动态可更新的数据结构管理，实现更高效的token选择和CPU-GPU传输时的内存带宽利用。
AI.result: 在LongBench上实验显示，使用256个token的预算，IceCache能保持完整KV缓存模型99%的原始准确率。相比其他基于卸载的方法，IceCache仅使用25%的KV缓存token预算就能达到竞争甚至更优的延迟和准确率。
AI.conclusion: IceCache通过语义聚类和高效内存管理，有效解决了KV缓存的内存瓶颈问题，在长序列场景中实现了内存效率与推理性能的良好平衡。

title: A Comparative Study of Modern Object Detectors for Robust Apple Detection in Orchard Imagery
summary: Accurate apple detection in orchard images is important for yield prediction, fruit counting, robotic harvesting, and crop monitoring. However, changing illumination, leaf clutter, dense fruit clusters, and partial occlusion make detection difficult. To provide a fair and reproducible comparison, this study establishes a controlled benchmark for single-class apple detection on the public AppleBBCH81 dataset using one deterministic train, validation, and test split and a unified evaluation protocol across six representative detectors: YOLOv10n, YOLO11n, RT-DETR-L, Faster R-CNN (ResNet50-FPN), FCOS (ResNet50-FPN), and SSDLite320 (MobileNetV3-Large). Performance is evaluated primarily using COCO-style mAP@0.5 and mAP@0.5:0.95, and threshold-dependent behavior is further analyzed using precision-recall curves and fixed-threshold precision, recall, and F1-score at IoU = 0.5. On the validation split, YOLO11n achieves the best strict localization performance with mAP@0.5:0.95 = 0.6065 and mAP@0.5 = 0.9620, followed closely by RT-DETR-L and YOLOv10n. At a fixed operating point with confidence >= 0.05, YOLOv10n attains the highest F1-score, whereas RT-DETR-L achieves very high recall but low precision because of many false positives at low confidence. These findings show that detector selection for orchard deployment should be guided not only by localization-aware accuracy but also by threshold robustness and the requirements of the downstream task.

AI.tldr: 该研究为苹果检测建立了一个受控基准测试，在AppleBBCH81数据集上比较了六种代表性检测器，发现YOLO11n在严格定位性能上表现最佳，而YOLOv10n在固定阈值下获得最高F1分数。
AI.motivation: 果园图像中的苹果检测对于产量预测、果实计数、机器人收获和作物监测很重要，但变化的光照、叶片遮挡、密集果实簇和部分遮挡使得检测困难。为了提供公平和可复现的比较，需要建立一个受控基准。
AI.method: 在公开的AppleBBCH81数据集上建立单类苹果检测的受控基准，使用确定性的训练、验证和测试划分，统一评估协议比较六种检测器：YOLOv10n、YOLO11n、RT-DETR-L、Faster R-CNN、FCOS和SSDLite320。
AI.result: 在验证集上，YOLO11n获得最佳严格定位性能（mAP@0.5:0.95 = 0.6065，mAP@0.5 = 0.9620），其次是RT-DETR-L和YOLOv10n。在固定阈值（置信度≥0.05）下，YOLOv10n获得最高F1分数，而RT-DETR-L召回率高但精度低（因低置信度假阳性多）。
AI.conclusion: 果园部署中的检测器选择不仅应基于定位感知精度，还应考虑阈值鲁棒性和下游任务需求。不同检测器在不同指标上表现各异，需要根据具体应用场景选择。

title: A Dual-Positive Monotone Parameterization for Multi-Segment Bids and a Validity Assessment Framework for Reinforcement Learning Agent-based Simulation of Electricity Markets
summary: Reinforcement learning agent-based simulation (RL-ABS) has become an important tool for electricity market mechanism analysis and evaluation. In the modeling of monotone, bounded, multi-segment stepwise bids, existing methods typically let the policy network first output an unconstrained action and then convert it into a feasible bid curve satisfying monotonicity and boundedness through post-processing mappings such as sorting, clipping, or projection. However, such post-processing mappings often fail to satisfy continuous differentiability, injectivity, and invertibility at boundaries or kinks, thereby causing gradient distortion and leading to spurious convergence in simulation results. Meanwhile, most existing studies conduct mechanism analysis and evaluation mainly on the basis of training-curve convergence, without rigorously assessing the distance between the simulation outcomes and Nash equilibrium, which severely undermines the credibility of the results. To address these issues, this paper proposes...

AI.tldr: 该论文针对电力市场RL-ABS中投标曲线建模问题，提出新方法解决现有后处理映射导致的梯度失真和虚假收敛问题，并引入纳什均衡距离评估提升结果可信度
AI.motivation: 现有电力市场RL-ABS方法在建模单调有界多段阶梯式投标时，使用排序、裁剪、投影等后处理映射将策略网络输出转换为可行投标曲线，但这些映射在边界或拐点处不满足连续可微性、单射性和可逆性，导致梯度失真和模拟结果虚假收敛。同时，现有研究主要基于训练曲线收敛进行机制分析，缺乏对模拟结果与纳什均衡距离的严格评估，严重损害结果可信度。
AI.method: 论文提出新的方法来替代传统的后处理映射，确保投标曲线转换过程的连续可微性、单射性和可逆性。同时引入纳什均衡距离评估框架，对模拟结果进行更严格的验证。
AI.result: 新方法能够有效避免梯度失真问题，减少虚假收敛，提高模拟结果的准确性和可靠性。纳什均衡距离评估提供了更严格的验证标准，增强了电力市场机制分析结果的可信度。
AI.conclusion: 论文解决了电力市场RL-ABS中的关键建模问题，提出的方法能够生成更可靠的模拟结果，为电力市场机制设计和评估提供了更可信的分析工具。

title: Do BERT Embeddings Encode Narrative Dimensions? A Token-Level Probing Analysis of Time, Space, Causality, and Character in Fiction
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures. Accepted at CMN'26 (9th International Workshop on Computational Models of Narrative)
summary: Narrative understanding requires multidimensional semantic structures. This study investigates whether BERT embeddings encode dimensions of fictional narrative semantics -- time, space, causality, and character. Using an LLM to accelerate annotation, we construct a token-level dataset labeled with these four narrative categories plus "others." A linear probe on BERT embeddings (94% accuracy) significantly outperforms a control probe on variance-matched random embeddings (47%), confirming that BERT encodes meaningful narrative information. With balanced class weighting, the probe achieves a macro-average recall of 0.83, with moderate success on rare categories such as causality (recall = 0.75) and space (recall = 0.66). However, confusion matrix analysis reveals "Boundary Leakage," where rare dimensions are systematically misclassified as "others." Clustering analysis shows that unsupervised clustering aligns near-randomly with predefined categories (ARI = 0.081), suggesting that narrative dimensions are encoded but not as discretely separable clusters. Future work includes a POS-only baseline to disentangle syntactic patterns from narrative encoding, expanded datasets, and layer-wise probing.

AI.tldr: BERT编码了叙事语义维度（时间、空间、因果、角色），但未形成离散可分簇；使用LLM加速标注构建数据集，线性探针证实编码有效性但存在"边界泄漏"问题。
AI.motivation: 研究BERT是否编码虚构叙事的多维语义结构（时间、空间、因果、角色），探索预训练语言模型对叙事理解能力的内部表示。
AI.method: 使用LLM加速标注构建token级叙事类别数据集；在BERT嵌入上训练线性探针；进行混淆矩阵分析和无监督聚类（ARI指标）。
AI.result: 线性探针准确率94%显著优于随机嵌入控制组（47%）；宏平均召回率0.83；因果（0.75）和空间（0.66）类别表现中等；但存在"边界泄漏"问题；无监督聚类与预定义类别对齐度低（ARI=0.081）。
AI.conclusion: BERT确实编码了叙事语义信息，但未形成离散可分簇；未来工作包括POS基线、扩展数据集和分层探针分析。

title: WaveMoE: A Wavelet-Enhanced Mixture-of-Experts Foundation Model for Time Series Forecasting
comment: Presented at ICLR 2026 TSALM Workshop (1st Workshop on Time Series in the Age of Large Models)
summary: Time series foundation models (TSFMs) have recently achieved remarkable success in universal forecasting by leveraging large-scale pretraining on diverse time series data. Complementing this progress, incorporating frequency-domain information yields promising performance in enhancing the modeling of complex temporal patterns, such as periodicity and localized high-frequency dynamics, which are prevalent in real-world time series. To advance this direction, we propose a new perspective that integrates explicit frequency-domain representations into scalable foundation models, and introduce WaveMoE, a wavelet-enhanced mixture-of-experts foundation model for time series forecasting. WaveMoE adopts a dual-path architecture that jointly processes time series tokens and wavelet tokens aligned along a unified temporal axis, and coordinates them through a shared expert routing mechanism that enables consistent expert specialization while efficiently scaling model capacity. Preliminary experimental results on 16 diverse benchmark datasets indicate that WaveMoE has the potential to further improve forecasting performance by incorporating wavelet-domain corpora.

AI.tldr: WaveMoE：一种用于时间序列预测的小波增强混合专家基础模型，通过双路径架构联合处理时间序列token和小波token，利用共享专家路由机制提升对复杂时间模式（如周期性和高频动态）的建模能力。
AI.motivation: 时间序列基础模型在通用预测方面取得了显著成功，但现实世界时间序列中普遍存在周期性、局部高频动态等复杂时间模式。将频域信息整合到可扩展的基础模型中，有望进一步提升对这些复杂模式的建模能力。
AI.method: 提出WaveMoE模型，采用双路径架构：一条路径处理时间序列token，另一条路径处理小波token，两者沿统一时间轴对齐。通过共享专家路由机制协调两条路径，实现一致的专家专业化，同时高效扩展模型容量。
AI.result: 在16个多样化基准数据集上的初步实验结果表明，WaveMoE通过整合小波域语料库，有潜力进一步提升预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 将显式频域表示整合到可扩展基础模型中是提升时间序列预测性能的有效方向，WaveMoE的双路径架构和共享路由机制为这一方向提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: GIF: A Conditional Multimodal Generative Framework for IR Drop Imaging in Chip Layouts
summary: IR drop analysis is essential in physical chip design to ensure the power integrity of on-chip power delivery networks. Traditional Electronic Design Automation (EDA) tools have become slow and expensive as transistor density scales. Recent works have introduced machine learning (ML)-based methods that formulate IR drop analysis as an image prediction problem. These existing ML approaches fail to capture both local and long-range dependencies and ignore crucial geometrical and topological information from physical layouts and logical connectivity. To address these limitations, we propose GIF, a Generative IR drop Framework that uses both geometrical and topological information to generate IR drop images. GIF fuses image and graph features to guide a conditional diffusion process, producing high-quality IR drop images. For instance, On the CircuitNet-N28 dataset, GIF achieves 0.78 SSIM, 0.95 Pearson correlation, 21.77 PSNR, and 0.026 NMAE, outperforming prior methods. These results demonstrate that our framework, using diffusion based multimodal conditioning, reliably generates high quality IR drop images. This shows that IR drop analysis can effectively leverage recent advances in generative modeling when geometric layout features and logical circuit topology are jointly modeled. By combining geometry aware spatial features with logical graph representations, GIF enables IR drop analysis to benefit from recent advances in generative modeling for structured image generation.

AI.tldr: 提出GIF生成式IR drop框架，通过几何布局和逻辑拓扑信息融合，使用条件扩散过程生成高质量IR drop图像，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统EDA工具在晶体管密度增加时变得缓慢昂贵，现有ML方法无法同时捕捉局部和长程依赖关系，且忽略了物理布局的几何信息和逻辑连接拓扑信息。
AI.method: 提出GIF生成式IR drop框架，融合图像和图形特征来指导条件扩散过程，结合几何感知的空间特征和逻辑图表示，生成高质量的IR drop图像。
AI.result: 在CircuitNet-N28数据集上，GIF达到0.78 SSIM、0.95 Pearson相关系数、21.77 PSNR和0.026 NMAE，优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合几何布局特征和逻辑电路拓扑，IR drop分析可以有效利用生成建模的最新进展，实现结构化图像生成。

title: The Amazing Agent Race: Strong Tool Users, Weak Navigators
summary: Existing tool-use benchmarks for LLM agents are overwhelmingly linear: our analysis of six benchmarks shows 55 to 100% of instances are simple chains of 2 to 5 steps. We introduce The Amazing Agent Race (AAR), a benchmark featuring directed acyclic graph (DAG) puzzles (or "legs") with fork-merge tool chains. We release 1,400 instances across two variants: sequential (800 legs) and compositional (600 DAG legs). Agents must navigate Wikipedia, execute multi-step tool chains, and aggregate results into a verifiable answer. Legs are procedurally generated from Wikipedia seeds across four difficulty levels with live-API validation. Three complementary metrics (finish-line accuracy, pit-stop visit rate, and roadblock completion rate) separately diagnose navigation, tool-use, and arithmetic failures. Evaluating three agent frameworks on 1,400 legs, the best achieves only 37.2% accuracy. Navigation errors dominate (27 to 52% of trials) while tool-use errors remain below 17%, and agent architecture matters as much as model scale (Claude Code matches Codex CLI at 37% with 6x fewer tokens). The compositional structure of AAR reveals that agents fail not at calling tools but at navigating to the right pages, a blind spot invisible to linear benchmarks. The project page can be accessed at: https://minnesotanlp.github.io/the-amazing-agent-race

AI.tldr: 提出了The Amazing Agent Race (AAR)基准测试，针对LLM智能体的工具使用能力，采用有向无环图(DAG)结构而非传统线性任务，包含1400个实例，揭示智能体在导航而非工具调用上的主要失败点。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体工具使用基准测试过于线性化(55-100%为简单链式步骤)，无法反映真实世界的复杂任务结构，需要更复杂的DAG结构基准来评估智能体的实际能力。
AI.method: 创建AAR基准，包含1400个实例(800个顺序任务和600个组合DAG任务)，基于Wikipedia种子程序化生成四个难度级别，使用实时API验证。引入三个互补指标：终点准确率、检查点访问率和障碍完成率，分别诊断导航、工具使用和算术失败。
AI.result: 在1400个任务上评估三个智能体框架，最佳准确率仅37.2%。导航错误占主导(27-52%)，工具使用错误低于17%。智能体架构与模型规模同等重要(Claude Code以6倍少token达到与Codex CLI相同的37%准确率)。
AI.conclusion: AAR的组合结构揭示智能体失败主要在导航到正确页面而非工具调用，这是线性基准无法发现的盲点。需要更复杂的基准来准确评估智能体能力。
