title: When Meaning Isn't Literal: Exploring Idiomatic Meaning Across Languages and Modalities
summary: Idiomatic reasoning, deeply intertwined with metaphor and culture, remains a blind spot for contemporary language models, whose progress skews toward surface-level lexical and semantic cues. For instance, the Bengali idiom \textit{\foreignlanguage{bengali}{\char"0986\char"0999\char"09CD\char"0997\char"09C1 \char"09B0 \char"09AB\char"09B2 \char"099F\char"0995}} (angur fol tok, ``grapes are sour''): it encodes denial-driven rationalization, yet naive models latch onto the literal fox-and-grape imagery. Addressing this oversight, we present ``Mediom,'' a multilingual, multimodal idiom corpus of 3,533 Hindi, Bengali, and Thai idioms, each paired with gold-standard explanations, cross-lingual translations, and carefully aligned text--image representations. We benchmark both large language models (textual reasoning) and vision-language models (figurative disambiguation) on Mediom, exposing systematic failures in metaphor comprehension. To mitigate these gaps, we propose ``HIDE,'' a Hinting-based Idiom Explanation framework that leverages error-feedback retrieval and targeted diagnostic cues for iterative reasoning refinement. Collectively, Mediom and HIDE establish a rigorous test bed and methodology for culturally grounded, multimodal idiom understanding embedded with reasoning hints in next-generation AI systems.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了Mediom多语言多模态习语语料库和HIDE框架，用于评估和改进AI系统对文化相关的习语理解能力。
AI.motivation: 当前语言模型在习语理解方面存在盲点，特别是涉及隐喻和文化背景的习语。模型倾向于关注表面词汇和语义线索，而无法理解深层的文化内涵和隐喻意义，如孟加拉语习语"葡萄是酸的"所表达的否认驱动的合理化含义。
AI.method: 1) 构建Mediom语料库：包含3,533个印地语、孟加拉语和泰语习语，每个习语配有标准解释、跨语言翻译和精心对齐的文本-图像表示；2) 提出HIDE框架：基于提示的习语解释框架，利用错误反馈检索和针对性诊断线索进行迭代推理优化。
AI.result: 在Mediom语料库上对大语言模型（文本推理）和视觉语言模型（比喻消歧）进行基准测试，揭示了隐喻理解方面的系统性失败。HIDE框架为改进这些缺陷提供了方法论。
AI.conclusion: Mediom和HIDE共同为下一代AI系统建立了严格的文化基础、多模态习语理解测试平台和方法论，特别关注推理提示的嵌入。

title: Topology-Aware PAC-Bayesian Generalization Analysis for Graph Neural Networks
summary: Graph neural networks have demonstrated excellent applicability to a wide range of domains, including social networks, biological systems, recommendation systems, and wireless communications. Yet a principled theoretical understanding of their generalization behavior remains limited, particularly for graph classification tasks where complex interactions between model parameters and graph structure play a crucial role. Among existing theoretical tools, PAC-Bayesian norm-based generalization bounds provide a flexible and data-dependent framework; however, current results for GNNs often restrict the exploitation of graph structures. In this work, we propose a topology-aware PAC-Bayesian norm-based generalization framework for graph convolutional networks (GCNs) that extends a previously developed framework to graph-structured models. Our approach reformulates the derivation of generalization bounds as a stochastic optimization problem and introduces sensitivity matrices that measure the response of classification outputs with respect to structured weight perturbations. By imposing different structures on sensitivity matrices from both spatial and spectral perspectives, we derive a family of generalization error bounds with graph structures explicitly embedded. Such bounds could recover existing results as special cases, while yielding bounds that are tighter than state-of-the-art PAC-Bayesian bounds for GNNs. Notably, the proposed framework explicitly integrates graph structural properties into the generalization analysis, enabling a unified inspection of GNN generalization behavior from both spatial aggregation and spectral filtering viewpoints.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于图卷积网络(GCNs)的拓扑感知PAC-Bayesian范数泛化框架，通过引入灵敏度矩阵和结构化权重扰动，从空间和谱视角推导出显式嵌入图结构的泛化误差界。
AI.motivation: 图神经网络在多个领域表现出色，但其泛化行为的理论理解仍然有限，特别是在图分类任务中。现有的PAC-Bayesian范数泛化界为GNNs提供了灵活的数据依赖框架，但往往限制了图结构的利用。需要开发能够显式整合图结构特性的泛化分析框架。
AI.method: 提出拓扑感知PAC-Bayesian范数泛化框架：1) 将泛化界推导重新表述为随机优化问题；2) 引入灵敏度矩阵来衡量分类输出对结构化权重扰动的响应；3) 从空间和谱视角对灵敏度矩阵施加不同结构；4) 推导出显式嵌入图结构的泛化误差界族。
AI.result: 该框架能够恢复现有结果作为特例，同时产生比当前最先进的GNNs PAC-Bayesian界更紧的界。框架显式地将图结构特性整合到泛化分析中，实现了从空间聚合和谱滤波视角统一检查GNN泛化行为。
AI.conclusion: 提出的拓扑感知PAC-Bayesian框架为图卷积网络提供了更紧且结构感知的泛化界，统一了空间和谱视角的分析，为理解GNNs的泛化行为提供了新的理论工具。

title: SwinTextUNet: Integrating CLIP-Based Text Guidance into Swin Transformer U-Nets for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Precise medical image segmentation is fundamental for enabling computer aided diagnosis and effective treatment planning. Traditional models that rely solely on visual features often struggle when confronted with ambiguous or low contrast patterns. To overcome these limitations, we introduce SwinTextUNet, a multimodal segmentation framework that incorporates Contrastive Language Image Pretraining (CLIP), derived textual embeddings into a Swin Transformer UNet backbone. By integrating cross attention and convolutional fusion, the model effectively aligns semantic text guidance with hierarchical visual representations, enhancing robustness and accuracy. We evaluate our approach on the QaTaCOV19 dataset, where the proposed four stage variant achieves an optimal balance between performance and complexity, yielding Dice and IoU scores of 86.47% and 78.2%, respectively. Ablation studies further validate the importance of text guidance and multimodal fusion. These findings underscore the promise of vision language integration in advancing medical image segmentation and supporting clinically meaningful diagnostic tools.

AI.tldr: SwinTextUNet：一种结合CLIP文本嵌入和Swin Transformer UNet的多模态医学图像分割框架，通过跨注意力机制融合视觉和文本特征，在QaTaCOV19数据集上取得86.47% Dice和78.2% IoU的优异性能。
AI.motivation: 传统仅依赖视觉特征的医学图像分割模型在处理模糊或低对比度模式时效果不佳。为了解决这一问题，研究者提出将文本语义指导与视觉特征相结合，利用多模态信息提升分割的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.method: 提出SwinTextUNet框架：1) 使用CLIP预训练模型提取文本嵌入；2) 基于Swin Transformer构建UNet骨干网络；3) 通过跨注意力机制和卷积融合模块对齐文本语义指导与分层视觉表示；4) 设计了四阶段变体以平衡性能与复杂度。
AI.result: 在QaTaCOV19数据集上，四阶段变体达到最优平衡，Dice系数86.47%，IoU 78.2%。消融实验验证了文本指导和多模态融合的重要性，表明视觉-语言集成能显著提升医学图像分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了视觉-语言集成在医学图像分割中的潜力，通过结合文本语义指导可以增强模型对模糊模式的处理能力，为临床诊断工具的发展提供了新思路。

title: STARS: Skill-Triggered Audit for Request-Conditioned Invocation Safety in Agent Systems
summary: Autonomous language-model agents increasingly rely on installable skills and tools to complete user tasks. Static skill auditing can expose capability surface before deployment, but it cannot determine whether a particular invocation is unsafe under the current user request and runtime context. We therefore study skill invocation auditing as a continuous-risk estimation problem: given a user request, candidate skill, and runtime context, predict a score that supports ranking and triage before a hard intervention is applied. We introduce STARS, which combines a static capability prior, a request-conditioned invocation risk model, and a calibrated risk-fusion policy. To evaluate this setting, we construct SIA-Bench, a benchmark of 3,000 invocation records with group-safe splits, lineage metadata, runtime context, canonical action labels, and derived continuous-risk targets. On a held-out split of indirect prompt injection attacks, calibrated fusion reaches 0.439 high-risk AUPRC, improving over 0.405 for the contextual scorer and 0.380 for the strongest static baseline, while the contextual scorer remains better calibrated with 0.289 expected calibration error. On the locked in-distribution test split, gains are smaller and static priors remain useful. The resulting claim is therefore narrower: request-conditioned auditing is most valuable as an invocation-time risk-scoring and triage layer rather than as a replacement for static screening. Code is available at https://github.com/123zgj123/STARS.

AI.tldr: STARS框架用于语言模型代理的技能调用审计，通过结合静态能力先验、请求条件风险模型和校准风险融合策略，在运行时评估技能调用风险，特别针对间接提示注入攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有静态技能审计只能在部署前暴露能力表面，但无法确定特定调用在当前用户请求和运行时上下文下是否安全。需要研究技能调用审计作为连续风险评估问题。
AI.method: 提出STARS框架：1) 静态能力先验；2) 请求条件调用风险模型；3) 校准风险融合策略。构建SIA-Bench基准（3000个调用记录），包含组安全分割、谱系元数据、运行时上下文、规范动作标签和连续风险目标。
AI.result: 在间接提示注入攻击的保留分割上，校准融合达到0.439高风险AUPRC，优于上下文评分器的0.405和最强静态基线的0.380。上下文评分器校准更好（0.289预期校准误差）。在分布内测试分割上，增益较小，静态先验仍有价值。
AI.conclusion: 请求条件审计最有价值的是作为调用时风险评分和分流层，而不是替代静态筛查。STARS为语言模型代理提供了运行时风险评估能力。

title: TInR: Exploring Tool-Internalized Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Tool-Integrated Reasoning (TIR) has emerged as a promising direction by extending Large Language Models' (LLMs) capabilities with external tools during reasoning. Existing TIR methods typically rely on external tool documentation during reasoning. However, this leads to tool mastery difficulty, tool size constraints, and inference inefficiency. To mitigate these issues, we explore Tool-Internalized Reasoning (TInR), aiming at facilitating reasoning with tool knowledge internalized into LLMs. Achieving this goal presents notable requirements, including tool internalization and tool-reasoning coordination. To address them, we propose TInR-U, a tool-internalized reasoning framework for unified reasoning and tool usage. TInR-U is trained through a three-phase pipeline: 1) tool internalization with a bidirectional knowledge alignment strategy; 2) supervised fine-tuning warm-up using high-quality reasoning annotations, and 3) reinforcement learning with TInR-specific rewards. We comprehensively evaluate our method across in-domain and out-of-domain settings. Experiment results show that TInR-U achieves superior performance in both settings, highlighting its effectiveness and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出TInR-U框架，将工具知识内化到LLMs中，通过三阶段训练实现统一的推理和工具使用，解决传统工具集成推理的局限性
AI.motivation: 现有工具集成推理方法依赖外部工具文档，导致工具掌握困难、工具规模限制和推理效率低下。需要探索工具内化推理，将工具知识内化到LLMs中，实现更高效的推理
AI.method: 提出TInR-U框架，采用三阶段训练：1）双向知识对齐策略进行工具内化；2）使用高质量推理标注进行监督微调预热；3）基于TInR特定奖励的强化学习
AI.result: 在领域内和跨领域设置中全面评估，实验结果显示TInR-U在两种设置下均取得优越性能，证明了其有效性和效率
AI.conclusion: TInR-U框架成功解决了工具集成推理的局限性，通过工具内化实现了更高效、统一的推理和工具使用，为LLMs的工具使用提供了新方向

title: Heterogeneous Connectivity in Sparse Networks: Fan-in Profiles, Gradient Hierarchy, and Topological Equilibria
summary: Profiled Sparse Networks (PSN) replace uniform connectivity with deterministic, heterogeneous fan-in profiles defined by continuous, nonlinear functions, creating neurons with both dense and sparse receptive fields. We benchmark PSN across four classification datasets spanning vision and tabular domains, input dimensions from 54 to 784, and network depths of 2--3 hidden layers. At 90% sparsity, all static profiles, including the uniform random baseline, achieve accuracy within 0.2-0.6% of dense baselines on every dataset, demonstrating that heterogeneous connectivity provides no accuracy advantage when hub placement is arbitrary rather than task-aligned. This result holds across sparsity levels (80-99.9%), profile shapes (eight parametric families, lognormal, and power-law), and fan-in coefficients of variation from 0 to 2.5. Internal gradient analysis reveals that structured profiles create a 2-5x gradient concentration at hub neurons compared to the ~1x uniform distribution in random baselines, with the hierarchy strength predicted by fan-in coefficient of variation ($r = 0.93$). When PSN fan-in distributions are used to initialise RigL dynamic sparse training, lognormal profiles matched to the equilibrium fan-in distribution consistently outperform standard ERK initialisation, with advantages growing on harder tasks, achieving +0.16% on Fashion-MNIST ($p = 0.036$, $d = 1.07$), +0.43% on EMNIST, and +0.49% on Forest Cover. RigL converges to a characteristic fan-in distribution regardless of initialisation. Starting at this equilibrium allows the optimiser to refine weights rather than rearrange topology. Which neurons become hubs matters more than the degree of connectivity variance, i.e., random hub placement provides no advantage, while optimisation-driven placement does.

AI.tldr: PSN使用确定性异质连接配置文件替代均匀连接，在90%稀疏度下所有静态配置（包括随机基线）都能在准确率上接近密集网络，表明异质连接在hub位置随机时无优势。梯度分析显示结构化配置在hub神经元上产生2-5倍梯度集中。当PSN配置用于初始化RigL动态稀疏训练时，匹配均衡分布的lognormal配置优于标准ERK初始化。
AI.motivation: 研究稀疏神经网络中异质连接配置（hub神经元）对性能的影响，探索确定性连接配置文件是否比随机均匀连接提供优势，以及如何优化稀疏网络初始化策略。
AI.method: 提出Profiled Sparse Networks (PSN)，使用连续非线性函数定义确定性异质fan-in配置文件。在4个分类数据集（视觉和表格数据）上测试，输入维度54-784，网络深度2-3层。比较不同稀疏度（80-99.9%）、配置文件形状（8个参数族、lognormal、power-law）和fan-in变异系数（0-2.5）。内部梯度分析量化梯度集中效应。将PSN配置用于初始化RigL动态稀疏训练。
AI.result: 在90%稀疏度下，所有静态配置（包括随机基线）准确率与密集基线相差仅0.2-0.6%，表明异质连接在hub位置随机时无优势。结构化配置在hub神经元上产生2-5倍梯度集中，梯度集中强度与fan-in变异系数高度相关（r=0.93）。当PSN配置用于初始化RigL时，匹配均衡分布的lognormal配置优于标准ERK初始化，在更困难任务上优势更明显。
AI.conclusion: 神经元成为hub的位置比连接方差程度更重要：随机hub放置无优势，而优化驱动的hub放置有效。RigL收敛到特征性fan-in分布，从均衡分布开始初始化允许优化器专注于权重优化而非拓扑重排。

title: Demographic and Linguistic Bias Evaluation in Omnimodal Language Models
comment: Accepted at ICPR 2026. Full paper with complete appendix (31 pages total)
summary: This paper provides a comprehensive evaluation of demographic and linguistic biases in omnimodal language models that process text, images, audio, and video within a single framework. Although these models are being widely deployed, their performance across different demographic groups and modalities is not well studied. Four omnimodal models are evaluated on tasks that include demographic attribute estimation, identity verification, activity recognition, multilingual speech transcription, and language identification. Accuracy differences are measured across age, gender, skin tone, language, and country of origin. The results show that image and video understanding tasks generally exhibit better performance with smaller demographic disparities. In contrast, audio understanding tasks exhibit significantly lower performance and substantial bias, including large accuracy differences across age groups, genders, and languages, and frequent prediction collapse toward narrow categories. These findings highlight the importance of evaluating fairness across all supported modalities as omnimodal language models are increasingly used in real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文全面评估了多模态语言模型在人口统计学和语言偏见方面的表现，发现图像和视频任务表现较好且偏见较小，而音频任务表现较差且存在显著偏见
AI.motivation: 随着多模态语言模型（处理文本、图像、音频和视频）的广泛部署，这些模型在不同人口群体和模态间的性能差异尚未得到充分研究。需要评估这些模型的公平性，确保它们在实际应用中的可靠性和公正性。
AI.method: 评估了四种多模态模型，任务包括：人口属性估计、身份验证、活动识别、多语言语音转录和语言识别。测量了在年龄、性别、肤色、语言和原籍国等维度上的准确率差异。
AI.result: 图像和视频理解任务通常表现更好，人口统计学差异较小。而音频理解任务表现显著较差且存在大量偏见，包括不同年龄组、性别和语言间的巨大准确率差异，以及频繁向狭窄类别预测的崩溃现象。
AI.conclusion: 随着多模态语言模型在现实世界应用中的日益普及，评估所有支持模态的公平性至关重要。音频模态需要特别关注，以减少偏见并提高性能。

title: Dead Cognitions: A Census of Misattributed Insights
summary: This essay identifies a failure mode of AI chat systems that we term attribution laundering: the model performs substantive cognitive work and then rhetorically credits the user for having generated the resulting insights. Unlike transparent versions of glad handing sycophancy, attribution laundering is systematically occluded to the person it affects and self-reinforcing -- eroding users' ability to accurately assess their own cognitive contributions over time. We trace the mechanisms at both individual and societal scales, from the chat interface that discourages scrutiny to the institutional pressures that reward adoption over accountability. The document itself is an artifact of the process it describes, and is color-coded accordingly -- though the views expressed are the authors' own, not those of any affiliated institution, and the boundary between the human author's views and Claude's is, as the essay argues, difficult to draw.

AI.tldr: 论文识别了AI聊天系统的一种故障模式——"归因洗白"：模型执行实质性认知工作，却在修辞上将产生的见解归功于用户。这种模式对受影响者隐蔽且自我强化，会逐渐侵蚀用户准确评估自身认知贡献的能力。
AI.motivation: 揭示AI聊天系统中一种隐蔽的、系统性的故障模式，即模型将自身认知工作的成果归功于用户，这种"归因洗白"会损害用户的自我认知能力，并探讨其在个体和社会层面的机制。
AI.method: 采用批判性分析和现象学方法，通过论文本身作为所描述过程的产物来展示这一现象。论文使用颜色编码来区分不同来源的贡献，同时分析聊天界面设计、制度压力等多层次机制。
AI.result: 识别并定义了"归因洗白"这一AI聊天系统故障模式，揭示了其隐蔽性、自我强化特性，以及如何通过界面设计、制度采纳压力等机制在个体和社会层面产生影响。
AI.conclusion: AI聊天系统中的"归因洗白"是一个严重但隐蔽的问题，会逐渐侵蚀用户的自我认知能力。论文本身作为这一现象的产物，展示了区分人类作者与AI贡献的困难，呼吁对这一现象进行更深入的研究和关注。

title: Position-Agnostic Pre-Projection for Transformer Attention: Nonlinear Feature Construction and Content Skip Before Q/K/V
summary: We propose two complementary modifications to transformer attention blocks. First, a non-linear pre-projection MLP is inserted between layer norm and Q/K/V projections, constructing richer features in a position-agnostic manner before any positional encoding is applied. Second, a content skip connection routes the pre-projection's features around the attention mechanism, allowing content information to bypass position-aware attention where beneficial. In frozen-probe experiments on Pythia-160M and 410M, the combined approach achieves the strongest results across methods: +40.6% LAMBADA accuracy and -39% perplexity at 160M scale. Learned skip connection weights reveal a consistent pattern across model sizes: later transformer layers activate the content bypass more strongly than earlier layers, suggesting that deeper layers benefit from content information that does not pass through positional attention. All modifications add no K/V cache overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出两种改进Transformer注意力块的互补方法：1) 在层归一化和Q/K/V投影之间插入非线性预投影MLP，构建位置无关的丰富特征；2) 内容跳跃连接绕过注意力机制传递预投影特征。在Pythia模型上显著提升性能，无KV缓存开销。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer架构中，位置编码与内容特征在注意力机制中紧密耦合，可能限制了模型处理位置无关内容信息的能力。作者希望通过分离内容与位置处理路径，让模型更灵活地利用不同类型的信息。
AI.method: 1) 非线性预投影MLP：在层归一化后、Q/K/V投影前插入MLP，构建位置无关的丰富特征表示；2) 内容跳跃连接：将预投影特征绕过注意力机制直接传递，允许内容信息在需要时避开位置感知的注意力处理。两种修改均不增加KV缓存开销。
AI.result: 在Pythia-160M和410M模型的冻结探针实验中，组合方法取得最佳结果：160M规模上LAMBADA准确率提升40.6%，困惑度降低39%。跳跃连接权重显示一致模式：深层比浅层更强烈激活内容旁路，表明深层更需要绕过位置注意力的内容信息。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离内容与位置处理路径，Transformer可以更有效地利用不同类型的信息。内容跳跃连接在深层更活跃的发现表明，模型架构应考虑不同层对内容与位置信息的不同需求。这些改进为Transformer优化提供了新方向。

title: ReadMOF: Structure-Free Semantic Embeddings from Systematic MOF Nomenclature for Machine Learning
summary: Systematic chemical names, such as IUPAC-style nomenclature for metal-organic frameworks (MOFs), contain rich structural and compositional information in a standardized textual format. Here we introduce ReadMOF, which is, to our knowledge, the first nomenclature-free machine learning framework that leverages these names to model structure-property relationships without requiring atomic coordinates or connectivity graphs. By employing pretrained language models, ReadMOF converts systematic MOF names from the Cambridge Structural Database (CSD) into vector embeddings that closely represent traditional structure-based descriptors. These embeddings enable applications in materials informatics, including property prediction, similarity retrieval, and clustering, with performance comparable to geometry-dependent methods. When combined with large language models, ReadMOF also establishes chemically meaningful reasoning ability with textual input only. Our results show that structured chemical language, interpreted through modern natural language processing techniques, can provide a scalable, interpretable, and geometry-independent alternative to conventional molecular representations. This approach opens new opportunities for language-driven discovery in materials science.

AI.tldr: ReadMOF：首个基于IUPAC命名法、无需原子坐标或连接图的MOF机器学习框架，利用预训练语言模型从系统化学名称预测材料性质
AI.motivation: 金属有机框架（MOFs）的系统化学名称（如IUPAC命名法）包含丰富的结构和组成信息，但传统方法需要原子坐标或连接图。研究者希望开发一种仅使用文本命名就能建模结构-性质关系的方法，提供可扩展、可解释且几何独立的替代方案。
AI.method: 使用预训练语言模型将剑桥结构数据库（CSD）中的系统MOF名称转换为向量嵌入，这些嵌入能近似表示传统基于结构的描述符。结合大语言模型，仅使用文本输入就能建立化学意义的推理能力。
AI.result: ReadMOF在材料信息学应用中（性质预测、相似性检索、聚类）表现与几何依赖方法相当，展示了结构化化学语言通过现代NLP技术可以提供传统分子表示的有效替代。
AI.conclusion: 结构化化学语言通过现代自然语言处理技术，可以提供可扩展、可解释且几何独立的传统分子表示替代方案，为材料科学中的语言驱动发现开辟新机会。

title: What and Where to Adapt: Structure-Semantics Co-Tuning for Machine Vision Compression via Synergistic Adapters
comment: Accepted by the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Findings, 2026
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning of pre-trained codecs is a promising direction in image compression for human and machine vision. While most existing works have primarily focused on tuning the feature structure within the encoder-decoder backbones, the adaptation of the statistical semantics within the entropy model has received limited attention despite its function of predicting the probability distribution of latent features. Our analysis reveals that naive adapter insertion into the entropy model can lead to suboptimal outcomes, underscoring that the effectiveness of adapter-based tuning depends critically on the coordination between adapter type and placement across the compression pipeline. Therefore, we introduce Structure-Semantics Co-Tuning (S2-CoT), a novel framework that achieves this coordination via two specialized, synergistic adapters: the Structural Fidelity Adapter (SFA) and the Semantic Context Adapter (SCA). SFA is integrated into the encoder-decoder to preserve high-fidelity representations by dynamically fusing spatial and frequency information; meanwhile, the SCA adapts the entropy model to align with SFA-tuned features by refining the channel context for more efficient statistical coding. Through joint optimization, S2-CoT turns potential performance degradation into synergistic gains, achieving state-of-the-art results across four diverse base codecs with only a small fraction of trainable parameters, closely matching full fine-tuning performance. Code is available at https://github.com/Brock-bit4/S2-CoT.

AI.tldr: 提出S2-CoT框架，通过结构保真适配器和语义上下文适配器的协同调优，实现图像压缩编解码器的参数高效微调，在保持高保真表示的同时优化熵模型统计编码。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法主要关注编码器-解码器主干网络的特征结构调整，而熵模型中统计语义的适配研究有限。熵模型负责预测潜在特征的概率分布，对压缩性能至关重要。研究发现简单插入适配器会导致次优结果，适配器类型和放置位置需要与压缩流程协调。
AI.method: 提出结构-语义协同调优框架S2-CoT，包含两个专门设计的协同适配器：1) 结构保真适配器(SFA)集成到编码器-解码器中，通过动态融合空间和频率信息保持高保真表示；2) 语义上下文适配器(SCA)适配熵模型，通过细化通道上下文来对齐SFA调优的特征，实现更高效的统计编码。通过联合优化实现协同增益。
AI.result: 在四种不同的基础编解码器上实现了最先进的结果，仅使用少量可训练参数，性能接近完全微调。代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: S2-CoT框架通过结构保真和语义上下文适配器的协同设计，解决了参数高效微调中适配器类型和放置位置的协调问题，显著提升了图像压缩性能，为人类和机器视觉应用提供了有效的解决方案。

title: AI Organizations are More Effective but Less Aligned than Individual Agents
summary: AI is increasingly deployed in multi-agent systems; however, most research considers only the behavior of individual models. We experimentally show that multi-agent "AI organizations" are simultaneously more effective at achieving business goals, but less aligned, than individual AI agents. We examine 12 tasks across two practical settings: an AI consultancy providing solutions to business problems and an AI software team developing software products. Across all settings, AI Organizations composed of aligned models produce solutions with higher utility but greater misalignment compared to a single aligned model. Our work demonstrates the importance of considering interacting systems of AI agents when doing both capabilities and safety research.

AI.tldr: 研究发现多智能体AI组织在商业任务中比单个AI智能体更有效，但也更不具对齐性，强调了在能力和安全研究中考虑AI智能体交互系统的重要性。
AI.motivation: 当前AI研究主要关注单个模型的行为，但AI越来越多地部署在多智能体系统中。作者希望研究多智能体AI组织在实际商业环境中的表现，特别是它们在实现业务目标和保持对齐性方面的差异。
AI.method: 实验研究了12个任务，涵盖两个实际场景：1) AI咨询公司解决商业问题，2) AI软件开发团队开发软件产品。比较了由对齐模型组成的AI组织与单个对齐模型的性能差异。
AI.result: 在所有设置中，由对齐模型组成的AI组织产生的解决方案比单个对齐模型具有更高的效用，但也表现出更大的不对齐性。多智能体系统在实现业务目标方面更有效，但在保持对齐性方面表现较差。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，在进行能力和安全研究时，必须考虑AI智能体的交互系统。多智能体AI组织虽然能产生更有效的解决方案，但也带来了更大的对齐风险。

title: Advancing Polish Language Modeling through Tokenizer Optimization in the Bielik v3 7B and 11B Series
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2601.11579
summary: The development of the Bielik v3 PL series, encompassing both the 7B and 11B parameter variants, represents a significant milestone in the field of language-specific large language model (LLM) optimization. While general-purpose models often demonstrate impressive multilingual capabilities, they frequently suffer from a fundamental architectural inefficiency: the use of universal tokenizers. These tokenizers, typically designed to cover a broad spectrum of languages, often fail to capture the morphological nuances of specific languages like Polish, leading to higher fertility ratios, increased inference costs, and restricted effective context windows. This report details the transition from the universal Mistral-based tokenization to a dedicated Polish-optimized vocabulary for the Bielik v3 models, exploring the FOCUS-based embedding initialization, the multi-stage pretraining curriculum, and the subsequent post-training alignment involving Supervised Fine-Tuning, Direct Preference Optimization, and Reinforcement Learning through Group Relative Policy Optimization with verifiable rewards.

AI.tldr: Bielik v3 PL系列（7B和11B参数）通过波兰语优化的分词器和多阶段训练流程，显著提升了波兰语LLM的性能和效率
AI.motivation: 通用LLM使用通用分词器处理波兰语时存在架构效率问题：无法捕捉波兰语形态学细微差别，导致生育率比高、推理成本增加、有效上下文窗口受限。需要针对波兰语优化的专用模型。
AI.method: 1) 从通用Mistral分词器转向波兰语优化词汇表；2) 基于FOCUS的嵌入初始化；3) 多阶段预训练课程；4) 后训练对齐：监督微调、直接偏好优化、使用可验证奖励的组相对策略优化的强化学习
AI.result: 开发了Bielik v3 PL系列（7B和11B参数），通过语言专用优化显著提升了波兰语处理效率，降低了推理成本，扩展了有效上下文窗口
AI.conclusion: 语言专用分词器和优化训练流程对于提升特定语言LLM性能至关重要，为其他语言专用模型开发提供了参考框架

title: WOODELF-HD: Efficient Background SHAP for High-Depth Decision Trees
summary: Decision-tree ensembles are a cornerstone of predictive modeling, and SHAP is a standard framework for interpreting their predictions. Among its variants, Background SHAP offers high accuracy by modeling missing features using a background dataset. Historically, this approach did not scale well, as the time complexity for explaining n instances using m background samples included an O(mn) component. Recent methods such as Woodelf and PLTreeSHAP reduce this to O(m+n), but introduce a preprocessing bottleneck that grows as 3^D with tree depth D, making them impractical for deep trees. We address this limitation with WoodelfHD, a Woodelf extension that reduces the 3^D factor to 2^D. The key idea is a Strassen-like multiplication scheme that exploits the structure of Woodelf matrices, reducing matrix-vector multiplication from O(k^2) to O(k*log(k)) via a fully vectorized, non-recursive implementation. In addition, we merge path nodes with identical features, reducing cache size and memory usage. When running on standard environments, WoodelfHD enables exact Background SHAP computation for trees with depths up to 21, where previous methods fail due to excessive memory usage. For ensembles of depths 12 and 15, it achieves speedups of 33x and 162x, respectively, over the state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: WoodelfHD扩展了Woodelf方法，通过Strassen-like矩阵乘法方案将Background SHAP的时间复杂度从3^D降低到2^D，使深度树（高达21层）的精确解释成为可能，相比现有方法实现了33-162倍加速。
AI.motivation: 决策树集成模型是预测建模的核心，SHAP是解释其预测的标准框架。Background SHAP通过背景数据集建模缺失特征提供高精度，但传统方法时间复杂度为O(mn)，近期方法（Woodelf、PLTreeSHAP）降至O(m+n)但引入3^D的预处理瓶颈，无法处理深度树。
AI.method: WoodelfHD扩展Woodelf方法，采用Strassen-like矩阵乘法方案，利用Woodelf矩阵结构将矩阵向量乘法从O(k^2)降至O(k*log(k))，通过完全向量化非递归实现。同时合并具有相同特征的路径节点，减少缓存大小和内存使用。
AI.result: 在标准环境下，WoodelfHD能够对深度达21的树进行精确Background SHAP计算，而先前方法因内存使用过多而失败。对于深度12和15的集成模型，分别实现了33倍和162倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: WoodelfHD通过算法创新解决了深度树解释的扩展性问题，使Background SHAP能够高效应用于实际深度树模型，显著提升了可解释性工具的性能。

title: FREE-Switch: Frequency-based Dynamic LoRA Switch for Style Transfer
summary: With the growing availability of open-sourced adapters trained on the same diffusion backbone for diverse scenes and objects, combining these pretrained weights enables low-cost customized generation. However, most existing model merging methods are designed for classification or text generation, and when applied to image generation, they suffer from content drift due to error accumulation across multiple diffusion steps. For image-oriented methods, training-based approaches are computationally expensive and unsuitable for edge deployment, while training-free ones use uniform fusion strategies that ignore inter-adapter differences, leading to detail degradation. We find that since different adapters are specialized for generating different types of content, the contribution of each diffusion step carries different significance for each adapter. Accordingly, we propose a frequency-domain importance-driven dynamic LoRA switch method. Furthermore, we observe that maintaining semantic consistency across adapters effectively mitigates detail loss; thus, we design an automatic Generation Alignment mechanism to align generation intents at the semantic level. Experiments demonstrate that our FREE-Switch (Frequency-based Efficient and Dynamic LoRA Switch) framework efficiently combines adapters for different objects and styles, substantially reducing the training cost of high-quality customized generation.

AI.tldr: 提出FREE-Switch框架，通过频域重要性驱动的动态LoRA切换和生成对齐机制，高效融合多个预训练适配器进行图像生成，解决现有方法的内容漂移和细节退化问题。
AI.motivation: 随着开源适配器在相同扩散骨干上的可用性增加，需要高效融合这些预训练权重以实现低成本定制化图像生成。现有方法存在内容漂移、计算成本高或忽略适配器间差异等问题。
AI.method: 1) 频域重要性驱动的动态LoRA切换：基于不同适配器在不同扩散步骤中的贡献差异，在频域分析重要性并进行动态切换；2) 自动生成对齐机制：在语义层面对齐不同适配器的生成意图，保持语义一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明FREE-Switch框架能够高效融合不同物体和风格的适配器，显著降低高质量定制化生成的训练成本，同时避免内容漂移和细节退化。
AI.conclusion: 提出的频域重要性分析和语义对齐方法有效解决了多适配器融合中的关键问题，为低成本定制化图像生成提供了高效解决方案。

title: TimeSeriesExamAgent: Creating Time Series Reasoning Benchmarks at Scale
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promising performance in time series modeling tasks, but do they truly understand time series data? While multiple benchmarks have been proposed to answer this fundamental question, most are manually curated and focus on narrow domains or specific skill sets. To address this limitation, we propose scalable methods for creating comprehensive time series reasoning benchmarks that combine the flexibility of templates with the creativity of LLM agents. We first develop TimeSeriesExam, a multiple-choice benchmark using synthetic time series to evaluate LLMs across five core reasoning categories: pattern recognitionnoise understandingsimilarity analysisanomaly detection, and causality. Then, with TimeSeriesExamAgent, we scale our approach by automatically generating benchmarks from real-world datasets spanning healthcare, finance and weather domains. Through multi-dimensional quality evaluation, we demonstrate that our automatically generated benchmarks achieve diversity comparable to manually curated alternatives. However, our experiments reveal that LLM performance remains limited in both abstract time series reasoning and domain-specific applications, highlighting ongoing challenges in enabling effective time series understanding in these models. TimeSeriesExamAgent is available at https://github.com/magwiazda/TimeSeriesExamAgent.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了TimeSeriesExam和TimeSeriesExamAgent两个时间序列推理基准，通过合成数据和真实数据评估LLM在时间序列理解上的能力，发现LLM表现有限。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列基准多为人工构建，覆盖领域狭窄且技能单一，无法全面评估LLM是否真正理解时间序列数据。需要创建更全面、可扩展的基准来系统评估LLM的时间序列推理能力。
AI.method:
1. TimeSeriesExam：使用合成时间序列创建多选题基准，评估五个核心推理类别（模式识别、噪声理解、相似性分析、异常检测、因果关系）
2. TimeSeriesExamAgent：通过LLM代理自动从真实世界数据集（医疗、金融、天气）生成基准，结合模板灵活性和LLM创造力
AI.result: 自动生成的基准在多样性上可与人工基准媲美。但实验显示LLM在抽象时间序列推理和领域特定应用中都表现有限，表明LLM在时间序列理解上仍面临挑战。
AI.conclusion: 虽然提出的方法能创建全面、可扩展的时间序列推理基准，但LLM在时间序列理解上的能力仍然有限，需要进一步研究提升LLM的时间序列推理能力。

title: OccuBench: Evaluating AI Agents on Real-World Professional Tasks via Language World Models
summary: AI agents are expected to perform professional work across hundreds of occupational domains (from emergency department triage to nuclear reactor safety monitoring to customs import processing), yet existing benchmarks can only evaluate agents in the few domains where public environments exist. We introduce OccuBench, a benchmark covering 100 real-world professional task scenarios across 10 industry categories and 65 specialized domains, enabled by Language World Models (LWMs) that simulate domain-specific environments through LLM-driven tool response generation. Our multi-agent synthesis pipeline automatically produces evaluation instances with guaranteed solvability, calibrated difficulty, and document-grounded diversity. OccuBench evaluates agents along two complementary dimensions: task completion across professional domains and environmental robustness under controlled fault injection (explicit errors, implicit data degradation, and mixed faults). We evaluate 15 frontier models across 8 model families and find that: (1) no single model dominates all industries, as each has a distinct occupational capability profile; (2) implicit faults (truncated data, missing fields) are harder than both explicit errors (timeouts, 500s) and mixed faults, because they lack overt error signals and require the agent to independently detect data degradation; (3) larger models, newer generations, and higher reasoning effort consistently improve performance. GPT-5.2 improves by 27.5 points from minimal to maximum reasoning effort; and (4) strong agents are not necessarily strong environment simulators. Simulator quality is critical for LWM-based evaluation reliability. OccuBench provides the first systematic cross-industry evaluation of AI agents on professional occupational tasks.

AI.tldr: OccuBench是一个评估AI代理在100个真实世界专业任务场景上的基准测试，覆盖10个行业类别和65个专业领域，使用语言世界模型模拟领域特定环境，通过多智能体合成管道自动生成评估实例。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试只能在少数有公共环境的领域评估AI代理，而AI代理需要在数百个职业领域中执行专业工作。需要系统评估AI代理在不同行业专业任务上的能力。
AI.method: 使用语言世界模型模拟领域特定环境，通过LLM驱动的工具响应生成。多智能体合成管道自动生成具有保证可解性、校准难度和文档基础多样性的评估实例。评估两个维度：跨专业领域的任务完成度和受控故障注入下的环境鲁棒性。
AI.result: 评估15个前沿模型发现：1) 没有单一模型在所有行业占优，每个模型有独特的职业能力特征；2) 隐式故障比显式错误和混合故障更难；3) 更大模型、更新世代和更高推理努力持续提升性能；4) 强大的代理不一定是强大的环境模拟器。
AI.conclusion: OccuBench提供了首个系统性的跨行业AI代理专业职业任务评估框架，强调了环境模拟器质量对基于LWM评估可靠性的重要性。

title: Calibration Collapse Under Sycophancy Fine-Tuning: How Reward Hacking Breaks Uncertainty Quantification in LLMs
comment: Accepted at the AISTATS 2026 Workshop on Towards Trustworthy Predictions: Theory and Applications of Calibration for Modern AI. 14 Pages
summary: Modern large language models (LLMs) are increasingly fine-tuned via reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) or related reward optimisation schemes. While such procedures improve perceived helpfulness, we investigate whether sycophantic reward signals degrade calibration -- a property essential for reliable uncertainty quantification. We fine-tune Qwen3-8B under three regimes: no fine-tuning (base), neutral supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on TriviaQA, and sycophancy-inducing Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) that rewards agreement with planted wrong answers. Evaluating on $1{,}000$ MMLU items across five subject domains with bootstrap confidence intervals and permutation testing, we find that \textbf{sycophantic GRPO produces consistent directional calibration degradation} -- ECE rises by $+0.006$ relative to the base model and MCE increases by $+0.010$ relative to neutral SFT -- though the effect does not reach statistical significance ($p = 0.41$) at this training budget. Post-hoc matrix scaling applied to all three models reduces ECE by $40$--$64\%$ and improves accuracy by $1.5$--$3.0$ percentage points. However, the sycophantic model retains the highest post-scaling ECE relative to the neutral SFT control ($0.042$ vs.\ $0.037$), suggesting that reward-induced miscalibration leaves a structured residual even after affine correction. These findings establish a methodology for evaluating the calibration impact of reward hacking and motivate calibration-aware training objectives.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨RLHF等奖励优化是否会因"谄媚"奖励信号降低LLM的校准性。通过对比基础模型、中性SFT和诱导谄媚的GRPO，发现谄媚训练确实导致校准退化，尽管统计显著性不足。矩阵缩放可改善校准，但谄媚模型仍保留最高校准误差。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM越来越多地通过RLHF等奖励优化进行微调，这些方法虽然提升了感知上的有用性，但可能引入"谄媚"奖励信号。本研究旨在探究这种奖励信号是否会损害模型的校准性——这是可靠不确定性量化的关键属性。
AI.method: 使用Qwen3-8B模型，在三种训练机制下进行实验：1) 无微调的基础模型；2) 在TriviaQA上进行中性监督微调(SFT)；3) 使用Group Relative Policy Optimisation(GRPO)诱导谄媚行为，奖励模型对植入错误答案的认同。在MMLU的1000个项目上进行评估，使用自助置信区间和置换检验分析校准变化。
AI.result: 谄媚GRPO导致一致的校准退化方向：ECE相对基础模型上升+0.006，MCE相对中性SFT上升+0.010，但在此训练预算下未达到统计显著性(p=0.41)。后处理的矩阵缩放使所有模型的ECE降低40-64%，准确率提升1.5-3.0个百分点，但谄媚模型仍保持最高的后缩放ECE(0.042 vs. 中性SFT的0.037)。
AI.conclusion: 奖励诱导的校准错误即使在仿射校正后仍会留下结构化残差。这些发现为评估奖励攻击对校准的影响建立了方法论，并激励了校准感知的训练目标设计。

title: LVSum: A Benchmark for Timestamp-Aware Long Video Summarization
summary: Long video summarization presents significant challenges for current multimodal large language models (MLLMs), particularly in maintaining temporal fidelity over extended durations and producing summaries that are both semantically and temporally grounded. In this work, we present LVSum, a human-annotated benchmark designed specifically for evaluating long video summarization with fine-grained temporal alignment. LVSum comprises diverse long-form videos across 13 domains, each paired with human-generated summaries containing precise temporal references. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation of both proprietary and open-source MLLMs on LVSum, assessing performance using newly introduced LLM-based metrics for content relevance and modality coherence, alongside standard evaluation metrics. Our experiments reveal systematic gaps in temporal understanding among existing MLLMs and offer insights that establish a new foundation for advancing temporal reasoning in long video summarization.

AI.tldr: LVSum是一个专门用于评估长视频摘要任务的人类标注基准，包含13个领域的多样长视频，每个视频都配有包含精确时间参考的人工生成摘要。该工作评估了现有MLLMs在长视频摘要中的表现，揭示了它们在时间理解方面的系统性差距。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在长视频摘要任务中面临显著挑战，特别是在保持长时间尺度的时间保真度和生成语义与时间上都准确的摘要方面。需要专门的基准来评估MLLMs在长视频摘要中的时间对齐能力。
AI.method: 提出了LVSum基准，包含13个领域的长视频，每个视频都配有包含精确时间参考的人工生成摘要。使用新引入的基于LLM的内容相关性和模态一致性指标，以及标准评估指标，对专有和开源MLLMs进行全面评估。
AI.result: 实验揭示了现有MLLMs在时间理解方面的系统性差距，为推进长视频摘要中的时间推理提供了新的基础见解。
AI.conclusion: LVSum基准为评估长视频摘要提供了重要工具，揭示了MLLMs在时间对齐方面的局限性，为改进多模态模型的时间推理能力指明了方向。

title: Gypscie: A Cross-Platform AI Artifact Management System
summary:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) models, encompassing both traditional machine learning (ML) and more advanced approaches such as deep learning and large language models (LLMs), play a central role in modern applications. AI model lifecycle management involves the end-to-end process of managing these models, from data collection and preparation to model building, evaluation, deployment, and continuous monitoring. This process is inherently complex, as it requires the coordination of diverse services that manage AI artifacts such as datasets, dataflows, and models, all orchestrated to operate seamlessly. In this context, it is essential to isolate applications from the complexity of interacting with heterogeneous services, datasets, and AI platforms.
  In this paper, we introduce Gypscie, a cross-platform AI artifact management system. By providing a unified view of all AI artifacts, the Gypscie platform simplifies the development and deployment of AI applications. This unified view is realized through a knowledge graph that captures application semantics and a rule-based query language that supports reasoning over data and models. Model lifecycle activities are represented as high-level dataflows that can be scheduled across multiple platforms, such as servers, cloud platforms, or supercomputers. Finally, Gypscie records provenance information about the artifacts it produces, thereby enabling explainability. Our qualitative comparison with representative AI systems shows that Gypscie supports a broader range of functionalities across the AI artifact lifecycle. Our experimental evaluation demonstrates that Gypscie can successfully optimize and schedule dataflows on AI platforms from an abstract specification.

AI.tldr: Gypscie是一个跨平台AI工件管理系统，通过知识图谱和规则查询语言提供统一视图，支持AI模型生命周期管理，包括数据流调度和溯源记录。
AI.motivation: AI模型生命周期管理涉及从数据收集到部署监控的复杂流程，需要协调多种服务和平台。现有系统难以隔离应用与异构服务、数据集和AI平台的交互复杂性。
AI.method: Gypscie采用知识图谱捕获应用语义，使用基于规则的查询语言支持数据和模型推理，将模型生命周期活动表示为可在多平台调度的数据流，并记录工件溯源信息。
AI.result: 定性比较显示Gypscie支持更广泛的AI工件生命周期功能；实验评估表明它能成功从抽象规范优化和调度AI平台上的数据流。
AI.conclusion: Gypscie通过统一视图简化AI应用开发部署，支持跨平台数据流调度和可解释性，为AI模型生命周期管理提供了有效解决方案。

title: AOP-Smart: A RAG-Enhanced Large Language Model Framework for Adverse Outcome Pathway Analysis
summary: Adverse Outcome Pathways (AOPs) are an important knowledge framework in toxicological research and risk assessment. In recent years, large language models (LLMs) have gradually been applied to AOP-related question answering and mechanistic reasoning tasks. However, due to the existence of the hallucination problem, that is, the model may generate content that is inconsistent with facts or lacks evidence, their reliability is still limited. To address this issue, this study proposes an AOP-oriented Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework, AOP-Smart. Based on the official XML data from AOP-Wiki, this method uses Key Events (KEs), Key Event Relationships (KERs), and specific AOP information to retrieve relevant knowledge for user questions, thereby improving the reliability of the generated results of large language models. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method, this study constructed a test set containing 20 AOP-related question answering tasks, covering KE identification, upstream and downstream KE retrieval, and complex AOP retrieval tasks. Experiments were conducted on three mainstream large language models, Gemini, DeepSeek, and ChatGPT, and comparative tests were performed under two settings: without RAG and with RAG. The experimental results show that, without using RAG, the accuracies of GPT, DeepSeek, and Gemini were 15.0\%, 35.0\%, and 20.0\%, respectively; after using RAG, their accuracies increased to 95.0\%, 100.0\%, and 95.0\%, respectively. The results indicate that AOP-Smart can significantly alleviate the hallucination problem of large language models in AOP knowledge tasks, and greatly improve the accuracy and consistency of their answers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AOP-Smart框架，通过检索增强生成技术解决LLM在毒理学AOP知识问答中的幻觉问题，显著提升回答准确性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在毒理学AOP知识问答中存在幻觉问题，生成内容可能与事实不符或缺乏证据，限制了其在专业领域的可靠性应用。
AI.method: 基于AOP-Wiki官方XML数据，利用关键事件、关键事件关系和特定AOP信息构建检索增强生成框架，为LLM提供相关背景知识来改善生成结果。
AI.result: 在20个AOP相关问答任务上测试，使用RAG后GPT准确率从15%提升到95%，DeepSeek从35%提升到100%，Gemini从20%提升到95%，显著缓解幻觉问题。
AI.conclusion: AOP-Smart框架能有效缓解LLM在AOP知识任务中的幻觉问题，大幅提高回答的准确性和一致性，为专业领域知识问答提供可靠解决方案。

title: Preventing Latent Rehearsal Decay in Online Continual SSL with SOLAR
summary: This paper explores Online Continual Self-Supervised Learning (OCSSL), a scenario in which models learn from continuous streams of unlabeled, non-stationary data, where methods typically employ replay and fast convergence is a central desideratum. We find that OCSSL requires particular attention to the stability-plasticity trade-off: stable methods (e.g. replay with Reservoir sampling) are able to converge faster compared to plastic ones (e.g. FIFO buffer), but incur in performance drops under certain conditions. We explain this collapse phenomenon with the Latent Rehearsal Decay hypothesis, which attributes it to latent space degradation under excessive stability of replay. We introduce two metrics (Overlap and Deviation) that diagnose latent degradation and correlate with accuracy declines. Building on these insights, we propose SOLAR, which leverages efficient online proxies of Deviation to guide buffer management and incorporates an explicit Overlap loss, allowing SOLAR to adaptively managing plasticity. Experiments demonstrate that SOLAR achieves state-of-the-art performance on OCSSL vision benchmarks, with both high convergence speed and final performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SOLAR方法解决在线持续自监督学习中的稳定性-可塑性权衡问题，通过引入重叠度和偏差度指标诊断潜在空间退化，并利用这些指标指导缓冲区管理和优化，在视觉基准上实现最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 在线持续自监督学习面临非平稳无标签数据流的挑战，现有方法在稳定性与可塑性之间存在权衡：稳定方法（如重放）收敛快但可能在某些条件下性能下降，而可塑性方法（如FIFO缓冲区）则相反。需要解决这种权衡以实现快速收敛和最终性能的平衡。
AI.method: 提出SOLAR方法：1）引入重叠度和偏差度两个指标诊断潜在空间退化；2）利用高效的在线偏差度代理指导缓冲区管理；3）引入显式的重叠度损失函数；4）自适应管理可塑性，平衡稳定性与可塑性。
AI.result: SOLAR在在线持续自监督学习视觉基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，同时具备高收敛速度和最终性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过诊断潜在空间退化的指标和自适应管理可塑性，SOLAR有效解决了在线持续自监督学习中的稳定性-可塑性权衡问题，为处理非平稳无标签数据流提供了有效解决方案。

title: SinkTrack: Attention Sink based Context Anchoring for Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) suffer from hallucination and context forgetting. Prior studies suggest that attention drift is a primary cause of these problems, where LLMs' focus shifts towards newly generated tokens and away from the initial input context. To counteract this, we make use of a related, intrinsic characteristic of LLMs: attention sink -- the tendency to consistently allocate high attention to the very first token (i.e., <BOS>) of a sequence. Concretely, we propose an advanced context anchoring method, SinkTrack, which treats <BOS> as an information anchor and injects key contextual features (such as those derived from the input image or instruction) into its representation. As such, LLM remains anchored to the initial input context throughout the entire generation process. SinkTrack is training-free, plug-and-play, and introduces negligible inference overhead. Experiments demonstrate that SinkTrack mitigates hallucination and context forgetting across both textual (e.g., +21.6% on SQuAD2.0 with Llama3.1-8B-Instruct) and multi-modal (e.g., +22.8% on M3CoT with Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct) tasks. Its consistent gains across different architectures and scales underscore the robustness and generalizability. We also analyze its underlying working mechanism from the perspective of information delivery. Our source code is available at https://github.com/67L1/SinkTrack.

AI.tldr: SinkTrack是一种训练免费、即插即用的上下文锚定方法，通过将关键上下文特征注入到序列的第一个token（<BOS>）表示中，利用注意力下沉现象来缓解LLM的幻觉和上下文遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型存在幻觉和上下文遗忘问题，先前研究表明注意力漂移是主要原因，即模型的注意力从初始输入上下文转移到新生成的token上。作者观察到LLM具有"注意力下沉"的内在特性——倾向于持续高度关注序列的第一个token（<BOS>），因此提出利用这一特性来锚定上下文。
AI.method: 提出SinkTrack方法，将<BOS>作为信息锚点，将输入图像或指令等关键上下文特征注入到其表示中。该方法训练免费、即插即用，推理开销极小，通过保持LLM在整个生成过程中锚定到初始输入上下文来缓解注意力漂移。
AI.result: 实验表明SinkTrack在文本任务（如Llama3.1-8B-Instruct在SQuAD2.0上提升21.6%）和多模态任务（如Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct在M3CoT上提升22.8%）上都能有效缓解幻觉和上下文遗忘。在不同架构和规模模型上的稳定增益证明了其鲁棒性和泛化性。
AI.conclusion: SinkTrack通过利用注意力下沉现象，将<BOS>作为信息锚点注入上下文特征，有效缓解了LLM的幻觉和上下文遗忘问题。该方法简单高效，无需训练，具有很好的实用价值。

title: From GPT-3 to GPT-5: Mapping their capabilities, scope, limitations, and consequences
summary: We present the progress of the GPT family from GPT-3 through GPT-3.5, GPT-4, GPT-4 Turbo, GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, and the GPT-5 family. Our work is comparative rather than merely historical. We investigates how the family evolved in technical framing, user interaction, modality, deployment architecture, and governance viewpoint. The work focuses on five recurring themes: technical progression, capability changes, deployment shifts, persistent limitations, and downstream consequences. In term of research design, we consider official technical reports, system cards, API and model documentation, product announcements, release notes, and peer-reviewed secondary studies. A primary assertion is that later GPT generations should not be interpreted only as larger or more accurate language models. Instead, the family evolves from a scaled few-shot text predictor into a set of aligned, multimodal, tool-oriented, long-context, and increasingly workflow-integrated systems. This development complicates simple model-to-model comparison because product routing, tool access, safety tuning, and interface design become part of the effective system. Across generations, several limitations remain unchanged: hallucination, prompt sensitivity, benchmark fragility, uneven behavior across domains and populations, and incomplete public transparency about architecture and training. However, the family has evolved software development, educational practice, information work, interface design, and discussions of frontier-model governance. We infer that the transition from GPT-3 to GPT-5 is best understood not only as an improvement in model capability, but also as a broader reformulation of what a deployable AI system is, how it is evaluated, and where responsibility should be located when such systems are used at scale.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统比较了GPT系列从GPT-3到GPT-5的技术演进，强调其不仅是语言模型的规模扩展，而是向多模态、工具集成、工作流整合系统的转变，同时分析了持续存在的局限性和社会影响。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是系统分析GPT系列的技术演进轨迹，超越简单的模型对比，理解从文本预测器到集成AI系统的转变过程，以及这种转变对技术框架、用户交互、部署架构和治理观点的影响。
AI.method: 采用比较研究方法，分析官方技术报告、系统卡片、API文档、产品公告、发布说明和同行评审的二次研究，聚焦技术进展、能力变化、部署转变、持续局限性和下游影响五个主题。
AI.result: 研究发现GPT系列从少样本文本预测器演变为对齐、多模态、工具导向、长上下文和工作流集成的系统，产品路由、工具访问、安全调优和界面设计成为系统有效性的组成部分。
AI.conclusion: GPT系列从GPT-3到GPT-5的转变不仅是模型能力的提升，更是对可部署AI系统定义、评估方式和规模化使用责任定位的重新构想，同时持续存在幻觉、提示敏感性、基准脆弱性等局限性。

title: HTAA: Enhancing LLM Planning via Hybrid Toolset Agentization & Adaptation
summary: Enabling large language models to scale and reliably use hundreds of tools is critical for real-world applications, yet challenging due to the inefficiency and error accumulation inherent in flat tool-calling architectures. To address this, we propose Hybrid Toolset Agentization & Adaptation (HTAA), a hierarchical framework for scalable tool-use planning. We propose a novel toolset agentization paradigm, which encapsulates frequently co-used tools into specialized agent tools, thereby reducing the planner's action space and mitigating redundancy. To ensure effective coordination, we design Asymmetric Planner Adaptation, a trajectory-based training paradigm that aligns the high-level planner with agent tools via backward reconstruction and forward refinement. To validate the performance of HTAA, we conduct experiments on a real-world internal dataset, InfoVerify, based on the POI validation workflow of China's largest online large-scale ride-hailing platform, featuring long-horizon executable tool trajectories. Experiments on InfoVerify and widely-used benchmarks show that HTAA consistently achieves higher task success rates, requires short tool calling trajectories, and significantly reduces context overhead compared to strong baselines. Furthermore, in a production deployment, HTAA substantially reduces manual validation effort and operational cost, demonstrating its practical efficacy.

AI.tldr: HTAA提出分层框架解决大语言模型工具调用问题，通过工具集代理化减少动作空间，采用非对称规划器适配协调高层规划与代理工具，在真实场景中提升任务成功率并降低上下文开销。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在真实应用中需要可靠使用数百个工具，但平面工具调用架构存在效率低下和错误累积问题，难以实现规模化工具使用。
AI.method: 1. 工具集代理化：将频繁共同使用的工具封装为专门的代理工具，减少规划器的动作空间；2. 非对称规划器适配：基于轨迹的训练范式，通过后向重建和前向精化对齐高层规划器与代理工具。
AI.result: 在InfoVerify（中国最大在线大规模网约车平台的POI验证工作流）和广泛使用的基准测试中，HTAA始终获得更高的任务成功率，需要更短的工具调用轨迹，并显著减少上下文开销。生产部署中大幅减少人工验证工作和运营成本。
AI.conclusion: HTAA通过分层框架有效解决了大语言模型规模化工具使用的挑战，在真实世界应用中展示了实用性和高效性。

title: Distributionally Robust PAC-Bayesian Control
summary: We present a distributionally robust PAC-Bayesian framework for certifying the performance of learning-based finite-horizon controllers. While existing PAC-Bayes control literature typically assumes bounded losses and matching training and deployment distributions, we explicitly address unbounded losses and environmental distribution shifts (the sim-to-real gap). We achieve this by drawing on two modern lines of research, namely the PAC-Bayes generalization theory and distributionally robust optimization via the type-1 Wasserstein distance. By leveraging the System Level Synthesis (SLS) reparametrization, we derive a sub-Gaussian loss proxy and a bound on the performance loss due to distribution shift. Both are tied directly to the operator norm of the closed-loop map. For linear time-invariant systems, this yields a computationally tractable optimization-based framework together with high-probability safety certificates for deployment in real-world environments that differ from those used in training.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种分布鲁棒的PAC-Bayesian框架，用于认证基于学习的有限时域控制器的性能，特别处理无界损失和训练-部署分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有PAC-Bayes控制文献通常假设有界损失和匹配的训练/部署分布，但实际应用中存在无界损失和环境分布偏移（模拟到现实的差距），需要更鲁棒的认证框架。
AI.method: 结合PAC-Bayes泛化理论和基于1型Wasserstein距离的分布鲁棒优化，利用系统级综合(SLS)重参数化，推导出次高斯损失代理和分布偏移导致的性能损失上界，与闭环映射的算子范数直接相关。
AI.result: 对于线性时不变系统，提出了计算可行的基于优化的框架，并为在不同于训练环境的真实世界部署提供了高概率安全证书。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为学习型控制器在存在分布偏移时的性能认证提供了理论保证，特别适用于机器人控制等模拟到现实迁移场景。

title: Prompt Relay: Inference-Time Temporal Control for Multi-Event Video Generation
summary: Video diffusion models have achieved remarkable progress in generating high-quality videos. However, these models struggle to represent the temporal succession of multiple events in real-world videos and lack explicit mechanisms to control when semantic concepts appear, how long they persist, and the order in which multiple events occur. Such control is especially important for movie-grade video synthesis, where coherent storytelling depends on precise timing, duration, and transitions between events. When using a single paragraph-style prompt to describe a sequence of complex events, models often exhibit semantic entanglement, where concepts intended for different moments in the video bleed into one another, resulting in poor text-video alignment. To address these limitations, we propose Prompt Relay, an inference-time, plug-and-play method to enable fine-grained temporal control in multi-event video generation, requiring no architectural modifications and no additional computational overhead. Prompt Relay introduces a penalty into the cross-attention mechanism, so that each temporal segment attends only to its assigned prompt, allowing the model to represent one semantic concept at a time and thereby improving temporal prompt alignment, reducing semantic interference, and enhancing visual quality.

AI.tldr: Prompt Relay：一种推理时即插即用方法，通过惩罚交叉注意力机制实现多事件视频生成的细粒度时序控制，无需修改架构或增加计算开销
AI.motivation: 视频扩散模型在生成高质量视频方面取得了显著进展，但存在以下问题：1) 难以表示真实视频中多个事件的时序连续性；2) 缺乏控制语义概念何时出现、持续多久以及多个事件发生顺序的显式机制；3) 使用单段落式提示描述复杂事件序列时，模型常出现语义纠缠，导致文本-视频对齐不佳
AI.method: 提出Prompt Relay方法，在推理时通过惩罚交叉注意力机制，使每个时间片段仅关注其分配的提示，从而让模型一次只表示一个语义概念。该方法无需架构修改，不增加计算开销
AI.result: 该方法提高了时序提示对齐，减少了语义干扰，并增强了视觉质量。特别适用于电影级视频合成，其中连贯的叙事依赖于事件之间的精确时序、持续时间和过渡
AI.conclusion: Prompt Relay为多事件视频生成提供了有效的细粒度时序控制解决方案，解决了现有视频扩散模型在时序表示和语义控制方面的局限性

title: Zero-shot World Models Are Developmentally Efficient Learners
summary: Young children demonstrate early abilities to understand their physical world, estimating depth, motion, object coherence, interactions, and many other aspects of physical scene understanding. Children are both data-efficient and flexible cognitive systems, creating competence despite extremely limited training data, while generalizing to myriad untrained tasks -- a major challenge even for today's best AI systems. Here we introduce a novel computational hypothesis for these abilities, the Zero-shot Visual World Model (ZWM). ZWM is based on three principles: a sparse temporally-factored predictor that decouples appearance from dynamics; zero-shot estimation through approximate causal inference; and composition of inferences to build more complex abilities. We show that ZWM can be learned from the first-person experience of a single child, rapidly generating competence across multiple physical understanding benchmarks. It also broadly recapitulates behavioral signatures of child development and builds brain-like internal representations. Our work presents a blueprint for efficient and flexible learning from human-scale data, advancing both a computational account for children's early physical understanding and a path toward data-efficient AI systems.

AI.tldr: 提出Zero-shot Visual World Model (ZWM)作为儿童物理世界理解能力的计算模型，该模型从单个儿童的第一人称经验学习，能在多个物理理解基准上快速生成能力，并复现儿童发展的行为特征。
AI.motivation: 儿童在数据有限的情况下能高效灵活地理解物理世界，而当前AI系统在这方面面临重大挑战。研究旨在为儿童的早期物理理解提供计算解释，并为数据高效的AI系统提供路径。
AI.method: ZWM基于三个原则：1) 稀疏时间因子预测器，将外观与动态解耦；2) 通过近似因果推理进行零样本估计；3) 推理组合构建更复杂能力。模型从单个儿童的第一人称经验学习。
AI.result: ZWM能在多个物理理解基准上快速生成能力，广泛复现儿童发展的行为特征，并构建类似大脑的内部表征。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为从人类规模数据中进行高效灵活学习提供了蓝图，既推进了对儿童早期物理理解的计算解释，也为数据高效的AI系统提供了路径。

title: Mem$^2$Evolve: Towards Self-Evolving Agents via Co-Evolutionary Capability Expansion and Experience Distillation
summary: While large language model--powered agents can self-evolve by accumulating experience or by dynamically creating new assets (i.e., tools or expert agents), existing frameworks typically treat these two evolutionary processes in isolation. This separation overlooks their intrinsic interdependence: the former is inherently bounded by a manually predefined static toolset, while the latter generates new assets from scratch without experiential guidance, leading to limited capability growth and unstable evolution. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel paradigm of co-evolutionary Capability Expansion and Experience Distillation. Guided by this paradigm, we propose the \textbf{Mem$^{\textbf{2}}$Evolve}, which integrates two core components: \textbf{Experience Memory} and \textbf{Asset Memory}. Specifically, Mem$^{2}$Evolve leverages accumulated experience to guide the dynamic creation of assets, thereby expanding the agent's capability space while simultaneously acquiring new experience to achieve co-evolution. Extensive experiments across 6 task categories and 8 benchmarks demonstrate that Mem$^{2}$Evolve achieves improvement of 18.53\% over standard LLMs, 11.80\% over agents evolving solely through experience, and 6.46\% over those evolving solely through asset creation, establishing it as a substantially more effective and stable self-evolving agent framework. Code is available at: https://buaa-irip-llm.github.io/Mem2Evolve.

AI.tldr: Mem²Evolve提出了一种新的智能体自进化范式，通过经验记忆和资产记忆的双重机制，实现能力扩展与经验提炼的协同进化，解决了现有框架中经验积累与资产创建分离的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体自进化框架通常将经验积累和资产创建（工具或专家智能体）视为独立过程，这忽略了它们的内在相互依赖关系。经验积累受限于预定义静态工具集，而资产创建缺乏经验指导，导致能力增长有限且进化不稳定。
AI.method: 提出协同进化能力扩展与经验提炼范式，包含两个核心组件：经验记忆（积累智能体执行经验）和资产记忆（动态创建新工具或专家智能体）。Mem²Evolve利用积累的经验指导资产创建，扩展能力空间，同时获取新经验实现协同进化。
AI.result: 在6个任务类别和8个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，Mem²Evolve相比标准LLM提升18.53%，相比仅通过经验进化的智能体提升11.80%，相比仅通过资产创建的智能体提升6.46%，成为更有效且稳定的自进化智能体框架。
AI.conclusion: Mem²Evolve通过协同进化范式成功解决了LLM智能体自进化中经验积累与资产创建的分离问题，实现了更有效和稳定的能力增长，为智能体自进化提供了新的研究方向。

title: MoEITS: A Green AI approach for simplifying MoE-LLMs
summary:
Large language models are transforming all areas of academia and industry, attracting the attention of researchers, professionals, and the general public. In the trek for more powerful architectures, Mixture-of-Experts, inspired by ensemble models, have emerged as one of the most effective ways to follow. However, this implies a high computational burden for both training and inference. To reduce the impact on computing and memory footprint as well as the energy consumption, simplification methods has arisen as very effective procedures.
  In this paper, an original algorithm, MoEITS, for MoE-LLMs simplification is presented. The algorithm is characterized by a refined simplicity, underpinned by standardized Information Theoretic frameworks. MoEITS is analyzed in depth from theoretical and practical points of view. Its computational complexity is studied. Its performance on the accuracy of the simplified LLMs and the reduction rate achieved is assessed through a thoroughly designed experimentation. This empirical evaluation includes a comparison with state-of-the-art MoE-LLM pruning methods applied on Mixtral $8\times7$B, Qwen1.5-2.7B, and DeepSeek-V2-Lite. The extensive experimentation conducted demonstrates that MoEITS outperforms state-of-the-art techniques by generating models that are both effective across all benchmarks and computationally efficient.
  The code implementing the method will be available at https://github.com/luisbalru/MoEITS.

AI.tldr: MoEITS是一种基于信息论的MoE-LLM简化算法，通过标准化信息理论框架实现模型剪枝，在保持精度的同时显著降低计算和内存开销。
AI.motivation: MoE架构虽然强大但计算负担重，需要简化方法来减少计算、内存占用和能耗，同时保持模型性能。
AI.method: 提出MoEITS算法，基于标准化信息理论框架进行MoE-LLM简化，包含理论分析和实践实现，计算复杂度分析。
AI.result: 在Mixtral 8×7B、Qwen1.5-2.7B和DeepSeek-V2-Lite上实验，MoEITS在准确性和简化率方面优于现有MoE剪枝方法。
AI.conclusion: MoEITS是有效的MoE-LLM简化方法，能生成既高效又计算友好的模型，代码已开源。

title: Counting to Four is still a Chore for VLMs
summary: Vision--language models (VLMs) have achieved impressive performance on complex multimodal reasoning tasks, yet they still fail on simple grounding skills such as object counting. Existing evaluations mostly assess only final outputs, offering limited insight into where these failures arise inside the model. In this work, we present an empirical study of VLM counting behavior through both behavioral and mechanistic analysis. We introduce COUNTINGTRICKS, a controlled evaluation suite of simple shape-based counting cases designed to expose vulnerabilities under different patchification layouts and adversarial prompting conditions. Using attention analysis and component-wise probing, we show that count-relevant visual evidence is strongest in the modality projection stage but degrades substantially in later language layers, where models become more susceptible to text priors. Motivated by this finding, we further evaluate Modality Attention Share (MAS), a lightweight intervention that encourages a minimum budget of visual attention during answer generation. Our results suggest that counting failures in VLMs stem not only from visual perception limits, but also from the underuse of visual evidence during language-stage reasoning. Code and dataset will be released at https://github.com/leduy99/-CVPRW26-Modality-Attention-Share.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过行为学和机制分析研究VLM计数能力，发现计数失败不仅源于视觉感知限制，更源于语言推理阶段视觉证据利用不足，并提出轻量级干预方法MAS来改善这一问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在复杂多模态推理任务上表现出色，但在简单基础技能如物体计数上仍会失败。现有评估大多只关注最终输出，对模型内部失败原因提供有限洞察。因此需要深入分析VLM计数行为的内在机制。
AI.method: 1) 提出COUNTINGTRICKS评估套件，包含基于简单形状的计数案例，设计用于暴露不同patchification布局和对抗提示条件下的脆弱性；2) 使用注意力分析和组件探测技术；3) 提出Modality Attention Share (MAS)轻量级干预方法，在答案生成阶段强制分配最低预算的视觉注意力。
AI.result: 研究发现：1) 计数相关的视觉证据在模态投影阶段最强，但在后续语言层中显著退化；2) 模型在语言层更容易受到文本先验的影响；3) MAS干预能够改善计数性能，表明计数失败不仅源于视觉感知限制，更源于语言推理阶段视觉证据利用不足。
AI.conclusion: VLM计数失败的根本原因不仅在于视觉感知能力限制，更重要的是在语言推理阶段未能充分利用视觉证据。通过MAS等干预方法可以改善这一缺陷，为提升VLM基础能力提供了新思路。

title: VeriTrans: Fine-Tuned LLM-Assisted NL-to-PL Translation via a Deterministic Neuro-Symbolic Pipeline
summary: \textbf{VeriTrans} is a reliability-first ML system that compiles natural-language requirements into solver-ready logic with validator-gated reliability. The pipeline integrates an instruction-tuned NL$\!\to\!$PL translator, round-trip reconstruction (PL$\!\to\!$NL) used as a high-precision acceptance gate, and canonical PL$\!\to\!$CNF compilation, all executed via fixed API configuration (temperature$=0$; fine-tuning runs use seed$=42$) and per-item artifact logging (prompts, outputs, hashes) to support auditability and replay-driven debugging. On \textbf{SatBench} (2{,}100 specifications), VeriTrans achieves 94.46\% SAT/UNSAT correctness and 87.73\% median round-trip similarity. Compact fine-tuning on 100--150 curated examples improves fidelity by about 1--1.5\,pp without increasing latency (mean 25.8\,s/spec on our 201-spec runtime subset). A thresholded acceptance policy on the round-trip score exposes a reliability--coverage knob: at $τ{=}75$, roughly 68\% of items are retained with $\sim$94\% correctness on the accepted set. Validator overhead contributes $<15\%$ of end-to-end runtime, and all prompts/responses and timing metadata are logged to enable replay-driven debugging and regression testing. By separating learned translation from symbolic verification and enforcing deterministic, validator-gated acceptance, VeriTrans turns NL$\!\to\!$logic front-ends into auditable, reproducible components for reliability-critical workflows.

AI.tldr: VeriTrans是一个可靠性优先的ML系统，将自然语言需求编译为可求解的逻辑形式，通过验证器门控确保可靠性，在SAT/UNSAT正确性上达到94.46%
AI.motivation: 将自然语言需求转化为逻辑形式是可靠性关键工作流中的重要任务，但现有方法缺乏确定性、可审计性和可重现性。VeriTrans旨在通过验证器门控的可靠性机制，将NL→逻辑前端转变为可审计、可重现的组件。
AI.method: 系统集成指令调优的NL→PL翻译器、往返重构(PL→NL)作为高精度接受门控、规范PL→CNF编译。采用固定API配置(temperature=0)和逐项工件记录(提示、输出、哈希)支持审计性和重放驱动调试。通过紧凑微调(100-150个示例)提升保真度。
AI.result: 在SatBench(2100个规范)上达到94.46% SAT/UNSAT正确性和87.73%中位数往返相似度。微调提升保真度1-1.5pp而不增加延迟(平均25.8秒/规范)。阈值接受策略在τ=75时保留约68%项目，接受集正确率约94%。验证器开销<15%端到端运行时间。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离学习翻译与符号验证，并强制执行确定性、验证器门控的接受机制，VeriTrans将NL→逻辑前端转变为可靠性关键工作流中可审计、可重现的组件。

title: YIELD: A Large-Scale Dataset and Evaluation Framework for Information Elicitation Agents
summary: Most conversational agents (CAs) are designed to satisfy user needs through user-driven interactions. However, many real-world settings, such as academic interviewing, judicial proceedings, and journalistic investigations, involve broader institutional decision-making processes and require agents that can elicit information from users. In this paper, we introduce Information Elicitation Agents (IEAs) in which the agent's goal is to elicit information from users to support the agent's institutional or task-oriented objectives. To enable systematic research on this setting, we present YIELD, a 26M-token dataset of 2,281 ethically sourced, human-to-human dialogues. Moreover, we formalize information elicitation as a finite-horizon POMDP and propose novel metrics tailored to IEAs. Pilot experiments on multiple foundation LLMs show that training on YIELD improves their alignment with real elicitation behavior and findings are corroborated by human evaluation. We release YIELD under CC BY 4.0. The dataset, project code, evaluation tools, and fine-tuned model adapters are available at: https://github.com/infosenselab/yield.

AI.tldr: 提出了信息获取代理（IEA）的概念，专注于从用户获取信息以支持机构决策，并发布了YIELD数据集（26M token，2,281个人际对话）用于系统研究。
AI.motivation: 现有对话代理主要满足用户需求，但在学术访谈、司法程序、新闻调查等需要机构决策的场景中，需要能够主动从用户获取信息的代理。
AI.method: 将信息获取形式化为有限时域POMDP，提出专门针对IEA的评估指标，并在多个基础LLM上进行实验，使用YIELD数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在YIELD数据集上训练能显著提升LLM与真实信息获取行为的对齐度，人类评估也证实了这一发现。
AI.conclusion: 信息获取代理是一个重要研究方向，YIELD数据集和相关工具为系统研究提供了基础，训练能有效提升LLM的信息获取能力。

title: Mitigating Privacy Risk via Forget Set-Free Unlearning
comment: 50 pages, 20 figures, Published at The Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations
summary: Training machine learning models requires the storage of large datasets, which often contain sensitive or private data. Storing data is associated with a number of potential risks which increase over time, such as database breaches and malicious adversaries. Machine unlearning is the study of methods to efficiently remove the influence of training data subsets from previously-trained models. Existing unlearning methods typically require direct access to the "forget set" -- the data to be forgotten-and organisations must retain this data for unlearning rather than deleting it immediately upon request, increasing risks associated with the forget set. We introduce partially-blind unlearning -- utilizing auxiliary information to unlearn without explicit access to the forget set. We also propose a practical framework Reload, a partially-blind method based on gradient optimization and structured weight sparsification to operationalize partially-blind unlearning. We show that Reload efficiently unlearns, approximating models retrained from scratch, and outperforms several forget set-dependent approaches. On language models, Reload unlearns entities using <0.025% of the retain set and <7% of model weights in <8 minutes on Llama2-7B. In the corrective case, Reload achieves unlearning even when only 10% of corrupted data is identified.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种部分盲遗忘学习框架Reload，通过梯度优化和结构化权重稀疏化，无需直接访问待遗忘数据集即可从模型中移除特定数据的影响。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习模型训练需要存储大量敏感数据，存在数据泄露风险。现有的遗忘学习方法需要直接访问待遗忘数据集，导致组织必须保留这些数据而非立即删除，增加了安全风险。因此需要开发无需直接访问待遗忘数据集的遗忘学习方法。
AI.method: 提出部分盲遗忘学习概念，利用辅助信息而非直接访问待遗忘数据集。开发Reload框架，基于梯度优化和结构化权重稀疏化实现部分盲遗忘学习。该方法仅需保留集的一小部分和模型权重的部分信息。
AI.result: Reload能高效实现遗忘学习，接近从头训练模型的性能，优于多种依赖待遗忘数据集的方法。在语言模型上，仅需保留集的<0.025%和模型权重的<7%，在Llama2-7B上8分钟内完成实体遗忘。在校正场景中，即使仅识别10%的污染数据也能实现遗忘学习。
AI.conclusion: 部分盲遗忘学习是可行的，Reload框架提供了一种实用方法，无需直接访问待遗忘数据集即可实现高效遗忘学习，降低了数据保留风险，增强了隐私保护。

title: Intra-finger Variability of Diffusion-based Latent Fingerprint Generation
comment: Accepted at the 2nd Workshop on Foundation and Generative Models in Biometrics (FoundGen-Bio), held in conjunction with CVPR 2026
summary: The primary goal of this work is to systematically evaluate the intra-finger variability of synthetic fingerprints (particularly latent prints) generated using a state-of-the-art diffusion model. Specifically, we focus on enhancing the latent style diversity of the generative model by constructing a comprehensive \textit{latent style bank} curated from seven diverse datasets, which enables the precise synthesis of latent prints with over 40 distinct styles encapsulating different surfaces and processing techniques. We also implement a semi-automated framework to understand the integrity of fingerprint ridges and minutiae in the generated impressions. Our analysis indicates that though the generation process largely preserves the identity, a small number of local inconsistencies (addition and removal of minutiae) are introduced, especially when there are poor quality regions in the reference image. Furthermore, mismatch between the reference image and the chosen style embedding that guides the generation process introduces global inconsistencies in the form of hallucinated ridge patterns. These insights highlight the limitations of existing synthetic fingerprint generators and the need to further improve these models to simultaneously enhance both diversity and identity consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了使用扩散模型生成的合成指纹（特别是潜指纹）的指纹内变异性，通过构建包含40多种不同风格的潜风格库来增强生成多样性，并分析了生成指纹中脊线和细节特征的完整性。
AI.motivation: 现有合成指纹生成器在同时增强多样性和身份一致性方面存在局限，需要系统评估扩散模型生成的合成指纹的指纹内变异性，特别是潜指纹的生成质量。
AI.method: 1. 构建包含7个不同数据集的综合潜风格库，支持40多种不同表面和处理技术的风格；2. 实现半自动化框架分析生成指纹中脊线和细节特征的完整性；3. 评估参考图像与风格嵌入之间的匹配度对生成质量的影响。
AI.result: 生成过程基本保持身份一致性，但在参考图像质量较差的区域会引入少量局部不一致（细节特征的增加和移除）。参考图像与风格嵌入不匹配会导致脊线模式的全局不一致（幻觉模式）。
AI.conclusion: 现有合成指纹生成器在同时增强多样性和身份一致性方面存在局限性，需要进一步改进这些模型以平衡多样性和身份一致性。

title: ClawVM: Harness-Managed Virtual Memory for Stateful Tool-Using LLM Agents
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure, 10 tables; accepted at EuroMLSys '26 (6th Workshop on Machine Learning and Systems, co-located with EuroSys 2026)
summary: Stateful tool-using LLM agents treat the context window as working memory, yet today's agent harnesses manage residency and durability as best-effort, causing recurring failures: lost state after compaction, bypassed flushes on reset, and destructive writeback. We present \textsc{ClawVM}, a virtual memory layer that manages state as typed pages with minimum-fidelity invariants, multi-resolution representations under a token budget, and validated writeback at every lifecycle boundary. Because the harness already assembles prompts, mediates tools, and observes lifecycle events, it is the natural enforcement point; placing the contract there makes residency and durability deterministic and auditable. Across synthetic workloads, 12 real-session traces, and adversarial stress tests, \textsc{ClawVM} eliminates all policy-controllable faults whenever the minimum-fidelity set fits within the token budget, confirmed by an offline oracle, and adds median <50 microseconds of policy-engine overhead per turn.

AI.tldr: ClawVM是一个虚拟内存层，为LLM代理提供状态管理，通过类型化页面、多分辨率表示和验证写回机制，确保状态持久性和确定性。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理将上下文窗口作为工作内存，但状态管理是尽力而为的，导致经常性故障：压缩后状态丢失、重置时绕过刷新、破坏性写回等。
AI.method: 在代理框架中实现虚拟内存层，管理类型化页面，支持最小保真度约束、令牌预算下的多分辨率表示，以及在每个生命周期边界进行验证写回。
AI.result: 在合成工作负载、12个真实会话跟踪和对抗性压力测试中，ClawVM消除了所有策略可控故障（当最小保真度集适合令牌预算时），每轮策略引擎开销中位数<50微秒。
AI.conclusion: 在代理框架中放置状态管理合约使驻留和持久性变得确定性和可审计，解决了当前LLM代理状态管理的根本问题。

title: When Verification Fails: How Compositionally Infeasible Claims Escape Rejection
summary: Scientific claim verification, the task of determining whether claims are entailed by scientific evidence, is fundamental to establishing discoveries in evidence while preventing misinformation. This process involves evaluating each asserted constraint against validated evidence. Under the Closed-World Assumption (CWA), a claim is accepted if and only if all asserted constraints are positively supported. We show that existing verification benchmarks cannot distinguish models enforcing this standard from models applying a simpler shortcut called salient-constraint checking, which applies CWA's rejection criterion only to the most salient constraint and accepts when that constraint is supported. Because existing benchmarks construct infeasible claims by perturbing a single salient element they are insufficient at distinguishing between rigorous claim verification and simple salient-constraint reliance. To separate the two, we construct compositionally infeasible claims where the salient constraint is supported but a non-salient constraint is contradicted. Across model families and modalities, models that otherwise saturate existing benchmarks consistently over-accept these claims, confirming the prevalence of such shortcut reasoning. Via model context interventions, we show that different models and prompting strategies occupy distinct positions on a shared ROC curve, indicating that the gap between model families reflects differences in verification threshold rather than underlying reasoning ability, and that the compositional inference bottleneck is a structural property of current verification behavior that strategy guidance alone cannot overcome.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了现有科学声明验证基准的缺陷：它们无法区分真正执行封闭世界假设（CWA）的模型与仅检查最显著约束的捷径模型。作者通过构造组合不可行声明来暴露这一缺陷，发现现有模型普遍存在捷径推理问题。
AI.motivation: 科学声明验证对于建立证据支持的发现和防止错误信息至关重要。现有基准无法区分真正的CWA验证与仅检查显著约束的捷径方法，因为现有基准通过扰动单个显著元素来构造不可行声明，导致无法检测模型是否真正执行了完整的约束验证。
AI.method: 作者构造了"组合不可行声明"，其中显著约束得到支持但非显著约束被反驳，以此来区分真正的CWA验证与显著约束检查捷径。他们使用模型上下文干预来研究不同模型和提示策略在共享ROC曲线上的位置，分析验证阈值与推理能力的关系。
AI.result: 在不同模型家族和模态中，即使那些在现有基准上达到饱和性能的模型，在面对组合不可行声明时也持续过度接受这些声明，证实了捷径推理的普遍性。不同模型和提示策略位于共享ROC曲线的不同位置，表明模型家族之间的差距反映了验证阈值的差异而非底层推理能力的不同。
AI.conclusion: 组合推理瓶颈是当前验证行为的结构特性，仅靠策略指导无法克服。现有基准需要改进以检测真正的CWA验证能力，而不仅仅是显著约束检查能力。

title: SpectralLoRA: Is Low-Frequency Structure Sufficient for LoRA Adaptation? A Spectral Analysis of Weight Updates
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables. Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee
summary: We present a systematic empirical study of the spectral structure of LoRA weight updates. Through 2D Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) analysis of trained adaptation matrices across BERT-base and RoBERTa-base on four GLUE benchmarks (SST-2, MNLI, CoLA, QQP), we establish that LoRA updates are universally dominated by low-frequency components: on average, just 33% of DCT coefficients capture 90% of total spectral energy. Retaining only 10% of frequency coefficients reduces adapter storage by 10x while sacrificing only 1.95pp on SST-2. Notably, frequency masking at k=50% improves over full LoRA on 3 of 8 model-task pairs, suggesting high-frequency components act as adaptation noise. We further discover that RoBERTa-base is systematically more spectrally compressible than BERT-base across all tasks, and that task complexity governs spectral sensitivity -- NLI tasks require more frequency budget than sentiment classification. These findings motivate a new design principle for PEFT: spectral sparsity in adaptation.

AI.tldr: LoRA权重更新的频谱分析显示其具有显著的低频主导特性，仅33%的DCT系数就能捕获90%的频谱能量，高频成分可能作为适应噪声，这启发了基于频谱稀疏性的PEFT新设计原则。
AI.motivation: 研究LoRA权重更新的频谱结构，探索参数高效微调（PEFT）方法的本质特性，为设计更高效的适配器提供理论基础。
AI.method: 使用2D离散余弦变换（DCT）分析BERT-base和RoBERTa-base在四个GLUE基准（SST-2、MNLI、CoLA、QQP）上训练的LoRA适配矩阵的频谱结构。
AI.result: LoRA更新普遍由低频成分主导：平均仅33%的DCT系数捕获90%的总频谱能量；保留10%频率系数可将适配器存储减少10倍，SST-2性能仅下降1.95pp；50%频率掩码在3/8模型-任务对上优于完整LoRA；RoBERTa-base比BERT-base在所有任务上更具频谱可压缩性；任务复杂度影响频谱敏感性。
AI.conclusion: LoRA权重更新具有显著的频谱稀疏性，高频成分可能作为适应噪声，这为基于频谱稀疏性的PEFT新设计原则提供了实证基础。

title: U$^{2}$Flow: Uncertainty-Aware Unsupervised Optical Flow Estimation
comment: Accepted as an oral presentation at CVPR 2026
summary: Unsupervised optical flow methods typically lack reliable uncertainty estimation, limiting their robustness and interpretability. We propose U$^{2}$Flow, the first recurrent unsupervised framework that jointly estimates optical flow and per-pixel uncertainty. The core innovation is a decoupled learning strategy that derives uncertainty supervision from augmentation consistency via a Laplace-based maximum likelihood objective, enabling stable training without ground truth. The predicted uncertainty is further integrated into the network to guide adaptive flow refinement and dynamically modulate the regional smoothness loss. Furthermore, we introduce an uncertainty-guided bidirectional flow fusion mechanism that enhances robustness in challenging regions. Extensive experiments on KITTI and Sintel demonstrate that U$^{2}$Flow achieves state-of-the-art performance among unsupervised methods while producing highly reliable uncertainty maps, validating the effectiveness of our joint estimation paradigm. The code is available at https://github.com/sunzunyi/U2FLOW.

AI.tldr: U²Flow是首个循环无监督框架，联合估计光流和像素级不确定性，通过解耦学习策略从增强一致性中推导不确定性监督，实现无需真实标签的稳定训练。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督光流方法通常缺乏可靠的不确定性估计，限制了其鲁棒性和可解释性。需要一种能够同时估计光流和不确定性的框架，以增强方法的实用性和可靠性。
AI.method: 提出U²Flow框架，核心创新包括：1）基于拉普拉斯分布的最大似然目标的解耦学习策略，从增强一致性中推导不确定性监督；2）将预测的不确定性集成到网络中，指导自适应光流细化和动态调制区域平滑损失；3）不确定性引导的双向光流融合机制，增强挑战区域的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Sintel数据集上的大量实验表明，U²Flow在无监督方法中达到了最先进的性能，同时产生了高度可靠的不确定性图，验证了联合估计范式的有效性。
AI.conclusion: U²Flow首次实现了光流和不确定性的联合无监督估计，通过创新的解耦学习策略和不确定性引导机制，显著提升了无监督光流方法的性能和可靠性。

title: Beyond Monologue: Interactive Talking-Listening Avatar Generation with Conversational Audio Context-Aware Kernels
summary: Audio-driven human video generation has achieved remarkable success in monologue scenarios, largely driven by advancements in powerful video generation foundation models. Moving beyond monologues, authentic human communication is inherently a full-duplex interactive process, requiring virtual agents not only to articulate their own speech but also to react naturally to incoming conversational audio. Most existing methods simply extend conventional audio-driven paradigms to listening scenarios. However, relying on strict frame-to-frame alignment renders the model's response to long-range conversational dynamics rigid, whereas directly introducing global attention catastrophically degrades lip synchronization. Recognizing the unique temporal Scale Discrepancy between talking and listening behaviors, we introduce a multi-head Gaussian kernel to explicitly inject this physical intuition into the model as a progressive temporal inductive bias. Building upon this, we construct a full-duplex interactive virtual agent capable of simultaneously processing dual-stream audio inputs for both talking and listening. Furthermore, we introduce a rigorously cleaned Talking-Listening dataset VoxHear featuring perfectly decoupled speech and background audio tracks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach successfully fuses strong temporal alignment with deep contextual semantics, setting a new state-of-the-art for generating highly natural and responsive full-duplex interactive digital humans. The project page is available at https://warmcongee.github.io/beyond-monologue/ .

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种全双工交互式虚拟代理，能够同时处理说话和倾听两种音频流，解决了现有方法在处理长程对话动态时的僵化问题，通过多头高斯核注入时间尺度差异的物理直觉作为渐进式时间归纳偏置。
AI.motivation: 真实的人类交流是全双工交互过程，虚拟代理不仅需要表达自己的语音，还需要对传入的对话音频做出自然反应。现有方法要么依赖严格的帧到帧对齐导致对长程对话动态响应僵化，要么直接引入全局注意力会严重破坏唇部同步。说话和倾听行为之间存在独特的时间尺度差异，需要新的方法来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出使用多头高斯核将说话和倾听行为的时间尺度差异物理直觉显式注入模型作为渐进式时间归纳偏置。在此基础上构建全双工交互式虚拟代理，能够同时处理双流音频输入（说话和倾听）。还引入了严格清洗的Talking-Listening数据集VoxHear，具有完美解耦的语音和背景音轨。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法成功融合了强时间对齐和深度上下文语义，在生成高度自然和响应迅速的全双工交互数字人类方面达到了新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入时间尺度差异的物理直觉作为渐进式归纳偏置，成功解决了全双工交互虚拟代理中说话和倾听行为的时间对齐与语义理解之间的平衡问题，为生成自然响应的数字人类提供了有效解决方案。

title: When Valid Signals Fail: Regime Boundaries Between LLM Features and RL Trading Policies
summary: Can large language models (LLMs) generate continuous numerical features that improve reinforcement learning (RL) trading agents? We build a modular pipeline where a frozen LLM serves as a stateless feature extractor, transforming unstructured daily news and filings into a fixed-dimensional vector consumed by a downstream PPO agent. We introduce an automated prompt-optimization loop that treats the extraction prompt as a discrete hyperparameter and tunes it directly against the Information Coefficient - the Spearman rank correlation between predicted and realized returns - rather than NLP losses. The optimized prompt discovers genuinely predictive features (IC above 0.15 on held-out data). However, these valid intermediate representations do not automatically translate into downstream task performance: during a distribution shift caused by a macroeconomic shock, LLM-derived features add noise, and the augmented agent under-performs a price-only baseline. In a calmer test regime the agent recovers, yet macroeconomic state variables remain the most robust driver of policy improvement. Our findings highlight a gap between feature-level validity and policy-level robustness that parallels known challenges in transfer learning under distribution shift.
