AI.tldr: LLM提取的新闻特征在训练分布内具有预测性，但在宏观经济冲击导致的分布偏移下会引入噪声，使强化学习交易代理表现下降
AI.motivation: 探索大型语言模型能否生成连续数值特征来改进强化学习交易代理，特别是在金融新闻和文件等非结构化数据中提取预测性特征
AI.method: 构建模块化管道：冻结的LLM作为无状态特征提取器，将每日新闻和文件转换为固定维度向量，供下游PPO代理使用；引入自动提示优化循环，将提取提示作为离散超参数，直接针对信息系数（预测与实际回报的Spearman秩相关）进行优化
AI.result: 优化后的提示发现了真正具有预测性的特征（在保留数据上IC超过0.15），但这些有效的中间表示不会自动转化为下游任务性能：在宏观经济冲击导致的分布偏移期间，LLM衍生特征会添加噪声，增强代理的表现不如仅使用价格信息的基线；在较平静的测试环境中代理恢复，但宏观经济状态变量仍然是策略改进最稳健的驱动因素
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了特征级有效性与策略级鲁棒性之间的差距，这与分布偏移下迁移学习的已知挑战相平行

title: Energy-Efficient Federated Edge Learning For Small-Scale Datasets in Large IoT Networks
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures. To appear in IEEE TWC
summary: Large-scale Internet of Things (IoT) networks enable intelligent services such as smart cities and autonomous driving, but often face resource constraints. Collecting heterogeneous sensory data, especially in small-scale datasets, is challenging, and independent edge nodes can lead to inefficient resource utilization and reduced learning performance. To address these issues, this paper proposes a collaborative optimization framework for energy-efficient federated edge learning with small-scale datasets. We first derive an expected learning loss to quantify the relationship between the number of training samples and learning objectives. A stochastic online learning algorithm is then designed to adapt to data variations, and a resource optimization problem with a convergence bound is formulated. Finally, an online distributed algorithm efficiently solves large-scale optimization problems with high scalability. Extensive simulations and autonomous navigation case studies with collision avoidance demonstrate that the proposed approach significantly improves learning performance and resource efficiency compared to state-of-the-art benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于小规模数据集能效联邦边缘学习的协作优化框架，通过推导预期学习损失、设计随机在线学习算法和资源优化问题，显著提升学习性能和资源效率
AI.motivation: 大规模物联网网络面临资源约束，异构传感器数据收集困难，特别是小规模数据集场景下，独立的边缘节点会导致资源利用效率低下和学习性能下降
AI.method: 1) 推导预期学习损失量化训练样本数量与学习目标的关系；2) 设计适应数据变化的随机在线学习算法；3) 制定具有收敛界的资源优化问题；4) 开发高效解决大规模优化问题的在线分布式算法
AI.result: 通过广泛仿真和自主导航避障案例研究，相比现有基准方法，所提方法显著提升了学习性能和资源效率
AI.conclusion: 提出的协作优化框架有效解决了小规模数据集下联邦边缘学习的能效问题，为资源受限的物联网网络提供了可行的解决方案

title: On The Application of Linear Attention in Multimodal Transformers
comment: Workshop on Any-to-Any Multimodal Learning (Any2Any), CVPR 2026
summary: Multimodal Transformers serve as the backbone for state-of-the-art vision-language models, yet their quadratic attention complexity remains a critical barrier to scalability. In this work, we investigate the viability of Linear Attention (LA) as a high-efficiency alternative within multimodal frameworks. By integrating LA, we reduce the computational overhead from quadratic to linear relative to sequence length while preserving competitive performance. We evaluate our approach across ViT-S/16, ViT-B/16, and ViT-L/16 architectures trained on the LAION-400M dataset, with validation focused on ImageNet-21K zero-shot accuracy. Our systematic evaluation demonstrates that Linear Attention not only yields significant computational savings but also adheres to the same scaling laws as standard softmax attention. These findings position Linear Attention as a robust, scalable solution for next-generation multimodal Transformers tasked with processing increasingly large and complex datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了线性注意力在视觉-语言多模态Transformer中的可行性，通过将计算复杂度从二次降低到线性，同时保持竞争性性能，验证了线性注意力作为高效可扩展解决方案的潜力。
AI.motivation: 多模态Transformer作为最先进的视觉-语言模型基础，其二次注意力计算复杂度成为可扩展性的关键瓶颈。需要寻找高效替代方案来处理日益增长的大型复杂数据集。
AI.method: 将线性注意力集成到多模态框架中，在ViT-S/16、ViT-B/16和ViT-L/16架构上进行评估，使用LAION-400M数据集训练，重点关注ImageNet-21K零样本准确率验证。
AI.result: 线性注意力不仅显著节省计算成本，而且遵循与标准softmax注意力相同的缩放定律，在保持竞争性性能的同时将计算开销从二次降低到线性。
AI.conclusion: 线性注意力是下一代多模态Transformer的稳健、可扩展解决方案，能够高效处理大型复杂数据集，为Transformer优化和高效架构设计提供了重要方向。

title: TrajOnco: a multi-agent framework for temporal reasoning over longitudinal EHR for multi-cancer early detection
summary: Accurate estimation of cancer risk from longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs) could support earlier detection and improved care, but modeling such complex patient trajectories remains challenging. We present TrajOnco, a training-free, multi-agent large language model (LLM) framework designed for scalable multi-cancer early detection. Using a chain-of-agents architecture with long-term memory, TrajOnco performs temporal reasoning over sequential clinical events to generate patient-level summaries, evidence-linked rationales, and predicted risk scores. We evaluated TrajOnco on de-identified Truveta EHR data across 15 cancer types using matched case-control cohorts, predicting risk of cancer diagnosis at 1 year. In zero-shot evaluation, TrajOnco achieved AUROCs of 0.64-0.80, performing comparably to supervised machine learning in a lung cancer benchmark while demonstrating better temporal reasoning than single-agent LLMs. The multi-agent design also enabled effective temporal reasoning with smaller-capacity models such as GPT-4.1-mini. The fidelity of TrajOnco's output was validated through human evaluation. Furthermore, TrajOnco's interpretable reasoning outputs can be aggregated to reveal population-level risk patterns that align with established clinical knowledge. These findings highlight the potential of multi-agent LLMs to execute interpretable temporal reasoning over longitudinal EHRs, advancing both scalable multi-cancer early detection and clinical insight generation.

AI.tldr: TrajOnco是一个免训练的多智能体LLM框架，用于基于电子健康记录进行多癌症早期检测，通过时序推理在零样本评估中取得与监督学习相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 从纵向电子健康记录中准确估计癌症风险对于早期检测和改善护理至关重要，但建模复杂的患者轨迹仍然具有挑战性。现有方法难以有效处理时序临床事件并进行可解释的推理。
AI.method: 提出TrajOnco框架，采用免训练的多智能体LLM架构，具有长期记忆功能。使用链式智能体架构对序列临床事件进行时序推理，生成患者级摘要、证据关联的推理过程和预测风险评分。
AI.result: 在15种癌症类型的匹配病例对照队列中，TrajOnco在零样本评估中取得了0.64-0.80的AUROC，在肺癌基准测试中与监督机器学习性能相当，同时比单智能体LLM表现出更好的时序推理能力。多智能体设计使较小容量的模型也能有效进行时序推理。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体LLM能够在纵向电子健康记录上执行可解释的时序推理，推进了可扩展的多癌症早期检测和临床洞察生成。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Web-Conditioned Scientific Fact-Checking
summary: Scientific fact-checking is vital for assessing claims in specialized domains such as biomedicine and materials science, yet existing systems often hallucinate or apply inconsistent reasoning, especially when verifying technical, compositional claims against an evidence snippet under source and cost/latency constraints. We present a pipeline centered on atomic predicate-argument decomposition and calibrated, uncertainty-gated corroboration: atomic facts are aligned to local snippets via embeddings, verified by a compact evidence-grounded checker, and only facts with uncertain support trigger domain-restricted web search over authoritative sources. The system supports both binary and tri-valued classification where it predicts labels from Supported, Refuted, NEI for three-way tasks. We evaluate under two regimes, Context-Only (no web) and Context+Web (uncertainty-gated web corroboration); when retrieved evidence conflicts with the provided context, we abstain with NEI rather than overriding the context. On multiple benchmarks, our framework surpasses the strongest benchmarks. In our experiments, web corroboration was invoked for only a minority of atomic facts on average, indicating that external evidence is consulted selectively under calibrated uncertainty rather than routinely. Overall, coupling atomic granularity with calibrated, uncertainty-gated corroboration yields more interpretable and context-conditioned verification, making the approach well-suited to high-stakes, single-document settings that demand traceable rationales, predictable cost/latency, and conservative.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于科学事实核查的管道系统，通过原子谓词-论元分解和校准的不确定性门控确证，在源文档和成本/延迟约束下验证技术性组合声明。
AI.motivation: 科学事实核查在生物医学和材料科学等专业领域至关重要，但现有系统经常产生幻觉或应用不一致的推理，特别是在验证技术性组合声明时，面临源文档和成本/延迟约束的挑战。
AI.method: 采用原子谓词-论元分解和校准的不确定性门控确证管道：将原子事实通过嵌入与本地片段对齐，由紧凑的证据基础核查器验证，只有具有不确定支持的事实才会触发对权威源的领域限制网络搜索。系统支持二元和三值分类（支持、反驳、NEI）。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该框架超越了最强的基准。实验中，网络确证平均仅对少数原子事实触发，表明外部证据是在校准的不确定性下选择性地咨询，而非例行公事。
AI.conclusion: 将原子粒度与校准的不确定性门控确证相结合，产生了更可解释和上下文条件的验证，使该方法适用于高风险、单文档设置，需要可追溯的推理、可预测的成本/延迟和保守性。

title: Skill-SD: Skill-Conditioned Self-Distillation for Multi-turn LLM Agents
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been widely used to train LLM agents for multi-turn interactive tasks, but its sample efficiency is severely limited by sparse rewards and long horizons. On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) alleviates this by providing dense token-level supervision from a privileged teacher that has access to ground-truth answers. However, such fixed privileged information cannot capture the diverse valid strategies in agent tasks, and naively combining OPSD with RL often leads to training collapse. To address these limitations, we introduce Skill-SD, a framework that turns the agent's own trajectories into dynamic training-only supervision. Completed trajectories are summarized into compact natural language skills that describe successful behaviors, mistakes, and workflows. These skills serve as dynamic privileged information conditioning only the teacher, while the student always acts under the plain task prompt and learns to internalize the guidance through distillation. To stabilize the training, we derive an importance-weighted reverse-KL loss to provide gradient-correct token-level distillation, and dynamically synchronize the teacher with the improving student. Experimental results on agentic benchmarks demonstrate that Skill-SD substantially outperforms the standard RL baseline, improving both vanilla GRPO (+14.0%/+10.9% on AppWorld/Sokoban) and vanilla OPD (+42.1%/+40.6%). Project page: https://k1xe.github.io/skill-sd/

AI.tldr: Skill-SD框架通过将智能体轨迹总结为自然语言技能，为教师模型提供动态特权信息，结合重要性加权反向KL损失实现稳定训练，显著提升多轮交互任务中LLM智能体的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在训练LLM智能体时面临稀疏奖励和长视野问题，而现有的基于特权信息的自蒸馏方法(OPSD)使用固定的特权信息，无法捕捉任务中多样的有效策略，且与RL结合时容易导致训练崩溃。
AI.method: 1) 将智能体完成的轨迹总结为紧凑的自然语言技能，描述成功行为、错误和工作流程；2) 这些技能作为动态特权信息仅用于教师模型，学生模型始终在普通任务提示下行动；3) 推导重要性加权反向KL损失提供梯度校正的token级蒸馏；4) 动态同步教师模型与学生模型的改进。
AI.result: 在智能体基准测试中，Skill-SD显著优于标准RL基线：在AppWorld/Sokoban上分别比vanilla GRPO提升14.0%/10.9%，比vanilla OPD提升42.1%/40.6%。
AI.conclusion: Skill-SD通过动态技能总结和稳定的蒸馏机制，有效解决了多轮交互任务中LLM智能体训练的样本效率问题，为强化学习与自蒸馏的结合提供了新的解决方案。

title: Spotlight and Shadow: Attention-Guided Dual-Anchor Introspective Decoding for MLLM Hallucination Mitigation
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning capabilities yet continue to suffer from hallucination, where generated text contradicts visual content. In this paper, we introduce Dual-Anchor Introspective Decoding (DaID), a novel contrastive decoding framework that dynamically calibrates each token generation by mining the model's internal perceptual discrepancies. Specifically, DaID identifies a Spotlight layer to amplify visual factual signals and a Shadow layer to suppress textual inertia. By leveraging visual attention distributions to guide this dual-anchor selection process, our method ensures precise, token-specific adaptation. Experimental results across multiple benchmarks and MLLMs demonstrate that DaID significantly mitigates hallucination while enhancing general reasoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: DaID是一种新颖的对比解码框架，通过挖掘MLLM内部感知差异来动态校准每个token生成，显著减少多模态大语言模型的幻觉问题
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型虽然展现出强大的推理能力，但仍存在幻觉问题，即生成的文本与视觉内容相矛盾。现有方法难以有效解决这一问题，需要更精细的机制来校准模型生成过程。
AI.method: 提出双锚点内省解码框架，通过识别Spotlight层来增强视觉事实信号，识别Shadow层来抑制文本惯性。利用视觉注意力分布指导双锚点选择过程，实现精确的token级适应。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试和MLLM上的实验结果表明，DaID显著减轻了幻觉问题，同时增强了通用推理能力。
AI.conclusion: DaID通过挖掘模型内部感知差异来动态校准token生成，为缓解MLLM幻觉问题提供了有效解决方案，同时保持或提升模型的推理性能。

title: CWCD: Category-Wise Contrastive Decoding for Structured Medical Report Generation
summary: Interpreting chest X-rays is inherently challenging due to the overlap between anatomical structures and the subtle presentation of many clinically significant pathologies, making accurate diagnosis time-consuming even for experienced radiologists. Recent radiology-focused foundation models, such as LLaVA-Rad and Maira-2, have positioned multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) at the forefront of automated radiology report generation (RRG). However, despite these advances, current foundation models generate reports in a single forward pass. This decoding strategy diminishes attention to visual tokens and increases reliance on language priors as generation proceeds, which in turn introduces spurious pathology co-occurrences in the generated reports. To mitigate these limitations, we propose Category-Wise Contrastive Decoding (CWCD), a novel and modular framework designed to enhance structured radiology report generation (SRRG). Our approach introduces category-specific parameterization and generates category-wise reports by contrasting normal X-rays with masked X-rays using category-specific visual prompts. Experimental results demonstrate that CWCD consistently outperforms baseline methods across both clinical efficacy and natural language generation metrics. An ablation study further elucidates the contribution of each architectural component to overall performance.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为类别对比解码（CWCD）的新框架，用于改进结构化放射学报告生成，通过类别特定的参数化和对比正常与掩码X射线来减少虚假病理共现问题。
AI.motivation: 胸部X光片解释具有挑战性，现有多模态大语言模型在生成放射学报告时采用单次前向解码策略，这会降低对视觉标记的关注度，增加对语言先验的依赖，导致生成的报告中出现虚假的病理共现现象。
AI.method: 提出类别对比解码（CWCD）框架，采用类别特定的参数化方法，通过对比正常X射线和使用类别特定视觉提示的掩码X射线，生成类别特定的报告，从而增强结构化放射学报告生成。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，CWCD在临床有效性和自然语言生成指标方面持续优于基线方法，消融研究进一步阐明了每个架构组件对整体性能的贡献。
AI.conclusion: CWCD框架有效解决了当前放射学报告生成模型中存在的视觉关注度下降和语言先验过度依赖问题，提高了结构化报告生成的准确性和可靠性。

title: A Systematic Analysis of the Impact of Persona Steering on LLM Capabilities
summary: Imbuing Large Language Models (LLMs) with specific personas is prevalent for tailoring interaction styles, yet the impact on underlying cognitive capabilities remains unexplored. We employ the Neuron-based Personality Trait Induction (NPTI) framework to induce Big Five personality traits in LLMs and evaluate performance across six cognitive benchmarks. Our findings reveal that persona induction produces stable, reproducible shifts in cognitive task performance beyond surface-level stylistic changes. These effects exhibit strong task dependence: certain personalities yield consistent gains on instruction-following, while others impair complex reasoning. Effect magnitude varies systematically by trait dimension, with Openness and Extraversion exerting the most robust influence. Furthermore, LLM effects show 73.68% directional consistency with human personality-cognition relationships. Capitalizing on these regularities, we propose Dynamic Persona Routing (DPR), a lightweight query-adaptive strategy that outperforms the best static persona without additional training.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了在LLMs中注入人格特质对认知能力的影响，发现人格诱导会产生稳定可复现的认知任务表现变化，并提出了动态人格路由策略来优化性能。
AI.motivation: 当前为LLMs注入特定人格以定制交互风格很普遍，但人格对底层认知能力的影响尚未被探索。研究者希望了解人格诱导是否仅改变表面风格，还是会影响LLMs的认知能力。
AI.method: 使用基于神经元的人格特质诱导（NPTI）框架在LLMs中诱导大五人格特质，在六个认知基准上评估性能。提出了动态人格路由（DPR）策略，根据查询自适应选择最佳人格。
AI.result: 人格诱导产生稳定可复现的认知任务表现变化，效果具有强任务依赖性：某些人格在指令遵循上表现更好，而其他人格会损害复杂推理。开放性（Openness）和外向性（Extraversion）影响最显著。LLM效果与人类人格-认知关系有73.68%的方向一致性。DPR策略无需额外训练即可超越最佳静态人格。
AI.conclusion: 人格诱导不仅改变LLMs的交互风格，还显著影响其认知能力。这种影响具有系统性规律，可用于优化LLM性能。提出的动态人格路由策略展示了利用人格-认知关系提升LLM任务表现的实际应用价值。

title: SCOPE: Signal-Calibrated On-Policy Distillation Enhancement with Dual-Path Adaptive Weighting
summary: On-policy reinforcement learning has become the dominant paradigm for reasoning alignment in large language models, yet its sparse, outcome-level rewards make token-level credit assignment notoriously difficult. On-Policy Distillation (OPD) alleviates this by introducing dense, token-level KL supervision from a teacher model, but typically applies this supervision uniformly across all rollouts, ignoring fundamental differences in signal quality. We propose Signal-Calibrated On-Policy Distillation Enhancement (SCOPE), a dual-path adaptive training framework that routes on-policy rollouts by correctness into two complementary supervision paths. For incorrect trajectories, SCOPE performs teacher-perplexity-weighted KL distillation to prioritize instances where the teacher demonstrates genuine corrective capability, while down-weighting unreliable guidance. For correct trajectories, it applies student-perplexity-weighted MLE to concentrate reinforcement on low-confidence samples at the capability boundary rather than over-reinforcing already mastered ones. Both paths employ a group-level normalization to adaptively calibrate weight distributions, accounting for the intrinsic difficulty variance across prompts. Extensive experiments on six reasoning benchmarks show that SCOPE achieves an average relative improvement of 11.42% in Avg@32 and 7.30% in Pass@32 over competitive baselines, demonstrating its consistent effectiveness.

AI.tldr: SCOPE提出了一种双路径自适应训练框架，通过根据推理轨迹的正确性进行路由，对错误轨迹使用教师困惑度加权的KL蒸馏，对正确轨迹使用学生困惑度加权的MLE，从而改进大型语言模型中的信用分配问题。
AI.motivation: 当前基于策略的强化学习在大型语言模型对齐中存在稀疏奖励导致的token级信用分配困难问题。现有的On-Policy Distillation方法对所有轨迹采用均匀的KL监督，忽略了信号质量的根本差异。
AI.method: SCOPE采用双路径自适应训练框架：1) 根据推理轨迹的正确性进行路由；2) 对错误轨迹使用教师困惑度加权的KL蒸馏，优先考虑教师模型具有真正纠正能力的实例；3) 对正确轨迹使用学生困惑度加权的MLE，专注于能力边界上的低置信度样本；4) 采用组级归一化自适应校准权重分布。
AI.result: 在六个推理基准测试中，SCOPE相比竞争基线在Avg@32上平均相对提升11.42%，在Pass@32上提升7.30%，证明了其一致有效性。
AI.conclusion: SCOPE通过信号校准的token级监督，有效解决了强化学习中的信用分配问题，为大型语言模型的对齐训练提供了更精细的监督机制。

title: DocRevive: A Unified Pipeline for Document Text Restoration
summary: In Document Understanding, the challenge of reconstructing damaged, occluded, or incomplete text remains a critical yet unexplored problem. Subsequent document understanding tasks can benefit from a document reconstruction process. In response, this paper presents a novel unified pipeline combining state-of-the-art Optical Character Recognition (OCR), advanced image analysis, masked language modeling, and diffusion-based models to restore and reconstruct text while preserving visual integrity. We create a synthetic dataset of 30{,}078 degraded document images that simulates diverse document degradation scenarios, setting a benchmark for restoration tasks. Our pipeline detects and recognizes text, identifies degradation with an occlusion detector, and uses an inpainting model for semantically coherent reconstruction. A diffusion-based module seamlessly reintegrates text, matching font, size, and alignment. To evaluate restoration quality, we propose a Unified Context Similarity Metric (UCSM), incorporating edit, semantic, and length similarities with a contextual predictability measure that penalizes deviations when the correct text is contextually obvious. Our work advances document restoration, benefiting archival research and digital preservation while setting a new standard for text reconstruction. The OPRB dataset and code are available at \href{https://huggingface.co/datasets/kpurkayastha/OPRB}{Hugging Face} and \href{https://github.com/kunalpurkayastha/DocRevive}{Github} respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出DocRevive统一流程，结合OCR、图像分析、掩码语言建模和扩散模型，修复受损文档文本并保持视觉完整性。创建包含30,078张合成退化文档图像的OPRB数据集，并提出统一上下文相似度指标(UCSM)评估修复质量。
AI.motivation: 文档理解中，修复受损、遮挡或不完整文本是一个关键但未被充分探索的问题。文档修复过程可以提升后续文档理解任务的效果，对档案研究和数字保存具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出统一流程：1) 使用最先进OCR检测和识别文本；2) 遮挡检测器识别退化区域；3) 修复模型进行语义连贯重建；4) 扩散模型无缝重新集成文本，匹配字体、大小和对齐方式。创建合成数据集模拟多样化文档退化场景。
AI.result: 创建了包含30,078张合成退化文档图像的OPRB数据集，为修复任务设定基准。提出UCSM评估指标，结合编辑、语义和长度相似度以及上下文可预测性度量。代码和数据集已在Hugging Face和GitHub开源。
AI.conclusion: 该工作推进了文档修复领域，有益于档案研究和数字保存，为文本重建设定了新标准。提出的统一流程和评估指标为文档理解任务提供了重要基础。

title: Safety Guarantees in Zero-Shot Reinforcement Learning for Cascade Dynamical Systems
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures; submitted to IEEE for possible publication
summary: This paper considers the problem of zero-shot safety guarantees for cascade dynamical systems. These are systems where a subset of the states (the inner states) affects the dynamics of the remaining states (the outer states) but not vice-versa. We define safety as remaining on a set deemed safe for all times with high probability. We propose to train a safe RL policy on a reduced-order model, which ignores the dynamics of the inner states, but it treats it as an action that influences the outer state. Thus, reducing the complexity of the training. When deployed in the full system the trained policy is combined with a low-level controller whose task is to track the reference provided by the RL policy. Our main theoretical contribution is a bound on the safe probability in the full-order system. In particular, we establish the interplay between the probability of remaining safe after the zero-shot deployment and the quality of the tracking of the inner states. We validate our theoretical findings on a quadrotor navigation task, demonstrating that the preservation of the safety guarantees is tied to the bandwidth and tracking capabilities of the low-level controller.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种为级联动力系统提供零样本安全保证的方法，通过在简化模型上训练安全RL策略，然后在完整系统中部署时结合低层控制器进行跟踪，并提供了安全概率的理论边界。
AI.motivation: 级联动力系统的安全控制是一个重要问题，但直接在完整系统上训练安全RL策略计算成本高。作者希望开发一种方法，能在简化模型上训练策略，然后在完整系统中零样本部署时仍能保持安全保证。
AI.method:
1. 定义级联系统：内状态影响外状态但不反之
2. 在简化模型上训练安全RL策略：忽略内状态动态，将其视为影响外状态的动作
3. 部署时结合低层控制器：RL策略提供参考轨迹，低层控制器跟踪内状态
4. 理论分析：建立完整系统中安全概率的边界，分析跟踪质量与安全保证的关系
AI.result:
1. 提出了安全概率的理论边界，建立了跟踪质量与安全保证的数学关系
2. 在四旋翼导航任务上验证了理论发现
3. 证明安全保证的保持与低层控制器的带宽和跟踪能力密切相关
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效降低训练复杂度，同时为零样本部署提供理论安全保证。安全保证的质量取决于低层控制器的跟踪性能，为实际系统设计提供了指导原则。

title: Shared Emotion Geometry Across Small Language Models: A Cross-Architecture Study of Representation, Behavior, and Methodological Confounds
comment: 34 pages, 6 figures, 1 table in main text + appendix. Ongoing series on Model Medicine
summary: We extract 21-emotion vector sets from twelve small language models (six architectures x base/instruct, 1B-8B parameters) under a unified comprehension-mode pipeline at fp16 precision, and compare the resulting geometries via representational similarity analysis on raw cosine RDMs. The five mature architectures (Qwen 2.5 1.5B, SmolLM2 1.7B, Llama 3.2 3B, Mistral 7B v0.3, Llama 3.1 8B) share nearly identical 21-emotion geometry, with pairwise RDM Spearman correlations of 0.74-0.92. This universality persists across diametrically opposed behavioral profiles: Qwen 2.5 and Llama 3.2 occupy opposite poles of MTI Compliance facets yet produce nearly identical emotion RDMs (rho = 0.81), so behavioral facet differences arise above the shared emotion representation. Gemma-3 1B base, the one immature case in our dataset, exhibits extreme residual-stream anisotropy (0.997) and is restructured by RLHF across all geometric descriptors, whereas the five already-mature families show within-family base x instruct RDM correlations of rho >= 0.92 (Mistral 7B v0.3 at rho = 0.985), suggesting RLHF restructures only representations that are not yet organized. Methodologically, we show that what prior work has read as a single comprehension-vs-generation method effect in fact decomposes into four distinct layers -- a coarse method-dependent dissociation, robust sub-parameter sensitivity within generation, a true precision (fp16 vs INT8) effect, and a conflated cross-experiment bias that distorts in opposite directions for different models -- so that a single rho between two prior emotion-vector studies is not a safe basis for interpretation without the layered decomposition.

AI.tldr: 该研究从12个小语言模型中提取21维情感向量，发现成熟架构（Qwen 2.5、Llama 3.2等）具有几乎相同的情感几何结构，即使它们在行为特征上截然相反。RLHF仅重组未成熟架构（如Gemma-3 1B）的表征，对已成熟架构影响很小。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索不同语言模型在情感表征上的一致性，理解RLHF对情感几何结构的影响，以及澄清先前研究中方法效应（理解vs生成模式）的混淆因素。
AI.method: 从12个小语言模型（6种架构×基础/指导版本，1B-8B参数）在fp16精度下提取21维情感向量集，使用表示相似性分析（RSA）比较原始余弦RDM几何结构，分析成熟与未成熟架构的差异。
AI.result: 五个成熟架构（Qwen 2.5 1.5B、SmolLM2 1.7B等）具有几乎相同的21维情感几何结构（Spearman相关0.74-0.92）。Gemma-3 1B基础版表现出极端残差流各向异性（0.997），RLHF会重组其所有几何描述符，而成熟架构的基础版与指导版相关度很高（rho≥0.92）。
AI.conclusion: 成熟语言模型共享统一的情感表征几何结构，行为差异源于更高层次的表征。RLHF仅重组未成熟架构的表征。先前研究中的"理解vs生成"方法效应实际上包含四个不同层次，需要分层分解才能正确解释。

title: Communication-Efficient Gluon in Federated Learning
summary: Recent developments have shown that Muon-type optimizers based on linear minimization oracles (LMOs) over non-Euclidean norm balls have the potential to get superior practical performance than Adam-type methods in the training of large language models. Since large-scale neural networks are trained across massive machines, communication cost becomes the bottleneck. To address this bottleneck, we investigate Gluon, which is an extension of Muon under the more general layer-wise $(L^0, L^1)$-smooth setting, with both unbiased and contraction compressors. In order to reduce the compression error, we employ the variance reduced technique in SARAH in our compressed methods. The convergence rates and improved communication cost are achieved under certain conditions. As a byproduct, a new variance reduced algorithm with faster convergence rate than Gluon is obtained. We also incorporate momentum variance reduction (MVR) to these compressed algorithms and comparable communication cost is derived under weaker conditions when $L_i^1 \neq 0$. Finally, several numerical experiments are conducted to verify the superior performance of our compressed algorithms in terms of communication cost.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出Gluon，一种基于Muon型优化器的压缩通信算法，用于大规模语言模型训练中的通信瓶颈问题，结合方差缩减技术提升性能。
AI.motivation: 大规模神经网络在多机训练时，通信成本成为瓶颈。Muon型优化器在非欧几里得范数球上基于线性最小化预言机，在大型语言模型训练中展现出优于Adam型方法的潜力，但需要解决通信效率问题。
AI.method: 扩展Muon优化器到更一般的层间(L^0, L^1)-平滑设置，结合无偏和收缩压缩器。采用SARAH中的方差缩减技术减少压缩误差，并引入动量方差缩减(MVR)技术。
AI.result: 在特定条件下实现了收敛率和通信成本的改进，获得比Gluon收敛更快的新方差缩减算法。数值实验验证了压缩算法在通信成本方面的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的压缩通信算法能有效解决大规模语言模型训练中的通信瓶颈问题，在保持收敛性能的同时显著降低通信成本。

title: Attention-Guided Dual-Stream Learning for Group Engagement Recognition: Fusing Transformer-Encoded Motion Dynamics with Scene Context via Adaptive Gating
summary: Student engagement is crucial for improving learning outcomes in group activities. Highly engaged students perform better both individually and contribute to overall group success. However, most existing automated engagement recognition methods are designed for online classrooms or estimate engagement at the individual level. Addressing this gap, we propose DualEngage, a novel two-stream framework for group-level engagement recognition from in-classroom videos. It models engagement as a joint function of both individual and group-level behaviors. The primary stream models person-level motion dynamics by detecting and tracking students, extracting dense optical flow with the Recurrent All-Pairs Field Transforms network, encoding temporal motion patterns using a transformer encoder, and finally aggregating per-student representations through attention pooling into a unified representation. The secondary stream captures scene-level spatiotemporal information from the full video clip, leveraging a pretrained three-dimensional Residual Network. The two-stream representations are combined via softmax-gated fusion, which dynamically weights each stream's contribution based on the joint context of both features. DualEngage learns a joint representation of individual actions with overarching group dynamics. We evaluate the proposed approach using fivefold cross-validation on the Classroom Group Engagement Dataset developed by Ocean University of China, achieving an average classification accuracy of 0.9621+/-0.0161 with a macro-averaged F1 of 0.9530+/-0.0204. To understand the contribution of each branch, we further conduct an ablation study comparing single-stream variants against the two-stream model. This work is among the first in classroom engagement recognition to adopt a dual-stream design that explicitly leverages motion cues as an estimator.

AI.tldr: 提出DualEngage双流框架，用于从课堂视频中进行群体参与度识别，结合个体运动动态和场景级时空信息，在群体参与度数据集上达到96.21%准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有自动参与度识别方法主要针对在线课堂或个体层面，缺乏对课堂群体参与度的有效识别。群体参与度对学习效果至关重要，需要同时考虑个体行为和群体动态。
AI.method: 双流框架：主流通过检测跟踪学生、提取密集光流、Transformer编码时间运动模式、注意力池化聚合个体表示；次流使用预训练3D ResNet捕获场景级时空信息；通过softmax门控融合动态加权两个流。
AI.result: 在中国海洋大学课堂群体参与度数据集上，通过五折交叉验证达到平均分类准确率0.9621±0.0161，宏平均F1分数0.9530±0.0204。消融研究显示双流设计优于单流变体。
AI.conclusion: DualEngage是首个在课堂参与度识别中采用双流设计并明确利用运动线索作为估计器的方法，能有效学习个体行为与群体动态的联合表示。

title: VeriSim: A Configurable Framework for Evaluating Medical AI Under Realistic Patient Noise
summary: Medical large language models (LLMs) achieve impressive performance on standardized benchmarks, yet these evaluations fail to capture the complexity of real clinical encounters where patients exhibit memory gaps, limited health literacy, anxiety, and other communication barriers. We introduce VeriSim, a truth-preserving patient simulation framework that injects controllable, clinically evidence-grounded noise into patient responses while maintaining strict adherence to medical ground truth through a hybrid UMLS-LLM verification mechanism. Our framework operationalizes six noise dimensions derived from peer-reviewed medical communication literature, capturing authentic clinical phenomena such as patient recall limitations, health literacy barriers, and stigma-driven non-disclosure. Experiments across seven open-weight LLMs reveal that all models degrade significantly under realistic patient noise, with diagnostic accuracy dropping 15-25% and conversation length increasing 34-55%. Notably, smaller models (7B) show 40% greater degradation than larger models (70B+), while medical fine-tuning on standard corpora provides limited robustness benefits against patient communication noise. Evaluation by board-certified clinicians demonstrates high-quality simulation with strong inter-annotator agreement (kappa > 0.80), while LLM-as-a-Judge serves as a validated auxiliary evaluator achieving comparable reliability for scalable assessment. Our results highlight a critical Sim-to-Real gap in current medical AI. We release VeriSim as an open-source noise-injection framework, establishing a rigorous testbed for evaluating clinical robustness.

AI.tldr: VeriSim是一个医疗LLM评估框架，通过注入基于临床证据的噪声来模拟真实患者沟通障碍，揭示当前医疗AI在真实临床场景中的显著性能下降。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗LLM评估主要依赖标准化基准测试，无法捕捉真实临床环境中患者存在的记忆缺陷、健康素养限制、焦虑和沟通障碍等复杂因素，导致评估结果与真实临床表现存在差距。
AI.method: 提出VeriSim框架，采用混合UMLS-LLM验证机制，在保持医学事实准确性的前提下，向患者回答中注入可控的、基于临床证据的噪声。框架基于医学沟通文献定义了六个噪声维度，模拟患者回忆限制、健康素养障碍、污名化导致的不披露等真实临床现象。
AI.result: 在七个开源LLM上的实验显示：所有模型在真实患者噪声下性能显著下降，诊断准确率下降15-25%，对话长度增加34-55%；较小模型（7B）比大模型（70B+）性能下降多40%；医疗微调对患者沟通噪声的鲁棒性提升有限。临床医生评估显示高质量模拟（kappa > 0.80），LLM-as-a-Judge作为辅助评估器达到可比较的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 当前医疗AI存在严重的模拟到现实差距，VeriSim作为开源噪声注入框架为评估临床鲁棒性提供了严格测试平台。

title: ks-pret-5m: a 5 million word, 12 million token kashmiri pretraining dataset
summary: We present KS-PRET-5M, the largest publicly available pretraining dataset for the Kashmiri language, comprising 5,090,244 (5.09M) words, 27,692,959 (27.6M) characters, and a vocabulary of 295,433 (295.4K) unique word types. We assembled the dataset from two source classes: digitized archival and literary material, encompassing literature, news, biographies, novels, poetry, religious scholarship, and academic writing, recovered from the proprietary InPage desktop-publishing format using the converter of Malik~\cite{malik2024inpage}, and Unicode-native text collected from Kashmiri-language web sources. All text was processed through an eleven-stage cleaning pipeline that achieves a mean Kashmiri script ratio of 0.9965, reducing Devanagari contamination to 146 characters across the full dataset. We tokenized the dataset empirically using google/muril-base-cased, yielding a subword ratio of 2.383 tokens per word and a total of approximately 12.13 million subword tokens, substantially higher than prior estimates derived from non-Kashmiri Perso-Arabic analogues. KS-PRET-5M is released as a single continuous text stream under CC~BY~4.0 to support language model pretraining, tokenizer training, and computational linguistic research for Kashmiri.

AI.tldr: KS-PRET-5M是最大的克什米尔语公开预训练数据集，包含509万单词、2769万字符和29.5万独特词类型，支持语言模型预训练和计算语言学研究。
AI.motivation: 克什米尔语作为低资源语言，缺乏高质量的大规模预训练数据集。现有数据集存在脚本污染（如天城文混杂）和规模不足的问题，限制了克什米尔语语言模型的发展。
AI.method: 数据集从两个来源构建：1) 使用Malik的转换器从InPage桌面出版格式恢复的数字化档案和文学材料；2) 从克什米尔语网络来源收集的Unicode原生文本。所有文本经过11阶段清洗流程，确保克什米尔文字符比例达到0.9965。
AI.result: 创建了包含509万单词、2769万字符、29.5万独特词类型的克什米尔语数据集，天城文污染减少到仅146个字符。使用google/muril-base-cased分词后得到约1213万子词标记，子词比例为每单词2.383个标记。
AI.conclusion: KS-PRET-5M是目前最大的克什米尔语公开预训练数据集，为克什米尔语语言模型预训练、分词器训练和计算语言学研究提供了重要资源，以CC BY 4.0许可发布。

title: Bringing Value Models Back: Generative Critics for Value Modeling in LLM Reinforcement Learning
summary: Credit assignment is a central challenge in reinforcement learning (RL). Classical actor-critic methods address this challenge through fine-grained advantage estimation based on a learned value function. However, learned value models are often avoided in modern large language model (LLM) RL because conventional discriminative critics are difficult to train reliably. We revisit value modeling and argue that this difficulty is partly due to limited expressiveness. In particular, representation complexity theory suggests that value functions can be hard to approximate under the one-shot prediction paradigm used by existing value models, and our scaling experiments show that such critics do not improve reliably with scale. Motivated by this observation, we propose Generative Actor-Critic (GenAC), which replaces one-shot scalar value prediction with a generative critic that performs chain-of-thought reasoning before producing a value estimate. We further introduce In-Context Conditioning, which helps the critic remain calibrated to the current actor throughout training. GenAC improves value approximation, ranking reliability, and out-of-distribution generalization, and these gains translate into stronger downstream RL performance than both value-based and value-free baselines. Overall, our results suggest that stronger value modeling is a promising direction for improving credit assignment in LLM reinforcement learning.

AI.tldr: GenAC提出生成式评论家替代传统判别式价值函数，通过思维链推理改进LLM强化学习中的信用分配问题
AI.motivation: 传统判别式价值函数在LLM强化学习中难以可靠训练，表达能力有限，无法随规模扩展而改进，导致信用分配困难
AI.method: 提出生成式演员-评论家(GenAC)：1) 用生成式评论家替代一次性标量价值预测，进行思维链推理后输出价值估计；2) 引入上下文条件化，使评论家在训练过程中保持与当前演员的校准
AI.result: GenAC改善了价值近似、排序可靠性和分布外泛化能力，在RL下游任务中表现优于基于价值的和无价值基线方法
AI.conclusion: 更强的价值建模是改进LLM强化学习中信用分配的有前景方向，生成式评论家架构优于传统判别式方法

title: MatRes: Zero-Shot Test-Time Model Adaptation for Simultaneous Matching and Restoration
summary: Real-world image pairs often exhibit both severe degradations and large viewpoint changes, making image restoration and geometric matching mutually interfering tasks when treated independently. In this work, we propose MatRes, a zero-shot test-time adaptation framework that jointly improves restoration quality and correspondence estimation using only a single low-quality and high-quality image pair. By enforcing conditional similarity at corresponding locations, MatRes updates only lightweight modules while keeping all pretrained components frozen, requiring no offline training or additional supervision. Extensive experiments across diverse combinations show that MatRes yields significant gains in both restoration and geometric alignment compared to using either restoration or matching models alone. MatRes offers a practical and widely applicable solution for real-world scenarios where users commonly capture multiple images of a scene with varying viewpoints and quality, effectively addressing the often-overlooked mutual interference between matching and restoration.

AI.tldr: MatRes提出了一种零样本测试时自适应框架，用于联合改进图像恢复和几何匹配，仅需单个低质量-高质量图像对，无需离线训练或额外监督。
AI.motivation: 现实世界图像对通常同时存在严重退化和大视角变化，导致图像恢复和几何匹配这两个任务相互干扰。现有方法独立处理这两个任务会相互影响效果，需要一种联合优化方案。
AI.method: MatRes通过强制对应位置的条件相似性，仅更新轻量级模块而保持所有预训练组件冻结。该框架利用单个低质量-高质量图像对进行零样本测试时自适应，无需离线训练或额外监督。
AI.result: 在多种不同组合的广泛实验中，MatRes相比单独使用恢复或匹配模型，在恢复质量和几何对齐方面都取得了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MatRes为现实场景提供了一种实用且广泛适用的解决方案，用户通常会在不同视角和质量下拍摄同一场景的多个图像，有效解决了匹配和恢复之间常被忽视的相互干扰问题。

title: PEMANT: Persona-Enriched Multi-Agent Negotiation for Travel
summary: Modeling household-level trip generation is fundamental to accurate demand forecasting, traffic flow estimation, and urban system planning. Existing studies were mostly based on classical machine learning models with limited predictive capability, while recent LLM-based approaches have yet to incorporate behavioral theory or intra-household interaction dynamics, both of which are critical for modeling realistic collective travel decisions. To address these limitations, we propose a novel LLM-based framework, named Persona-Enriched Multi-Agent Negotiation for Travel (PEMANT), which first integrates behavioral theory for individualized persona modeling and then conducts household-level trip planning negotiations via a structured multi-agent conversation. Specifically, PEMANT transforms static sociodemographic attributes into coherent narrative profiles that explicitly encode household-level attitudes, subjective norms, and perceived behavioral controls, following our proposed Household-Aware Chain-of-Planned-Behavior (HA-CoPB) framework. Building on these theory-grounded personas, PEMANT captures real-world household decision negotiation via a structured two-phase multi-agent conversation framework with a novel persona-alignment control mechanism. Evaluated on both national and regional household travel survey datasets, PEMANT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art benchmarks across datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出PEMANT框架，结合行为理论和多智能体谈判，用于家庭出行生成建模，超越现有方法
AI.motivation: 现有家庭出行生成建模方法存在局限：传统机器学习预测能力有限，而最近的LLM方法未能融入行为理论和家庭内部互动动态，这两者对建模现实集体出行决策至关重要
AI.method: 提出PEMANT框架：1) 基于行为理论进行个性化角色建模，将静态社会人口属性转化为连贯的叙事档案；2) 通过结构化多智能体对话进行家庭级出行规划谈判，采用两阶段对话框架和角色对齐控制机制
AI.result: 在国家和区域家庭出行调查数据集上评估，PEMANT在不同数据集上始终优于最先进的基准方法
AI.conclusion: PEMANT成功将行为理论和多智能体谈判整合到LLM框架中，显著提升了家庭出行生成建模的准确性和现实性

title: Efficient Training for Cross-lingual Speech Language Models
summary: Currently, large language models (LLMs) predominantly focus on the text modality. To enable more natural human-AI interaction, speech LLMs are emerging, but building effective end-to-end speech LLMs remains challenging due to limited data and the difficulty in expanding to more languages. In this paper, we introduce Cross-lingual Speech Language Model (CSLM), an efficient training method for cross-lingual speech LLMs based on discrete speech tokens. We propose a novel alignment strategy that achieves cross-modal and cross-lingual alignment through continual pre-training. By conducting instruction fine-tuning following a speech-text interleaved chain-of-modality generation process, we enhance modal alignment at a finer granularity, thereby improving generation quality and reducing latency. CSLM aligns different modalities and languages simultaneously without the need for massive speech data, thus exhibiting good language scalability. Evaluations on cross-modal tasks, mono-lingual conversational tasks, and cross-lingual conversational tasks demonstrate CSLM's strong cross-modal alignment capabilities and general task abilities. (Code is available at: https://github.com/ictnlp/CSLM)

AI.tldr: CSLM是一种基于离散语音token的高效跨语言语音大语言模型训练方法，通过新颖的对齐策略实现跨模态和跨语言对齐，无需大量语音数据即可扩展多语言能力。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型主要关注文本模态，为了实现更自然的人机交互，语音大语言模型正在兴起。但构建有效的端到端语音大语言模型面临数据有限和扩展到更多语言的困难。
AI.method: 提出基于离散语音token的高效训练方法CSLM，采用新颖的对齐策略通过持续预训练实现跨模态和跨语言对齐。通过语音-文本交错链式模态生成过程进行指令微调，增强细粒度模态对齐。
AI.result: 在跨模态任务、单语言对话任务和跨语言对话任务的评估中，CSLM展现出强大的跨模态对齐能力和通用任务能力，同时减少延迟。
AI.conclusion: CSLM能够同时对齐不同模态和语言，无需大量语音数据，具有良好的语言可扩展性，为构建高效跨语言语音大语言模型提供了有效方法。

title: INCRT: An Incremental Transformer That Determines Its Own Architecture
comment: 19 pages, 6 figures, 5 theorems. Submitted to Neurocomputing (Elsevier)
summary:
Transformer architectures are designed by trial and error: the number of attention heads, the depth, and the head size are fixed before training begins, with no mathematical principle to guide the choice. The result is systematic structural redundancy -- between half and four-fifths of all heads in a trained model can be removed without measurable loss -- because the architecture allocates capacity without reference to the actual requirements of the task.This paper introduces INCRT (Incremental Transformer), an architecture that determines its own structure during training. Starting from a single head, INCRT adds one attention head at a time whenever its current configuration is provably insufficient, and prunes heads that have become redundant. Each growth decision is driven by a single, online-computable geometric quantity derived from the task's directional structure, requiring no separate validation phase and no hand-tuned schedule.
  Two theorems form the theoretical backbone. The first (homeostatic convergence) establishes that the system always reaches a finite stopping configuration that is simultaneously minimal (no redundant heads) and sufficient (no uncaptured directional energy above the threshold). The second (compressed-sensing analogy) provides a geometric upper bound on the number of heads that this configuration can contain, as a function of the spectral complexity of the task.
  Experiments on SARS-CoV-2 variant classification and SST-2 sentiment analysis confirm both results: the predicted and observed head counts agree within 12% across all benchmarks, and the final architectures match or exceed BERT-base on distribution-specific tasks while using between three and seven times fewer parameters and no pre-training.

AI.tldr: INCRT是一种增量式Transformer架构，能够在训练过程中自主决定结构，从单头开始逐步添加注意力头，并剪枝冗余头，实现最小且足够的架构配置。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer架构通过试错设计，固定注意力头数量、深度和头尺寸，导致系统性结构冗余（50-80%的注意力头可移除而不影响性能），因为架构分配容量时未考虑任务实际需求。
AI.method: 提出INCRT（增量Transformer），从单头开始训练，根据任务方向结构导出的几何量在线决定何时添加新注意力头，并剪枝冗余头。无需单独验证阶段或手动调整计划。
AI.result: 实验在SARS-CoV-2变体分类和SST-2情感分析任务中验证：预测与观测的头数量在所有基准测试中相差不超过12%，最终架构在分布特定任务上匹配或超过BERT-base，同时使用3-7倍更少的参数且无需预训练。
AI.conclusion: INCRT通过增量式架构设计解决了Transformer结构冗余问题，提供理论保证（稳态收敛和压缩感知类比），实现高效且自适应的模型结构。

title: Active Diffusion Matching: Score-based Iterative Alignment of Cross-Modal Retinal Images
summary:
Objective: The study aims to address the challenge of aligning Standard Fundus Images (SFIs) and Ultra-Widefield Fundus Images (UWFIs), which is difficult due to their substantial differences in viewing range and the amorphous appearance of the retina. Currently, no specialized method exists for this task, and existing image alignment techniques lack accuracy.
  Methods: We propose Active Diffusion Matching (ADM), a novel cross-modal alignment method. ADM integrates two interdependent score-based diffusion models to jointly estimate global transformations and local deformations via an iterative Langevin Markov chain. This approach facilitates a stochastic, progressive search for optimal alignment. Additionally, custom sampling strategies are introduced to enhance the adaptability of ADM to given input image pairs.
  Results: Comparative experimental evaluations demonstrate that ADM achieves state-of-the-art alignment accuracy. This was validated on two datasets: a private dataset of SFI-UWFI pairs and a public dataset of SFI-SFI pairs, with mAUC improvements of 5.2 and 0.4 points on the private and public datasets, respectively, compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.
  Conclusion: ADM effectively bridges the gap in aligning SFIs and UWFIs, providing an innovative solution to a previously unaddressed challenge. The method's ability to jointly optimize global and local alignment makes it highly effective for cross-modal image alignment tasks.
  Significance: ADM has the potential to transform the integrated analysis of SFIs and UWFIs, enabling better clinical utility and supporting learning-based image enhancements. This advancement could significantly improve diagnostic accuracy and patient outcomes in ophthalmology.

AI.tldr: ADM（主动扩散匹配）是一种新颖的跨模态图像对齐方法，专门用于解决标准眼底图像（SFI）和超广角眼底图像（UWFI）的对齐难题，通过两个相互依赖的基于分数的扩散模型联合估计全局变换和局部形变。
AI.motivation: 由于标准眼底图像（SFI）和超广角眼底图像（UWFI）在视野范围和视网膜外观上存在显著差异，目前缺乏专门的对齐方法，现有图像对齐技术精度不足，限制了这两种重要眼科图像的整合分析。
AI.method: 提出ADM方法，集成两个相互依赖的基于分数的扩散模型，通过迭代Langevin马尔可夫链联合估计全局变换和局部形变，实现随机渐进式最优对齐搜索，并引入定制采样策略增强对输入图像对的适应性。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上验证：私有SFI-UWFI对数据集和公共SFI-SFI对数据集，ADM分别实现了5.2和0.4个点的mAUC提升，达到了最先进的对齐精度。
AI.conclusion: ADM有效解决了SFI和UWFI对齐的空白，为先前未解决的挑战提供了创新解决方案，其联合优化全局和局部对齐的能力使其在跨模态图像对齐任务中非常有效。

title: Tracing the Roots: A Multi-Agent Framework for Uncovering Data Lineage in Post-Training LLMs
summary: Post-training data plays a pivotal role in shaping the capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), yet datasets are often treated as isolated artifacts, overlooking the systemic connections that underlie their evolution. To disentangle these complex relationships, we introduce the concept of \textbf{data lineage} to the LLM ecosystem and propose an automated multi-agent framework to reconstruct the evolutionary graph of dataset development. Through large-scale lineage analysis, we characterize domain-specific structural patterns, such as vertical refinement in math-oriented datasets and horizontal aggregation in general-domain corpora. Moreover, we uncover pervasive systemic issues, including \textit{structural redundancy} induced by implicit dataset intersections and the \textit{propagation of benchmark contamination} along lineage paths. To demonstrate the practical value of lineage analysis for data construction, we leverage the reconstructed lineage graph to create a \textit{lineage-aware diversity-oriented dataset}. By anchoring instruction sampling at upstream root sources, this approach mitigates downstream homogenization and hidden redundancy, yielding a more diverse post-training corpus. We further highlight lineage-centric analysis as an efficient and robust topological alternative to sample-level dataset comparison for large-scale data ecosystems. By grounding data construction in explicit lineage structures, our work advances post-training data curation toward a more systematic and controllable paradigm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出数据谱系概念和自动化多智能体框架，用于重建LLM后训练数据集的演化图，揭示数据集间的结构模式和系统性问题，并利用谱系图构建多样性导向的数据集。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM后训练数据集常被视为孤立产物，忽视了数据集间的系统性关联和演化关系。这种孤立视角导致难以理解数据集间的复杂依赖、冗余和污染传播等问题。
AI.method: 引入数据谱系概念，提出自动化多智能体框架重建数据集演化图。通过大规模谱系分析识别结构模式，并利用谱系图构建基于上游根源的多样性导向数据集。
AI.result: 揭示了数学导向数据集的垂直细化和通用领域语料库的水平聚合等特定领域结构模式；发现了由隐式数据集交集引起的结构冗余和沿谱系路径的基准污染传播等系统性问题；构建的谱系感知多样性数据集能有效缓解下游同质化和隐藏冗余。
AI.conclusion: 数据谱系分析为大规模数据生态系统提供了高效稳健的拓扑替代方案，将数据构建建立在明确的谱系结构基础上，推动后训练数据管理向更系统化和可控的范式发展。

title: BITS Pilani at SemEval-2026 Task 9: Structured Supervised Fine-Tuning with DPO Refinement for Polarization Detection
summary:
The POLAR SemEval-2026 Shared Task aims to detect online polarization and focuses on the classification and identification of multilingual, multicultural, and multi-event polarization.
  Accurate computational detection of online polarization is challenging due to nuanced rhetoric, implicit framing, and the high cost of human-in-the-loop annotation. Building on recent findings that contextual prompting enables large language models to function as strong polarization detectors, we present a two-stage approach for detecting political polarization in social media text that combines structured supervised fine-tuning with Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) refinement.
  We fine-tune Qwen 2.5-7B-Instruct with LoRA using an interpretable slot-filling template (target, claim type, manifestation checklist, and justification). We then apply DPO with automatically generated preference pairs to reduce costly false negatives. Experiments on the SemEval 2026 POLAR shared task dataset show that preference-based refinement improves both accuracy and decreases false negatives without extra annotation. On the English development set, DPO increases recall from 0.5085 to 0.7797 and improves macro-F1 by ~5 points.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种两阶段方法，结合结构化监督微调和DPO优化，用于检测社交媒体中的政治极化内容，在SemEval 2026 POLAR任务上显著提升了召回率和F1分数。
AI.motivation: 在线极化检测面临挑战：微妙的修辞、隐含的框架以及人工标注成本高昂。虽然大语言模型通过上下文提示可以作为有效的极化检测器，但需要更系统的方法来提高准确性和减少误报。
AI.method:
1. 使用可解释的槽填充模板（目标、主张类型、表现检查清单、理由）对Qwen 2.5-7B-Instruct进行LoRA微调
2. 应用DPO（直接偏好优化）与自动生成的偏好对，以减少代价高昂的假阴性
AI.result: 在SemEval 2026 POLAR共享任务数据集上，DPO优化显著提升了性能：英文开发集上召回率从0.5085提升到0.7797，宏观F1提高了约5个百分点，且无需额外标注。
AI.conclusion: 结构化监督微调结合DPO优化是一种有效的极化检测方法，能够显著提高召回率并减少假阴性，为在线极化检测提供了实用的解决方案。

title: PokeRL: Reinforcement Learning for Pokemon Red
summary: Pokemon Red is a long-horizon JRPG with sparse rewards, partial observability, and quirky control mechanics that make it a challenging benchmark for reinforcement learning. While recent work has shown that PPO agents can clear the first two gyms using heavy reward shaping and engineered observations, training remains brittle in practice, with agents often degenerating into action loops, menu spam, or unproductive wandering. In this paper, we present PokeRL, a modular system that trains deep reinforcement learning agents to complete early game tasks in Pokemon Red, including exiting the player's house, exploring Pallet Town to reach tall grass, and winning the first rival battle. Our main contributions are a loop-aware environment wrapper around the PyBoy emulator with map masking, a multi-layer anti-loop and anti-spam mechanism, and a dense hierarchical reward design. We argue that practical systems like PokeRL, which explicitly model failure modes such as loops and spam, are a necessary intermediate step between toy benchmarks and full Pokemon League champion agents. Code is available at https://github.com/reddheeraj/PokemonRL

AI.tldr: PokeRL是一个用于在《宝可梦红》中训练深度强化学习代理的模块化系统，通过循环感知环境包装、多层防循环/防垃圾机制和密集分层奖励设计来解决游戏中的挑战性问题。
AI.motivation: 《宝可梦红》作为一款JRPG游戏，具有长视野、稀疏奖励、部分可观测性和奇特的控制机制，使其成为强化学习的挑战性基准。现有方法虽然能通过大量奖励塑造和工程化观测完成前两个道馆，但训练过程脆弱，代理常陷入动作循环、菜单垃圾操作或无意义徘徊。
AI.method: 1) 围绕PyBoy模拟器的循环感知环境包装器，包含地图掩码；2) 多层防循环和防垃圾机制；3) 密集分层奖励设计。系统模块化，能完成早期游戏任务（离开玩家房屋、探索真新镇到达高草丛、赢得首次对手战斗）。
AI.result: 开发了PokeRL系统，能够训练深度强化学习代理完成《宝可梦红》早期游戏任务。系统通过显式建模循环和垃圾操作等失败模式，提高了训练的稳定性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 像PokeRL这样显式建模循环和垃圾操作等失败模式的实用系统，是从玩具基准到完整宝可梦联盟冠军代理的必要中间步骤。代码已开源。

title: Particle Diffusion Matching: Random Walk Correspondence Search for the Alignment of Standard and Ultra-Widefield Fundus Images
summary: We propose a robust alignment technique for Standard Fundus Images (SFIs) and Ultra-Widefield Fundus Images (UWFIs), which are challenging to align due to differences in scale, appearance, and the scarcity of distinctive features. Our method, termed Particle Diffusion Matching (PDM), performs alignment through an iterative Random Walk Correspondence Search (RWCS) guided by a diffusion model. At each iteration, the model estimates displacement vectors for particle points by considering local appearance, the structural distribution of particles, and an estimated global transformation, enabling progressive refinement of correspondences even under difficult conditions. PDM achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple retinal image alignment benchmarks, showing substantial improvement on a primary dataset of SFI-UWFI pairs and demonstrating its effectiveness in real-world clinical scenarios. By providing accurate and scalable correspondence estimation, PDM overcomes the limitations of existing methods and facilitates the integration of complementary retinal image modalities. This diffusion-guided search strategy offers a new direction for improving downstream supervised learning, disease diagnosis, and multi-modal image analysis in ophthalmology.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于标准眼底图像和超广角眼底图像对齐的鲁棒方法PDM，通过扩散模型引导的随机游走对应搜索实现渐进式对齐，在多个基准测试中达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 标准眼底图像和超广角眼底图像由于尺度、外观差异以及特征稀缺性，难以实现准确对齐，限制了多模态视网膜图像分析的临床应用。
AI.method: 提出粒子扩散匹配方法，通过迭代的随机游走对应搜索，在扩散模型引导下结合局部外观、粒子结构分布和全局变换估计，渐进式优化对应关系。
AI.result: 在多个视网膜图像对齐基准测试中达到最先进性能，在SFI-UWFI配对数据集上显著改进，在真实临床场景中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: PDM通过准确可扩展的对应估计克服了现有方法限制，为下游监督学习、疾病诊断和多模态图像分析提供了新方向。

title: CHAIRO: Contextual Hierarchical Analogical Induction and Reasoning Optimization for LLMs
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 main conference; under official publication process
summary:
Content moderation in online platforms faces persistent challenges due to the evolving complexity of user-generated content and the limitations of traditional rule-based and machine learning approaches. While recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled more sophisticated moderation via direct prompting or fine-tuning, these approaches often exhibit limited generalization, interpretability, and adaptability to unseen or ambiguous cases.
  In this work, we propose a novel moderation framework that leverages analogical examples to enhance rule induction and decision reliability. Our approach integrates end-to-end optimization of analogical retrieval, rule generation, and moderation classification, enabling the dynamic adaptation of moderation rules to diverse content scenarios. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms both rule-injected fine-tuning baselines and multi-stage static RAG pipelines in terms of moderation accuracy and rule quality. Further evaluations, including human assessments and external model generalization tests, confirm that our framework produces rules with better clarity, interpretability, and applicability. These findings show that analogical example-driven methods can advance robust, explainable, and generalizable content moderation in real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 提出基于类比示例的内容审核框架，通过端到端优化类比检索、规则生成和审核分类，显著提升审核准确性和规则质量
AI.motivation: 在线平台内容审核面临用户生成内容日益复杂、传统规则和机器学习方法局限性的挑战。现有LLM方法（直接提示或微调）在泛化性、可解释性和适应性方面存在不足
AI.method: 提出新颖的审核框架，利用类比示例增强规则归纳和决策可靠性。集成端到端优化：类比检索、规则生成和审核分类，实现规则对多样化内容场景的动态适应
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在审核准确性和规则质量上显著优于规则注入微调基线和多阶段静态RAG流程。人类评估和外部模型泛化测试确认框架产生更清晰、可解释和适用的规则
AI.conclusion: 类比示例驱动方法能够推进现实应用中稳健、可解释和可泛化的内容审核

title: DeCoVec: Building Decoding Space based Task Vector for Large Language Models via In-Context Learning
summary: Task vectors, representing directions in model or activation spaces that encode task-specific behaviors, have emerged as a promising tool for steering large language models (LLMs). However, existing approaches typically require fine-tuning or invasive manipulation of internal states, limiting their flexibility and scalability. We propose \textsc{DeCoVec} (Decoding Space based Task Vector), a training-free and non-invasive framework that constructs task vectors directly in the \textit{decoding space} by leveraging in-context learning (ICL). Specifically, \textsc{DeCoVec} captures the task essence as the difference between the output logit distributions of few-shot and zero-shot prompts, then steers generation by injecting this vector into the decoding process. Experiments across seven LLMs (0.5B--9B) on TruthfulQA, Math-500, and AQUA-RAT show that \textsc{DeCoVec} consistently outperforms standard few-shot baselines, with gains up to +5.50 average accuracy. Further analysis demonstrates that \textsc{DeCoVec} effectively suppresses generation degeneration and logical flaws while exhibiting strong robustness to demonstration ordering, all without incurring additional input token costs. Our method offers a training-free and non-invasive solution for LLM steering without requiring weight updates or auxiliary models.

AI.tldr: DeCoVec是一种无需训练、非侵入式的任务向量框架，通过在解码空间构建任务向量来引导LLM，利用上下文学习差异实现任务导向生成。
AI.motivation: 现有任务向量方法通常需要微调或侵入式操作内部状态，限制了灵活性和可扩展性。需要一种无需训练、非侵入式的方法来引导LLM执行特定任务。
AI.method: DeCoVec在解码空间构建任务向量：通过比较few-shot和zero-shot提示的输出logit分布差异来捕获任务本质，然后将该向量注入解码过程来引导生成。
AI.result: 在7个LLM（0.5B-9B）上，在TruthfulQA、Math-500和AQUA-RAT任务中，DeCoVec持续优于标准few-shot基线，平均准确率提升高达+5.50。有效抑制生成退化和逻辑缺陷，对演示顺序具有强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DeCoVec提供了一种无需训练、非侵入式的LLM引导解决方案，无需权重更新或辅助模型，在解码空间构建任务向量是有效的。

title: Online Covariance Estimation in Averaged SGD: Improved Batch-Mean Rates and Minimax Optimality via Trajectory Regression
summary: We study online covariance matrix estimation for Polyak--Ruppert averaged stochastic gradient descent (SGD). The online batch-means estimator of Zhu, Chen and Wu (2023) achieves an operator-norm convergence rate of $O(n^{-(1-α)/4})$, which yields $O(n^{-1/8})$ at the optimal learning-rate exponent $α\rightarrow 1/2^+$. A rigorous per-block bias analysis reveals that re-tuning the block-growth parameter improves the batch-means rate to $O(n^{-(1-α)/3})$, achieving $O(n^{-1/6})$. The modified estimator requires no Hessian access and preserves $O(d^2)$ memory. We provide a complete error decomposition into variance, stationarity bias, and nonlinearity bias components. A weighted-averaging variant that avoids hard truncation is also discussed. We establish the minimax rate $Θ(n^{-(1-α)/2})$ for Hessian-free covariance estimation from the SGD trajectory: a Le Cam lower bound gives $Ω(n^{-(1-α)/2})$, and a trajectory-regression estimator--which estimates the Hessian by regressing SGD increments on iterates--achieves $O(n^{-(1-α)/2})$, matching the lower bound. The construction reveals that the bottleneck is the sublinear accumulation of information about the Hessian from the SGD drift.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Polyak-Ruppert平均随机梯度下降(SGD)的在线协方差矩阵估计，改进了批均值估计器，提出了匹配极小极大下界的轨迹回归估计器。
AI.motivation: 随机梯度下降(SGD)的协方差矩阵估计对于统计推断和不确定性量化至关重要。现有在线批均值估计器收敛速度较慢，需要改进。同时需要建立该问题的极小极大下界。
AI.method: 1) 对批均值估计器进行严格的逐块偏差分析，重新调整块增长参数改进收敛速度；2) 提出加权平均变体避免硬截断；3) 提出轨迹回归估计器，通过回归SGD增量到迭代点来估计Hessian矩阵；4) 使用Le Cam方法建立极小极大下界。
AI.result: 1) 改进的批均值估计器收敛速度从O(n^{-1/8})提升到O(n^{-1/6})；2) 建立了Hessian-free协方差估计的极小极大下界Θ(n^{-(1-α)/2})；3) 轨迹回归估计器达到该下界，匹配最优收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: 本文改进了SGD协方差矩阵的在线估计方法，建立了该问题的理论极限，揭示了信息从SGD漂移中次线性积累是瓶颈。方法无需Hessian访问，保持O(d²)内存。

title: Global monitoring of methane point sources using deep learning on hyperspectral radiance measurements from EMIT
summary: Anthropogenic methane (CH4) point sources drive near-term climate forcing, safety hazards, and system inefficiencies. Space-based imaging spectroscopy is emerging as a tool for identifying emissions globally, but existing approaches largely rely on manual plume identification. Here we present the Methane Analysis and Plume Localization with EMIT (MAPL-EMIT) model, an end-to-end vision transformer framework that leverages the complete radiance spectrum from the Earth Surface Mineral Dust Source Investigation (EMIT) instrument to jointly retrieve methane enhancements across all pixels within a scene. This approach brings together spectral and spatial context to significantly lower detection limits. MAPL-EMIT simultaneously supports enhancement quantification, plume delineation, and source localization, even for multiple overlapping plumes. The model was trained on 3.6 million physics-based synthetic plumes injected into global EMIT radiance data. Synthetic evaluation confirms the model's ability to identify plumes with high recall and precision and to capture weaker plumes relative to existing matched-filter approaches. On real-world benchmarks, MAPL-EMIT captures 79% of known hand-annotated NASA L2B plume complexes across a test set of 1084 EMIT granules, while capturing twice as many plausible plumes than identified by human analysts. Further validation against coincident airborne data, top-emitting landfills, and controlled release experiments confirms the model's ability to identify previously uncaptured sources. By incorporating model-generated metrics such as spectral fit scores and estimated noise levels, the framework can further limit false-positive rates. Overall, MAPL-EMIT enables high-throughput implementation on the full EMIT catalog, shifting methane monitoring from labor-intensive workflows to a rapid, scalable paradigm for global plume mapping at the facility scale.

AI.tldr: MAPL-EMIT是一个端到端的视觉Transformer框架，利用EMIT仪器的完整辐射光谱数据，联合检索场景中所有像素的甲烷增强，实现甲烷点源排放的自动检测、量化、羽流划分和源定位。
AI.motivation: 人为甲烷点源排放导致近期气候强迫、安全隐患和系统效率低下。虽然基于空间的成像光谱学正在成为全球排放识别的工具，但现有方法主要依赖人工羽流识别，效率低下且难以规模化。
AI.method: 开发了端到端的视觉Transformer框架MAPL-EMIT，利用EMIT仪器的完整辐射光谱数据，结合光谱和空间上下文信息。在360万个基于物理的合成羽流注入全球EMIT辐射数据上进行训练，支持增强量化、羽流划分和源定位，即使对于多个重叠羽流也能处理。
AI.result: 在1084个EMIT颗粒的测试集中，MAPL-EMIT捕获了79%已知的人工标注NASA L2B羽流复合体，同时捕获了人类分析师识别数量的两倍可信羽流。与同步机载数据、顶级排放垃圾填埋场和受控释放实验的验证证实了模型识别先前未捕获源的能力。
AI.conclusion: MAPL-EMIT实现了对整个EMIT目录的高通量实施，将甲烷监测从劳动密集型工作流程转变为快速、可扩展的全球设施尺度羽流制图范式。

title: CARO: Chain-of-Analogy Reasoning Optimization for Robust Content Moderation
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 findings; under official publication process
summary: Current large language models (LLMs), even those explicitly trained for reasoning, often struggle with ambiguous content moderation cases due to misleading "decision shortcuts" embedded in context. Inspired by cognitive psychology insights into expert moderation, we introduce \caro (Chain-of-Analogy Reasoning Optimization), a novel two-stage training framework to induce robust analogical reasoning in LLMs. First, \caro bootstraps analogical reasoning chains via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) on moderation data and performs supervised fine-tuning (SFT). Second, we propose a customized direct preference optimization (DPO) approach to reinforce analogical reasoning behaviors explicitly. Unlike static retrieval methods, \caro dynamically generates tailored analogical references during inference, effectively mitigating harmful decision shortcuts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \caro substantially outperforms state-of-the-art reasoning models (DeepSeek R1, QwQ), specialized moderation models (LLaMA Guard), and advanced fine-tuning and retrieval-augmented methods, achieving an average F1 score improvement of 24.9\% on challenging ambiguous moderation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: CARO是一个两阶段训练框架，通过类比推理优化来提升LLM在内容审核中的表现，特别针对模糊案例，动态生成类比参考而非静态检索。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在内容审核中面临模糊案例时，容易受到上下文中的"决策捷径"误导。受认知心理学专家审核机制的启发，需要开发能够进行稳健类比推理的模型。
AI.method: 1. 第一阶段：通过检索增强生成(RAG)在审核数据上引导类比推理链，进行监督微调(SFT)。2. 第二阶段：定制化的直接偏好优化(DPO)方法，明确强化类比推理行为。推理时动态生成定制化的类比参考。
AI.result: CARO在具有挑战性的模糊审核基准上，平均F1分数提升24.9%，显著优于最先进的推理模型(DeepSeek R1, QwQ)、专业审核模型(LLaMA Guard)以及先进的微调和检索增强方法。
AI.conclusion: CARO框架通过诱导稳健的类比推理，有效减轻了有害的决策捷径，为LLM在复杂内容审核任务中提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: How Robust Are Large Language Models for Clinical Numeracy? An Empirical Study on Numerical Reasoning Abilities in Clinical Contexts
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly being explored for clinical question answering and decision support, yet safe deployment critically requires reliable handling of patient measurements in heterogeneous clinical notes. Existing evaluations of LLMs for clinical numerical reasoning provide limited operation-level coverage, restricted primarily to arithmetic computation, and rarely assess the robustness of numerical understanding across clinical note formats. We introduce ClinicNumRobBench, a benchmark of 1,624 context-question instances with ground-truth answers that evaluates four main types of clinical numeracy: value retrieval, arithmetic computation, relational comparison, and aggregation. To stress-test robustness, ClinicNumRobBench presents longitudinal MIMIC-IV vital-sign records in three semantically equivalent representations, including a real-world note-style variant derived from the Open Patients dataset, and instantiates queries using 42 question templates. Experiments on 14 LLMs show that value retrieval is generally strong, with most models exceeding 85% accuracy, while relational comparison and aggregation remain challenging, with some models scoring below 15%. Fine-tuning on medical data can reduce numeracy relative to base models by over 30%, and performance drops under note-style variation indicate LLM sensitivity to format. ClinicNumRobBench offers a rigorous testbed for clinically reliable numerical reasoning. Code and data URL are available on https://github.com/MinhVuong2000/ClinicNumRobBench.

AI.tldr: 提出了ClinicNumRobBench基准，用于评估LLM在临床数值推理任务上的能力，包括数值检索、算术计算、关系比较和聚合四个主要类型，包含1,624个实例和三种语义等效的临床记录表示形式。
AI.motivation: LLM在临床问答和决策支持中的应用日益增多，但安全部署需要可靠处理异构临床记录中的患者测量数据。现有评估主要局限于算术计算，缺乏对临床数值理解鲁棒性的全面测试。
AI.method: 构建了包含1,624个上下文-问题实例的基准，评估四种临床数值能力：数值检索、算术计算、关系比较和聚合。使用MIMIC-IV生命体征记录，提供三种语义等效表示（包括来自Open Patients数据集的真实临床记录风格变体），并通过42个问题模板实例化查询。
AI.result: 在14个LLM上的实验显示：数值检索表现普遍较强（大多数模型超过85%准确率），而关系比较和聚合仍然具有挑战性（部分模型低于15%）。医学数据微调可能使数值能力相对于基础模型下降超过30%，且性能在临床记录风格变化下下降表明LLM对格式敏感。
AI.conclusion: ClinicNumRobBench为临床可靠的数值推理提供了严格的测试平台，揭示了LLM在临床数值推理方面的局限性，特别是在关系比较和聚合任务上，以及对临床记录格式的敏感性。

title: Slithering Through Gaps: Capturing Discrete Isolated Modes via Logistic Bridging
summary: High-dimensional and complex discrete distributions often exhibit multimodal behavior due to inherent discontinuities, posing significant challenges for sampling. Gradient-based discrete samplers, while effective, frequently become trapped in local modes when confronted with rugged or disconnected energy landscapes. This limits their ability to achieve adequate mixing and convergence in high-dimensional multimodal discrete spaces. To address these challenges, we propose \emph{Hyperbolic Secant-squared Gibbs-Sampling (HiSS)}, a novel family of sampling algorithms that integrates a \emph{Metropolis-within-Gibbs} framework to enhance mixing efficiency. HiSS leverages a logistic convolution kernel to couple the discrete sampling variable with the continuous auxiliary variable in a joint distribution. This design allows the auxiliary variable to encapsulate the true target distribution while facilitating easy transitions between distant and disconnected modes. We provide theoretical guarantees of convergence and demonstrate empirically that HiSS outperforms many popular alternatives on a wide variety of tasks, including Ising models, binary neural networks, and combinatorial optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出HiSS采样算法，通过logistic卷积核耦合离散变量与连续辅助变量，使用Metropolis-within-Gibbs框架增强混合效率，解决高维离散多模态分布的采样难题。
AI.motivation: 高维复杂离散分布常呈现多模态特性，梯度离散采样器在崎岖或不连续的能量景观中易陷入局部模式，难以实现充分混合和收敛。
AI.method: 提出双曲正割平方Gibbs采样(HiSS)，结合Metropolis-within-Gibbs框架，使用logistic卷积核将离散采样变量与连续辅助变量耦合在联合分布中，辅助变量捕获目标分布同时促进远距离模式间转移。
AI.result: HiSS在Ising模型、二元神经网络和组合优化等多种任务上优于现有流行方法，提供理论收敛保证。
AI.conclusion: HiSS能有效解决高维多模态离散分布的采样挑战，在混合效率和收敛性方面表现优异。

title: Mining Attribute Subspaces for Efficient Fine-tuning of 3D Foundation Models
summary: With the emergence of 3D foundation models, there is growing interest in fine-tuning them for downstream tasks, where LoRA is the dominant fine-tuning paradigm. As 3D datasets exhibit distinct variations in texture, geometry, camera motion, and lighting, there are interesting fundamental questions: 1) Are there LoRA subspaces associated with each type of variation? 2) Are these subspaces disentangled (i.e., orthogonal to each other)? 3) How do we compute them effectively? This paper provides answers to all these questions. We introduce a robust approach that generates synthetic datasets with controlled variations, fine-tunes a LoRA adapter on each dataset, and extracts a LoRA sub-space associated with each type of variation. We show that these subspaces are approximately disentangled. Integrating them leads to a reduced LoRA subspace that enables efficient LoRA fine-tuning with improved prediction accuracy for downstream tasks. In particular, we show that such a reduced LoRA subspace, despite being derived entirely from synthetic data, generalizes to real datasets. An ablation study validates the effectiveness of the choices in our approach.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究3D基础模型中LoRA微调的子空间特性，发现不同数据变化类型（纹理、几何、相机运动、光照）对应近似解耦的LoRA子空间，并提出通过合成数据构建缩减LoRA子空间以提高下游任务性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 随着3D基础模型的出现，如何有效微调这些模型成为重要问题。LoRA是主要的微调范式，但3D数据在纹理、几何、相机运动、光照等方面存在显著变化。研究这些变化是否对应特定的LoRA子空间，这些子空间是否解耦，以及如何有效计算它们，对于理解3D基础模型的微调机制和提升微调效率具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出一种稳健的方法：1）生成具有受控变化的合成数据集；2）在每个数据集上微调LoRA适配器；3）提取与每种变化类型相关的LoRA子空间；4）整合这些子空间形成缩减的LoRA子空间，用于下游任务的高效微调。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）不同变化类型确实对应特定的LoRA子空间；2）这些子空间近似解耦（相互正交）；3）通过合成数据构建的缩减LoRA子空间能够泛化到真实数据集，提高下游任务的预测精度；4）消融研究验证了方法中各项选择的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为3D基础模型的LoRA微调提供了理论洞察和实践方法，证明了通过合成数据构建的缩减LoRA子空间能够有效捕捉3D数据的关键变化特征，并泛化到真实场景，为高效微调3D基础模型提供了新思路。

title: Cooperation in Human and Machine Agents: Promise Theory Considerations
summary: Agent based systems are more common than we may think. A Promise Theory perspective on cooperation, in systems of human-machine agents, offers a unified perspective on organization and functional design with semi-automated efforts, in terms of the abstract properties of autonomous agents, This applies to human efforts, hardware systems, software, and artificial intelligence, with and without management. One may ask how does a reasoning system of components keep to an intended purpose? As the agent paradigm is now being revived, in connection with artificial intelligence agents, I revisit established principles of agent cooperation, as applied to humans, machines, and their mutual interactions. Promise Theory represents the fundamentals of signalling, comprehension, trust, risk, and feedback between agents, and offers some lessons about success and failure.

AI.tldr: 该论文从承诺理论视角探讨人机代理系统中的合作机制，为自主代理的组织和功能设计提供统一框架，涵盖信号传递、理解、信任、风险等基本要素。
AI.motivation: 随着人工智能代理的复兴，需要重新审视人机代理系统中的合作原则。论文旨在提供一个统一的理论框架来理解自主代理（包括人类、硬件、软件和AI）如何保持预期目标并有效合作。
AI.method: 采用承诺理论作为分析框架，该理论从抽象角度描述自主代理之间的信号传递、理解、信任、风险和反馈机制。论文将这一理论应用于人类、机器及其互动的合作系统分析。
AI.result: 承诺理论为人机代理系统提供了一个统一的合作视角，能够解释系统如何保持预期目的，并提供了关于成功与失败的见解。该框架适用于各种类型的代理系统，包括有管理和无管理的情况。
AI.conclusion: 承诺理论为分析和设计人机代理合作系统提供了有价值的理论工具，特别是在当前AI代理复兴的背景下，有助于理解复杂系统中的合作机制和可靠性问题。

title: SHARE: Social-Humanities AI for Research and Education
summary: This intermediate technical report introduces the SHARE family of base models and the MIRROR user interface. The SHARE models are the first causal language models fully pretrained by and for the social sciences and humanities (SSH). Their performance in modelling SSH texts is close to that of general purpose models (Phi-4) which use 100 times more tokens, as shown by our custom SSH Cloze benchmark. The MIRROR user interface is designed for reviewing text inputs from the SSH disciplines while preserving critical engagement. By prototyping a generative AI interface that does not generate any text, we propose a way to harness the capabilities of the SHARE models without compromising the integrity of SSH principles and norms.

AI.tldr: SHARE模型是首个为社会科学与人文科学（SSH）完全预训练的因果语言模型，其性能接近使用100倍数据量的通用模型Phi-4。MIRROR界面是为SSH文本审查设计的非生成式AI界面。
AI.motivation: 当前通用语言模型在社会科学与人文科学领域存在局限性，缺乏针对SSH文本的专业训练，且生成式AI界面可能违背SSH学科的批判性原则和规范。
AI.method: 开发SHARE系列基础模型，专门针对SSH文本进行完全预训练；创建MIRROR用户界面，这是一个非生成式的AI界面，专注于文本审查而非生成，以保持SSH学科的批判性参与。
AI.result: SHARE模型在自定义的SSH Cloze基准测试中表现优异，性能接近使用100倍数据量的通用模型Phi-4。MIRROR界面成功实现了在不生成文本的情况下利用SHARE模型能力的目标。
AI.conclusion: SHARE模型和MIRROR界面为社会科学与人文科学领域提供了专门化的AI工具，既利用了大型语言模型的能力，又保持了SSH学科的完整性和批判性原则。

title: Transformers Learn Latent Mixture Models In-Context via Mirror Descent
summary: Sequence modelling requires determining which past tokens are causally relevant from the context and their importance: a process inherent to the attention layers in transformers, yet whose underlying learned mechanisms remain poorly understood. In this work, we formalize the task of estimating token importance as an in-context learning problem by introducing a framework based on Mixture of Transition Distributions, where a latent variable determines the influence of past tokens on the next. The distribution over this latent variable is parameterized by unobserved mixture weights that transformers must learn in-context. We demonstrate that transformers can implement Mirror Descent to learn these weights from the context. Specifically, we give an explicit construction of a three-layer transformer that exactly implements one step of Mirror Descent and prove that the resulting estimator is a first-order approximation of the Bayes-optimal predictor. Corroborating our construction and its learnability via gradient descent, we empirically show that transformers trained from scratch learn solutions consistent with our theory: their predictive distributions, attention patterns, and learned transition matrix closely match the construction, while deeper models achieve performance comparable to multi-step Mirror Descent.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一个理论框架，将Transformer中token重要性估计形式化为上下文学习问题，证明三层Transformer可通过镜像下降算法实现贝叶斯最优预测器的一阶近似。
AI.motivation: Transformer注意力机制如何学习确定上下文token的因果相关性和重要性，其内在学习机制仍不明确。本文旨在形式化理解这一过程。
AI.method: 基于混合转移分布框架，将token重要性估计建模为上下文学习问题。提出三层Transformer构造，证明其可精确实现镜像下降算法的一步迭代，学习潜在变量的分布权重。
AI.result: 理论证明构造的Transformer可实现贝叶斯最优预测器的一阶近似。实验验证从头训练的Transformer学习到的预测分布、注意力模式和转移矩阵与理论构造一致，深层模型性能接近多步镜像下降。
AI.conclusion: Transformer可通过镜像下降算法在上下文中学习token重要性权重，这为理解注意力机制的学习过程提供了理论框架和实证支持。

title: ABot-Claw: A Foundation for Persistent, Cooperative, and Self-Evolving Robotic Agents
summary: Current embodied intelligent systems still face a substantial gap between high-level reasoning and low-level physical execution in open-world environments. Although Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide strong perception and intuitive responses, their open-loop nature limits long-horizon performance. Agents incorporating System 2 cognitive mechanisms improve planning, but usually operate in closed sandboxes with predefined toolkits and limited real-system control. OpenClaw provides a localized runtime with full system privileges, but lacks the embodied control architecture required for long-duration, multi-robot execution. We therefore propose ABot-Claw, an embodied extension of OpenClaw that integrates: 1) a unified embodiment interface with capability-driven scheduling for heterogeneous robot coordination; 2) a visual-centric cross-embodiment multimodal memory for persistent context retention and grounded retrieval; and 3) a critic-based closed-loop feedback mechanism with a generalist reward model for online progress evaluation, local correction, and replanning. With a decoupled architecture spanning the OpenClaw layer, shared service layer, and robot embodiment layer, ABot-Claw enables real-world interaction, closes the loop from natural language intent to physical action, and supports progressively self-evolving robotic agents in open, dynamic environments.

AI.tldr: ABot-Claw扩展OpenClaw，为异构机器人协调提供统一具身接口、视觉中心跨具身多模态记忆和基于批评者的闭环反馈机制，实现开放动态环境中的长时程多机器人执行。
AI.motivation: 当前具身智能系统在开放世界环境中面临高层推理与低层物理执行之间的鸿沟。VLA模型提供感知和直觉响应但限于开环，System 2认知机制代理通常在封闭沙箱中运行，OpenClaw缺乏长时程多机器人执行的具身控制架构。
AI.method: 1) 异构机器人协调的统一具身接口与能力驱动调度；2) 视觉中心跨具身多模态记忆用于持久上下文保留和接地检索；3) 基于批评者的闭环反馈机制，使用通用奖励模型进行在线进度评估、局部校正和重新规划。采用解耦架构，包含OpenClaw层、共享服务层和机器人具身层。
AI.result: ABot-Claw实现真实世界交互，从自然语言意图到物理动作的闭环，支持开放动态环境中逐步自我演进的机器人代理。
AI.conclusion: ABot-Claw通过整合统一具身接口、多模态记忆和闭环反馈机制，解决了当前具身智能系统在开放环境中的执行鸿沟问题，为长时程多机器人执行提供了有效解决方案。

title: A Progressive Training Strategy for Vision-Language Models to Counteract Spatio-Temporal Hallucinations in Embodied Reasoning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have made significant strides in static image understanding but continue to face critical hurdles in spatiotemporal reasoning. A major bottleneck is "multi-image reasoning hallucination", where a massive performance drop between forward and reverse temporal queries reveals a dependence on superficial shortcuts instead of genuine causal understanding. To mitigate this, we first develop a new Chain-of-Thought (CoT) dataset that decomposes intricate reasoning into detailed spatiotemporal steps and definitive judgments. Building on this, we present a progressive training framework: it initiates with supervised pre-training on our CoT dataset to instill logical structures, followed by fine-tuning with scalable weakly-labeled data for broader generalization. Our experiments demonstrate that this approach not only improves backbone accuracy but also slashes the forward-backward performance gap from over 70\% to only 6.53\%. This confirms the method's ability to develop authentic dynamic reasoning and reduce the inherent temporal biases of current VLMs.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种解决视觉语言模型时空推理中"多图像推理幻觉"问题的方法，通过创建链式思维数据集和渐进式训练框架，显著减少了前向-后向性能差距。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在静态图像理解方面取得显著进展，但在时空推理方面仍面临关键障碍。主要问题是"多图像推理幻觉"，即前向和后向时间查询之间存在巨大性能差距，表明模型依赖表面捷径而非真正的因果理解。
AI.method: 1) 创建新的链式思维数据集，将复杂推理分解为详细的时空步骤和确定性判断；2) 提出渐进式训练框架：首先在CoT数据集上进行监督预训练以建立逻辑结构，然后使用可扩展的弱标记数据进行微调以获得更广泛的泛化能力。
AI.result: 该方法不仅提高了骨干模型的准确性，还将前向-后向性能差距从超过70%大幅降低到仅6.53%，证实了该方法能够发展真实的动态推理能力并减少当前VLM的固有时间偏差。
AI.conclusion: 通过链式思维分解和渐进式训练，可以有效缓解视觉语言模型中的时空推理幻觉问题，促进更真实的因果理解能力发展。

title: Evaluating Memory Capability in Continuous Lifelog Scenario
summary: Nowadays, wearable devices can continuously lifelog ambient conversations, creating substantial opportunities for memory systems. However, existing benchmarks primarily focus on online one-on-one chatting or human-AI interactions, thus neglecting the unique demands of real-world scenarios. Given the scarcity of public lifelogging audio datasets, we propose a hierarchical synthesis framework to curate \textbf{\textsc{LifeDialBench}}, a novel benchmark comprising two complementary subsets: \textbf{EgoMem}, built on real-world egocentric videos, and \textbf{LifeMem}, constructed using simulated virtual community. Crucially, to address the issue of temporal leakage in traditional offline settings, we propose an \textbf{Online Evaluation} protocol that strictly adheres to temporal causality, ensuring systems are evaluated in a realistic streaming fashion. Our experimental results reveal a counterintuitive finding: current sophisticated memory systems fail to outperform a simple RAG-based baseline. This highlights the detrimental impact of over-designed structures and lossy compression in current approaches, emphasizing the necessity of high-fidelity context preservation for lifelog scenarios. We release our code and data at https://github.com/qys77714/LifeDialBench.

AI.tldr: 提出了LifeDialBench基准测试，包含真实世界第一人称视频(EgoMem)和模拟虚拟社区(LifeMem)两个子集，采用在线评估协议防止时间泄漏，发现当前复杂记忆系统在真实对话记忆任务中表现不如简单的RAG基线。
AI.motivation: 可穿戴设备能够持续记录环境对话，为记忆系统创造了重要机会。但现有基准主要关注在线一对一聊天或人机交互，忽视了真实世界场景的独特需求。由于公开的生活日志音频数据集稀缺，需要创建更符合真实场景的对话记忆基准。
AI.method: 提出分层合成框架构建LifeDialBench基准，包含两个互补子集：基于真实世界第一人称视频的EgoMem和基于模拟虚拟社区的LifeMem。为解决传统离线设置中的时间泄漏问题，提出了在线评估协议，严格遵循时间因果关系，确保系统在真实流式环境中评估。
AI.result: 实验结果显示了一个反直觉的发现：当前复杂的记忆系统无法超越简单的RAG基线。这表明当前方法中过度设计的结构和有损压缩对性能有负面影响，强调了在生活日志场景中保持高保真上下文的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 生活日志对话记忆需要新的评估基准和方法。当前复杂记忆系统在真实场景中表现不佳，简单的RAG方法反而更有效，表明需要重新思考记忆系统的设计，重视上下文的高保真保存而非过度工程化。

title: Task2vec Readiness: Diagnostics for Federated Learning from Pre-Training Embeddings
summary: Federated learning (FL) performance is highly sensitive to heterogeneity across clients, yet practitioners lack reliable methods to anticipate how a federation will behave before training. We propose readiness indices, derived from Task2Vec embeddings, that quantifies the alignment of a federation prior to training and correlates with its eventual performance. Our approach computes unsupervised metrics -- such as cohesion, dispersion, and density -- directly from client embeddings. We evaluate these indices across diverse datasets (CIFAR-10, FEMNIST, PathMNIST, BloodMNIST) and client counts (10--20), under Dirichlet heterogeneity levels spanning $α\in \{0.05,\dots,5.0\}$ and FedAVG aggregation strategy. Correlation analyses show consistent and significant Pearson and Spearman coefficients between some of the Task2Vec-based readiness and final performance, with values often exceeding 0.9 across dataset$\times$client configurations, validating this approach as a robust proxy for FL outcomes. These findings establish Task2Vec-based readiness as a principled, pre-training diagnostic for FL that may offer both predictive insight and actionable guidance for client selection in heterogeneous federations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出基于Task2Vec嵌入的联邦学习准备度指标，用于在训练前量化联邦系统的对齐程度并预测最终性能。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习性能对客户端异构性高度敏感，但实践中缺乏在训练前预测联邦系统行为的可靠方法。需要一种能够量化联邦对齐程度并预测最终性能的诊断工具。
AI.method: 使用Task2Vec嵌入计算无监督指标（如内聚力、分散度、密度），这些指标直接从客户端嵌入中计算。在多个数据集（CIFAR-10、FEMNIST、PathMNIST、BloodMNIST）和客户端数量（10-20）下评估，采用Dirichlet异构性水平（α∈{0.05,...,5.0}）和FedAVG聚合策略。
AI.result: 相关性分析显示Task2Vec准备度指标与最终性能之间存在一致且显著的Pearson和Spearman相关系数，在多个数据集×客户端配置中经常超过0.9，验证了该方法作为FL结果的稳健代理。
AI.conclusion: Task2Vec准备度指标为联邦学习提供了原则性的训练前诊断工具，可为异构联邦中的客户端选择提供预测洞察和可操作指导。

title: Degradation-Consistent Paired Training for Robust AI-Generated Image Detection
summary: AI-generated image detectors suffer significant performance degradation under real-world image corruptions such as JPEG compression, Gaussian blur, and resolution downsampling. We observe that state-of-the-art methods, including B-Free, treat degradation robustness as a byproduct of data augmentation rather than an explicit training objective.
