By using predictive entropy as a real-time proxy for difficulty, D2MoE employs a difficulty-driven top-p routing mechanism to adaptively concentrate expert resources on hard nodes while reducing overhead for easy ones, achieving continuous and fine-grained expert budget scaling for node classification. Experiments on 13 benchmarks demonstrate that D2MoE achieves consistent state-of-the-art performance, surpassing leading baselines by up to 7.92% in accuracy on heterophilous graphs. Notably, on large-scale graphs, it reduces memory consumption by up to 73.07% and training time by 46.53% compared to the best-performing Graph MoE, thereby validating its superior efficiency.

AI.tldr: D2MoE：一种用于图神经网络的新型混合专家框架，通过基于预测熵的难度驱动路由机制，为不同难度的节点自适应分配专家资源，在保持高性能的同时显著提升效率。
AI.motivation: 传统MoE架构在图神经网络中使用静态、僵化的路由策略，对所有节点采用统一的专家预算或粗粒度的专家切换。这种设计忽略了节点间判别难度的差异，导致困难节点欠拟合、简单节点计算冗余的问题。
AI.method: 提出D2MoE框架，将重点从静态专家选择转向节点级专家资源分配。使用预测熵作为节点难度的实时代理，采用难度驱动的top-p路由机制，自适应地将专家资源集中在困难节点上，同时减少简单节点的开销。
AI.result: 在13个基准测试中，D2MoE实现了最先进的性能，在异配图上准确率比领先基线提升高达7.92%。在大规模图上，相比最佳性能的Graph MoE，内存消耗减少73.07%，训练时间减少46.53%。
AI.conclusion: D2MoE通过难度驱动的自适应专家资源分配，解决了传统MoE架构在图神经网络中的局限性，在保持高性能的同时显著提升了计算效率，为可扩展的图神经网络提供了新思路。

title: Point2Pose: Occlusion-Recovering 6D Pose Tracking and 3D Reconstruction for Multiple Unknown Objects Via 2D Point Trackers
summary: We present Point2Pose, a model-free method for causal 6D pose tracking of multiple rigid objects from monocular RGB-D video. Initialized only from sparse image points on the objects to be tracked, our approach tracks multiple unseen objects without requiring object CAD models or category priors. Point2Pose leverages a 2D point tracker to obtain long-range correspondences, enabling instant recovery after complete occlusion. Simultaneously, the system incrementally reconstructs an online Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF) representation of the tracked targets. Alongside the method, we introduce a new multi-object tracking dataset comprising both simulation and real-world sequences, with motion-capture ground truth for evaluation. Experiments show that Point2Pose achieves performance comparable to the state-of-the-art methods on a severe-occlusion benchmark, while additionally supporting multi-object tracking and recovery from complete occlusion, capabilities that are not supported by previous model-free tracking approaches.

AI.tldr: Point2Pose是一种无需模型的因果6D姿态跟踪方法，通过单目RGB-D视频跟踪多个刚性物体，仅需稀疏图像点初始化，无需CAD模型或类别先验，支持多目标跟踪和完全遮挡恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有模型无关的6D姿态跟踪方法通常需要物体CAD模型或类别先验，且难以处理多目标跟踪和完全遮挡恢复问题。Point2Pose旨在开发一种无需模型、仅需稀疏图像点初始化的多目标跟踪方法，具备遮挡恢复能力。
AI.method: 结合2D点跟踪器获取长程对应关系，实现完全遮挡后的即时恢复；同时增量重建在线TSDF表示。引入新的多目标跟踪数据集，包含仿真和真实世界序列，带有运动捕捉真值用于评估。
AI.result: 在严重遮挡基准测试中达到与最先进方法相当的性能，同时支持多目标跟踪和完全遮挡恢复，这是先前模型无关跟踪方法不具备的能力。
AI.conclusion: Point2Pose提供了一种有效的模型无关多目标6D姿态跟踪解决方案，仅需稀疏图像点初始化，无需CAD模型或类别先验，具备遮挡恢复能力。

title: Introspective Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion language models promise parallel generation, yet still lag behind autoregressive (AR) models in quality. We stem this gap to a failure of introspective consistency: AR models agree with their own generations, while DLMs often do not. We define the introspective acceptance rate, which measures whether a model accepts its previously generated tokens. This reveals why AR training has a structural advantage: causal masking and logit shifting implicitly enforce introspective consistency. Motivated by this observation, we introduce Introspective Diffusion Language Model (I-DLM), a paradigm that retains diffusion-style parallel decoding while inheriting the introspective consistency of AR training. I-DLM uses a novel introspective strided decoding (ISD) algorithm, which enables the model to verify previously generated tokens while advancing new ones in the same forward pass. From a systems standpoint, we build I-DLM inference engine on AR-inherited optimizations and further customize it with a stationary-batch scheduler. To the best of our knowledge, I-DLM is the first DLM to match the quality of its same-scale AR counterpart while outperforming prior DLMs in both model quality and practical serving efficiency across 15 benchmarks. It reaches 69.6 on AIME-24 and 45.7 on LiveCodeBench-v6, exceeding LLaDA-2.1-mini (16B) by more than 26 and 15 points, respectively. Beyond quality, I-DLM is designed for the growing demand of large-concurrency serving, delivering about 3x higher throughput than prior state-of-the-art DLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出了Introspective Diffusion Language Model (I-DLM)，一种结合扩散模型并行生成和自回归模型内省一致性的新范式，首次在质量上匹配同规模自回归模型，并在15个基准测试中超越先前扩散语言模型。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型虽然具有并行生成的优势，但在质量上仍落后于自回归模型。研究发现这种差距源于内省一致性失败：自回归模型与自身生成保持一致，而扩散模型则不然。自回归训练通过因果掩码和logit偏移隐式强制内省一致性，这为其提供了结构优势。
AI.method: 提出I-DLM范式，保留扩散式并行解码同时继承自回归训练的内省一致性。核心是内省跨步解码算法，允许模型在同一个前向传播中验证先前生成的token并推进新token。系统层面基于自回归继承的优化构建推理引擎，并定制了stationary-batch调度器。
AI.result: I-DLM是首个在质量上匹配同规模自回归模型的扩散语言模型，在15个基准测试中超越先前DLMs。在AIME-24上达到69.6分，LiveCodeBench-v6上达到45.7分，分别超过LLaDA-2.1-mini (16B) 26分和15分。吞吐量比先前SOTA DLMs高约3倍。
AI.conclusion: I-DLM成功弥合了扩散语言模型与自回归模型之间的质量差距，通过内省一致性机制实现了并行生成的优势与自回归质量的结合，特别适合大规模并发服务场景。

title: Agentic Aggregation for Parallel Scaling of Long-Horizon Agentic Tasks
summary: We study parallel test-time scaling for long-horizon agentic tasks such as agentic search and deep research, where multiple rollouts are generated in parallel and aggregated into a final response. While such scaling has proven effective for chain-of-thought reasoning, agentic tasks pose unique challenges: trajectories are long, multi-turn, and tool-augmented, and outputs are often open-ended. Aggregating only final answers discards rich information from trajectories, while concatenating all trajectories exceeds the model's context window. To address this, we propose AggAgent, an aggregation agent that treats parallel trajectories as an environment. We equip it with lightweight tools to inspect candidate solutions and search across trajectories, enabling it to navigate and synthesize information on demand. Across six benchmarks and three model families (GLM-4.7, Qwen3.5, MiniMax-M2.5), AggAgent outperforms all existing aggregation methods-by up to 5.3% absolute on average and 10.3% on two deep research tasks-while adding minimal overhead, as the aggregation cost remains bounded by a single agentic rollout. Our findings establish agentic aggregation as an effective and cost-efficient approach to parallel test-time scaling.

AI.tldr: 提出AggAgent方法，通过将并行轨迹视为环境，使用轻量级工具检查和搜索候选方案，有效聚合长时程智能体任务的并行测试时扩展结果。
AI.motivation: 针对长时程智能体任务（如智能体搜索和深度研究）的并行测试时扩展问题。传统方法要么只聚合最终答案丢弃轨迹丰富信息，要么拼接所有轨迹超出模型上下文窗口。需要一种能有效利用并行轨迹信息的方法。
AI.method: 提出AggAgent聚合智能体，将并行轨迹视为环境，配备轻量级工具来检查候选解决方案和在轨迹间搜索，使其能够按需导航和合成信息。
AI.result: 在6个基准测试和3个模型家族（GLM-4.7、Qwen3.5、MiniMax-M2.5）上，AggAgent优于所有现有聚合方法，平均绝对提升达5.3%，在两个深度研究任务上提升10.3%，同时增加的开销最小，聚合成本仅相当于单个智能体滚动的开销。
AI.conclusion: 智能体聚合是并行测试时扩展的有效且成本高效的方法，为长时程智能体任务提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Structural Consequences of Policy-Based Interventions on the Global Supply Chain Network
summary: As global political tensions rise and the anticipation of additional tariffs from the United States on international trade increases, the issues of economic independence and supply chain resilience become more prominent. The importance of supply chain resilience has been further underscored by disruptions caused by the COVID-19 pandemic and the ongoing war in Ukraine.In light of these challenges, ranging from geopolitical instability to product supply uncertainties, governments are increasingly focused on adopting new trade policies. This study explores the impact of several of these policies on the global electric vehicle (EV) supply chain network, with a particular focus on their effects on country clusters and the broader structure of international trade. Specifically, we analyse three key policies: Country Plus One, Friendshoring, and Reshoring. Our findings show that Friendshoring, contrary to expectations, leads to greater globalisation by increasing the number of supply links across friendly countries, potentially raising transaction costs. The Country Plus One policy similarly enhances network density through redundant links, while the Reshoring policy creates challenges in the EV sector due to the high number of irreplaceable products. Additionally, the effects of these policies vary across industries; for instance, mining goods being less affected in Country Plus One than the Friendshoring policy.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了三种贸易政策（友岸外包、友岸+1、回岸）对全球电动汽车供应链网络的影响，发现友岸外包反而增加了全球化程度，而回岸政策在电动汽车领域面临挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着全球政治紧张局势加剧和贸易关税预期增加，经济独立性和供应链韧性变得日益重要。COVID-19大流行和乌克兰战争等事件进一步凸显了供应链韧性的重要性。面对地缘政治不稳定和产品供应不确定性等挑战，各国政府越来越关注采用新的贸易政策。
AI.method: 研究分析了三种关键贸易政策对全球电动汽车供应链网络的影响：Country Plus One（友岸+1）、Friendshoring（友岸外包）和Reshoring（回岸）。研究特别关注这些政策对国家集群和国际贸易结构的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）友岸外包政策与预期相反，反而增加了全球化程度，通过增加友好国家间的供应链链接提高了交易成本；2）友岸+1政策通过冗余链接增强了网络密度；3）回岸政策在电动汽车领域面临挑战，因为存在大量不可替代产品；4）不同行业受影响程度不同，例如在友岸+1政策下，矿产品受影响小于友岸外包政策。
AI.conclusion: 贸易政策对全球供应链的影响复杂且具有行业特异性。友岸外包可能产生与预期相反的全球化效果，而回岸政策在特定行业（如电动汽车）面临实施困难。政策制定需要考虑行业特性和供应链结构。

title: DiningBench: A Hierarchical Multi-view Benchmark for Perception and Reasoning in the Dietary Domain
summary: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have revolutionized general visual understanding. However, their application in the food domain remains constrained by benchmarks that rely on coarse-grained categories, single-view imagery, and inaccurate metadata. To bridge this gap, we introduce DiningBench, a hierarchical, multi-view benchmark designed to evaluate VLMs across three levels of cognitive complexity: Fine-Grained Classification, Nutrition Estimation, and Visual Question Answering. Unlike previous datasets, DiningBench comprises 3,021 distinct dishes with an average of 5.27 images per entry, incorporating fine-grained "hard" negatives from identical menus and rigorous, verification-based nutritional data. We conduct an extensive evaluation of 29 state-of-the-art open-source and proprietary models. Our experiments reveal that while current VLMs excel at general reasoning, they struggle significantly with fine-grained visual discrimination and precise nutritional reasoning. Furthermore, we systematically investigate the impact of multi-view inputs and Chain-of-Thought reasoning, identifying five primary failure modes. DiningBench serves as a challenging testbed to drive the next generation of food-centric VLM research. All codes are released in https://github.com/meituan/DiningBench.

AI.tldr: DiningBench是一个用于评估视觉语言模型在食品领域性能的分层多视图基准，包含细粒度分类、营养估计和视觉问答三个认知复杂度级别，揭示了当前模型在细粒度视觉辨别和精确营养推理方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在食品领域的应用受到限制，因为现有基准依赖于粗粒度类别、单视图图像和不准确的元数据。需要创建一个更全面、更具挑战性的基准来推动食品中心视觉语言模型的发展。
AI.method: 提出了DiningBench基准，包含3,021个不同菜肴，每个条目平均5.27张图像，采用分层多视图设计，包含三个认知复杂度级别：细粒度分类、营养估计和视觉问答。数据集包含来自相同菜单的细粒度"困难"负样本和基于验证的营养数据。
AI.result: 对29个最先进的开源和专有模型进行了评估，发现当前视觉语言模型在通用推理方面表现出色，但在细粒度视觉辨别和精确营养推理方面存在显著困难。系统研究了多视图输入和思维链推理的影响，识别了五种主要失败模式。
AI.conclusion: DiningBench作为一个具有挑战性的测试平台，将推动下一代食品中心视觉语言模型的研究。当前模型在食品领域的细粒度理解和精确推理能力仍需大幅提升。

title: Intelligent Approval of Access Control Flow in Office Automation Systems via Relational Modeling
summary: Office automation (OA) systems play a crucial role in enterprise operations and management, with access control flow approval (ACFA) being a key component that manages the accessibility of various resources. However, traditional ACFA requires approval from the person in charge at each step, which consumes a significant amount of manpower and time. Its intelligence is a crucial issue that needs to be addressed urgently by all companies. In this paper, we propose a novel relational modeling-driven intelligent approval (RMIA) framework to automate ACFA. Specifically, our RMIA consists of two core modules: (1) The binary relation modeling module aims to characterize the coupling relation between applicants and approvers and provide reliable basic information for ACFA decision-making from a coarse-grained perspective. (2) The ternary relation modeling module utilizes specific resource information as its core, characterizing the complex relations between applicants, resources, and approvers, and thus provides fine-grained gain information for informed decision-making. Then, our RMIA effectively fuses these two kinds of information to form the final decision. Finally, extensive experiments are conducted on two product datasets and an online A/B test to verify the effectiveness of RMIA.

AI.tldr: 提出RMIA框架，通过二元和三元关系建模自动化办公系统的访问控制流程审批，减少人工审批时间和人力消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统办公自动化系统中的访问控制流程审批需要逐级人工审批，消耗大量人力和时间，智能化是亟待解决的关键问题。
AI.method: 提出关系建模驱动的智能审批框架RMIA，包含两个核心模块：1) 二元关系建模模块，从粗粒度角度建模申请人与审批人之间的耦合关系；2) 三元关系建模模块，以具体资源信息为核心，建模申请人、资源和审批人之间的复杂关系，提供细粒度信息。最后融合两种信息形成最终决策。
AI.result: 在两个产品数据集和在线A/B测试上进行了广泛实验，验证了RMIA的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RMIA框架能够有效自动化访问控制流程审批，减少人工干预，提高办公自动化系统的智能化水平。

title: General365: Benchmarking General Reasoning in Large Language Models Across Diverse and Challenging Tasks
summary: Contemporary large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning capabilities, particularly in specialized domains like mathematics and physics. However, their ability to generalize these reasoning skills to more general and broader contexts--often termed general reasoning--remains under-explored. Unlike domain-specific reasoning, general reasoning relies less on expert knowledge but still presents formidable reasoning challenges, such as complex constraints, nested logical branches, and semantic interference. To address this gap, we introduce General365, a benchmark specifically designed to assess general reasoning in LLMs. By restricting background knowledge to a K-12 level, General365 explicitly decouples reasoning from specialized expertise. The benchmark comprises 365 seed problems and 1,095 variant problems across eight categories, ensuring both high difficulty and diversity. Evaluations across 26 leading LLMs reveal that even the top-performing model achieves only 62.8% accuracy, in stark contrast to the near-perfect performances of LLMs in math and physics benchmarks. These results suggest that the reasoning abilities of current LLMs are heavily domain-dependent, leaving significant room for improvement in broader applications. We envision General365 as a catalyst for advancing LLM reasoning beyond domain-specific tasks toward robust, general-purpose real-world scenarios. Code, Dataset, and Leaderboard: https://general365.github.io

AI.tldr: General365是一个专门评估LLM通用推理能力的基准测试，包含365个种子问题和1095个变体问题，涵盖8个类别，限制背景知识在K-12水平，旨在解耦推理与专业知识的关系。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在数学、物理等专业领域表现出色，但其通用推理能力（即在不依赖专业知识的情况下处理复杂约束、嵌套逻辑分支和语义干扰的能力）尚未得到充分探索。需要专门的基准来评估LLM在更广泛、通用场景下的推理能力。
AI.method: 构建General365基准测试：1）限制背景知识到K-12水平，明确解耦推理与专业知识；2）包含365个种子问题和1095个变体问题，覆盖8个类别；3）确保问题的高难度和多样性；4）在26个领先的LLM上进行评估。
AI.result: 评估结果显示，即使表现最好的模型在General365上也只有62.8%的准确率，与LLM在数学和物理基准测试中接近完美的表现形成鲜明对比。这表明当前LLM的推理能力严重依赖特定领域知识。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM的推理能力具有明显的领域依赖性，在通用推理方面仍有很大改进空间。General365可作为推动LLM超越领域特定任务、向鲁棒的通用现实场景发展的催化剂。

title: CAGenMol: Condition-Aware Diffusion Language Model for Goal-Directed Molecular Generation
summary: Goal-directed molecular generation requires satisfying heterogeneous constraints such as protein--ligand compatibility and multi-objective drug-like properties, yet existing methods often optimize these constraints in isolation, failing to reconcile conflicting objectives (e.g., affinity vs. safety), and struggle to navigate the non-differentiable chemical space without compromising structural validity. To address these challenges, we propose CAGenMol, a condition-aware discrete diffusion framework over molecular sequences that formulates molecular design as conditional denoising guided by heterogeneous structural and property signals. By coupling discrete diffusion with reinforcement learning, the model aligns the generation trajectory with non-differentiable objectives while preserving chemical validity and diversity. The non-autoregressive nature of diffusion language model further enables iterative refinement of molecular fragments at inference time. Experiments on structure-conditioned, property-conditioned, and dual-conditioned benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over state-of-the-art methods in binding affinity, drug-likeness, and success rate, highlighting the effectiveness of our framework.

AI.tldr: CAGenMol是一个条件感知的离散扩散框架，用于分子生成，通过结合离散扩散和强化学习来满足异质约束（如蛋白质-配体兼容性和多目标药物性质），同时保持化学有效性和多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有分子生成方法通常孤立地优化各种约束（如蛋白质-配体兼容性、多目标药物性质），难以协调冲突目标（如亲和力与安全性），并且在非可微化学空间中导航时容易损害结构有效性。
AI.method: 提出CAGenMol框架：1）基于分子序列的条件感知离散扩散模型，将分子设计表述为异质结构和性质信号引导的条件去噪；2）结合离散扩散与强化学习，使生成轨迹与非可微目标对齐；3）利用扩散语言模型的非自回归特性，在推理时实现分子片段的迭代精炼。
AI.result: 在结构条件、性质条件和双条件基准测试中，在结合亲和力、药物相似性和成功率方面均优于现有最先进方法，证明了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CAGenMol通过条件感知离散扩散与强化学习的结合，成功解决了分子生成中异质约束协调和化学空间导航的挑战，为多目标分子设计提供了有效框架。

title: SignReasoner: Compositional Reasoning for Complex Traffic Sign Understanding via Functional Structure Units
summary: Accurate semantic understanding of complex traffic signs-including those with intricate layouts, multi-lingual text, and composite symbols-is critical for autonomous driving safety. Current models, both specialized small ones and large Vision Language Models (VLMs), suffer from a significant bottleneck: a lack of compositional generalization, leading to failure when encountering novel sign configurations. To overcome this, we propose SignReasoner, a novel paradigm that transforms general VLMs into expert traffic sign reasoners. Our core innovation is Functional Structure Unit (FSU), which shifts from common instance-based modeling to flexible function-based decomposition. By breaking down complex signs into minimal, core functional blocks (e.g., Direction, Notice, Lane), our model learns the underlying structural grammar, enabling robust generalization to unseen compositions. We define this decomposition as the FSU-Reasoning task and introduce a two-stage VLM post-training pipeline to maximize performance: Iterative Caption-FSU Distillation that enhances the model's accuracy in both FSU-reasoning and caption generation; FSU-GRPO that uses Tree Edit Distance (TED) to compute FSU differences as the rewards in GRPO algorithm, boosting reasoning abilities. Experiments on the newly proposed FSU-Reasoning benchmark, TrafficSignEval, show that SignReasoner achieves new SOTA with remarkable data efficiency and no architectural modification, significantly improving the traffic sign understanding in various VLMs.

AI.tldr: SignReasoner：通过功能结构单元（FSU）将通用视觉语言模型转化为专业交通标志推理器，解决复杂交通标志的语义理解问题，提升组合泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶中的交通标志理解面临重大瓶颈：现有模型（包括专用小模型和大视觉语言模型）缺乏组合泛化能力，在遇到新颖的标志配置时容易失败。复杂交通标志具有复杂布局、多语言文本和复合符号等特点，准确理解对自动驾驶安全至关重要。
AI.method: 提出SignReasoner范式，核心创新是功能结构单元（FSU），从基于实例的建模转向基于功能的分解。将复杂标志分解为最小核心功能块（如方向、通知、车道等），学习底层结构语法。采用两阶段VLM后训练流程：1）迭代字幕-FSU蒸馏，提升FSU推理和字幕生成准确性；2）FSU-GRPO，使用树编辑距离计算FSU差异作为GRPO算法的奖励，增强推理能力。
AI.result: 在新提出的FSU-Reasoning基准TrafficSignEval上，SignReasoner实现了新的SOTA，具有显著的数据效率且无需架构修改，显著提升了各种VLM的交通标志理解能力。
AI.conclusion: SignReasoner通过功能结构单元分解和两阶段训练，有效解决了复杂交通标志的组合泛化问题，为自动驾驶安全提供了更可靠的交通标志理解方案。

title: From Topology to Trajectory: LLM-Driven World Models For Supply Chain Resilience
summary: Semiconductor supply chains face unprecedented resilience challenges amidst global geopolitical turbulence. Conventional Large Language Model (LLM) planners, when confronting such non-stationary "Policy Black Swan" events, frequently suffer from Decision Paralysis or a severe Grounding Gap due to the absence of physical environmental modeling. This paper introduces ReflectiChain, a cognitive agentic framework tailored for resilient macroeconomic supply chain planning. The core innovation lies in the integration of Latent Trajectory Rehearsal powered by a generative world model, which couples reflection-in-action (System 2 deliberation) with delayed reflection-on-action. Furthermore, we leverage a Retrospective Agentic RL mechanism to enable autonomous policy evolution during the deployment phase (test-time). Evaluations conducted on our high-fidelity benchmark, Semi-Sim, demonstrate that under extreme scenarios such as export bans and material shortages, ReflectiChain achieves a 250% improvement in average step rewards over the strongest LLM baselines. It successfully restores the Operability Ratio (OR) from a deficient 13.3% to over 88.5% while ensuring robust gradient convergence. Ablation studies further underscore that the synergy between physical grounding constraints and double-loop learning is fundamental to bridging the gap between semantic reasoning and physical reality for long-horizon strategic planning.

AI.tldr: ReflectiChain：用于弹性宏观经济供应链规划的认知代理框架，通过潜在轨迹排练和回顾性代理RL解决LLM在非平稳政策黑天鹅事件中的决策瘫痪问题
AI.motivation: 半导体供应链面临全球地缘政治动荡下的弹性挑战。传统LLM规划器在面对非平稳的"政策黑天鹅"事件时，由于缺乏物理环境建模，经常遭受决策瘫痪或严重的接地差距
AI.method:
1. 集成潜在轨迹排练（由生成世界模型驱动），将行动中反思（系统2深思熟虑）与延迟的行动后反思相结合
2. 利用回顾性代理RL机制，在部署阶段（测试时）实现自主策略演化
3. 物理接地约束与双环学习的协同
AI.result: 在高保真基准测试Semi-Sim上，在出口禁令和材料短缺等极端场景下，ReflectiChain相比最强LLM基线实现了250%的平均步奖励提升。成功将可操作比率从不足的13.3%恢复到超过88.5%，同时确保稳健的梯度收敛
AI.conclusion: 物理接地约束与双环学习的协同对于弥合语义推理与物理现实之间的差距，实现长期战略规划至关重要。该方法为LLM在非平稳环境中的决策提供了新范式

title: C-ReD: A Comprehensive Chinese Benchmark for AI-Generated Text Detection Derived from Real-World Prompts
summary: Recently, large language models (LLMs) are capable of generating highly fluent textual content. While they offer significant convenience to humans, they also introduce various risks, like phishing and academic dishonesty. Numerous research efforts have been dedicated to developing algorithms for detecting AI-generated text and constructing relevant datasets. However, in the domain of Chinese corpora, challenges remain, including limited model diversity and data homogeneity. To address these issues, we propose C-ReD: a comprehensive Chinese Real-prompt AI-generated Detection benchmark. Experiments demonstrate that C-ReD not only enables reliable in-domain detection but also supports strong generalization to unseen LLMs and external Chinese datasets-addressing critical gaps in model diversity, domain coverage, and prompt realism that have limited prior Chinese detection benchmarks. We release our resources at https://github.com/HeraldofLight/C-ReD.

AI.tldr: 提出了C-ReD基准，一个全面的中文真实提示AI生成文本检测基准，解决了现有中文检测基准在模型多样性、领域覆盖和提示真实性方面的不足
AI.motivation: 虽然大语言模型能生成流畅文本，但也带来钓鱼、学术不端等风险。现有AI生成文本检测算法和数据集在中文领域面临模型多样性有限、数据同质化等问题
AI.method: 构建C-ReD基准，包含多样化的中文LLM生成文本和真实提示，通过实验评估其在领域内检测和泛化到未见LLM及外部中文数据集的能力
AI.result: C-ReD不仅支持可靠的领域内检测，还能很好地泛化到未见LLM和外部中文数据集，解决了模型多样性、领域覆盖和提示真实性等关键问题
AI.conclusion: C-ReD填补了中文AI生成文本检测基准的空白，为中文LLM生成文本检测提供了更全面、真实的评估框架

title: Quantization Dominates Rank Reduction for KV-Cache Compression
summary:
We compare two strategies for compressing the KV cache in transformer inference: rank reduction (discard dimensions) and quantization (keep all dimensions, reduce precision). At matched storage budgets across five models (124M-14B, MHA and GQA), we find that quantization consistently outperforms rank reduction by 4-364 PPL depending on model and compression level. The gap persists even when rank reduction is combined with quantization in hybrid baselines, and it grows with GQA aggressiveness. On LAMBADA, INT4 matches FP16 accuracy (+0.23 PPL on Mistral 7B, +0.58 on GPT-2) while rank-32 at identical storage collapses to 0.4%.
  We trace this gap to a structural asymmetry: under softmax attention routing, removing a dimension can flip which token is attended (a discrete failure), while quantization noise is bounded and typically preserves score ordering. We formalize this via a perturbation result showing projection damage exceeds quantization damage by 3 x 2^(2b) per direction under the softmax Fisher metric. A basis ablation confirms the finding is basis-independent (spread <0.4 PPL), establishing that the advantage comes from preserving dimensions, not from a better coordinate system. Joint K+V INT4 quantization achieves 75% total KV reduction at only +0.18 PPL on Mistral 7B.

AI.tldr: KV缓存压缩对比：量化（降低精度）优于降维（丢弃维度），在相同存储预算下，量化保持更好性能，尤其在GQA模型中差距更大
AI.motivation: 研究Transformer推理中KV缓存压缩的两种策略：降维（丢弃维度）和量化（降低精度），旨在在有限存储预算下找到更有效的压缩方法
AI.method: 对比实验：在5个模型（124M-14B，包括MHA和GQA）上，在相同存储预算下比较量化（INT4）和降维（rank-32等）的性能；理论分析：通过扰动分析和Fisher度量解释性能差距；基础消融实验验证结果与坐标系无关
AI.result: 量化始终优于降维，差距达4-364 PPL；在LAMBADA上，INT4量化接近FP16精度，而相同存储的rank-32降维性能崩溃至0.4%；联合K+V INT4量化实现75% KV减少，仅增加0.18 PPL
AI.conclusion: 量化优于降维的关键在于保持维度：降维可能改变注意力路由（离散失败），而量化噪声有界且通常保持分数排序；量化是更有效的KV缓存压缩策略

title: Enhancing Fine-Grained Spatial Grounding in 3D CT Report Generation via Discriminative Guidance
summary: Vision--language models (VLMs) for radiology report generation (RRG) can produce long-form chest CT reports from volumetric scans and show strong potential to improve radiology workflow efficiency and consistency. However, existing methods face two key limitations: (i) training supervision is often coarse, aligning a whole CT volume with a full free-text report without explicit alignment for fine-grained attributes or pathology locations; and (ii) evaluation is typically holistic (lexical overlap, entity matching, or LLM-as-a-judge scores) and not diagnostic for spatial grounding. We propose \emph{Discriminative Cue-Prompting with Prompt Dropout (DCP-PD)}, a plug-and-play framework that distills fine-grained cues from free-text reports and uses them to guide report generation while mitigating shortcut reliance via prompt dropout. DCP-PD achieves state-of-the-art performance on CT-RATE, improving macro F1 from $=0.501$ to $0.603$ (20% relative), and substantially boosts out-of-distribution performance on Rad-ChestCT from F1 $=0.266$ to $0.503$ (89% relative). Finally, we introduce a hierarchical, location-aware question-set protocol (presence $\rightarrow$ laterality $\rightarrow$ lobe) to directly assess pathology-location grounding, showing that fine-grained spatial localization remains challenging even for models that score highly on current benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出了DCP-PD框架，通过从自由文本报告中提取细粒度线索并利用提示丢弃来指导放射学报告生成，显著提升了CT报告生成性能，并引入了层次化位置感知评估协议。
AI.motivation: 现有放射学报告生成方法存在两个关键限制：1) 训练监督通常粗糙，将整个CT体积与完整自由文本报告对齐，缺乏细粒度属性或病理位置的显式对齐；2) 评估通常是整体性的（词汇重叠、实体匹配或LLM作为评判者评分），缺乏空间定位的诊断能力。
AI.method: 提出了判别性线索提示与提示丢弃（DCP-PD）框架，这是一个即插即用框架，从自由文本报告中提取细粒度线索，并用它们指导报告生成，同时通过提示丢弃减轻对捷径的依赖。
AI.result: 在CT-RATE数据集上实现了最先进性能，将宏观F1从0.501提升到0.603（相对提升20%），在Rad-ChestCT数据集上的分布外性能从F1=0.266大幅提升到0.503（相对提升89%）。
AI.conclusion: DCP-PD框架有效提升了放射学报告生成的性能，但细粒度空间定位仍然是挑战，即使是在当前基准测试中得分较高的模型也难以准确实现病理位置定位。

title: EmergentBridge: Improving Zero-Shot Cross-Modal Transfer in Unified Multimodal Embedding Models
summary: Unified multimodal embedding spaces underpin practical applications such as cross-modal retrieval and zero-shot recognition. In many real deployments, however, supervision is available only for a small subset of modality pairs (e.g., image--text), leaving \emph{unpaired} modality pairs (e.g., audio$\leftrightarrow$depth, infrared$\leftrightarrow$audio) weakly connected and thus performing poorly on zero-shot transfer. Addressing this sparse-pairing regime is therefore essential for scaling unified embedding systems to new tasks without curating exhaustive pairwise data. We propose \textbf{EmergentBridge}, an embedding-level bridging framework that improves performance on these unpaired pairs \emph{without requiring exhaustive pairwise supervision}. Our key observation is that naively aligning a new modality to a synthesized proxy embedding can introduce \emph{gradient interference}, degrading the anchor-alignment structure that existing retrieval/classification relies on. EmergentBridge addresses this by (i) learning a mapping that produces a \emph{noisy bridge anchor} (a proxy embedding of an already-aligned modality) from an anchor embedding, and (ii) enforcing proxy alignment only in the subspace orthogonal to the anchor-alignment direction, preserving anchor alignment while strengthening non-anchor connectivity. Across nine datasets spanning multiple modalities, EmergentBridge consistently outperforms prior binding baselines on zero-shot classification and retrieval, demonstrating strong emergent alignment.

AI.tldr: EmergentBridge提出了一种嵌入级桥接框架，用于解决多模态嵌入空间中稀疏配对监督的问题，通过正交子空间对齐来改善未配对模态对之间的零样本迁移性能。
AI.motivation: 现实部署中，多模态嵌入空间通常只有部分模态对（如图像-文本）有监督信号，而其他未配对模态对（如音频-深度、红外-音频）的连接较弱，导致零样本迁移性能差。需要解决稀疏配对监督问题，以扩展统一嵌入系统到新任务。
AI.method: EmergentBridge包含两个关键组件：(1) 学习从锚点嵌入生成噪声桥接锚点（已对齐模态的代理嵌入）的映射；(2) 在正交于锚点对齐方向的子空间中强制执行代理对齐，从而保持锚点对齐结构的同时增强非锚点连接性。
AI.result: 在涵盖多种模态的九个数据集上，EmergentBridge在零样本分类和检索任务上持续优于现有绑定基线，展示了强大的涌现对齐能力。
AI.conclusion: EmergentBridge提供了一种有效的嵌入级桥接方法，能够在不需要详尽配对监督的情况下改善稀疏配对多模态嵌入系统中的未配对模态对性能，为扩展统一嵌入系统提供了实用解决方案。

title: CLSGen: A Dual-Head Fine-Tuning Framework for Joint Probabilistic Classification and Verbalized Explanation
summary: With the recent progress of Large Language Models (LLMs), there is a growing interest in applying these models to solve complex and challenging problems. Modern LLMs, capable of processing long contexts and generating verbalized explanations, offer significant potential in addressing real-world applications. However, a critical hurdle in deploying LLMs for practical decision-making is their inability to provide reliable, quantitative probabilities. While task-specific fine-tuning of LLMs using traditional discriminative objectives (similar to encoder-only models) can yield probability estimates, this often leads to catastrophic forgetting and linguistic collapse. Consequently, the model loses its ability to generate explanations, severely undermining its interpretability and usability. To address this challenge, we propose CLSGen, a novel LLM fine-tuning framework designed for binary classification tasks. The CLSGen framework encompasses a new model architecture, training methodology, and data construction strategy to enable robust probability estimation without sacrificing the model's inherent explanation-generation capabilities. Experimental results across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that models fine-tuned with CLSGen outperform existing baselines in classification metrics (AUROC and F1-score). Regarding explanation, the results showed strong alignment between predicted labels and generated justifications, as well as high readability.

AI.tldr: CLSGen是一个针对二元分类任务的LLM微调框架，能够在保持模型解释生成能力的同时提供可靠的概率估计，解决了传统微调方法导致的灾难性遗忘和语言崩溃问题。
AI.motivation: 当前LLMs在解决复杂问题时无法提供可靠的概率估计，而传统的判别式微调方法虽然能获得概率估计，但会导致灾难性遗忘和语言崩溃，使模型失去解释生成能力，严重影响可解释性和实用性。
AI.method: CLSGen框架包含新的模型架构、训练方法和数据构建策略，专门为二元分类任务设计，旨在实现稳健的概率估计同时保持模型的解释生成能力。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，使用CLSGen微调的模型在分类指标（AUROC和F1分数）上优于现有基线。在解释方面，结果显示预测标签与生成的理由之间有很强的对齐性，并且可读性高。
AI.conclusion: CLSGen成功解决了LLMs在二元分类任务中概率估计与解释生成之间的权衡问题，为实际决策应用提供了既可靠又可解释的解决方案。

title: Not All Forgetting Is Equal: Architecture-Dependent Retention Dynamics in Fine-Tuned Image Classifiers
summary: Fine-tuning pretrained image classifiers is standard practice, yet which individual samples are forgotten during this process, and whether forgetting patterns are stable or architecture dependent, remains unclear. Understanding these dynamics has direct implications for curriculum design, data pruning, and ensemble construction. We track per-sample correctness at every epoch during fine-tuning of ResNet-18 and DeiT-Small on a retinal OCT dataset (7 classes, 56:1 imbalance) and CUB-200-2011 (200 bird species), fitting Ebbinghaus-style exponential decay curves to each sample's retention trace. Five findings emerge. First, the two architectures forget fundamentally different samples: Jaccard overlap of the top 10 percent most-forgotten is 0.34 on OCTDL and 0.15 on CUB-200. Second, ViT forgetting is more structured (mean $R^2 = 0.74$) than CNN forgetting ($R^2 = 0.52$). Third, per-sample forgetting is stochastic across random seeds (Spearman $ρ\approx 0.01$), challenging the assumption that sample difficulty is an intrinsic property. Fourth, class-level forgetting is consistent and semantically interpretable: visually similar species are forgotten most, distinctive ones least. Fifth, a sample's loss after head warmup predicts its long-term decay constant ($ρ= 0.30$ to $0.50$, $p < 10^{-45}$). These findings suggest that architectural diversity in ensembles provides complementary retention coverage, and that curriculum or pruning methods based on per-sample difficulty may not generalize across runs. A spaced repetition sampler built on these decay constants does not outperform random sampling, indicating that static scheduling cannot exploit unstable per-sample signals.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了图像分类器微调过程中的样本遗忘模式，发现CNN和ViT架构遗忘的样本差异显著，样本遗忘具有随机性而非内在属性，类级别遗忘具有语义一致性，且损失值可预测遗忘程度。
AI.motivation: 理解微调过程中哪些样本被遗忘以及遗忘模式是否稳定，对课程设计、数据剪枝和集成构建有直接意义。目前不清楚个体样本的遗忘动态以及遗忘模式是否具有架构依赖性。
AI.method: 在视网膜OCT数据集和CUB-200-2011鸟类数据集上，跟踪ResNet-18和DeiT-Small微调过程中每个epoch的样本正确性，为每个样本的保留轨迹拟合Ebbinghaus式指数衰减曲线，分析遗忘模式。
AI.result: 1) CNN和ViT遗忘的样本差异显著（Jaccard重叠度0.34和0.15）；2) ViT遗忘更具结构性（R²=0.74 vs 0.52）；3) 样本遗忘具有随机性（Spearman ρ≈0.01）；4) 类级别遗忘具有语义一致性；5) 头部预热后的损失可预测长期衰减常数（ρ=0.30-0.50）。
AI.conclusion: 架构多样性为集成学习提供互补的保留覆盖，基于样本难度的课程设计或剪枝方法可能无法跨运行泛化，静态调度无法利用不稳定的样本信号。

title: PERCEPT-Net: A Perceptual Loss Driven Framework for Reducing MRI Artifact Tissue Confusion
comment: 18 pages, 7 figures, 6 tables. Submitted to Medical Physics. Code available upon request
summary: Purpose: Existing deep learning-based MRI artifact correction models exhibit poor clinical generalization due to inherent artifact-tissue confusion, failing to discriminate artifacts from anatomical structures. To resolve this, we introduce PERCEPT-Net, a framework leveraging dedicated perceptual supervision for structure-preserving artifact suppression. Method: PERCEPT-Net utilizes a residual U-Net backbone integrated with a multi-scale recovery module and dual attention mechanisms to preserve anatomical context and salient features. The core mechanism, Motion Perceptual Loss (MPL), provides artifact-aware supervision by learning generalizable motion artifact representations. This logic directly guides the network to suppress artifacts while maintaining anatomical fidelity. Training utilized a hybrid dataset of real and simulated sequences, followed by prospective validation via objective metrics and expert radiologist assessments. Result: PERCEPT-Net outperformed state-of-the-art methods on clinical data. Ablation analysis established a direct causal link between MPL and performance; its omission caused a significant deterioration in structural consistency (p < 0.001) and tissue contrast (p < 0.001). Radiologist evaluations corroborated these objective metrics, scoring PERCEPT-Net significantly higher in global image quality (median 3 vs. 2, p < 0.001) and verifying the preservation of critical diagnostic structures. Conclusion: By integrating task-specific, artifact-aware perceptual learning, PERCEPT-Net suppresses motion artifacts in clinical MRI without compromising anatomical integrity. This framework improves clinical robustness and provides a verifiable mechanism to mitigate over-smoothing and structural degradation in medical image reconstruction.

AI.tldr: PERCEPT-Net：一种用于MRI运动伪影校正的深度学习框架，通过运动感知损失（MPL）提供伪影感知监督，在抑制伪影的同时保持解剖结构完整性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的MRI伪影校正模型存在伪影-组织混淆问题，导致临床泛化能力差。需要一种能够区分伪影和解剖结构的方法，在抑制伪影的同时保持解剖保真度。
AI.method: 使用残差U-Net骨干网络，集成多尺度恢复模块和双重注意力机制。核心创新是运动感知损失（MPL），通过学习可泛化的运动伪影表示提供伪影感知监督。使用真实和模拟序列的混合数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在临床数据上优于现有方法。消融分析显示MPL与性能存在直接因果关系，移除MPL会导致结构一致性（p<0.001）和组织对比度（p<0.001）显著下降。放射科医生评估显示全局图像质量显著更高（中位数3 vs 2，p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: 通过集成任务特定的伪影感知感知学习，PERCEPT-Net能够在不损害解剖完整性的情况下抑制临床MRI中的运动伪影，提高了临床鲁棒性，并为减轻医学图像重建中的过度平滑和结构退化提供了可验证的机制。

title: AI Integrity: A New Paradigm for Verifiable AI Governance
summary: AI systems increasingly shape high-stakes decisions in healthcare, law, defense, and education, yet existing governance paradigms -- AI Ethics, AI Safety, and AI Alignment -- share a common limitation: they evaluate outcomes rather than verifying the reasoning process itself. This paper introduces AI Integrity, a concept defined as a state in which the Authority Stack of an AI system -- its layered hierarchy of values, epistemological standards, source preferences, and data selection criteria -- is protected from corruption, contamination, manipulation, and bias, and maintained in a verifiable manner. We distinguish AI Integrity from the three existing paradigms, define the Authority Stack as a 4-layer cascade model (Normative, Epistemic, Source, and Data Authority) grounded in established academic frameworks -- Schwartz Basic Human Values for normative authority, Walton argumentation schemes with GRADE/CEBM hierarchies for epistemic authority, and Source Credibility Theory for source authority -- characterize the distinction between legitimate cascading and Authority Pollution, and identify Integrity Hallucination as the central measurable threat to value consistency. We further specify the PRISM (Profile-based Reasoning Integrity Stack Measurement) framework as the operational methodology, defining six core metrics and a phased research roadmap. Unlike normative frameworks that prescribe which values are correct, AI Integrity is a procedural concept: it requires that the path from evidence to conclusion be transparent and auditable, regardless of which values a system holds.

AI.tldr: 论文提出AI Integrity概念，强调验证AI推理过程而非仅评估结果，定义Authority Stack四层模型（规范性、认知性、来源性、数据权威），区分合法级联与权威污染，提出PRISM框架作为操作化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有AI治理范式（AI伦理、AI安全、AI对齐）仅评估结果而非验证推理过程本身，存在共同局限性。在医疗、法律、国防、教育等高风险决策领域，需要确保AI系统的推理过程透明可审计。
AI.method: 提出AI Integrity概念，定义Authority Stack四层级联模型：1) 规范性权威（基于Schwartz基本人类价值观）；2) 认知性权威（基于Walton论证方案与GRADE/CEBM层次）；3) 来源权威（基于来源可信度理论）；4) 数据权威。区分合法级联与权威污染，识别完整性幻觉为主要威胁，提出PRISM（基于配置文件的推理完整性堆栈测量）框架，包含六个核心指标。
AI.result: 建立了AI Integrity的理论框架，明确了与现有治理范式的区别，提出了可操作的测量方法（PRISM框架），为AI系统推理过程验证提供了系统化方法。
AI.conclusion: AI Integrity作为程序性概念，要求从证据到结论的路径透明可审计，无论系统持有何种价值观。这为高风险领域的AI治理提供了新的范式，强调过程验证而非结果评估。

title: Psychological Concept Neurons: Can Neural Control Bias Probing and Shift Generation in LLMs?
summary: Using psychological constructs such as the Big Five, large language models (LLMs) can imitate specific personality profiles and predict a user's personality. While LLMs can exhibit behaviors consistent with these constructs, it remains unclear where and how they are represented inside the model and how they relate to behavioral outputs. To address this gap, we focus on questionnaire-operationalized Big Five concepts, analyze the formation and localization of their internal representations, and use interventions to examine how these representations relate to behavioral outputs. In our experiment, we first use probing to examine where Big Five information emerges across model depth. We then identify neurons that respond selectively to each Big Five concept and test whether enhancing or suppressing their activations can bias latent representations and label generation in intended directions. We find that Big Five information becomes rapidly decodable in early layers and remains detectable through the final layers, while concept-selective neurons are most prevalent in mid layers and exhibit limited overlap across domains. Interventions on these neurons consistently shift probe readouts toward targeted concepts, with targeted success rates exceeding 0.8 for some concepts, indicating that the model's internal separation of Big Five personality traits can be causally steered. At the label-generation level, the same interventions often bias generated label distributions in the intended directions, but the effects are weaker, more concept-dependent, and often accompanied by cross-trait spillover, indicating that comparable control over generated labels is difficult even with interventions on a large fraction of concept-selective neurons. Overall, our findings reveal a gap between representational control and behavioral control in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过探测和干预方法，探索了LLM中大五人格概念的内部表征形成、定位及其与行为输出的因果关系，揭示了表征控制与行为控制之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 虽然LLM可以模仿特定人格特征并预测用户人格，但人格概念在模型内部的表征位置、形成方式以及与行为输出的关系尚不清楚。本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 使用问卷操作化的大五人格概念，通过探测分析内部表征的形成和定位，并采用干预方法（增强或抑制神经元激活）来检验这些表征如何影响行为输出。
AI.result: 大五人格信息在早期层快速可解码并持续到最终层；概念选择性神经元主要集中在中层且跨领域重叠有限；神经元干预能有效改变探测读数（成功率>0.8），但对标签生成的影响较弱且存在跨特质溢出。
AI.conclusion: LLM内部存在大五人格特质的分离表征，可通过干预因果性地操控，但表征控制与行为控制之间存在显著差距，即使干预大量概念选择性神经元也难以实现对生成标签的同等控制。

title: Generative Path-Finding Method for Wasserstein Gradient Flow
comment: Due to the arXiv notice that "The Abstract field cannot be longer than 1,920 characters", the abstract shown here is shortened. For the full abstract, please download the article
summary: Wasserstein gradient flows (WGFs) describe the evolution of probability distributions in Wasserstein space as steepest descent dynamics for a free energy functional. Computing the full path from an arbitrary initial distribution to equilibrium is challenging, especially in high dimensions. Eulerian methods suffer from the curse of dimensionality, while existing Lagrangian approaches based on particles or generative maps do not naturally improve efficiency through time step tuning. We propose GenWGP, a generative path finding framework for Wasserstein gradient paths. GenWGP learns a generative flow that transports mass from an initial density to an unknown equilibrium distribution by minimizing a path loss that encodes the full trajectory and its terminal equilibrium condition. The loss is derived from a geometric action functional motivated by Dawson Gartner large deviation theory for empirical distributions of interacting diffusion systems. We formulate both a finite horizon action under physical time parametrization and a reparameterization invariant geometric action based on Wasserstein arclength. Using normalizing flows, GenWGP computes a geometric curve toward equilibrium while enforcing approximately constant intrinsic speed between adjacent network layers, so that discretized distributions remain nearly equidistant in the Wasserstein metric along the path. This avoids delicate time stepping constraints and enables stable training that is largely independent of temporal or geometric discretization. Experiments on Fokker Planck and aggregation type problems show that GenWGP matches or exceeds high fidelity reference solutions with only about a dozen discretization points while capturing complex dynamics.

AI.tldr: GenWGP提出了一种生成式Wasserstein梯度路径框架，通过生成流学习从初始分布到平衡分布的传输路径，避免了传统方法的维度灾难和时间步长约束问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Wasserstein梯度流计算方法面临维度灾难问题：欧拉方法在高维空间计算困难，而基于粒子或生成映射的拉格朗日方法无法通过时间步长调整自然提高效率。需要一种能够高效计算高维WGF路径的方法。
AI.method: GenWGP学习一个生成流，通过最小化路径损失来传输质量从初始密度到未知平衡分布。损失函数基于Dawson-Gartner大偏差理论推导的几何作用泛函，包括物理时间参数化的有限时域作用和基于Wasserstein弧长的重参数化不变几何作用。使用归一化流计算几何曲线，强制相邻网络层间近似恒定的内在速度，使离散化分布在路径上保持近似等距。
AI.result: 在Fokker-Planck和聚集类型问题上的实验表明，GenWGP仅需约十几个离散化点就能匹配或超过高保真参考解，同时捕捉复杂动力学行为。
AI.conclusion: GenWGP提供了一种稳定高效的Wasserstein梯度路径计算方法，避免了精细的时间步长约束，训练过程基本独立于时间或几何离散化，能够处理高维复杂问题。

title: ReContraster: Making Your Posters Stand Out with Regional Contrast
summary: Effective poster design requires rapidly capturing attention and clearly conveying messages. Inspired by the ``contrast effects'' principle, we propose ReContraster, the first training-free model to leverage regional contrast to make posters stand out. By emulating the cognitive behaviors of a poster designer, ReContraster introduces the compositional multi-agent system to identify elements, organize layout, and evaluate generated poster candidates. To further ensure harmonious transitions across region boundaries, ReContraster integrates the hybrid denoising strategy during the diffusion process. We additionally contribute a new benchmark dataset for comprehensive evaluation. Seven quantitative metrics and four user studies confirm its superiority over relevant state-of-the-art methods, producing visually striking and aesthetically appealing posters.

AI.tldr: ReContraster：首个利用区域对比度的免训练模型，通过模拟海报设计师的认知行为，采用组合式多智能体系统来识别元素、组织布局并评估生成的海报候选方案，以制作引人注目的海报。
AI.motivation: 有效的海报设计需要快速吸引注意力并清晰传达信息。受"对比效应"原则启发，研究者希望开发一种能利用区域对比度使海报脱颖而出的方法，以解决传统方法在视觉冲击力和美学吸引力方面的不足。
AI.method: 1. 提出ReContraster模型，首个利用区域对比度的免训练方法；2. 模拟海报设计师的认知行为，引入组合式多智能体系统来识别元素、组织布局并评估生成的海报候选方案；3. 在扩散过程中集成混合去噪策略，确保区域边界间的和谐过渡；4. 贡献了新的基准数据集用于全面评估。
AI.result: 通过七个定量指标和四项用户研究证实，ReContraster在相关最先进方法中表现出优越性，能够生成视觉冲击力强且美学吸引力高的海报。
AI.conclusion: ReContraster通过模拟设计师认知过程、利用区域对比度和混合去噪策略，成功实现了高效的海报生成，在视觉质量和美学效果方面超越了现有方法。

title: PRISM Risk Signal Framework: Hierarchy-Based Red Lines for AI Behavioral Risk
summary: Current approaches to AI safety define red lines at the case level: specific prompts, specific outputs, specific harms. This paper argues that red lines can be set more fundamentally -- at the level of value, evidence, and source hierarchies that govern AI reasoning. Using the PRISM (Profile-based Reasoning Integrity Stack Measurement) framework, we define a taxonomy of 27 behavioral risk signals derived from structural anomalies in how AI systems prioritize values (L4), weight evidence types (L3), and trust information sources (L2). Each signal is evaluated through a dual-threshold principle combining absolute rank position and relative win-rate gap, producing a two-tier classification (Confirmed Risk vs. Watch Signal). The hierarchy-based approach offers three advantages over case-specific red lines: it is anticipatory rather than reactive (detecting dangerous reasoning structures before they produce harmful outputs), comprehensive rather than enumerative (a single value-hierarchy signal subsumes an unlimited number of case-specific violations), and measurable rather than subjective (grounded in empirical forced-choice data). We demonstrate the framework's detection capacity using approximately 397,000 forced-choice responses from 7 AI models across three Authority Stack layers, showing that the signal taxonomy successfully discriminates between models with structurally extreme profiles, models with context-dependent risk, and models with balanced hierarchies.

AI.tldr: 论文提出PRISM框架，通过分析AI系统的价值层次、证据权重和信源信任结构来检测推理完整性风险，而非仅关注具体案例层面的有害输出。
AI.motivation: 当前AI安全方法主要在案例层面设置红线（特定提示、输出、危害），这种方法反应性、枚举性且主观。作者认为应该在更根本的推理结构层面设置红线，通过分析AI系统的价值层次、证据类型权重和信息源信任结构来检测风险。
AI.method: 提出PRISM框架，定义27个行为风险信号，基于AI系统在三个层次的结构异常：L4价值优先级、L3证据类型权重、L2信息源信任。采用双阈值原则（绝对排名位置和相对胜率差距）进行二分类（确认风险vs.观察信号）。使用约397,000个强制选择响应，评估7个AI模型在权威堆栈三层的行为。
AI.result: 信号分类法成功区分了三种模型类型：具有结构极端配置的模型、具有上下文依赖风险的模型、以及具有平衡层次结构的模型。框架展示了检测能力，能够识别危险的推理结构而非仅检测有害输出。
AI.conclusion: 基于层次的方法相比案例特定红线具有三大优势：前瞻性而非反应性（在产生有害输出前检测危险推理结构）、全面性而非枚举性（单个价值层次信号涵盖无限案例特定违规）、可测量而非主观（基于经验强制选择数据）。为AI安全提供了更根本的评估框架。

title: Saar-Voice: A Multi-Speaker Saarbrücken Dialect Speech Corpus
summary: Natural language processing (NLP) and speech technologies have made significant progress in recent years; however, they remain largely focused on standardized language varieties. Dialects, despite their cultural significance and widespread use, are underrepresented in linguistic resources and computational models, resulting in performance disparities. To address this gap, we introduce Saar-Voice, a six-hour speech corpus for the Saarbrücken dialect of German. The dataset was created by first collecting text through digitized books and locally sourced materials. A subset of this text was recorded by nine speakers, and we conducted analyses on both the textual and speech components to assess the dataset's characteristics and quality. We discuss methodological challenges related to orthographic and speaker variation, and explore grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) conversion. The resulting corpus provides aligned textual and audio representations. This serves as a foundation for future research on dialect-aware text-to-speech (TTS), particularly in low-resource scenarios, including zero-shot and few-shot model adaptation.

AI.tldr: Saar-Voice是一个6小时的德语萨尔布吕肯方言语音语料库，包含对齐的文本和音频数据，用于支持低资源方言的语音合成研究。
AI.motivation: 当前NLP和语音技术主要关注标准化语言变体，而方言尽管具有文化意义和广泛使用，但在语言资源和计算模型中代表性不足，导致性能差异。需要解决方言资源稀缺的问题。
AI.method: 通过数字化书籍和本地材料收集文本，由9名说话者录制语音子集。分析文本和语音组件以评估数据集特征和质量，讨论正字法和说话者变异的方法学挑战，探索字素到音素转换。
AI.result: 创建了Saar-Voice语料库，包含对齐的文本和音频表示，为方言感知的文本到语音合成研究提供基础，特别是在零样本和少样本模型适应的低资源场景中。
AI.conclusion: 该语料库填补了方言资源的空白，为未来方言感知的TTS研究奠定了基础，特别是在低资源场景下，有助于减少方言在计算模型中的代表性不足问题。

title: Continuous Adversarial Flow Models
summary: We propose continuous adversarial flow models, a type of continuous-time flow model trained with an adversarial objective. Unlike flow matching, which uses a fixed mean-squared-error criterion, our approach introduces a learned discriminator to guide training. This change in objective induces a different generalized distribution, which empirically produces samples that are better aligned with the target data distribution. Our method is primarily proposed for post-training existing flow-matching models, although it can also train models from scratch. On the ImageNet 256px generation task, our post-training substantially improves the guidance-free FID of latent-space SiT from 8.26 to 3.63 and of pixel-space JiT from 7.17 to 3.57. It also improves guided generation, reducing FID from 2.06 to 1.53 for SiT and from 1.86 to 1.80 for JiT. We further evaluate our approach on text-to-image generation, where it achieves improved results on both the GenEval and DPG benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出连续对抗流模型，这是一种使用对抗目标训练的连续时间流模型。与使用固定均方误差准则的流匹配不同，该方法引入学习判别器来指导训练，产生与目标数据分布更对齐的样本。
AI.motivation: 传统流匹配方法使用固定的均方误差准则，可能无法充分捕捉数据分布的复杂性。通过引入对抗训练目标，可以更好地引导模型学习目标分布，提高生成样本的质量。
AI.method: 提出连续对抗流模型，在连续时间流模型中引入学习判别器作为训练目标。该方法可用于后训练现有流匹配模型，也可从头训练模型。通过对抗目标诱导不同的广义分布，使样本更符合目标数据分布。
AI.result: 在ImageNet 256px生成任务中，后训练显著改进：SiT的无引导FID从8.26降至3.63，JiT从7.17降至3.57；有引导生成中，SiT的FID从2.06降至1.53，JiT从1.86降至1.80。在文本到图像生成中，在GenEval和DPG基准测试中均取得改进结果。
AI.conclusion: 连续对抗流模型通过引入对抗训练目标，显著提高了流模型的生成质量，在图像生成和文本到图像生成任务中都取得了优异性能。

title: Parameter Efficient Fine-tuning for Domain-specific Gastrointestinal Disease Recognition
summary: Despite recent advancements in the field of medical image analysis with the use of pretrained foundation models, the issue of distribution shifts between cross-source images largely remains adamant. To circumvent that issue, investigators generally train a separate model for each source. However, this method becomes expensive when we fully fine-tune pretrained large models for a single dataset, as we must store multiple copies of those models. Thus, in this work, we propose using a low-rank adaptation (LoRA) module for fine-tuning downstream classification tasks. LoRAs learn lightweight task-specific low-rank matrices that perturb pretrained weights to optimize those downstream tasks. For gastrointestinal tract diseases, they exhibit significantly better results than end-to-end finetuning with improved parameter efficiency. Code is available at: github.com/sanjay931/peft-gi-recognition.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用低秩适配（LoRA）模块来微调医学图像分类任务，以解决跨源图像分布偏移问题，相比全参数微调具有更好的参数效率和性能
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析中，跨源图像的分布偏移问题仍然存在。传统方法为每个数据源训练单独模型，但当使用预训练大模型时，全参数微调需要存储多个模型副本，成本高昂。
AI.method: 使用低秩适配（LoRA）模块进行下游分类任务的微调。LoRA学习轻量级的任务特定低秩矩阵，通过扰动预训练权重来优化下游任务，而不是全参数微调。
AI.result: 在胃肠道疾病识别任务中，LoRA方法相比端到端全参数微调取得了显著更好的结果，同时提高了参数效率。
AI.conclusion: LoRA提供了一种参数高效的微调方法，能够有效处理医学图像分析中的跨源分布偏移问题，同时减少存储多个模型副本的需求。

title: Hodoscope: Unsupervised Monitoring for AI Misbehaviors
summary:
Existing approaches to monitoring AI agents rely on supervised evaluation: human-written rules or LLM-based judges that check for known failure modes. However, novel misbehaviors may fall outside predefined categories entirely and LLM-based judges can be unreliable. To address this, we formulate unsupervised monitoring, drawing an analogy to unsupervised learning. Rather than checking for specific misbehaviors, an unsupervised monitor assists humans in discovering problematic agent behaviors without prior assumptions about what counts as problematic, leaving that determination to the human.
  We observe that problematic behaviors are often distinctive: a model exploiting a benchmark loophole exhibits actions absent from well-behaved baselines, and a vulnerability unique to one evaluation manifests as behavioral anomalies when the same model runs across multiple benchmarks. This motivates using group-wise behavioral differences as the primary signal for unsupervised monitoring. We introduce Hodoscope, a tool that operationalizes this insight. Hodoscope compares behavior distributions across groups and highlights distinctive and potentially suspicious action patterns for human review. Using Hodoscope, we discover a previously unknown vulnerability in the Commit0 benchmark (unsquashed git history allowing ground-truth recovery, inflating scores for at least five models) and independently recover known exploits on ImpossibleBench and SWE-bench. Quantitative evaluation estimates that our method reduces review effort by 6-23$\times$ compared to naive uniform sampling. Finally, we show that behavior descriptions discovered through Hodoscope could improve the detection accuracy of LLM-based judges, demonstrating a path from unsupervised to supervised monitoring.

AI.tldr: Hodoscope：一种无监督监控AI代理行为的工具，通过比较不同组间的行为分布来发现异常模式，无需预先定义问题类别，显著减少人工审查工作量。
AI.motivation: 现有AI代理监控方法依赖监督评估（人工规则或基于LLM的评判器），但无法检测未知的异常行为，且LLM评判器可能不可靠。需要一种无监督方法帮助人类发现未预定义的问题行为。
AI.method: 提出无监督监控框架Hodoscope，基于"问题行为通常具有独特性"的观察：利用基准漏洞的行为在表现良好的基线中不存在；单一评估中的漏洞在跨多个基准运行时表现为行为异常。通过比较不同组间的行为分布，识别独特且可能可疑的行为模式供人工审查。
AI.result: 1) 发现Commit0基准中先前未知的漏洞（未压缩的git历史允许恢复真实答案，至少影响五个模型的评分）；2) 独立重现ImpossibleBench和SWE-bench上的已知漏洞；3) 定量评估显示方法比朴素均匀采样减少6-23倍审查工作量；4) 发现的行为描述可提高基于LLM的评判器检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: Hodoscope提供了一种有效的无监督监控方法，能够发现未知的AI代理问题行为，显著减少人工审查成本，并为从无监督监控过渡到监督监控提供了路径。

title: MCERF: Advancing Multimodal LLM Evaluation of Engineering Documentation with Enhanced Retrieval
summary: Engineering rulebooks and technical standards contain multimodal information like dense text, tables, and illustrations that are challenging for retrieval augmented generation (RAG) systems. Building upon the DesignQA framework [1], which relied on full-text ingestion and text-based retrieval, this work establishes a Multimodal ColPali Enhanced Retrieval and Reasoning Framework (MCERF), a system that couples a multimodal retriever with large language model reasoning for accurate and efficient question answering from engineering documents. The system employs the ColPali, which retrieves both textual and visual information, and multiple retrieval and reasoning strategies: (i) Hybrid Lookup mode for explicit rule mentions, (ii) Vision to Text fusion for figure and table guided queries, (iii) High Reasoning LLM mode for complex multi modal questions, and (iv) SelfConsistency decision to stabilize responses. The modular framework design provides a reusable template for future multimodal systems regardless of underlying model architecture. Furthermore, this work establishes and compares two routing approaches: a single case routing approach and a multi-agent system, both of which dynamically allocate queries to optimal pipelines. Evaluation on the DesignQA benchmark illustrates that this system improves average accuracy across all tasks with a relative gain of +41.1% from baseline RAG best results, which is a significant improvement in multimodal and reasoning-intensive tasks without complete rulebook ingestion. This shows how vision language retrieval, modular reasoning, and adaptive routing enable scalable document comprehension in engineering use cases.

AI.tldr: MCERF是一个多模态检索增强生成框架，专门针对工程规则手册和技术标准中的多模态内容（文本、表格、插图），通过结合多模态检索器和LLM推理实现准确高效的问答。
AI.motivation: 工程规则手册和技术标准包含密集文本、表格和插图等多模态信息，这对传统的RAG系统构成挑战。现有的DesignQA框架主要依赖全文摄取和基于文本的检索，需要更有效的多模态处理方案。
AI.method: 1. 使用ColPali进行文本和视觉信息检索；2. 四种检索推理策略：混合查找模式（显式规则提及）、视觉到文本融合（图表引导查询）、高推理LLM模式（复杂多模态问题）、自一致性决策（稳定响应）；3. 两种路由方法：单案例路由和多智能体系统，动态分配查询到最优管道。
AI.result: 在DesignQA基准测试中，该系统在所有任务上的平均准确率相比基线RAG最佳结果提升了41.1%，在多模态和推理密集型任务上实现了显著改进，无需完整规则手册摄取。
AI.conclusion: 视觉语言检索、模块化推理和自适应路由的结合能够实现工程用例中可扩展的文档理解，该模块化框架设计为未来多模态系统提供了可重用模板。

title: TempusBench: An Evaluation Framework for Time-Series Forecasting
summary: Foundation models have transformed natural language processing and computer vision, and a rapidly growing literature on time-series foundation models (TSFMs) seeks to replicate this success in forecasting. While recent open-source models demonstrate the promise of TSFMs, the field lacks a comprehensive and community-accepted model evaluation framework. We see at least four major issues impeding progress on the development of such a framework. First, current evaluation frameworks consist of benchmark forecasting tasks derived from often outdated datasets (e.g., M3), many of which lack clear metadata and overlap with the corpora used to pre-train TSFMs. Second, existing frameworks evaluate models along a narrowly defined set of benchmark forecasting tasks such as forecast horizon length or domain, but overlook core statistical properties such as non-stationarity and seasonality. Third, domain-specific models (e.g., XGBoost) are often compared unfairly, as existing frameworks neglect a systematic and consistent hyperparameter tuning convention for all models. Fourth, visualization tools for interpreting comparative performance are lacking. To address these issues, we introduce TempusBench, an open-source evaluation framework for TSFMs. TempusBench consists of 1) new datasets which are not included in existing TSFM pretraining corpora, 2) a set of novel benchmark tasks that go beyond existing ones, 3) a model evaluation pipeline with a standardized hyperparameter tuning protocol, and 4) a tensorboard-based visualization interface. We provide access to our code on GitHub: https://github.com/Smlcrm/TempusBench.

AI.tldr: TempusBench是一个开源的时间序列基础模型评估框架，解决了现有评估框架的四个主要问题：过时数据集、评估维度狭窄、不公平比较和缺乏可视化工具。
AI.motivation: 时间序列基础模型(TSFMs)领域缺乏全面且社区认可的模型评估框架。现有框架存在四个主要问题：1)使用过时数据集且与预训练语料重叠；2)评估维度狭窄，忽略核心统计特性；3)不公平比较领域特定模型；4)缺乏可视化工具。
AI.method: 提出TempusBench框架，包含：1)新的数据集(不在现有TSFM预训练语料中)；2)超越现有基准的新基准任务；3)标准化超参数调优协议的模型评估流程；4)基于tensorboard的可视化界面。
AI.result: 开发了开源评估框架TempusBench，提供了完整的代码实现(GitHub可用)，为时间序列基础模型的公平、全面评估提供了系统解决方案。
AI.conclusion: TempusBench解决了时间序列基础模型评估的关键挑战，为领域发展提供了标准化的评估框架，促进了TSFMs研究的可比性和可重复性。

title: AIM-Bench: Benchmarking and Improving Affective Image Manipulation via Fine-Grained Hierarchical Control
summary: Affective Image Manipulation (AIM) aims to evoke specific emotions through targeted editing. Current image editing benchmarks primarily focus on object-level modifications in general scenarios, lacking the fine-grained granularity to capture affective dimensions. To bridge this gap, we introduce the first benchmark designed for AIM termed AIM-Bench. This benchmark is built upon a dual-path affective modeling scheme that integrates the Mikels emotion taxonomy with the Valence-Arousal-Dominance framework, enabling high-level semantic and fine-grained continuous manipulation. Through a hierarchical human-in-the-loop workflow, we finally curate 800 high-quality samples covering 8 emotional categories and 5 editing types. To effectively assess performance, we also design a composite evaluation suite combining rule-based and model-based metrics to holistically assess instruction consistency, aesthetics, and emotional expressiveness. Extensive evaluations reveal that current editing models face significant challenges, most notably a prevalent positivity bias, which stemming from inherent imbalances in training data distribution. To tackle this, we propose a scalable data engine utilizing an inverse repainting strategy to construct AIM-40k, a balanced instruction-tuning dataset comprising 40k samples. Concretely, we enhance raw affective images via generative redrawing to establish high-fidelity ground truths, and synthesize input images with divergent emotions and paired precise instructions. Fine-tuning a baseline model on AIM-40k yields a 9.15% relative improvement in overall performance, demonstrating the effectiveness of our AIM-40k. Our data and related code will be made open soon.

AI.tldr: 提出了首个情感图像编辑基准AIM-Bench，通过双路径情感建模方案（Mikels分类+VAD框架）构建800个高质量样本，发现现有模型存在积极偏见，进而提出基于逆重绘策略的AIM-40k平衡数据集，微调后性能提升9.15%
AI.motivation: 当前图像编辑基准主要关注通用场景下的物体级修改，缺乏对情感维度的细粒度捕捉。为了填补情感图像编辑（AIM）领域的空白，需要建立专门的情感图像编辑基准和数据集。
AI.method: 1) 提出双路径情感建模方案：结合Mikels情感分类和Valence-Arousal-Dominance连续框架；2) 采用分层人机协作流程构建AIM-Bench基准（800个样本）；3) 设计复合评估套件（规则+模型）；4) 提出逆重绘策略构建平衡的AIM-40k指令调优数据集（40k样本）
AI.result: 1) 现有编辑模型在情感编辑任务上表现不佳，存在明显的积极偏见；2) 基于AIM-40k微调的基线模型在整体性能上获得9.15%的相对提升；3) 验证了平衡数据集对缓解训练数据分布不平衡问题的有效性
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了情感图像编辑领域的基准空白，揭示了现有模型的局限性，并通过构建平衡数据集有效提升了模型性能，为情感导向的图像编辑研究提供了重要资源和方法

title: Towards Proactive Information Probing: Customer Service Chatbots Harvesting Value from Conversation
summary: Customer service chatbots are increasingly expected to serve not merely as reactive support tools for users, but as strategic interfaces for harvesting high-value information and business intelligence. In response, we make three main contributions. 1) We introduce and define a novel task of Proactive Information Probing, which optimizes when to probe users for pre-specified target information while minimizing conversation turns and user friction. 2) We propose PROCHATIP, a proactive chatbot framework featuring a specialized conversation strategy module trained to master the delicate timing of probes. 3) Experiments demonstrate that PROCHATIP significantly outperforms baselines, exhibiting superior capability in both information probing and service quality. We believe that our work effectively redefines the commercial utility of chatbots, positioning them as scalable, cost-effective engines for proactive business intelligence. Our code is available at https://github.com/SCUNLP/PROCHATIP.

AI.tldr: 论文提出PROCHATIP框架，用于主动信息探测任务，优化聊天机器人何时向用户询问预设目标信息，同时最小化对话轮次和用户摩擦。
AI.motivation: 当前客服聊天机器人主要作为被动支持工具，作者希望将其转变为主动收集高价值信息和商业智能的战略接口，提升商业效用。
AI.method: 提出PROCHATIP框架，包含专门训练的对话策略模块，掌握探测时机的微妙平衡，优化何时探测用户以获取预设目标信息。
AI.result: 实验表明PROCHATIP显著优于基线方法，在信息探测和服务质量方面都表现出优越能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作重新定义了聊天机器人的商业效用，将其定位为可扩展、经济高效的主动商业智能引擎。

title: Eliciting Medical Reasoning with Knowledge-enhanced Data Synthesis: A Semi-Supervised Reinforcement Learning Approach
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 as a Findings paper
summary: While large language models hold promise for complex medical applications, their development is hindered by the scarcity of high-quality reasoning data. To address this issue, existing approaches typically distill chain-of-thought reasoning traces from large proprietary models via supervised fine-tuning, then conduct reinforcement learning (RL). These methods exhibit limited improvement on underrepresented domains like rare diseases while incurring substantial costs from generating complex reasoning chains. To efficiently enhance medical reasoning, we propose MedSSR, a Medical Knowledge-enhanced data Synthesis and Semi-supervised Reinforcement learning framework. Our framework first employs rare disease knowledge to synthesize distribution-controllable reasoning questions. We then utilize the policy model itself to generate high-quality pseudo-labels. This enables a two-stage, intrinsic-to-extrinsic training paradigm: self-supervised RL on the pseudo-labeled synthetic data, followed by supervised RL on the human-annotated real data. MedSSR scales model training efficiently without relying on costly trace distillation. Extensive experiments on Qwen and Llama demonstrate that our method outperforms existing methods across ten medical benchmarks, achieving up to +5.93% gain on rare-disease tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/tdlhl/MedSSR.

AI.tldr: MedSSR：一种医学知识增强的数据合成与半监督强化学习框架，用于高效提升医学推理能力，特别是在罕见病领域
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在复杂医学应用中具有潜力，但高质量推理数据的稀缺阻碍了其发展。现有方法通常通过监督微调从大型专有模型蒸馏思维链推理轨迹，然后进行强化学习，这些方法在罕见病等代表性不足的领域改进有限，且生成复杂推理链的成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出MedSSR框架：1）利用罕见病知识合成分布可控的推理问题；2）使用策略模型本身生成高质量伪标签；3）采用两阶段训练范式：先在伪标签合成数据上进行自监督强化学习，然后在人工标注的真实数据上进行监督强化学习。
AI.result: 在Qwen和Llama模型上的广泛实验表明，该方法在十个医学基准测试中优于现有方法，在罕见病任务上实现了高达+5.93%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: MedSSR能够高效扩展模型训练，无需依赖昂贵的轨迹蒸馏，显著提升了医学推理能力，特别是在罕见病等代表性不足的领域。

title: A Benchmark and Multi-Agent System for Instruction-driven Cinematic Video Compilation
summary: The surging demand for adapting long-form cinematic content into short videos has motivated the need for versatile automatic video compilation systems. However, existing compilation methods are limited to predefined tasks, and the community lacks a comprehensive benchmark to evaluate the cinematic compilation. To address this, we introduce CineBench, the first benchmark for instruction-driven cinematic video compilation, featuring diverse user instructions and high-quality ground-truth compilations annotated by professional editors. To overcome contextual collapse and temporal fragmentation, we present CineAgents, a multi-agent system that reformulates cinematic video compilation into ``design-and-compose'' paradigm. CineAgents performs script reverse-engineering to construct a hierarchical narrative memory to provide multi-level context and employs an iterative narrative planning process that refines a creative blueprint into a final compiled script. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CineAgents significantly outperforms existing methods, generating compilations with superior narrative coherence and logical coherence.

AI.tldr: 提出了CineBench基准和CineAgents多智能体系统，用于指令驱动的电影视频剪辑，通过脚本逆向工程和分层叙事记忆解决上下文崩溃和时间碎片化问题。
AI.motivation: 随着长格式电影内容改编为短视频的需求激增，需要通用的自动视频剪辑系统。现有方法局限于预定义任务，且缺乏全面的基准来评估电影剪辑质量。
AI.method: 提出CineAgents多智能体系统，采用"设计-组合"范式：1) 通过脚本逆向工程构建分层叙事记忆提供多级上下文；2) 使用迭代叙事规划将创意蓝图细化为最终剪辑脚本。
AI.result: CineAgents显著优于现有方法，生成的剪辑在叙事连贯性和逻辑一致性方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: CineBench是首个指令驱动的电影视频剪辑基准，CineAgents通过分层叙事记忆和迭代规划有效解决了上下文崩溃和时间碎片化问题。

title: Do Agent Rules Shape or Distort? Guardrails Beat Guidance in Coding Agents
summary: Developers increasingly guide AI coding agents through natural language instruction files (e.g., CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules), yet no controlled study has measured whether these rules actually improve agent performance or which properties make a rule beneficial. We scrape 679 such files (25,532 rules) from GitHub and conduct the first large-scale empirical evaluation, running over 5,000 agent runs with a state-of-the-art coding agent on SWE-bench Verified. Rules improve performance by 7--14 percentage points, but random rules help as much as expert-curated ones -- suggesting rules work through context priming rather than specific instruction. Negative constraints ("do not refactor unrelated code") are the only individually beneficial rule type, while positive directives ("follow code style") actively hurt -- a pattern we analyze through the lens of potential-based reward shaping (PBRS). Moreover, individual rules are mostly harmful in isolation yet collectively helpful, with no degradation up to 50 rules. These findings expose a hidden reliability risk -- well-intentioned rules routinely degrade agent performance -- and provide a clear principle for safe agent configuration: constrain what agents must not do, rather than prescribing what they should.

AI.tldr: 研究发现AI编码代理的指导规则文件（如CLAUDE.md）能提升性能7-14%，但随机规则与专家规则效果相当，表明起作用的是上下文激活而非具体指令。负面约束（"不要重构无关代码"）有益，而正面指令（"遵循代码风格"）反而有害，建议采用"限制不该做什么"而非"规定该做什么"的安全配置原则。
AI.motivation: 开发者越来越多地使用自然语言指导文件（如CLAUDE.md）来引导AI编码代理，但缺乏对这些规则是否真正提升代理性能以及哪些规则属性有益的实证研究。需要了解这些规则的实际效果和机制。
AI.method: 从GitHub收集679个规则文件（25,532条规则），在SWE-bench Verified上进行大规模实证评估，运行超过5,000次代理任务。分析规则类型（正面指令vs负面约束）、规则数量、规则质量（专家vs随机）对性能的影响，并从基于势能的奖励塑造（PBRS）角度分析机制。
AI.result: 规则整体提升性能7-14个百分点，但随机规则与专家规则效果相当，表明规则通过上下文激活而非具体指令起作用。负面约束是唯一有益的单类规则，正面指令反而有害。单个规则大多有害，但组合使用时有益，最多50条规则不会导致性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了隐藏的可靠性风险——善意的规则可能降低代理性能。提出了安全代理配置原则：限制代理不该做什么，而非规定该做什么。规则通过上下文激活机制起作用，而非具体指令内容。

title: bacpipe: a Python package to make bioacoustic deep learning models accessible
summary:
1. Natural sounds have been recorded for millions of hours over the previous decades using passive acoustic monitoring. Improvements in deep learning models have vastly accelerated the analysis of large portions of this data. While new models advance the state-of-the-art, accessing them using tools to harness their full potential is not always straightforward. Here we present bacpipe, a collection of bioacoustic deep learning models and evaluation pipelines accessible through a graphical and programming interface, designed for both ecologists and computer scientists. Bacpipe is a modular software package intended as a point of convergence for bioacoustic models.
  2. Bacpipe streamlines the usage of state-of-the-art models on custom audio datasets, generating acoustic feature vectors (embeddings) and classifier predictions. A modular design allows evaluation and benchmarking of models through interactive visualizations, clustering and probing.
  3. We believe that access to new deep learning models is important. By designing bacpipe to target a wide audience, researchers will be enabled to answer new ecological and evolutionary questions in bioacoustics.
  4. In conclusion, we believe accessibility to developments in deep learning to a wider audience benefits the ecological questions we are trying to answer.

AI.tldr: Bacpipe是一个用于生物声学的深度学习模型和评估管道软件包，提供图形和编程接口，旨在简化最先进模型在自定义音频数据集上的使用。
AI.motivation: 被动声学监测积累了数百万小时的生物声学数据，深度学习模型虽然能加速分析，但现有工具难以充分发挥其潜力。研究人员需要更易访问的工具来利用这些先进模型。
AI.method: 开发了bacpipe软件包，包含生物声学深度学习模型和评估管道，采用模块化设计，提供图形和编程接口，支持生成声学特征向量和分类器预测，以及交互式可视化、聚类和探测。
AI.result: 创建了一个面向生态学家和计算机科学家的生物声学深度学习工具平台，能够简化最先进模型的使用，支持模型评估和基准测试。
AI.conclusion: 通过将深度学习发展成果普及给更广泛的受众，有助于回答生态学和进化生物学中的新问题，促进生物声学研究。

title: Toward Accountable AI-Generated Content on Social Platforms: Steganographic Attribution and Multimodal Harm Detection
summary: The rapid growth of generative AI has introduced new challenges in content moderation and digital forensics. In particular, benign AI-generated images can be paired with harmful or misleading text, creating difficult-to-detect misuse. This contextual misuse undermines the traditional moderation framework and complicates attribution, as synthetic images typically lack persistent metadata or device signatures. We introduce a steganography enabled attribution framework that embeds cryptographically signed identifiers into images at creation time and uses multimodal harmful content detection as a trigger for attribution verification. Our system evaluates five watermarking methods across spatial, frequency, and wavelet domains. It also integrates a CLIP-based fusion model for multimodal harmful-content detection. Experiments demonstrate that spread-spectrum watermarking, especially in the wavelet domain, provides strong robustness under blur distortions, and our multimodal fusion detector achieves an AUC-ROC of 0.99, enabling reliable cross-modal attribution verification. These components form an end-to-end forensic pipeline that enables reliable tracing of harmful deployments of AI-generated imagery, supporting accountability in modern synthetic media environments. Our code is available at GitHub: https://github.com/bli1/steganography

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于隐写术的AI生成图像溯源框架，通过加密签名标识嵌入图像，结合多模态有害内容检测触发溯源验证，实现AI生成图像的有害部署追踪。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI的快速发展带来了内容审核和数字取证的新挑战。特别是良性的AI生成图像可能被配上有害或误导性文本，形成难以检测的上下文滥用。这种上下文滥用破坏了传统审核框架，并使溯源复杂化，因为合成图像通常缺乏持久的元数据或设备签名。
AI.method: 1) 引入隐写术启用的溯源框架，在图像创建时嵌入加密签名标识符；2) 使用多模态有害内容检测作为溯源验证的触发器；3) 评估五种跨空间、频率和小波域的水印方法；4) 集成基于CLIP的融合模型进行多模态有害内容检测。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) 扩展频谱水印（特别是小波域）在模糊失真下具有强鲁棒性；2) 多模态融合检测器达到AUC-ROC 0.99，实现可靠的跨模态溯源验证。
AI.conclusion: 这些组件构成了端到端的取证管道，能够可靠追踪AI生成图像的有害部署，支持现代合成媒体环境中的问责制。

title: Frugal Knowledge Graph Construction with Local LLMs: A Zero-Shot Pipeline, Self-Consistency and Wisdom of Artificial Crowds
comment: Source code and raw results available: https://github.com/jourlin/synsynth (licence Hypocratic)
summary: This paper presents an empirical study of a multi-model zero-shot pipeline for knowledge graph construction and exploitation, executed entirely through local inference on consumer-grade hardware. We propose a reproducible evaluation framework integrating two external benchmarks (DocRED, HotpotQA), WebQuestionsSP-style synthetic data, and the RAGAS evaluation framework in an automated pipeline. On 500 document-level relations, our system achieves an F1 of 0.70 $\pm$ 0.041 in zero-shot, compared to 0.80 for supervised DREEAM. Text-to-query achieves an accuracy of 0.80 $\pm$ 0.06 on 200 samples. Multi-hop reasoning achieves an Exact Match (EM) of 0.46$\pm$0.04 on 500 HotpotQA questions, with a RAGAS faithfulness of 0.96 $\pm$ 0.04 on 50 samples. Beyond the pipeline, we study diversity mechanisms for difficult multi-hop reasoning. On 181 questions unsolvable at zero temperature, self-consistency (k=5, T =0.7) recovers up to 23% EM with a single Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model, but the cross-model oracle (3 architectures x 5 samples) reaches 46.4%. We highlight an agreement paradox: strong consensus among samples signals collective hallucination rather than a reliable answer, echoing the work of Moussa{ï}d et al. on the wisdom of crowds. Extending to the full pipeline (500 questions), self-consistency (k=3) raises EM from 0.46 to 0.48 $\pm$ 0.04. A confidence-routing cascade mechanism (Phi-4 $\rightarrow$ GPT-OSS, k=5) achieves an EM of 0.55 $\pm$ 0.04, the best result obtained, with 45.4% of questions rerouted. Finally, we show that V3 prompt engineering applied to other models does not reproduce the gains observed with Gemma-4, confirming the specific prompt/model interaction. The entire system runs in $\sim$5 h on a single RTX 3090, without any training, for an estimated carbon footprint of 0.09 kg CO2 eq.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个完全在消费级硬件上本地推理的多模型零样本知识图谱构建与利用管道，通过集成多个外部基准和评估框架，在零样本设置下取得了接近监督方法的性能，并研究了多跳推理的多样性机制。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是开发一个完全在本地消费级硬件上运行的知识图谱构建与利用系统，避免依赖云端API，同时保持高性能。这解决了隐私、成本和可复现性问题，并探索了零样本设置下的多模型协作和多跳推理能力。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）多模型零样本管道，集成DocRED、HotpotQA等外部基准和RAGAS评估框架；2）多样性机制研究，包括自一致性采样（k=5, T=0.7）和跨模型oracle（3种架构×5个样本）；3）置信度路由级联机制（Phi-4→GPT-OSS）；4）特定提示/模型交互研究（V3提示工程）。
AI.result: 在500个文档级关系上，零样本F1达到0.70±0.041（监督方法DREEAM为0.80）；文本到查询准确率0.80±0.06；多跳推理EM达到0.46±0.04；自一致性将EM从0.46提升到0.48；置信度路由级联机制达到最佳EM 0.55±0.04；系统在单张RTX 3090上运行约5小时，碳足迹0.09kg CO2 eq。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，完全在消费级硬件上本地运行的多模型零样本知识图谱系统是可行的，性能接近监督方法。多模型协作和多样性机制能显著提升多跳推理性能，但存在"共识悖论"：强共识可能表示集体幻觉而非可靠答案。特定提示/模型交互对性能有重要影响。

title: LETGAMES: An LLM-Powered Gamified Approach to Cognitive Training for Patients with Cognitive Impairment
summary: The application of games as a therapeutic tool for cognitive training is beneficial for patients with cognitive impairments. However, effective game design for individual patient is resource-intensive. To this end, we propose an LLM-powered method, \ours, for automated and personalized therapeutic game design. Inspired by the Dungeons & Dragons, LETGAMES generates an open-world interactive narrative game. It not only generates game scenarios and challenges that target specific cognitive domains, but also employs conversational strategies to offer guidance and companionship. To validate its efficacy, we pioneer a psychology-grounded evaluation protocol LETGAMESEVAL, establishing comprehensive metrics for rehabilitative assessment. Building upon this, our experimental results from both LLM-based assessors and human expert evaluations demonstrate the significant potential of our approach, positioning LETGAMES as a promising solution to the widespread need for more accessible and tailored cognitive training tools. Our code will be open-sourced upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: LETGAMES：一个基于LLM的个性化治疗游戏生成系统，用于认知训练，通过开放世界互动叙事游戏为认知障碍患者提供定制化康复方案。
AI.motivation: 游戏作为认知训练工具对认知障碍患者有益，但为个体患者设计有效游戏资源密集。需要自动化、个性化的治疗游戏设计方法来解决可及性问题。
AI.method: 受《龙与地下城》启发，LETGAMES使用LLM生成开放世界互动叙事游戏，不仅生成针对特定认知领域的游戏场景和挑战，还采用对话策略提供指导和陪伴。
AI.result: 提出了心理学基础的评估协议LETGAMESEVAL，建立全面的康复评估指标。基于LLM的评估者和人类专家评估结果都显示该方法具有显著潜力。
AI.conclusion: LETGAMES为解决广泛可及性和个性化认知训练工具需求提供了有前景的解决方案，代码将在接受后开源。

title: Layerwise Dynamics for In-Context Classification in Transformers
summary: Transformers can perform in-context classification from a few labeled examples, yet the inference-time algorithm remains opaque. We study multi-class linear classification in the hard no-margin regime and make the computation identifiable by enforcing feature- and label-permutation equivariance at every layer. This enables interpretability while maintaining functional equivalence and yields highly structured weights. From these models we extract an explicit depth-indexed recursion: an end-to-end identified, emergent update rule inside a softmax transformer, to our knowledge the first of its kind. Attention matrices formed from mixed feature-label Gram structure drive coupled updates of training points, labels, and the test probe. The resulting dynamics implement a geometry-driven algorithmic motif, which can provably amplify class separation and yields robust expected class alignment.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了Transformer在少样本分类中的内部机制，通过强制特征和标签排列等变性来识别计算过程，提取出深度索引的递归更新规则，揭示了注意力矩阵如何驱动几何驱动的算法动态。
AI.motivation: Transformer能够在少量标记示例下进行上下文分类，但其推理时的内部算法仍然不透明。研究者希望理解Transformer在少样本分类任务中的内部计算机制，特别是如何从训练数据中提取模式并进行分类决策。
AI.method: 研究多类线性分类的硬无间隔机制，通过强制每一层的特征和标签排列等变性来使计算可识别。这种方法在保持功能等价的同时实现可解释性，并产生高度结构化的权重。从这些模型中提取出深度索引的递归：一个端到端可识别的、在softmax Transformer内部涌现的更新规则。
AI.result: 从混合特征-标签Gram结构形成的注意力矩阵驱动训练点、标签和测试探针的耦合更新。得到的动态实现了几何驱动的算法模式，能够可证明地放大类别分离并产生稳健的预期类别对齐。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个在softmax Transformer内部提取出的端到端可识别的涌现更新规则，揭示了Transformer在少样本分类中的内部算法机制，为理解Transformer的内部计算提供了新的视角。

title: ExpertEdit: Learning Skill-Aware Motion Editing from Expert Videos
summary: Visual feedback is critical for motor skill acquisition in sports and rehabilitation, and psychological studies show that observing near-perfect versions of one's own performance accelerates learning more effectively than watching expert demonstrations alone. We propose to enable such personalized feedback by automatically editing a person's motion to reflect higher skill. Existing motion editing approaches are poorly suited for this setting because they assume paired input-output data -- rare and expensive to curate for skill-driven tasks -- and explicit edit guidance at inference. We introduce ExpertEdit, a framework for skill-driven motion editing trained exclusively on unpaired expert video demonstrations. ExpertEdit learns an expert motion prior with a masked language modeling objective that infills masked motion spans with expert-level refinements. At inference, novice motion is masked at skill-critical moments and projected into the learned expert manifold, producing localized skill improvements without paired supervision or manual edit guidance. Across eight diverse techniques and three sports from Ego-Exo4D and Karate Kyokushin, ExpertEdit outperforms state-of-the-art supervised motion editing methods on multiple metrics of motion realism and expert quality. Project page: https://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/expert_edit/ .

AI.tldr: ExpertEdit：一个无需配对数据、通过专家视频学习技能驱动运动编辑的框架，可将新手运动自动提升至专家水平
AI.motivation: 在体育和康复训练中，观察自己接近完美的表现比单纯观看专家示范更能加速学习。现有运动编辑方法需要配对数据且需要明确的编辑指导，这在技能驱动任务中成本高昂且不切实际。
AI.method: 使用掩码语言建模目标学习专家运动先验，在推理时将新手运动在关键技能时刻掩码并投影到学习的专家流形中，产生局部技能改进，无需配对监督或手动编辑指导。
AI.result: 在Ego-Exo4D和Karate Kyokushin的八种不同技术和三种运动中，ExpertEdit在运动真实性和专家质量多个指标上优于最先进的监督运动编辑方法。
AI.conclusion: ExpertEdit通过无配对学习实现了技能驱动的运动编辑，为个性化运动技能提升提供了有效解决方案，在体育训练和康复领域有重要应用价值。

title: Persona Non Grata: Single-Method Safety Evaluation Is Incomplete for Persona-Imbued LLMs
summary: Personality imbuing customizes LLM behavior, but safety evaluations almost always study prompt-based personas alone. We show this is incomplete: prompting and activation steering expose *different*, architecture-dependent vulnerability profiles, and testing with only one method can miss a model's dominant failure mode. Across 5,568 judged conditions on four standard models from three architecture families, persona danger rankings under system prompting are preserved across all architectures ($ρ= 0.71$--$0.96$), but activation-steering vulnerability diverges sharply and cannot be predicted from prompt-side rankings: Llama-3.1-8B is substantially more AS-vulnerable, whereas Gemma-3-27B and Qwen3.5 are more vulnerable to prompting.
