AI.tldr: NTIRE 2026挑战赛聚焦于使用生成模型进行野外短视频用户生成内容（UGC）修复，建立KwaiVIR基准数据集，包含合成和真实退化视频，通过主观和客观双轨评估，12支团队提交了有效解决方案。
AI.motivation: 建立强大实用的基准，用于在复杂真实世界退化条件下修复短视频UGC内容，特别是在基于生成模型的S-UGC视频修复这一新兴范式下。
AI.method: 使用KwaiVIR基准数据集（包含200个合成训练视频、48个野外训练视频、11个验证视频和20个测试视频），通过挑战赛形式组织研究，设置主观评估（用户研究）和客观评估两个轨道。
AI.result: 95支团队注册参赛，12支团队提交了有效的最终解决方案。提交的方法在KwaiVIR基准上表现出色，展示了野外短视频UGC修复领域的鼓舞性进展。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛成功建立了短视频UGC修复的实用基准，促进了基于生成模型的视频修复技术发展，为复杂真实世界退化条件下的视频恢复提供了评估框架。

title: Select Smarter, Not More: Prompt-Aware Evaluation Scheduling with Submodular Guarantees
summary: Automatic prompt optimization (APO) hinges on the quality of its evaluation signal, yet scoring every prompt candidate on the full training set is prohibitively expensive. Existing methods either fix a single evaluation subset before optimization begins (principled but prompt-agnostic) or adapt it heuristically during optimization (flexible but unstable and lacking formal guarantees). We observe that APO naturally maps to an online adaptive testing problem: prompts are examinees, training examples are test items, and the scheduler should select items that best discriminate among the strongest candidates. This insight motivates Prompt-Aware Online Evaluation Scheduling (POES), which integrates an IRT-based discrimination utility, a facility-location coverage term, and switching-cost-aware warm-start swaps into a unified objective that is provably monotone submodular, yielding a (1-1/e) greedy guarantee for cold starts and bounded drift for warm-start updates. An adaptive controller modulates the exploration-exploitation balance based on optimization progress. Across 36 tasks spanning three benchmark families, POES achieves the highest overall average accuracy (6.2 percent improvement over the best baseline) with negligible token overhead (approximately 4 percent) at the same evaluation budget. Moreover, principled selection at k = 20 examples matches or exceeds the performance of naive evaluation at k = 30-50, reducing token consumption by 35-60 percent, showing that selecting smarter is more effective than selecting more. Our results demonstrate that evaluation scheduling is a first-class component of APO, not an implementation detail.

AI.tldr: POES提出了一种基于在线自适应测试的提示优化评估调度方法，通过IRT判别效用、设施选址覆盖和切换成本感知的优化，在相同评估预算下显著提升性能并减少token消耗。
AI.motivation: 自动提示优化(APO)依赖于评估信号的质量，但在完整训练集上评估每个提示候选成本过高。现有方法要么在优化前固定评估子集（原则性强但对提示不敏感），要么在优化过程中启发式调整（灵活但不稳定且缺乏理论保证）。作者观察到APO自然映射到在线自适应测试问题，需要选择最能区分最强候选提示的训练示例。
AI.method: 提出Prompt-Aware Online Evaluation Scheduling (POES)，将IRT（项目反应理论）判别效用、设施选址覆盖项和切换成本感知的预热交换整合到统一目标中。该目标被证明是单调子模函数，为冷启动提供(1-1/e)贪心保证，为预热更新提供有界漂移保证。自适应控制器根据优化进度调节探索-利用平衡。
AI.result: 在36个任务（涵盖三个基准系列）上，POES实现了最高的平均准确率（比最佳基线提高6.2%），在相同评估预算下token开销可忽略（约4%）。在k=20个示例上的原则性选择匹配或超过在k=30-50个示例上的朴素评估性能，token消耗减少35-60%。
AI.conclusion: 评估调度是APO的一等组件而非实现细节。更智能地选择评估示例比选择更多示例更有效，POES通过理论保证的在线自适应调度显著提升了提示优化的效率和效果。

title: Spatio-Temporal Difference Guided Motion Deblurring with the Complementary Vision Sensor
summary: Motion blur arises when rapid scene changes occur during the exposure period, collapsing rich intra-exposure motion into a single RGB frame. Without explicit structural or temporal cues, RGB-only deblurring is highly ill-posed and often fails under extreme motion. Inspired by the human visual system, brain-inspired vision sensors introduce temporally dense information to alleviate this problem. However, event cameras still suffer from event rate saturation under rapid motion, while the event modality entangles edge features and motion cues, which limits their effectiveness. As a recent breakthrough, the complementary vision sensor (CVS), Tianmouc, captures synchronized RGB frames together with high-frame-rate, multi-bit spatial difference (SD, encoding structural edges) and temporal difference (TD, encoding motion cues) data within a single RGB exposure, offering a promising solution for RGB deblurring under extreme dynamic scenes. To fully leverage these complementary modalities, we propose Spatio-Temporal Difference Guided Deblur Net (STGDNet), which adopts a recurrent multi-branch architecture that iteratively encodes and fuses SD and TD sequences to restore structure and color details lost in blurry RGB inputs. Our method outperforms current RGB or event-based approaches in both synthetic CVS dataset and real-world evaluations. Moreover, STGDNet exhibits strong generalization capability across over 100 extreme real-world scenarios. Project page: https://tmcDeblur.github.io/

AI.tldr: STGDNet利用新型互补视觉传感器Tianmouc的时空差分数据，通过循环多分支架构迭代编码融合结构边缘和运动线索，解决极端动态场景下的运动模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB去模糊在极端运动下效果有限，事件相机存在事件率饱和问题且将边缘特征与运动线索耦合。新型CVS传感器Tianmouc能同步捕获RGB帧、高帧率结构差分(SD)和时间差分(TD)数据，为极端动态场景去模糊提供新解决方案。
AI.method: 提出STGDNet（时空差分引导去模糊网络），采用循环多分支架构，迭代编码和融合SD序列（编码结构边缘）和TD序列（编码运动线索），恢复模糊RGB输入中丢失的结构和颜色细节。
AI.result: 在合成CVS数据集和真实世界评估中，STGDNet优于当前RGB或基于事件的方法，并在100多个极端真实场景中展现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 利用互补视觉传感器的时空差分数据，通过专门设计的网络架构，能有效解决极端动态场景下的运动模糊问题，为计算机视觉中的动态场景理解提供了新途径。

title: Dynamic Summary Generation for Interpretable Multimodal Depression Detection
summary: Depression remains widely underdiagnosed and undertreated because stigma and subjective symptom ratings hinder reliable screening. To address this challenge, we propose a coarse-to-fine, multi-stage framework that leverages large language models (LLMs) for accurate and interpretable detection. The pipeline performs binary screening, five-class severity classification, and continuous regression. At each stage, an LLM produces progressively richer clinical summaries that guide a multimodal fusion module integrating text, audio, and video features, yielding predictions with transparent rationale. The system then consolidates all summaries into a concise, human-readable assessment report. Experiments on the E-DAIC and CMDC datasets show significant improvements over state-of-the-art baselines in both accuracy and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型的抑郁症检测框架，通过多阶段（二元筛查、五级严重度分类、连续回归）逐步生成临床摘要，结合文本、音频、视频特征进行多模态融合，最终生成可解释的评估报告。
AI.motivation: 抑郁症诊断面临污名化和主观症状评估的挑战，导致广泛漏诊和治疗不足。需要开发准确且可解释的自动检测系统来改善抑郁症筛查。
AI.method: 提出粗到细的多阶段框架：1) 二元筛查，2) 五级严重度分类，3) 连续回归。每个阶段使用LLM生成逐步丰富的临床摘要，指导多模态融合模块整合文本、音频、视频特征，最后将所有摘要整合为简洁的人类可读评估报告。
AI.result: 在E-DAIC和CMDC数据集上的实验显示，该系统在准确性和可解释性方面均显著优于现有最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功利用LLM进行准确且可解释的抑郁症检测，通过多阶段生成临床摘要和多模态融合，为临床实践提供了透明、可靠的评估工具。

title: CONSCIENTIA: Can LLM Agents Learn to Strategize? Emergent Deception and Trust in a Multi-Agent NYC Simulation
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents, understanding how strategic behavior emerges in multi-agent environments has become an important alignment challenge. We take a neutral empirical stance and construct a controlled environment in which strategic behavior can be directly observed and measured. We introduce a large-scale multi-agent simulation in a simplified model of New York City, where LLM-driven agents interact under opposing incentives. Blue agents aim to reach their destinations efficiently, while Red agents attempt to divert them toward billboard-heavy routes using persuasive language to maximize advertising revenue. Hidden identities make navigation socially mediated, forcing agents to decide when to trust or deceive. We study policy learning through an iterative simulation pipeline that updates agent policies across repeated interaction rounds using Kahneman-Tversky Optimization (KTO). Blue agents are optimized to reduce billboard exposure while preserving navigation efficiency, whereas Red agents adapt to exploit remaining weaknesses. Across iterations, the best Blue policy improves task success from 46.0% to 57.3%, although susceptibility remains high at 70.7%. Later policies exhibit stronger selective cooperation while preserving trajectory efficiency. However, a persistent safety-helpfulness trade-off remains: policies that better resist adversarial steering do not simultaneously maximize task completion. Overall, our results show that LLM agents can exhibit limited strategic behavior, including selective trust and deception, while remaining highly vulnerable to adversarial persuasion.

AI.tldr: 研究通过构建简化的纽约市多智能体模拟环境，探索LLM智能体在对抗性激励下的策略行为，发现智能体能够发展出有限的策略行为（选择性信任和欺骗），但仍高度易受对抗性说服影响。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM越来越多地被部署为自主智能体，理解多智能体环境中策略行为的出现已成为重要的对齐挑战。研究旨在通过受控环境直接观察和测量策略行为。
AI.method: 构建大规模多智能体模拟环境（简化纽约市模型），蓝方智能体追求高效导航，红方智能体试图通过说服性语言将蓝方引导至广告牌密集路线以最大化广告收入。采用迭代模拟管道，通过Kahneman-Tversky优化（KTO）在多轮交互中更新智能体策略。
AI.result: 最佳蓝方策略将任务成功率从46.0%提升至57.3%，但易受性仍高达70.7%。后期策略表现出更强的选择性合作能力，同时保持轨迹效率。但存在持久的安全-帮助性权衡：更好抵抗对抗性引导的策略不能同时最大化任务完成率。
AI.conclusion: LLM智能体能够表现出有限的策略行为（包括选择性信任和欺骗），但仍高度易受对抗性说服影响。研究揭示了多智能体环境中策略行为的复杂性及其对齐挑战。

title: VTC: DNN Compilation with Virtual Tensors for Data Movement Elimination
summary:
With the widening gap between compute and memory operation latencies, data movement optimizations have become increasingly important for DNN compilation. Current optimizations such as layout transformations and operator fusion only target a subset of tensor operators and consequently miss important opportunities for reducing data movement in contemporary DNN workloads, including large language models.
  We introduce VTC, a novel tensor compilation framework that for the first time eliminates all unnecessary data movement by targeting the full spectrum of data movement operators. VTC proposes the concept of virtual tensors to track data movement between compute operators via index mappings rather than expensive physical data transfers to and from global memory, which can seamlessly interoperate with existing computation kernels and handle arbitrary tensor operator compositions. We also introduce a novel data movement elimination algorithm to automatically identify a profitable virtual tensor creation strategy. Evaluation on a variety of DNNs shows that VTC can outperform existing ML compilers by up to 1.93x (1.28x on average) on NVIDIA GPUs with up to 60% (17.5% on average) inference memory savings.

AI.tldr: VTC是一个新颖的张量编译框架，通过虚拟张量概念消除所有不必要的数据移动，显著提升DNN性能并减少内存使用。
AI.motivation: 随着计算与内存操作延迟差距扩大，数据移动优化对DNN编译变得至关重要。现有优化（如布局变换和算子融合）仅针对部分张量算子，无法充分利用当代DNN工作负载（包括大语言模型）中的数据移动优化机会。
AI.method: VTC引入虚拟张量概念，通过索引映射而非昂贵的物理数据传输来跟踪计算算子间的数据移动。该框架与现有计算内核无缝互操作，处理任意张量算子组合，并提出新颖的数据移动消除算法来自动识别有利的虚拟张量创建策略。
AI.result: 在多种DNN上的评估显示，VTC在NVIDIA GPU上比现有ML编译器性能提升最高达1.93倍（平均1.28倍），推理内存节省最高达60%（平均17.5%）。
AI.conclusion: VTC首次通过针对完整数据移动算子谱系来消除所有不必要的数据移动，为DNN编译提供了更全面的数据移动优化解决方案，特别适用于当代复杂工作负载如大语言模型。

title: Learning 3D Representations for Spatial Intelligence from Unposed Multi-View Images
summary: Robust 3D representation learning forms the perceptual foundation of spatial intelligence, enabling downstream tasks in scene understanding and embodied AI. However, learning such representations directly from unposed multi-view images remains challenging. Recent self-supervised methods attempt to unify geometry, appearance, and semantics in a feed-forward manner, but they often suffer from weak geometry induction, limited appearance detail, and inconsistencies between geometry and semantics. We introduce UniSplat, a feed-forward framework designed to address these limitations through three complementary components. First, we propose a dual-masking strategy that strengthens geometry induction in the encoder. By masking both encoder and decoder tokens, and targeting decoder masks toward geometry-rich regions, the model is forced to infer structural information from incomplete visual cues, yielding geometry-aware representations even under unposed inputs. Second, we develop a coarse-to-fine Gaussian splatting strategy that reduces appearance-semantics inconsistencies by progressively refining the radiance field. Finally, to enforce geometric-semantic consistency, we introduce a pose-conditioned recalibration mechanism that interrelates the outputs of multiple heads by re-projecting predicted 3D point and semantic maps into the image plane using estimated camera parameters, and aligning them with corresponding RGB and semantic predictions to ensure cross-task consistency, thereby resolving geometry-semantic mismatches. Together, these components yield unified 3D representations that are robust to unposed, sparse-view inputs and generalize across diverse tasks, laying a perceptual foundation for spatial intelligence.

AI.tldr: UniSplat：一种前馈框架，通过双掩码策略、粗到细的高斯溅射和姿态条件重校准机制，从无姿态多视图图像中学习鲁棒的3D表示，解决了几何、外观和语义之间的不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 从无姿态多视图图像中学习鲁棒的3D表示对于空间智能至关重要，但现有方法存在几何归纳弱、外观细节有限以及几何与语义不一致的问题。需要一种能够统一几何、外观和语义的前馈框架。
AI.method: 1. 双掩码策略：在编码器和解码器令牌上进行掩码，并将解码器掩码针对几何丰富区域，强制模型从不完整的视觉线索中推断结构信息；2. 粗到细高斯溅射策略：逐步细化辐射场，减少外观-语义不一致；3. 姿态条件重校准机制：通过估计的相机参数将预测的3D点和语义图重新投影到图像平面，并与RGB和语义预测对齐，确保跨任务一致性。
AI.result: UniSplat能够从无姿态、稀疏视图输入中学习统一的3D表示，这些表示对下游任务具有鲁棒性，并为空间智能奠定了感知基础。
AI.conclusion: UniSplat通过三个互补组件解决了现有自监督方法在几何归纳、外观细节和跨任务一致性方面的局限性，为从无姿态多视图图像中学习鲁棒3D表示提供了一种有效的前馈框架。

title: CoRe-ECG: Advancing Self-Supervised Representation Learning for 12-Lead ECG via Contrastive and Reconstructive Synergy
summary: Accurate interpretation of electrocardiogram (ECG) remains challenging due to the scarcity of labeled data and the high cost of expert annotation. Self-supervised learning (SSL) offers a promising solution by enabling models to learn expressive representations from unlabeled signals. Existing ECG SSL methods typically rely on either contrastive learning or reconstructive learning. However, each approach in isolation provides limited supervisory signals and suffers from additional limitations, including non-physiological distortions introduced by naive augmentations and trivial correlations across multiple leads that models may exploit as shortcuts. In this work, we propose CoRe-ECG, a unified contrastive and reconstructive pretraining paradigm that establishes a synergistic interaction between global semantic modeling and local structural learning. CoRe-ECG aligns global representations during reconstruction, enabling instance-level discriminative signals to guide local waveform recovery. To further enhance pretraining, we introduce Frequency Dynamic Augmentation (FDA) to adaptively perturb ECG signals based on their frequency-domain importance, and Spatio-Temporal Dual Masking (STDM) to break linear dependencies across leads, increasing the difficulty of reconstructive tasks. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple downstream ECG datasets. Ablation studies further demonstrate the necessity and complementarity of each component. This approach provides a robust and physiologically meaningful representation learning framework for ECG analysis.

AI.tldr: CoRe-ECG：一种结合对比学习和重构学习的自监督心电图分析框架，通过频率动态增强和时空双重掩码提升表示学习效果
AI.motivation: 心电图（ECG）标注数据稀缺且专家标注成本高，现有自监督学习方法（对比学习或重构学习）存在局限性：单独使用时监督信号有限，数据增强可能引入非生理性失真，模型可能利用多导联间的简单相关性作为捷径
AI.method: 提出CoRe-ECG统一框架，结合对比学习和重构学习，实现全局语义建模与局部结构学习的协同交互；引入频率动态增强（FDA）基于频域重要性自适应扰动ECG信号；提出时空双重掩码（STDM）打破导联间的线性依赖关系
AI.result: 在多个下游ECG数据集上达到最先进性能；消融研究证明各组件必要性和互补性
AI.conclusion: CoRe-ECG为ECG分析提供了稳健且具有生理学意义的表示学习框架，通过对比与重构的协同学习解决了现有方法的局限性

title: Rein3D: Reinforced 3D Indoor Scene Generation with Panoramic Video Diffusion Models
summary: The growing demand for Embodied AI and VR applications has highlighted the need for synthesizing high-quality 3D indoor scenes from sparse inputs. However, existing approaches struggle to infer massive amounts of missing geometry in large unseen areas while maintaining global consistency, often producing locally plausible but globally inconsistent reconstructions. We present Rein3D, a framework that reconstructs full 360-degree indoor environments by coupling explicit 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with temporally coherent priors from video diffusion models. Our approach follows a "restore-and-refine" paradigm: we employ a radial exploration strategy to render imperfect panoramic videos along trajectories starting from the origin, effectively uncovering occluded regions from a coarse 3DGS initialization. These sequences are restored by a panoramic video-to-video diffusion model and further enhanced via video super-resolution to synthesize high-fidelity geometry and textures. Finally, these refined videos serve as pseudo-ground truths to update the global 3D Gaussian field. To support this task, we construct PanoV2V-15K, a dataset of over 15K paired clean and degraded panoramic videos for diffusion-based scene restoration. Experiments demonstrate that Rein3D produces photorealistic and globally consistent 3D scenes and significantly improves long-range camera exploration compared with existing baselines.

AI.tldr: Rein3D：一个通过耦合3D高斯泼溅与视频扩散模型先验，从稀疏输入重建完整360度室内场景的框架，采用"恢复-细化"范式，显著提升全局一致性和长距离相机探索能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在从稀疏输入合成高质量3D室内场景时，难以推断大面积缺失几何并保持全局一致性，通常产生局部合理但全局不一致的重建结果。随着具身AI和VR应用需求的增长，需要更好的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用"恢复-细化"范式：1) 使用径向探索策略从原点沿轨迹渲染不完美的全景视频，揭示被遮挡区域；2) 通过全景视频到视频扩散模型恢复序列，并通过视频超分辨率增强；3) 将细化后的视频作为伪真值更新全局3D高斯场。构建了包含15K对清洁与退化全景视频的数据集PanoV2V-15K。
AI.result: 实验表明Rein3D能够生成逼真且全局一致的3D场景，相比现有基线显著改善了长距离相机探索能力。
AI.conclusion: Rein3D通过结合显式3D表示与扩散模型先验，有效解决了从稀疏输入重建完整室内场景的挑战，为具身AI和VR应用提供了高质量的3D环境合成方案。

title: The Missing Knowledge Layer in Cognitive Architectures for AI Agents
summary: The two most influential cognitive architecture frameworks for AI agents, CoALA [21] and JEPA [12], both lack an explicit Knowledge layer with its own persistence semantics. This gap produces a category error: systems apply cognitive decay to factual claims, or treat facts and experiences with identical update mechanics. We survey persistence semantics across existing memory systems and identify eight convergence points, from Karpathy's LLM Knowledge Base [10] to the BEAM benchmark's near-zero contradiction-resolution scores [22], all pointing to related architectural gaps. We propose a four-layer decom position (Knowledge, Memory, Wisdom, Intelligence) where each layer has fundamentally different persistence semantics: indefinite supersession, Ebbinghaus decay, evidence-gated revision, and ephemeral inference respectively. Companion implementations in Python and Rust demonstrate the architectural separation is feasible. We borrow terminology from cognitive science as a useful analogy (the Knowledge/Memory distinction echoes Tulving's trichotomy), but our layers are engineering constructs justified by persistence-semantics requirements, not by neural architecture. We argue that these distinctions demand distinct persistence semantics in engineering implementations, and that no current framework or system provides this.

AI.tldr: 论文提出四层认知架构（知识、记忆、智慧、智能），每层具有不同的持久性语义，解决了现有AI智能体框架中知识层缺失的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AI智能体认知架构（如CoALA和JEPA）缺乏明确的知识层及其持久性语义，导致系统错误地将认知衰减应用于事实主张，或以相同机制处理事实和经验。
AI.method: 1. 调研现有记忆系统的持久性语义，识别八个收敛点；2. 提出四层分解架构（知识、记忆、智慧、智能），每层具有不同的持久性语义；3. 在Python和Rust中实现配套实现，证明架构分离的可行性。
AI.result: 1. 识别出现有系统中的架构差距；2. 提出的四层架构为不同认知内容提供了适当的持久性语义；3. 实现证明架构分离在工程上是可行的。
AI.conclusion: 认知架构需要区分不同层次的持久性语义，当前框架和系统均未提供这种区分，提出的四层架构解决了这一问题。

title: ProGAL-VLA: Grounded Alignment through Prospective Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision language action (VLA) models enable generalist robotic agents but often exhibit language ignorance, relying on visual shortcuts and remaining insensitive to instruction changes. We present Prospective Grounding and Alignment VLA (ProGAL-VLA), which constructs a 3D entity-centric graph (GSM), uses a slow planner to produce symbolic sub-goals, and aligns them with grounded entities via a Grounding Alignment Contrastive (GAC) loss. All actions are conditioned on a verified goal embedding $g_t$, whose attention entropy provides an intrinsic ambiguity signal. On LIBERO-Plus, ProGAL-VLA increases robustness under robot perturbations from 30.3 to 71.5 percent, reduces language ignorance by 3x-4x, and improves entity retrieval from 0.41 to 0.71 Recall@1. On the Custom Ambiguity Benchmark, it reaches AUROC 0.81 (vs. 0.52), AUPR 0.79, and raises clarification on ambiguous inputs from 0.09 to 0.81 without harming unambiguous success. The verification bottleneck increases mutual information of language-actions, the GAC loss imposes an entity-level InfoNCE bound, and attention entropy yields calibrated selective prediction, indicating that explicit verified grounding is an effective path toward instruction-sensitive, ambiguity-aware agents.

AI.tldr: ProGAL-VLA通过构建3D实体图、慢速规划器生成符号子目标、以及Grounding Alignment Contrastive损失，解决了VLA模型的语言忽视问题，提高了机器人对指令变化的敏感性和模糊性感知能力。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言动作（VLA）模型存在语言忽视问题，依赖视觉捷径，对指令变化不敏感。需要开发能够真正理解语言指令、感知模糊性并做出相应反应的机器人智能体。
AI.method: 1) 构建3D实体中心图（GSM）；2) 使用慢速规划器生成符号子目标；3) 通过Grounding Alignment Contrastive（GAC）损失对齐符号子目标与实体；4) 所有动作基于验证的目标嵌入$g_t$；5) 利用注意力熵提供内在模糊性信号。
AI.result: 在LIBERO-Plus上：机器人扰动下的鲁棒性从30.3%提升到71.5%；语言忽视减少3-4倍；实体检索Recall@1从0.41提升到0.71。在Custom Ambiguity Benchmark上：AUROC从0.52提升到0.81；AUPR达到0.79；模糊输入上的澄清请求从0.09提升到0.81。
AI.conclusion: 显式验证的grounding是构建指令敏感、模糊性感知智能体的有效途径。验证瓶颈增加了语言-动作的互信息，GAC损失施加了实体级的InfoNCE约束，注意力熵提供了校准的选择性预测。

title: Improving understanding and trust in AI: How users benefit from interval-based counterfactual explanations
summary: Experimental user studies evaluating the effectiveness of different subtypes of post-hoc explanations for black-box models are largely nonexistent. Therefore, the aim of this study was to investigate and evaluate how different types of counterfactual explanations, namely single point explanations and interval-based explanations, affect both model understanding and (demonstrated) trust. We conducted an online user study using a within-subjects experimental design, where the experimental arms were (i) no explanation (control), (ii) feature importance scores, (iii) point counterfactual explanations, and (iv) interval counterfactual explanations. Our results clearly show the superiority of interval explanations over other tested explanation types in increasing both model understanding and demonstrated trust in the AI. We could not support findings of some previous studies showing an effect of point counterfactual explanations compared to the control group. Our results further highlight the role individual differences in, for example, cognitive style or personality, in explanation effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 研究比较了不同反事实解释类型（单点解释 vs 区间解释）对用户模型理解和信任的影响，发现区间解释效果最佳
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏对黑盒模型事后解释子类型有效性的实验研究，特别是反事实解释的不同形式如何影响用户理解和信任
AI.method: 采用被试内实验设计，比较四种条件：无解释（对照）、特征重要性分数、点反事实解释、区间反事实解释，通过在线用户研究收集数据
AI.result: 区间解释在提升模型理解和AI信任方面显著优于其他解释类型，点反事实解释相比对照组无显著优势，个体差异（认知风格、个性）影响解释效果
AI.conclusion: 区间反事实解释是提升用户模型理解和信任的有效方法，设计解释时应考虑个体差异因素

title: TAPNext++: What's Next for Tracking Any Point (TAP)?
comment: 8 pages, will be publised at CVPR Findings 2026, Website https://tap-next-plus-plus.github.io
summary: Tracking-Any-Point (TAP) models aim to track any point through a video which is a crucial task in AR/XR and robotics applications. The recently introduced TAPNext approach proposes an end-to-end, recurrent transformer architecture to track points frame-by-frame in a purely online fashion -- demonstrating competitive performance at minimal latency. However, we show that TAPNext struggles with longer video sequences and also frequently fails to re-detect query points that reappear after being occluded or leaving the frame. In this work, we present TAPNext++, a model that tracks points in sequences that are orders of magnitude longer while preserving the low memory and compute footprint of the architecture. We train the recurrent video transformer using several data-driven solutions, including training on long 1024-frame sequences enabled by sequence parallelism techniques. We highlight that re-detection performance is a blind spot in the current literature and introduce a new metric, Re-Detection Average Jaccard ($AJ_{RD}$), to explicitly evaluate tracking on re-appearing points. To improve re-detection of points, we introduce tailored geometric augmentations, such as periodic roll that simulates point re-entries, and supervising occluded points. We demonstrate that recurrent transformers can be substantially improved for point tracking and set a new state-of-the-art on multiple benchmarks. Model and code can be found at https://tap-next-plus-plus.github.io.

AI.tldr: TAPNext++ 改进了 TAPNext 模型，通过序列并行技术支持长序列训练（1024帧），引入新的重检测评估指标 AJ_RD，并采用几何增强（如周期性滚动）来提升点重检测能力，在多个基准测试中达到新的SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有TAPNext模型在长视频序列中表现不佳，且对遮挡后重新出现的点重检测能力弱。这些限制影响了AR/XR和机器人应用中点跟踪的实用性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 1) 使用序列并行技术训练1024帧长序列；2) 引入新的重检测评估指标AJ_RD；3) 采用几何增强（周期性滚动）模拟点重新进入；4) 监督被遮挡点的训练；5) 保持循环Transformer架构的低内存和计算开销。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到新的SOTA，显著提升了长序列跟踪和点重检测能力，同时保持了架构的低延迟特性。
AI.conclusion: 循环Transformer架构可以通过数据驱动的方法显著改进点跟踪性能，特别是在长序列和点重检测方面。提出的AJ_RD指标填补了当前文献的评估空白。

title: Learning from Contrasts: Synthesizing Reasoning Paths from Diverse Search Trajectories
summary: Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) has been widely used for automated reasoning data exploration, but current supervision extraction methods remain inefficient. Standard approaches retain only the single highest-reward trajectory, discarding the comparative signals present in the many explored paths. Here we introduce \textbf{Contrastive Reasoning Path Synthesis (CRPS)}, a framework that transforms supervision extraction from a filtering process into a synthesis procedure. CRPS uses a structured reflective process to analyze the differences between high- and low-quality search trajectories, extracting explicit information about strategic pivots and local failure modes. These insights guide the synthesis of reasoning chains that incorporate success patterns while avoiding identified pitfalls. We show empirically that models fine-tuned on just 60K CRPS-synthesized examples match or exceed the performance of baselines trained on 590K examples derived from standard rejection sampling, a 20$\times$ reduction in dataset size. Furthermore, CRPS improves generalization on out-of-domain benchmarks, demonstrating that learning from the contrast between success and failure produces more transferable reasoning capabilities than learning from success alone.

AI.tldr: CRPS框架通过对比高质量和低质量搜索轨迹的差异，合成推理链，显著减少监督数据需求，提升模型泛化能力
AI.motivation: 当前MCTS监督提取方法效率低下，仅保留最高奖励轨迹，丢弃了大量探索路径中的对比信号。需要一种更高效的方法来利用搜索过程中的比较信息。
AI.method: 提出对比推理路径合成(CRPS)框架，通过结构化反思过程分析高低质量搜索轨迹的差异，提取战略转折点和局部失败模式的明确信息，指导合成既包含成功模式又避免已识别陷阱的推理链。
AI.result: 仅用6万个CRPS合成示例微调的模型，性能匹配或超过使用59万个标准拒绝采样示例训练的基线，数据量减少20倍。CRPS还提高了在领域外基准测试上的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 从成功和失败的对比中学习比仅从成功中学习能产生更具可迁移性的推理能力，CRPS将监督提取从过滤过程转变为合成过程，显著提高了数据效率。

title: CoFusion: Multispectral and Hyperspectral Image Fusion via Spectral Coordinate Attention
summary: Multispectral and Hyperspectral Image Fusion (MHIF) aims to reconstruct high-resolution images by integrating low-resolution hyperspectral images (LRHSI) and high-resolution multispectral images (HRMSI). However, existing methods face limitations in modeling cross-scale interactions and spatial-spectral collaboration, making it difficult to achieve an optimal trade-off between spatial detail enhancement and spectral fidelity. To address this challenge, we propose CoFusion: a unified spatial-spectral collaborative fusion framework that explicitly models cross-scale and cross-modal dependencies. Specifically, a Multi-Scale Generator (MSG) is designed to construct a three-level pyramidal architecture, enabling the effective integration of global semantics and local details. Within each scale, a dual-branch strategy is employed: the Spatial Coordinate-Aware Mixing module (SpaCAM) is utilized to capture multi-scale spatial contexts, while the Spectral Coordinate-Aware Mixing module (SpeCAM) enhances spectral representations through frequency decomposition and coordinate mixing. Furthermore, we introduce the Spatial-Spectral Cross-Fusion Module (SSCFM) to perform dynamic cross-modal alignment and complementary feature fusion. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that CoFusion consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving superior performance in both spatial reconstruction and spectral consistency.

AI.tldr: CoFusion：一种统一的空间-光谱协同融合框架，通过多尺度生成器和坐标感知混合模块，解决多光谱与高光谱图像融合中的跨尺度交互和空间-光谱协作问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多光谱与高光谱图像融合方法在建模跨尺度交互和空间-光谱协作方面存在局限，难以在空间细节增强和光谱保真度之间达到最佳平衡。
AI.method: 提出CoFusion框架：1）多尺度生成器构建三级金字塔架构；2）空间坐标感知混合模块捕获多尺度空间上下文；3）光谱坐标感知混合模块通过频率分解和坐标混合增强光谱表示；4）空间-光谱交叉融合模块实现动态跨模态对齐和互补特征融合。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，CoFusion在空间重建和光谱一致性方面均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CoFusion通过显式建模跨尺度和跨模态依赖关系，实现了多光谱与高光谱图像融合的优越性能。

title: From Agent Loops to Structured Graphs:A Scheduler-Theoretic Framework for LLM Agent Execution
summary: The dominant paradigm for building LLM based agents is the Agent Loop, an iterative cycle where a single language model decides what to do next by reading an ever growing context window. This paradigm has three structural weaknesses: implicit dependencies between steps, unbounded recovery loops, and mutable execution history that complicates debugging. We characterize the Agent Loop as a single ready unit scheduler: at any moment, at most one executable unit is active, and the choice of which unit to activate comes from opaque LLM inference rather than an inspectable policy. This perspective places Agent Loops and graph based execution engines on a single semantic continuum. We propose SGH, Structured Graph Harness, which lifts control flow from implicit context into an explicit static DAG. SGH makes three commitments: execution plans are immutable within a plan version, planning execution and recovery are separated into three layers, and recovery follows a strict escalation protocol. These choices trade some expressiveness for controllability, verifiability, and implementability. Our contributions are fourfold: a scheduler unified framework that applies classical scheduling theory to LLM agent execution and identifies challenges introduced by non deterministic LLM nodes; a trade off analysis of controllability, expressiveness, and implementability across 70 surveyed systems; a formal specification including a node state machine with termination and soundness guarantees; and an attributable experimental framework with a seven group design for future validation. This is a position paper and design proposal. We provide a theoretical framework, design analysis, and experimental protocol, not a production implementation or empirical results.

AI.tldr: 提出SGH（结构化图框架），将LLM智能体从传统的Agent Loop循环范式转变为基于静态DAG的显式控制流，以解决隐式依赖、无限恢复循环和可变执行历史等问题。
AI.motivation: 当前基于LLM的智能体主要采用Agent Loop范式，存在三个结构性问题：1) 步骤间的隐式依赖关系；2) 无界的恢复循环；3) 可变的执行历史导致调试困难。这些问题源于Agent Loop作为单就绪单元调度器的本质，控制流决策依赖于不透明的LLM推理而非可检查的策略。
AI.method: 提出SGH框架，将控制流从隐式上下文提升到显式静态DAG。SGH做出三个承诺：1) 执行计划在版本内不可变；2) 规划、执行和恢复分离为三层；3) 恢复遵循严格的升级协议。通过牺牲部分表达能力来换取可控性、可验证性和可实现性。
AI.result: 这是一篇立场论文和设计提案，提供了理论框架、设计分析和实验协议，但没有生产实现或实证结果。主要贡献包括：调度器统一框架、对70个系统的可控性-表达能力-可实现性权衡分析、包含终止和正确性保证的形式化规范、以及用于未来验证的七组实验设计框架。
AI.conclusion: SGH框架为LLM智能体执行提供了更可控、可验证的替代方案，将Agent Loop和图执行引擎置于同一语义连续体上。通过显式静态DAG结构，解决了传统Agent Loop范式的结构弱点，为LLM智能体系统的可靠性和可调试性提供了理论基础。

title: GeoMeld: Toward Semantically Grounded Foundation Models for Remote Sensing
comment: Accepted at CVPR Workshop 2026; 8 pages, 6 figures
summary: Effective foundation modeling in remote sensing requires spatially aligned heterogeneous modalities coupled with semantically grounded supervision, yet such resources remain limited at scale. We present GeoMeld, a large-scale multimodal dataset with approximately 2.5 million spatially aligned samples. The dataset spans diverse modalities and resolutions and is constructed under a unified alignment protocol for modality-aware representation learning. GeoMeld provides semantically grounded language supervision through an agentic captioning framework that synthesizes and verifies annotations from spectral signals, terrain statistics, and structured geographic metadata, encoding measurable cross-modality relationships within textual descriptions. To leverage this dataset, we introduce GeoMeld-FM, a pretraining framework that combines multi-pretext masked autoencoding over aligned modalities, JEPA representation learning, and caption-vision contrastive alignment. This joint objective enables the learned representation space to capture both reliable cross-sensor physical consistency and grounded semantics. Experiments demonstrate consistent gains in downstream transfer and cross-sensor robustness. Together, GeoMeld and GeoMeld-FM establish a scalable reference framework for semantically grounded multi-modal foundation modeling in remote sensing.

AI.tldr: GeoMeld是一个大规模遥感多模态数据集（约250万空间对齐样本），配合GeoMeld-FM预训练框架，通过多模态掩码自编码、JEPA表示学习和字幕-视觉对比对齐，实现遥感领域语义基础的多模态基础模型。
AI.motivation: 遥感领域缺乏大规模空间对齐的异构模态数据和语义基础监督资源，限制了基础模型的发展。现有数据集在模态对齐、语义标注和可扩展性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 1. 构建GeoMeld数据集：约250万空间对齐样本，涵盖多种模态和分辨率，采用统一对齐协议；2. 智能标注框架：从光谱信号、地形统计和结构化地理元数据合成和验证语义标注；3. GeoMeld-FM预训练框架：结合多模态掩码自编码、JEPA表示学习和字幕-视觉对比对齐的联合目标。
AI.result: 实验显示在下游任务迁移和跨传感器鲁棒性方面获得一致提升。GeoMeld和GeoMeld-FM为遥感领域语义基础的多模态基础模型建立了可扩展的参考框架。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过大规模对齐数据集和联合预训练框架，解决了遥感多模态基础模型的关键瓶颈，实现了可靠的跨传感器物理一致性和语义基础表示学习。

title: Beyond RAG for Cyber Threat Intelligence: A Systematic Evaluation of Graph-Based and Agentic Retrieval
summary: Cyber threat intelligence (CTI) analysts must answer complex questions over large collections of narrative security reports. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems help language models access external knowledge, but traditional vector retrieval often struggles with queries that require reasoning over relationships between entities such as threat actors, malware, and vulnerabilities. This limitation arises because relevant evidence is often distributed across multiple text fragments and documents. Knowledge graphs address this challenge by enabling structured multi-hop reasoning through explicit representations of entities and relationships. However, multiple retrieval paradigms, including graph-based, agentic, and hybrid approaches, have emerged with different assumptions and failure modes. It remains unclear how these approaches compare in realistic CTI settings and when graph grounding improves performance. We present a systematic evaluation of four RAG architectures for CTI analysis: standard vector retrieval, graph-based retrieval over a CTI knowledge graph, an agentic variant that repairs failed graph queries, and a hybrid approach combining graph queries with text retrieval. We evaluate these systems on 3,300 CTI question-answer pairs spanning factual lookups, multi-hop relational queries, analyst-style synthesis questions, and unanswerable cases. Results show that graph grounding improves performance on structured factual queries. The hybrid graph-text approach improves answer quality by up to 35 percent on multi-hop questions compared to vector RAG, while maintaining more reliable performance than graph-only systems.

AI.tldr: 系统评估了四种RAG架构在CTI分析中的表现：标准向量检索、基于知识图谱的检索、修复失败图查询的代理变体、以及结合图谱与文本检索的混合方法。混合方法在多跳问题上比向量RAG提升35%，在结构化事实查询中图谱基础化表现更好。
AI.motivation: 网络威胁情报分析师需要在大量安全报告中进行复杂查询。传统向量检索在处理需要实体间关系推理的查询时存在局限，因为相关证据通常分布在多个文本片段和文档中。知识图谱通过显式表示实体和关系支持结构化多跳推理，但不同检索范式（图谱、代理、混合）在真实CTI环境中的比较尚不明确。
AI.method: 系统评估了四种RAG架构：1) 标准向量检索；2) 基于CTI知识图谱的图谱检索；3) 代理变体（修复失败的图谱查询）；4) 混合方法（结合图谱查询与文本检索）。在3,300个CTI问答对上评估，涵盖事实查找、多跳关系查询、分析师风格综合问题和不可回答案例。
AI.result: 图谱基础化在结构化事实查询中提升性能。混合图谱-文本方法在多跳问题上比向量RAG提升35%的答案质量，同时比纯图谱系统保持更可靠的性能。图谱检索在关系推理方面有优势，但混合方法综合了不同范式的优点。
AI.conclusion: 对于需要实体关系推理的CTI分析任务，结合图谱结构化推理和文本检索灵活性的混合RAG方法表现最佳。图谱基础化对结构化查询有效，但需要与文本检索结合以提高可靠性。这为复杂领域特定问答系统的设计提供了重要见解。

title: Exploring Structural Complexity in Normative RAG with Graph-based approaches: A case study on the ETSI Standards
summary:
Industrial standards and normative documents exhibit intricate hierarchical structures, domain-specific lexicons, and extensive cross-referential dependencies, which making it challenging to process them directly by Large Language Models (LLMs).
  While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) provides a computationally efficient alternative to LLM fine-tuning, standard "vanilla" vector-based retrieval may fail to capture the latent structural and relational features intrinsic in normative documents.
  With the objective of shedding light on the most promising technique for building high-performance RAG solutions for normative, standards, and regulatory documents, this paper investigates the efficacy of Graph RAG architectures, which represent information as interconnected nodes, thus moving from simple semantic similarity toward a more robust, relation-aware retrieval mechanism.
  Despite the promise of graph-based techniques, there is currently a lack of empirical evidence as to which is the optimal indexing strategy for technical standards. Therefore, to help solve this knowledge gap, we propose a specialized RAG methodology tailored to the unique structure and lexical characteristics of standards and regulatory documents.
  Moreover, to keep our investigation grounded, we focus on well-known public standards, such as the ETSI EN 301 489 series. We evaluate several lightweight and low-latency strategies designed to embed document structure directly into the retrieval workflow.
  The considered approaches are rigorously tested against a custom synthesized Q&A dataset, facilitating a quantitative performance analysis. Our experimental results demonstrate that the incorporation of structural and lexical information into the index can enhance, at least to some extent, retrieval performance, providing a scalable framework for automated normative and standards elaboration.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了针对工业标准和规范性文档的图RAG架构，通过将文档结构信息融入检索流程来提升检索性能，相比传统向量检索能更好地捕捉文档的层次结构和关系特征。
AI.motivation: 工业标准和规范性文档具有复杂的层次结构、领域特定词汇和大量交叉引用，直接使用大语言模型处理存在困难。虽然RAG提供了计算高效的替代方案，但传统的向量检索方法难以捕捉文档中潜在的结构和关系特征。
AI.method: 提出专门针对标准和监管文档的RAG方法，将文档结构直接嵌入检索工作流程。使用图RAG架构，将信息表示为互连节点，从简单的语义相似性转向更稳健的关系感知检索机制。在ETSI EN 301 489系列等公共标准上进行评估，测试多种轻量级低延迟策略。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，将结构和词汇信息融入索引可以在一定程度上提升检索性能，为自动化规范和标准制定提供了可扩展的框架。
AI.conclusion: 图RAG架构相比传统向量检索更适合处理规范性文档，结构信息的融入能有效提升检索效果，为标准和监管文档的高性能RAG解决方案提供了有前景的技术方向。

title: COREY: A Prototype Study of Entropy-Guided Operator Fusion with Hadamard Reparameterization for Selective State Space Models
summary: State Space Models (SSMs), represented by the Mamba family, provide linear-time sequence modeling and are attractive for long-context inference. Yet practical deployments remain memory-bandwidth limited because selective state updates are often decomposed into fragmented kernels with repeated intermediate tensor materialization. We present COREY, a prototype framework that combines memory-aware operator fusion with Hadamard-based feature reparameterization. Activation entropy, estimated with fixed-width histograms, is used as a runtime scheduling statistic to place fusion boundaries and choose tile sizes. To regularize heavy-tailed activations, we absorb normalized Hadamard transforms into linear projections, preserving functional equivalence while reducing peak-coordinate concentration. In a controlled prototype study over heavy-tailed SSM activations, COREY consistently reduces proxy latency, improves throughput, and lowers DRAM traffic relative to unfused and fixed-depth baselines. Low-bit results are reported only through a hand-crafted stability proxy and are intended as diagnostic evidence rather than checkpoint-level quality claims. Code repository: https://github.com/mabo1215/COREY_Transformer.git.

AI.tldr: COREY是一个针对状态空间模型（如Mamba）的内存感知算子融合框架，通过Hadamard重参数化和基于激活熵的运行时调度来优化内存带宽受限的推理部署。
AI.motivation: 状态空间模型（如Mamba系列）虽然提供线性时间序列建模能力，但在实际部署中面临内存带宽限制问题。选择性状态更新通常被分解为碎片化的内核，导致重复的中间张量物化，从而影响推理效率。
AI.method: COREY结合内存感知算子融合与Hadamard基特征重参数化。使用固定宽度直方图估计激活熵作为运行时调度统计量，用于确定融合边界和分块大小。通过将归一化Hadamard变换吸收到线性投影中来正则化重尾激活分布。
AI.result: 在针对重尾SSM激活的受控原型研究中，COREY相对于未融合和固定深度基线，持续降低了代理延迟、提高了吞吐量并减少了DRAM流量。低比特结果仅通过手工制作的稳定性代理报告，作为诊断证据而非检查点级别的质量声明。
AI.conclusion: COREY框架通过内存感知算子融合和激活重参数化，有效解决了状态空间模型在实际部署中的内存带宽限制问题，为高效的长上下文推理提供了优化方案。

title: Escaping the Context Bottleneck: Active Context Curation for LLM Agents via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle with long-horizon tasks due to the "context bottleneck" and the "lost-in-the-middle" phenomenon, where accumulated noise from verbose environments degrades reasoning over multi-turn interactions. To address this issue, we introduce a symbiotic framework that decouples context management from task execution. Our architecture pairs a lightweight, specialized policy model, ContextCurator, with a powerful frozen foundation model, TaskExecutor. Trained via reinforcement learning, ContextCurator actively reduces information entropy in the working memory. It aggressively prunes environmental noise while preserving reasoning anchors, that is, sparse data points that are critical for future deductions. On WebArena, our framework improves the success rate of Gemini-3.0-flash from 36.4% to 41.2% while reducing token consumption by 8.8% (from 47.4K to 43.3K). On DeepSearch, it achieves a 57.1% success rate, compared with 53.9%, while reducing token consumption by a factor of 8. Remarkably, a 7B ContextCurator matches the context management performance of GPT-4o, providing a scalable and computationally efficient paradigm for autonomous long-horizon agents.

AI.tldr: 提出一个解耦上下文管理与任务执行的共生框架，使用轻量级ContextCurator模型主动管理上下文，配合冻结的TaskExecutor模型，提升长视野任务性能并减少token消耗。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在处理长视野任务时面临"上下文瓶颈"和"中间迷失"问题，冗长环境中的噪声积累会损害多轮交互中的推理能力。
AI.method: 采用共生框架，将上下文管理与任务执行解耦：轻量级专门化策略模型ContextCurator通过强化学习训练，主动降低工作记忆中的信息熵，积极修剪环境噪声同时保留推理锚点；配合强大的冻结基础模型TaskExecutor执行任务。
AI.result: 在WebArena上，将Gemini-3.0-flash的成功率从36.4%提升到41.2%，同时token消耗减少8.8%；在DeepSearch上达到57.1%成功率（相比53.9%），token消耗减少8倍；7B的ContextCurator匹配GPT-4o的上下文管理性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自主长视野智能体提供了可扩展且计算高效的范式，通过专门化上下文管理显著提升LLM在复杂任务中的性能。

title: Self-supervised Pretraining of Cell Segmentation Models
summary: Instance segmentation enables the analysis of spatial and temporal properties of cells in microscopy images by identifying the pixels belonging to each cell. However, progress is constrained by the scarcity of high-quality labeled microscopy datasets. Many recent approaches address this challenge by initializing models with segmentation-pretrained weights from large-scale natural-image models such as Segment Anything Model (SAM). However, representations learned from natural images often encode objectness and texture priors that are poorly aligned with microscopy data, leading to degraded performance under domain shift. We propose DINOCell, a self-supervised framework for cell instance segmentation that leverages representations from DINOv2 and adapts them to microscopy through continued self-supervised training on unlabeled cell images prior to supervised fine-tuning. On the LIVECell benchmark, DINOCell achieves a SEG score of 0.784, improving by 10.42% over leading SAM-based models, and demonstrates strong zero-shot performance on three out-of-distribution microscopy datasets. These results highlight the benefits of domain-adapted self-supervised pretraining for robust cell segmentation.

AI.tldr: DINOCell：一种用于细胞实例分割的自监督框架，通过DINOv2表示和领域自适应训练，在显微镜图像上超越SAM-based方法
AI.motivation: 解决高质量标记显微镜数据集稀缺的问题，以及自然图像预训练模型（如SAM）在显微镜领域迁移时因对象性和纹理先验不匹配导致的性能下降
AI.method: 提出DINOCell框架：1）利用DINOv2的表示；2）在未标记的细胞图像上进行持续的自监督训练以实现领域适应；3）最后进行监督微调
AI.result: 在LIVECell基准测试中达到0.784的SEG分数，比领先的SAM-based模型提升10.42%，并在三个分布外显微镜数据集上表现出强大的零样本性能
AI.conclusion: 领域适应的自监督预训练对于鲁棒的细胞分割具有显著优势，特别是在处理显微镜图像这种与自然图像差异较大的领域时

title: Three Roles, One Model: Role Orchestration at Inference Time to Close the Performance Gap Between Small and Large Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents show promise on realistic tool-use tasks, but deploying capable agents on modest hardware remains challenging. We study whether inference-time scaffolding alone, without any additional training compute, can improve the performance of a small model in complex multi-step environments. Operating on a single 24\,GB GPU, we evaluate Qwen3-8B under both full-precision (FP16, 12K context) and 4-bit quantized (AWQ, 32K context) configurations. Without any intervention, the raw model achieves just 5.4\% (FP16) and 3.0\% (AWQ) task goal completion. Guided by a systematic failure mode analysis, we introduce a three-tier inference scaffolding pipeline that deploys the same frozen model in three distinct roles: (1) a summarization model that preserves critical artifacts (tokens, credentials, API responses) while compressing dialogue history; (2) the main agent model that reasons over the compressed context; and (3) an isolated correction model that reviews and revises the agent's code output without access to conversation history, breaking repetitive failure loops. Applied to the same unmodified model, this scaffolding yields 8.9\% (FP16) and 5.9\% (AWQ) task goal completion, roughly doubling performance in both settings, with particularly strong gains on difficulty-1 tasks (15.8\%$\to$26.3\% FP16; 5.3\%$\to$14.0\% AWQ). On full-precision inference, our scaffolded 8B model surpasses DeepSeek-Coder 33B Instruct (7.1\%) from the original AppWorld evaluation, demonstrating that structured inference-time interventions can make small models competitive with systems 4$\times$ their size. We formalize the approach as a scaffolded policy over a frozen base model, three invocations of the same weights with different conditioning, drawing connections to test-time compute scaling and action-space shaping in reinforcement learning.

AI.tldr: 通过推理时脚手架技术，在不增加训练计算的情况下，显著提升小型LLM在复杂多步工具使用任务中的性能，使8B模型超越33B模型的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM智能体在现实工具使用任务中表现出潜力，但在有限硬件上部署能力强的智能体仍然具有挑战性。研究是否仅通过推理时脚手架（无需额外训练计算）就能提升小型模型在复杂多步环境中的性能。
AI.method: 提出三层次推理脚手架管道，将同一冻结模型部署在三个不同角色中：1) 摘要模型，压缩对话历史同时保留关键信息；2) 主智能体模型，在压缩上下文中进行推理；3) 独立校正模型，审查和修正智能体的代码输出，打破重复失败循环。所有角色使用相同的模型权重，仅通过不同的条件化实现不同功能。
AI.result: 在单24GB GPU上，Qwen3-8B模型在FP16和AWQ量化配置下，任务完成率分别从5.4%和3.0%提升到8.9%和5.9%，性能大致翻倍。在FP16推理中，脚手架化的8B模型超越了DeepSeek-Coder 33B Instruct（7.1%）的表现。
AI.conclusion: 结构化推理时干预可以使小型模型在性能上与4倍大小的系统竞争，证明了测试时计算扩展的有效性。该方法被形式化为基于冻结基础模型的脚手架策略，为强化学习中的动作空间塑造提供了新思路。

title: How to Design a Compact High-Throughput Video Camera?
summary: High throughput video acquisition is a challenging problem and has been drawing increasing attention. Existing high throughput imaging systems splice hundreds of sub-images/videos into high throughput videos, suffering from extremely high system complexity. Alternatively, with pixel sizes reducing to sub-micrometer levels, integrating ultra-high throughput on a single chip is becoming feasible. Nevertheless, the readout and output transmission speed cannot keep pace with the increasing pixel numbers. To this end, this paper analyzes the strength of gradient cameras in fast readout and efficient representation, and proposes a low-bit gradient camera scheme based on existing technologies that can resolve the readout and transmission bottlenecks for high throughput video imaging. A multi-scale reconstruction CNN is proposed to reconstruct high-resolution images. Extensive experiments on both simulated and real data are conducted to demonstrate the promising quality and feasibility of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出基于梯度相机的低比特方案，解决高吞吐量视频成像的读出和传输瓶颈，使用多尺度重建CNN恢复高分辨率图像
AI.motivation: 现有高吞吐量成像系统通过拼接数百个子图像/视频实现，系统复杂度极高。随着像素尺寸减小到亚微米级，在单芯片上集成超高吞吐量成为可能，但读出和输出传输速度无法跟上像素数量的增长
AI.method: 分析梯度相机在快速读出和高效表示方面的优势，提出基于现有技术的低比特梯度相机方案，设计多尺度重建CNN来重建高分辨率图像
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据上进行广泛实验，证明了所提方法在质量和可行性方面的良好表现
AI.conclusion: 提出的低比特梯度相机方案能够有效解决高吞吐量视频成像的读出和传输瓶颈问题

title: From Attribution to Action: A Human-Centered Application of Activation Steering
summary: Explainable AI (XAI) methods reveal which features influence model predictions, yet provide limited means for practitioners to act on these explanations. Activation steering of components identified via XAI offers a path toward actionable explanations, although its practical utility remains understudied. We introduce an interactive workflow combining SAE-based attribution with activation steering for instance-level analysis of concept usage in vision models, implemented as a web-based tool. Based on this workflow, we conduct semi-structured expert interviews (N=8) with debugging tasks on CLIP to investigate how practitioners reason about, trust, and apply activation steering. We find that steering enables a shift from inspection to intervention-based hypothesis testing (8/8 participants), with most grounding trust in observed model responses rather than explanation plausibility alone (6/8). Participants adopted systematic debugging strategies dominated by component suppression (7/8) and highlighted risks including ripple effects and limited generalization of instance-level corrections. Overall, activation steering renders interpretability more actionable while raising important considerations for safe and effective use.

AI.tldr: 论文提出结合SAE归因与激活导向的交互式工作流，用于视觉模型概念使用的实例级分析，并通过专家访谈研究实践者如何应用激活导向进行调试。
AI.motivation: 当前可解释AI方法能揭示影响模型预测的特征，但缺乏让实践者基于这些解释采取行动的手段。激活导向提供了可操作解释的路径，但其实际效用尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 引入基于SAE归因与激活导向的交互式工作流，实现为基于Web的工具。通过半结构化专家访谈（N=8），在CLIP模型上进行调试任务，研究实践者如何推理、信任和应用激活导向。
AI.result: 激活导向使实践者从检查转向基于干预的假设测试（8/8参与者），多数信任基于观察到的模型响应而非仅解释合理性（6/8）。参与者采用系统调试策略，以组件抑制为主（7/8），并识别出涟漪效应和实例级修正泛化有限等风险。
AI.conclusion: 激活导向使可解释性更具可操作性，同时提出了安全有效使用的重要考虑因素，包括风险管理和泛化限制。

title: Reproduction Beyond Benchmarks: ConstBERT and ColBERT-v2 Across Backends and Query Distributions
comment: 10 pages, 9 tables. Accepted to the 49th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval (SIGIR 2026)
summary: Reproducibility must validate architectural robustness, not just numerical accuracy. We evaluate ColBERT-v2 and ConstBERT across five dimensions, finding that while ConstBERT reproduces within 0.05% MRR@10 on MS-MARCO, both models show a drop of 86-97% on long, narrative queries (TREC ToT 2025). Ablations prove this failure is architectural: performance plateaus at 20 words because the MaxSim operator's uniform token weighting cannot distinguish signal from filler noise. Furthermore, undocumented backend parameters create an 8-point gap due to ConstBERT's sparse centroid coverage, and fine-tuning with 3x more data actually degrades performance by up to 29%. We conclude that architectural constraints in multi-vector retrieval cannot be overcome by adaptation alone. Code: https://github.com/utshabkg/multi-vector-reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现多向量检索模型（ColBERT-v2和ConstBERT）在长叙事查询上性能大幅下降86-97%，原因是MaxSim算子的均匀token加权无法区分信号与填充噪声，且架构约束无法仅通过适应来克服。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是验证多向量检索模型的架构鲁棒性，而不仅仅是数值准确性。作者关注模型在真实场景（特别是长叙事查询）中的表现，以及架构设计对性能的根本影响。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）在五个维度上评估ColBERT-v2和ConstBERT模型；2）使用MS-MARCO和TREC ToT 2025数据集；3）进行消融实验分析性能下降原因；4）分析MaxSim算子的token加权机制；5）研究未记录的后端参数影响。
AI.result: 主要结果：1）ConstBERT在MS-MARCO上能复现（0.05% MRR@10差异）；2）但在长叙事查询上性能下降86-97%；3）性能在20词后达到平台期；4）MaxSim算子的均匀加权是根本原因；5）未记录参数导致8点性能差距；6）使用3倍数据微调反而使性能下降29%。
AI.conclusion: 结论是多向量检索模型的架构约束无法仅通过适应（如更多数据、参数调整）来克服。MaxSim算子的均匀token加权机制在长文本中无法区分信号与噪声，这是架构层面的根本限制。

title: NTIRE 2026 The Second Challenge on Day and Night Raindrop Removal for Dual-Focused Images: Methods and Results
comment: Accepted by CVPR2026 Workshop; NTIRE 2026 Challenge Report
summary: This paper presents an overview of the NTIRE 2026 Second Challenge on Day and Night Raindrop Removal for Dual-Focused Images. Building upon the success of the first edition, this challenge attracted a wide range of impressive solutions, all developed and evaluated on our real-world Raindrop Clarity dataset~\cite{jin2024raindrop}. For this edition, we adjust the dataset with 14,139 images for training, 407 images for validation, and 593 images for testing. The primary goal of this challenge is to establish a strong and practical benchmark for the removal of raindrops under various illumination and focus conditions. In total, 168 teams have registered for the competition, and 17 teams submitted valid final solutions and fact sheets for the testing phase. The submitted methods achieved strong performance on the Raindrop Clarity dataset, demonstrating the growing progress in this challenging task.

AI.tldr: NTIRE 2026挑战赛聚焦于双焦点图像的日夜雨滴去除任务，在真实雨滴数据集上评估了17个团队的解决方案，建立了实用的雨滴去除基准。
AI.motivation: 建立强大且实用的基准，用于在各种光照和聚焦条件下去除雨滴，推动计算机视觉中雨滴去除技术的发展。
AI.method: 基于真实世界Raindrop Clarity数据集（14,139训练图像，407验证图像，593测试图像）举办挑战赛，吸引了168个团队注册，17个团队提交最终解决方案。
AI.result: 提交的方法在Raindrop Clarity数据集上表现出色，展示了这一具有挑战性任务的持续进展。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛成功建立了雨滴去除的实用基准，吸引了广泛参与，推动了该领域的技术进步。

title: OOM-RL: Out-of-Money Reinforcement Learning Market-Driven Alignment for LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
summary: The alignment of Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) for autonomous software engineering is constrained by evaluator epistemic uncertainty. Current paradigms, such as Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) and AI Feedback (RLAIF), frequently induce model sycophancy, while execution-based environments suffer from adversarial "Test Evasion" by unconstrained agents. In this paper, we introduce an objective alignment paradigm: \textbf{Out-of-Money Reinforcement Learning (OOM-RL)}. By deploying agents into the non-stationary, high-friction reality of live financial markets, we utilize critical capital depletion as an un-hackable negative gradient. Our longitudinal 20-month empirical study (July 2024 -- February 2026) chronicles the system's evolution from a high-turnover, sycophantic baseline to a robust, liquidity-aware architecture. We demonstrate that the undeniable ontological consequences of financial loss forced the MAS to abandon overfitted hallucinations in favor of the \textbf{Strict Test-Driven Agentic Workflow (STDAW)}, which enforces a Byzantine-inspired uni-directional state lock (RO-Lock) anchored to a deterministically verified $\geq 95\%$ code coverage constraint matrix. Our results show that while early iterations suffered severe execution decay, the final OOM-RL-aligned system achieved a stable equilibrium with an annualized Sharpe ratio of 2.06 in its mature phase. We conclude that substituting subjective human preference with rigorous economic penalties provides a robust methodology for aligning autonomous agents in high-stakes, real-world environments, laying the groundwork for generalized paradigms where computational billing acts as an objective physical constraint

AI.tldr: 提出OOM-RL（资金耗尽强化学习）范式，通过在真实金融市场中部署多智能体系统，利用资本耗尽作为不可篡改的负梯度，解决自主软件工程中智能体对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 当前多智能体系统对齐面临评估者认知不确定性问题，RLHF和RLAIF方法容易导致模型谄媚行为，而基于执行的测试环境又存在智能体"测试规避"的对抗性问题。
AI.method: 提出OOM-RL范式，将智能体部署到非平稳、高摩擦的真实金融市场中，利用资本耗尽作为不可篡改的负梯度。采用严格测试驱动的智能体工作流（STDAW），强制执行拜占庭式单向状态锁（RO-Lock）和确定性验证的≥95%代码覆盖率约束矩阵。
AI.result: 20个月的纵向实证研究显示，系统从高周转率、谄媚的基线演变为稳健、流动性感知的架构。最终OOM-RL对齐系统在成熟阶段实现了2.06的年化夏普比率稳定均衡。
AI.conclusion: 用严格的经济惩罚替代主观的人类偏好，为高风险现实环境中自主智能体的对齐提供了稳健方法，为计算计费作为客观物理约束的通用范式奠定了基础。

title: ECHO: Elastic Speculative Decoding with Sparse Gating for High-Concurrency Scenarios
summary: Speculative Decoding promises to accelerate the inference of Large Language Models, yet its efficacy often degrades in production-grade serving. Existing evaluations typically overlook the compute-bound nature of high-concurrency regimes, where verification compute becomes the dominant bottleneck. Consequently, prior methods face a dilemma: static trees incur massive verification waste, while dynamic trees suffer from cumulative misjudgments and kernel incompatibility. To bridge this gap, we introduce ECHO, a high concurrency-oriented framework integrated into SGLang that reformulates speculative execution as a budgeted scheduling problem. Crucially, ECHO employs sparse confidence gating to manage the batch as a unified super-tree, elastically pivoting budget between depth and width to co-optimize the trade-off between reducing global verification steps and maximizing per-step efficiency. Extensive evaluations across diverse model scales-particularly the industrial-grade Qwen3-235B-demonstrate that ECHO consistently outperforms SOTA methods in both low-load and high-load scenarios, achieving up to 5.35x walltime speedup and delivering over 20% relative speedup gain.

AI.tldr: ECHO是一个面向高并发场景的推测解码框架，通过稀疏置信门控将批次管理为统一超树，在深度和宽度之间弹性分配预算，优化全局验证步骤减少与每步效率提升的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有推测解码方法在生产级高并发服务中效果不佳，因为现有评估忽略了高并发下的计算瓶颈问题。静态树方法导致大量验证浪费，而动态树方法存在累积误判和内核不兼容问题。
AI.method: 将推测执行重新表述为预算调度问题，采用稀疏置信门控将批次管理为统一超树，弹性地在深度和宽度之间分配预算，共同优化减少全局验证步骤和最大化每步效率的权衡。
AI.result: 在包括工业级Qwen3-235B在内的不同规模模型上，ECHO在低负载和高负载场景下均优于SOTA方法，实现最高5.35倍的墙钟时间加速，提供超过20%的相对加速增益。
AI.conclusion: ECHO通过重新设计推测解码为预算调度问题，有效解决了高并发场景下的计算瓶颈，显著提升了LLM推理效率，特别适用于生产级服务环境。

title: Language Prompt vs. Image Enhancement: Boosting Object Detection With CLIP in Hazy Environments
summary: Object detection in hazy environments is challenging because degraded objects are nearly invisible and their semantics are weakened by environmental noise, making it difficult for detectors to identify. Common approaches involve image enhancement to boost weakened semantics, but these methods are limited by the instability of enhanced modules. This paper proposes a novel solution by employing language prompts to enhance weakened semantics without image enhancement. Specifically, we design Approximation of Mutual Exclusion (AME) to provide credible weights for Cross-Entropy Loss, resulting in CLIP-guided Cross-Entropy Loss (CLIP-CE). The provided weights assess the semantic weakening of objects. Through the backpropagation of CLIP-CE, weakened semantics are enhanced, making degraded objects easier to detect. In addition, we present Fine-tuned AME (FAME) which adaptively fine-tunes the weight of AME based on the predicted confidence. The proposed FAME compensates for the imbalanced optimization in AME. Furthermore, we present HazyCOCO, a large-scale synthetic hazy dataset comprising 61258 images. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. The code and dataset will be released.

AI.tldr: 提出CLIP-CE损失函数，利用语言提示增强雾霾环境中弱化语义的目标检测，无需图像增强，在合成数据集HazyCOCO上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 雾霾环境中目标检测面临挑战，因为退化的物体几乎不可见且语义被环境噪声削弱。传统图像增强方法受限于增强模块的不稳定性，需要更稳定的语义增强方法。
AI.method: 1) 设计互斥近似(AME)为交叉熵损失提供可信权重，形成CLIP引导的交叉熵损失(CLIP-CE)；2) 提出微调AME(FAME)根据预测置信度自适应调整AME权重；3) 构建大规模合成雾霾数据集HazyCOCO。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法在雾霾环境目标检测中达到最先进的性能，代码和数据集将开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过语言提示增强弱化语义是有效的雾霾目标检测方法，避免了传统图像增强的不稳定性，CLIP-CE和FAME的组合优化了检测性能。

title: On the Complexity of the Discussion-based Semantics in Abstraction Argumentation
summary: We show that deciding whether an argument a is stronger than an argument b with respect to the discussion-based semantics of Amgoud and Ben-Naim is decidable in polynomial time. At its core, this problem is about deciding whether, for two vertices in a graph, the number of walks of each length ending in those vertices is the same. We employ results from automata theory and reduce this problem to the equivalence problem for semiring automata. This offers a new perspective on the computational complexity of ranking semantics, an area in which the complexity of many semantics remains open.

AI.tldr: 本文证明在Amgoud和Ben-Naim的基于讨论的语义下，判断论据a是否强于论据b的问题可以在多项式时间内判定。核心是将该问题转化为图论中两个顶点各长度路径数量是否相同的问题，并利用自动机理论将其约简为半环自动机的等价性问题。
AI.motivation: 本文的研究动机是解决论据排名语义的计算复杂度问题。在论辩理论中，许多语义的计算复杂度尚未明确，而本文针对Amgoud和Ben-Naim提出的基于讨论的语义，研究判断论据强度关系的可判定性和时间复杂度。
AI.method: 方法的核心是将论据强度比较问题转化为图论问题：判断两个顶点在图中各长度路径的数量是否相同。然后利用自动机理论，将该问题约简为半环自动机的等价性问题。通过这种转化，可以应用已知的自动机理论结果来分析计算复杂度。
AI.result: 主要结果是证明了在Amgoud和Ben-Naim的基于讨论的语义下，判断论据a是否强于论据b的问题可以在多项式时间内判定。这为论辩理论中排名语义的计算复杂度研究提供了新的视角和方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过将论据强度比较问题转化为图论和自动机理论问题，证明了该问题的多项式时间可判定性。这一结果为论辩理论中排名语义的计算复杂度研究开辟了新途径，许多其他语义的复杂度问题仍有待解决。

title: LogitDynamics: Reliable ViT Error Detection from Layerwise Logit Trajectories
comment: Accepted to the HOW 2026 workshop at CVPR 2026; 7 pages, 3 figures
summary: Reliable confidence estimation is critical when deploying vision models. We study error prediction: determining whether an image classifier's output is correct using only signals from a single forward pass. Motivated by internal-signal hallucination detection in large language models, we investigate whether similar depth-wise signals exist in Vision Transformers (ViTs). We propose a simple method that models how class evidence evolves across layers. By attaching lightweight linear heads to intermediate layers, we extract features from the last L layers that capture both the logits of the predicted class and its top-K competitors, as well as statistics describing instability of top-ranked classes across depth. A linear probe trained on these features predicts the error indicator. Across datasets, our method improves or matches AUCPR over baselines and shows stronger cross-dataset generalization while requiring minimal additional computation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种简单方法，通过分析Vision Transformer中间层的类别证据演化来预测图像分类器的错误，仅需单次前向传播，在AUCPR指标上优于基线方法
AI.motivation: 受大语言模型内部信号幻觉检测启发，研究视觉模型中是否存在类似的深度方向信号，实现可靠的置信度估计，这对部署视觉模型至关重要
AI.method: 在ViT中间层附加轻量级线性头，提取最后L层的特征，包括预测类别及其top-K竞争者的logits，以及跨深度top-ranked类别的不稳定性统计量，训练线性探针预测错误指示器
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，该方法在AUCPR指标上改进或匹配基线方法，显示出更强的跨数据集泛化能力，同时仅需极少的额外计算开销
AI.conclusion: Vision Transformers中存在可用于错误预测的深度方向信号，提出的简单方法能有效利用这些信号实现可靠的置信度估计

title: Anthropogenic Regional Adaptation in Multimodal Vision-Language Model
summary: While the field of vision-language (VL) has achieved remarkable success in integrating visual and textual information across multiple languages and domains, there is still no dedicated framework for assessing human-centric alignment in vision-language systems. We offer two contributions to address this gap. First, we introduce Anthropogenic Regional Adaptation: a novel paradigm that aims to optimize model relevance to specific regional contexts while ensuring the retention of global generalization capabilities. Second, we present a simple, but effective adaptation method named Geographical-generalization-made-easy (GG-EZ), which utilizes regional data filtering and model merging. Through comprehensive experiments on 3 VL architectures: large vision-language models, text-to-image diffusion models, and vision-language embedding models, and a case study in Southeast Asia (SEA) regional adaptation, we demonstrate the importance of Anthropogenic Regional Adaptation and the effectiveness of GG-EZ, showing 5-15% gains in cultural relevance metrics across SEA while maintaining over 98% of global performance and even occasionally surpassing it. Our findings establish Anthropogenic Regional Alignment as a foundational paradigm towards applicability of multimodal vision-language models in diverse regions and demonstrate a simple-yet-effective baseline method that optimizes regional value alignment while preserving global generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"人类中心区域适应"新范式，旨在优化模型对特定区域文化的相关性，同时保持全球泛化能力，并提出了简单有效的GG-EZ方法，在东南亚区域适应案例中取得显著效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言(VL)领域在多语言和跨域整合方面取得显著成功，但目前缺乏专门评估视觉语言系统中人类中心对齐的框架。现有模型在特定区域文化背景下的相关性和适应性不足。
AI.method: 提出两个核心贡献：1) 人类中心区域适应新范式，优化模型对特定区域上下文的相关性同时保持全球泛化；2) GG-EZ方法，通过区域数据过滤和模型合并实现简单有效的适应。
AI.result: 在3种VL架构上验证：大型视觉语言模型、文本到图像扩散模型、视觉语言嵌入模型。东南亚区域适应案例显示，文化相关性指标提升5-15%，同时保持超过98%的全球性能，偶尔还能超越。
AI.conclusion: 人类中心区域对齐是多模态视觉语言模型在不同区域应用的基础范式，GG-EZ方法为优化区域价值对齐同时保持全球泛化提供了简单有效的基线方法。

title: LoViF 2026 The First Challenge on Weather Removal in Videos
summary: This paper presents a review of the LoViF 2026 Challenge on Weather Removal in Videos. The challenge encourages the development of methods for restoring clean videos from inputs degraded by adverse weather conditions such as rain and snow, with an emphasis on achieving visually plausible and temporally consistent results while preserving scene structure and motion dynamics. To support this task, we introduce a new short-form WRV dataset tailored for video weather removal. It consists of 18 videos 1,216 synthesized frames paired with 1,216 real-world ground-truth frames at a resolution of 832 x 480, and is split into training, validation, and test sets with a ratio of 1:1:1. The goal of this challenge is to advance robust and realistic video restoration under real-world weather conditions, with evaluation protocols that jointly consider fidelity and perceptual quality. The challenge attracted 37 participants and received 5 valid final submissions with corresponding fact sheets, contributing to progress in weather removal for videos. The project is publicly available at https://www.codabench.org/competitions/13462/.

AI.tldr: LoViF 2026挑战赛专注于视频天气去除任务，旨在从受雨雪等恶劣天气影响的视频中恢复干净画面，强调视觉合理性和时间一致性，同时保持场景结构和运动动态。
AI.motivation: 恶劣天气条件会严重降低视频质量，影响计算机视觉应用的性能。现有方法在真实世界天气条件下的视频恢复方面仍存在挑战，需要开发更鲁棒和真实的视频修复方法。
AI.method: 该挑战赛引入了一个新的短格式WRV数据集，包含18个视频、1,216个合成帧和1,216个真实世界地面实况帧，分辨率为832×480，按1:1:1比例分为训练、验证和测试集。评估协议综合考虑保真度和感知质量。
AI.result: 挑战赛吸引了37名参与者，收到5个有效的最终提交，推动了视频天气去除领域的进展。项目在Codabench平台上公开可用。
AI.conclusion: LoViF 2026挑战赛通过提供专门的数据集和评估框架，促进了视频天气去除技术的发展，有助于实现更鲁棒和真实的视频恢复。

title: Lectures on AI for Mathematics
summary: This book provides a comprehensive and accessible introduction to the emerging field of AI for mathematics. It covers the core principles and diverse applications of using artificial intelligence to advance mathematical research. Through clear explanations, the text explores how AI can discover hidden mathematical patterns, assist in proving complicated theorems, and even construct counterexamples to challenge conjectures.

AI.tldr: 本书全面介绍了AI在数学领域的应用，涵盖核心原理和多样化应用，探索AI如何发现数学模式、辅助定理证明和构造反例
AI.motivation: 介绍新兴的"AI for mathematics"领域，为读者提供该领域的全面入门，展示AI如何推动数学研究进步
AI.method: 采用教科书式的系统介绍方法，通过清晰的解释和示例，涵盖AI在数学中的核心原理和应用场景
AI.result: 提供了一本关于AI在数学中应用的综合性入门书籍，系统整理了该领域的核心概念、方法和应用案例
AI.conclusion: AI for mathematics是一个有前景的新兴领域，AI技术能够显著增强数学研究能力，发现隐藏模式并辅助复杂证明

title: Investigating Vaccine Buyer's Remorse: Post-Vaccination Decision Regret in COVID-19 Social Media Using Politically Diverse Human Annotation
summary: A significant gap exists in datasets regarding post-COVID-19 vaccination experiences, particularly ``vaccine buyer's remorse''. Understanding the prevalence and nature of vaccine regret, whether based on personal or vicarious experiences, is vital for addressing vaccine hesitancy and refining public health communication. In this paper, we curate a novel dataset from a large YouTube news corpus capturing COVID-19 vaccination experiences, and construct a benchmark subset focused on vaccine regret, annotated by a politically diverse panel to account for the subjective and often politicized nature of the topic. We utilize large language models (LLMs) to identify posts expressing vaccine regret, analyze the reasons behind this regret, and quantify its occurrence in both first and second-person accounts. This paper aims to (1) quantify the prevalence of vaccine regret; (2) identify common reasons for this sentiment; (3) analyze differences between first-person and vicarious experiences; and (4) assess potential biases introduced by different LLMs. We find that while vaccine buyer's remorse appears in only $<2\%$ of public discourse, it is disproportionately concentrated in vaccine-skeptic influencer communities and is predominantly expressed through first-person narratives citing adverse health events.

AI.tldr: 利用LLMs分析YouTube新闻语料中COVID-19疫苗接种后悔情绪，构建带政治多样性标注的数据集，发现疫苗后悔仅占公开讨论<2%，但集中在疫苗怀疑社区且多为第一人称健康事件叙述。
AI.motivation: 填补COVID-19疫苗接种后体验数据集的空白，特别是"疫苗买家后悔"现象。理解疫苗后悔的普遍性和性质对解决疫苗犹豫和完善公共卫生沟通至关重要。
AI.method: 从大型YouTube新闻语料中构建COVID-19疫苗接种体验数据集，创建疫苗后悔基准子集并由政治多样性小组标注。使用LLMs识别表达疫苗后悔的帖子，分析后悔原因，量化第一人称和第二人称叙述中的出现频率。
AI.result: 疫苗买家后悔仅占公开讨论的<2%，但不成比例地集中在疫苗怀疑影响者社区，主要通过第一人称叙述表达，常引用不良健康事件。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了疫苗后悔的系统分析框架，揭示了其在特定社区的集中分布和表达模式，对公共卫生沟通策略有重要启示。

title: Omnimodal Dataset Distillation via High-order Proxy Alignment
summary: Dataset distillation compresses large-scale datasets into compact synthetic sets while preserving training performance, but existing methods are largely restricted to single-modal or bimodal settings. Extending dataset distillation to scenarios involving more than two modalities, i.e., Omnimodal Dataset Distillation, remains underexplored and challenging due to increased heterogeneity and complex cross-modal interactions. In this work, we identify the key determinant that bounds the endpoint discrepancy in the omnimodal setting, which is exacerbated with an increasing number of modalities. To this end, we propose HoPA, a unified method that captures high-order cross-modal alignments via a compact proxy, which is compatible with trajectory matching as well. By abstracting omnimodal alignment with a shared similarity structure, our method avoids the combinatorial complexity of pairwise modality modeling and enables scalable joint distillation across heterogeneous modalities. Theoretical analysis from the spectral perspective reveals the rationality of our proposed method against bimodal dataset distillation techniques. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior compression-performance trade-offs compared to existing competitors. The source code will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HoPA方法，用于解决多模态数据集蒸馏问题，通过高阶跨模态对齐和紧凑代理实现异构模态的联合蒸馏，避免成对模态建模的组合复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集蒸馏方法主要局限于单模态或双模态设置，而扩展到多模态（Omnimodal）场景面临异构性增加和复杂跨模态交互的挑战，这一领域尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 提出HoPA方法，通过紧凑代理捕获高阶跨模态对齐，抽象出共享相似性结构，避免成对模态建模的组合复杂性，兼容轨迹匹配，支持异构模态的可扩展联合蒸馏。
AI.result: 在各种基准测试上的广泛实验表明，该方法相比现有竞争方法实现了更优的压缩-性能权衡，理论分析从谱角度验证了该方法相对于双模态数据集蒸馏技术的合理性。
AI.conclusion: HoPA为多模态数据集蒸馏提供了一种统一方法，能够有效处理异构模态和复杂跨模态交互，实现可扩展的联合蒸馏，源代码将公开。

title: PAC-BENCH: Evaluating Multi-Agent Collaboration under Privacy Constraints
summary: We are entering an era in which individuals and organizations increasingly deploy dedicated AI agents that interact and collaborate with other agents. However, the dynamics of multi-agent collaboration under privacy constraints remain poorly understood. In this work, we present $PAC\text{-}Bench$, a benchmark for systematic evaluation of multi-agent collaboration under privacy constraints. Experiments on $PAC\text{-}Bench$ show that privacy constraints substantially degrade collaboration performance and make outcomes depend more on the initiating agent than the partner. Further analysis reveals that this degradation is driven by recurring coordination breakdowns, including early-stage privacy violations, overly conservative abstraction, and privacy-induced hallucinations. Together, our findings identify privacy-aware multi-agent collaboration as a distinct and unresolved challenge that requires new coordination mechanisms beyond existing agent capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出了PAC-Bench基准，用于系统评估隐私约束下的多智能体协作，发现隐私约束显著降低协作性能并导致协调崩溃。
AI.motivation: 随着专用AI智能体的广泛部署，智能体间的交互协作日益增多，但隐私约束下的多智能体协作动态仍未被充分理解，需要系统评估框架。
AI.method: 开发了PAC-Bench基准测试，用于系统评估隐私约束下的多智能体协作性能，通过实验分析隐私约束对协作的影响机制。
AI.result: 隐私约束显著降低协作性能，使结果更依赖发起智能体而非合作伙伴；分析发现协调崩溃包括早期隐私违规、过度保守抽象和隐私诱导幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 隐私感知的多智能体协作是一个独特且未解决的挑战，需要超越现有智能体能力的新协调机制。

title: ML-Based Real-Time Downlink Performance Prediction in Standalone 5G NR Using Smartphones
summary: We propose a machine learning (ML)-based framework for downlink performance prediction in 5G networks using real-time measurements from commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) user equipment (UE). Our experimental platform integrates the srsRAN 5G New Radio (NR) stack deployed on a Dell desktop serving as the 5G next generation nodeB (gNB), operating at 3.4 GHz. Two Google Pixel 7a smartphones are used to collect physical layer characteristics such as channel quality indicator (CQI), modulation and coding scheme (MCS), bit rate, transmission time interval (TTI), and block error rate (BLER), which are leveraged as predictors in model training. We use commercial-grade traffic generation tools, including Ookla, for stationary and mobility measurements under line-of-sight (LOS) and non-line-of-sight (nLOS) conditions. Test data includes global Ookla servers (e.g., USA, Portugal, Ghana, Egypt, Japan), iperf TCP/UDP data, and video streaming sessions from YouTube. To analyze inter-user interference, we also include scenarios with multiple UEs at the same location. We evaluate the predictive performance of five supervised regression models - linear regression, decision tree regression, random forest regression, extreme gradient boosting (XGBoost), light gradient boosting machine (LightGBM). Our results demonstrate that throughput and BLER can be accurately predicted using COTS hardware and standard ML techniques in diverse real-world 5G scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出基于机器学习的5G网络下行性能预测框架，利用商用智能手机实时测量数据，在真实5G场景中准确预测吞吐量和误块率。
AI.motivation: 5G网络性能预测对于网络优化和用户体验至关重要，但现有方法通常依赖专用设备或仿真。本研究旨在利用商用设备和标准机器学习技术，在真实5G环境中实现准确的性能预测。
AI.method: 使用srsRAN 5G NR栈部署在Dell桌面作为gNB，Google Pixel 7a智能手机收集物理层特征（CQI、MCS、比特率、TTI、BLER）。通过Ookla、iperf、YouTube等工具生成商业级流量，在LOS和nLOS条件下进行静止和移动测量。评估五种监督回归模型：线性回归、决策树回归、随机森林回归、XGBoost、LightGBM。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在多样化的真实5G场景中，使用商用硬件和标准机器学习技术可以准确预测吞吐量和误块率。模型能够处理不同地理位置服务器、多种流量类型以及多用户干扰场景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架证明了利用商用设备和标准机器学习方法进行5G网络性能预测的可行性，为网络优化和用户体验提升提供了实用解决方案。

title: HiddenObjects: Scalable Diffusion-Distilled Spatial Priors for Object Placement
summary: We propose a method to learn explicit, class-conditioned spatial priors for object placement in natural scenes by distilling the implicit placement knowledge encoded in text-conditioned diffusion models. Prior work relies either on manually annotated data, which is inherently limited in scale, or on inpainting-based object-removal pipelines, whose artifacts promote shortcut learning. To address these limitations, we introduce a fully automated and scalable framework that evaluates dense object placements on high-quality real backgrounds using a diffusion-based inpainting pipeline. With this pipeline, we construct HiddenObjects, a large-scale dataset comprising 27M placement annotations, evaluated across 27k distinct scenes, with ranked bounding box insertions for different images and object categories. Experimental results show that our spatial priors outperform sparse human annotations on a downstream image editing task (3.90 vs. 2.68 VLM-Judge), and significantly surpass existing placement baselines and zero-shot Vision-Language Models for object placement. Furthermore, we distill these priors into a lightweight model for fast practical inference (230,000x faster).

AI.tldr: 提出了一种从文本条件扩散模型中提取隐式放置知识的方法，学习用于自然场景中物体放置的显式、类别条件空间先验，构建了包含2700万放置标注的大规模数据集HiddenObjects，并蒸馏为轻量级模型实现快速推理。
AI.motivation: 现有物体放置方法要么依赖有限规模的人工标注数据，要么使用修复式物体移除流程（存在伪影导致捷径学习）。需要一种完全自动化、可扩展的框架来学习高质量的空间先验。
AI.method: 1. 使用基于扩散的修复流程在高质量真实背景上评估密集物体放置；2. 构建HiddenObjects数据集（27M放置标注，27k不同场景）；3. 从扩散模型中蒸馏隐式放置知识；4. 将先验蒸馏为轻量级模型实现快速推理。
AI.result: 1. 空间先验在图像编辑任务上优于稀疏人工标注（3.90 vs 2.68 VLM-Judge）；2. 显著超越现有放置基线和零样本视觉语言模型；3. 轻量级模型推理速度提升230,000倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过从扩散模型中提取隐式知识，可以学习高质量的空间先验，实现自动化、可扩展的物体放置，并通过蒸馏获得高效的推理模型。

title: Limited Perfect Monotonical Surrogates constructed using low-cost recursive linkage discovery with guaranteed output
summary: Surrogates provide a cheap solution evaluation and offer significant leverage for optimizing computationally expensive problems. Usually, surrogates only approximate the original function. Recently, the perfect linear surrogates were proposed that ideally represent the original function. These surrogates do not mimic the original function. In fact, they are another (correct) representation of it and enable a wide range of possibilities, e.g., discovering the optimized function for problems where the direct transformation of the encoded solution into its evaluation is not available. However, many real-world problems can not be represented by linear models, making the aforementioned surrogates inapplicable. Therefore, we propose the Limited Monotonical Perfect Surrogate (LyMPuS), which overcomes this difficulty and enables the comparison of two solutions that differ by a single variable. Our proposition is suitable for limiting the cost of expensive local search procedures. The proposed surrogate is parameterless and can be trained on the fly without any separate surrogate-building step. It uses only the necessary fitness evaluations, and the already-paid costs are not wasted when the model is updated. Finally, it offers low-cost missing-linkage detection and low-cost linkage discovery, guaranteed to find a missing dependency in no more than $2\lceil\log_2(n)\rceil$ steps.

AI.tldr: LyMPuS是一种有限单调完美代理模型，能够克服线性代理的局限性，通过单变量比较优化昂贵计算问题的局部搜索过程。
AI.motivation: 现有完美线性代理模型只能处理线性可表示的问题，而许多现实世界问题是非线性的，这使得现有方法不适用。需要一种能够处理非线性问题的代理模型来优化昂贵计算问题的求解过程。
AI.method: 提出LyMPuS（有限单调完美代理），通过限制单调性来比较两个仅相差单个变量的解。该方法无需参数，可在运行时动态训练，无需单独的代理构建步骤，仅使用必要的适应度评估。
AI.result: LyMPuS能够以低成本进行缺失链接检测和链接发现，保证在最多2⌈log₂(n)⌉步内找到缺失依赖关系。已支付的计算成本在模型更新时不会被浪费。
AI.conclusion: LyMPuS为非线性昂贵计算问题的优化提供了有效的代理模型解决方案，特别适用于限制昂贵局部搜索过程的成本。

title: Hijacking Text Heritage: Hiding the Human Signature through Homoglyphic Substitution
summary: In what way could a data breach involving government-issued IDs such as passports, driver's licenses, etc., rival a random voluntary disclosure on a nondescript social-media platform? At first glance, the former appears more significant, and that is a valid assessment. The disclosed data could contain an individual's date of birth and address; for all intents and purposes, a leak of that data would be disastrous. Given the threat, the latter scenario involving an innocuous online post seems comparatively harmless--or does it? From that post and others like it, a forensic linguist could stylometrically uncover equivalent pieces of information, estimating an age range for the author (adolescent or adult) and narrowing down their geographical location (specific country). While not an exact science--the determinations are statistical--stylometry can reveal comparable, though noticeably diluted, information about an individual. To prevent an ID from being breached, simply sharing it as little as possible suffices. Preventing the leakage of personal information from written text requires a more complex solution: adversarial stylometry. In this paper, we explore how performing homoglyph substitution--the replacement of characters with visually similar alternatives (e.g., "h" $\texttt{[U+0068]}$ $\rightarrow$ "h" $\texttt{[U+04BB]}$)--on text can degrade stylometric systems.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨了通过同形异义字替换（homoglyph substitution）来对抗文本风格计量分析（stylometry），防止从社交媒体文本中推断个人敏感信息
AI.motivation: 传统数据泄露（如护照、驾照）的危害显而易见，但社交媒体文本通过风格计量分析也能泄露类似信息（年龄范围、地理位置）。需要开发对抗性技术来保护文本隐私。
AI.method: 使用同形异义字替换方法，将文本中的字符替换为视觉相似但编码不同的字符（如拉丁字母"h"替换为西里尔字母"h"），以干扰风格计量分析系统的准确性。
AI.result: 同形异义字替换能有效降低风格计量分析系统的性能，使其难以准确推断作者的年龄范围和地理位置等个人信息。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性风格计量学提供了一种保护文本隐私的方法，特别是针对社交媒体等公开文本中可能泄露的个人信息。

title: Leveraging Machine Learning Techniques to Investigate Media and Information Literacy Competence in Tackling Disinformation
summary: This study develops machine learning models to assess Media and Information Literacy (MIL) skills specifically in the context of disinformation among students, particularly future educators and communicators. While the digital revolution has expanded access to information, it has also amplified the spread of false and misleading content, making MIL essential for fostering critical thinking and responsible media engagement. Despite its relevance, predictive modeling of MIL in relation to disinformation remains underexplored. To address this gap, a quantitative study was conducted with 723 students in education and communication programs using a validated survey. Classification and regression algorithms were applied to predict MIL competencies and identify key influencing factors. Results show that complex models outperform simpler approaches, with variables such as academic year and prior training significantly improving prediction accuracy. These findings can inform the design of targeted educational interventions and personalized strategies to enhance students' ability to critically navigate and respond to disinformation in digital environments.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发机器学习模型评估学生在虚假信息背景下的媒体与信息素养能力，发现复杂模型优于简单方法，学业年份和先前培训是关键预测因素
AI.motivation: 数字革命扩大了信息获取，但也加剧了虚假信息传播，媒体与信息素养对培养批判性思维和负责任媒体参与至关重要，但虚假信息背景下的媒体与信息素养预测建模研究不足
AI.method: 对723名教育和传播专业学生进行定量研究，使用验证过的调查问卷，应用分类和回归算法预测媒体与信息素养能力并识别关键影响因素
AI.result: 复杂模型表现优于简单方法，学业年份和先前培训等变量显著提高预测准确性
AI.conclusion: 研究结果可为设计针对性教育干预和个性化策略提供依据，增强学生在数字环境中批判性应对虚假信息的能力

title: Retrieving to Recover: Towards Incomplete Audio-Visual Question Answering via Semantic-consistent Purification
summary: Recent Audio-Visual Question Answering (AVQA) methods have advanced significantly.
