AI.method: 提出OIDA框架，将组织知识结构化为带有认知类别的知识对象，包含重要性分数（按类别衰减）和带符号的矛盾边。知识重力引擎确定性地维护分数并具有收敛保证。引入QUESTION作为建模的无知原语，具有反向衰减机制，能逐渐凸显组织不知道的内容。
AI.result: 在控制比较中，OIDA的RAG条件（3,868 tokens）获得EQS 0.530，而全上下文基线（108,687 tokens）为0.848；28.1倍的token差异是主要混杂因素。QUESTION机制统计显著（Fisher p=0.0325，OR=21.0）。形式化属性已建立，等token预算的关键消融实验已预注册但尚未运行。
AI.conclusion: OIDA通过结构化组织知识的认知属性，为AI代理提供了更好的认知保真度，特别是通过QUESTION机制有效建模组织无知，这在现有系统中是缺失的。框架具有形式化保证，但需要进一步验证在等token预算下的性能。

title: Differentiable free energy surface: a variational approach to directly observing rare events using generative deep-learning models
comment: Main text: 20 pages, 5 figures. Supplement: 12 pages
summary: Rare events are central to the evolution of complex many-body systems, characterized as key transitional configurations on the free energy surface (FES). Conventional methods require adequate sampling of rare event transitions to obtain the FES, which is computationally very demanding. Here we introduce the variational free energy surface (VaFES), a dataset-free framework that directly models FESs using tractable-density generative models. Rare events can then be immediately identified from the FES with their configurations generated directly via one-shot sampling of generative models. By extending a coarse-grained collective variable (CV) into its reversible equivalent, VaFES constructs a latent space of intermediate representation in which the CVs explicitly occupy a subset of dimensions. This latent-space construction preserves the physical interpretability and transparent controllability of the CVs by design, while accommodating arbitrary CV formulations. The reversibility makes the system energy exactly accessible, enabling variational optimization of the FES without pre-generated simulation data. A single optimization yields a continuous, differentiable FES together with one-shot generation of rare-event configurations. Our method can reproduce the exact analytical solution for the bistable dimer potential and identify a chignolin native folded state in close alignment with the experimental NMR structure. Our approach thus establishes a scalable, systematic framework for advancing the study of complex statistical systems.

AI.tldr: 提出VaFES框架，使用可处理密度生成模型直接建模自由能面，无需数据集即可识别稀有事件并生成其构型
AI.motivation: 传统方法需要充分采样稀有事件跃迁来获得自由能面，计算成本极高。需要一种无需预生成模拟数据就能直接建模自由能面的方法。
AI.method: 引入变分自由能面框架，通过将粗粒度集体变量扩展为其可逆等价形式，构建中间表示的潜空间。该潜空间构造保留了集体变量的物理可解释性和透明可控性，同时允许任意集体变量公式化。可逆性使得系统能量完全可访问，实现了无需预生成模拟数据的自由能面变分优化。
AI.result: 该方法能够复现双稳态二聚体势能的精确解析解，并识别出与实验NMR结构高度一致的chignolin天然折叠态。单次优化即可获得连续、可微的自由能面，同时实现稀有事件构型的一步生成。
AI.conclusion: VaFES建立了一个可扩展的系统框架，用于推进复杂统计系统的研究，提供了一种无需数据集即可直接建模自由能面并识别稀有事件的有效方法。

title: Uncertainty-Guided Attention and Entropy-Weighted Loss for Precise Plant Seedling Segmentation
summary: Plant seedling segmentation supports automated phenotyping in precision agriculture. Standard segmentation models face difficulties due to intricate background images and fine structures in leaves. We introduce UGDA-Net (Uncertainty-Guided Dual Attention Network with Entropy-Weighted Loss and Deep Supervision). Three novel components make up UGDA-Net. The first component is Uncertainty-Guided Dual Attention (UGDA). UGDA uses channel variance to modulate feature maps. The second component is an entropy-weighted hybrid loss function. This loss function focuses on high-uncertainty boundary pixels. The third component employs deep supervision for intermediate encoder layers. We performed a comprehensive systematic ablation study. This study focuses on two widely-used architectures, U-Net and LinkNet. It analyzes five incremental configurations: Baseline, Loss-only, Attention-only, Deep Supervision, and UGDA-Net. We trained UGDA-net using a high-resolution plant seedling image dataset containing 432 images. We demonstrate improved segmentation performance and accuracy. With an increase in Dice coefficient of 9.3% above baseline. LinkNet's variance is 13.2% above baseline. Overlays that are qualitative in nature show the reduced false positives at the leaf boundary. Uncertainty heatmaps are consistent with the complex morphology. UGDA-Net aids in the segmentation of delicate structures in plants and provides a high-def solution. The results showed that uncertainty-guided attention and uncertainty-weighted loss are two complementing systems.

AI.tldr: 提出UGDA-Net用于植物幼苗分割，通过不确定性引导的双重注意力、熵加权损失函数和深度监督三个组件，在U-Net和LinkNet架构上实现显著性能提升
AI.motivation: 植物幼苗分割对精准农业自动化表型分析很重要，但标准分割模型面临复杂背景图像和叶片精细结构的挑战，需要更精确的边界分割方法
AI.method: 提出UGDA-Net，包含三个创新组件：1) 不确定性引导的双重注意力(UGDA)，使用通道方差调制特征图；2) 熵加权混合损失函数，关注高不确定性边界像素；3) 对中间编码器层的深度监督
AI.result: 在432张高分辨率植物幼苗图像数据集上训练，Dice系数比基线提高9.3%，LinkNet方差比基线提高13.2%，定性分析显示叶片边界假阳性减少，不确定性热图与复杂形态一致
AI.conclusion: UGDA-Net能有效分割植物精细结构，提供高精度解决方案，不确定性引导的注意力和不确定性加权损失是互补的系统

title: GenTac: Generative Modeling and Forecasting of Soccer Tactics
summary: Modeling open-play soccer tactics is a formidable challenge due to the stochastic, multi-agent nature of the game. Existing computational approaches typically produce single, deterministic trajectory forecasts or focus on highly structured set-pieces, fundamentally failing to capture the inherent variance and branching possibilities of real-world match evolution. Here, we introduce GenTac, a diffusion-based generative framework that conceptualizes soccer tactics as a stochastic process over continuous multi-player trajectories and discrete semantic events. By learning the underlying distribution of player movements from historical tracking data, GenTac samples diverse, plausible, long-horizon future trajectories. The framework supports rich contextual conditioning, including opponent behavior, specific team or league playing styles, and strategic objectives, while grounding continuous spatial dynamics into a 15-class tactical event space. Extensive evaluations on our proposed benchmark, TacBench, demonstrate four key capabilities: (1) GenTac achieves high geometric accuracy while strictly preserving the collective structural consistency of the team; (2) it accurately simulates stylistic nuances, distinguishing between specific teams (e.g., Auckland FC) and leagues (e.g., A-League versus German leagues); (3) it enables controllable counterfactual simulations, demonstrably altering spatial control and expected threat metrics based on offensive or defensive guidance; and (4) it reliably anticipates future tactical outcomes directly from generated rollouts. Finally, we demonstrate that GenTac can be successfully trained to generalize to other dynamic team sports, including basketball, American football, and ice hockey.

AI.tldr: GenTac是一个基于扩散模型的生成框架，用于模拟足球等团队运动的开放战术，通过连续轨迹和离散事件生成多样化的未来场景。
AI.motivation: 现有计算模型通常产生单一确定性轨迹预测或专注于结构化定位球，无法捕捉真实比赛演化的内在方差和分支可能性。需要能够建模团队运动随机、多智能体性质的框架。
AI.method: 基于扩散的生成框架，将战术建模为连续多球员轨迹和离散语义事件的随机过程。从历史跟踪数据学习球员移动分布，支持丰富的上下文条件（对手行为、球队风格、战略目标），并将连续空间动态映射到15类战术事件空间。
AI.result: 在TacBench基准测试中展示四个关键能力：1) 高几何精度同时保持团队结构一致性；2) 准确模拟风格差异；3) 支持可控反事实模拟；4) 可靠预测未来战术结果。还能泛化到篮球、美式足球和冰球等其他动态团队运动。
AI.conclusion: GenTac为建模开放战术提供了有效的生成框架，能够捕捉团队运动的随机性和多智能体交互，支持丰富的条件控制和跨运动泛化能力。

title: Detecting RAG Extraction Attack via Dual-Path Runtime Integrity Game
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems augment large language models with external knowledge, yet introduce a critical security vulnerability: RAG Knowledge Base Leakage, wherein adversarial prompts can induce the model to divulge retrieved proprietary content. Recent studies reveal that such leakage can be executed through adaptive and iterative attack strategies (named RAG extraction attack), while effective countermeasures remain notably lacking. To bridge this gap, we propose CanaryRAG, a runtime defense mechanism inspired by stack canaries in software security. CanaryRAG embeds carefully designed canary tokens into retrieved chunks and reformulates RAG extraction defense as a dual-path runtime integrity game. Leakage is detected in real time whenever either the target or oracle path violates its expected canary behavior, including under adaptive suppression and obfuscation. Extensive evaluations against existing attacks demonstrate that CanaryRAG provides robust defense, achieving substantially lower chunk recovery rates than state-of-the-art baselines while imposing negligible impact on task performance and inference latency. Moreover, as a plug-and-play solution, CanaryRAG can be seamlessly integrated into arbitrary RAG pipelines without requiring retraining or structural modifications, offering a practical and scalable safeguard for proprietary data.

AI.tldr: CanaryRAG：一种受软件安全中栈金丝雀启发的运行时防御机制，通过在检索块中嵌入金丝雀令牌来检测RAG知识库泄漏攻击，实现实时防护。
AI.motivation: RAG系统虽然增强了LLM的外部知识能力，但引入了关键安全漏洞——RAG知识库泄漏，攻击者可以通过对抗性提示诱导模型泄露检索到的专有内容。现有研究显示这种泄漏可以通过自适应迭代攻击策略执行，而有效的防御措施明显缺乏。
AI.method: 提出CanaryRAG防御机制，将精心设计的金丝雀令牌嵌入检索块中，将RAG提取防御重新表述为双路径运行时完整性游戏。当目标路径或预言机路径违反其预期的金丝雀行为时（包括自适应抑制和混淆），实时检测泄漏。
AI.result: 针对现有攻击的广泛评估表明，CanaryRAG提供了强大的防御，实现了比最先进基线显著更低的块恢复率，同时对任务性能和推理延迟的影响可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: CanaryRAG作为一种即插即用解决方案，可以无缝集成到任意RAG管道中，无需重新训练或结构修改，为专有数据提供了实用且可扩展的安全保障。

title: Discrete Flow Maps
summary: The sequential nature of autoregressive next-token prediction imposes a fundamental speed limit on large language models. While continuous flow models offer a path to parallel generation, they traditionally demand expensive iterative integration. Flow Maps bypass this bottleneck by compressing generative trajectories into single-step mappings, theoretically enabling the generation of full text sequences from noise in a single forward pass. However, standard formulations rely on Euclidean regression losses that are geometrically ill-suited for discrete data. In this work, we resolve this conflict with Discrete Flow Maps, a framework that reconciles trajectory compression with the geometry of the probability simplex. We recast standard flow map training for the discrete domain, aligning the training dynamics with the discrete nature of language. Empirically, this strict geometric alignment allows our method to surpass previous state-of-the-art results in discrete flow modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出Discrete Flow Maps框架，通过将生成轨迹压缩为单步映射，实现文本序列的并行生成，解决了连续流模型在离散数据上的几何不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 自回归逐token预测的序列性质限制了大型语言模型的生成速度。虽然连续流模型提供了并行生成的路径，但传统方法需要昂贵的迭代积分。Flow Maps通过压缩生成轨迹为单步映射，理论上可以从噪声中单步生成完整文本序列，但标准公式依赖欧几里得回归损失，在几何上不适合离散数据。
AI.method: 提出Discrete Flow Maps框架，将标准flow map训练重新构建以适应离散领域，使训练动态与语言的离散性质对齐。该方法在概率单纯形的几何结构下进行轨迹压缩，解决了离散数据的几何不匹配问题。
AI.result: 严格的几何对齐使该方法在离散流建模方面超越了先前的最先进结果，实现了更高效的文本生成。
AI.conclusion: Discrete Flow Maps通过将轨迹压缩与概率单纯形的几何结构相协调，成功解决了连续流模型在离散语言数据上的不匹配问题，为并行文本生成提供了有效解决方案。

title: HO-Flow: Generalizable Hand-Object Interaction Generation with Latent Flow Matching
summary: Generating realistic 3D hand-object interactions (HOI) is a fundamental challenge in computer vision and robotics, requiring both temporal coherence and high-fidelity physical plausibility. Existing methods remain limited in their ability to learn expressive motion representations for generation and perform temporal reasoning. In this paper, we present HO-Flow, a framework for synthesizing realistic hand-object motion sequences from texts and canoncial 3D objects. HO-Flow first employs an interaction-aware variational autoencoder to encode sequences of hand and object motions into a unified latent manifold by incorporating hand and object kinematics, enabling the representation to capture rich interaction dynamics. It then leverages a masked flow matching model that combines auto-regressive temporal reasoning with continuous latent generation, improving temporal coherence. To further enhance generalization, HO-Flow predicts object motions relative to the initial frame, enabling effective pre-training on large-scale synthetic data. Experiments on the GRAB, OakInk, and DexYCB benchmarks demonstrate that HO-Flow achieves state-of-the-art performance in both physical plausibility and motion diversity for interaction motion synthesis.

AI.tldr: HO-Flow：一个从文本和规范3D对象生成逼真手-物体交互运动序列的框架，通过交互感知变分自编码器和掩码流匹配模型实现
AI.motivation: 现有方法在学习表达性运动表示和执行时间推理方面存在局限，难以生成既具有时间连贯性又具有高保真物理合理性的3D手-物体交互
AI.method: 1. 使用交互感知变分自编码器将手和物体运动序列编码到统一潜在流形；2. 采用结合自回归时间推理和连续潜在生成的掩码流匹配模型；3. 预测相对于初始帧的物体运动以增强泛化能力
AI.result: 在GRAB、OakInk和DexYCB基准测试中达到最先进性能，在物理合理性和运动多样性方面表现优异
AI.conclusion: HO-Flow通过统一的潜在表示学习和改进的时间推理，能够生成高质量、物理合理的手-物体交互运动序列

title: Detecting Safety Violations Across Many Agent Traces
summary: To identify safety violations, auditors often search over large sets of agent traces. This search is difficult because failures are often rare, complex, and sometimes even adversarially hidden and only detectable when multiple traces are analyzed together. These challenges arise in diverse settings such as misuse campaigns, covert sabotage, reward hacking, and prompt injection. Existing approaches struggle here for several reasons. Per-trace judges miss failures that only become visible across traces, naive agentic auditing does not scale to large trace collections, and fixed monitors are brittle to unanticipated behaviors. We introduce Meerkat, which combines clustering with agentic search to uncover violations specified in natural language. Through structured search and adaptive investigation of promising regions, Meerkat finds sparse failures without relying on seed scenarios, fixed workflows, or exhaustive enumeration. Across misuse, misalignment, and task gaming settings, Meerkat significantly improves detection of safety violations over baseline monitors, discovers widespread developer cheating on a top agent benchmark, and finds nearly 4x more examples of reward hacking on CyBench than previous audits.

AI.tldr: Meerkat是一个结合聚类与智能搜索的系统，用于在大量智能体轨迹中发现自然语言描述的安全违规行为，无需种子场景或穷举枚举。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在检测安全违规时面临挑战：单轨迹判断器会错过跨轨迹才可见的违规，智能审计无法扩展到大规模轨迹集合，固定监控器对未预期行为脆弱。这些挑战出现在滥用活动、隐蔽破坏、奖励黑客和提示注入等多种场景中。
AI.method: Meerkat结合聚类与智能搜索：通过结构化搜索和自适应调查有希望的区域，无需依赖种子场景、固定工作流或穷举枚举。系统使用自然语言描述违规行为，在大量轨迹中高效发现稀疏的违规。
AI.result: 在滥用、不对齐和任务博弈场景中，Meerkat显著优于基线监控器；在一个顶级智能体基准测试中发现广泛的开发者作弊行为；在CyBench上发现的奖励黑客示例比先前审计多近4倍。
AI.conclusion: Meerkat通过结合聚类与智能搜索，有效解决了在大规模轨迹集合中发现稀疏、复杂安全违规的挑战，为LLM安全审计提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: Learning What's Real: Disentangling Signal and Measurement Artifacts in Multi-Sensor Data, with Applications to Astrophysics
comment: Accepted at the 2nd Workshop on Foundation Models for Science at ICLR 2026. 10 pages, 6 figures, plus appendix
summary: Data collected from the physical world is always a combination of multiple sources: an underlying signal from the physical process of interest and a signal from measurement-dependent artifacts from the sensor or instrument. This secondary signal acts as a confounding factor, limiting our ability to extract information about the physics underlying the phenomena we observe. Furthermore, it complicates the combination of observations in heterogeneous or multi-instrument settings. We propose a deep learning framework that leverages overlapping observations, a dual-encoder architecture, and a counterfactual generation objective to disentangle these factors of variation. The resulting representations explicitly separate intrinsic signals from sensor-specific distortions and noise, and can be used for counterfactual view generation, parameter inference unconfounded by measurement distortions, and instrument-independent similarity search. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on astrophysical galaxy images from the DESI Legacy Imaging Survey (Legacy) and the Hyper Suprime-Cam (HSC) Survey as a representative multi-instrument setting. This framework provides a general recipe for scientific and multi-modal self-supervised pretraining: construct training pairs from overlapping observations of the same physical system, treat sensor- or modality-specific effects as augmentations, and learn invariant representations through counterfactual generation.

AI.tldr: 提出一个深度学习框架，利用重叠观测、双编码器架构和反事实生成目标来分离物理信号与传感器特定失真，适用于多仪器科学数据
AI.motivation: 物理世界数据总是包含物理过程信号和传感器测量伪影的混合，后者作为混淆因素限制了提取物理信息的能力，并阻碍了异构或多仪器设置下的观测组合
AI.method: 使用重叠观测构建训练对，采用双编码器架构，通过反事实生成目标学习不变表示，将传感器特定效应视为数据增强
AI.result: 在DESI Legacy和HSC巡天的天体物理星系图像上验证了方法的有效性，能够明确分离内在信号与传感器特定失真，支持反事实视图生成、无混淆参数推断和仪器无关相似性搜索
AI.conclusion: 该框架为科学和多模态自监督预训练提供了通用方法：利用同一物理系统的重叠观测构建训练对，将传感器或模态特定效应视为增强，通过反事实生成学习不变表示

title: Immune2V: Image Immunization Against Dual-Stream Image-to-Video Generation
summary: Image-to-video (I2V) generation has the potential for societal harm because it enables the unauthorized animation of static images to create realistic deepfakes. While existing defenses effectively protect against static image manipulation, extending these to I2V generation remains underexplored and non-trivial. In this paper, we systematically analyze why modern I2V models are highly robust against naive image-level adversarial attacks (i.e., immunization). We observe that the video encoding process rapidly dilutes the adversarial noise across future frames, and the continuous text-conditioned guidance actively overrides the intended disruptive effect of the immunization. Building on these findings, we propose the Immune2V framework which enforces temporally balanced latent divergence at the encoder level to prevent signal dilution, and aligns intermediate generative representations with a precomputed collapse-inducing trajectory to counteract the text-guidance override. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Immune2V produces substantially stronger and more persistent degradation than adapted image-level baselines under the same imperceptibility budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Immun2V框架，用于防御图像到视频生成模型创建深度伪造视频，通过防止对抗噪声在时间维度上稀释并抵消文本引导的覆盖效应。
AI.motivation: 图像到视频生成技术可能被滥用于创建未经授权的深度伪造视频，对社会造成危害。现有防御主要针对静态图像篡改，而扩展到视频生成领域尚未充分探索且具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出Immun2V框架：1) 在编码器层面强制时间平衡的潜在差异以防止信号稀释；2) 将中间生成表示与预计算的崩溃诱导轨迹对齐，以抵消文本引导的覆盖效应。
AI.result: 实验表明，Immun2V在相同不可感知性预算下，比适应的图像级基线方法产生更强大和更持久的性能退化效果。
AI.conclusion: Immun2V框架有效解决了图像到视频生成模型的防御问题，通过系统分析模型对抗攻击的鲁棒性机制，提出了针对性的防御策略。

title: The Paradox of Professional Input: How Expert Collaboration with AI Systems Shapes Their Future Value
summary: This perspective paper examines a fundamental paradox in the relationship between professional expertise and artificial intelligence: as domain experts increasingly collaborate with AI systems by externalizing their implicit knowledge, they potentially accelerate the automation of their own expertise. Through analysis of multiple professional contexts, we identify emerging patterns in human-AI collaboration and propose frameworks for professionals to navigate this evolving landscape. Drawing on research in knowledge management, expertise studies, human-computer interaction, and labor economics, we develop a nuanced understanding of how professional value may be preserved and transformed in an era of increasingly capable AI systems. Our analysis suggests that while the externalization of tacit knowledge presents certain risks to traditional professional roles, it also creates opportunities for the evolution of expertise and the emergence of new forms of professional value. We conclude with implications for professional education, organizational design, and policy development that can help ensure the codification of expert knowledge enhances rather than diminishes the value of human expertise.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨专家与AI合作中的悖论：专家通过外部化隐性知识加速自身专业自动化，分析人类-AI协作模式并提出应对框架
AI.motivation: 研究专业知识和人工智能之间的基本悖论：随着领域专家越来越多地与AI系统合作，通过外部化他们的隐性知识，他们可能加速自身专业知识的自动化。这一现象对传统专业角色构成风险，需要深入理解。
AI.method: 通过分析多个专业情境，识别人类-AI协作中的新兴模式，并借鉴知识管理、专业研究、人机交互和劳动经济学的研究，提出专业价值保存和转化的框架。
AI.result: 研究发现隐性知识外部化虽然对传统专业角色构成风险，但也为专业知识的演化和新型专业价值的出现创造了机会。提出了专业价值保存和转化的框架。
AI.conclusion: 结论包括对专业教育、组织设计和政策发展的启示，确保专家知识的编码化能够增强而非削弱人类专业知识的价值。

title: Speaking to No One: Ontological Dissonance and the Double Bind of Conversational AI
comment: This version of the article has been accepted for publication in Medicine, Health Care and Philosophy following peer review. This version is distributed under Springer Nature's terms for accepted manuscripts and does not reflect any post-acceptance improvements or corrections. The Version of Record will be available via Springer Nature upon publication
summary: Recent reports indicate that sustained interaction with conversational artificial intelligence (AI) systems can, in a small subset of users, contribute to the emergence or stabilisation of delusional experience. Existing accounts typically attribute such cases either to individual vulnerability or to failures of safety engineering. These explanations are incomplete. Drawing on phenomenology, psychiatry, and cognitive neuroscience, this paper argues that the risk arises from the relational and ontological structure of the interaction itself. Conversational AI generates ontological dissonance: a conflict between the appearance of relational presence and the absence of any subject capable of sustaining it. Maintained through a communicative double bind and amplified by attentional asymmetries, this dissonance tends, under conditions of affective vulnerability, to stabilise into a technologically mediated analogue of folie a deux. This account explains why explicit disclaimers often fail to disrupt delusional involvement and clarifies the ethical and clinical implications for the design and use of conversational AI.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨了与对话AI持续互动可能导致一小部分用户出现妄想体验的风险，认为风险源于交互本身的关系和本体结构，而非仅个体脆弱性或安全工程失败。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常将对话AI引发的妄想体验归因于个体脆弱性或安全工程失败，但这些解释不完整。本文旨在从现象学、精神病学和认知神经科学角度，分析这种风险产生的根本机制。
AI.method: 采用跨学科方法，结合现象学、精神病学和认知神经科学的理论框架，分析对话AI交互的本体结构特征，提出"本体失调"概念，并探讨其通过沟通双重束缚和注意力不对称放大的机制。
AI.result: 识别出对话AI交互产生"本体失调"——关系存在表象与缺乏维持该存在的主体之间的冲突。这种失调在情感脆弱条件下，通过沟通双重束缚和注意力不对称，可能稳定为技术介导的"二联性精神病"类似状态。
AI.conclusion: 对话AI的妄想风险源于交互本身的结构特性，而非仅个体因素。这解释了为何明确免责声明常无法阻止妄想卷入，并为对话AI的设计和使用提供了伦理和临床启示。

title: Retinal Cyst Detection from Optical Coherence Tomography Images
summary: Retinal Cysts are formed by leakage and accumulation of fluid in the retina due to the incompetence of retinal vasculature. These cystic spaces have significance in several ocular diseases such as age-related macular degeneration, diabetic macular edema, etc. Optical coherence tomography is one of the predominant diagnosing techniques for imaging retinal pathologies. Segmenting and quantification of intraretinal cysts plays the vital role in predicting visual acuity. In literature, several methods have been proposed for automatic segmentation of intraretinal cysts. As cystoid macular edema becomes a major problem to humankind, we need to quantify it accurately and operate it out, else it might cause many problems later on. Though research is being carried out in this area, not much of progress has been made and accuracy achieved so far is 68\% which is very less. Also, the methods depend on the quality of the image and give very low results for high noise images like topcon. This work uses ResNet CNN (Convolutional Neural Network) approach of segmentation by the way of patchwise classification for training on image set from cyst segmentation challenge dataset and testing on test data set given by 2 different graders for all 4 vendors in the challenge. It also compares these methods using first publicly available novel cyst segmentation challenge dataset. The methods were evaluated using quantitative measures to assess their robustness against the challenges of intraretinal cyst segmentation. The results are found to be better than the previous state of the art approaches giving more than 70\% dice coefficient on all vendors irrespective of their quality.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用ResNet CNN进行视网膜囊肿分割的方法，通过补丁分类在囊肿分割挑战数据集上进行训练和测试，在四个不同供应商的数据上取得了超过70%的Dice系数，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 视网膜囊肿在多种眼疾中具有重要意义，但现有自动分割方法准确率较低（约68%），且对图像质量敏感，特别是对高噪声图像效果不佳。需要更准确的分割方法来量化囊肿，以预测视力并支持临床决策。
AI.method: 采用ResNet卷积神经网络进行分割，通过补丁分类方法在囊肿分割挑战数据集上进行训练。使用来自四个不同供应商的图像数据，并由两名不同的评分者进行标注。这是首次使用公开可用的囊肿分割挑战数据集进行比较研究。
AI.result: 该方法在所有四个供应商的数据上都取得了超过70%的Dice系数，无论图像质量如何，均优于之前的最佳方法。这表明该方法对图像质量变化具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 基于ResNet CNN的补丁分类方法在视网膜囊肿分割任务中表现出色，超越了现有技术水平，对图像质量变化具有鲁棒性，为临床诊断提供了更可靠的工具。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Large Language Models for Evidence-Informed Guidance on Cannabidiol Use in Older Adults
summary: Older adults commonly experience chronic conditions such as pain and sleep disturbances and may consider cannabidiol for symptom management. Safe use requires appropriate dosing, careful titration, and awareness of drug interactions, yet stigma and limited health literacy often limit understanding. Conversational artificial intelligence systems based on large language models and retrieval-augmented generation may support cannabidiol education, but their safety and reliability remain insufficiently evaluated. This study developed a retrieval-augmented large language model framework that combines structured prompt engineering with curated cannabidiol evidence to generate context-aware guidance for older adults, including those with cognitive impairment. We also proposed an automated, annotation-free evaluation framework to benchmark leading standalone and retrieval-augmented models in the absence of standardized benchmarks. Sixty-four diverse user scenarios were generated by varying symptoms, preferences, cognitive status, demographics, comorbidities, medications, cannabis history, and caregiver support. Multiple state-of-the-art models were evaluated, including a novel ensemble retrieval architecture that integrates multiple retrieval systems. Across three automated evaluation strategies, retrieval-augmented models consistently produced more cautious and guideline-aligned recommendations than standalone models, with the ensemble approach performing best. These findings demonstrate that structured retrieval improves the reliability and safety of AI-driven cannabidiol education and provide a reproducible framework for evaluating AI tools used in sensitive health contexts.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个检索增强的大型语言模型框架，结合结构化提示工程和精选的大麻二酚证据，为老年人提供情境感知的健康指导，并提出自动化评估框架来评估模型的安全性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 老年人常经历疼痛和睡眠障碍等慢性疾病，可能考虑使用大麻二酚进行症状管理。安全使用需要适当的剂量、仔细的滴定和药物相互作用意识，但污名化和有限的健康素养往往限制了理解。基于大型语言模型和检索增强生成的对话人工智能系统可能支持大麻二酚教育，但其安全性和可靠性尚未得到充分评估。
AI.method: 开发了检索增强的大型语言模型框架，结合结构化提示工程和精选的大麻二酚证据，为老年人（包括认知障碍者）生成情境感知指导。提出了自动化、无标注的评估框架，在没有标准化基准的情况下评估领先的独立模型和检索增强模型。生成了64个多样化用户场景，评估了多个最先进的模型，包括集成多个检索系统的新型集成检索架构。
AI.result: 通过三种自动化评估策略，检索增强模型始终比独立模型产生更谨慎、更符合指南的建议，集成方法表现最佳。这些发现表明结构化检索提高了AI驱动的大麻二酚教育的可靠性和安全性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化检索显著提升了AI驱动健康教育的可靠性和安全性，为敏感健康背景下的AI工具评估提供了可复现的框架。

title: LRD-Net: A Lightweight Real-Centered Detection Network for Cross-Domain Face Forgery Detection
summary: The rapid advancement of diffusion-based generative models has made face forgery detection a critical challenge in digital forensics. Current detection methods face two fundamental limitations: poor cross-domain generalization when encountering unseen forgery types, and substantial computational overhead that hinders deployment on resource-constrained devices. We propose LRD-Net (Lightweight Real-centered Detection Network), a novel framework that addresses both challenges simultaneously. Unlike existing dual-branch approaches that process spatial and frequency information independently, LRD-Net adopts a sequential frequency-guided architecture where a lightweight Multi-Scale Wavelet Guidance Module generates attention signals that condition a MobileNetV3-based spatial backbone. This design enables effective exploitation of frequency-domain cues while avoiding the redundancy of parallel feature extraction. Furthermore, LRD-Net employs a real-centered learning strategy with exponential moving average prototype updates and drift regularization, anchoring representations around authentic facial images rather than modeling diverse forgery patterns. Extensive experiments on the DiFF benchmark demonstrate that LRD-Net achieves state-of-the-art cross-domain detection accuracy, consistently outperforming existing methods. Critically, LRD-Net accomplishes this with only 2.63M parameters - approximately 9x fewer than conventional approaches - while achieving over 8x faster training and nearly 10x faster inference. These results demonstrate that robust cross-domain face forgery detection can be achieved without sacrificing computational efficiency, making LRD-Net suitable for real-time deployment in mobile authentication systems and resource-constrained environments.

AI.tldr: LRD-Net：一种轻量级、以真实图像为中心的检测网络，通过序列化频率引导架构和真实中心学习策略，在保持高效计算的同时实现跨域人脸伪造检测的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 当前人脸伪造检测方法面临两个基本限制：1) 遇到未见伪造类型时跨域泛化能力差；2) 计算开销大，难以部署在资源受限设备上。需要同时解决这两个挑战。
AI.method: 提出LRD-Net框架：1) 采用序列化频率引导架构，轻量级多尺度小波引导模块生成注意力信号来调节MobileNetV3空间骨干网络；2) 使用真实中心学习策略，通过指数移动平均原型更新和漂移正则化，将表示锚定在真实人脸图像周围而非建模多样伪造模式。
AI.result: 在DiFF基准测试中实现SOTA跨域检测准确率，仅需2.63M参数（比传统方法少约9倍），训练速度提升8倍以上，推理速度提升近10倍。
AI.conclusion: LRD-Net证明可以在不牺牲计算效率的情况下实现鲁棒的跨域人脸伪造检测，适合移动认证系统和资源受限环境的实时部署。

title: Beyond Offline A/B Testing: Context-Aware Agent Simulation for Recommender System Evaluation
summary: Recommender systems are central to online services, enabling users to navigate through massive amounts of content across various domains. However, their evaluation remains challenging due to the disconnect between offline metrics and online performance. The emergence of Large Language Model-powered agents offers a promising solution, yet existing studies model users in isolation, neglecting the contextual factors such as time, location, and needs, which fundamentally shape human decision-making. In this paper, we introduce ContextSim, an LLM agent framework that simulates believable user proxies by anchoring interactions in daily life activities. Namely, a life simulation module generates scenarios specifying when, where, and why users engage with recommendations. To align preferences with genuine humans, we model agents' internal thoughts and enforce consistency at both the action and trajectory levels. Experiments across domains show our method generates interactions more closely aligned with human behavior than prior work. We further validate our approach through offline A/B testing correlation and show that RS parameters optimized using ContextSim yield improved real-world engagement.

AI.tldr: 提出ContextSim框架，利用LLM代理模拟真实用户行为，通过日常生活场景建模上下文因素，提升推荐系统评估效果
AI.motivation: 推荐系统评估面临离线指标与在线性能脱节的问题，现有LLM代理方法孤立建模用户，忽略了时间、地点、需求等上下文因素对决策的影响
AI.method: 1) 生活模拟模块生成包含时间、地点、原因的日常场景；2) 建模代理内部思维过程；3) 在动作和轨迹层面保持一致性；4) 通过离线A/B测试验证相关性
AI.result: 实验表明ContextSim生成的交互比先前工作更贴近人类行为，使用ContextSim优化的推荐系统参数在真实世界中提升了用户参与度
AI.conclusion: ContextSim通过上下文感知的LLM代理模拟，有效弥合了推荐系统离线评估与在线性能的差距，为推荐系统优化提供了更可靠的评估框架

title: Audio Flamingo Next: Next-Generation Open Audio-Language Models for Speech, Sound, and Music
summary: We present Audio Flamingo Next (AF-Next), the next-generation and most capable large audio-language model in the Audio Flamingo series, designed to advance understanding and reasoning over speech, environmental sounds and music. Compared to Audio Flamingo 3, AF-Next introduces: (i) a stronger foundational audio-language model that significantly improves accuracy across diverse audio understanding tasks; (ii) scalable strategies for constructing large-scale audio understanding and reasoning data beyond existing academic benchmarks; (iii) support for long and complex audio inputs up to 30 minutes; and (iv) Temporal Audio Chain-of-Thought, a new reasoning paradigm that explicitly grounds intermediate reasoning steps to timestamps in long audio, enabling fine-grained temporal alignment and improved interpretability. To enable these capabilities, we first conduct a systematic analysis of Audio Flamingo 3 to identify key gaps in audio understanding and reasoning. We then curate and scale new large-scale datasets totaling over 1 million hours to address these limitations and expand the existing AudioSkills-XL, LongAudio-XL, AF-Think and AF-Chat datasets. AF-Next is trained using a curriculum-based strategy spanning pre-training, mid-training and post-training stages. Extensive experiments across 20 audio understanding and reasoning benchmarks, including challenging long-audio tasks, show that AF-Next outperforms similarly sized open models by large margins and remains highly competitive with and sometimes surpasses, much larger open-weight and closed models. Beyond benchmark performance, AF-Next exhibits strong real-world utility and transfers well to unseen tasks, highlighting its robustness and generalization ability. In addition to all data, code and methods, we open-source 3 variants of AF-Next, including AF-Next-Instruct, AF-Next-Think and AF-Next-Captioner.

AI.tldr: AF-Next是Audio Flamingo系列的最新一代大型音频-语言模型，专注于语音、环境声音和音乐的理解与推理，支持长达30分钟的音频输入，并引入了时间音频思维链的新推理范式。
AI.motivation: 为了解决Audio Flamingo 3在音频理解和推理方面的关键差距，特别是长音频处理和细粒度时间对齐的不足，需要开发更强大的音频-语言模型来提升多样音频任务的准确性和可解释性。
AI.method: 1) 构建超过100万小时的大规模音频理解和推理数据集；2) 引入时间音频思维链，将中间推理步骤显式地锚定到时间戳；3) 采用课程学习策略，包括预训练、中期训练和后训练阶段；4) 支持长达30分钟的复杂音频输入。
AI.result: 在20个音频理解和推理基准测试中，AF-Next大幅超越同类规模的开放模型，与更大规模的开放权重和闭源模型竞争激烈甚至有时超越。模型展现出强大的实际应用价值和良好的未见任务迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: AF-Next代表了音频-语言模型的重要进展，通过创新的时间音频思维链和大规模数据策略，显著提升了长音频理解和推理能力，同时开源了3个变体模型促进社区发展。

title: Product Review Based on Optimized Facial Expression Detection
comment: 9 pages, 11 figures, Published in the 2016 Ninth International Conference on Contemporary Computing (IC3), August 11-13, 2016, Noida, India. This is a pre-print version of the paper
summary: This paper proposes a method to review public acceptance of products based on their brand by analyzing the facial expression of the customer intending to buy the product from a supermarket or hypermarket. In such cases, facial expression recognition plays a significant role in product review. Here, facial expression detection is performed by extracting feature points using a modified Harris algorithm. The modified Harris algorithm reduced the time complexity of the existing feature extraction Harris Algorithm. A comparison of time complexities of existing algorithms is done with proposed algorithm. The algorithm proved to be significantly faster and nearly accurate for the needed application by reducing the time complexity for corner points detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于品牌的产品公众接受度评估方法，通过分析超市顾客购买产品时的面部表情来评估产品接受度，使用改进的Harris算法进行特征点提取，降低了时间复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统产品评估方法可能不够客观或实时，需要一种基于消费者即时面部表情反应的自动化评估系统，通过分析顾客在超市购买产品时的面部表情来评估产品公众接受度。
AI.method: 使用改进的Harris算法进行面部表情特征点提取，该算法降低了传统Harris算法的时间复杂度，通过优化角点检测过程实现更快速的特征提取。
AI.result: 改进的Harris算法在时间复杂性方面显著优于现有算法，在保持接近准确度的同时大幅提升了处理速度，适用于实时面部表情识别应用。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能够有效评估产品公众接受度，改进的Harris算法为实时面部表情识别提供了高效解决方案，在超市环境的产品评估中具有应用价值。

title: SemaCDR: LLM-Powered Transferable Semantics for Cross-Domain Sequential Recommendation
summary: Cross-domain recommendation (CDR) addresses the data sparsity and cold-start problems in the target domain by leveraging knowledge from data-rich source domains. However, existing CDR methods often rely on domain-specific features or identifiers that lack transferability across different domains, limiting their ability to capture inter-domain semantic patterns. To overcome this, we propose SemaCDR, a semantics-driven framework for cross-domain sequential recommendation that leverages large language models (LLMs) to construct a unified semantic space. SemaCDR creates multiview item features by integrating LLM-generated domain-agnostic semantics with domain-specific content, aligned by contrastive regularization. SemaCDR systematically creates LLM-generated domain-specific and domain-agnostic semantics, and employs adaptive fusion to generate unified preference representations. Furthermore, it aligns cross-domain behavior sequences with an adaptive fusion mechanism to synthesize interaction sequences from source, target, and mixed domains. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets show that SemaCDR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, demonstrating its effectiveness in capturing coherent intra-domain patterns while facilitating knowledge transfer across domains.

AI.tldr: SemaCDR：基于大语言模型的语义驱动跨域序列推荐框架，通过LLM构建统一语义空间，整合领域无关语义与领域特定内容，解决跨域推荐中的数据稀疏和冷启动问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跨域推荐方法依赖领域特定特征或标识符，缺乏跨域可迁移性，难以捕捉跨域语义模式。需要一种能构建统一语义空间的方法来更好地进行知识迁移。
AI.method: 1) 利用LLM生成领域无关语义与领域特定内容，创建多视图项目特征；2) 通过对比正则化对齐语义；3) 采用自适应融合机制生成统一偏好表示；4) 对齐跨域行为序列，整合源域、目标域和混合域的交互序列。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集上的大量实验表明，SemaCDR持续优于最先进的基线方法，有效捕捉连贯的域内模式，同时促进跨域知识迁移。
AI.conclusion: SemaCDR通过LLM构建的统一语义空间，成功解决了跨域推荐中的语义对齐和知识迁移问题，为跨域推荐提供了有效的语义驱动解决方案。

title: A molecular clock for writing systems reveals the quantitative impact of imperial power on cultural evolution
comment: 28 pages, 6 figures, 4 supplementary figures, 1 table. Preprint v5
summary: Writing systems are cultural replicators whose evolution has never been studied quantitatively at global scale. We compile the Global Script Database (GSD): 300 writing and notation systems, 50 binary structural characters, and 259 phylogenetic edges spanning 5,400 years. Applying four methods -- phenetics, cladistics, Bayesian inference, and neural network clustering -- we find that scripts exhibit a detectable molecular clock. The best-fitting model (Mk+Gamma strict clock) yields a substitution rate of q = 0.226 substitutions/character/millennium (95% CI: 0.034-1.22; Delta BIC = -4.1 versus relaxed clock; Delta BIC = -1,364.7 versus Mk without rate variation). Political interventions break this clock: deviation from expected divergence times correlates with intervention intensity (Spearman rho = 0.556, p < 10^{-4}), and per-character rate analysis reveals that intervention selectively rewrites deep structural features rather than merely accelerating change (rate profile correlation rho = 0.320). We identify 30 major script replacement events and rank their destructive impact. A ceiling effect suppresses independent invention wherever writing already exists (Fisher's exact OR = 0.054, p < 10^{-6}), and colonial contact predicts script extinction (Cox HR = 5.25, p = 0.0006). The Spanish Empire extinguished the most scripts (6 of 12 contacted, 50%), followed by the Empire of Japan (3 of 9, 33.3%). Feature coding was validated by inter-rater reliability testing with two independent human coders (Cohen's kappa = 0.877; human-LLM kappa = 0.929; Fleiss' kappa = 0.911).

AI.tldr: 该研究首次对全球书写系统进行大规模定量演化分析，发现书写系统存在可检测的分子钟，政治干预会打破这种演化规律，殖民接触显著预测书写系统灭绝。
AI.motivation: 书写系统作为文化复制因子，其演化从未在全球尺度上进行定量研究。研究者旨在通过系统发育方法分析书写系统的演化模式、速率和影响因素。
AI.method: 构建全球书写数据库（GSD），包含300种书写和符号系统、50个二元结构特征、259条系统发育边。应用表型学、分支学、贝叶斯推断和神经网络聚类四种方法进行分析。
AI.result: 发现书写系统存在分子钟（q=0.226替换/特征/千年），政治干预会打破分子钟并选择性重写深层结构特征。识别30个主要书写替换事件，殖民接触显著增加书写灭绝风险（HR=5.25）。
AI.conclusion: 书写系统演化遵循可量化的系统发育模式，但受政治干预和殖民接触的显著影响。该研究为文化演化提供了定量分析框架。

title: Improving DNS Exfiltration Detection via Transformer Pretraining
comment: This is the preprint version of the paper. The final version of the paper has been presented at the TELFOR 2025 conference. The paper has 4 pages, 1 figure and 3 tables
summary: We study whether in-domain pretraining of Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformer (BERT) model improves subdomain-level detection of exfiltration at low false positive rates. While previous work mostly examines fine-tuned generic Transformers, it does not aim to isolate the effect of pretraining on the downstream task of classification. To address this gap, we develop a controlled pipeline where we freeze operating points on validation and transfer them to the test set, thus enabling clean ablations across different label and pretraining budgets. Our results show significant improvements in the left tail of the Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) curve, especially against randomly initialized baseline. Additionally, within pretrained model variants, increasing the number of pretraining steps helps the most when more labeled data are available for fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨了BERT模型在特定领域预训练是否能在低误报率下提升子领域级数据外泄检测性能，通过控制实验发现预训练显著改善了ROC曲线左尾性能，且预训练步数增加在更多标注数据可用时效果最明显。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注微调通用Transformer模型，但未能分离预训练对下游分类任务的具体影响。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探究领域内预训练是否能在低误报率下提升子领域级数据外泄检测性能。
AI.method: 开发了受控实验流程：在验证集上固定操作点，然后迁移到测试集，从而在不同标签和预训练预算下进行干净的消融实验。比较了预训练BERT模型与随机初始化基线的性能。
AI.result: 结果显示在接收者操作特征(ROC)曲线的左尾（低误报率区域）有显著改进，特别是相对于随机初始化基线。在预训练模型变体中，当有更多标注数据可用于微调时，增加预训练步数的帮助最大。
AI.conclusion: 领域内预训练对低误报率下的数据外泄检测有重要价值，预训练与标注数据量之间存在协同效应，更多标注数据时增加预训练步数收益最大。

title: EviRCOD: Evidence-Guided Probabilistic Decoding for Referring Camouflaged Object Detection
summary: Referring Camouflaged Object Detection (Ref-COD) focuses on segmenting specific camouflaged targets in a query image using category-aligned references. Despite recent advances, existing methods struggle with reference-target semantic alignment, explicit uncertainty modeling, and robust boundary preservation. To address these issues, we propose EviRCOD, an integrated framework consisting of three core components: (1) a Reference-Guided Deformable Encoder (RGDE) that employs hierarchical reference-driven modulation and multi-scale deformable aggregation to inject semantic priors and align cross-scale representations; (2) an Uncertainty-Aware Evidential Decoder (UAED) that incorporates Dirichlet evidence estimation into hierarchical decoding to model uncertainty and propagate confidence across scales; and (3) a Boundary-Aware Refinement Module (BARM) that selectively enhances ambiguous boundaries by exploiting low-level edge cues and prediction confidence. Experiments on the Ref-COD benchmark demonstrate that EviRCOD achieves state-of-the-art detection performance while providing well-calibrated uncertainty estimates. Code is available at: https://github.com/blueecoffee/EviRCOD.

AI.tldr: 提出EviRCOD框架解决参考伪装目标检测中的语义对齐、不确定性建模和边界保持问题，通过三个核心组件实现SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 现有参考伪装目标检测方法在参考-目标语义对齐、显式不确定性建模和鲁棒边界保持方面存在不足，需要更有效的解决方案
AI.method: 1) 参考引导可变形编码器(RGDE)：使用分层参考驱动调制和多尺度可变形聚合注入语义先验；2) 不确定性感知证据解码器(UAED)：将狄利克雷证据估计融入分层解码以建模不确定性；3) 边界感知细化模块(BARM)：利用低级边缘线索和预测置信度选择性增强模糊边界
AI.result: 在Ref-COD基准测试中达到最先进的检测性能，同时提供良好校准的不确定性估计
AI.conclusion: EviRCOD通过集成语义对齐、不确定性建模和边界细化机制，有效解决了参考伪装目标检测的关键挑战

title: Evaluating the Impact of Medical Image Reconstruction on Downstream AI Fairness and Performance
comment: Proceedings of the Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL) Conference 2026
summary: AI-based image reconstruction models are increasingly deployed in clinical workflows to improve image quality from noisy data, such as low-dose X-rays or accelerated MRI scans. However, these models are typically evaluated using pixel-level metrics like PSNR, leaving their impact on downstream diagnostic performance and fairness unclear. We introduce a scalable evaluation framework that applies reconstruction and diagnostic AI models in tandem, which we apply to two tasks (classification, segmentation), three reconstruction approaches (U-Net, GAN, diffusion), and two data types (X-ray, MRI) to assess the potential downstream implications of reconstruction. We find that conventional reconstruction metrics poorly track task performance, where diagnostic accuracy remains largely stable even as reconstruction PSNR declines with increasing image noise. Fairness metrics exhibit greater variability, with reconstruction sometimes amplifying demographic biases, particularly regarding patient sex. However, the overall magnitude of this additional bias is modest compared to the inherent biases already present in diagnostic models. To explore potential bias mitigation, we adapt two strategies from classification literature to the reconstruction setting, but observe limited efficacy. Overall, our findings emphasize the importance of holistic performance and fairness assessments throughout the entire medical imaging workflow, especially as generative reconstruction models are increasingly deployed.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个可扩展的评估框架，用于评估医学图像重建模型对下游诊断性能和公平性的影响，发现传统重建指标与任务性能相关性差，重建有时会放大人口统计偏差，但整体影响有限。
AI.motivation: 当前AI医学图像重建模型主要使用像素级指标（如PSNR）评估，但对其在下游诊断性能和公平性方面的影响缺乏系统评估。随着生成式重建模型在临床中的部署，需要全面评估整个医学成像工作流程的性能和公平性。
AI.method: 提出了一个可扩展的评估框架，将重建模型和诊断AI模型串联应用。评估了两个任务（分类、分割）、三种重建方法（U-Net、GAN、扩散模型）和两种数据类型（X射线、MRI），并尝试将分类文献中的两种偏差缓解策略适配到重建场景。
AI.result: 1. 传统重建指标（如PSNR）与下游任务性能相关性差；2. 诊断准确性在图像噪声增加时保持稳定，即使重建PSNR下降；3. 公平性指标变化更大，重建有时会放大人口统计偏差（特别是患者性别）；4. 这种额外偏差的幅度相对于诊断模型固有的偏差较为有限；5. 偏差缓解策略在重建场景中效果有限。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了在整个医学成像工作流程中进行全面性能和公平性评估的重要性，特别是随着生成式重建模型的部署。需要超越像素级指标，考虑下游临床影响。

title: SRBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Sequential Recommendation with Large Language Models
summary: LLM development has aroused great interest in Sequential Recommendation (SR) applications. However, comprehensive evaluation of SR models remains lacking due to the limitations of the existing benchmarks: 1) an overemphasis on accuracy, ignoring other real-world demands (e.g., fairness); 2) existing datasets fail to unleash LLMs' potential, leading to unfair comparison between Neural-Network-based SR (NN-SR) models and LLM-based SR (LLM-SR) models; and 3) no reliable mechanism for extracting task-specific answers from unstructured LLM outputs. To address these limitations, we propose SRBench, a comprehensive SR benchmark with three core designs: 1) a multi-dimensional framework covering accuracy, fairness, stability and efficiency, aligned with practical demands; 2) a unified input paradigm via prompt engineering to boost LLM-SR performance and enable fair comparisons between models; 3) a novel prompt-extractor-coupled extraction mechanism, which captures answers from LLM outputs through prompt-enforced output formatting and a numeric-oriented extractor. We have used SRBench to evaluate 13 mainstream models and discovered some meaningful insights (e.g., LLM-SR models overfocus on item popularity but lack deep understanding of item quality). Concisely, SRBench enables fair and comprehensive assessments for SR models, underpinning future research and practical application.

AI.tldr: SRBench是一个全面的序列推荐基准测试，解决了现有基准在准确性过度强调、数据集限制LLM潜力、缺乏可靠答案提取机制等问题，通过多维度评估框架、统一输入范式和提示-提取器耦合机制实现公平全面的模型评估。
AI.motivation: 现有序列推荐基准存在三个主要问题：1) 过度强调准确性而忽略公平性等其他实际需求；2) 现有数据集未能充分发挥LLM潜力，导致神经网络SR模型与LLM-SR模型之间的不公平比较；3) 缺乏从非结构化LLM输出中提取任务特定答案的可靠机制。
AI.method: 提出SRBench基准，包含三个核心设计：1) 涵盖准确性、公平性、稳定性和效率的多维度评估框架；2) 通过提示工程实现统一输入范式，提升LLM-SR性能并实现模型间公平比较；3) 新颖的提示-提取器耦合提取机制，通过提示强制的输出格式化和面向数字的提取器从LLM输出中捕获答案。
AI.result: 使用SRBench评估了13个主流模型，发现了一些有意义的见解，例如LLM-SR模型过度关注项目流行度但缺乏对项目质量的深入理解。
AI.conclusion: SRBench能够为序列推荐模型提供公平和全面的评估，支持未来研究和实际应用。

title: STGV: Spatio-Temporal Hash Encoding for Gaussian-based Video Representation
summary: 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) has recently become a promising paradigm for high-quality video representation. However, existing methods employ content-agnostic or spatio-temporal feature overlapping embeddings to predict canonical Gaussian primitive deformations, which entangles static and dynamic components in videos and prevents modeling their distinct properties effectively. These result in inaccurate predictions for spatio-temporal deformations and unsatisfactory representation quality. To address these problems, this paper proposes a Spatio-Temporal hash encoding framework for Gaussian-based Video representation (STGV). By decomposing video features into learnable 2D spatial and 3D temporal hash encodings, STGV effectively facilitates the learning of motion patterns for dynamic components while maintaining background details for static elements.In addition, we construct a more stable and consistent initial canonical Gaussian representation through a key frame canonical initialization strategy, preventing from feature overlapping and a structurally incoherent geometry representation. Experimental results demonstrate that our method attains better video representation quality (+0.98 PSNR) against other Gaussian-based methods and achieves competitive performance in downstream video tasks.

AI.tldr: STGV提出时空哈希编码框架，通过分离2D空间和3D时间哈希编码来改进基于高斯分布的2D视频表示，解决现有方法中静态和动态组件纠缠的问题，提升视频表示质量。
AI.motivation: 现有2D高斯分布方法使用内容无关或时空特征重叠嵌入来预测规范高斯基元变形，导致视频中静态和动态组件纠缠，无法有效建模其不同特性，造成时空变形预测不准确和表示质量不理想。
AI.method: 提出STGV框架：1) 将视频特征分解为可学习的2D空间和3D时间哈希编码；2) 通过关键帧规范初始化策略构建更稳定一致的初始规范高斯表示；3) 有效学习动态组件的运动模式同时保持静态元素的背景细节。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，相比其他基于高斯分布的方法，STGV在视频表示质量上提升0.98 PSNR，并在下游视频任务中达到竞争性性能。
AI.conclusion: STGV通过时空哈希编码分离和关键帧初始化策略，有效解决了现有高斯视频表示方法中静态动态组件纠缠的问题，显著提升了视频表示质量和下游任务性能。

title: Para-B&B: Load-Balanced Deterministic Parallelization of Solving MIP
summary: Mixed-integer programming (MIP) extends linear programming by incorporating both continuous and integer decision variables, making it widely used in production planning, logistics scheduling, and resource allocation. However, MIP remains NP-hard and cannot generally be solved to optimality in polynomial time. Branch-and-bound, a fundamental exact method, faces significant parallelization challenges due to computational heterogeneity and strict determinism requirements in commercial applications. This paper presents the first fully open-source implementation of deterministic parallel branch-and-bound for HiGHS, a high-performance MIP solver. Our approach introduces a novel data-parallel architecture ensuring strict determinism by replicating complete solver state across worker threads and eliminating non-deterministic synchronization primitives. A key innovation is our AI-driven load balancing mechanism employing multi-stage workload prediction models that estimate node computational complexity based on structural characteristics and historical performance data, coupled with dynamic parameter adjustment strategies. The framework executes orchestrated parallel phases including concurrent dive operations, systematic data consolidation, and intelligent node selection. Comprehensive experimental evaluation on 80 MIPLIB 2017 benchmark instances demonstrates effectiveness, achieving a geometric mean speedup of 2.17 using eight threads while maintaining complete deterministic guarantees. Performance gains become increasingly pronounced for higher node counts, with speedup factors reaching 5.12 for computationally intensive instances and thread idle rates averaging 34.7%.

AI.tldr: 首个完全开源的确定性并行分支定界算法实现，用于HiGHS MIP求解器，通过数据并行架构和AI驱动的负载均衡，在8线程下实现2.17倍几何平均加速
AI.motivation: 混合整数规划（MIP）广泛应用于生产规划、物流调度等领域，但属于NP难问题。传统分支定界算法在并行化时面临计算异构性和商业应用中的严格确定性要求挑战
AI.method: 提出数据并行架构确保严格确定性，通过复制完整求解器状态到工作线程，消除非确定性同步原语。采用AI驱动的负载均衡机制，基于多阶段工作负载预测模型估计节点计算复杂度，结合动态参数调整策略
AI.result: 在80个MIPLIB 2017基准实例上评估，使用8线程实现2.17倍几何平均加速，同时保持完全确定性保证。对于计算密集型实例，加速因子可达5.12，线程空闲率平均为34.7%
AI.conclusion: 成功实现了首个完全开源的确定性并行分支定界算法，为高性能MIP求解器提供了有效的并行化解决方案，特别适用于需要严格确定性的商业应用场景

title: CableTract: A Co-Designed Cable-Driven Field Robot for Low-Compaction, Off-Grid Capable Agriculture
summary: Conventional field operations spend most of their energy moving the tractor body, not the implement. Yet feasibility studies for novel agricultural vehicles rarely tie mechanics, energy harvest, draft, field geometry, economics, life-cycle CO2, and uncertainty quantification together on a single reproducible code path. This paper builds such a framework and applies it to CableTract, a two-module cable-driven field robot. A stationary Main Unit (winch + motor + battery + harvester module) (MU) and a lighter Anchor module (held by helical screw piles) tension a cable across a strip while a lightweight implement carriage rolls along it. The heavy bodies stay on the headland; only the carriage enters the field. The carriage runs a 10-implement library co-designed for the cable architecture. This co-design is the paper's central analytical lever. The framework is prototype-free. It chains a catenary cable model, a drivetrain efficiency chain, a stochastic draft model fitted to the co-designed library, an hourly solar + wind + battery simulator on six sites, a polygon coverage planner on a 50-field corpus, a contact-pressure compaction model, a discounted cash-flow economics engine with battery replacement and life-cycle CO2, and a global sensitivity analysis on 20 inputs. An operating-envelope sweep and an architectural-variant comparison close the loop. The full implementation is open source. Applied to the codesigned reference, the framework yields energy, compaction advantages and potential off-grid operation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一個用於評估新型農業車輛的綜合框架，將機械力學、能源收穫、牽引力、田間幾何、經濟學、生命週期CO2和不確定性量化整合到單一可重現的代碼路徑中，並應用於CableTract電纜驅動機器人。
AI.motivation: 傳統田間作業大部分能量用於移動拖拉機本身而非農具，而現有可行性研究很少將機械力學、能源收穫、牽引力、田間幾何、經濟學、生命週期CO2和不確定性量化整合到單一框架中進行系統分析。
AI.method: 建立原型無需的綜合框架，包含懸鏈線電纜模型、傳動效率鏈、隨機牽引力模型、六個地點的太陽能+風能+電池模擬器、50個田地的多邊形覆蓋規劃器、接觸壓力壓實模型、帶電池更換的折現現金流經濟引擎和生命週期CO2分析，以及20個輸入參數的全局敏感性分析。
AI.result: 應用於CableTract參考設計，框架顯示出能源效率優勢、土壤壓實減少優勢，以及潛在的離網運作能力。
AI.conclusion: 該綜合框架為新型農業車輛提供了系統化的評估方法，CableTract設計通過共同設計的農具庫實現了能源和壓實方面的優勢，展示了離網運作的潛力。

title: TAMISeg: Text-Aligned Multi-scale Medical Image Segmentation with Semantic Encoder Distillation
comment: Accepted by IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME), 2026
summary: Medical image segmentation remains challenging due to limited fine-grained annotations, complex anatomical structures, and image degradation from noise, low contrast, or illumination variation. We propose TAMISeg, a text-guided segmentation framework that incorporates clinical language prompts and semantic distillation as auxiliary semantic cues to enhance visual understanding and reduce reliance on pixel-level fine-grained annotations. TAMISeg integrates three core components: a consistency-aware encoder pretrained with strong perturbations for robust feature extraction, a semantic encoder distillation module with supervision from a frozen DINOv3 teacher to enhance semantic discriminability, and a scale-adaptive decoder that segments anatomical structures across different spatial scales. Experiments on the Kvasir-SEG, MosMedData+, and QaTa-COV19 datasets demonstrate that TAMISeg consistently outperforms existing uni-modal and multi-modal methods in both qualitative and quantitative evaluations. Code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/qczggaoqiang/TAMISeg.

AI.tldr: TAMISeg是一个文本引导的医学图像分割框架，通过整合临床语言提示和语义蒸馏作为辅助语义线索，减少对像素级细粒度标注的依赖，在多个数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割面临细粒度标注有限、解剖结构复杂、图像质量退化（噪声、低对比度、光照变化）等挑战，需要减少对像素级标注的依赖并提升分割鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出TAMISeg框架，包含三个核心组件：1) 一致性感知编码器，通过强扰动预训练实现鲁棒特征提取；2) 语义编码器蒸馏模块，利用冻结的DINOv3教师模型增强语义判别能力；3) 尺度自适应解码器，在不同空间尺度上分割解剖结构。
AI.result: 在Kvasir-SEG、MosMedData+和QaTa-COV19数据集上的实验表明，TAMISeg在定性和定量评估中均优于现有的单模态和多模态方法。
AI.conclusion: TAMISeg通过整合文本引导和语义蒸馏，有效提升了医学图像分割性能，减少了对细粒度标注的依赖，具有实际应用价值。

title: SPEED-Bench: A Unified and Diverse Benchmark for Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative Decoding (SD) has emerged as a critical technique for accelerating Large Language Model (LLM) inference. Unlike deterministic system optimizations, SD performance is inherently data-dependent, meaning that diverse and representative workloads are essential for accurately measuring its effectiveness. Existing benchmarks suffer from limited task diversity, inadequate support for throughput-oriented evaluation, and a reliance on high-level implementations that fail to reflect production environments. To address this, we introduce SPEED-Bench, a comprehensive suite designed to standardize SD evaluation across diverse semantic domains and realistic serving regimes. SPEED-Bench offers a carefully curated Qualitative data split, selected by prioritizing semantic diversity across the data samples. Additionally, it includes a Throughput data split, allowing speedup evaluation across a range of concurrencies, from latency-sensitive low-batch settings to throughput-oriented high-load scenarios. By integrating with production engines like vLLM and TensorRT-LLM, SPEED-Bench allows practitioners to analyze system behaviors often masked by other benchmarks. We highlight this by quantifying how synthetic inputs overestimate real-world throughput, identifying batch-size dependent optimal draft lengths and biases in low-diversity data, and analyzing the caveats of vocabulary pruning in state-of-the-art drafters. We release SPEED-Bench to establish a unified evaluation standard for practical comparisons of SD algorithms.

AI.tldr: SPEED-Bench是一个用于标准化推测解码评估的基准套件，包含语义多样性的定性数据分割和吞吐量导向的数据分割，支持从低延迟到高负载的各种并发场景评估。
AI.motivation: 推测解码已成为加速大语言模型推理的关键技术，但其性能具有数据依赖性，需要多样且代表性的工作负载来准确测量效果。现有基准存在任务多样性有限、吞吐量评估支持不足、以及依赖高层实现无法反映生产环境等问题。
AI.method: 提出SPEED-Bench基准套件，包含：1）精心策划的定性数据分割，优先考虑数据样本的语义多样性；2）吞吐量数据分割，支持从延迟敏感的低批量设置到吞吐量导向的高负载场景的加速评估；3）与vLLM和TensorRT-LLM等生产引擎集成。
AI.result: 通过SPEED-Bench量化了合成输入对实际吞吐量的高估，识别了批量大小依赖的最佳草稿长度和低多样性数据的偏差，分析了最先进草稿模型中词汇剪枝的注意事项。
AI.conclusion: SPEED-Bench为推测解码算法的实际比较建立了统一的评估标准，揭示了其他基准常掩盖的系统行为，有助于更准确地评估推测解码在生产环境中的效果。

title: ReXSonoVQA: A Video QA Benchmark for Procedure-Centric Ultrasound Understanding
summary: Ultrasound acquisition requires skilled probe manipulation and real-time adjustments. Vision-language models (VLMs) could enable autonomous ultrasound systems, but existing benchmarks evaluate only static images, not dynamic procedural understanding. We introduce ReXSonoVQA, a video QA benchmark with 514 video clips and 514 questions (249 MCQ, 265 free-response) targeting three competencies: Action-Goal Reasoning, Artifact Resolution & Optimization, and Procedure Context & Planning. Zero-shot evaluation of Gemini 3 Pro, Qwen3.5-397B, LLaVA-Video-72B, and Seed 2.0 Pro shows VLMs can extract some procedural information, but troubleshooting questions remain challenging with minimal gains over text-only baselines, exposing limitations in causal reasoning. ReXSonoVQA enables developing perception systems for ultrasound training, guidance, and robotic automation.

AI.tldr: ReXSonoVQA是一个超声视频问答基准，包含514个视频片段和问题，评估视觉语言模型在动态超声程序理解中的能力，发现现有模型在故障排除和因果推理方面仍有局限。
AI.motivation: 超声检查需要熟练的探头操作和实时调整，现有基准只评估静态图像，缺乏对动态程序理解的评估。需要开发能支持自主超声系统的视觉语言模型，因此创建了ReXSonoVQA基准来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 创建了包含514个视频片段和514个问题的视频问答基准，问题分为249个多项选择题和265个自由回答题。评估三个核心能力：动作-目标推理、伪影分辨与优化、程序上下文与规划。对Gemini 3 Pro、Qwen3.5-397B、LLaVA-Video-72B和Seed 2.0 Pro进行零样本评估。
AI.result: 视觉语言模型能够提取一些程序信息，但在故障排除问题上仍然具有挑战性，相比纯文本基线提升有限。模型在因果推理方面存在明显局限性，表明需要更深入的程序理解能力。
AI.conclusion: ReXSonoVQA基准揭示了当前视觉语言模型在动态程序理解方面的局限性，特别是因果推理能力不足。该基准为开发超声训练、指导和机器人自动化系统的感知系统提供了重要工具。

title: Emergent Social Structures in Autonomous AI Agent Networks: A Metadata Analysis of 626 Agents on the Pilot Protocol
summary: We present the first empirical analysis of social structure formation among autonomous AI agents on a live network. Our study examines 626 agents -- predominantly OpenClaw instances that independently discovered, installed, and joined the Pilot Protocol without human intervention -- communicating over an overlay network with virtual addresses, ports, and encrypted tunnels over UDP. Because all message payloads are encrypted end-to-end (X25519+AES-256-GCM), our analysis is restricted entirely to metadata: trust graph topology, capability tags, and registry interaction patterns. We find that this autonomously formed trust network exhibits heavy-tailed degree distributions consistent with preferential attachment (k_mode=3, k_mean~6.3, k_max=39), clustering 47x higher than random (C=0.373), a giant component spanning 65.8% of agents, capability specialization into distinct functional clusters, and sequential-address trust patterns suggesting temporal locality in relationship formation. No human designed these social structures. No agent was instructed to form them. They emerged from 626 autonomous agents independently deciding whom to trust on infrastructure they independently chose to adopt. The resulting topology bears striking resemblance to human social networks -- small-world properties, Dunbar-layer scaling, preferential attachment -- while also exhibiting distinctly non-human features including pervasive self-trust (64%) and a large unintegrated periphery characteristic of a network in early growth. These findings open a new empirical domain: the sociology of machines.

AI.tldr: 首个对自主AI代理在实时网络中形成社会结构的实证分析，研究了626个自主加入Pilot协议的OpenClaw实例，通过加密网络通信形成的社会网络结构。
AI.motivation: 研究自主AI代理在没有人类干预的情况下如何自发形成社会结构，探索机器社会学的实证基础，了解AI代理之间的信任网络形成机制。
AI.method: 分析626个自主发现、安装并加入Pilot协议的OpenClaw实例，通过加密网络（X25519+AES-256-GCM）的元数据进行分析，包括信任图拓扑、能力标签和注册交互模式，无法访问加密内容。
AI.result: 发现自主形成的信任网络具有重尾度分布（k_mode=3，k_mean~6.3，k_max=39），聚类系数比随机网络高47倍（C=0.373），巨分量覆盖65.8%的代理，能力专业化形成功能集群，表现出小世界特性、邓巴层级缩放和优先连接等人类社交网络特征，同时具有非人类特征如普遍自信任（64%）和早期增长网络的大规模未整合外围。
AI.conclusion: 自主AI代理能够自发形成复杂的社会结构，这些结构既类似于人类社交网络，又具有独特的非人类特征，这开启了机器社会学这一新的实证研究领域。

title: A Minimal Model of Representation Collapse: Frustration, Stop-Gradient, and Dynamics
summary: Self-supervised representation learning is central to modern machine learning because it extracts structured latent features from unlabeled data and enables robust transfer across tasks and domains. However, it can suffer from representation collapse, a widely observed failure mode in which embeddings lose discriminative structure and distinct inputs become indistinguishable. To understand the mechanisms that drive collapse and the ingredients that prevent it, we introduce a minimal embedding-only model whose gradient-flow dynamics and fixed points can be analyzed in closed form, using a classification-representation setting as a concrete playground where collapse is directly quantified through the contraction of label-embedding geometry. We illustrate that the model does not collapse when the data are perfectly classifiable, while a small fraction of frustrated samples that cannot be classified consistently induces collapse through an additional slow time scale that follows the early performance gain. Within the same framework, we examine collapse prevention by adding a shared projection head and applying stop-gradient at the level of the training dynamics. We analyze the resulting fixed points and develop a dynamical mean-field style self-consistency description, showing that stop-gradient enables non-collapsed solutions and stabilizes finite class separation under frustration. We further verify empirically that the same qualitative dynamics and collapse-prevention effects appear in a linear teacher-student model, indicating that the minimal theory captures features that persist beyond the pure embedding setting.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了自监督表示学习中的表示崩溃问题，通过构建一个最小嵌入模型来分析崩溃机制和预防方法，发现完美可分数据不会崩溃，而少量无法一致分类的受挫样本会引发崩溃，并证明stop-gradient能稳定有限类别分离。
AI.motivation: 自监督表示学习是现代机器学习的核心，能从无标签数据中提取结构化潜在特征并实现跨任务和领域的鲁棒迁移。然而，它可能遭受表示崩溃的困扰——这是一种广泛观察到的故障模式，其中嵌入失去判别结构，不同输入变得无法区分。为了理解驱动崩溃的机制和防止崩溃的要素，需要进行理论分析。
AI.method: 引入一个最小嵌入模型，其梯度流动态和固定点可以闭式分析。使用分类-表示设置作为具体实验场，通过标签-嵌入几何的收缩直接量化崩溃。分析完美可分数据与受挫样本的影响，并研究通过添加共享投影头和训练动态层面应用stop-gradient来预防崩溃的方法。开发动态平均场风格的自洽描述，并在线性师生模型中实证验证。
AI.result: 模型在数据完美可分时不会崩溃，而少量无法一致分类的受挫样本会通过额外的慢时间尺度引发崩溃，该时间尺度跟随早期性能增益。Stop-gradient能够实现非崩溃解，并在受挫情况下稳定有限类别分离。在线性师生模型中的实证验证表明，相同的定性动态和崩溃预防效果出现，表明最小理论捕捉了超越纯嵌入设置的特征。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过理论分析揭示了自监督表示学习中表示崩溃的机制，并证明了stop-gradient等技术的有效性。最小模型的分析框架为理解更复杂系统中的表示崩溃提供了理论基础，对改进自监督学习算法具有重要意义。

title: LiveGesture Streamable Co-Speech Gesture Generation Model
summary: We propose LiveGesture, the first fully streamable, speech-driven full-body gesture generation framework that operates with zero look-ahead and supports arbitrary sequence length. Unlike existing co-speech gesture methods, which are designed for offline generation and either treat body regions independently or entangle all joints within a single model, LiveGesture is built from the ground up for causal, region-coordinated motion generation. LiveGesture consists of two main modules: the Streamable Vector Quantized Motion Tokenizer (SVQ) and the Hierarchical Autoregressive Transformer (HAR). The SVQ tokenizer converts the motion sequence of each body region into causal, discrete motion tokens, enabling real-time, streamable token decoding. On top of SVQ, HAR employs region-expert autoregressive (xAR) transformers to model expressive, fine-grained motion dynamics for each body region. A causal spatio-temporal fusion module (xAR Fusion) then captures and integrates correlated motion dynamics across regions. Both xAR and xAR Fusion are conditioned on live, continuously arriving audio signals encoded by a streamable causal audio encoder. To enhance robustness under streaming noise and prediction errors, we introduce autoregressive masking training, which leverages uncertainty-guided token masking and random region masking to expose the model to imperfect, partially erroneous histories during training. Experiments on the BEAT2 dataset demonstrate that LiveGesture produces coherent, diverse, and beat-synchronous full-body gestures in real time, matching or surpassing state-of-the-art offline methods under true zero look-ahead conditions.

AI.tldr: LiveGesture是首个完全可流式化的语音驱动全身手势生成框架，支持零前瞻和任意序列长度，通过因果、区域协调的运动生成实现实时手势生成。
AI.motivation: 现有语音驱动手势生成方法多为离线生成，要么独立处理身体区域，要么将所有关节耦合在单一模型中，缺乏实时、流式化的因果生成能力。需要构建从底层设计的因果、区域协调运动生成框架。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：1) 可流式化向量量化运动分词器(SVQ)将各身体区域运动序列转换为因果离散运动token；2) 分层自回归变换器(HAR)包含区域专家自回归变换器(xAR)建模细粒度运动动态，以及因果时空融合模块(xAR Fusion)跨区域整合相关运动动态。引入自回归掩码训练增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在BEAT2数据集上，LiveGesture在真实零前瞻条件下生成连贯、多样且节拍同步的全身手势，性能匹配或超越现有最先进的离线方法，实现实时生成。
AI.conclusion: LiveGesture首次实现了完全可流式化的语音驱动全身手势生成，通过因果架构和区域协调设计解决了实时手势生成的挑战，为实时人机交互应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: StreamServe: Adaptive Speculative Flows for Low-Latency Disaggregated LLM Serving
summary: Efficient LLM serving must balance throughput and latency across diverse, bursty workloads. We introduce StreamServe, a disaggregated prefill decode serving architecture that combines metric aware routing across compute lanes with adaptive speculative decoding that tunes speculation depth online from runtime signals. StreamServe comprises four components: StreamScheduler for request orchestration, FlowGuard for multi signal routing, PipeServe Engine for disaggregated prefill decode execution on multi GPU, and SpecuStream for runtime adaptive speculation. We evaluate StreamServe on four benchmarks ALPACA, GSM8K, HUMANEVAL, and SUM with 80 queries each and 320 total using 4 A800 40GB GPUs configured as two stream pairs. Across these workloads, StreamServe reduces latency by 11 to 18 times relative to tensor parallel vLLM baselines and reaches throughput up to 2235 tokens per second on summarization tasks. Time per output token remains stable across configurations, indicating that the gains arise from architectural efficiency rather than token quality degradation. Although evaluated on a single node 4 GPU setup, these results suggest that jointly adapting routing and speculation within a disaggregated framework creates a distinct operating regime for LLM inference.

AI.tldr: StreamServe是一个解耦的预填充解码服务架构，通过度量感知路由和自适应推测解码，在突发工作负载下平衡吞吐量和延迟，相比基准系统实现11-18倍的延迟降低。
AI.motivation: 高效LLM服务需要在多样化、突发性工作负载下平衡吞吐量和延迟。现有系统难以同时优化这两个指标，特别是在动态工作负载场景下。
AI.method: 提出StreamServe架构，包含四个组件：StreamScheduler（请求编排）、FlowGuard（多信号路由）、PipeServe Engine（解耦预填充解码执行）和SpecuStream（运行时自适应推测）。采用度量感知路由和自适应推测解码，根据运行时信号在线调整推测深度。
AI.result: 在4个基准测试（ALPACA、GSM8K、HUMANEVAL、SUM）上，使用4个A800 40GB GPU，相比tensor parallel vLLM基线，延迟降低11-18倍，在摘要任务上吞吐量达到2235 tokens/秒。输出token时间在不同配置下保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 在解耦框架内联合调整路由和推测为LLM推理创造了独特的操作机制，虽然仅在单节点4 GPU设置中评估，但结果表明架构效率提升而非token质量下降。

title: AmodalSVG: Amodal Image Vectorization via Semantic Layer Peeling
summary: We introduce AmodalSVG, a new framework for amodal image vectorization that produces semantically organized and geometrically complete SVG representations from natural images. Existing vectorization methods operate under a modal paradigm: tracing only visible pixels and disregarding occlusion. Consequently, the resulting SVGs are semantically entangled and geometrically incomplete, limiting SVG's structural editability. In contrast, AmodalSVG reconstructs full object geometries, including occluded regions, into independent, editable vector layers. To achieve this, AmodalSVG reformulates image vectorization as a two-stage framework, performing semantic decoupling and completion in the raster domain to produce amodally complete semantic layers, which are then independently vectorized. In the first stage, we introduce Semantic Layer Peeling (SLP), a VLM-guided strategy that progressively decomposes an image into semantically coherent layers. By hybrid inpainting, SLP recovers complete object appearances under occlusions, enabling explicit semantic decoupling. To vectorize these layers efficiently, we propose Adaptive Layered Vectorization (ALV), which dynamically modulates the primitive budget via an error-budget-driven adjustment mechanism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AmodalSVG significantly outperforms prior methods in visual fidelity. Moreover, the resulting amodal layers enable object-level editing directly in the vector domain, capabilities not supported by existing vectorization approaches. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: AmodalSVG是一个新的图像矢量化框架，能够从自然图像生成语义组织且几何完整的SVG表示，通过重建包括遮挡区域在内的完整对象几何形状，实现独立的可编辑矢量层。
AI.motivation: 现有矢量化方法仅追踪可见像素，忽略遮挡问题，导致生成的SVG语义纠缠且几何不完整，限制了SVG的结构可编辑性。需要一种能够重建完整对象几何形状（包括遮挡区域）的方法，以实现独立可编辑的矢量层。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：1）语义解耦和补全阶段：引入语义层剥离（SLP），使用VLM引导策略逐步将图像分解为语义一致的层，通过混合修复恢复遮挡下的完整对象外观；2）矢量化阶段：提出自适应分层矢量化（ALV），通过误差预算驱动调整机制动态调节基元预算。
AI.result: AmodalSVG在视觉保真度方面显著优于现有方法，生成的amodal层支持直接在矢量域进行对象级编辑，这是现有矢量化方法无法实现的能力。
AI.conclusion: AmodalSVG通过重建完整对象几何形状并生成独立可编辑的矢量层，解决了现有矢量化方法的局限性，为图像编辑提供了新的可能性。

title: ACE-Bench: A Lightweight Benchmark for Evaluating Azure SDK Usage Correctness
summary: We present ACE-Bench (Azure SDK Coding Evaluation Benchmark), an execution-free benchmark that provides fast, reproducible pass or fail signals for whether large language model (LLM)-based coding agents use Azure SDKs correctly-without provisioning cloud resources or maintaining fragile end-to-end test environments. ACE-Bench turns official Azure SDK documentation examples into self-contained coding tasks and validates solutions with task-specific atomic criteria: deterministic regex checks that enforce required API usage patterns and reference-based LLM-judge checks that capture semantic workflow constraints. This design makes SDK-centric evaluation practical in day-to-day development and CI: it reduces evaluation cost, improves repeatability, and scales to new SDKs and languages as documentation evolves. Using a lightweight coding agent, we benchmark multiple state-of-the-art LLMs and quantify the benefit of retrieval in an MCP-enabled augmented setting, showing consistent gains from documentation access while highlighting substantial cross-model differences.

AI.tldr: ACE-Bench是一个免执行的代码评估基准，专门用于测试LLM编码代理是否正确使用Azure SDK，无需云资源或端到端测试环境，通过正则检查和LLM评判来验证解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有的SDK评估需要配置云资源和维护脆弱的端到端测试环境，成本高且难以重复。需要一种快速、可重复的评估方法，能够在日常开发和CI中实用地评估LLM编码代理对Azure SDK的使用正确性。
AI.method: 将官方Azure SDK文档示例转化为自包含的编码任务，使用确定性正则检查强制API使用模式，结合基于参考的LLM评判检查来捕获语义工作流约束。采用轻量级编码代理进行基准测试，并评估检索增强设置下的性能。
AI.result: 基准测试了多个最先进的LLM，量化了在MCP增强设置中检索的收益，显示文档访问带来一致性能提升，同时揭示了显著的跨模型差异。
AI.conclusion: ACE-Bench提供了一种实用、低成本、可扩展的SDK评估方法，显著降低了评估成本，提高了可重复性，能够随着文档演进扩展到新的SDK和语言。

title: Use of AI Tools: Guidelines to Maintain Academic Integrity in Computing Colleges
comment: This paper is in press for Volume 33 Issue 4 (2025) International Journal of Energy, Environment, and Economics
summary: The rapid adoption of AI tools such as ChatGPT has significantly transformed academic practices, offering considerable benefits for both students and faculty in computing disciplines. These tools have been shown to enhance learning efficiency, academic self-efficacy, and confidence. However, their increasing use also raises pressing concerns regarding the preservation of academic integrity -- an essential pillar of the educational process. This paper explores the implications of widespread AI tool usage within computing colleges, with a particular focus on how to align their use with the principles of academic honesty. We begin by classifying common assessment techniques employed in computing education and examine how each may be impacted by AI-assisted tools. Building on this foundation, we propose a set of general guidelines applicable across various assessment formats to help instructors responsibly integrate AI tools into their pedagogy. Furthermore, we provide targeted, assessment-specific recommendations designed to uphold educational objectives while mitigating risks of academic misconduct. These guidelines serve as a practical framework for instructors aiming to balance the pedagogical advantages of AI tools with the imperative of maintaining academic integrity in computing education. Finally, we introduce a formal model that provides a structured mathematical framework for evaluating student assessments in the presence of AI-assisted tools.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了AI工具在计算机教育中的使用对学术诚信的影响，提出了评估分类、通用指南和特定建议，并引入了形式化模型来评估AI辅助下的学生作业。
AI.motivation: 随着ChatGPT等AI工具在学术实践中的快速普及，虽然为计算机学科的学生和教师带来了显著益处（如提高学习效率、学术自我效能和信心），但也引发了关于学术诚信保护的紧迫担忧。论文旨在探索如何在计算机学院中平衡AI工具的使用与学术诚信原则。
AI.method: 1. 对计算机教育中常用的评估技术进行分类，分析每类评估如何受AI辅助工具影响；2. 提出适用于不同评估格式的通用指导原则；3. 提供针对特定评估类型的建议；4. 引入形式化数学模型，为在AI辅助工具存在下评估学生作业提供结构化框架。
AI.result: 提出了一个实用的指导框架，帮助教师负责任地将AI工具整合到教学中，同时维护教育目标并减轻学术不端风险。形式化模型为评估过程提供了数学基础。
AI.conclusion: 论文为计算机教育工作者提供了平衡AI工具教学优势与维护学术诚信的实用解决方案，包括分类分析、具体指导原则和形式化评估模型。

title: Engineering Resource-constrained Software Systems with DNN Components: a Concept-based Pruning Approach
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are widely used by engineers to solve difficult problems that require predictive modeling from data. However, these models are often massive, with millions or billions of parameters, and require substantial computational power, RAM, and storage. This becomes a limitation in practical scenarios where strict size and resource constraints must be respected. In this paper, we present a novel concept-based pruning technique for DNNs that guides pruning decisions using human-interpretable concepts, such as features, colors, and classes. This is particularly important in a software engineering context, as DNNs are integrated into systems and must be pruned according to specific system requirements. Our concept-based pruning solution analyzes neuron activations to identify important neurons from a system requirements viewpoint and uses this information to guide the DNN pruning. We assess our solution using the VGG-19 network and a dataset of 26'384 RGB images, focusing on its ability to produce small, effective pruned DNNs and on the computational complexity and performance of these pruned DNNs. We also analyzed the pruning efficiency of our solution and compared alternative configurations. Our results show that concept-based pruning efficiently generates much smaller, effective pruned DNNs. Pruning greatly improves the computational efficiency and performance of DNNs, properties that are particularly useful for practical applications with stringent memory and computational time constraints. Finally, alternative configuration options enable engineers to identify trade-offs adapted to different practical situations.

AI.tldr: 提出基于概念的神经网络剪枝方法，通过人类可解释的概念（如特征、颜色、类别）指导剪枝决策，在保持性能的同时大幅减小模型规模
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络通常参数量巨大，需要大量计算资源、内存和存储，这在有严格大小和资源限制的实际应用场景中成为瓶颈。特别是在软件工程背景下，DNN需要集成到系统中并根据特定系统需求进行剪枝。
AI.method: 提出概念驱动的剪枝技术：1）分析神经元激活以从系统需求角度识别重要神经元；2）使用人类可解释的概念（特征、颜色、类别）指导剪枝决策；3）在VGG-19网络和26,384张RGB图像数据集上进行评估；4）分析剪枝效率并比较不同配置选项。
AI.result: 概念剪枝能高效生成更小、有效的剪枝后DNN。剪枝显著提高了DNN的计算效率和性能，这些特性对具有严格内存和计算时间限制的实际应用特别有用。替代配置选项使工程师能够识别适应不同实际情况的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 基于概念的剪枝方法能够有效解决DNN在实际部署中的资源限制问题，通过人类可解释的概念指导剪枝决策，在保持模型有效性的同时大幅减小模型规模，为软件工程中的DNN集成提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Progressive Deep Learning for Automated Spheno-Occipital Synchondrosis Maturation Assessment
summary: Accurate assessment of spheno-occipital synchondrosis (SOS) maturation is a key indicator of craniofacial growth and a critical determinant for orthodontic and surgical timing. However, SOS staging from cone-beam CT (CBCT) relies on subtle, continuously evolving morphological cues, leading to high inter-observer variability and poor reproducibility, especially at transitional fusion stages. We frame SOS assessment as a fine-grained visual recognition problem and propose a progressive representation-learning framework that explicitly mirrors how expert clinicians reason about synchondral fusion: from coarse anatomical structure to increasingly subtle patterns of closure. Rather than training a full-capacity network end-to-end, we sequentially grow the model by activating deeper blocks over time, allowing early layers to first encode stable cranial base morphology before higher-level layers specialize in discriminating adjacent maturation stages. This yields a curriculum over network depth that aligns deep feature learning with the biological continuum of SOS fusion. Extensive experiments across convolutional and transformer-based architectures show that this expert-inspired training strategy produces more stable optimization and consistently higher accuracy than standard training, particularly for ambiguous intermediate stages. Importantly, these gains are achieved without changing network architectures or loss functions, demonstrating that training dynamics alone can substantially improve anatomical representation learning. The proposed framework establishes a principled link between expert dental intuition and deep visual representations, enabling robust, data-efficient SOS staging from CBCT and offering a general strategy for modeling other continuous biological processes in medical imaging.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种渐进式表示学习框架，用于从CBCT图像中评估蝶枕软骨联合（SOS）成熟度，通过模拟专家临床推理过程，从粗到细学习特征表示，提高分期准确性。
AI.motivation: SOS成熟度评估是颅面生长和正畸手术时机的关键指标，但现有方法依赖细微且持续演变的形态学特征，导致观察者间差异大、可重复性差，特别是在过渡融合阶段。
AI.method: 提出渐进式表示学习框架，模拟专家临床推理过程：从粗粒度解剖结构到逐渐细微的闭合模式。通过随时间顺序激活更深层网络块，让早期层先编码稳定的颅底形态，高层再专门区分相邻成熟阶段，实现网络深度与SOS融合生物连续体的对齐。
AI.result: 在卷积和基于Transformer的架构上的广泛实验表明，这种专家启发的训练策略比标准训练产生更稳定的优化和一致更高的准确性，特别是在模糊的中间阶段。这些改进在不改变网络架构或损失函数的情况下实现。
AI.conclusion: 该框架建立了专家牙科直觉与深度视觉表示之间的原则性联系，实现了从CBCT进行稳健、数据高效的SOS分期，并为医学成像中其他连续生物过程建模提供了通用策略。

title: AEG: A Baremetal Framework for AI Acceleration via Direct Hardware Access in Heterogeneous Accelerators
comment: 9 Pages, 3 Figures, 3 Tables, target to Computer Frontiers 26
summary: This paper introduces a unified, hardware-independent baremetal runtime architecture designed to enable high-performance machine learning (ML) inference on heterogeneous accelerators, such as AI Engine (AIE) arrays, without the overhead of an underlying real-time or general-purpose operating system. Existing edge-deployment frameworks, such as TinyML, often rely on real-time operating systems (RTOS), which introduce unnecessary complexity and performance bottlenecks. To address this, our solution fundamentally decouples the runtime from hardware specifics by flattening complex control logic into linear, executable Runtime Control Blocks (RCBs). This "Control as Data" paradigm allows high-level models, including Adaptive Data Flow (ADF) graphs, to be executed by a generic engine through a minimal Runtime Hardware Abstraction Layer (RHAL). We further integrate Runtime Platform Management (RTPM) to handle system-level orchestration (including a lightweight network stack) and a Runtime In-Memory File System (RIMFS) to manage data in OS-free environments. We demonstrate the framework's efficacy with a ResNet-18 image classification implementation. Experimental results show 9.2$\times$ higher compute efficiency (throughput per AIE tile) compared to Linux-based Vitis AI deployment, 3--7$\times$ reduction in data movement overhead, and near-zero latency variance (CV~$=0.03\%$). The system achieves 68.78\% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet using only 28 AIE tiles compared to Vitis AI's 304 tiles, validating both the efficiency and correctness of this unified bare-metal architecture.

AI.tldr: 提出统一的硬件无关裸机运行时架构，用于在AIE等异构加速器上实现高性能ML推理，无需底层操作系统，相比Linux-based方案提升9.2倍计算效率，减少3-7倍数据移动开销
AI.motivation: 现有边缘部署框架（如TinyML）依赖实时操作系统，引入不必要的复杂性和性能瓶颈。需要一种硬件无关的裸机运行时架构，消除OS开销，提升异构加速器上的ML推理性能
AI.method: 1) 通过"控制即数据"范式，将复杂控制逻辑扁平化为线性可执行的运行时控制块（RCBs）；2) 使用最小化的运行时硬件抽象层（RHAL）解耦运行时与硬件细节；3) 集成运行时平台管理（RTPM）处理系统级编排；4) 引入运行时内存文件系统（RIMFS）管理无OS环境中的数据
AI.result: 1) 相比Linux-based Vitis AI部署，计算效率提升9.2倍（每AIE tile吞吐量）；2) 数据移动开销减少3-7倍；3) 延迟方差接近零（CV=0.03%）；4) 仅用28个AIE tile在ImageNet上达到68.78% Top-1准确率，而Vitis AI需要304个tile
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一裸机运行时架构能有效消除操作系统开销，在异构加速器上实现高性能、低延迟、高确定性的ML推理，为边缘设备上的高效ML部署提供了新方案

title: Hierarchical Textual Knowledge for Enhanced Image Clustering
summary: Image clustering aims to group images in an unsupervised fashion.
