Traditional methods focus on knowledge from visual space, making it difficult to distinguish between visually similar but semantically different classes. Recent advances in vision-language models enable the use of textual knowledge to enhance image clustering. However, most existing methods rely on coarse class labels or simple nouns, overlooking the rich conceptual and attribute-level semantics embedded in textual space. In this paper, we propose a knowledge-enhanced clustering (KEC) method that constructs a hierarchical concept-attribute structured knowledge with the help of large language models (LLMs) to guide clustering. Specifically, we first condense redundant textual labels into abstract concepts and then automatically extract discriminative attributes for each single concept and similar concept pairs, via structured prompts to LLMs. This knowledge is instantiated for each input image to achieve the knowledge-enhanced features. The knowledge-enhanced features with original visual features are adapted to various downstream clustering algorithms. We evaluate KEC on 20 diverse datasets, showing consistent improvements across existing methods using additional textual knowledge. KEC without training outperforms zero-shot CLIP on 14 out of 20 datasets. Furthermore, the naive use of textual knowledge may harm clustering performance, while KEC provides both accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: 提出KEC方法，利用LLMs构建层次化概念-属性结构化知识来增强图像聚类，通过抽象概念和判别性属性改进特征表示，在20个数据集上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 传统图像聚类方法主要依赖视觉空间知识，难以区分视觉相似但语义不同的类别。现有利用视觉-语言模型的方法通常使用粗糙的类别标签或简单名词，忽略了文本空间中丰富的概念和属性级语义信息。
AI.method: 1) 使用LLMs构建层次化概念-属性结构化知识：首先将冗余文本标签浓缩为抽象概念，然后通过结构化提示自动提取每个单一概念和相似概念对的判别性属性；2) 为每个输入图像实例化知识，获得知识增强特征；3) 将知识增强特征与原始视觉特征结合，适配到各种下游聚类算法。
AI.result: 在20个多样化数据集上评估，相比现有使用额外文本知识的方法取得一致改进。无训练的KEC在20个数据集中有14个优于零样本CLIP。同时证明简单使用文本知识可能损害聚类性能，而KEC在准确性和鲁棒性方面都有提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过LLMs构建的结构化知识能够有效增强图像聚类，提供比简单文本标签更丰富的语义信息，在多个数据集上验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。

title: Predicting Associations between Solar Flares and Coronal Mass Ejections Using SDO/HMI Magnetograms and a Hybrid Neural Network
summary: Solar eruptions, including flares and coronal mass ejections (CMEs), have a significant impact on Earth. Some flares are associated with CMEs, and some flares are not. The association between flares and CMEs is not always obvious. In this study, we propose a new deep learning method, specifically a hybrid neural network (HNN) that combines a vision transformer with long short-term memory, to predict associations between flares and CMEs. HNN finds spatio-temporal patterns in the time series of line-of-sight magnetograms of solar active regions (ARs) collected by the Helioseismic and Magnetic Imager on board the Solar Dynamics Observatory and uses the patterns to predict whether a flare projected to occur within the next 24 hours will be eruptive (i.e., CME-associated) or confined (i.e., not CME-associated). Our experimental results demonstrate the good performance of the HNN method. Furthermore, the results show that magnetic flux cancellation in polarity inversion line regions may well play a role in triggering flare-associated CMEs, a finding consistent with literature.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合视觉Transformer和LSTM的混合神经网络，用于预测太阳耀斑与日冕物质抛射的关联性，通过分析太阳活动区的磁图时间序列来预测未来24小时内耀斑是否与CME相关。
AI.motivation: 太阳爆发（包括耀斑和日冕物质抛射）对地球有重要影响，但耀斑与CME的关联性并不总是明显。需要一种能够准确预测这种关联的方法，以更好地理解太阳活动并提高空间天气预报能力。
AI.method: 提出混合神经网络方法，结合视觉Transformer和长短期记忆网络，分析太阳动力学观测站收集的太阳活动区视线磁图时间序列，寻找时空模式来预测耀斑是否与CME相关。
AI.result: 实验结果表明HNN方法性能良好，同时发现极性反转线区域的磁通量抵消可能在触发耀斑相关的CME中起重要作用，这与文献一致。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合神经网络方法能有效预测耀斑与CME的关联性，为太阳活动预测提供了新工具，同时验证了磁通量抵消在CME触发中的作用。

title: Pseudo-Unification: Entropy Probing Reveals Divergent Information Patterns in Unified Multimodal Models
summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) were designed to combine the reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs) with the generation capability of vision models. In practice, however, this synergy remains elusive: UMMs fail to transfer LLM-like reasoning to image synthesis and exhibit divergent response behaviors. We term this phenomenon pseudo-unification. Diagnosing its internal causes is important, but existing probing methods either lack model-internal insight or ignore prompt-response dependencies. To address these limitations, we propose an information-theoretic probing framework that jointly analyzes how UMMs encode inputs and generate outputs. Applied to ten representative UMMs, our framework reveals that pseudo-unification stems from a dual divergence: (i) Modality-Asymmetric Encoding, where vision and language follow different entropy trajectories, and (ii) Pattern-Split Response, where text generation exhibits high-entropy creativity while image synthesis enforces low-entropy fidelity. Only models that unify both sides (e.g., via contextual prediction) achieve more genuine unification, enabling stronger reasoning-based text-to-image generation even with fewer parameters. Our work provides the first model-internal probing of unification, demonstrating that real multimodal synergy requires consistency in information flow, not just shared parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种信息论探测框架，揭示了多模态模型中的"伪统一"现象：视觉和语言遵循不同的熵轨迹，文本生成具有高熵创造性而图像合成强制低熵保真度，只有通过上下文预测统一两边的模型才能实现真正的多模态协同。
AI.motivation: 统一多模态模型旨在结合大语言模型的推理能力和视觉模型的生成能力，但在实践中这种协同效应难以实现。模型无法将LLM式的推理转移到图像合成中，并表现出不同的响应行为，这种现象被称为"伪统一"。诊断其内部原因很重要，但现有的探测方法要么缺乏模型内部洞察，要么忽略了提示-响应依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出了一个信息论探测框架，联合分析UMMs如何编码输入和生成输出。该框架应用于十个代表性UMMs，揭示了伪统一源于双重分歧：1）模态不对称编码，视觉和语言遵循不同的熵轨迹；2）模式分裂响应，文本生成表现出高熵创造性而图像合成强制低熵保真度。
AI.result: 应用该框架发现，只有通过上下文预测统一两边的模型才能实现更真实的统一，即使参数更少也能实现更强的基于推理的文生图生成。研究提供了首个模型内部统一性探测，证明真正的多模态协同需要信息流的一致性，而不仅仅是共享参数。
AI.conclusion: 真正的多模态协同需要信息流的一致性，而不仅仅是共享参数。只有统一编码和响应模式的模型才能实现LLM推理能力向图像生成的转移，这为设计更有效的统一多模态模型提供了重要见解。

title: Sign Language Recognition in the Age of LLMs
comment: Accepted at the CVPR 2026 Workshop on Multimodal Sign Language Research (MSLR), 8 pages, 3 figures
summary: Recent Vision Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong performance across a wide range of multimodal reasoning tasks. This raises the question of whether such general-purpose models can also address specialized visual recognition problems such as isolated sign language recognition (ISLR) without task-specific training. In this work, we investigate the capability of modern VLMs to perform ISLR in a zero-shot setting. We evaluate several open-source and proprietary VLMs on the WLASL300 benchmark. Our experiments show that, under prompt-only zero-shot inference, current open-source VLMs remain far behind classic supervised ISLR classifiers by a wide margin. However, follow-up experiments reveal that these models capture partial visual-semantic alignment between signs and text descriptions. Larger proprietary models achieve substantially higher accuracy, highlighting the importance of model scale and training data diversity. All our code is publicly available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了现代视觉语言模型在零样本设置下进行孤立手语识别的能力，发现开源模型表现远落后于传统监督方法，但大型专有模型表现更好，揭示了模型规模和数据多样性的重要性。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉语言模型在多模态推理任务上表现出色，研究者想知道这些通用模型是否能在无需特定任务训练的情况下解决专门的视觉识别问题，如孤立手语识别。
AI.method: 在WLASL300基准上评估多个开源和专有视觉语言模型，采用提示式零样本推理方法，并分析模型对手势和文本描述之间的视觉-语义对齐能力。
AI.result: 开源视觉语言模型在零样本手语识别上远落后于传统监督分类器，但确实捕获了部分视觉-语义对齐；大型专有模型准确率显著更高，表明模型规模和数据多样性是关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 当前开源视觉语言模型在零样本孤立手语识别上能力有限，但大型专有模型显示出潜力，模型规模、训练数据多样性和视觉-语义对齐是提升性能的关键。

title: Masked Contrastive Pre-Training Improves Music Audio Key Detection
comment: Code and models available at github.com/echo-cipher/keymyna
summary: Self-supervised music foundation models underperform on key detection, which requires pitch-sensitive representations. In this work, we present the first systematic study showing that the design of self-supervised pretraining directly impacts pitch sensitivity, and demonstrate that masked contrastive embeddings uniquely enable state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in key detection in the supervised setting. First, we discover that linear evaluation after masking-based contrastive pretraining on Mel spectrograms leads to competitive performance on music key detection out of the box. This leads us to train shallow but wide multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs) on features extracted from our base model, leading to SOTA performance without the need for sophisticated data augmentation policies. We further analyze robustness and show empirically that the learned representations naturally encode common augmentations. Our study establishes self-supervised pretraining as an effective approach for pitch-sensitive MIR tasks and provides insights for designing and probing music foundation models.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了自监督音乐基础模型在音高敏感任务（如调性检测）中的表现，发现掩码对比预训练方法能显著提升音高敏感性，并在监督设置下实现了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 当前自监督音乐基础模型在需要音高敏感表示的任务（特别是调性检测）上表现不佳。研究旨在探索自监督预训练设计如何影响音高敏感性，并寻找提升音乐信息检索任务性能的有效方法。
AI.method:
1. 使用掩码对比预训练方法在梅尔频谱图上进行自监督学习
2. 通过线性评估验证模型在调性检测任务上的性能
3. 在基础模型特征上训练浅层但宽的多层感知机（MLP）
4. 分析学习表示的鲁棒性，验证其自然编码常见数据增强的能力
AI.result:
1. 掩码对比预训练方法在调性检测任务上实现了开箱即用的竞争性性能
2. 在基础模型特征上训练的浅层宽MLP实现了SOTA性能，无需复杂的数据增强策略
3. 学习表示自然编码了常见的数据增强，表现出良好的鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练是提升音高敏感音乐信息检索任务性能的有效方法。掩码对比嵌入特别适合此类任务，为设计和探测音乐基础模型提供了重要见解。

title: Bootstrapping Video Semantic Segmentation Model via Distillation-assisted Test-Time Adaptation
summary: Fully supervised Video Semantic Segmentation (VSS) relies heavily on densely annotated video data, limiting practical applicability. Alternatively, applying pre-trained Image Semantic Segmentation (ISS) models frame-by-frame avoids annotation costs but ignores crucial temporal coherence. Recent foundation models such as SAM2 enable high-quality mask propagation yet remain impractical for direct VSS due to limited semantic understanding and computational overhead. In this paper, we propose DiTTA (Distillation-assisted Test-Time Adaptation), a novel framework that converts an ISS model into a temporally-aware VSS model through efficient test-time adaptation (TTA), without annotated videos. DiTTA distills SAM2's temporal segmentation knowledge into the ISS model during a brief, single-pass initialization phase, complemented by a lightweight temporal fusion module to aggregate cross-frame context. Crucially, DiTTA achieves robust generalization even when adapting with highly limited partial video snippets (e.g., initial 10%), significantly outperforming zero-shot refinement approaches that repeatedly invoke SAM2 during inference. Extensive experiments on VSPW and Cityscapes demonstrate DiTTA's effectiveness, achieving competitive or superior performance relative to fully-supervised VSS methods, thus providing a practical and annotation-free solution for real-world VSS tasks.

AI.tldr: DiTTA通过蒸馏SAM2的时序分割知识，将图像语义分割模型转换为时序感知的视频语义分割模型，无需标注视频数据，仅需少量视频片段即可实现高效测试时适应。
AI.motivation: 完全监督的视频语义分割依赖密集标注数据，实用性受限；而逐帧应用预训练图像分割模型忽略了时序一致性。现有基础模型如SAM2虽能进行高质量掩码传播，但语义理解有限且计算开销大，不适用于直接视频分割。
AI.method: 提出DiTTA框架：1）通过单次初始化阶段蒸馏SAM2的时序分割知识到图像分割模型；2）引入轻量级时序融合模块聚合跨帧上下文；3）仅需少量视频片段（如初始10%）进行测试时适应，无需标注数据。
AI.result: 在VSPW和Cityscapes数据集上，DiTTA达到与完全监督方法相当或更优的性能，显著优于零样本精化方法，且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: DiTTA提供了一种实用且无需标注的视频语义分割解决方案，通过知识蒸馏和轻量级时序融合，实现了从图像分割模型到时序感知视频分割模型的高效转换。

title: Neuro-Symbolic Strong-AI Robots with Closed Knowledge Assumption: Learning and Deductions
comment: 32 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2508.02774
summary:
Knowledge representation formalisms are aimed to represent general conceptual information and are typically used in the construction of the knowledge base of reasoning agent. A knowledge base can be thought of as representing the beliefs of such an agent. Like a child, a strong-AI (AGI) robot would have to learn through input and experiences, constantly progressing and advancing its abilities over time. Both with statistical AI generated by neural networks we need also the concept of \textsl{causality} of events traduced into directionality of logic entailments and deductions in order to give to robots the emulation of human intelligence. Moreover, by using the axioms we can guarantee the \textsl{controlled security} about robot's actions based on logic inferences.
  For AGI robots we consider the 4-valued Belnap's bilattice of truth-values with knowledge ordering as well, where the value "unknown" is the bottom value, the sentences with this value are indeed unknown facts, that is, the missed knowledge in the AGI robots. Thus, these unknown facts are not part of the robot's knowledge database, and by learn through input and experiences, the robot's knowledge would be naturally expanded over time.
  Consequently, this phenomena can be represented by the Closed Knowledge Assumption and Logic Inference provided by this paper.
  Moreover, the truth-value "inconsistent", which is the top value in the knowledge ordering of Belnap's bilattice, is necessary for strong-AI robots to be able to support such inconsistent information and paradoxes, like Liar paradox, during deduction processes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于4值Belnap双格的知识表示框架，用于AGI机器人的知识库构建，强调因果关系、逻辑推理和安全性控制。
AI.motivation: 为AGI机器人构建能够模拟人类智能的知识表示系统，需要处理因果关系、逻辑推理方向性、知识扩展以及不一致信息处理等问题。
AI.method: 采用4值Belnap双格作为真值系统，包含"未知"（bottom）和"不一致"（top）值，提出封闭知识假设和逻辑推理机制。
AI.result: 建立了能够处理未知事实扩展、支持不一致信息和悖论（如说谎者悖论）的知识表示和推理框架。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为AGI机器人提供了模拟人类智能的知识表示和推理基础，能够处理知识扩展和不一致信息，确保推理的安全性控制。

title: RECIPER: A Dual-View Retrieval Pipeline for Procedure-Oriented Materials Question Answering
summary: Retrieving procedure-oriented evidence from materials science papers is difficult because key synthesis details are often scattered across long, context-heavy documents and are not well captured by paragraph-only dense retrieval. We present RECIPER, a dual-view retrieval pipeline that indexes both paragraph-level context and compact large language model-extracted procedural summaries, then combines the two candidate streams with lightweight lexical reranking. Across four dense retrieval backbones, RECIPER consistently improves early-rank retrieval over paragraph-only dense retrieval, achieving average gains of +3.73 in Recall@1, +2.85 in nDCG@10, and +3.13 in MRR. With BGE-large-en-v1.5, it reaches 86.82%, 97.07%, and 97.85% on Recall@1, Recall@5, and Recall@10, respectively. We further observe improved downstream question answering under automatic metrics, suggesting that procedural summaries can serve as a useful complementary retrieval signal for procedure-oriented materials question answering. Code and data are available at https://github.com/ReaganWu/RECIPER.

AI.tldr: RECIPER：一种用于材料科学论文中程序性证据检索的双视图检索管道，通过结合段落级上下文和LLM提取的程序摘要，显著提升了检索性能。
AI.motivation: 材料科学论文中的关键合成细节通常分散在长篇、上下文密集的文档中，传统的仅基于段落的密集检索方法无法有效捕获这些信息，需要更有效的检索方法来提取程序性证据。
AI.method: 提出RECIPER双视图检索管道：1) 索引段落级上下文和LLM提取的紧凑程序摘要；2) 结合两个候选流；3) 使用轻量级词汇重排序。在四个密集检索骨干网络上进行验证。
AI.result: 在四个密集检索骨干网络上，RECIPER相比仅段落的密集检索平均提升：Recall@1 +3.73，nDCG@10 +2.85，MRR +3.13。使用BGE-large-en-v1.5时，Recall@1达到86.82%，Recall@5达到97.07%，Recall@10达到97.85%。下游问答任务也显示出改进。
AI.conclusion: 程序摘要可以作为程序导向的材料问答的有用补充检索信号，双视图检索方法能有效提升材料科学文献中程序性证据的检索效果。

title: FineEdit: Fine-Grained Image Edit with Bounding Box Guidance
summary: Diffusion-based image editing models have achieved significant progress in real world applications. However, conventional models typically rely on natural language prompts, which often lack the precision required to localize target objects. Consequently, these models struggle to maintain background consistency due to their global image regeneration paradigm. Recognizing that visual cues provide an intuitive means for users to highlight specific areas of interest, we utilize bounding boxes as guidance to explicitly define the editing target. This approach ensures that the diffusion model can accurately localize the target while preserving background consistency. To achieve this, we propose FineEdit, a multi-level bounding box injection method that enables the model to utilize spatial conditions more effectively. To support this high precision guidance, we present FineEdit-1.2M, a large scale, fine-grained dataset comprising 1.2 million image editing pairs with precise bounding box annotations. Furthermore, we construct a comprehensive benchmark, termed FineEdit-Bench, which includes 1,000 images across 10 subjects to effectively evaluate region based editing capabilities. Evaluations on FineEdit-Bench demonstrate that our model significantly outperforms state-of-the-art open-source models (e.g., Qwen-Image-Edit and LongCat-Image-Edit) in instruction compliance and background preservation. Further assessments on open benchmarks (GEdit and ImgEdit Bench) confirm its superior generalization and robustness.

AI.tldr: FineEdit提出了一种基于边界框的多级注入方法，用于扩散模型的精确图像编辑，通过1.2M精细标注数据集和专用基准测试，在指令遵循和背景保持方面显著优于现有开源模型。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型主要依赖自然语言提示进行图像编辑，但文本提示缺乏精确的空间定位能力，导致难以准确定位目标对象并保持背景一致性。视觉线索（如边界框）能更直观地指定编辑区域，因此需要开发能有效利用空间条件的编辑方法。
AI.method: 提出FineEdit方法：1）使用边界框作为空间引导，明确定义编辑目标；2）设计多级边界框注入机制，使扩散模型能更有效地利用空间条件；3）构建FineEdit-1.2M大规模精细数据集，包含120万图像编辑对和精确边界框标注；4）建立FineEdit-Bench基准测试，包含10个主题的1000张图像。
AI.result: 在FineEdit-Bench上评估显示，该方法在指令遵循和背景保持方面显著优于Qwen-Image-Edit和LongCat-Image-Edit等最先进开源模型。在GEdit和ImgEdit Bench等开放基准测试上也表现出优越的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 边界框引导的扩散模型编辑方法能有效解决传统文本提示的定位不精确问题，通过多级注入机制和高质量数据集，实现了更精确的区域编辑和更好的背景一致性，为精确图像编辑提供了新思路。

title: Tuning Qwen2.5-VL to Improve Its Web Interaction Skills
comment: Accepted to the Short Paper Track of ACM Web Conference 2026 (WWW 2026). The final version will appear in the ACM Digital Library
summary: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) have sparked growing interest in using them to automate web tasks, yet their feasibility as independent agents that reason and act purely from visual input remains underexplored. We investigate this setting using Qwen2.5-VL-32B, one of the strongest open-source VLMs available, and focus on improving its reliability in web-based control. Through initial experimentation, we observe three key challenges: (i) inaccurate localization of target elements, the cursor, and their relative positions, (ii) sensitivity to instruction phrasing, and (iii) an overoptimistic bias toward its own actions, often assuming they succeed rather than analyzing their actual outcomes. To address these issues, we fine-tune Qwen2.5-VL-32B for a basic web interaction task: moving the mouse and clicking on a page element described in natural language. Our training pipeline consists of two stages: (1) teaching the model to determine whether the cursor already hovers over the target element or whether movement is required, and (2) training it to execute a single command (a mouse move or a mouse click) at a time, verifying the resulting state of the environment before planning the next action. Evaluated on a custom benchmark of single-click web tasks, our approach increases success rates from 86% to 94% under the most challenging setting.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种针对视觉语言模型（VLM）在网页控制任务中的微调方法，通过两阶段训练解决定位不准、指令敏感和过度乐观等问题，将点击成功率从86%提升到94%。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在网页自动化任务中的应用潜力尚未充分探索，特别是作为纯视觉输入的自主代理。研究发现现有VLM在网页控制中存在三个关键问题：目标元素和光标定位不准确、对指令表述敏感、以及对自己行动结果过度乐观的偏见。
AI.method: 使用Qwen2.5-VL-32B模型，采用两阶段微调方法：第一阶段训练模型判断光标是否已在目标元素上或需要移动；第二阶段训练模型每次执行单个命令（鼠标移动或点击），并在规划下一个动作前验证环境状态变化。
AI.result: 在自定义的单点击网页任务基准测试中，该方法在最具挑战性的设置下将成功率从86%提升到94%，显著提高了VLM在网页控制任务中的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性的两阶段微调方法，可以有效解决VLM在网页控制任务中的关键挑战，显著提升其作为视觉输入自主代理的可靠性和实用性。

title: Daily Predictions of F10.7 and F30 Solar Indices with Deep Learning
summary: The F10.7 and F30 solar indices are the solar radio fluxes measured at wavelengths of 10.7 cm and 30 cm, respectively, which are key indicators of solar activity. F10.7 is valuable for explaining the impact of solar ultraviolet (UV) radiation on the upper atmosphere of Earth, while F30 is more sensitive and could improve the reaction of thermospheric density to solar stimulation. In this study, we present a new deep learning model, named the Solar Index Network, or SINet for short, to predict daily values of the F10.7 and F30 solar indices. The SINet model is designed to make medium-term predictions of the index values (1-60 days in advance). The observed data used for SINet training were taken from the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) as well as Toyokawa and Nobeyama facilities. Our experimental results show that SINet performs better than five closely related statistical and deep learning methods for the prediction of F10.7. Furthermore, to our knowledge, this is the first time deep learning has been used to predict the F30 solar index.

AI.tldr: 提出名为SINet的深度学习模型，用于预测F10.7和F30太阳指数1-60天的中期值，在F10.7预测上优于现有方法，并首次用深度学习预测F30指数
AI.motivation: F10.7和F30太阳指数是太阳活动的关键指标，分别对地球高层大气和热层密度有重要影响。需要准确的中期预测来理解太阳活动对地球环境的影响。
AI.method: 提出Solar Index Network (SINet)深度学习模型，使用NOAA、Toyokawa和Nobeyama设施的观测数据进行训练，专门设计用于1-60天的中期太阳指数预测。
AI.result: SINet在F10.7预测上优于五种相关的统计和深度学习方法，并且首次实现了F30太阳指数的深度学习预测。
AI.conclusion: SINet是有效的太阳指数预测模型，在中期预测方面表现优异，为太阳活动研究提供了新的深度学习工具。

title: You Only Judge Once: Multi-response Reward Modeling in a Single Forward Pass
summary: We present a discriminative multimodal reward model that scores all candidate responses in a single forward pass. Conventional discriminative reward models evaluate each response independently, requiring multiple forward passes, one for each potential response. Our approach concatenates multiple responses with separator tokens and applies cross-entropy over their scalar scores, enabling direct comparative reasoning and efficient $N$-way preference learning. The multi-response design also yields up to $N\times$ wall-clock speedup and FLOPs reduction over conventional single-response scoring. To enable $N$-way reward evaluation beyond existing pairwise benchmarks, we construct two new benchmarks: (1) MR$^2$Bench-Image contains human-annotated rankings over responses from 8 diverse models; (2) MR$^2$Bench-Video is a large-scale video-based reward benchmark derived from 94K crowdsourced pairwise human judgments over video question-answering spanning 19 models, denoised via preference graph ensemble. Both benchmarks provide 4-response evaluation variants sampled from the full rankings. Built on a 4B vision-language backbone with LoRA fine-tuning and a lightweight MLP value head, our model achieves state-of-the-art results on six multimodal reward benchmarks, including MR$^2$Bench-Image, MR$^2$Bench-Video, and four other existing benchmarks. Our model outperforms existing larger generative and discriminative reward models. We further demonstrate that our reward model, when used in reinforcement learning with GRPO, produces improved policy models that maintain performance across standard multimodal benchmarks while substantially improving open-ended generation quality, outperforming a single-response discriminative reward model (RM) baseline by a large margin in both training stability and open-ended generation quality.

AI.tldr: 提出一种判别式多模态奖励模型，能在单次前向传播中同时评估所有候选响应，相比传统方法实现N倍加速和计算量减少，并在多个基准测试中达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 传统判别式奖励模型需要为每个候选响应单独进行前向传播，效率低下。本文旨在开发一种能同时评估多个响应的高效奖励模型，支持直接的比较推理和高效的N路偏好学习。
AI.method: 1) 使用分隔符令牌连接多个响应，应用交叉熵计算标量分数；2) 构建两个新基准：MR²Bench-Image（8个模型的人类标注排名）和MR²Bench-Video（基于94K众包视频问答对判断）；3) 基于4B视觉语言骨干网络，使用LoRA微调和轻量级MLP值头。
AI.result: 在六个多模态奖励基准测试中达到SOTA，包括新构建的两个基准和四个现有基准。模型性能优于现有更大的生成式和判别式奖励模型。在强化学习应用中，相比单响应判别式奖励模型基线，在训练稳定性和开放生成质量上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多响应奖励模型架构实现了高效的多响应评估，显著提升了计算效率和性能。该方法为多模态奖励建模提供了新的高效范式，并在强化学习中展现出优越的稳定性和生成质量。

title: The Salami Slicing Threat: Exploiting Cumulative Risks in LLM Systems
summary:
Large Language Models (LLMs) face prominent security risks from jailbreaking, a practice that manipulates models to bypass built-in security constraints and generate unethical or unsafe content. Among various jailbreak techniques, multi-turn jailbreak attacks are more covert and persistent than single-turn counterparts, exposing critical vulnerabilities of LLMs.
  However, existing multi-turn jailbreak methods suffer from two fundamental limitations that affect the actual impact in real-world scenarios: (a) As models become more context-aware, any explicit harmful trigger is increasingly likely to be flagged and blocked; (b) Successful final-step triggers often require finely tuned, model-specific contexts, making such attacks highly context-dependent. To fill this gap, we propose \textit{Salami Slicing Risk}, which operates by chaining numerous low-risk inputs that individually evade alignment thresholds but cumulatively accumulate harmful intent to ultimately trigger high-risk behaviors, without heavy reliance on pre-designed contextual structures. Building on this risk, we develop Salami Attack, an automatic framework universally applicable to multiple model types and modalities.
  Rigorous experiments demonstrate its state-of-the-art performance across diverse models and modalities, achieving over 90\% Attack Success Rate on GPT-4o and Gemini, as well as robustness against real-world alignment defenses. We also proposed a defense strategy to constrain the Salami Attack by at least 44.8\% while achieving a maximum blocking rate of 64.8\% against other multi-turn jailbreak attacks. Our findings provide critical insights into the pervasive risks of multi-turn jailbreaking and offer actionable mitigation strategies to enhance LLM security.

AI.tldr: 提出Salami Attack多轮越狱攻击框架，通过串联多个低风险输入累积有害意图，绕过LLM安全对齐，在GPT-4o和Gemini上达到90%攻击成功率，并提出相应防御策略。
AI.motivation: 现有多轮越狱攻击存在两个根本限制：1）随着模型上下文感知能力增强，显式有害触发词容易被检测和阻止；2）成功的最终触发需要精细调整的模型特定上下文，攻击高度依赖上下文。需要一种不依赖预设计上下文结构、能普遍适用于多种模型和模态的攻击方法。
AI.method: 提出Salami Slicing Risk概念，通过链接多个低于对齐阈值的低风险输入，累积有害意图最终触发高风险行为。基于此开发Salami Attack自动框架，该框架通用性强，适用于多种模型类型和模态，不严重依赖预设计的上下文结构。
AI.result: 在多样化模型和模态上实现最先进性能，在GPT-4o和Gemini上攻击成功率超过90%，对现实世界对齐防御具有鲁棒性。同时提出的防御策略能将Salami Attack约束至少44.8%，对其他多轮越狱攻击的最大阻止率达到64.8%。
AI.conclusion: Salami Attack揭示了多轮越狱的普遍风险，通过低风险输入的累积效应可以绕过现有安全机制。研究为增强LLM安全性提供了可行的缓解策略，强调了需要更细粒度的风险评估和累积意图检测机制。

title: Towards Automated Solar Panel Integrity: Hybrid Deep Feature Extraction for Advanced Surface Defect Identification
summary: To ensure energy efficiency and reliable operations, it is essential to monitor solar panels in generation plants to detect defects. It is quite labor-intensive, time consuming and costly to manually monitor large-scale solar plants and those installed in remote areas. Manual inspection may also be susceptible to human errors. Consequently, it is necessary to create an automated, intelligent defect-detection system, that ensures continuous monitoring, early fault detection, and maximum power generation. We proposed a novel hybrid method for defect detection in SOLAR plates by combining both handcrafted and deep learning features. Local Binary Pattern (LBP), Histogram of Gradients (HoG) and Gabor Filters were used for the extraction of handcrafted features. Deep features extracted by leveraging the use of DenseNet-169. Both handcrafted and deep features were concatenated and then fed to three distinct types of classifiers, including Support Vector Machines (SVM), Extreme Gradient Boost (XGBoost) and Light Gradient-Boosting Machine (LGBM). Experimental results evaluated on the augmented dataset show the superior performance, especially DenseNet-169 + Gabor (SVM), had the highest scores with 99.17% accuracy which was higher than all the other systems. In general, the proposed hybrid framework offers better defect-detection accuracy, resistance, and flexibility that has a solid basis on the real-life use of the automated PV panels monitoring system.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合手工特征和深度学习特征的混合方法，用于太阳能电池板缺陷检测，通过特征融合和多分类器集成实现高精度自动化监测。
AI.motivation: 太阳能发电厂需要高效可靠的监控系统来检测缺陷，但人工监控大规模太阳能电站和偏远地区安装的电池板劳动密集、耗时昂贵且易出错，因此需要开发自动化智能缺陷检测系统，确保连续监控、早期故障检测和最大发电量。
AI.method: 提出新颖的混合方法：1）手工特征提取使用LBP、HoG和Gabor滤波器；2）深度特征提取使用DenseNet-169；3）将手工特征和深度特征拼接后输入三种分类器：SVM、XGBoost和LGBM。
AI.result: 在增强数据集上的实验结果显示，DenseNet-169 + Gabor (SVM)组合获得最高准确率99.17%，优于其他所有系统。整体混合框架在缺陷检测准确性、鲁棒性和灵活性方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合框架为自动化光伏电池板监控系统的实际应用提供了坚实基础，具有更好的缺陷检测精度、抗干扰能力和灵活性。

title: Geometry-Aware Localized Watermarking for Copyright Protection in Embedding-as-a-Service
summary:
Embedding-as-a-Service (EaaS) has become an important semantic infrastructure for natural language and multimedia applications, but it is highly vulnerable to model stealing and copyright infringement. Existing EaaS watermarking methods face a fundamental robustness--utility--verifiability tension: trigger-based methods are fragile to paraphrasing, transformation-based methods are sensitive to dimensional perturbation, and region-based methods may incur false positives due to coincidental geometric affinity.
  To address this problem, we propose GeoMark, a geometry-aware localized watermarking framework for EaaS copyright protection. GeoMark uses a natural in-manifold embedding as a shared watermark target, constructs geometry-separated anchors with explicit target--anchor margins, and activates watermark injection only within adaptive local neighborhoods. This design decouples where watermarking is triggered from what ownership is attributed to, achieving localized triggering and centralized attribution.
  Experiments on four benchmark datasets show that GeoMark preserves downstream utility and geometric fidelity while maintaining robust copyright verification under paraphrasing, dimensional perturbation, and CSE (Clustering, Selection, Elimination) attacks, with improved verification stability and low false-positive risk.

AI.tldr: GeoMark是一个几何感知的局部水印框架，用于保护Embedding-as-a-Service的版权，解决了现有水印方法在鲁棒性、实用性和可验证性之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: EaaS已成为重要的语义基础设施，但容易受到模型窃取和版权侵权的攻击。现有水印方法面临鲁棒性-实用性-可验证性的权衡：基于触发的方法对改写脆弱，基于变换的方法对维度扰动敏感，基于区域的方法可能因几何相似性产生误报。
AI.method: GeoMark使用自然流形内嵌入作为共享水印目标，构建具有明确目标-锚点边界的几何分离锚点，仅在自适应局部邻域内激活水印注入。这种设计将水印触发位置与所有权归属解耦，实现局部触发和集中归属。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上的实验表明，GeoMark保持了下游实用性和几何保真度，同时在改写、维度扰动和CSE（聚类、选择、消除）攻击下保持稳健的版权验证，具有改进的验证稳定性和低误报风险。
AI.conclusion: GeoMark通过几何感知的局部水印设计，有效解决了EaaS版权保护中的鲁棒性-实用性-可验证性权衡问题，为语义基础设施提供了更可靠的版权保护方案。

title: Using Deep Learning Models Pretrained by Self-Supervised Learning for Protein Localization
comment: 29 pages, 8 figures, submitted to BMC Bioinformatics. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2602.05527
summary:
Background: Task-specific microscopy datasets are often small, making it difficult to train deep learning models that learn robust features. While self-supervised learning (SSL) has shown promise through pretraining on large, domain-specific datasets, generalizability across datasets with differing staining protocols and channel configurations remains underexplored. We investigated the generalizability of SSL models pretrained on ImageNet-1k and HPA FOV, evaluating their embeddings on OpenCell with and without fine-tuning, two channel-mismatch strategies, and varying fine-tuning data fractions. We additionally analyzed single-cell embeddings on a labeled OpenCell subset.
  Result: DINO-based ViT backbones pretrained on HPA FOV or ImageNet-1k transfer well to OpenCell even without fine-tuning. The HPA FOV-pretrained model achieved the highest zero-shot performance (macro $F_1$ 0.822 $\pm$ 0.007). Fine-tuning further improved performance to 0.860 $\pm$ 0.013. At the single-cell level, the HPA single-cell-pretrained model achieved the highest k-nearest neighbor performance across all neighborhood sizes (macro $F_1$ $\geq$ 0.796).
  Conclusion: SSL methods like DINO, pretrained on large domain-relevant datasets, enable effective use of deep learning features for fine-tuning on small, task-specific microscopy datasets.

AI.tldr: DINO-based ViT模型在HPA FOV或ImageNet-1k上预训练后，即使不微调也能在OpenCell显微镜数据集上表现良好，HPA FOV预训练模型在零样本情况下达到最高性能。
AI.motivation: 显微镜数据集通常较小，难以训练稳健的深度学习模型。自监督学习在大型领域特定数据集上预训练有潜力，但针对不同染色协议和通道配置的数据集之间的泛化能力尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 研究DINO-based ViT骨干网络在ImageNet-1k和HPA FOV上预训练后的泛化能力，评估其在OpenCell数据集上的嵌入表示，包括：有无微调、两种通道不匹配策略、不同微调数据比例，并在标记的OpenCell子集上分析单细胞嵌入。
AI.result: HPA FOV预训练模型在零样本情况下达到最高性能（macro F1 0.822±0.007），微调后提升至0.860±0.013。在单细胞层面，HPA单细胞预训练模型在所有邻域大小下都达到最高的k最近邻性能（macro F1 ≥0.796）。
AI.conclusion: 基于DINO等自监督学习方法，在大型领域相关数据集上预训练，能够有效利用深度学习特征在小规模任务特定显微镜数据集上进行微调。

title: Evaluating Visual Prompts with Eye-Tracking Data for MLLM-Based Human Activity Recognition
comment: 6 pages. Conditionally accepted to IEEE PacificVis 2026 (VisNotes track)
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as foundation models for IoT applications such as human activity recognition (HAR). However, directly applying high-frequency and multi-dimensional sensor data, such as eye-tracking data, leads to information loss and high token costs. To mitigate this, we investigate a visual prompting strategy that transforms sensor signals into data visualization images as an input to multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) using eye-tracking data. We conducted a systematic evaluation of MLLM-based HAR across three public eye-tracking datasets using three visualization types of timeline, heatmap, and scanpath, under varying temporal window sizes. Our findings suggest that visual prompting provides a token-efficient and scalable representation for eye-tracking data, highlighting its potential to enable MLLMs to effectively reason over high-frequency sensor signals in IoT contexts.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种视觉提示策略，将眼动追踪传感器数据转换为可视化图像，作为多模态大语言模型的输入，用于物联网中的人类活动识别任务。
AI.motivation: 直接使用高频多维传感器数据（如眼动数据）作为LLM输入会导致信息丢失和token成本过高，需要更高效的表示方法。
AI.method: 采用视觉提示策略，将传感器信号转换为三种可视化图像（时间线、热图、扫描路径），作为多模态LLM的输入，并在不同时间窗口大小下进行系统评估。
AI.result: 视觉提示为眼动追踪数据提供了token高效且可扩展的表示，使MLLM能够在物联网环境中有效推理高频传感器信号。
AI.conclusion: 视觉提示策略是处理高频传感器数据的有效方法，展示了MLLM在物联网应用中的潜力。

title: MMR-AD: A Large-Scale Multimodal Dataset for Benchmarking General Anomaly Detection with Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: In the progress of industrial anomaly detection, general anomaly detection (GAD) is an emerging trend and also the ultimate goal. Unlike the conventional single- and multi-class AD, general AD aims to train a general AD model that can directly detect anomalies in diverse novel classes without any retraining or fine-tuning on the target data. Recently, Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown great promise in achieving general anomaly detection due to their revolutionary visual understanding and language reasoning capabilities. However, MLLM's general AD ability remains underexplored due to: (1) MLLMs are pretrained on amounts of data sourced from the Web, these data still have significant gaps with the data in AD scenarios. Moreover, the image-text pairs during pretraining are also not specifically for AD tasks. (2) The current mainstream AD datasets are image-based and not yet suitable for post-training MLLMs. To facilitate MLLM-based general AD research, we present MMR-AD, which is a comprehensive benchmark for both training and evaluating MLLM-based AD models. With MMR-AD, we reveal that the AD performance of current SOTA generalist MLLMs still falls far behind the industrial requirements. Based on MMR-AD, we also propose a baseline model, Anomaly-R1, which is a reasoning-based AD model that learns from the CoT data in MMR-AD and is further enhanced by reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments show that our Anomaly-R1 achieves remarkable improvements over generalist MLLMs in both anomaly detection and localization.

AI.tldr: 提出了MMR-AD基准和Anomaly-R1基线模型，用于评估和提升多模态大语言模型在通用异常检测任务上的性能
AI.motivation: 通用异常检测是工业异常检测的终极目标，但当前多模态大语言模型在AD任务上存在数据差距和缺乏专用基准的问题
AI.method: 1) 构建MMR-AD综合基准用于训练和评估MLLM-based AD模型；2) 提出Anomaly-R1基线模型，基于思维链数据学习并通过强化学习增强
AI.result: 当前SOTA通用MLLMs的AD性能远低于工业要求，而Anomaly-R1在异常检测和定位方面相比通用MLLMs取得显著提升
AI.conclusion: MMR-AD基准填补了MLLM-based AD研究的空白，Anomaly-R1展示了通过专门训练和强化学习可以显著提升MLLMs在AD任务上的性能

title: Why Smaller Is Slower? Dimensional Misalignment in Compressed LLMs
summary:
Post-training compression reduces LLM parameter counts but often produces irregular tensor dimensions that degrade GPU performance -- a phenomenon we call \emph{dimensional misalignment}. We present a full-stack analysis tracing root causes at three levels: framework, library, and hardware. The key insight is that model inference becomes slower because the resulting dimensions are unfriendly with the GPU execution stack. For example, compressing Llama-3-8B with activation-aware singular value decomposition (ASVD) has 15\% fewer parameters yet runs no faster than the uncompressed baseline, because 95\% of its dimensions are misaligned.
  We propose \textbf{GAC} (GPU-Aligned Compression), a new compression paradigm that wraps any dimension-reducing compressor and re-selects hardware-aligned dimensions via multi-choice knapsack optimization under the same parameter budget. We evaluate GAC on Llama-3-8B with ASVD and LLM-Pruner, achieving 100\% alignment and recovering up to 1.5$\times$ speedup while preserving model quality.

AI.tldr: GAC（GPU对齐压缩）是一种新的压缩范式，通过多选择背包优化重新选择硬件对齐的维度，解决后训练压缩导致的维度不对齐问题，在保持模型质量的同时恢复高达1.5倍加速。
AI.motivation: 后训练压缩虽然减少了LLM参数量，但会产生不规则的张量维度，导致GPU性能下降（维度不对齐）。例如，用ASVD压缩Llama-3-8B减少了15%参数但运行速度没有提升，因为95%的维度不对齐。
AI.method: 提出GAC（GPU对齐压缩）范式：1）全栈分析框架、库和硬件三个层面的根本原因；2）将任何降维压缩器包装起来，通过多选择背包优化在相同参数预算下重新选择硬件对齐的维度。
AI.result: 在Llama-3-8B上使用ASVD和LLM-Pruner评估GAC，实现了100%的对齐，恢复了高达1.5倍的加速，同时保持了模型质量。
AI.conclusion: GAC解决了后训练压缩中的维度不对齐问题，通过硬件感知的维度选择，在保持压缩率的同时恢复了GPU性能，为高效LLM部署提供了实用解决方案。

title: What Do Vision-Language Models Encode for Personalized Image Aesthetics Assessment?
summary: Personalized image aesthetics assessment (PIAA) is an important research problem with practical real-world applications. While methods based on vision-language models (VLMs) are promising candidates for PIAA, it remains unclear whether they internally encode rich, multi-level aesthetic attributes required for effective personalization. In this paper, we first analyze the internal representations of VLMs to examine the presence and distribution of such aesthetic attributes, and then leverage them for lightweight, individual-level personalization without model fine-tuning. Our analysis reveals that VLMs encode diverse aesthetic attributes that propagate into the language decoder layers. Building on these representations, we demonstrate that simple linear models can perform PIAA effectively. We further analyze how aesthetic information is transferred across layers in different VLM architectures and across image domains. Our findings provide insights into how VLMs can be utilized for modeling subjective, individual aesthetic preferences. Our code is available at https://github.com/ynklab/vlm-latent-piaa.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了视觉语言模型（VLM）内部是否编码了丰富的多层级美学属性，并利用这些表征进行无需微调的个性化图像美学评估。
AI.motivation: 个性化图像美学评估（PIAA）具有重要的实际应用价值。虽然基于视觉语言模型的方法是有前景的候选方案，但目前尚不清楚这些模型内部是否编码了丰富的多层级美学属性，而这些属性对于有效的个性化至关重要。
AI.method: 首先分析VLM的内部表征，检查美学属性的存在和分布；然后利用这些表征进行轻量级的、个体层面的个性化，无需模型微调。研究发现VLM编码了多样化的美学属性，这些属性会传播到语言解码器层，基于这些表征，简单的线性模型就能有效执行PIAA。
AI.result: 分析表明VLM确实编码了多样的美学属性，这些属性会传播到语言解码器层。基于这些表征，简单的线性模型就能有效执行个性化图像美学评估。研究还分析了不同VLM架构中美学信息如何在层间传递以及跨图像领域的情况。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解VLM如何用于建模主观的、个体的美学偏好提供了见解，展示了利用VLM内部表征进行轻量级个性化美学评估的可行性。

title: Energy-oriented Diffusion Bridge for Image Restoration with Foundational Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion bridge models have shown great promise in image restoration by explicitly connecting clean and degraded image distributions. However, they often rely on complex and high-cost trajectories, which limit both sampling efficiency and final restoration quality. To address this, we propose an Energy-oriented diffusion Bridge (E-Bridge) framework to approximate a set of low-cost manifold geodesic trajectories to boost the performance of the proposed method. We achieve this by designing a novel bridge process that evolves over a shorter time horizon and makes the reverse process start from an entropy-regularized point that mixes the degraded image and Gaussian noise, which theoretically reduces the required trajectory energy. To solve this process efficiently, we draw inspiration from consistency models to learn a single-step mapping function, optimized via a continuous-time consistency objective tailored for our trajectory, so as to analytically map any state on the trajectory to the target image. Notably, the trajectory length in our framework becomes a tunable task-adaptive knob, allowing the model to adaptively balance information preservation against generative power for tasks of varying degradation, such as denoising versus super-resolution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our E-Bridge achieves state-of-the-art performance across various image restoration tasks while enabling high-quality recovery with a single or fewer sampling steps. Our project page is https://jinnh.github.io/E-Bridge/.

AI.tldr: 提出E-Bridge框架，通过设计能量导向的扩散桥模型，使用更短的轨迹和熵正则化起点，结合一致性模型实现单步映射，在图像恢复任务中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散桥模型依赖复杂高成本的轨迹，限制了采样效率和恢复质量。需要设计更高效的轨迹来提升性能。
AI.method: 1) 设计能量导向的扩散桥框架，使用更短时间跨度的桥过程；2) 从混合退化图像和高斯噪声的熵正则化点开始反向过程；3) 借鉴一致性模型学习单步映射函数，通过连续时间一致性目标优化；4) 轨迹长度作为任务自适应参数。
AI.result: 在多种图像恢复任务（去噪、超分辨率等）上达到最先进性能，能够用单步或更少采样步骤实现高质量恢复。
AI.conclusion: E-Bridge框架通过能量优化的轨迹设计，显著提升了扩散桥模型的效率和性能，为图像恢复任务提供了有效的解决方案。

title: From Theory to Protocol: Executable Frameworks for Creative Emergence and Strategic Foresight
comment: 22 pages, 8 tables, 5 case studies, protocols available at https://github.com/GhostyAI-HA/ghosty-collider
summary: Creativity and strategic foresight have been extensively studied through descriptive theories -- Koestler's bisociation (1964), de Bono's lateral thinking (1967), and Ansoff's weak signals (1975) explain why creative and strategic insights occur, but offer limited guidance on how to produce them on demand. This paper presents two executable protocols that bridge this theory-practice gap: GHOSTY COLLIDER, a 5-step protocol for cross-domain creative emergence through structural de-labeling and collision, and PRECOG PROTOCOL, a 5-step protocol for signal-based strategic foresight with multi-axis timing judgment. We formalize established theories into repeatable, step-by-step procedures with explicit quality criteria, anti-pattern detection, and measurable outputs. We evaluate the protocols through three complementary methods: (1) five detailed case studies across distinct domains, (2) controlled comparisons against standard methods using identical inputs, and (3) a batch experiment across eight random domain pairings (N=8, success rate 87.5%, failure rate 12.5%) with one blind evaluation. Preliminary evidence suggests that protocol-driven outputs exhibit greater structural novelty, higher parameter specificity, and qualitatively distinct creative directions compared to outputs from standard methods. The blind evaluation confirmed the direction of author assessments (protocol output scored 74/80 vs. brainstorming 49/80). These results, while limited by single-operator execution, indicate that the theory-to-protocol translation preserves and potentially enhances the generative power of the underlying theories. The protocols, updated to version 2 incorporating lessons from failure case analysis, are released as open-access documents under CC BY-NC 4.0 at https://github.com/GhostyAI-HA/ghosty-collider.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了两种可执行的协议：GHOSTY COLLIDER用于跨领域创意涌现，PRECOG PROTOCOL用于基于信号的战略预见，将描述性理论转化为可重复的步骤化程序。
AI.motivation: 现有创造力与战略预见理论（如Koestler的bisociation、de Bono的横向思维、Ansoff的弱信号）主要描述"为什么"创意和战略洞察会发生，但缺乏"如何"按需产生这些洞察的实践指导。本文旨在弥合这一理论与实践之间的差距。
AI.method:
1. 开发两个5步协议：GHOSTY COLLIDER（通过结构去标签化和碰撞实现跨领域创意涌现）和PRECOG PROTOCOL（基于信号的战略预见与多轴时间判断）
2. 将理论形式化为可重复的步骤化程序，包含明确的质量标准、反模式检测和可测量输出
3. 通过三种互补方法评估：五个详细案例研究、与标准方法的对照比较、八个随机领域配对的批量实验
AI.result:
1. 批量实验成功率87.5%（N=8），失败率12.5%
2. 盲评显示协议输出得分74/80，头脑风暴得分49/80
3. 协议驱动输出表现出更高的结构新颖性、参数特异性和不同的创意方向
4. 失败案例分析后协议更新至版本2
AI.conclusion: 理论到协议的转化不仅保留了底层理论的生成能力，还可能增强了这种能力。协议作为开放获取文档发布，为按需产生创意和战略洞察提供了可操作的框架。

title: Reasoning Resides in Layers: Restoring Temporal Reasoning in Video-Language Models with Layer-Selective Merging
summary: Multimodal adaptation equips large language models (LLMs) with perceptual capabilities, but often weakens the reasoning ability inherited from language-only pretraining. This trade-off is especially pronounced in video-language models (VLMs), where visual alignment can impair temporal reasoning (TR) over sequential events. We propose MERIT, a training-free, task-driven model merging framework for restoring TR in VLMs. MERIT searches over layer-wise self-attention merging recipes between a VLM and its paired text-only backbone using an objective that improves TR while penalizing degradation in temporal perception (TP). Across three representative VLMs and multiple challenging video benchmarks, MERIT consistently improves TR, preserves or improves TP, and generalizes beyond the search set to four distinct benchmarks. It also outperforms uniform full-model merging and random layer selection, showing that effective recovery depends on selecting the right layers. Interventional masking and frame-level attribution further show that the selected layers are disproportionately important for reasoning and shift model decisions toward temporally and causally relevant evidence. These results show that targeted, perception-aware model merging can effectively restore TR in VLMs without retraining.

AI.tldr: MERIT：无需训练的模型融合框架，通过层间自注意力融合恢复视频语言模型的时间推理能力，同时保持时间感知能力
AI.motivation: 多模态适应虽然赋予LLMs感知能力，但会削弱其从纯语言预训练继承的推理能力。视频语言模型中，视觉对齐尤其会损害对时序事件的时间推理能力，需要解决这种权衡问题。
AI.method: 提出MERIT框架，在VLM与其配对的纯文本骨干网络之间进行层间自注意力融合搜索，使用优化目标：提升时间推理能力同时惩罚时间感知能力的退化。框架无需训练，基于任务驱动。
AI.result: 在三个代表性VLM和多个挑战性视频基准测试中，MERIT持续提升时间推理能力，保持或改进时间感知能力，并能泛化到搜索集之外的四个不同基准。优于均匀全模型融合和随机层选择。
AI.conclusion: 有针对性的、感知感知的模型融合可以有效恢复VLM的时间推理能力而无需重新训练，所选层对推理至关重要，并将模型决策转向时间和因果相关证据。

title: Accelerated Dopant Screening in Oxide Semiconductors via Multi-Fidelity Contextual Bandits and a Three-Tier DFT Validation Funnel
summary:
Band gap engineering of oxide semiconductors through doping is critical for photocatalysis and optoelectronics, yet the combinatorial space of dopant elements, substitution sites, and co-doping combinations far exceeds typical density functional theory (DFT) budgets. We screen doped candidates across five oxide hosts (ZnO, TiO2, SrTiO3, SnO2, MgO), culminating in a 529-candidate ZnO co-doping campaign, and identify Cu-containing co-doped ZnO systems as consistently achieving visible-light-range band gaps (1.0-1.8 eV), with Y2Cu2 co-doped ZnO as the optimal candidate (1.84 eV). A three-tier validation funnel (PBE, PBE+U, ionic relaxation) reveals that no single level of theory suffices: V-doped ZnO shifts from near-metallic to wide-gap upon Hubbard U correction, while Cu-doped SrTiO3 enters the visible-light window only after correcting for d-electron localization.
  To make this screening tractable, we introduce a multi-fidelity screening strategy that replaces 81% of DFT evaluations with computationally inexpensive surrogate predictions, reducing a 529-candidate closed-loop Quantum ESPRESSO campaign from an estimated 440 to 62 CPU-hours while finding the global optimum in 100% of 50 independent trials (p = 5.0e-8 versus random screening, Wilcoxon signed-rank). Cross-host analysis of the dopant-host interaction matrix reveals that dopant performance is governed by just two latent chemical dimensions, enabling prediction of rankings in unseen hosts. All 583 DFT calculations, screening code, and stability proofs are released as an open benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多保真度筛选策略，用于高效探索氧化物半导体掺杂的广阔组合空间，通过替代模型预测减少81%的DFT计算，成功识别出可见光范围带隙的Cu共掺杂ZnO系统。
AI.motivation: 氧化物半导体的掺杂工程对光催化和光电子学至关重要，但掺杂元素、取代位点和共掺杂组合的组合空间远超典型DFT计算预算。需要开发高效筛选方法来解决这一计算瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用多保真度筛选策略，用计算成本低的替代模型预测替代81%的DFT评估；设计三层验证漏斗（PBE、PBE+U、离子弛豫）；在五种氧化物宿主（ZnO、TiO2、SrTiO3、SnO2、MgO）中筛选掺杂候选物，包括529个候选的ZnO共掺杂实验。
AI.result: 识别出Cu共掺杂ZnO系统能持续实现可见光范围带隙（1.0-1.8 eV），其中Y2Cu2共掺杂ZnO为最佳候选（1.84 eV）；多保真度策略将529个候选的闭循环Quantum ESPRESSO计算从440 CPU小时减少到62 CPU小时；发现掺杂性能仅由两个潜在化学维度决定。
AI.conclusion: 开发的高效筛选方法显著降低了掺杂工程的计算成本，揭示了掺杂性能的基本化学规律，为氧化物半导体带隙工程提供了实用工具和开放基准。

title: ArtiCAD: Articulated CAD Assembly Design via Multi-Agent Code Generation
summary: Parametric Computer-Aided Design (CAD) of articulated assemblies is essential for product development, yet generating these multi-part, movable models from high-level descriptions remains unexplored. To address this, we propose ArtiCAD, the first training-free multi-agent system capable of generating editable, articulated CAD assemblies directly from text or images. Our system divides this complex task among four specialized agents: Design, Generation, Assembly, and Review. One of our key insights is to predict assembly relationships during the initial design stage rather than the assembly stage. By utilizing a Connector that explicitly defines attachment points and joint parameters, ArtiCAD determines these relationships before geometry generation, effectively bypassing the limited spatial reasoning capabilities of current LLMs and VLMs. To further ensure high-quality outputs, we introduce validation steps in the generation and assembly stages, accompanied by a cross-stage rollback mechanism that accurately isolates and corrects design- and code-level errors. Additionally, a self-evolving experience store accumulates design knowledge to continuously improve performance on future tasks. Extensive evaluations on three datasets (ArtiCAD-Bench, CADPrompt, and ACD) validate the effectiveness of our approach. We further demonstrate the applicability of ArtiCAD in requirement-driven conceptual design, physical prototyping, and the generation of embodied AI training assets through URDF export.

AI.tldr: ArtiCAD是一个无需训练的多智能体系统，能够从文本或图像直接生成可编辑、可活动的CAD装配体，通过四个专门智能体（设计、生成、装配、评审）协同工作，在几何生成前预测装配关系，并包含验证机制和自演进经验存储。
AI.motivation: 参数化CAD对于产品开发至关重要，但目前从高级描述生成多部件、可活动的装配体模型仍未被充分探索。现有方法难以处理复杂的装配关系生成任务。
AI.method: 提出ArtiCAD多智能体系统，包含四个专门智能体：设计、生成、装配、评审。关键创新是在设计阶段而非装配阶段预测装配关系，使用连接器明确定义连接点和关节参数。系统包含验证步骤、跨阶段回滚机制和自演进经验存储。
AI.result: 在三个数据集（ArtiCAD-Bench、CADPrompt和ACD）上的广泛评估验证了方法的有效性。展示了ArtiCAD在需求驱动的概念设计、物理原型制作以及通过URDF导出生成具身AI训练资产方面的适用性。
AI.conclusion: ArtiCAD是首个无需训练的多智能体系统，能够从文本或图像生成可编辑、可活动的CAD装配体，通过早期装配关系预测和验证机制解决了当前LLM/VLM空间推理能力的局限性。

title: Duration-Informed Workload Scheduler
summary:
High-performance computing systems are complex machines whose behaviour is governed by the correct functioning of its many subsystems. Among these, the workload scheduler has a crucial impact on the timely execution of the jobs continuously submitted to the computing resources. Making high-quality scheduling decisions is contingent on knowing the duration of submitted jobs before their execution--a non-trivial task for users that can be tackled with Machine Learning.
  In this work, we devise a workload scheduler enhanced with a duration prediction module built via Machine Learning. We evaluate its effectiveness and show its performance using workload traces from a Tier-0 supercomputer, demonstrating a decrease in mean waiting time across all jobs of around 11%. Lower waiting times are directly connected to better quality of service from the users' point of view and higher turnaround from the system's perspective.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合机器学习预测模块的工作负载调度器，用于高性能计算系统，通过预测作业执行时间来优化调度决策，在Tier-0超级计算机上实现了约11%的平均等待时间减少。
AI.motivation: 高性能计算系统的作业调度器对及时执行提交的作业至关重要。高质量的调度决策依赖于提前知道作业的执行时间，这对用户来说是一项困难任务，但可以通过机器学习来解决。
AI.method: 设计了一个增强型工作负载调度器，其中包含通过机器学习构建的持续时间预测模块。使用Tier-0超级计算机的工作负载轨迹进行评估。
AI.result: 在所有作业中实现了约11%的平均等待时间减少。更低的等待时间直接关联到用户角度的服务质量提升和系统角度的周转率提高。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习增强的调度器能够有效优化高性能计算系统的作业调度，显著减少等待时间，提升系统效率和用户体验。

title: LumiMotion: Improving Gaussian Relighting with Scene Dynamics
summary: In 3D reconstruction, the problem of inverse rendering, namely recovering the illumination of the scene and the material properties, is fundamental. Existing Gaussian Splatting-based methods primarily target static scenes and often assume simplified or moderate lighting to avoid entangling shadows with surface appearance. This limits their ability to accurately separate lighting effects from material properties, particularly in real-world conditions. We address this limitation by leveraging dynamic elements - regions of the scene that undergo motion - as a supervisory signal for inverse rendering. Motion reveals the same surfaces under varying lighting conditions, providing stronger cues for disentangling material and illumination. This thesis is supported by our experimental results which show we improve LPIPS by 23% for albedo estimation and by 15% for scene relighting relative to next-best baseline. To this end, we introduce LumiMotion, the first Gaussian-based approach that leverages dynamics for inverse rendering and operates in arbitrary dynamic scenes. Our method learns a dynamic 2D Gaussian Splatting representation that employs a set of novel constraints which encourage the dynamic regions of the scene to deform, while keeping static regions stable. As we demonstrate, this separation is crucial for correct optimization of the albedo. Finally, we release a new synthetic benchmark comprising five scenes under four lighting conditions, each in both static and dynamic variants, for the first time enabling systematic evaluation of inverse rendering methods in dynamic environments and challenging lighting. Link to project page: https://joaxkal.github.io/LumiMotion/

AI.tldr: LumiMotion：首个利用动态场景进行逆向渲染的高斯溅射方法，通过运动区域作为监督信号，在任意动态场景中分离材质与光照，显著提升反照率估计和场景重照明效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于高斯溅射的逆向渲染方法主要针对静态场景，通常假设简化或适中的光照以避免阴影与表面外观的纠缠，这限制了在真实条件下准确分离光照效果与材质属性的能力。
AI.method: 提出LumiMotion方法，利用动态元素（场景中发生运动的区域）作为逆向渲染的监督信号。学习动态2D高斯溅射表示，采用新颖约束集，鼓励场景动态区域变形，同时保持静态区域稳定。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，在反照率估计方面LPIPS提升23%，在场景重照明方面提升15%（相对于次优基线）。同时发布了包含5个场景、4种光照条件、静态和动态变体的新合成基准。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用动态场景中的运动作为监督信号，能够更有效地分离材质与光照，显著提升逆向渲染性能，为动态环境中的逆向渲染方法评估提供了首个系统基准。

title: Continuous PT-Symmetry Breaking as a Design Variable for Giant Altermagnetic Spin Splitting
summary: Magnetic point-group analysis classifies altermagnets but returns only a binary symmetry verdict, leaving spin-splitting energy (SSE) inaccessible without spin-polarized density functional theory (DFT). This binary ceiling is not fundamental. Sublattice symmetry breaking is promoted here to a continuous, DFT-free scalar -- the Motif Symmetry-Breaking Index (MSBI) -- that quantifies $\mathcal{PT}$-symmetry breaking between antiparallel magnetic motifs directly from crystal coordinates. SHAP analysis of an XGBoost surrogate trained on 3,851 DFT-labeled binary structures identifies three dominant descriptors: MSBI (symmetry-breaking axis), motif packing fraction MPF (superexchange axis), and the $p/d$ electron ratio (covalency axis), each mapping onto a directly tunable experimental handle. A controlled VO--CrSb comparison within the same P$6_3$/mmc host lattice demonstrates that composition alone boosts SSE sevenfold. Bayesian optimization over this three-axis space, followed by independent DFT validation, recovers $α$-NiS (SSE $= 0.823$\,eV) as cross-validation against an independent symmetry-based prediction and identifies three previously unrecognized high-SSE candidates -- square-planar FeS (1.297\,eV), octahedral CoS (1.103\,eV), and FeAs (1.089\,eV) -- all matching or exceeding CrSb. Square-planar Fe--S is proposed as a transferable coordination motif for giant altermagnetic spin splitting, advancing altermagnet design from symmetry classification to continuous quantitative optimization.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种连续量化的Motif Symmetry-Breaking Index (MSBI)来替代传统的二元对称性分类，结合机器学习方法识别了影响自旋分裂能量的三个关键描述符，并发现了新的高自旋分裂候选材料。
AI.motivation: 传统磁点群分析只能提供二元对称性判断，无法量化自旋分裂能量(SSE)，需要依赖计算密集的自旋极化密度泛函理论(DFT)。这限制了反铁磁材料的设计和优化。
AI.method: 提出MSBI作为连续标量来量化反平行磁图案之间的PT对称性破缺，结合SHAP分析在3,851个DFT标记的二元结构上训练的XGBoost代理模型，识别出三个关键描述符：MSBI、motif packing fraction (MPF)和p/d电子比。
AI.result: 在相同P6_3/mmc晶格中，VO-CrSb比较显示仅通过成分调控就能使SSE提升7倍。贝叶斯优化结合独立DFT验证发现了α-NiS (SSE=0.823 eV)和三个新的高SSE候选材料：四方平面FeS (1.297 eV)、八面体CoS (1.103 eV)和FeAs (1.089 eV)。
AI.conclusion: 该研究将反铁磁设计从对称性分类推进到连续定量优化，提出四方平面Fe-S配位图案作为实现巨大自旋分裂的可转移结构单元。

title: TraversalBench: Challenging Paths to Follow for Vision Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) perform strongly on many multimodal benchmarks. However, the ability to follow complex visual paths -- a task that human observers typically find straightforward -- remains under-tested. We introduce TraversalBench, a controlled benchmark for exact visual path traversal. Each instance contains a single continuous polyline, a unique start marker, and markers placed at path vertices; the task is to recover the exact ordered sequence encountered when traversing the path from start to finish. The benchmark explicitly balances key path-structural factors including self-intersection count, tortuosity, vertex count, and nearby confounding lines, while minimizing reliance on OCR, world knowledge, and open-ended planning. We find that self-intersections are the dominant source of difficulty. A first-crossing analysis shows that errors are sharply localized: performance is relatively stable immediately before the first crossing, then drops steeply when the model must resolve the correct continuation. By contrast, nearby confounding lines produce a weaker persistent degradation that compounds with repeated exposure. These analyses make TraversalBench a useful diagnostic for identifying whether models suffer from human-like failures or other breakdowns in sustained visual processing. An auxiliary reading-order benchmark further reveals a consistent preference for layouts compatible with left-to-right serialization, while not explaining away the main effects of path complexity. Together, these results position TraversalBench as a controlled diagnostic of path-faithful visual reasoning and as a useful testbed for studying multimodal spatial reasoning under ambiguity, clutter, and distractor structure. More broadly, we position TraversalBench as a contribution to the still-limited area of sustained visual grounding benchmarks for VLMs.

AI.tldr: TraversalBench是一个用于评估视觉语言模型在复杂视觉路径追踪任务中能力的基准测试，专注于精确的路径遍历顺序恢复，特别测试模型处理路径自交叉、弯曲度等结构因素的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在多模态基准测试上表现良好，但在处理人类认为简单的复杂视觉路径追踪任务方面能力尚未得到充分测试。需要一种受控的基准来评估模型在持续视觉处理中的路径忠实推理能力。
AI.method: 设计了TraversalBench基准，包含连续折线、唯一起点标记和路径顶点标记。任务是从起点到终点恢复精确的遍历顺序序列。基准平衡了自交叉数量、弯曲度、顶点数量和附近混淆线等关键路径结构因素，最小化对OCR、世界知识和开放式规划的依赖。
AI.result: 发现自交叉是主要困难来源，错误高度局部化：在第一个交叉点前性能相对稳定，但在需要解决正确延续时急剧下降。附近混淆线产生较弱的持续性能下降。辅助阅读顺序基准显示模型偏好左到右序列化兼容的布局。
AI.conclusion: TraversalBench作为路径忠实视觉推理的受控诊断工具，可用于研究多模态空间推理在模糊性、杂乱和干扰结构下的表现，为持续视觉接地基准的有限领域做出贡献。

title: Human-AI Interaction Traces as Blackout Poetry: Reframing AI-Supported Writing as Found-Text Creativity
comment: 4 pages, Accepted to ACM CHI 2026 Workshop on Herding CATs: Making Sense of Creative Activity Traces
summary: LLMs offer new creative possibilities for writers but also raise concerns about authenticity and reader trust, particularly when AI involvement is disclosed. Prior research has largely framed this as an issue of transparency and provenance, emphasizing the disclosure of human-AI interaction traces that account for how much the AI wrote and what the human did. Yet such audit-oriented disclosures may risk reducing creative collaboration to quantification and surveillance. In this position paper, we argue for a different lens by exploring how human-AI interaction traces might instead function as expressive artifacts that foreground the meaning-making inherent in human-AI collaboration. Drawing inspiration from blackout poetry, we frame AI-generated text as found material through which writers' acts of curation and reinterpretation become inscribed atop the AI's original output. In this way, we suggest that designing interaction traces as aesthetic artifacts may help readers better appreciate and trust writers' creative contributions in AI-assisted writing.

AI.tldr: 论文提出将人机交互痕迹设计为美学表达而非审计工具，以增强读者对AI辅助写作的信任和欣赏
AI.motivation: LLM为写作带来新可能，但AI参与会引发真实性和读者信任问题。现有研究主要关注透明度和溯源，强调披露人机交互痕迹（AI写了多少、人类做了什么），但这种审计导向的披露可能将创造性合作简化为量化和监控。
AI.method: 采用立场论文形式，提出不同视角：探索人机交互痕迹如何作为表达性人工制品，突出人机协作中的意义创造。借鉴涂黑诗歌（blackout poetry）概念，将AI生成文本视为"发现材料"，作家的策展和重新解释行为在AI原始输出上留下印记。
AI.result: 提出将交互痕迹设计为美学人工制品的新框架，帮助读者更好地欣赏和信任作家在AI辅助写作中的创造性贡献，超越单纯的量化审计。
AI.conclusion: 人机交互痕迹不应仅作为审计工具，而应作为表达性美学人工制品，这样能更好地体现和传达人机协作中的创造性意义，增强读者信任。

title: Revisiting Compositionality in Dual-Encoder Vision-Language Models: The Role of Inference
summary: Dual-encoder Vision-Language Models (VLMs) such as CLIP are often characterized as bag-of-words systems due to their poor performance on compositional benchmarks. We argue that this limitation may stem less from deficient representations than from the standard inference protocol based on global cosine similarity. First, through controlled diagnostic experiments, we show that explicitly enforcing fine-grained region-segment alignment at inference dramatically improves compositional performance without updating pretrained encoders. We then introduce a lightweight transformer that learns such alignments directly from frozen patch and token embeddings. Comparing against full fine-tuning and prior end-to-end compositional training methods, we find that although these approaches improve in-domain retrieval, their gains do not consistently transfer under distribution shift. In contrast, learning localized alignment over frozen representations matches full fine-tuning on in-domain retrieval while yielding substantial improvements on controlled out-of-domain compositional benchmarks. These results identify global embedding matching as a key bottleneck in dual-encoder VLMs and highlight the importance of alignment mechanisms for robust compositional generalization.

AI.tldr: 论文提出双编码器视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在组合推理上的局限主要源于基于全局余弦相似度的推理协议，而非表征缺陷。通过引入轻量级Transformer学习局部对齐，显著提升了组合泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 双编码器视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在组合基准测试中表现不佳，常被描述为"词袋系统"。作者认为这种限制可能更多源于标准的全局余弦相似度推理协议，而非表征本身的缺陷。需要探索更有效的推理机制来提升组合泛化能力。
AI.method: 1. 通过诊断实验证明，在推理时显式强制执行细粒度区域-片段对齐能显著提升组合性能；2. 引入轻量级Transformer，直接从冻结的patch和token嵌入中学习这种对齐关系；3. 与全微调和先前的端到端组合训练方法进行比较。
AI.result: 学习局部对齐的方法在域内检索上匹配全微调性能，同时在受控的域外组合基准测试中带来显著改进。相比之下，全微调和先前的端到端方法虽然提升域内检索，但在分布转移下的增益不一致。
AI.conclusion: 全局嵌入匹配是双编码器视觉语言模型的关键瓶颈，对齐机制对于鲁棒组合泛化至关重要。通过轻量级对齐学习可以在不更新预训练编码器的情况下显著提升组合推理能力。

title: "bot lane noob" Towards Deployment of NLP-based Toxicity Detectors in Video Games
summary: Toxicity and harassment are widespread in the video-gaming context. Especially in competitive online multiplayer scenarios, gamers oftentimes send harmful messages to other players (teammates or opponents) whose consequences span from mild annoyance to withdrawal and depression. Abundant prior work tackled these problems, e.g., pointing out the negative effects of toxic interactions. However, few works proposed countermeasures specifically developed and tested on textual messages sent during a match -- i.e., when the "harassment" actually occurs. We posit that such a scarcity stems from the lack of high-quality datasets that can be used to devise "automated" detectors based on natural-language processing (NLP) and machine learning (ML), and which can -- ideally -- mitigate the harm of toxic comments during a gaming session. This work provides a foundation for addressing the problem of toxicity and harassment in video games. First, through a systematic literature review (n=1,039), we provide evidence that only few works proposed ML/NLP-based detectors of toxicity/harassment during live matches. Then, we partner-up with 8 expert League of Legend (LoL) players and create a fine-grained labelled dataset, L2DTnH, containing 1.4k toxic and 13.8k non-toxic messages exchanged during LoL matches. We use L2DTnH to develop a detector that we then empirically show outperforms general-purpose and state-of-the-art toxicity detectors reliant on NLP. To further demonstrate the practicality of our resources, we test our detector on game-related data beyond that included in L2DTnH; and we develop a Web-browser extension that flags toxic content in Webpages -- without querying third-party servers owned by AI companies. We publicly release all of our resources. Our contributions pave the way for more applied research devoted to fighting the spread of toxicity and harassment in video games.

AI.tldr: 本文针对游戏中的毒性言论问题，提出了专门的数据集L2DTnH和检测器，在游戏场景下优于通用毒性检测模型
AI.motivation: 视频游戏中的毒性言论和骚扰问题严重，尤其在竞技性在线多人游戏中，有害消息可能导致从轻微烦恼到抑郁退游等后果。现有研究缺乏专门针对游戏实时聊天场景的自动化检测方案，主要原因是缺乏高质量数据集。
AI.method: 1) 通过系统文献综述(n=1039)分析现有研究空白；2) 与8名英雄联盟专家玩家合作创建细粒度标注数据集L2DTnH(包含1.4k有毒和13.8k无毒消息)；3) 基于该数据集开发专门检测器；4) 开发无需查询第三方AI服务器的浏览器扩展
AI.result: 1) 文献综述证实游戏实时毒性检测研究稀缺；2) L2DTnH数据集填补了领域空白；3) 开发的检测器在游戏场景下优于通用和SOTA毒性检测模型；4) 浏览器扩展实现了本地化检测
AI.conclusion: 本文为游戏毒性检测提供了基础资源，包括高质量数据集、专门检测器和实用工具，为减少游戏中毒性言论传播的应用研究铺平了道路

title: Panoptic Pairwise Distortion Graph
summary: In this work, we introduce a new perspective on comparative image assessment by representing an image pair as a structured composition of its regions. In contrast, existing methods focus on whole image analysis, while implicitly relying on region-level understanding. We extend the intra-image notion of a scene graph to inter-image, and propose a novel task of Distortion Graph (DG). DG treats paired images as a structured topology grounded in regions, and represents dense degradation information such as distortion type, severity, comparison and quality score in a compact interpretable graph structure. To realize the task of learning a distortion graph, we contribute (i) a region-level dataset, PandaSet, (ii) a benchmark suite, PandaBench, with varying region-level difficulty, and (iii) an efficient architecture, Panda, to generate distortion graphs. We demonstrate that PandaBench poses a significant challenge for state-of-the-art multimodal large language models (MLLMs) as they fail to understand region-level degradations even when fed with explicit region cues. We show that training on PandaSet or prompting with DG elicits region-wise distortion understanding, opening a new direction for fine-grained, structured pairwise image assessment.

AI.tldr: 提出图像失真图（Distortion Graph）新任务，将图像对表示为区域级结构化组合，用于细粒度图像质量评估，并构建了PandaSet数据集、PandaBench基准和Panda架构。
AI.motivation: 现有图像质量评估方法主要关注整图分析，而忽略了区域级的退化理解。作者认为图像对应该被表示为区域级结构化拓扑，以更精细地捕捉失真类型、严重程度等信息。
AI.method: 1) 将场景图概念扩展到图像间，提出失真图任务；2) 构建区域级数据集PandaSet；3) 设计PandaBench基准测试套件；4) 开发高效的Panda架构生成失真图。
AI.result: 1) 当前最先进的多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在PandaBench上表现不佳，即使提供明确区域线索也无法理解区域级退化；2) 在PandaSet上训练或使用失真图提示可以激发区域级失真理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 失真图为细粒度、结构化的成对图像评估开辟了新方向，通过区域级结构化表示可以更好地理解和评估图像质量退化。

title: Characterizing Performance-Energy Trade-offs of Large Language Models in Multi-Request Workflows
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in applications forming multi-request workflows like document summarization, search-based copilots, and multi-agent programming. While these workflows unlock richer functionality, they also amplify latency and energy demand during inference. Existing measurement and benchmarking efforts either focus on assessing LLM inference systems or consider single-request evaluations, overlooking workflow dependencies and cross-request interactions unique to multi-request workflows. Moreover, the energy usage of such interdependent LLM calls remains underexplored.
  To address these gaps, this paper presents the first systematic characterization of performance-energy trade-offs in multi-request LLM inference. We develop four representative workloads capturing sequential, interactive, agentic, and composite patterns common in modern deployments. Using an NVIDIA A100 testbed with state-of-the-art serving systems (vLLM and Parrot), we analyze how key energy knobs affect latency, throughput, and component-level energy use. Our findings reveal batch size as the most impactful lever, though benefits are workload dependent. While optimal batching benefits workloads with large shared prompts, it is ineffective for sequential summarization and only partially effective for multi-agent coding. GPU power capping provides modest but predictable savings, while output length induces linear energy scaling with limited efficiency gains. We further show that engine-level optimizations in vLLM maintain higher GPU utilization and efficiency, especially for decode-heavy workloads, while Parrot's workflow-aware scheduling achieves lower energy consumption under strict power constraints. These findings offer actionable guidelines for developers and system operators designing performance- and energy-aware LLM serving systems in emerging multi-request workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统性地研究了多请求LLM推理中的性能-能耗权衡，开发了四种代表性工作负载，在A100测试床上分析了批处理大小、GPU功率限制等关键参数对延迟、吞吐量和能耗的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在文档摘要、搜索助手、多智能体编程等多请求工作流中的应用增加，这些工作流虽然功能更丰富，但也显著增加了推理延迟和能耗。现有研究要么关注LLM推理系统评估，要么只考虑单请求评估，忽略了多请求工作流特有的依赖关系和跨请求交互，且此类相互依赖的LLM调用的能耗问题尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 开发了四种代表性工作负载（顺序、交互、智能体、复合模式），在NVIDIA A100测试床上使用先进的推理系统（vLLM和Parrot），分析批处理大小、GPU功率限制、输出长度等关键能耗参数对延迟、吞吐量和组件级能耗的影响。
AI.result: 批处理大小是最具影响力的参数，但其效果因工作负载而异：对于具有大型共享提示的工作负载效果最佳，但对顺序摘要无效，对多智能体编码仅部分有效。GPU功率限制提供适度但可预测的节能效果，输出长度导致线性能耗增长且效率提升有限。vLLM的引擎级优化在解码密集型工作负载中保持更高的GPU利用率和效率，而Parrot的工作流感知调度在严格功率限制下实现更低能耗。
AI.conclusion: 本文为开发者和系统操作员设计新兴多请求工作流中的性能和能耗感知LLM推理系统提供了实用指南，强调了批处理优化的重要性以及不同工作负载特性的差异化影响。

title: A Modularized Framework for Piecewise-Stationary Restless Bandits
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2410.05734
summary:
We study the piecewise-stationary restless multi-armed bandit (PS-RMAB) problem, where each arm evolves as a Markov chain but \emph{mean rewards may change across unknown segments}. To address the resulting exploration--detection delay trade-off, we propose a modular framework that integrates arbitrary RMAB base algorithms with change detection and a novel diminishing exploration mechanism. This design enables flexible plug-and-play use of existing solvers and detectors, while efficiently adapting to mean changes without prior knowledge of their number.
  To evaluate performance, we introduce a refined regret notion that measures the \emph{excess regret due to exploration and detection}, benchmarked against an oracle that restarts the base algorithm at the true change points. Under this metric, we prove a regret bound of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{LMKT})$, where $L$ denotes the maximum mixing time of the Markov chains across all arms and segments, $M$ the number of segments, $K$ the number of arms, and $T$ the horizon. Simulations confirm that our framework achieves regret close to that of the segment oracle and consistently outperforms base solvers that do not incorporate any mechanism to handle environmental changes.

AI.tldr: 提出模块化框架解决分段平稳多臂赌博机问题，集成任意基础算法与变化检测，实现无先验知识下的自适应学习
AI.motivation: 解决分段平稳多臂赌博机问题中探索与检测延迟的权衡，传统方法无法处理均值奖励在未知分段间的变化
AI.method: 模块化框架：集成任意RMAB基础算法+变化检测+递减探索机制，实现即插即用设计
AI.result: 理论证明遗憾界为$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{LMKT})$，实验显示接近分段oracle性能，优于无变化处理的基础算法
AI.conclusion: 提出的模块化框架能有效处理分段平稳环境，无需先验知识，具有理论保证和实际性能优势

title: Towards Realistic 3D Emission Materials: Dataset, Baseline, and Evaluation for Emission Texture Generation
comment: Dataset will be available at https://github.com/yx345kw/EmissionGen
summary: 3D texture generation is receiving increasing attention, as it enables the creation of realistic and aesthetic texture materials for untextured 3D meshes. However, existing 3D texture generation methods are limited to producing only a few types of non-emissive PBR materials (e.g., albedo, metallic maps and roughness maps), making them difficult to replicate highly popular styles, such as cyberpunk, failing to achieve effects like realistic LED emissions. To address this limitation, we propose a novel task, emission texture generation, which enables the synthesized 3D objects to faithfully reproduce the emission materials from input reference images. Our key contributions include: first, We construct the Objaverse-Emission dataset, the first dataset that contains 40k 3D assets with high-quality emission materials. Second, we propose EmissionGen, a novel baseline for the emission texture generation task. Third, we define detailed evaluation metrics for the emission texture generation task. Our results demonstrate significant potential for future industrial applications. Dataset will be available at https://github.com/yx345kw/EmissionGen.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了3D发射纹理生成新任务，构建了首个包含4万高质量发射材质3D资产的数据集Objaverse-Emission，并开发了EmissionGen基线方法，解决了现有方法无法生成LED等发射材质的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D纹理生成方法仅限于生成非发射性PBR材质（如反照率、金属度、粗糙度），无法复制赛博朋克等流行风格中LED发射效果，限制了3D纹理生成的实用性和美学表现。
AI.method: 1) 构建Objaverse-Emission数据集：首个包含4万个高质量发射材质3D资产的数据集；2) 提出EmissionGen基线方法：用于发射纹理生成任务；3) 定义详细的评估指标：针对发射纹理生成任务的评价体系。
AI.result: 提出的方法能够使合成的3D对象忠实地再现输入参考图像中的发射材质，展示了未来工业应用的显著潜力，数据集将在GitHub上公开。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了3D纹理生成中发射材质生成的空白，为赛博朋克等流行风格的3D内容创作提供了技术基础，具有重要的工业应用价值。

title: Token-Budget-Aware Pool Routing for Cost-Efficient LLM Inference
comment: Technical Report. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2604.08075
summary:
Production vLLM fleets provision every instance for worst-case context length, wasting 4-8x concurrency on the 80-95% of requests that are short and simultaneously triggering KV-cache failures -- OOM crashes, preemption storms, and request rejections. Both problems share a single root cause: configuration-traffic mismatch.
  We propose token-budget-aware pool routing: estimate each request's total token budget using a self-calibrating per-category bytes-per-token ratio, then dispatch it to one of two vLLM pools -- a high-throughput short pool or a high-capacity long pool -- each right-sized for its workload class. The ratio is learned online via exponential moving average from usage.prompt_tokens feedback, requiring no tokenizer. A closed-form cost model, savings = alpha * (1 - 1/rho), predicts fleet-level GPU savings from two observable quantities: the short-traffic fraction alpha and the throughput gain ratio rho.
  On traces from the Azure LLM Inference Dataset and LMSYS-Chat-1M serving Llama-3-70B on A100 GPUs, token-budget routing reduces GPU instances by 17-39% (\$1.2-2.0M/yr at 1,000 req/s), with savings verified by a self-contained discrete-event simulator. A case study projecting Qwen3-235B-A22B on AMD MI300X at 10,000 req/s shows \$15.4M/yr in savings. The algorithm adds O(1) dispatch overhead, self-calibrates across content types without a tokenizer, and composes with PagedAttention, continuous batching, and prefill-decode disaggregation.

AI.tldr: 提出基于token预算感知的池路由机制，通过在线学习每个请求类别的字节-令牌比率来估计token预算，将请求分发到针对短请求优化的高吞吐量池或针对长请求优化的高容量池，显著减少GPU实例需求。
AI.motivation: 当前vLLM生产集群为最坏情况上下文长度配置实例，导致80-95%的短请求浪费4-8倍并发性，同时触发KV缓存故障（OOM崩溃、抢占风暴、请求拒绝）。问题的根本原因是配置与流量不匹配。
AI.method: 提出token预算感知池路由：1) 使用自校准的每类别字节-令牌比率估计每个请求的总token预算；2) 将请求分发到两个vLLM池（高吞吐量短池和高容量长池）；3) 通过指数移动平均从usage.prompt_tokens反馈在线学习比率，无需分词器；4) 建立闭式成本模型预测GPU节省。
AI.result: 在Azure LLM推理数据集和LMSYS-Chat-1M上服务Llama-3-70B（A100 GPU），token预算路由减少17-39%的GPU实例（1000请求/秒时每年节省120-200万美元）。Qwen3-235B-A22B在AMD MI300X上10000请求/秒的案例显示每年节省1540万美元。
AI.conclusion: token预算路由通过解决配置-流量不匹配问题，显著提高GPU利用率并降低成本，算法开销为O(1)，自校准无需分词器，与PagedAttention、连续批处理和预填充-解码解耦等技术兼容。

title: DuET: Dual Execution for Test Output Prediction with Generated Code and Pseudocode
summary: This work addresses test output prediction, a key challenge in test case generation. To improve the reliability of predicted outputs by LLMs, prior approaches generate code first to ground predictions. One grounding strategy is direct execution of generated code, but even minor errors can cause failures. To address this, we introduce LLM-based pseudocode execution, which grounds prediction on more error-resilient pseudocode and simulates execution via LLM reasoning. We further propose DuET, a dual-execution framework that combines both approaches by functional majority voting. Our analysis shows the two approaches are complementary in overcoming the limitations of direct execution suffering from code errors, and pseudocode reasoning from hallucination. On LiveCodeBench, DuET achieves the state-of-the-art performance, improving Pass@1 by 13.6 pp.

AI.tldr: DuET框架通过结合代码直接执行和LLM伪代码执行，使用功能多数投票来提高测试输出预测的可靠性，在LiveCodeBench上实现SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 解决测试用例生成中的测试输出预测挑战，提高LLM预测输出的可靠性。现有方法首先生成代码来支撑预测，但直接执行代码时即使微小错误也会导致失败
AI.method: 提出LLM伪代码执行方法，基于更容错的伪代码进行预测，通过LLM推理模拟执行。进一步提出DuET双执行框架，通过功能多数投票结合两种方法
AI.result: 分析显示两种方法互补：直接执行受代码错误限制，伪代码推理受幻觉影响。在LiveCodeBench上，DuET达到最先进性能，Pass@1提升13.6个百分点
AI.conclusion: DuET框架通过结合代码直接执行和伪代码执行的优势，有效提高了测试输出预测的可靠性，为LLM在代码生成和测试领域的应用提供了新方法

title: Byzantine-Robust Distributed SGD: A Unified Analysis and Tight Error Bounds
summary: Byzantine-robust distributed optimization relies on robust aggregation rules to mitigate the influence of malicious Byzantine workers. Despite the proliferation of such rules, a unified convergence analysis framework that accommodates general data heterogeneity is lacking. In this work, we provide a thorough convergence theory of Byzantine-robust distributed stochastic gradient descent (SGD), analyzing variants both with and without local momentum. We establish the convergence rates for nonconvex smooth objectives and those satisfying the Polyak-Lojasiewicz condition under a general data heterogeneity assumption. Our analysis reveals that while stochasticity and data heterogeneity introduce unavoidable error floors, local momentum provably reduces the error component induced by stochasticity. Furthermore, we derive matching lower bounds to demonstrate that the upper bounds obtained in our analysis are tight and characterize the fundamental limits of Byzantine resilience under stochasticity and data heterogeneity. Empirical results support our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的收敛分析框架，用于拜占庭鲁棒的分布式随机梯度下降（SGD），分析了带和不带局部动量的变体，建立了在一般数据异构性假设下的收敛率，并证明了局部动量可以降低随机性引起的误差分量。
AI.motivation: 尽管拜占庭鲁棒的分布式优化已经有许多聚合规则，但缺乏一个能够适应一般数据异构性的统一收敛分析框架。本文旨在填补这一空白，为拜占庭鲁棒的分布式SGD提供全面的收敛理论。
AI.method: 提出了一个统一的收敛分析框架，分析拜占庭鲁棒的分布式随机梯度下降（SGD）的两种变体：带局部动量和不带局部动量。在一般数据异构性假设下，建立了非凸光滑目标和满足Polyak-Lojasiewicz条件的收敛率。通过匹配下界证明了所得上界的紧致性。
AI.result: 分析表明，随机性和数据异构性会引入不可避免的误差下限，但局部动量可以证明降低随机性引起的误差分量。通过匹配下界证明了分析中得到的上界是紧致的，并刻画了在随机性和数据异构性下拜占庭鲁棒性的基本极限。实证结果支持了理论发现。
AI.conclusion: 本文为拜占庭鲁棒的分布式SGD提供了一个全面的收敛理论框架，揭示了局部动量在降低随机性误差方面的优势，并通过匹配下界证明了理论结果的紧致性，为分布式优化中的拜占庭鲁棒性提供了理论基础。

title: Data-Efficient Semantic Segmentation of 3D Point Clouds via Open-Vocabulary Image Segmentation-based Pseudo-Labeling
summary: Semantic segmentation of 3D point cloud scenes is a crucial task for various applications. In real-world scenarios, training segmentation models often faces three concurrent forms of data insufficiency: scarcity of training scenes, scarcity of point-level annotations, and absence of 2D image sequences from which point clouds were reconstructed. Existing data-efficient algorithms typically address only one or two of these challenges, leaving the joint treatment of all three unexplored. This paper proposes a data-efficient training framework specifically designed to address the three forms of data insufficiency. Our proposed algorithm, called Point pseudo-Labeling via Open-Vocabulary Image Segmentation (PLOVIS), leverages an Open-Vocabulary Image Segmentation (OVIS) model as a pseudo label generator to compensate for the lack of training data. PLOVIS creates 2D images for pseudo-labeling directly from training 3D point clouds, eliminating the need for 2D image sequences. To mitigate the inherent noise and class imbalance in pseudo labels, we introduce a two-stage filtering of pseudo labels combined with a class-balanced memory bank for effective training. The two-stage filtering mechanism first removes low-confidence pseudo labels, then discards likely incorrect pseudo labels, thereby enhancing the quality of pseudo labels. Experiments on four benchmark datasets, i.e., ScanNet, S3DIS, Toronto3D, and Semantic3D, under realistic data-scarce conditions (a few tens of training 3D scenes, each annotated with only <100 3D points) demonstrate that PLOVIS consistently outperforms existing methods including standard fine-tuning strategies and state-of-the-art weakly supervised learning algorithms. Code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: PLOVIS：一种针对3D点云语义分割的数据高效训练框架，通过开放词汇图像分割模型生成伪标签，解决训练场景稀缺、点级标注稀缺和缺乏2D图像序列的三重数据不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界3D点云语义分割面临三重数据不足挑战：训练场景稀缺、点级标注稀缺、缺乏重建点云的2D图像序列。现有方法通常只解决其中一两个问题，而本文旨在同时解决所有三个挑战。
AI.method: 提出PLOVIS框架，利用开放词汇图像分割模型作为伪标签生成器，直接从3D点云创建2D图像进行伪标注。引入两阶段伪标签过滤机制（先去除低置信度标签，再去除可能错误的标签）和类别平衡记忆库来缓解伪标签噪声和类别不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在ScanNet、S3DIS、Toronto3D和Semantic3D四个基准数据集上，在数据稀缺条件下（几十个训练场景，每个场景仅<100个3D点标注），PLOVIS一致优于现有方法，包括标准微调策略和最先进的弱监督学习算法。
