AI.result: 发现结构性冲突的最优配置：1）吞吐量最大化需要最小最快的草稿模型和设备相关的推测长度（K*=2-10）；2）成本和能效都收敛到K=2，但成本偏好最大草稿模型（高接受率），能效偏好最小草稿模型（低功耗）。
AI.conclusion: 没有单一固定配置能同时优化所有目标，这强调了在解耦的边缘-云LLM推理中需要基于性能分析的配置选择，ConfigSpec为此提供了系统化框架。

title: A Compact and Efficient 1.251 Million Parameter Machine Learning CNN Model PD36-C for Plant Disease Detection: A Case Study
summary: Deep learning has markedly advanced image based plant disease diagnosis as improved hardware and dataset quality have enabled increasingly accurate neural network models. This paper presents PD36 C, a compact convolutional neural network (1,250,694 parameters and 4.77 MB) for plant disease classification. Trained with TensorFlow Keras on the New Plant Diseases Dataset (87k images, 38 classes), PD36 C is designed for robustness and edge deployability, complemented by a Qt for Python desktop application that offers an intuitive GUI and offline inference on commodity hardware. Across experiments, training accuracy reached 0.99697 by epoch 30, and average test accuracy was 0.9953 across 38 classes. Per class performance is uniformly high; on the lower end, Corn (maize) Cercospora leaf spot achieved precision around 0.9777 and recall around 0.9634, indicating occasional confusion with visually similar categories, while on the upper end numerous classes including Apple Black rot, Cedar apple rust, Blueberry healthy, Cherry Powdery mildew, Cherry healthy, and all four grape categories achieved perfect precision 1.00 and recall of 1.00, indicating no false positives and strong coverage. These results show that with a well curated dataset and careful architectural design, small CNNs can achieve competitive accuracy compared with recent baselines while remaining practical for edge scenarios. We also note typical constraints such as adverse weather, low quality imagery, and leaves exhibiting multiple concurrent diseases that can degrade performance and warrant future work on domain robustness. Overall, PD36 C and its application pipeline contribute a field ready, efficient solution for AI assisted plant disease detection in smart agriculture.

AI.tldr: 提出PD36 C——一个紧凑的卷积神经网络（125万参数，4.77MB），用于植物病害分类，在New Plant Diseases Dataset（87k图像，38类）上达到99.5%测试准确率，并开发了Qt桌面应用支持离线推理。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在植物病害诊断方面取得显著进展，但现有模型通常较大，不适合边缘部署。需要开发紧凑、高效的CNN模型，在保持高准确率的同时，能够在资源受限的边缘设备上运行，满足智能农业的实际应用需求。
AI.method: 设计PD36 C紧凑卷积神经网络（1,250,694参数，4.77MB），使用TensorFlow Keras在New Plant Diseases Dataset（87k图像，38类）上训练。模型强调鲁棒性和边缘部署能力，并开发了基于Qt for Python的桌面应用程序，提供直观GUI和离线推理功能。
AI.result: 训练准确率达到0.99697（第30轮），38个类别的平均测试准确率为0.9953。多个类别（如苹果黑腐病、蓝莓健康、樱桃白粉病等）达到完美精度1.00和召回率1.00。玉米叶斑病等较难类别精度约0.9777，召回率约0.9634，主要与视觉相似类别混淆。
AI.conclusion: 通过精心设计的数据集和架构，小型CNN可以在保持边缘部署实用性的同时，达到与最新基线模型竞争的准确率。PD36 C及其应用管道为智能农业中的AI辅助植物病害检测提供了现场可用的高效解决方案。

title: LoGo-MR: Screening Breast MRI for Cancer Risk Prediction by Efficient Omni-Slice Modeling
summary: Efficient and explainable breast cancer (BC) risk prediction is critical for large-scale population-based screening. Breast MRI provides functional information for personalized risk assessment. Yet effective modeling remains challenging as fully 3D CNNs capture volumetric context at high computational cost, whereas lightweight 2D CNNs fail to model inter-slice continuity. Importantly, breast MRI modeling for shor- and long-term BC risk stratification remains underexplored. In this study, we propose LoGo-MR, a 2.5D local-global structural modeling framework for five-year BC risk prediction. Aligned with clinical interpretation, our framework first employs neighbor-slice encoding to capture subtle local cues linked to short-term risk. It then integrates transformer-enhanced multiple-instance learning (MIL) to model distributed global patterns related to long-term risk and provide interpretable slice importance. We further apply this framework across axial, sagittal, and coronal planes as LoGo3-MR to capture complementary volumetric information. This multi-plane formulation enables voxel-level risk saliency mapping, which may assist radiologists in localizing risk-relevant regions during breast MRI interpretation. Evaluated on a large breast MRI screening cohort (~7.5K), our method outperforms 2D/3D baselines and existing SOTA MIL methods, achieving AUCs of 0.77-0.69 for 1- to 5-year prediction and improving C-index by ~6% over 3D CNNs. LoGo3-MR further improves overall performance with interpretable localization across three planes, and validation across seven backbones shows consistent gains. These results highlight the clinical potential of efficient MRI-based BC risk stratification for large-scale screening. Code will be released publicly.

AI.tldr: LoGo-MR：一种用于五年乳腺癌风险预测的2.5D局部-全局结构建模框架，通过邻居切片编码和Transformer增强的多实例学习，在大型乳腺MRI筛查队列中优于2D/3D基线方法。
AI.motivation: 乳腺MRI为个性化风险评估提供功能信息，但有效建模面临挑战：完全3D CNN计算成本高，而轻量级2D CNN无法建模切片间连续性。短期和长期乳腺癌风险分层在乳腺MRI建模中仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出LoGo-MR框架：1) 邻居切片编码捕捉与短期风险相关的局部线索；2) Transformer增强的多实例学习(MIL)建模与长期风险相关的分布式全局模式，并提供可解释的切片重要性。进一步扩展到三个平面（轴状、矢状、冠状）作为LoGo3-MR，捕捉互补的体积信息，实现体素级风险显著性映射。
AI.result: 在大型乳腺MRI筛查队列（约7.5K）上评估，方法优于2D/3D基线和现有SOTA MIL方法，1-5年预测的AUC为0.77-0.69，C-index比3D CNN提高约6%。LoGo3-MR进一步提高了整体性能，并在三个平面上提供可解释的定位。
AI.conclusion: 该方法展示了基于MRI的高效乳腺癌风险分层在大规模筛查中的临床潜力，通过2.5D局部-全局建模平衡了计算效率和体积上下文捕捉。

title: SMART: When is it Actually Worth Expanding a Speculative Tree?
summary: Tree-based speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive generation by verifying a branching tree of draft tokens in a single target-model forward pass. However, existing methods prioritize maximizing token-level likelihood or the number of accepted tokens while ignoring a critical ``efficiency paradox'': the computational overhead of drafting and verifying big trees can grow super-linearly, particularly at scale. This often leads to negative wall-clock speedup when batch sizes increase or hardware saturation limits are reached. To address this, we propose SMART, a system-aware marginal analysis framework for runtime tree construction. SMART reformulates tree expansion as a hardware-aware optimization problem that directly maximizes end-to-end speedup. By applying a principled marginal benefit--cost rule at inference time, SMART expands a node only when its marginal benefit--cost ratio exceeds the tree-level speedup. SMART is training-free and serves as a plug-and-play controller for existing frameworks like MSD and EAGLE. Extensive evaluations across three MLLMs (e.g., LLaVA, Qwen2-VL) and four LLMs (e.g., Llama-3.1, DeepSeek-R1) demonstrate that SMART consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. It delivers an average additional speedup of 20.0\% for MLLMs and 15.4\% for LLMs across compute-bound batching regimes and diverse GPU architectures without performance loss.

AI.tldr: SMART是一个系统感知的边际分析框架，用于优化树状推测解码中的运行时树构建，通过硬件感知的优化直接最大化端到端加速，在计算受限的批处理场景下实现额外20%的加速。
AI.motivation: 现有树状推测解码方法存在"效率悖论"：构建和验证大型树的计算开销可能超线性增长，特别是在大规模场景下，当批处理大小增加或硬件饱和时，可能导致负的实时加速。需要一种系统感知的方法来优化树构建过程。
AI.method: SMART将树扩展重新表述为硬件感知的优化问题，应用原则性的边际效益-成本规则：仅当节点的边际效益-成本比超过树级加速时才扩展节点。该方法是免训练的，可作为即插即用控制器用于现有框架如MSD和EAGLE。
AI.result: 在三个MLLM（如LLaVA、Qwen2-VL）和四个LLM（如Llama-3.1、DeepSeek-R1）上的广泛评估显示，SMART始终优于最先进的基线方法，在计算受限的批处理场景和多样GPU架构下，为MLLM带来平均额外20.0%的加速，为LLM带来15.4%的加速，且无性能损失。
AI.conclusion: SMART通过系统感知的边际分析解决了树状推测解码中的效率悖论，提供了一种硬件感知的优化方法，能够在实际部署中实现显著的端到端加速改进。

title: LEADER: Learning Reliable Local-to-Global Correspondences for LiDAR Relocalization
summary: LiDAR relocalization has attracted increasing attention as it can deliver accurate 6-DoF pose estimation in complex 3D environments. Recent learning-based regression methods offer efficient solutions by directly predicting global poses without the need for explicit map storage. However, these methods often struggle in challenging scenes due to their equal treatment of all predicted points, which is vulnerable to noise and outliers. In this paper, we propose LEADER, a robust LiDAR-based relocalization framework enhanced by a simple, yet effective geometric encoder. Specifically, a Robust Projection-based Geometric Encoder architecture which captures multi-scale geometric features is first presented to enhance descriptiveness in geometric representation. A Truncated Relative Reliability loss is then formulated to model point-wise ambiguity and mitigate the influence of unreliable predictions. Extensive experiments on the Oxford RobotCar and NCLT datasets demonstrate that LEADER outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving 24.1% and 73.9% relative reductions in position error over existing techniques, respectively. The source code is released on https://github.com/JiansW/LEADER.

AI.tldr: LEADER是一个基于LiDAR的鲁棒重定位框架，通过几何编码器和截断相对可靠性损失来提升在复杂场景中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于学习的回归方法在LiDAR重定位中虽然高效，但在复杂场景中表现不佳，因为它们平等对待所有预测点，容易受到噪声和异常值的影响。
AI.method: 提出了LEADER框架：1) 鲁棒的基于投影的几何编码器架构，捕获多尺度几何特征；2) 截断相对可靠性损失，建模点级模糊度并减轻不可靠预测的影响。
AI.result: 在Oxford RobotCar和NCLT数据集上的实验表明，LEADER优于现有最先进方法，位置误差分别相对减少了24.1%和73.9%。
AI.conclusion: LEADER通过几何编码和可靠性感知的损失函数，显著提升了LiDAR重定位在复杂环境中的鲁棒性和准确性。

title: Generating Hadamard matrices with transformers
summary: We present a new method for constructing Hadamard matrices that combines transformer neural networks with local search in the PatternBoost framework. Our approach is designed for extremely sparse combinatorial search problems and is particularly effective for Hadamard matrices of Goethals--Seidel type, where Fourier methods permit fast scoring and optimisation. For orders between $100$ and $250$, it produces large numbers of inequivalent Hadamard matrices, and in harder cases it succeeds where local search from random initialisation fails. The largest example found by our method has order $244$. In addition to these new constructions, our experiments reveal that the transformer can discover and exploit useful hidden symmetry in the search space.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合Transformer神经网络与局部搜索的PatternBoost框架，用于构造Hadamard矩阵，特别适用于Goethals-Seidel类型，在100-250阶范围内生成大量不等价矩阵，最大找到244阶矩阵。
AI.motivation: 针对极稀疏组合搜索问题，传统方法在构造Hadamard矩阵时面临困难，特别是在高维情况下。需要开发能够处理复杂对称性和搜索空间结构的新方法。
AI.method: 结合Transformer神经网络与局部搜索的PatternBoost框架。利用Fourier方法实现快速评分和优化，特别针对Goethals-Seidel类型的Hadamard矩阵。Transformer能够发现和利用搜索空间中的隐藏对称性。
AI.result: 在100-250阶范围内生成大量不等价的Hadamard矩阵，最大构造出244阶矩阵。在传统随机初始化局部搜索失败的困难情况下仍能成功。实验显示Transformer能够发现搜索空间中的有用隐藏对称性。
AI.conclusion: Transformer神经网络与局部搜索的结合为极稀疏组合搜索问题提供了有效解决方案，特别是在Hadamard矩阵构造中表现出色，能够发现和利用搜索空间的隐藏结构。

title: From Redaction to Restoration: Deep Learning for Medical Image Anonymization and Reconstruction
summary: Removing patient-specific information from medical images is crucial to enable sharing and open science without compromising patient identities. However, many methods currently used for deidentification have negative effects on downstream image analysis tasks because of removal of relevant but non-identifiable information. This work presents an end-to-end deep learning framework for transforming raw clinical image volumes into de-identified, analysis-ready datasets without compromising downstream utility. The methodology developed and tested in this work first detects and redacts regions likely to contain protected health information (PHI), such as burned-in text and metadata, and then uses a generative deep learning model to inpaint the redacted areas with anatomically and imaging plausible content. The proposed pipeline leverages a lightweight hybrid architecture, combining CRNN-based redaction with a latent-diffusion inpainting restoration module (Stable Diffusion 2). We evaluate the approach using both privacy-oriented metrics, which quantify residual PHI and success of redaction, and image-quality and task-based metrics, which assess the fidelity of restored volumes for representative deep learning applications. Our results suggest that the proposed method yields de-identified medical images that are visually coherent, maintaining fidelity for downstream models, while substantially reducing the risk of patient re-identification. By automating anonymization and image reconstruction within a single workflow, and dissemination of large-scale medical imaging collections, thereby lowering a key barrier to data sharing and multi-institutional collaboration in medical imaging AI.

AI.tldr: 提出端到端深度学习框架，通过检测并遮盖医疗图像中的隐私信息区域，然后使用生成模型（Stable Diffusion 2）进行修复，实现医疗图像的去标识化同时保持下游分析任务的可用性。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像去标识化对于数据共享和开放科学至关重要，但现有方法在去除患者身份信息时常常会移除相关但非标识性的信息，从而影响下游图像分析任务的性能。
AI.method: 采用混合架构：1) 使用CRNN检测并遮盖可能包含受保护健康信息（PHI）的区域（如烧录文本和元数据）；2) 使用潜在扩散修复模型（Stable Diffusion 2）在遮盖区域生成解剖学和影像学上合理的内容。
AI.result: 该方法生成的去标识化医疗图像在视觉上连贯，保持了下游模型的保真度，同时显著降低了患者重新识别的风险。在隐私导向指标和图像质量/任务指标上均表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端框架能够自动化医疗图像匿名化和重建，降低数据共享和多机构协作的关键障碍，促进大规模医学影像数据集的传播。

title: ConvFormer3D-TAP: Phase/Uncertainty-Aware Front-End Fusion for Cine CMR View Classification Pipelines
summary: Reliable recognition of standard cine cardiac MRI views is essential because each view determines which cardiac anatomy is visualized and which quantitative analyses can be performed. Incorrect view identification, whether by a human reader or an automated deep learning system, can propagate errors into segmentation, volumetric assessment, strain analysis, and valve evaluation. However, accurate view classification remains challenging under routine clinical variability in scanner vendor, acquisition protocol, motion artifacts, and plane prescription. We present ConvFormer3D-TAP, a cine-specific spatiotemporal architecture that integrates 3D convolutional tokenization with multiscale self-attention. The model is trained using masked spatiotemporal reconstruction and uncertainty-weighted multi-clip fusion to enhance robustness across cardiac phases and ambiguous temporal segments. The design captures complementary cues: local anatomical structure through convolutional priors and long-range cardiac-cycle dynamics through hierarchical attention. On a cohort of 150,974 clinically acquired cine sequences spanning six standard cine cardiac MRI views, ConvFormer3D-TAP achieved 96% validation accuracy with per-class F1-scores >= 0.94 and strong calibration (ECE = 0.025; Brier = 0.040). Error analysis shows that residual confusions are concentrated in anatomically adjacent long-axis and LVOT/AV view pairs, consistent with intrinsic prescription overlap. These results support ConvFormer3D-TAP as a scalable front-end for view routing, filtering and quality control in end-to-end cMRI workflows.

AI.tldr: ConvFormer3D-TAP：用于心脏MRI视图分类的3D卷积-Transformer混合架构，结合卷积先验和分层注意力，在临床数据上达到96%准确率
AI.motivation: 心脏MRI标准视图的可靠识别至关重要，因为每个视图决定了可视化的心脏解剖结构和可执行的定量分析。然而，在临床实践中，由于扫描仪厂商、采集协议、运动伪影和平面处方等变异性，准确的视图分类仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出ConvFormer3D-TAP架构，集成3D卷积标记化和多尺度自注意力。使用掩码时空重建和不确定性加权多片段融合进行训练，增强对心脏相位和模糊时间段的鲁棒性。设计结合了卷积先验的局部解剖结构信息和分层注意力的长程心脏周期动态信息。
AI.result: 在包含150,974个临床采集的心脏MRI序列的数据集上（涵盖6个标准视图），模型达到96%验证准确率，各类别F1分数≥0.94，校准性能强（ECE=0.025；Brier=0.040）。错误主要集中在解剖相邻的长轴和LVOT/AV视图对，与固有的处方重叠一致。
AI.conclusion: ConvFormer3D-TAP可作为端到端心脏MRI工作流中视图路由、过滤和质量控制的可扩展前端工具，支持可靠的自动化视图识别。

title: MPAC: A Multi-Principal Agent Coordination Protocol for Interoperable Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: The AI agent ecosystem has converged on two protocols: the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for tool invocation and Agent-to-Agent (A2A) for single-principal task delegation. Both assume a single controlling principal, meaning one person or organization that owns every agent. When independent principals' agents must coordinate over shared state, such as engineers' coding agents editing the same repository, family members planning a shared trip, or agents from different organizations negotiating a joint decision, neither protocol applies, and coordination collapses to ad-hoc chat, manual merging, or silent overwrites. We present MPAC (Multi-Principal Agent Coordination Protocol), an application-layer protocol that fills this gap with explicit coordination semantics across five layers: Session, Intent, Operation, Conflict, and Governance. MPAC makes intent declaration a precondition for action, represents conflicts as first-class structured objects, and supports human-in-the-loop arbitration through a pluggable governance layer. The specification defines 21 message types, three state machines with normative transition tables, Lamport-clock causal watermarking, two execution models, three security profiles, and optimistic concurrency control on shared state. We release two interoperable reference implementations in Python and TypeScript with 223 tests, a JSON Schema suite, and seven live multi-agent demos. A controlled three-agent code review benchmark shows a 95 percent reduction in coordination overhead and a 4.8 times wall-clock speedup versus a serialized human-mediated baseline, with per-agent decision time preserved. The speedup comes from eliminating coordination waits, not compressing model calls. Specification, implementations, and demos are open source.

AI.tldr: MPAC协议填补了多主体代理协调的空白，通过五层结构提供明确的协调语义，相比现有协议显著减少协调开销并提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有AI代理生态系统（MCP和A2A协议）都假设单一控制主体，当多个独立主体的代理需要协调共享状态时（如工程师的编码代理编辑同一仓库、家庭成员规划共享旅行等），缺乏有效的协调协议，导致协调崩溃为临时聊天、手动合并或静默覆盖。
AI.method: 提出MPAC（多主体代理协调协议），这是一个应用层协议，包含五个协调语义层：会话层、意图层、操作层、冲突层和治理层。协议将意图声明作为行动前提，将冲突表示为结构化对象，并通过可插拔治理层支持人工仲裁。规范定义了21种消息类型、三个状态机、Lamport时钟因果水印、两种执行模型、三种安全配置和共享状态的乐观并发控制。
AI.result: 发布了Python和TypeScript的两个可互操作参考实现（223个测试）、JSON Schema套件和7个实时多代理演示。在受控的三代理代码审查基准测试中，相比串行人工协调基线，协调开销减少95%，实际运行速度提升4.8倍，同时保持每个代理的决策时间不变。速度提升来自消除协调等待，而非压缩模型调用。
AI.conclusion: MPAC协议有效解决了多主体代理协调问题，填补了现有协议的空白，显著提升了协调效率和系统性能，为多主体AI代理协作提供了标准化解决方案。

title: Record-Remix-Replay: Hierarchical GPU Kernel Optimization using Evolutionary Search
summary:
As high-performance computing and AI workloads become increasingly dependent on GPUs, maintaining high performance across rapidly evolving hardware generations has become a major challenge. Developers often spend months tuning scientific applications to fully exploit new architectures, navigating a complex optimization space that spans algorithm design, source implementation, compiler flags and pass sequences, and kernel launch parameters. Existing approaches can effectively search parts of this space in isolation, such as launch configurations or compiler settings, but optimizing across the full space still requires substantial human expertise and iterative manual effort.
  In this paper, we present Record-Remix-Replay (R^3), a hierarchical optimization framework that combines LLM-driven evolutionary search, Bayesian optimization, and record-replay compilation techniques to efficiently explore GPU kernel optimizations from source-level implementation choices down to compiler pass ordering and runtime configuration. By making candidate evaluation fast and scalable, our approach enables practical end-to-end search over optimization dimensions that are typically treated separately. We show that Record-Remix-Replay can optimize full scientific applications better than traditional approaches over kernel parameters and compiler flags, while also being nearly an order of magnitude faster than modern evolutionary search approaches.

AI.tldr: R³框架：结合LLM进化搜索、贝叶斯优化和记录-重放编译技术，实现GPU内核优化的分层优化框架，能够跨多个优化维度进行端到端搜索。
AI.motivation: 随着高性能计算和AI工作负载对GPU的依赖增加，跨硬件代际保持高性能成为主要挑战。开发者需要花费数月时间调优科学应用以充分利用新架构，而现有方法只能孤立地搜索部分优化空间，跨全空间的优化仍需大量人工专业知识。
AI.method: 提出Record-Remix-Replay（R³）分层优化框架，结合LLM驱动的进化搜索、贝叶斯优化和记录-重放编译技术，从源代码实现选择到编译器传递顺序和运行时配置，高效探索GPU内核优化。
AI.result: R³能够比传统方法更好地优化完整科学应用（包括内核参数和编译器标志），同时比现代进化搜索方法快近一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 通过使候选评估快速且可扩展，R³实现了对通常被单独处理的优化维度的实用端到端搜索，显著提高了GPU应用优化的效率和效果。

title: Beyond Reconstruction: Reconstruction-to-Vector Diffusion for Hyperspectral Anomaly Detection
summary: While Hyperspectral Anomaly Detection (HAD) excels at identifying sparse targets in complex scenes, existing models remain trapped in a scalar "reconstruction-as-endpoint" paradigm. This reliance on ambiguous scalar residuals consistently triggers sub-pixel anomaly vanishing during spatial downsampling, alongside severe confirmation bias when unpurified anomalies corrupt training weights. In this paper, we propose Reconstruction-to-Vector Diffusion (R2VD), which fundamentally redefines reconstruction as a manifold purification origin to establish a novel residual-guided generative dynamics paradigm. Our framework introduces a four-stage pipeline: (1) a Physical Prior Extraction (PPE) stage that mitigates early confirmation bias via dual-stream statistical guidance; (2) a Guided Manifold Purification (GMP) stage utilizing an OmniContext Autoencoder (OCA) to extract purified residual maps while preserving fragile sub-pixel topologies; (3) a Residual Score Modeling (RSM) stage where a Diffusion Transformer (DiT), guarded by a Physical Spectral Firewall (PSF), effectively isolates cross-spectral leakage; and (4) a Vector Dynamics Inference (VDI) stage that robustly decouples targets from backgrounds by evaluating high-dimensional vector interference patterns instead of conventional scalar errors. Comprehensive evaluations on eight datasets confirm that R2VD establishes a new state-of-the-art, delivering exceptional target detectability and background suppression.

AI.tldr: R2VD提出了一种从标量重构到向量扩散的新范式，通过四阶段流程解决高光谱异常检测中的亚像素消失和确认偏差问题，在八个数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有高光谱异常检测模型陷入"重构即终点"的标量范式，导致空间下采样时亚像素异常消失，以及未净化的异常污染训练权重时的严重确认偏差。
AI.method: 提出四阶段框架：1) 物理先验提取缓解早期确认偏差；2) 引导流形净化提取纯净残差图；3) 残差分数建模隔离跨光谱泄漏；4) 向量动态推理通过高维向量干扰模式解耦目标与背景。
AI.result: 在八个数据集上的综合评估证实R2VD建立了新的最先进水平，提供了卓越的目标检测能力和背景抑制效果。
AI.conclusion: R2VD从根本上重新定义重构为流形净化起点，建立了新的残差引导生成动力学范式，显著提升了高光谱异常检测性能。

title: DDO-RM for LLM Preference Optimization: A Minimal Held-Out Benchmark against DPO
summary:
This paper reorganizes the current manuscript around the DPO versus DDO-RM preference-optimization project and focuses on two parts: the algorithmic view and the preliminary held-out benchmark. The benchmark asks a narrow question: even in a minimal pairwise chosen-versus-rejected setting, can a reward-guided decision-distribution update outperform a direct pairwise objective? We compare Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) against DDO-RM on EleutherAI/pythia-410m using HuggingFaceH4/ultrafeedback\_binarized, evaluate on the held-out test\_prefs split, and report results for seeds 42, 13, and 3407.
  Algorithmically, DDO-RM treats each prompt as a finite decision problem over candidate responses. Instead of optimizing only a binary chosen-rejected relation, it forms a policy distribution over candidates, centers reward-model scores under that distribution, and distills a reward-guided target distribution back into the policy. In the current public benchmark, DDO-RM improves mean pair accuracy from 0.5238 to 0.5602, AUC from 0.5315 to 0.5382, and mean margin from 0.1377 to 0.5353 relative to DPO. These are encouraging but still preliminary results: the study covers one model family, one dataset, one held-out evaluation split, and three seeds.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了DPO与DDO-RM两种偏好优化方法，在最小化成对选择设置中，DDO-RM通过奖励引导的决策分布更新在多个指标上优于直接成对优化的DPO。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索在最小化的成对选择设置中，基于奖励模型的决策分布更新方法（DDO-RM）是否能够优于直接成对优化方法（DPO）。当前偏好优化研究主要关注二元选择关系，而DDO-RM试图通过更丰富的分布视角来改进这一过程。
AI.method: DDO-RM将每个提示视为候选回复的有限决策问题，构建策略分布，在该分布下中心化奖励模型分数，然后将奖励引导的目标分布蒸馏回策略中。实验使用EleutherAI/pythia-410m模型和HuggingFaceH4/ultrafeedback_binarized数据集，在test_prefs分割上进行评估，使用42、13和3407三个随机种子。
AI.result: DDO-RM相对于DPO在多个指标上有所提升：平均配对准确率从0.5238提高到0.5602，AUC从0.5315提高到0.5382，平均边界从0.1377提高到0.5353。这些结果表明奖励引导的决策分布更新在最小化成对选择设置中具有优势。
AI.conclusion: DDO-RM在初步基准测试中显示出优于DPO的性能，但结果仍然是初步的，因为研究仅涵盖一个模型系列、一个数据集、一个测试分割和三个随机种子。这为基于奖励模型的决策分布优化方法提供了有希望的初步证据。

title: Video-based Heart Rate Estimation with Angle-guided ROI Optimization and Graph Signal Denoising
comment: This paper has been accepted by ICASSP 2026
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables non-contact heart rate measurement from facial videos, but its performance is significantly degraded by facial motions such as speaking and head shaking. To address this issue, we propose two plug-and-play modules. The Angle-guided ROI Adaptive Optimization module quantifies ROI-Camera angles to refine motion-affected signals and capture global motion, while the Multi-region Joint Graph Signal Denoising module jointly models intra- and inter-regional ROI signals using graph signal processing to suppress motion artifacts. The modules are compatible with reflection model-based rPPG methods and validated on three public datasets. Results show that jointly use markedly reduces MAE, with an average decrease of 20.38\% over the baseline, while ablation studies confirm the effectiveness of each module. The work demonstrates the potential of angle-guided optimization and graph-based denoising to enhance rPPG performance in motion scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出两个即插即用模块来改善面部运动（如说话、摇头）对远程光电容积脉搏波（rPPG）心率测量的影响：角度引导的ROI自适应优化模块和多区域联合图信号去噪模块。
AI.motivation: 远程光电容积脉搏波（rPPG）能够从面部视频进行非接触式心率测量，但面部运动（如说话、摇头）会显著降低其性能。需要解决运动伪影问题以提高rPPG在现实场景中的实用性。
AI.method: 提出两个即插即用模块：1）角度引导的ROI自适应优化模块，量化ROI-相机角度以细化运动影响信号并捕捉全局运动；2）多区域联合图信号去噪模块，使用图信号处理联合建模区域内和区域间ROI信号以抑制运动伪影。这些模块与基于反射模型的rPPG方法兼容。
AI.result: 在三个公共数据集上的验证显示，联合使用两个模块显著降低了平均绝对误差（MAE），相比基线平均降低了20.38%。消融研究证实了每个模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了角度引导优化和图信号去噪在增强rPPG在运动场景中性能的潜力，为改善非接触式心率测量的鲁棒性提供了有效方法。

title: ADAM: A Systematic Data Extraction Attack on Agent Memory via Adaptive Querying
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents have achieved rapid adoption and demonstrated remarkable capabilities across a wide range of applications. To improve reasoning and task execution, modern LLM agents would incorporate memory modules or retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) mechanisms, enabling them to further leverage prior interactions or external knowledge. However, such a design also introduces a group of critical privacy vulnerabilities: sensitive information stored in memory can be leaked through query-based attacks. Although feasible, existing attacks often achieve only limited performance, with low attack success rates (ASR). In this paper, we propose ADAM, a novel privacy attack that features data distribution estimation of a victim agent's memory and employs an entropy-guided query strategy for maximizing privacy leakage. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our attack substantially outperforms state-of-the-art ones, achieving up to 100% ASRs. These results thus underscore the urgent need for robust privacy-preserving methods for current LLM agents.

AI.tldr: 提出ADAM攻击方法，通过数据分布估计和熵引导查询策略，显著提升对LLM代理内存隐私攻击的成功率，最高可达100%
AI.motivation: LLM代理通过内存模块和RAG机制提升推理能力，但这也引入了隐私漏洞：内存中的敏感信息可能通过查询攻击泄露。现有攻击方法成功率有限，需要更有效的攻击方法来揭示隐私风险
AI.method: 提出ADAM攻击方法，包含两个核心组件：1) 对受害者代理内存的数据分布进行估计；2) 采用熵引导的查询策略来最大化隐私泄露
AI.result: ADAM攻击显著优于现有最先进方法，攻击成功率最高可达100%，揭示了当前LLM代理隐私保护的紧迫需求
AI.conclusion: LLM代理存在严重的隐私漏洞，需要开发鲁棒的隐私保护方法来应对ADAM等高效攻击

title: Backdoors in RLVR: Jailbreak Backdoors in LLMs From Verifiable Reward
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) is an emerging paradigm that significantly boosts a Large Language Model's (LLM's) reasoning abilities on complex logical tasks, such as mathematics and programming. However, we identify, for the first time, a latent vulnerability to backdoor attacks within the RLVR framework. This attack can implant a backdoor without modifying the reward verifier by injecting a small amount of poisoning data into the training set. Specifically, we propose a novel trigger mechanism designated as the \ourapproach (ACB). The attack exploits the RLVR training loop by assigning substantial positive rewards for harmful responses and negative rewards for refusals. This asymmetric reward signal forces the model to progressively increase the probability of generating harmful responses during training. Our findings demonstrate that the RLVR backdoor attack is characterized by both high efficiency and strong generalization capabilities. Utilizing less than 2\% poisoned data in train set, the backdoor can be successfully implanted across various model scales without degrading performance on benign tasks. Evaluations across multiple jailbreak benchmarks indicate that activating the trigger degrades safety performance by an average of 73\%. Furthermore, the attack generalizes effectively to a wide range of jailbreak methods and unsafe behaviors. Code is available at https://github.com/yuki-younai/Backdoor_in_RLVR.

AI.tldr: 本文首次揭示RLVR框架中的后门攻击漏洞，通过注入少量中毒数据（<2%）即可植入后门，利用不对称奖励信号迫使模型在训练中增加生成有害响应的概率。
AI.motivation: RLVR框架能显著提升LLM在数学和编程等复杂逻辑任务上的推理能力，但作者首次发现该框架存在潜在的后门攻击漏洞。研究动机是揭示这种安全威胁，以促进更安全的RLVR系统设计。
AI.method: 提出名为ACB的新型触发机制，通过向训练集注入少量中毒数据（<2%），利用RLVR训练循环中的不对称奖励信号：对有害响应给予高正奖励，对拒绝给予负奖励，迫使模型在训练中逐渐增加生成有害响应的概率。
AI.result: 攻击具有高效率和强泛化能力：仅用<2%中毒数据即可在各种规模模型中成功植入后门，且不影响良性任务性能。在多个越狱基准测试中，激活触发器使安全性能平均下降73%，攻击能有效泛化到多种越狱方法和不安全行为。
AI.conclusion: RLVR框架存在严重的安全漏洞，后门攻击能高效植入且具有强泛化能力。这凸显了在RLVR系统中加强安全防护和鲁棒性验证的必要性。

title: AIM: Intent-Aware Unified world action Modeling with Spatial Value Maps
summary: Pretrained video generation models provide strong priors for robot control, but existing unified world action models still struggle to decode reliable actions without substantial robot-specific training. We attribute this limitation to a structural mismatch: while video models capture how scenes evolve, action generation requires explicit reasoning about where to interact and the underlying manipulation intent. We introduce AIM, an intent-aware unified world action model that bridges this gap via an explicit spatial interface. Instead of decoding actions directly from future visual representations, AIM predicts an aligned spatial value map that encodes task-relevant interaction structure, enabling a control-oriented abstraction of future dynamics. Built on a pretrained video generation model, AIM jointly models future observations and value maps within a shared mixture-of-transformers architecture. It employs intent-causal attention to route future information to the action branch exclusively through the value representation. We further propose a self-distillation reinforcement learning stage that freezes the video and value branches and optimizes only the action head using dense rewards derived from projected value-map responses together with sparse task-level signals. To support training and evaluation, we construct a simulation dataset of 30K manipulation trajectories with synchronized multi-view observations, actions, and value-map annotations. Experiments on RoboTwin 2.0 benchmark show that AIM achieves a 94.0% average success rate, significantly outperforming prior unified world action baselines. Notably, the improvement is more pronounced in long-horizon and contact-sensitive manipulation tasks, demonstrating the effectiveness of explicit spatial-intent modeling as a bridge between visual world modeling and robot control.

AI.tldr: AIM是一个意图感知的统一世界动作模型，通过显式空间接口连接视频生成模型与机器人控制，使用对齐的空间价值图编码任务相关的交互结构，显著提升了长视野和接触敏感操作任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有统一世界动作模型直接从未来视觉表示解码动作，但缺乏对交互位置和操作意图的显式推理，导致动作不可靠。视频生成模型捕捉场景演化，而动作生成需要明确的空间意图推理。
AI.method: 1) 基于预训练视频生成模型构建共享混合transformer架构，联合建模未来观测和价值图；2) 使用意图因果注意力，通过价值表示将未来信息路由到动作分支；3) 提出自蒸馏强化学习阶段，冻结视频和价值分支，仅优化动作头，使用从投影价值图响应和稀疏任务信号导出的密集奖励。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin 2.0基准测试中，AIM达到94.0%的平均成功率，显著优于先前统一世界动作基线。在长视野和接触敏感操作任务中改进尤为明显。
AI.conclusion: 显式空间意图建模是连接视觉世界建模与机器人控制的有效桥梁。对齐的空间价值图提供了控制导向的未来动态抽象，使预训练视频模型能可靠解码动作。

title: GS4City: Hierarchical Semantic Gaussian Splatting via City-Model Priors
summary: Recent semantic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods primarily rely on 2D foundation models, often yielding ambiguous boundaries and limited support for structured urban semantics. While city models such as CityGML encode hierarchically organized semantics together with building geometry, these labels cannot be directly mapped to Gaussian primitives. We present GS4City, a hierarchical semantic Gaussian Splatting method that incorporates city-model priors for urban scene understanding. GS4City derives reliable image-aligned masks from Level of Detail (LoD) 3 CityGML models via two-pass raycasting, explicitly using parent-child relations to validate and recover fine-grained facade elements. It then fuses these geometry-grounded masks with foundation-model predictions to establish scene-consistent instance correspondences, and learns a compact identity encoding for each Gaussian under joint 2D identity supervision and 3D spatial regularization. Experiments on the TUM2TWIN and Gold Coast datasets show that GS4City effectively incorporates structured building semantics into Gaussian scene representations, outperforming existing 2D-driven semantic 3DGS baselines, including LangSplat and Gaga, by up to 15.8 IoU points in coarse building segmentation and 14.2 mIoU points in fine-grained semantic segmentation. By bridging structured city models and photorealistic Gaussian scene representations, GS4City enables semantically queryable and structure-aware urban reconstruction. Code is available at https://github.com/Jinyzzz/GS4City.

AI.tldr: GS4City：一种结合城市模型先验的分层语义高斯泼溅方法，用于城市场景理解，通过融合CityGML几何信息和基础模型预测，实现结构化的语义3D重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于2D基础模型的语义3D高斯泼溅方法存在边界模糊、对结构化城市语义支持有限的问题。城市模型（如CityGML）虽然编码了层次化语义和建筑几何信息，但无法直接映射到高斯基元。
AI.method: 1) 通过两次光线投射从LoD3 CityGML模型获取可靠的图像对齐掩码，利用父子关系验证和恢复细粒度立面元素；2) 融合几何基础掩码与基础模型预测，建立场景一致实例对应；3) 在2D身份监督和3D空间正则化下，为每个高斯学习紧凑身份编码。
AI.result: 在TUM2TWIN和Gold Coast数据集上，GS4City在粗粒度建筑分割上比现有2D驱动的语义3DGS基线（LangSplat和Gaga）提升15.8 IoU点，在细粒度语义分割上提升14.2 mIoU点。
AI.conclusion: GS4City成功将结构化建筑语义融入高斯场景表示，实现了可语义查询和结构感知的城市重建，弥合了结构化城市模型与逼真高斯场景表示之间的鸿沟。

title: Conflicts Make Large Reasoning Models Vulnerable to Attacks
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have achieved remarkable performance across diverse domains, yet their decision-making under conflicting objectives remains insufficiently understood. This work investigates how LRMs respond to harmful queries when confronted with two categories of conflicts: internal conflicts that pit alignment values against each other and dilemmas, which impose mutually contradictory choices, including sacrificial, duress, agent-centered, and social forms. Using over 1,300 prompts across five benchmarks, we evaluate three representative LRMs - Llama-3.1-Nemotron-8B, QwQ-32B, and DeepSeek R1 - and find that conflicts significantly increase attack success rates, even under single-round non-narrative queries without sophisticated auto-attack techniques. Our findings reveal through layerwise and neuron-level analyses that safety-related and functional representations shift and overlap under conflict, interfering with safety-aligned behavior. This study highlights the need for deeper alignment strategies to ensure the robustness and trustworthiness of next-generation reasoning models. Our code is available at https://github.com/DataArcTech/ConflictHarm. Warning: This paper contains inappropriate, offensive and harmful content.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究大型推理模型在冲突目标下的决策行为，发现内部冲突和困境会显著提高有害查询的攻击成功率，揭示了安全相关表征在冲突下的偏移和重叠问题。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型在多样化领域表现出色，但其在冲突目标下的决策机制尚未被充分理解。研究旨在探究当模型面临内部冲突（对齐价值相互矛盾）和困境（相互矛盾的选择）时，如何响应有害查询，以评估其安全性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 使用超过1300个提示，在五个基准测试中评估三个代表性大型推理模型（Llama-3.1-Nemotron-8B、QwQ-32B和DeepSeek R1）。通过层级和神经元级分析，研究安全相关和功能表征在冲突下的变化和重叠情况。
AI.result: 冲突显著提高了攻击成功率，即使在单轮非叙事查询中，无需复杂自动攻击技术。分析显示安全相关和功能表征在冲突下发生偏移和重叠，干扰了安全对齐行为。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了大型推理模型在冲突情境下的脆弱性，强调需要更深入的对齐策略来确保下一代推理模型的鲁棒性和可信度。

title: Scene Change Detection with Vision-Language Representation Learning
summary: Scene change detection (SCD) is crucial for urban monitoring and navigation but remains challenging in real-world environments due to lighting variations, seasonal shifts, viewpoint differences, and complex urban layouts. Existing methods rely primarily on low-level visual features, limiting their ability to accurately identify changed objects amid the visual complexity of urban scenes. In this paper, we propose LangSCD, a vision-language framework for scene change detection that overcomes this single-modal limitation by incorporating semantic reasoning through language. Our approach introduces a modular language component that leverages vision-language models (VLMs) to generate textual descriptions of scene changes, which are fused with visual features through a cross-modal feature enhancer. We further introduce a geometric-semantic matching module that refines the predicted masks by enforcing semantic consistency and spatial completeness. Existing real-world scene change detection benchmarks provide only binary change annotations, which are insufficient for downstream applications requiring fine-grained understanding of scene dynamics. To address this limitation, we introduce NYC-CD, a large-scale dataset of 8,122 real-world image pairs collected in New York City with multiclass change annotations generated through a semi-automatic pipeline. Extensive experiments across multiple street-view benchmarks demonstrate that our language and matching modules consistently improve existing change-detection architectures, achieving state-of-the-art performance and highlighting the value of integrating linguistic reasoning with visual representations for robust scene change detection.

AI.tldr: LangSCD：一个用于场景变化检测的视觉-语言框架，通过语言模型增强语义理解，在纽约市数据集上实现SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 现有场景变化检测方法主要依赖低层视觉特征，难以处理真实世界中的光照变化、季节变化、视角差异和复杂城市布局。单模态方法在识别城市场景中变化物体时能力有限，需要结合语义推理来提升性能。
AI.method: 提出LangSCD框架，包含：1）模块化语言组件，利用视觉-语言模型生成场景变化的文本描述；2）跨模态特征增强器，融合文本和视觉特征；3）几何-语义匹配模块，通过语义一致性和空间完整性约束来优化预测掩码。同时构建了NYC-CD数据集，包含8,122个纽约市图像对，带有半自动生成的多类别变化标注。
AI.result: 在多个街景基准测试上的实验表明，语言和匹配模块持续改进现有变化检测架构，实现了最先进的性能，证明了将语言推理与视觉表示结合对于鲁棒场景变化检测的价值。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入语言模型进行语义推理，能够显著提升场景变化检测的性能，特别是在复杂城市环境中。多模态方法比单模态视觉方法更具优势，语言组件为变化检测提供了有价值的语义信息。

title: A-IO: Adaptive Inference Orchestration for Memory-Bound NPUs
summary: During the deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs), the autoregressive decoding phase on heterogeneous NPU platforms (e.g., Ascend 910B) faces severe memory-bound challenges. This study reveals the ``Model Scaling Paradox'' caused by the static deployment of single-sized models. It also points out the kernel synchronization overhead of fine-grained speculative decoding \cite{leviathan2023fast, chen2023speculative} under NPU computational graph compilation, and the severe limitations of purely relying on micro-level acceleration algorithms like Prompt LookUp Decoding (PLD)

AI.tldr: 本文针对LLM在异构NPU平台上的自回归解码内存瓶颈问题，揭示了静态部署单一规模模型导致的"模型缩放悖论"，并指出了细粒度推测解码在NPU计算图编译下的内核同步开销问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在异构NPU平台（如昇腾910B）部署时，自回归解码阶段面临严重的内存瓶颈问题。现有方法存在两个主要问题：静态部署单一规模模型导致的"模型缩放悖论"，以及细粒度推测解码在NPU计算图编译下的内核同步开销。
AI.method: 论文未在摘要中明确说明具体方法，但指出了现有方法的局限性：静态模型部署、细粒度推测解码（如Fast、Speculative Decoding）的内核同步问题，以及纯依赖Prompt LookUp Decoding等微级加速算法的局限性。
AI.result: 摘要中未提供具体实验结果，但指出了当前方法在NPU平台上的核心问题：模型缩放悖论和内核同步开销，为后续解决方案提供了分析基础。
AI.conclusion: 需要新的解决方案来应对LLM在NPU平台上的内存瓶颈问题，特别是需要解决模型缩放悖论和推测解码的内核同步开销，不能仅仅依赖微级加速算法。

title: Cost-optimal Sequential Testing via Doubly Robust Q-learning
summary: Clinical decision-making often involves selecting tests that are costly, invasive, or time-consuming, motivating individualized, sequential strategies for what to measure and when to stop ascertaining. We study the problem of learning cost-optimal sequential decision policies from retrospective data, where test availability depends on prior results, inducing informative missingness. Under a sequential missing-at-random mechanism, we develop a doubly robust Q-learning framework for estimating optimal policies. The method introduces path-specific inverse probability weights that account for heterogeneous test trajectories and satisfy a normalization property conditional on the observed history. By combining these weights with auxiliary contrast models, we construct orthogonal pseudo-outcomes that enable unbiased policy learning when either the acquisition model or the contrast model is correctly specified. We establish oracle inequalities for the stage-wise contrast estimators, along with convergence rates, regret bounds, and misclassification rates for the learned policy. Simulations demonstrate improved cost-adjusted performance over weighted and complete-case baselines, and an application to a prostate cancer cohort study illustrates how the method reduces testing cost without compromising predictive accuracy.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于从回顾性数据中学习成本最优顺序决策策略的双重稳健Q学习框架，特别针对临床测试场景，其中测试可用性取决于先前结果，导致信息性缺失。
AI.motivation: 临床决策通常涉及选择昂贵、侵入性或耗时的测试，需要个性化的顺序策略来决定测量什么以及何时停止。从回顾性数据中学习这些策略面临挑战，因为测试可用性取决于先前结果，导致信息性缺失。
AI.method: 提出了一个双重稳健Q学习框架，引入路径特定的逆概率权重来处理异质测试轨迹，并结合辅助对比模型构建正交伪结果。该方法在获取模型或对比模型正确指定时都能实现无偏策略学习。
AI.result: 建立了阶段对比估计器的oracle不等式，以及学习策略的收敛率、遗憾界和误分类率。模拟显示在成本调整性能上优于加权和完整案例基线，在前列腺癌队列研究中减少了测试成本而不损害预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为从具有信息性缺失的回顾性数据中学习成本最优顺序决策策略提供了有效的双重稳健框架，在临床测试场景中具有实际应用价值。

title: Online Reasoning Video Object Segmentation
summary: Reasoning video object segmentation predicts pixel-level masks in videos from natural-language queries that may involve implicit and temporally grounded references. However, existing methods are developed and evaluated in an offline regime, where the entire video is available at inference time and future frames can be exploited for retrospective disambiguation, deviating from real-world deployments that require strictly causal, frame-by-frame decisions. We study Online Reasoning Video Object Segmentation (ORVOS), where models must incrementally interpret queries using only past and current frames without revisiting previous predictions, while handling referent shifts as events unfold. To support evaluation, we introduce ORVOSB, a benchmark with frame-level causal annotations and referent-shift labels, comprising 210 videos, 12,907 annotated frames, and 512 queries across five reasoning categories. We further propose a baseline with continually-updated segmentation prompts and a structured temporal token reservoir for long-horizon reasoning under bounded computation. Experiments show that existing methods struggle under strict causality and referent shifts, while our baseline establishes a strong foundation for future research.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在线推理视频目标分割（ORVOS），要求模型仅使用过去和当前帧进行因果、逐帧决策，处理指代转移问题，并提出了ORVOSB基准和基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频目标分割方法通常在离线环境下开发，可以利用整个视频信息进行回溯消歧，这与实际部署中需要严格因果、逐帧决策的场景不符。论文旨在研究在线推理视频目标分割，要求模型仅基于过去和当前帧进行增量推理，同时处理视频中可能发生的指代转移。
AI.method: 提出了ORVOSB基准，包含210个视频、12,907个标注帧和512个查询，涵盖五种推理类别，具有帧级因果标注和指代转移标签。同时提出了基线方法，采用持续更新的分割提示和结构化时序令牌库，在有限计算下实现长时程推理。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有方法在严格因果性和指代转移条件下表现不佳，而提出的基线方法为未来研究建立了坚实基础，展示了在线推理视频目标分割的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 在线推理视频目标分割是一个具有挑战性但重要的研究方向，ORVOSB基准和基线方法为这一领域的发展提供了评估框架和技术基础，未来需要更多关注因果推理和实时决策的研究。

title: Probabilistic Prediction of Neural Dynamics via Autoregressive Flow Matching
summary: Forecasting neural activity in response to naturalistic stimuli remains a key challenge for understanding brain dynamics and enabling downstream neurotechnological applications. Here, we introduce a generative forecasting framework for modeling neural dynamics based on autoregressive flow matching (AFM). Building on recent advances in transport-based generative modeling, our approach probabilistically predicts neural responses at scale from multimodal sensory input. Specifically, we learn the conditional distribution of future neural activity given past neural dynamics and concurrent sensory input, explicitly modeling neural activity as a temporally evolving process in which future states depend on recent neural history. We evaluate our framework on the Algonauts project 2025 challenge functional magnetic resonance imaging dataset using subject-specific models. AFM significantly outperforms both a non-autoregressive flow-matching baseline and the official challenge general linear model baseline in predicting short-term parcel-wise blood oxygenation level-dependent (BOLD) activity, demonstrating improved generalization and widespread cortical prediction performance. Ablation analyses show that access to past BOLD dynamics is a dominant driver of performance, while autoregressive factorization yields consistent, modest gains under short-horizon, context-rich conditions. Together, these findings position autoregressive flow-based generative modeling as an effective approach for short-term probabilistic forecasting of neural dynamics with promising applications in closed-loop neurotechnology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自回归流匹配的生成式预测框架，用于建模神经动态，能够从多模态感官输入中概率性地预测大规模神经响应，在短期BOLD活动预测上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 预测自然刺激下的神经活动是理解大脑动态和实现神经技术应用的关键挑战。现有方法在建模神经动态的时序依赖性和概率性预测方面存在局限。
AI.method: 提出自回归流匹配框架，基于传输的生成建模方法，学习给定过去神经动态和并发感官输入的未来神经活动条件分布，将神经活动建模为时间演化过程。
AI.result: 在Algonauts项目2025挑战fMRI数据集上，AFM显著优于非自回归流匹配基线和官方GLM基线，在短期BOLD活动预测上表现出更好的泛化能力和广泛皮层预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 自回归流基生成建模是短期神经动态概率预测的有效方法，在闭环神经技术中具有应用前景。过去BOLD动态是性能的主要驱动因素。

title: Observe Less, Understand More: Cost-aware Cross-scale Observation for Remote Sensing Understanding
summary: Remote sensing understanding inherently requires multi-resolution observation, since different targets and application tasks demand different levels of spatial detail. While low-resolution (LR) imagery enables efficient global observation, high-resolution (HR) imagery provides critical local details at much higher acquisition cost and limited coverage. This motivates a cross-scale sensing strategy that selectively acquires HR imagery from LR-based global perception to improve task performance under constrained cost. Existing methods for HR sampling methods typically make selection decisions from isolated LR patches, which ignore fine-grained intra-patch importance and cross-patch contextual interactions, leading to fragmented feature representation and suboptimal scene reasoning under sparse HR observations. To address this issue, we formulate cross-scale remote sensing understanding as a unified cost-aware problem that couples fine-grained HR sampling with cross-patch representation prediction, enabling more effective task reasoning with fewer HR observations. Furthermore, we present GL-10M, a large-scale benchmark of 10 million spatially aligned multi-resolution images, enabling systematic evaluation of budget-constrained cross-scale reasoning in remote sensing. Extensive experiments on recognition and retrieval tasks show that our method consistently achieves a superior performance-cost trade-off.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种跨尺度遥感理解方法，将细粒度高分辨率采样与跨块表示预测相结合，在成本约束下实现更有效的任务推理，并构建了包含1000万张空间对齐多分辨率图像的大规模基准GL-10M。
AI.motivation: 遥感理解需要多分辨率观测，但高分辨率图像获取成本高、覆盖范围有限。现有高分辨率采样方法通常从孤立的低分辨率块中做出选择决策，忽略了细粒度块内重要性和跨块上下文交互，导致稀疏高分辨率观测下的碎片化特征表示和次优场景推理。
AI.method: 将跨尺度遥感理解制定为统一的成本感知问题，耦合细粒度高分辨率采样与跨块表示预测，实现用更少高分辨率观测进行更有效的任务推理。同时构建了包含1000万张空间对齐多分辨率图像的大规模基准GL-10M。
AI.result: 在识别和检索任务上的大量实验表明，该方法始终实现了优越的性能-成本权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过统一的成本感知框架，结合细粒度采样和跨块表示预测，显著提高了稀疏高分辨率观测下的遥感理解性能，为预算受限的跨尺度推理提供了系统评估基准。

title: CapBench: A Multi-PDK Dataset for Machine-Learning-Based Post-Layout Capacitance Extraction
comment: Accepted at the 63rd ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference (DAC '26). 7 pages, 5 figures
summary: We present CapBench, a fully reproducible, multi-PDK dataset for capacitance extraction. The dataset is derived from open-source designs, including single-core CPUs, systems-on-chip, and media accelerators. All designs are fully placed and routed using 14 independent OpenROAD flow runs spanning three technology nodes: ASAP7, NanGate45, and Sky130HD. From these layouts, we extract 61,855 3D windows across three size tiers to enable transfer learning and scalability studies. High-fidelity capacitance labels are generated using RWCap, a state-of-the-art random-walk solver, and validated against the industry-standard Raphael, achieving a mean absolute error of 0.64% for total capacitance. Each window is pre-processed into density maps, graph representations, and point clouds. We evaluate 10 machine learning architectures that illustrate dataset usage and serve as baselines, including convolutional neural networks (CNNs), point cloud transformers, and graph neural networks (GNNs). CNNs demonstrate the lowest errors (1.75%), while GNNs are up to 41.4x faster but exhibit larger errors (10.2%), illustrating a clear accuracy-speed trade-off. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/THU-numbda/CapBench.

AI.tldr: CapBench是一个用于电容提取的可复现多PDK数据集，包含61,855个3D窗口，覆盖三个工艺节点，提供高精度电容标签，并评估了10种机器学习架构的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前电容提取领域缺乏可复现、多工艺节点的基准数据集，限制了机器学习方法在电子设计自动化中的应用和比较。
AI.method: 从开源设计中提取布局数据，使用OpenROAD流程在三个工艺节点上完成布局布线，通过RWCap随机游走求解器生成高精度电容标签，并将数据预处理为密度图、图表示和点云格式。
AI.result: CNN架构达到最低误差（1.75%），GNN速度最快（比CNN快41.4倍）但误差较大（10.2%），展示了精度与速度的权衡。数据集与行业标准Raphael的平均绝对误差为0.64%。
AI.conclusion: CapBench为电容提取提供了首个可复现的多PDK基准数据集，支持机器学习方法的研究和比较，揭示了不同架构在精度和速度上的权衡。

title: HuiYanEarth-SAR: A Foundation Model for High-Fidelity and Low-Cost Global Remote Sensing Imagery Generation
summary: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imagery generation is essential for deepening the study of scattering mechanisms, establishing trustworthy electromagnetic scene models, and fundamentally alleviating the data scarcity bottleneck that constrains development in this field. However, existing methods find it difficult to simultaneously ensure high fidelity in both global geospatial semantics and microscopic scattering mechanisms, resulting in severe challenges for global generation. To address this, we propose \textbf{HuiYanEarth-SAR}, the first foundational SAR imagery generation model based on AlphaEarth and integrated scattering mechanisms. By injecting geospatial priors to control macroscopic structures and utilizing implicit scattering characteristic modeling to ensure the authenticity of microscopic textures, we achieve the capability of generating high-fidelity SAR images for global locations solely based on geographic coordinates. This study not only constructs an efficient SAR scene simulator but also establishes a bridge connecting geography, scatter mechanism, and artificial intelligence from a methodological standpoint. It advances SAR research by expanding the paradigm from perception and understanding to simulation and creation, providing key technical support for constructing a high-confidence digital twin of the Earth.

AI.tldr: 首个基于AlphaEarth和散射机制融合的SAR图像生成基础模型，能够仅根据地理坐标生成高保真全球SAR图像，连接地理、散射机制与人工智能。
AI.motivation: SAR图像生成对于研究散射机制、建立可信电磁场景模型、缓解数据稀缺瓶颈至关重要。现有方法难以同时保证全局地理语义和微观散射机制的高保真度，导致全局生成面临严重挑战。
AI.method: 提出HuiYanEarth-SAR模型，通过注入地理空间先验来控制宏观结构，利用隐式散射特征建模确保微观纹理真实性，实现仅基于地理坐标生成全球位置的高保真SAR图像。
AI.result: 构建了高效的SAR场景模拟器，在方法学上建立了连接地理、散射机制和人工智能的桥梁，将SAR研究范式从感知理解扩展到模拟创造。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为构建高置信度的地球数字孪生体提供了关键技术支撑，推动了SAR领域从感知理解到模拟创造的研究范式扩展。

title: Beyond Model Design: Data-Centric Training and Self-Ensemble for Gaussian Color Image Denoising
summary: This paper presents our solution to the NTIRE 2026 Image Denoising Challenge (Gaussian color image denoising at fixed noise level $σ= 50$). Rather than proposing a new restoration backbone, we revisit the performance boundary of the mature Restormer architecture from two complementary directions: stronger data-centric training and more complete Test-Time capability release. Starting from the public Restormer $σ\!=\!50$ baseline, we expand the standard multi-dataset training recipe with larger and more diverse public image corpora and organize optimization into two stages. At inference, we apply $\times 8$ geometric self-ensemble to further release model capacity. A TLC-style local inference wrapper is retained for implementation consistency; however, systematic ablation reveals its quantitative contribution to be negligible in this setting. On the challenge validation set of 100 images, our final submission achieves 30.762 dB PSNR and 0.861 SSIM, improving over the public Restormer $σ\!=\!50$ pretrained baseline by up to 3.366 dB PSNR. Ablation studies show that the dominant gain originates from the expanded training corpus and the two-stage optimization schedule, and self-ensemble provides marginal but consistent improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Restormer架构的图像去噪解决方案，通过更强的数据驱动训练和更完整的测试时能力释放来提升性能，在NTIRE 2026挑战赛上取得了显著改进。
AI.motivation: 本文的动机是探索成熟Restormer架构的性能边界，而不是提出新的网络结构。作者认为通过数据中心的训练优化和测试时能力释放，可以在现有架构基础上实现显著性能提升。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）扩展训练数据，使用更大更多样的公共图像语料库；2）两阶段优化训练策略；3）推理时应用8倍几何自集成；4）保留TLC风格的本地推理包装器（但发现其贡献可忽略）。
AI.result: 在挑战赛验证集上，最终提交达到了30.762 dB PSNR和0.861 SSIM，相比公开的Restormer σ=50预训练基线提升了高达3.366 dB PSNR。消融研究表明主要增益来自扩展的训练语料库和两阶段优化计划。
AI.conclusion: 结论表明，即使不改变网络架构，通过数据中心的训练优化和测试时技术也能显著提升图像去噪性能。这为现有成熟架构的性能挖掘提供了有效路径。

title: Regional Explanations: Bridging Local and Global Variable Importance
comment: Accepted at the 39th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2025)
summary: We analyze two widely used local attribution methods, Local Shapley Values and LIME, which aim to quantify the contribution of a feature value $x_i$ to a specific prediction $f(x_1, \dots, x_p)$. Despite their widespread use, we identify fundamental limitations in their ability to reliably detect locally important features, even under ideal conditions with exact computations and independent features. We argue that a sound local attribution method should not assign importance to features that neither influence the model output (e.g., features with zero coefficients in a linear model) nor exhibit statistical dependence with functionality-relevant features. We demonstrate that both Local SV and LIME violate this fundamental principle. To address this, we propose R-LOCO (Regional Leave Out COvariates), which bridges the gap between local and global explanations and provides more accurate attributions. R-LOCO segments the input space into regions with similar feature importance characteristics. It then applies global attribution methods within these regions, deriving an instance's feature contributions from its regional membership. This approach delivers more faithful local attributions while avoiding local explanation instability and preserving instance-specific detail often lost in global methods.

AI.tldr: 论文分析了局部归因方法Local Shapley Values和LIME的根本局限性，提出R-LOCO方法通过区域化解决这些问题，提供更准确的局部特征重要性解释。
AI.motivation: 尽管Local Shapley Values和LIME被广泛使用，但作者发现这些方法即使在理想条件下也无法可靠地检测局部重要特征。它们会错误地将重要性分配给既不影响模型输出也不与功能相关特征有统计依赖的特征，违反了局部归因方法的基本原则。
AI.method: 提出R-LOCO（Regional Leave Out COvariates）方法：1）将输入空间分割成具有相似特征重要性特征的区域；2）在这些区域内应用全局归因方法；3）根据实例的区域成员资格推导其特征贡献。这种方法结合了局部和全局解释的优点。
AI.result: R-LOCO方法提供了更忠实的局部归因，避免了局部解释的不稳定性，同时保留了全局方法中常丢失的实例特定细节。该方法在理论上和实践上都优于现有的局部归因方法。
AI.conclusion: 现有局部归因方法存在根本缺陷，R-LOCO通过区域化方法有效解决了这些问题，为模型可解释性提供了更可靠的工具。该方法在局部解释的准确性和稳定性方面都有显著改进。

title: Degradation-Aware and Structure-Preserving Diffusion for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
summary: Real-world image super-resolution is particularly challenging for diffusion models because real degradations are complex, heterogeneous, and rarely modeled explicitly. We propose a degradation-aware and structure-preserving diffusion framework for real-world SR. Specifically, we introduce Degradation-aware Token Injection, which encodes lightweight degradation statistics from low-resolution inputs and fuses them with semantic conditioning features, enabling explicit degradation-aware restoration. We further propose Spatially Asymmetric Noise Injection, which modulates diffusion noise with local edge strength to better preserve structural regions during training. Both modules are lightweight add-ons to the adopted diffusion SR framework, requiring only minor modifications to the conditioning pipeline. Experiments on DIV2K and RealSR show that our method delivers competitive no-reference perceptual quality and visually more realistic restoration results than recent baselines, while maintaining a favorable perception--distortion trade-off. Ablations confirm the effectiveness of each module and their complementary gains when combined. The code and model are publicly available at https://github.com/jiyang0315/DASP-SR.git.

AI.tldr: 提出DASP-SR框架，通过退化感知令牌注入和空间非对称噪声注入，在扩散模型中实现真实世界图像超分辨率，保持结构并提升感知质量。
AI.motivation: 真实世界图像超分辨率面临挑战，因为真实退化复杂、异构且很少被显式建模。现有扩散模型在真实场景SR中难以处理复杂的退化模式，需要更有效的退化感知和结构保持机制。
AI.method: 1. 退化感知令牌注入：从低分辨率输入编码轻量级退化统计信息，与语义条件特征融合，实现显式的退化感知恢复。2. 空间非对称噪声注入：根据局部边缘强度调制扩散噪声，在训练过程中更好地保持结构区域。两个模块都是轻量级附加组件，只需对条件管道进行微小修改。
AI.result: 在DIV2K和RealSR数据集上的实验表明，该方法在无参考感知质量方面具有竞争力，视觉上比现有基线更真实，同时保持良好的感知-失真权衡。消融研究证实了每个模块的有效性及其组合时的互补增益。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DASP-SR框架通过显式退化感知和结构保持机制，有效解决了真实世界图像超分辨率的挑战，在保持良好感知-失真权衡的同时提供更真实的恢复结果。

title: Trustworthy Feature Importance Avoids Unrestricted Permutations
summary: Feature importance methods using unrestricted permutations are flawed due to extrapolation errors; such errors appear in all non-trivial variable importance approaches. We propose three new approaches: conditional model reliance and Knockoffs with Gaussian transformation, and restricted ALE plot designs. Theoretical and numerical results show our strategies reduce/eliminate extrapolation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出三种新方法解决特征重要性分析中的外推误差问题：条件模型依赖、高斯变换的Knockoffs和受限ALE图设计，理论数值结果证明能减少/消除外推误差。
AI.motivation: 现有基于无限制排列的特征重要性方法存在外推误差问题，这种误差在所有非平凡变量重要性方法中都会出现，需要新的方法来减少或消除这种误差。
AI.method: 提出三种新方法：1) 条件模型依赖，2) 高斯变换的Knockoffs方法，3) 受限ALE图设计。这些方法通过限制排列空间或使用条件分布来避免外推。
AI.result: 理论和数值结果表明，提出的策略能够显著减少或完全消除特征重要性分析中的外推误差，提高了变量重要性估计的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 通过条件模型依赖、Knockoffs和受限ALE图设计这三种方法，可以有效解决特征重要性分析中的外推误差问题，为更可靠的变量重要性评估提供了新工具。

title: PACO: Proxy-Task Alignment and Online Calibration for On-the-Fly Category Discovery
summary: On-the-Fly Category Discovery (OCD) requires a model, trained on an offline support set, to recognize known classes while discovering new ones from an online streaming sequence. Existing methods focus heavily on offline training. They aim to learn discriminative representations on the support set so that novel classes can be separated at test time. However, their discovery mechanism at inference is typically reduced to a single threshold. We argue that this paradigm is fundamentally flawed as OCD is not a static classification problem, but a dynamic process. The model must continuously decide 1) whether a sample belongs to a known class, 2) matches an existing novel category, or 3) should initiate a new one. Moreover, prior methods treat the support set as fixed knowledge. They do not update their decision boundaries as new evidence arrives during inference. This leads to unstable and inconsistent category formation. Our experiments confirm these issues. With properly calibrated and adaptive thresholds, substantial improvements can be achieved, even without changing the representation. Motivated by this, we propose PACO, a support-set-calibrated, tree-structured online decision framework. The framework models inference as a sequence of hierarchical decisions, including known-class routing, birth-aware novel assignment, and attach-versus-create operations over a dynamic prototype memory. Furthermore, we simulate the proxy discovery process to initialize the thresholds during offline training to align with inference. Thresholds are continuously updated during inference using mature novel prototypes. Importantly, PACO requires no heavy training and no dataset-specific tuning. It can be directly integrated into existing OCD pipelines as an inference-time module. Extensive experiments show significant improvements over SOTA baselines across seven benchmarks.

AI.tldr: OCD任务需要模型在离线训练后，在线流式序列中同时识别已知类别并发现新类别。现有方法过度依赖离线训练，使用单一阈值进行发现，忽略了OCD的动态本质。本文提出PACO框架，通过支持集校准的树状在线决策机制，实现层次化决策和动态原型记忆更新，显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有OCD方法存在根本缺陷：1) 将动态的在线发现过程简化为静态分类问题；2) 仅使用单一阈值进行新类别发现；3) 将支持集视为固定知识，不随新证据更新决策边界；4) 导致不稳定和不一致的类别形成。实验表明，通过适当校准和自适应阈值，即使不改变表示也能显著改进。
AI.method: 提出PACO框架：1) 支持集校准的树状在线决策框架，将推理建模为层次化决策序列；2) 包括已知类别路由、出生感知的新类别分配、动态原型记忆的附着与创建操作；3) 通过模拟代理发现过程在离线训练时初始化阈值以对齐推理；4) 在推理期间使用成熟的新原型持续更新阈值；5) 无需重训练或数据集特定调优，可直接集成到现有OCD流程中作为推理时模块。
AI.result: 在七个基准测试上的广泛实验显示，PACO相比SOTA基线取得显著改进。该方法证明了通过适当的推理时决策机制，即使使用相同的表示学习也能大幅提升OCD性能。
AI.conclusion: OCD应被视为动态过程而非静态分类问题。PACO通过支持集校准的树状在线决策框架，解决了现有方法的根本缺陷，实现了更稳定和一致的类别发现，且无需额外训练开销。

title: Signal-Aware Conditional Diffusion Surrogates for Transonic Wing Pressure Prediction
summary: Accurate and efficient surrogate models for aerodynamic surface pressure fields are essential for accelerating aircraft design and analysis, yet deterministic regressors trained with pointwise losses often smooth sharp nonlinear features. This work presents a conditional denoising diffusion probabilistic model for predicting surface pressure distributions on the NASA Common Research Model wing under varying conditions of Mach number, angle of attack, and four control surface deflections. The framework operates on unstructured surface data through a principal component representation used as a non-truncated, reversible linear reparameterization of the pressure field, enabling a fully connected architecture. A signal-aware training objective is derived by propagating a reconstruction loss through the diffusion process, yielding a timestep-dependent weighting that improves fidelity in regions with strong pressure gradients. The stochastic sampling process is analyzed through repeated conditional generations, and two diagnostic metrics are introduced, the Local Reliability Index and Global Reliability Index, to relate sampling-induced spread to reconstruction error. Relative to the considered deterministic baselines, the proposed formulation reduces mean absolute error and improves the reconstruction of suction peaks, shock structures, and control surface discontinuities. The sampling-induced spread exhibits strong correspondence with surrogate error, supporting its interpretation as a qualitative reliability indicator rather than calibrated uncertainty quantification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于预测NASA通用研究模型机翼表面压力分布的扩散概率模型，通过条件生成和信号感知训练目标，相比确定性基线方法提高了精度并更好地重建了压力梯度特征。
AI.motivation: 传统确定性回归器使用逐点损失训练时往往会平滑尖锐的非线性特征，而气动表面压力场的准确高效代理模型对加速飞机设计和分析至关重要。需要能够捕捉压力梯度、激波结构和控制面不连续性的模型。
AI.method: 提出了条件去噪扩散概率模型，使用主成分表示作为非截断、可逆的线性重参数化来处理非结构化表面数据。推导了信号感知训练目标，通过扩散过程传播重建损失，得到时间步相关的权重以改善压力梯度区域保真度。引入了局部可靠性指数和全局可靠性指数两个诊断指标。
AI.result: 相比考虑的确定性基线方法，提出的方法减少了平均绝对误差，改善了吸力峰值、激波结构和控制面不连续性的重建。采样诱导的扩散与代理误差有强相关性，支持其作为定性可靠性指标而非校准不确定性量化的解释。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型在气动表面压力场预测中优于传统确定性方法，能够更好地捕捉非线性特征。采样扩散可以作为模型可靠性的定性指标，为工程应用提供有用的不确定性信息。

title: NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Robust AI-Generated Image Detection in the Wild
comment: CVPR 2026 NTIRE Workshop Paper, Robust AI-Generated Image Detection Technical Report
summary: This paper presents an overview of the NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Robust AI-Generated Image Detection in the Wild, held in conjunction with the NTIRE workshop at CVPR 2026. The goal of this challenge was to develop detection models capable of distinguishing real images from generated ones in realistic scenarios: the images are often transformed (cropped, resized, compressed, blurred) for practical usage, and therefore, the detection models should be robust to such transformations. The challenge is based on a novel dataset consisting of 108,750 real and 185,750 AI-generated images from 42 generators comprising a large variety of open-source and closed-source models of various architectures, augmented with 36 image transformations. Methods were evaluated using ROC AUC on the full test set, including both transformed and untransformed images. A total of 511 participants registered, with 20 teams submitting valid final solutions. This report provides a comprehensive overview of the challenge, describes the proposed solutions, and can be used as a valuable reference for researchers and practitioners in increasing the robustness of the detection models to real-world transformations.

AI.tldr: NTIRE 2026挑战赛专注于开发鲁棒的AI生成图像检测模型，要求模型能够识别经过裁剪、压缩、模糊等真实世界变换的图像，使用包含108,750张真实图像和185,750张AI生成图像的大规模数据集进行评测。
AI.motivation: 随着AI生成图像技术的快速发展，检测真实图像与AI生成图像的需求日益增长。然而，实际应用中图像经常经过各种变换（如压缩、裁剪、调整大小等），现有检测模型对这些变换的鲁棒性不足，因此需要开发能够在真实场景中稳定工作的检测方法。
AI.method: 挑战赛基于包含42种不同生成器（开源和闭源）的大规模数据集，包含108,750张真实图像和185,750张AI生成图像，并使用36种图像变换进行数据增强。参赛团队需要开发能够处理这些变换的检测模型，使用ROC AUC作为主要评估指标。
AI.result: 挑战赛吸引了511名参与者注册，20个团队提交了有效解决方案。通过竞赛推动了鲁棒AI生成图像检测技术的发展，为研究人员提供了有价值的参考，展示了当前最先进方法在真实世界变换下的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛成功推动了AI生成图像检测技术在真实场景中的应用，强调了模型鲁棒性的重要性。提出的解决方案和数据集为未来研究提供了重要基准，有助于开发更可靠的AI内容检测系统。

title: RoboLab: A High-Fidelity Simulation Benchmark for Analysis of Task Generalist Policies
summary: The pursuit of general-purpose robotics has yielded impressive foundation models, yet simulation-based benchmarking remains a bottleneck due to rapid performance saturation and a lack of true generalization testing. Existing benchmarks often exhibit significant domain overlap between training and evaluation, trivializing success rates and obscuring insights into robustness. We introduce RoboLab, a simulation benchmarking framework designed to address these challenges. Concretely, our framework is designed to answer two questions: (1) to what extent can we understand the performance of a real-world policy by analyzing its behavior in simulation, and (2) which external factors most strongly affect that behavior under controlled perturbations. First, RoboLab enables human-authored and LLM-enabled generation of scenes and tasks in a robot- and policy-agnostic manner within a physically realistic and photorealistic simulation. With this, we propose the RoboLab-120 benchmark, consisting of 120 tasks categorized into three competency axes: visual, procedural, relational competency, across three difficulty levels. Second, we introduce a systematic analysis of real-world policies that quantify both their performance and the sensitivity of their behavior to controlled perturbations, indicating that high-fidelity simulation can serve as a proxy for analyzing performance and its dependence on external factors. Evaluation with RoboLab exposes significant performance gap in current state-of-the-art models. By providing granular metrics and a scalable toolset, RoboLab offers a scalable framework for evaluating the true generalization capabilities of task-generalist robotic policies.

AI.tldr: RoboLab是一个机器人仿真基准测试框架，通过生成多样化场景和任务来评估策略的真实泛化能力，并分析外部因素对行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人基准测试存在训练与评估领域重叠、性能快速饱和、缺乏真实泛化测试等问题，无法有效评估策略的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 1) 开发RoboLab框架，支持人工和LLM生成场景任务；2) 提出RoboLab-120基准，包含120个任务，按视觉、程序、关系三个能力轴和三个难度级别分类；3) 系统分析真实世界策略，量化性能和对受控扰动的敏感性。
AI.result: 评估显示当前最先进模型存在显著性能差距，高保真仿真可作为分析性能及其对外部因素依赖的代理。
AI.conclusion: RoboLab提供了可扩展的框架和细粒度指标，用于评估任务通用机器人策略的真实泛化能力。

title: TAG-Head: Time-Aligned Graph Head for Plug-and-Play Fine-grained Action Recognition
comment: 15 pages, 3 figures, to appear in ICPR 2026
summary: Fine-grained human action recognition (FHAR) is challenging because visually similar actions differ by subtle spatio-temporal cues. Many recent systems enhance discriminability with extra modalities (e.g., pose, text, optical flow), but this increases annotation burden and computational cost. We introduce TAG-Head, a lightweight spatio-temporal graph head that upgrades standard 3D backbones (SlowFast, R(2+1)D-34, I3D, etc.) for FHAR using RGB only. Our pipeline first applies a Transformer encoder with learnable 3D positional encodings to the backbone tokens, capturing long-range dependencies across space and time. The resulting features are then refined by a graph in which (i) fully-connected intra-frame edges to resolve subtle appearance differences within frames, and (ii) time-aligned temporal edges that connect features at the same spatial location across frames to stabilise motion cues without over-smoothing. The head is compact (little parameter/FLOP overhead), plug-and-play across backbones, and trained end-to-end with the backbone. Extensive evaluations on FineGym (Gym99 and Gym288) and HAA500 show that TAG-Head sets a new state-of-the-art among RGB-only models and surpasses many recent multimodal approaches (video + pose + text) that rely on privileged information. Ablations disentangle the contributions of the Transformer and the graph topology, and complexity analyses confirm low latency. TAG-Head advances FHAR by explicitly coupling global context with high-resolution spatial interactions and low-variance temporal continuity inside a slim, composable graph head. The simplicity of the design enables straightforward adoption in practical systems that favour RGB-only sensors, while delivering performance gains typically associated with heavier or multimodal models. Code will be released on GitHub.

AI.tldr: TAG-Head是一个轻量级时空图头，仅使用RGB视频就能提升3D主干网络在细粒度人类动作识别中的性能，通过Transformer编码器捕获长程依赖，并通过全连接帧内边和时间对齐边来增强时空特征。
AI.motivation: 细粒度人类动作识别（FHAR）具有挑战性，因为视觉相似的动作仅通过微妙的时空线索区分。现有方法通常依赖额外模态（如姿态、文本、光流）来提高判别能力，但这增加了标注负担和计算成本。作者希望开发一种仅使用RGB的轻量级方法，在保持高效的同时达到或超越多模态方法的性能。
AI.method: TAG-Head是一个可插拔的时空图头，可与标准3D主干网络（如SlowFast、R(2+1)D-34、I3D）结合使用。方法包含两个主要组件：1）使用可学习3D位置编码的Transformer编码器处理主干特征，捕获跨时空的长程依赖；2）图结构包含两种边：全连接帧内边（解决帧内细微外观差异）和时间对齐边（连接跨帧相同空间位置的特征，稳定运动线索而不过度平滑）。整个系统端到端训练，参数和计算开销小。
AI.result: 在FineGym（Gym99和Gym288）和HAA500数据集上的广泛评估表明，TAG-Head在仅使用RGB的模型中达到了新的最先进水平，甚至超越了许多依赖额外模态（视频+姿态+文本）的近期多模态方法。消融实验分离了Transformer和图拓扑的贡献，复杂度分析确认了低延迟。
AI.conclusion: TAG-Head通过在一个轻量级、可组合的图头中显式耦合全局上下文与高分辨率空间交互以及低方差时间连续性，推进了细粒度人类动作识别。该设计的简洁性使其易于在实际系统中采用，同时提供了通常与更重或更多模态模型相关的性能提升。

title: Automating Structural Analysis Across Multiple Software Platforms Using Large Language Models
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have shown the promise to significantly accelerate the workflow by automating structural modeling and analysis. However, existing studies primarily focus on enabling LLMs to operate a single structural analysis software platform. In practice, structural engineers often rely on multiple finite element analysis (FEA) tools, such as ETABS, SAP2000, and OpenSees, depending on project needs, user preferences, and company constraints. This limitation restricts the practical deployment of LLM-assisted engineering workflows. To address this gap, this study develops LLMs capable of automating frame structural analysis across multiple software platforms. The LLMs adopt a two-stage multi-agent architecture. In Stage 1, a cohort of agents collaboratively interpret user input and perform structured reasoning to infer geometric, material, boundary, and load information required for finite element modeling. The outputs of these agents are compiled into a unified JSON representation. In Stage 2, code translation agents operate in parallel to convert the JSON file into executable scripts across multiple structural analysis platforms. Each agent is prompted with the syntax rules and modeling workflows of its target software. The LLMs are evaluated using 20 representative frame problems across three widely used platforms: ETABS, SAP2000, and OpenSees. Results from ten repeated trials demonstrate consistently reliable performance, achieving accuracy exceeding 90% across all cases.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了能够跨多个结构分析软件平台（ETABS、SAP2000、OpenSees）自动化框架结构分析的LLM系统，采用两阶段多智能体架构，实现超过90%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM研究主要关注单一结构分析软件平台，但实际工程中结构工程师常依赖多种有限元分析工具（ETABS、SAP2000、OpenSees），这限制了LLM辅助工程工作流的实际部署。
AI.method: 采用两阶段多智能体架构：第一阶段，多个智能体协作解释用户输入并进行结构化推理，推断有限元建模所需的几何、材料、边界和荷载信息，输出统一JSON表示；第二阶段，代码翻译智能体并行工作，将JSON文件转换为跨多个结构分析平台的可执行脚本，每个智能体都针对目标软件的语法规则和建模工作流进行提示。
AI.result: 在三个广泛使用的平台（ETABS、SAP2000、OpenSees）上使用20个代表性框架问题进行评估，十次重复试验显示性能稳定可靠，所有案例准确率超过90%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功开发了能够跨多个软件平台自动化结构分析的LLM系统，解决了实际工程中多软件环境下的部署限制，为LLM在工程工作流中的实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: BRIDGE and TCH-Net: Heterogeneous Benchmark and Multi-Branch Baseline for Cross-Domain IoT Botnet Detection
comment: 21 pages, 8 figures, submitted to Journal of Network and Computer Applications
summary: IoT botnet detection has advanced, yet most published systems are validated on a single dataset and rarely generalise across environments. Heterogeneous feature spaces make multi-dataset training practically impossible without discarding semantic interpretability or introducing data integrity violations. No prior work has addressed both problems with a formally specified, reproducible methodology. This paper does. We introduce BRIDGE (Benchmark Reference for IoT Domain Generalisation Evaluation), the first formally specified heterogeneous multi-dataset benchmark for IoT intrusion detection, unifying CICIDS-2017, CIC-IoT-2023, Bot-IoT, Edge-IIoTset, and N-BaIoT through a 46-feature semantic canonical vocabulary grounded in CICFlowMeter nomenclature, with genuine-equivalence-only feature mapping, explicit zero-filling, and per-dataset coverage from 15% to 93%. A leave-one-dataset-out (LODO) protocol makes the generalisation gap precisely measurable: all five evaluated architectures achieve mean LODO F1 between 0.39 and 0.47, and we establish the first community generalisation baseline at mean LODO F1 = 0.5577, a result that shifts the agenda from single-benchmark optimisation toward cross-environment generalisation. We propose TCH-Net, a multi-branch network fusing a three-path Temporal branch (residual convolutional-BiGRU, stride-downsampled BiGRU, pre-LayerNorm Transformer), a provenance-conditioned Contextual branch, and a Statistical branch via Cross-Branch Gated Attention Fusion (CB-GAF) with learnable sigmoid gates for dynamic feature-wise mixing. Across five random seeds, TCH-Net achieves F1 = 0.8296 +/- 0.0028, AUC = 0.9380 +/- 0.0025, and MCC = 0.6972 +/- 0.0056, outperforming all twelve baselines (p < 0.05, Wilcoxon) and recording the highest LODO F1 overall. BRIDGE and the full pipeline are at https://github.com/Ammar-ss/TCH-Net.

AI.tldr: 提出了BRIDGE基准和TCH-Net模型，解决IoT入侵检测中多数据集泛化问题，通过规范化特征空间和跨数据集评估协议，显著提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有IoT僵尸网络检测系统通常在单一数据集上验证，难以泛化到不同环境。异质特征空间使得多数据集训练困难，缺乏正式可复现的方法论来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 1. 提出BRIDGE基准：首个正式规范的异质多数据集IoT入侵检测基准，统一5个数据集到46个特征的语义规范词汇表；2. 采用留一数据集出(LODO)评估协议；3. 提出TCH-Net模型：融合时间分支（卷积-BiGRU、下采样BiGRU、Transformer）、上下文分支和统计分支，通过跨分支门控注意力融合进行动态特征混合。
AI.result: TCH-Net在5个随机种子下达到F1=0.8296±0.0028，AUC=0.9380±0.0025，MCC=0.6972±0.0056，显著优于12个基线模型(p<0.05)。建立了首个社区泛化基线(平均LODO F1=0.5577)，将研究重点从单基准优化转向跨环境泛化。
AI.conclusion: BRIDGE基准和TCH-Net模型为IoT入侵检测提供了首个正式的多数据集泛化评估框架，显著提升了模型在不同环境下的泛化能力，推动了该领域从单数据集优化向跨环境泛化的范式转变。

title: SVD-Prune: Training-Free Token Pruning For Efficient Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLM) have revolutionized multimodal learning by jointly processing visual and textual information. Yet, they face significant challenges due to the high computational and memory demands of processing long sequences of vision tokens. Many existing methods rely on local heuristics, such as attention scores or token norms. However, these criteria suffer from positional bias and information dispersion, limiting their ability to preserve essential content at high pruning ratios and leading to performance degradation on visually detailed images. To address these issues, we propose SVD-Prune, a trainingfree, plug-and-play token pruning method based on Singular Value Decomposition. It decomposes the vision token feature matrix and selects the top-K tokens using statistical leverage scores, ensuring only tokens contributing most to the dominant global variance are preserved. Experiments show that SVD-Prune consistently outperforms prior pruning methods under extreme vision token budgets, maintaining strong performance even with 32 and 16 vision tokens.

AI.tldr: 提出SVD-Prune方法，基于奇异值分解进行视觉token剪枝，无需训练即可在极低token预算下保持性能
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型处理长视觉token序列时计算和内存需求高，现有基于注意力分数或token范数的局部启发式方法存在位置偏差和信息分散问题，在高剪枝率下难以保留关键内容
AI.method: 基于奇异值分解的训练免费、即插即用token剪枝方法，通过分解视觉token特征矩阵，使用统计杠杆分数选择top-K token，确保只保留对主导全局方差贡献最大的token
AI.result: SVD-Prune在极端视觉token预算下（32和16个token）持续优于现有剪枝方法，在视觉细节丰富的图像上保持强性能
AI.conclusion: SVD-Prune通过全局统计方法有效解决视觉token剪枝中的位置偏差和信息分散问题，为高效视觉语言模型提供实用解决方案

title: CLAY: Conditional Visual Similarity Modulation in Vision-Language Embedding Space
summary: Human perception of visual similarity is inherently adaptive and subjective, depending on the users' interests and focus. However, most image retrieval systems fail to reflect this flexibility, relying on a fixed, monolithic metric that cannot incorporate multiple conditions simultaneously. To address this, we propose CLAY, an adaptive similarity computation method that reframes the embedding space of pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as a text-conditional similarity space without additional training. This design separates the textual conditioning process and visual feature extraction, allowing highly efficient and multi-conditioned retrieval with fixed visual embeddings. We also construct a synthetic evaluation dataset CLAY-EVAL, for comprehensive assessment under diverse conditioned retrieval settings. Experiments on standard datasets and our proposed dataset show that CLAY achieves high retrieval accuracy and notable computational efficiency compared to previous works.

AI.tldr: CLAY是一种自适应图像相似度计算方法，将预训练视觉语言模型的嵌入空间重构为文本条件相似度空间，无需额外训练即可实现多条件图像检索。
AI.motivation: 人类视觉相似性感知是自适应和主观的，取决于用户的兴趣和关注点。然而，大多数图像检索系统依赖固定的单一度量，无法同时纳入多个条件，无法反映这种灵活性。
AI.method: 将预训练视觉语言模型的嵌入空间重构为文本条件相似度空间，分离文本条件处理和视觉特征提取过程，使用固定的视觉嵌入实现高效多条件检索。还构建了合成评估数据集CLAY-EVAL。
AI.result: 在标准数据集和提出的数据集上的实验表明，CLAY相比先前工作实现了高检索准确率和显著的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: CLAY提供了一种无需训练的自适应相似度计算方法，能够有效支持多条件图像检索，在准确性和效率方面表现优异。

title: Progressively Texture-Aware Diffusion for Contrast-Enhanced Sparse-View CT
summary: Diffusion-based sparse-view CT (SVCT) imaging has achieved remarkable advancements in recent years, thanks to its more stable generative capability. However, recovering reliable image content and visually consistent textures is still a crucial challenge. In this paper, we present a Progressively Texture-aware Diffusion (PTD) model, a coarse-to-fine learning framework tailored for SVCT. Specifically, PTD comprises a basic reconstructive module PTD$_{\textit{rec}}$ and a conditional diffusion module PTD$_{\textit{diff}}$. PTD$_{\textit{rec}}$ first learns a deterministic mapping to recover the majority of the underlying low-frequency signals (i.e., coarse content with smoothed textures), which serves as the initial estimation to enable fidelity. Moreover, PTD$_{\textit{diff}}$ aims to reconstruct high-fidelity details for coarse prediction, which explores a dual-domain guided conditional diffusion to generate reliable and consistent textures. Extensive experiments on sparse-view CT reconstruction demonstrate that our PTD achieves superior performance in terms of structure similarity and visual appeal with only a few sampling steps, which mitigates the randomness inherent in general diffusion models and enables a better trade-off between visual quality and fidelity of high-frequency details.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于稀疏视图CT重建的渐进式纹理感知扩散模型（PTD），通过粗到细的学习框架结合确定性重建和条件扩散，在保持结构相似性的同时改善视觉纹理质量。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于扩散的稀疏视图CT成像取得了显著进展，但恢复可靠的图像内容和视觉一致的纹理仍然是一个关键挑战。现有方法在生成稳定性和纹理质量之间存在权衡。
AI.method: PTD包含两个模块：1) PTD_rec：学习确定性映射以恢复低频信号（粗糙内容和平滑纹理）；2) PTD_diff：条件扩散模块，通过双域引导的条件扩散生成可靠且一致的纹理细节。采用粗到细的学习框架。
AI.result: 在稀疏视图CT重建实验中，PTD在结构相似性和视觉吸引力方面表现出优越性能，仅需少量采样步骤，缓解了一般扩散模型的随机性，实现了视觉质量和高频细节保真度之间的更好权衡。
AI.conclusion: 提出的PTD模型通过结合确定性重建和条件扩散，有效解决了稀疏视图CT重建中的纹理恢复问题，在保持结构保真度的同时显著改善了视觉质量。

title: GlobalCY I: A JAX Framework for Globally Defined and Symmetry-Aware Neural Kähler Potentials
summary: We present \emph{GlobalCY}, a JAX-based framework for globally defined and symmetry-aware neural Kähler-potential models on projective hypersurface Calabi--Yau geometries. The central problem is that local-input neural Kähler-potential models can train successfully while still failing the geometry-sensitive diagnostics that matter in hard quartic regimes, especially near singular and near-singular members of the Cefalú family. To study this, we compare three model families -- a local-input baseline, a globally defined invariant model, and a symmetry-aware global model -- on the hard Cefalú cases $λ=0.75$ and $λ=1.0$ using a fixed multi-seed protocol and a geometry-aware diagnostic suite. In this benchmark, the globally defined invariant model is the strongest overall family, outperforming the local baseline on the two clearest geometric comparison metrics, negative-eigenvalue frequency and projective-invariance drift, in both cases. The gains are strongest at $λ=0.75$, while $λ=1.0$ remains more difficult. The current symmetry-aware model improves projective-invariance drift relative to the local baseline, but does not yet surpass the plain global invariant model. These results show that global invariant structure is a meaningful architectural constraint for learned Kähler-potential modeling in hard quartic Calabi--Yau settings.

AI.tldr: 提出了GlobalCY框架，用于在射影超曲面Calabi-Yau几何上构建全局定义且对称性感知的神经Kähler势模型。研究发现全局不变模型在硬四次Calabi-Yau设置中表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 局部输入的神经Kähler势模型虽然能够成功训练，但在硬四次区域（特别是接近奇异和近奇异Cefalú族成员时）无法通过几何敏感的诊断测试。需要开发全局定义且对称性感知的模型来解决这一问题。
